Title: Main Story (Normal) - 00 Prologue → Prologue 01 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
With the cessation of the 170th Corrupted activity signal, silence returns and takes over the noise.
The wounded Lucia lays disheveled over the heaps of broken Corrupted parts. Her chest heaving irregularly in an attempt to calm her own breathing.
[Lucia]: Commandant...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 00 Prologue → Prologue 02 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Corrupted]: Urgh—
[Corrupted]: Bzz..
[Lucia]: Commandant, this way...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 00 Prologue → Prologue 03 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Under the blinding sunlight from the church entrance, a mysterious female figure with an ashen head of hair steps forth.
[Liv]: It\'s a... Construct—an ally?
In an instant, electricity—of a ghostly red—arced around her.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 00 Prologue → Prologue 03 (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Sparks fly as the two blades clash...
But this time, Lucia\'s blade becomes redirected and whirls into the air...
[Liv]: Lucia!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 01 Graffiti Art → 1-1 A Brief Transit (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Next, we\'ll be reliving those missions in the sim, Commandant.
[Lucia]: The target for this sim battle is a spray-type infected unit called "Graffiti Artist."
[Lucia]: Even if we\'ve beaten them before, we can\'t afford to let our guard down.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 01 Graffiti Art → 1-1 A Brief Transit (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: That\'s the last two!
[Corrupted]: Urgh—
[Lucia]: Ah...! What?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 01 Graffiti Art → 1-2 Farewell Gift (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Construct Soldier]: Take my arm. It\'s likely not as good as your original one, but at least it\'s still army grade.
[Construct Soldier]: I can\'t even move a finger now. It will be of better use in your hands. Please, defeat the Corrupted. I\'ll be counting on you.
[Lucia]: ...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 01 Graffiti Art → 1-3 Graffiti Blast (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Everyone, we\'ve reached the coordinates of the weapon supplies—ah, this is...
[Lucia]: Such an eerie sight.
[Lucia]: The Constructs here are all blown to pieces, and paint is all over their body parts.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 01 Graffiti Art → 1-4 Full Strength (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Was I... of any help?
[Lucia]: The battle was a lot easier with your cannon support, Liv.
[Lee]: Well, it was the full force of Gray Raven.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 01 Graffiti Art → 1-5 Restoring Scene (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Initializing memory sequences...
[Liv]: Rendering simulation image...
...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 01 Graffiti Art → 1-6 Lost in Mist (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: I\'ve never heard of a Corrupted doing pranks before. Liv, can you check its original model?
[Liv]: ...Based on its shape and size, it is likely the painting model "Spray Can", also named Nozzle, from Cosmos Industries back in the middle Golden Age.
[Liv]: It was mainly used to paint large areas, but some models were used in performances, education, and artistic creations...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 01 Graffiti Art → 1-7 A Soft Heart (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[System]: Connecting—
[Celica]: Gray Ravens? This is Babylonia. Do you copy? Over.
[Lucia]: Miss Celica? What\'s the situation in Babylonia?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 01 Graffiti Art → 1-8 The Purpose (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: I... I\'m sorry for my behavior just now...
[Lucia]: Sorry, everyone...
[Lucia]: I don\'t know why, but when I saw this plushie, a strange yet familiar feeling welled up within me...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 01 Graffiti Art → 1-9 The Followers (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: We have breached the Corrupted frontlines. The Nozzle model is in sight!
[Liv]: Its coordinates show that it\'s been here for some time now... Is it painting again?
[Lee]: There are quite a few Corrupted protecting it. They\'re probably its followers—We\'d better brace for combat.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 01 Graffiti Art → 1-10 Base Color (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: You\'re locked on. There is no use to run.
[Graffiti Artist]: Hehe... Run?
[Lee]: You keep mentioning "Ascendants", what are those?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 01 Graffiti Art → 1-11 Self Analysis (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: What are you trying to express with these Graffiti?
[Graffiti Artist]: Y-you... asked... an artist...
[Graffiti Artist]: ...to explain... their... work...? What an... amateur... hehe...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 01 Graffiti Art → 1-12 Final Work (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: The Punishing Virus activity is becoming stronger inside this Nozzle model!
[Liv]: It\'s allowing the virus to overtake itself!
[Graffiti Artist]: No... choice... hehe...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 01 Graffiti Art → 1-12 Final Work (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
...
[Liv]: It went silent...
[Liv]: I don\'t know why, but... I feel sad...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 06 Alloy Contamination → 6-1 Tracking the Ascendant (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Celica]: And, that\'s all of Mr. Hassen\'s words.
[Lucia]: I still can\'t believe HQ would allow us to stay in Forsaken camps for a night...
[Lee]: They really are trying to use us as diplomatic envoys.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 06 Alloy Contamination → 6-2 Deep Under (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: Heh, how\'s it feel to play with the Corrupted within your M.I.N.D. last night?
[Kamui]: I\'m never losing to you!
[???]: In our M.I.N.D., I have slain virus embodiments tenfold of yours.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 06 Alloy Contamination → 6-2 Deep Under (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Watanabe]: Extermination target?! You\'re from the Purifying Force?!
[Nanami]: Hahaha! You\'re so easy to trick, ojisan!
[Nanami]: As if Nanami will be in the Purifying Force. Nanami was just imitating that nagging obasan from the Purifying Force.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 06 Alloy Contamination → 6-3 Mystery (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Corrupted]: —! —!
[Lucia]: The Corrupted here are getting stronger.
[Liv]: And there are some new ones as well...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 06 Alloy Contamination → 6-3 Mystery (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: I can\'t believe this Corrupted\'s memory shell data is encrypted... And in a way I\'ve never seen before too...
[Lucia]: Its attack mode has been redesigned before manufacturing too...
[Liv]: These designs... are all "efforts" of the Punishing Virus to destroy humanity?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 06 Alloy Contamination → 6-4 Powerful Reinforcement (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: Here! We! Go!
[Nanami]: 1 point for small fries! 10 points for the big fish!
[Nanami]: Nanami\'s hopping—in! To! The! Ring! YEAH!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 06 Alloy Contamination → 6-4 Powerful Reinforcement (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Everyone, I\'ve decrypted the memory shell of this kind of Corrupted.
[Liv]: There\'s a record of a battle with another strong Corrupted...
[Lucia]: Another Corrupted?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 06 Alloy Contamination → 6-5 Mind Noises (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: The viral density shot up suddenly in this area...
[Kamui]: Ugh...
[Liv]: Kamui, are you okay?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 06 Alloy Contamination → 6-6 Parting Ways (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: This is... the military factory... but the viral density is too high, ugh... I can\'t...
[Lee]: Commandant, please take this.
[Lee]: A new filtration device. Found nearby. Should at least lower some viral intake.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 06 Alloy Contamination → 6-7 Greater Threats (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: This should be the assembly department of the factory.
[Watanabe]: The Corrupted are assembled here one by one, then sent through the elevators onto the surface, terrorizing the Earth...
[Lucia]: Moving on his own in this situation...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 06 Alloy Contamination → 6-8 Detonation (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: These doors won\'t hold for long.
[Watanabe]: Enough to buy us time.
[Watanabe]: We split up. We can blow this place to pieces using the explosives that I brought with me.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 06 Alloy Contamination → 6-8 Detonation (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Watanabe, the structure on your side can\'t hold anymore! Please move away quickly! Do you hear me, Watanabe...
[Nanami]: Ol\' pops there wants to go on an explosive suicide run!
[Nanami]: Hm-hm, that\'s the first time Nanami\'s seen a human angry!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 06 Alloy Contamination → 6-9 Cleansing (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: Hey there, o-ji-san!
[Watanabe]: ...Why are you still here? Where are the others?
[Nanami]: It\'s all sorted! Everyone\'s ready to hop already!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 06 Alloy Contamination → 6-10 Retreat (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: A very unique Corrupted... It should have high research value for Babylonia.
[Liv]: I\'ll download its memory shell data first...
[Lucia]: Did it call my nam—

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 06 Alloy Contamination → 6-11 Cerberus (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: Pathetic, you can\'t even leave here...
[Kamui]: Shut up!
[Kamui]: When I find "Tenebrion" and cleanse the virus inside me, I won\'t need you anymore... and then...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 06 Alloy Contamination → 6-11 Cerberus (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Kamu...
[Vera]: Oh, good day, everyone!
[Vera]: Hello, my lovely Gray Ravens.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 06 Alloy Contamination → 6-12 Purifying Force (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Two outlines step out of the shadows.
[???]: Kamui of Strike Hawk? Heard he\'s a feisty one, what\'s he doing like this?
[???]: He is currently fighting the virus, and it has taken a toll on his capacity.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 06 Alloy Contamination → 6-12 Purifying Force (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Ugh... such... strength...
[Karenina]: I told you, don\'t mess with me.
[Kamui]: Lucia... it\'s enough... thank you...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 08 Consumed by Darkness → 8-1 Dawn (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Connection Request—E-02 Babylonia Private Channel
[Nikola]: Command here.
[Nikola]: Gray Raven Commandant! Are you aware of the risks of your actions?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 08 Consumed by Darkness → 8-1 Dawn (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Is it still intact?
[Liv]: There\'s a large amount of serum inside, and a new frame.
[Liv]: It\'s a frame for Lucia!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 08 Consumed by Darkness → 8-2 Potential Unlocked (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: M.I.N.D. connection with the new frame is stable. No issues yet.
[Lucia]: This way.
[Lucia]: The Corrupted on our path are increasing in numbers. Likely left behind by Roland to hinder us.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 08 Consumed by Darkness → 8-3 Obstacle (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: As I thought, the further we go, the more the Corrupted.
[Bianca]: Not wise to enact exactly what they intended us to.
[Lee]: Though corrupted, they are still only normal mechanoids. Their sensors still only consist of visual scanning devices.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 08 Consumed by Darkness → 8-3 Obstacle (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: Hmph.
[???]: Useless struggles.
[Kamui]: ...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 08 Consumed by Darkness → 8-4 Clone (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: We broke through that area successfully.
[???]: Sacred gallery!
[???]: No intruders—!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 08 Consumed by Darkness → 8-4 Clone (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: It\'s down...?
[Liv]: Even the attack patterns are the same.
[Lucia]: Commandant\'s right, though we have many questions, we must find Kamui first.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 08 Consumed by Darkness → 8-5 Weeping Rose (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Incoming from the back!
[Lee]: An ambush?
[Lee]: A new mechanoid... It\'s...!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 08 Consumed by Darkness → 8-5 Weeping Rose (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Communication Request—Purifying Force private channel.
[Vera]: Is the purification target still alive and well, Bianca?
[Lee]: Vera? Haven\'t you extracted already?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 08 Consumed by Darkness → 8-6 Path of Torture (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Iron Maiden]: Oh? It\'s a... control valve?
[Iron Maiden]: Interesting, having something like this buried.
[Iron Maiden]: And I didn\'t even notice it before.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 08 Consumed by Darkness → 8-6 Path of Torture (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: You left it in me from that time?
[Iron Maiden]: You found out, hm?
[Lee]: If we weren\'t constantly running missions, I would never have allowed it to stay within me normally.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 08 Consumed by Darkness → 8-7 Remnants (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Lucia, Lee\'s over there!
[Lucia]: Be careful. The Iron Maiden is near him.
[Liv]: Wait. Lee is aiming at us!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 08 Consumed by Darkness → 8-7 Remnants (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Lucia!
[Lucia]: Do you have the results?
[Liv]: Lee\'s been injected with something.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 08 Consumed by Darkness → 8-8 Trial of Torture (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Iron Maiden]: Dammit...
[Iron Maiden]: How useless... But never mind, this has taken up enough of your time.
[Iron Maiden]: ...Staring at me with such eager eyes, what do you want?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 08 Consumed by Darkness → 8-8 Trial of Torture (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Iron Maiden]: ...You... horrifying...
[Lucia]: I\'ve said already. Say your prayers.
[Iron Maiden]: I hate... hate, hate, hate...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 08 Consumed by Darkness → 8-9 Justice (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: We\'re here.
[Liv]: Bianca... and the other members of the Purifying Force.
[Lee]: And a large amount of Corrupted.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 08 Consumed by Darkness → 8-10 Resistance (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bianca]: You\'ve arrived at the right moment. The surrounding Corrupted are taking up part of the Purifying Force\'s attention.
[Lucia]: Where\'s Kamui?
[Bianca]: His signal has stopped right ahead. Inside that enclosed energy chamber.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 08 Consumed by Darkness → 8-10 Resistance (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Vera]: Hm, more tenacious than I thought.
[Lee]: You\'re not joining in yourself?
[Vera]: Oh, if it weren\'t for a certain little promise.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 08 Consumed by Darkness → 8-11 Devoured (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Liv, can you analyze the material constituents inside the energy chamber?
[Liv]: I can\'t identify its properties, but I\'ve been recording all the observational data. I\'ll hand it over to HQ after this.
[Liv]: The energy chamber is changing in color!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 08 Consumed by Darkness → 8-11 Devoured (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
...
[Camu]: You know it full well. Even the power of Tenebrion is under my control.
[Camu]: You depend on me to fend against the corruption.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 08 Consumed by Darkness → 8-12 Light and Shadow (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: The chamber is open!
[Lucia]: Liv, monitor Kamui\'s condition.
[Liv]: The energy inside the chamber is... being absorbed by Kamui! His M.I.N.D. is overheating!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 08 Consumed by Darkness → 8-12 Light and Shadow (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Camu]: They\'d go so far... for you...?
[Kamui]: Because you\'re wrong from the start, Camu! It\'s not only power that can protect yourself!
[Kamui]: My reliable companions will be there for me as well!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 09 Fallen Star → 9-1 Flying Sand (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Somewhere in the desert, battlefield cleanup is underway in a Forsaken base. Sand and dust cover every inch of ground.
[Watanabe]: The third time this month...
A dark, long needle-like object protrudes from the ground in the center of the base.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 09 Fallen Star → 9-2 Second Contact (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Operator]: Incoming! The next wave of beyond-visual-range strike will hit soon! Interception rate 73%!
[Hassen]: Celica! Tell all departments to prepare for impact!
[Celica]: Roger!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 09 Fallen Star → 9-2 Second Contact (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Broadcast]: A friendly reminder from Korolev: Dear children, please treat public facilities with love and care—
[Broadcast]: Serious offenders will be separated from their parents for one week in correctional facilities.
[Lee]: You sure a child can climb up here?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 09 Fallen Star → 9-3 Star Rift (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Allen]: So, President Hassen, would you like to consider my request?
[Hassen]: We are at war. WGAA is a civilian organization, and as their leader you shouldn\'t even be here in the command room.
[Hassen]: Let alone making requests.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 09 Fallen Star → 9-3 Star Rift (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: Done. All weapon systems of the space station have been disabled.
[Broadcast]: A friendly reminder from Korolev: Dear children, please treat public facilities with love and care—
[Broadcast]: Serious offenders will be separated from their parents for one week in correctional facilities.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 09 Fallen Star → 9-4 Reunion (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: If we want to go to the control center next, we need to take the main passage. But...
[Lee]: Darn. That AI shut the airtight valve...
[Lucia]: Is there no other way?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 09 Fallen Star → 9-4 Reunion (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: Incredible acceleration and flexibility... Like it was designed specifically for space combat...
[Lee]: Why do the Forsakens have such an advanced frame?
[Watanabe]: Babylonia would design more advanced frames for Constructs with outstanding performance to further enhance their abilities.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 09 Fallen Star → 9-5 Self Immune (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Gabriel]: I\'m out, Miss Luna.
Boom—
Boom—

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 09 Fallen Star → 9-6 Digit Blade (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Lee, I can feel the virus\' logical contamination of the control system weakening.
[Liv]: It could be due to the space station\'s expelling action.
[Lee]: Good, the electromagnetic lock is still functioning. This is an old system, so it shouldn\'t be too difficult to manually change the parameters.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 09 Fallen Star → 9-7 Strict Education (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: We did it.
[Lee]: All cabin lock status have been reconfigured to lock...
[Lee]: But only 72% of compartments are online now.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 09 Fallen Star → 9-8 Gravitational Edge (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Boom—
The platform could not withstand the battle between Gray Raven and the Corrupted—
It shatters into pieces, separating the members of Gray Raven...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 09 Fallen Star → 9-9 Instant Communication (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Commandant... We cannot advance anymore...
[Lee]: This area seems to have more puzzles.
[Lucia]: If we force our way through, the large number of Heteromer shards could form enemies like what we saw.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 09 Fallen Star → 9-10 Hetero-Core (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Miss Ayla? Miss Ayla... are you there?
[Lucia]: She appears to be online in the channel, but there\'s some weird noise... Could it be...
[Ayla\'s Voice]: Selena—!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 09 Fallen Star → 9-11 Set (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: All platforms have been stabilized...
[Liv]: Energy pulse detected in the central core!
Crimson lightning strikes the platform surface, creating many enemies formed by Punishing Heteromers—

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 09 Fallen Star → 9-12 Shatter (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Did we... succeed?
[Lee]: It only adjusted its form temporarily... There\'s no substantial change...
[Lucia]: In that case... Let\'s keep suppressing it!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 09 Fallen Star → 9-13 Chase (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Watanabe]: NOW!!!
[Lucia]: All squads, immediately evacuate from the core!
...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 09 Fallen Star → 9-13 Chase (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Forsaken Construct]: Mr. Watanabe, you are too close!
Four nuclear bombs launch from the aircraft—
[Watanabe]: …………

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 10 Eternal Engine → 10-1 Pray (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
I stare up at the sky, as all the others do.
Even if you have the power to run forever on the ground, it all just gets tiring in the end.
"Only the sky is safe."

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 10 Eternal Engine → 10-2 To Akdilek (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Hassen]: Your performance at the space station was outstanding.
[Hassen]: Well done, Gray Raven.
[Hassen]: You guys are the MVP this time, no need to be modest.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 10 Eternal Engine → 10-3 Constructs on Earth (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Rail Heterozygote]: ——
[???]: Tsk, it really is here. Sophia, report to the boss immediately!
[Sophia]: The Commoner Carriage that it was attached to...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 10 Eternal Engine → 10-3 Constructs on Earth (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After breaking the glass ceiling, Gray Raven members jump into the carriage, shocking the occupants inside.
What greets you is not the cramped and suffocating compartment you were expecting—
The spacious and luxurious double-deck carriage has a series of paintings hung along its walls. Even the staircases linking the two stories are all made from high-quality wood.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 10 Eternal Engine → 10-4 A Trade with Akdilek (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Aston]: Let\'s begin our deal then.
Despite the situation of the train not looking good, and the floorboards ferociously shaking under his feet, the man named Aston didn\'t waver an inch.
Maintaining his pace, he strides forward with confidence, and even saluted Gray Raven.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 10 Eternal Engine → 10-4 A Trade with Akdilek (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: I didn\'t expect that thing to blow up...
[Sophia]: That machine is used for paving roads and exploration.
[Sophia]: ...Sorry I forgot to tell you earlier.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 10 Eternal Engine → 10-5 Choice (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Corrupted]: Urgh—!
[Ashlar]: W-wait! The Corrupted followed the peasants into this carriage!
[Aristocrat A]: Dammit! Don\'t come over!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 10 Eternal Engine → 10-6 Omen (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Sophia]: Changyu!
[Changyu]: What took you so long...!
They arrive to discover a boy half kneeling on the floor, covered in deep gashes—

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 10 Eternal Engine → 10-7 Someone and Bianca (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: Ooooh, yeah. Public transport is the shizz. Hooyah!
[Bianca]: ...
[???]: Hi hi, aren\'t you going to at least give a reply to your former co-worker?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 10 Eternal Engine → 10-8 Powerless (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Aston]: We meet again, commandant from Babylonia. Thanks to your reckless behavior, this carriage is no longer safe.
[Aston]: That\'s not true. At least those filthy Corrupted never invaded our carriage.
[Ashlar]: Is this how Babylonia works? Always spieling lies like that? Revolting.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 10 Eternal Engine → 10-9 Hitchhike (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
——
[Bianca]: Mission log—I have boarded the train... Although not the target carriage.
[Bianca]: Looking at the decorations on the top of the carriage, this carriage should belong to Akdilek, and—

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 10 Eternal Engine → 10-10 Gunners (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Celica]: President, the extermination of the Hetero-Core on the ground is 60% complete.
[Nikola]: Only 60%, how inefficient can they be?!
[Hassen]: They\'re all squads deployed in a hurry and most of them just finished their last mission, it\'s a miracle they\'ve already done this much.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 10 Eternal Engine → 10-11 Resolve (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Sophia]: I...!
[Lucia]: Have we reached our destination...?
[Sophia]: Huh?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 10 Eternal Engine → 10-11 Resolve (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Rail Heterozygote]: —!
[Sophia]: C-can\'t move...
[Sophia]: How?!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 10 Eternal Engine → 10-12 From Now On (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bianca]: It\'s over.
As the arrow hits its mark, a crack spreads on its body like a spiderweb at lightning speed until the Rail Heterozygote disintegrates into nothing but sand, seeping through the gaps onto the railway.
[Sophia]: Wonderful... wonderful.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 10 Eternal Engine → Eternity (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Engine "Asslam" is moving smoothly as usual.
Inside the first carriage, also known as the royal carriage.
[Aston]: ...Emergency repair of the 11 functional carriages is complete. Train operation is back to normal. All damage is within the expected level.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 10 Eternal Engine → Delivery (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Inside the sealed first carriage, also known as the royal carriage.
[Robotic Voice]: Delivery time: Confirmed. Location: Confirmed. Target: Scanning... 2 individuals. No infection detected. Identifying target. Confirming delivery content.
The monotonous, mechanical voice of the meter-tall robot resonates across the carriage.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 10 Eternal Engine → Port (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Port No.9 - Night.
[Nikola]: ...L\'Isle-Adam... Data missing. Forget about it. Chrome, your frame has been modified again. How do you feel?
[Chrome]: Very good.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 10 Eternal Engine → Port (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: Captain, look... On the sea!
[Kamui]: So huge...!
[Kamui]: What a gigantic ship!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 07 Inver-Collapse → 7-1 Left Behind (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bianca]: I think we need an evaluation of the current status, but that\'s not something I can decide.
[Chrome]: Give me some time, I\'ll handle the talking.
[Lucia]: Chrome, the one he needs the most right now is you.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 07 Inver-Collapse → 7-1 Left Behind (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bianca]: Looks like there are no scavengers around here.
[Lucia]: Only Corrupted.
[Bianca]: Those devices were originally in the Sicilian Energy Station for use of surveying and extracting underground resources.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 07 Inver-Collapse → 7-2 Buried Alive (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bianca]: This looks like the ruins of some form of civilization.
[Bianca]: Please proceed carefully. The digging devices are quite high-powered and might cause mini tremors.
[Lucia]: There are some ruins up ahead.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 07 Inver-Collapse → 7-2 Buried Alive (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bianca]: The target has a highly robust defensive structure, we cannot destroy it in a short amount of time.
[Lucia]: We can\'t let it go on. The ruins aren\'t going to hold.
[Lucia]: Everybody, stay back. Let\'s return to the safe zone near the entrance.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 07 Inver-Collapse → 7-3 Restructure (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: The entrance is completely blocked.
[Liv]: The ruins here are convoluted. Plus, a large amount of Corrupted are wandering around. We should consider other plans to advance.
[Liv]: So as to avoid the situation just now. If the commandant was drawn in by that...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 07 Inver-Collapse → 7-3 Restructure (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: You all found some new friends while Nanami went for a walk!
[Lee]: ...This voice.
[Karenina]: Who\'s there?!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 07 Inver-Collapse → 7-4 Unexpected Alliance (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bianca]: We\'re wasting time.
[Lucia]: Liv, where do we walk next?
[Liv]: We\'ve returned to somewhere near the ruins when we first engaged with the Corrupted. Now we\'ll just have to follow Kamui\'s signal through the excavated paths.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 07 Inver-Collapse → 7-4 Unexpected Alliance (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: Rohacchi—!
[Lee]: Rohacchi?
[Liv]: That\'s a... survey-type robot made for ruins.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 07 Inver-Collapse → 7-5 Split (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: This machine... It\'s quite similar to the situation we encountered before.
[Lee]: I agree. The awakening of this machine series is an unforeseen phenomenon.
[Nanami]: Hey, don\'t bully my Rohacchi!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 07 Inver-Collapse → 7-5 Split (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Rohacchi]: They. Companions. But. Hit me.
[Rohacchi]: We. Dug. Treasure. Together. Once.
[Nanami]: Treasure... Is that the mural you wanted to show me?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 07 Inver-Collapse → 7-6 Tracking (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: The digging device is nearing us. If it continues, the ruins here won\'t hold.
[Bianca]: It\'s all broken machine parts and traces of heavy fire.
[Bianca]: Looks like Karen was here.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 07 Inver-Collapse → 7-6 Tracking (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Traces of battles have extended all this way. That\'s the other side of the fork in the road we passed.
[Lucia]: Look at the walls. There are fresh marks apart from bullet holes and signs of explosives.
[Bianca]: They\'re slashes from a blade...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 07 Inver-Collapse → 7-7 Encounter (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bianca]: (Requesting permission—)
[Bianca]: (I require the coordinates of Karenina...)
[Bianca]: (A slash of such strength...)

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 07 Inver-Collapse → 7-8 Abnormal Energy (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Gunsmoke fills the air beneath the sand.
[Karenina]: I... what\'s happening...?
[Karenina]: Body... feels... empty... can\'t...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 07 Inver-Collapse → 7-9 Boiling Consciousness (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Because we don\'t have access authority to her M.I.N.D., we\'ll have to brute force it...
[Liv]: This is...!
[Liv]: A form of energy is trying to invade Karen\'s M.I.N.D.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 07 Inver-Collapse → 7-9 Boiling Consciousness (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: M.I.N.D. stabilizing... Commandant, Lucia succeeded!
[Bianca]: We should get going. The number of Corrupted nearby is increasing.
[Lee]: This figure isn\'t normal.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 07 Inver-Collapse → 7-10 Besieged (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: The enemy is flanking us!
[Lee]: They move in coordination. There must be someone behind them.
[Bianca]: Let\'s focus on getting out of our current predicament first.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 07 Inver-Collapse → 7-11 Two Frontlines (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bianca]: Remember the signal transmitters from before? These are from the same batch as those.
[Bianca]: Our location was in broad daylight all this time.
[Lucia]: The enemy launched a full-frontal attack on us, knowing full well about the time lag?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 07 Inver-Collapse → 7-11 Two Frontlines (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Roland]: ...That was a bit more well played than I expected.
[Roland]: But let us not waste more time. I\'ll end this farce.
(As the Musashi falls, Watanabe flies in from the side at the same time, crashing into the wall. An arm of his lays in complete waste, buzzing in a cacophony of sparks.)

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 07 Inver-Collapse → 7-12 End of the Path (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Bianca, we\'ll aid you.
[Bianca]: Thank you...
[Roland]: You people are quite annoying.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 07 Inver-Collapse → 7-12 End of the Path (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: It\'s over!
[Roland]: How, careless of me...
[Roland]: Even so, I will...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 03 Final Exhibition → 3-1 Seeds (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Gabriel]: Miss Luna is already here. Are you all ready?
[Roland]: Of course! I\'ve even left a little gift for our guests from Babylonia.
[Gabriel]: You\'re playing around again.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 03 Final Exhibition → 3-2 Terminal (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Commandant, we\'re here.
[Liv]: This is the Museum Estate—the final station of Rail 11 of City 015. The Ascendant traces ended here.
[Liv]: Yes. According to the records, this was an estate privately owned by a business magnate of the Transatlantic Economic Community, back in the Golden Age.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 03 Final Exhibition → 3-3 Driven by Instinct (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Lucia, look out!
[Lucia]: !
Right behind Lucia, the Terrapod cannons finish charging up—

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 03 Final Exhibition → 3-4 Good Samaritan (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: Helping people makes me feel good!
[Lee]: Behind you—
[Kamui]: Hmm? Oh, it\'s not dead yet?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 03 Final Exhibition → 3-5 Trespassing (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: You still plan on following us?
[Kamui]: Of course! Gotta clean up my own mess!
[Lee]: Just, don\'t cause any unnecessary troubles.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 03 Final Exhibition → 3-6 Traps (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: I am the butler of this estate.
[Estate Butler]: I am here to protect the inheritance of the estate owner, Mr. Copperfield.
[Kamui]: Good day, sir!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 03 Final Exhibition → 3-7 Final Warning (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: According to the navigation, we will reach the courtyard after passing through here. The garden is the core area, and also the furthest location reached by the recon squads.
Boom—
[Lucia]: There are fights happening elsewhere in the estate.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 03 Final Exhibition → 3-8 Take Caution (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: We\'ve reached the courtyard. The Construct squad is just above the stairs!
[Kamui]: The space\'s massive in here.
[Liv]: They seem to have finished the battle. Squad members are all intact, but why aren\'t they heeding our calls?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 03 Final Exhibition → 3-9 Special Mission (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: Wait, the enemy concentration is high near our destination.
[Lee]: If we were to move all at once, we\'d likely be found out and surrounded, even with EM Camo protection.
[Lee]: But if we split up, we can\'t cover each other if we were found.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 03 Final Exhibition → 3-10 Twisted Modification (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: It\'s too quiet up the stairs.
[Lee]: This feels eerily familiar.
[Lee]: Do you remember what happened to the Suzaku squad?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 03 Final Exhibition → 3-11 Each Loyal to Their Own (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Roland]: Greetings everyone, we finally meet.
[Kamui]: It\'s you...
[Kamui]: You\'re the Ascendant I\'ve been chasing after!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 03 Final Exhibition → 3-12 A New Seed (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Estate Butler]: Urgh...
[Roland]: Can\'t handle it anymore?
[Roland]: Alright, you did indeed perform quite well for an anonymous little someone.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 03 Final Exhibition → 3-12 A New Seed (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The hall continues to shake, causing countless debris to fall.
[Kamui]: Didn\'t think you\'d be stupid enough to ignore me!
[Roland]: Is that what you think... Did you not notice that my target was you from the start?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 02 Journey of Torture → 2-1 A Strange New Friend (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Celica]: Gray Raven, did you parachute back to Earth safely this time?
[Lee]: You know, aside from having to pass through the giant and murderous belt of space debris corrupted by the virus, everything was fine.
[Lucia]: Because of the mobility of the drop pod, we managed to pass through that area without requiring support. There was no better way of landing, Lee.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 02 Journey of Torture → 2-2 Strange Signal (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: Ooh, right! Nanami has something else to do!
[Lee]: Those graffiti?
[Nanami]: Yup yup! This is important stuff! See y\'all for now!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 02 Journey of Torture → 2-3 Old Acquaintance (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[System]: Connecting—
[Vera]: Why, hello there, Gray Ravens!
[Vera]: This is the leader of the Cerberus squad—

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 02 Journey of Torture → 2-4 Relic (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Commandant, we\'re close to the signal source.
[Lucia]: If we pass through these Corrupted, then we should encounter the target.
[Lee]: Hold on... It\'s quiet. Too quiet...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 02 Journey of Torture → 2-5 Language Game (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: This Inver-Device... Tifa took it off herself.
[Liv]: It was broadcasting connection requests for Mind Beacons before it was taken off, so it\'s been like this the whole time.
[Liv]: But, what could possibly make a Construct take off their Inver-Device in a place full of the virus?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 02 Journey of Torture → 2-6 Will to Survive (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: There\'s still 2km until the city center.
...
[Lucia]: Those explosions...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 02 Journey of Torture → 2-7 Iso-Device (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Suzaku Squad Construct]: Urgh...
[Liv]: His body structure is compromised all over, I\'ll have to perform emergency treatment...
[Lucia]: After you\'re done, put him near the Iso-Device. If he can\'t recover his memory... You can only hope that he can hold on until the Purifying Force arrives.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 02 Journey of Torture → 2-8 Rescue Signal (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Commandant, according to the locational data from Babylonia, Tifa is approaching our position!
[Lucia]: Commandant, your orders, please!
[Liv]: Ah, wait! There are... other Corrupted signals as well!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 02 Journey of Torture → 2-9 Will of Steel (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: What are you trying to do with this Inver-Device?
[Suzaku Squad Construct]: Tifa was injected with a foreign power by an enemy... That power allowed Constructs to keep their consciousness stable even under viral influence, all while harnessing the power of the virus...
[Suzaku Squad Construct]: But if such immense power comes at the expense of human nature... Those that master it are still slaves to the Punishing Virus...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 02 Journey of Torture → 2-10 A "Safe" Exit (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Boom—
Continuous explosions echoes from behind the Gray Raven squad.
[Lucia]: Satellite imagery is useless now, Liv, we need a new route!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 02 Journey of Torture → 2-11 The Proud (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Tifa]: AHAHAHA—
The "Iron Maiden" Tifa lightly trailed out of the darkness, a Construct lay unmoving on one of her spikes.
The Construct was then thrown aside like trash. The body let off a dull thud as it hit the ground, causing a cloud of dust to rise.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 02 Journey of Torture → 2-12 End of Torture (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Tifa]: AAAAGGHHH!
Tifa concentrated every ounce of the viral power inside her to shoot at her surroundings blindly.
Lucia, being in a frontal position—

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 02 Journey of Torture → 2-12 End of Torture (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The Gray Raven squad arrives at an abandoned subway station with its roof destroyed.
[Liv]: Lee, I\'m going to put you down now. Please wait a moment while I heal you!
[Lucia]: Lee, hang in there, we\'ll be able to go back soon!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 05 Shattered Illusion → 5-1 Traces (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: Outer rim survey completed. No ambushes confirmed.
[Lucia]: And the route inside?
[Lee]: Liv\'s not here, so we have limited data collection capabilities. Nothing to do now but to wait for Kamui.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 05 Shattered Illusion → 5-2 Blind Fight (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: It\'s an oasis inside the building? An organization researching artificial biospheres?
[Lee]: If that\'s the case, this might have been the predecessor to Babylonia\'s bio-system.
[Lucia]: But something still doesn\'t feel right about this place...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 05 Shattered Illusion → 5-2 Blind Fight (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Communication request—
[Lucia]: Lee! Please respond if you can hear me!
[Lee]: I can hear you, but it\'s not because of the communication but because my hearing has recovered...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 05 Shattered Illusion → 5-3 Dispelling Illusions (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: If I\'m not mistaken, this should be from a specialized "EM Projection" device that can alter the electromagnetic fields of nearby spaces.
[Lee]: Rather than deceiving our sensory organs directly, it\'s more like covering a fictional piece of veil over the real world.
[Lucia]: So that sensory discrepancy we felt earlier, that was a form of maladjustment to this type of augmented space?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 05 Shattered Illusion → 5-4 A Smart Path (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: There is one method.
Lee fished out a small, square-shaped pendant from his collar.
[Lee]: This is a souvenir Murray gave me.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 05 Shattered Illusion → 5-5 True Form (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: This won\'t do. Turning them off by hand is too inefficient. There might be up to hundreds of these devices here.
[Lucia]: Can\'t we just use EMP grenades like in the Museum Estate?
[Lee]: That\'s Strike Hawk equipment. Not Gray Raven.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 05 Shattered Illusion → 5-5 True Form (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After the explosion, the alloy covering the floor and walls begin to show their true colors, and the projection becomes temporarily down.
[Lee]: It actually worked, looks like they reduced its protection quality for mass production.
[Lucia]: Now, Lee. Let\'s map down the temple\'s routes and projector locations.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 05 Shattered Illusion → 5-6 Suppressed Illusions (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Ah, this is...
[Kamui]: The projectors restarted themselves?
[Lee]: Looks like these devices aren\'t as flimsy as we made them out to be.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 05 Shattered Illusion → 5-6 Suppressed Illusions (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: Be careful not to get hit by my sword waves!
[Kamui]: Ha!
[Lee]: I can\'t tell if he\'s acting or not...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 05 Shattered Illusion → 5-7 Humanoid (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: The Corrupted can\'t handle it, they\'re doing an organized retreat!
[Lee]: They won\'t retreat without reason, Kamui must have won the lottery again.
[Kamui]: Hey, they\'re grouping up!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 05 Shattered Illusion → 5-7 Humanoid (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: Are you done yet?
[Lee]: ...Would you like to do it instead?
[Kamui]: ...I\'m not suitable for analyzing data.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 05 Shattered Illusion → 5-8 Supervisor (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: From the records of the Corrupted\'s memory shell, there\'s an individual named Gabriel ordering them to research M.I.N.D. technology...
[Kamui]: Gabriel... From the info I have, there are several Ascendant members, and this Gabriel person... He might be one of them!
[Lee]: That\'s possible... But we don\'t have any more info for now.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 05 Shattered Illusion → 5-8 Supervisor (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: Found it. The consciousness of a trapped Forsaken from not long ago.
[Kamui]: Put it onto the projector!
[Forsaken Soldier]: Watanabe! We keep losing comrades...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 05 Shattered Illusion → 5-9 The Light of Seven (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
At this moment, the surrounding scenery begins to tremble relentlessly—
Boom—
[Lucia]: The wall\'s... open?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 05 Shattered Illusion → 5-9 The Light of Seven (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: Are you planning to keep pestering us?
[Nanami]: Nanami doesn\'t want to answer you.
[Lee]: Which team do you belong to? Under who\'s commands?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 05 Shattered Illusion → 5-10 Lost Sword (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: With the routes she gave us, we should be able to find our way.
[Lee]: Let\'s continue onwards.
[Lucia]: The scenery is changing...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 05 Shattered Illusion → 5-10 Lost Sword (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: This is the last M.I.N.D. space.
[Lee]: The next stop will be the central consciousness container.
[Kamui]: Where\'s the exit?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 05 Shattered Illusion → 5-11 Turning the Table (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Watanabe and the Forsaken stand silently in the darkness. Liv stands behind them with her eyes closed, as still as a rock.
Numerous cables were extending from Liv\'s Inver-Device, connecting her to the central consciousness container.
[Lucia]: Watanabe, I need an explanation...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 05 Shattered Illusion → 5-12 Liv's Return (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: Tch, such a well-made piece of intrusion countermeasure.
[Lucia]: So this is what Liv\'s M.I.N.D. looks like...
[Lee]: To be exact, it\'s the M.I.N.D. once placed in a central memory vessel.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 05 Shattered Illusion → 5-12 Liv's Return (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Life once again graces Liv\'s face.
[Lucia]: Liv!
[Liv]: Oh, L-Lucia...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 11 Nona Ouroboros → 11-1 Night Voyage (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Asslam, Carriage 014
[Lucia]: Sophia and I searched every carriage and every possible hiding place.
[Sophia]: ...Including the 64 ventilation pipes and 7 garbage disposal points. Nothing found.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 11 Nona Ouroboros → 11-2 Escape Room (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
It\'s a familiar feeling.
You open your eyes, and what greets your eyes is neither a familiar ceiling nor a narrow one-man capsule.
[Hassen]: ...And that\'s everything about this mission. Given your excellent solo combat ability, I believe you\'re the best person for the job.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 11 Nona Ouroboros → 11-2 Escape Room (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: Here are the goods plus the "gift". And with that, my job as your agent is done.
[???]: No need to thank me. This is just the price I pay for... being able to receive and understand your "language".
[???]: As for the reward I asked for, I\'m sure I\'ll get it when this is all over.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 11 Nona Ouroboros → 11-3 Port (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: From the radar readings and Changyu\'s description, this should be the port Commandant\'s signals came from.
[Lee]: We can\'t get a more precise set of coordinates. Our radars are not only being interfered with, but Commandant\'s signal is being blocked and double-encrypted.
[Lee]: Asslam just took heavy damage and their combative capability is limited. Sophia and Changyu both expressed wishes to join in our rescue of Commandant, but it might not be appropriate.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 11 Nona Ouroboros → 11-4 Night Market (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: No guards at the entrance, nor any other restrictions.
[Lee]: But a lot of humans...
[Lucia]: Let\'s go.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 11 Nona Ouroboros → 11-5 Closure (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Three drumbeats.
"The midnight drums are beatin\'! We\'re closing up!"
...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 11 Nona Ouroboros → 11-6 Cargo (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: I hacked into a mechanoid\'s memory shell, but the data I got so far only reveals the authority hierarchy on the ship.
[Lee]: It\'s based on biometric verification. Organism, or in this case humans, have the lowest authority on the ship, followed by mechanoids, then Constructs. The highest authority belongs to the main control system.
A sad look creeps onto Liv\'s face, as if she is reminded of something unpleasant.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 11 Nona Ouroboros → 11-6 Cargo (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Pulao]: I, Pulao, hereby order you as a member of the Kowloong Crew.
The mechanical puppets stop their attack.
[Pulao]: Good. It\'s working.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 11 Nona Ouroboros → 11-7 Control (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Pulao]: At this trade fair, eight pieces of merchandise will be put on display.
[Pulao]: After that, they will go through four rounds of inspection. The best one selected from them will be accepted by the Lady Qu.
[Pulao]: What I have prepared will blow everyone\'s socks off! Just watch!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 11 Nona Ouroboros → 11-7 Control (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Qu]: ...
[Qu]: Finally, the moment has come.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 11 Nona Ouroboros → 11-8 Entry (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: Leader Leader Leader Chief Boss Capt. Leader Leader! How should I pose with my hands?! Man, this thing is so tight... Girl Constructs have it rough...
[Chrome]: We can\'t do anything about your voice right now. Try to speak less.
[Beautiful Woman]: Argh... No talking? But I want to talk... Is there something we can do about this, Capt?!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 11 Nona Ouroboros → 11-8 Entry (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Standing on the stage, Kemuri bows to the audience.
[Drawn-Out Voice]: All merchandise have been individually displayed.
[Drawn-Out Voice]: All merchandise, please step on the stage for a group display.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 11 Nona Ouroboros → 11-9 The Fool (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Qu]: What is this? Who are you people?
[Qu]: Gray Raven. And... Lucia.
[Lucia]: ...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 11 Nona Ouroboros → 11-9 The Fool (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Yazi\'s body suddenly disappeared... as if teleported to somewhere else...
[Liv]: This place is... very odd.
[Lee]: It\'s a virtual M.I.N.D... and yet its precision level is higher than that of a real one.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 11 Nona Ouroboros → 11-10 Who Dreams (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Qu]: Why...
[Qu]: Huaxu, did you bring them here?
As if held up by some invisible force, Lucia quietly floats in the air.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 11 Nona Ouroboros → 11-11 Freedom (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Qu]: You can\'t stop me.
[Lee]: The mind transfer process... has begun!
[Chrome]: We\'ll hold Qu down!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 11 Nona Ouroboros → 11-12 Kowloong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The ship is a total mess. When the people aboard learn of the disappearance of Huaxu and Qu, they burst into tears and laughter.
[Lee]: Is it... finally over?
[Lee]: The ship became free when Huaxu disappeared. Luckily, Lucia gained partial authority because of the mind transfer process.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 11 Nona Ouroboros → Unknown Future (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nikola]: The mission is over according to the report, right Hassen?
[Hassen]: That\'s right. Both Strike Hawk and Gray Raven have done a great job. You want to hear about how they roughed up the enemies on the ship?
[Nikola]: I only care about the result.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 11 Nona Ouroboros → Thorough Preparation (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nikola]: The extra thing I asked you to prepare, how is it coming along, Asimov?
[Asimov]: Had a few hiccups. Still working on it.
[Asimov]: As you know, the Task Force classifies combat zones based on their Punishing Virus intensity.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 11 Nona Ouroboros → Catcher in the Rye (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Gabriel]: Roland, how are you feeling?
[Roland]: I must thank you. If it hadn\'t been for that thing you brought back, I wouldn\'t have improved so much.
[Selena]: ...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 04 Forgotten Sand → 4-1 Night Escape (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Kamui!
[Lucia]: Kamui... Wake up! The floor\'s about to collapse!
[Kamui]: Lu... cia...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 04 Forgotten Sand → 4-1 Night Escape (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: Yep, that should be enough data for us to use!
[Kamui]: Take it away, Liv!
[Lee]: That\'s the end of your plan?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 04 Forgotten Sand → 4-2 Deduction (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: Unknown tremors.
[Lee]: The structure\'s fragile here, beware of enemies from the cracks.
[Kamui]: Why didn\'t these traps pop from that stinky Roland and the Corrupted?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 04 Forgotten Sand → 4-2 Deduction (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Lee, I\'ll leave the long-distance attacking to you.
[Lee]: No problem.
[Kamui]: Liv, how\'s it going?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 04 Forgotten Sand → 4-3 Beneficiary (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[System]: Calculations complete.
[System]: Available routes: 0.
[Kamui]: A-alright... Probably not going to work even if we retry it.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 04 Forgotten Sand → 4-3 Beneficiary (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: Oh, I think it\'s working!
[Lee]: You think... So, what electronic device did you want to interfere?
[Kamui]: Shh... Listen!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 04 Forgotten Sand → 4-4 Breaking Through (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: All the Corrupted are drawn to it.
[Lee]: This massive thing... It\'s a combat customized agricultural heavy machine, I know these well...
[Kamui]: Righto, I mean just look at it! If we didn\'t need it to get out, I\'d want to try wrestling with it!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 04 Forgotten Sand → 4-4 Breaking Through (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Zack]: Emma...
The heavy agriculture machine falls to the ground with a thud, its speaker keeps repeating something, as if calling out for someone, until the very end when it exhausted all its energy.
[Corrupted]: —! —!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 04 Forgotten Sand → 4-5 Lurking Sand (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: There\'s Punishing Virus reaction beneath the sand! Liv!
(Slither, slither...)
[Liv]: Got it! Marking the location of the Corrupted target... It\'s so fast!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 04 Forgotten Sand → 4-5 Lurking Sand (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[System]: Connecting—
[Celica]: Gray Raven and Kamui... I\'m relieved that all of you are fine.
[Celica]: We\'re currently sending another aircraft over to pick you up.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 04 Forgotten Sand → 4-6 Panic Dive (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: I briefly checked the info on this area.
[Liv]: There\'s an old military base around 10km from here.
[Liv]: There\'s a foreign organization named "Forsaken" holding camp there.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 04 Forgotten Sand → 4-6 Panic Dive (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: Looks like it went underground again.
[Liv]: That was close... This is the first time I\'ve seen a Corrupted like that.
[Lucia]: Liv, can you look up information on Vassago? We\'ll need more effective strategies next time we encounter it.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 04 Forgotten Sand → 4-7 Forsaken (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The biting wind showers the Gray Ravens, bringing with it whirling sand and wearing down the soft synth-skin of the Constructs.
[Lee]: Let\'s wait here until the sandstorm ends.
[Liv]: Commandant, our bodies can filter out sand grains, so don\'t worry... cough...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 04 Forgotten Sand → 4-7 Forsaken (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Who are you... And why do you know me?
[???]: ...
[Kamui]: Hey, Watanabe! Long time no see!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 04 Forgotten Sand → 4-8 Negotiation (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Watanabe]: The sandstorm\'s weakening, but it\'s going to return in 30 minutes.
[Lucia]: Do your people have a weather system of your own?
[Watanabe]: Since your grand retreat, even Babylonia has not succeeded in deploying a single satellite. Do you think we could have one ourselves?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 04 Forgotten Sand → 4-8 Negotiation (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: That takes care of it!
[Watanabe]: Hmph, looks like you\'re still as reckless as ever, Kamui.
[Lee]: Liv, you can contact Babylonia now...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 04 Forgotten Sand → 4-9 Left Behind (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: The flanks! There\'s a large-sized Corrupted signal!
[Watanabe]: Spread out! Retrieve the vehicles!
[Kamui]: Look at him go, he ain\'t the leader of the Forsakens, is he?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 04 Forgotten Sand → 4-9 Left Behind (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Watanabe]: What are you waiting for?! Get in the car!
[Lucia]: Kamui! Stop attacking!
[Kamui]: Dammit, it\'s got me!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 04 Forgotten Sand → 4-10 Kidnapping (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Watanabe takes the wheel and drives away.
Liv gazes at the heat-distorted horizon in silence. Her silken hair flutters in the hot wind as her body bumps along with the vehicle\'s uneven movements.
[Watanabe]: ...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 04 Forgotten Sand → 4-11 Noises (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Liv\'s signal vanished around here.
[Lee]: There are Forsaken vehicles around this facility.
[Lucia]: The Corrupted remains here do seem like the work of the Forsaken.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 04 Forgotten Sand → 4-12 Bloody Truth (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
————
[Lee]: Should be nearly clear.
[Kamui]: Wait up! I think I hear an old friend!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 04 Forgotten Sand → 4-12 Bloody Truth (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: Ha... Ha... Finally...
[Kamui]: How was Vassago able to track us from that far, and that ferocious too? Is it because we gave it a beating once?
[Lee]: Of course, this was Watanabe\'s plan, to use Vassago\'s trait... I should\'ve known.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 12 Kowloong Metropolis → 12-1 Mist (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Sounds of petrels trickle through the air, but the singers themselves remain unseen. Their instrumental chirps lighten the atmosphere.
[Kamui]: Yo, is that a shark over there? Capt., lend me your scythe for a sec!
[Chrome]: How many times have I told you, Kamui... Be patient and prudent while on standby.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 12 Kowloong Metropolis → 12-2 Rejection (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
As soon as the ship docks, everyone aboard rushes ashore. Yet, sensing the uncanny air, the Kowloong Crew shouts and stops the stampede.
Not a single soul is at the port. No sailors, no mechanoids.
"——Something is afoot."

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 12 Kowloong Metropolis → 12-3 Gathering (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Celica]: Just located Strike Hawk and Gray Raven. They lost the enemies.
[Hassen]: Tell them to be on standby and wait there for further instructions.
[Celica]: Understood.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 12 Kowloong Metropolis → 12-4 Break the Ice (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Some time earlier—
In an arctic land, a fisher, burdened by a bulging bag of tools, is trudging forward in the snow.
Ahead of him is the port shared by members of the Arctic Route Union, with a couple ships lazing nearby. A group of sailors are huddled around a furnace-like heating device, chatting away.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 12 Kowloong Metropolis → 12-5 Chaos (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Guard]: Report. We drove those Babylonians out of the security area.
[Qu]: Good.
[Guard]: But they\'re not showing signs of backing down. The monitoring device suggests that they\'re even planning to make camp in the outer part of the city.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 12 Kowloong Metropolis → 12-6 Hawk & Hound (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: Capt., what was that explosion...?
[Chrome]: Must be the Corrupted self-exploding. But it doesn\'t seem to be doing much to the Kowloong walls.
The sounds of explosions are even reaching Strike Hawk\'s position. Tasked with defense, and not vanguard duty, the two can only stay put and be on standby.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 12 Kowloong Metropolis → 12-7 War Decision (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Roland]: Gabriel, how fares thee?
[Gabriel]: Not much progress. Kowloong is more powerful than we thought. And as far as I can tell, Lamia is having trouble as well.
[Lamia]: H-hey, I can speak for myself! Why am I getting bullied even on the comms?!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 12 Kowloong Metropolis → 12-8 Frankenstein (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Phecda]: Ugh...
[Construct]: M-monster...
Kowloong, Babylonia—an abrupt tremor seizes everything, rendering members of both factions all paralyzed on the floor.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 12 Kowloong Metropolis → 12-9 Smile (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Coordinating Officer]: All teams from C to H head to the west entrance. Remember, do not enter Kowloong\'s security area, or you\'ll be attacked.
[Construct]: What about the Support Force?
[Coordinating Officer]: The supply line needs to be flexible. Every squad will have a Support Force agent acting as a go-between. Any more questions?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 12 Kowloong Metropolis → 12-10 Support Force (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Soon after the beginning of the war, the outer ring of the city has already descended into chaos. The cacophonous shrieks of the Corrupted and the clang of weapons are the only things that fill the air.
At first, the Babylonia squads were having little trouble fending off the Corrupted, but then they began swarming in. The Corrupted grew in numbers, and things got out of control.
[Construct A]: If only I still had a weapon...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 12 Kowloong Metropolis → 12-11 Sister (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Construct]: Ugh... I... I will never f-fall!
[α]: Sure.
[Construct]: —!!!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 12 Kowloong Metropolis → 12-11 Sister (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Unlike the clean and merciless cuts, Alpha tears through Lucia\'s body with something that almost hints at emotion.
[Lucia]: A-agh!!!!
Her blade dances in the air amid a crescendo of anguished moans. Upon sheathing the blade, Alpha kicks Lucia onto the ground.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 12 Kowloong Metropolis → 12-12 Accumulation (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bridget]: Her wounds... Get her in the truck. We\'ll handle the rest.
On your way back to the city, you run into the traveling Support Force agents. You follow their instructions and put Lucia in the transport truck.
[Lucia]: ...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 12 Kowloong Metropolis → 12-13 Ticket (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Forsaken Soldier]: ...I see, t\'was a really close call back there in the space station then. Mr. Watanabe, I thought you were going to ram right into that virus ball.
[Watanabe]: Same here. That was the plan too.
(It\'s still a bit early... But we\'ve gotten enough rest, might as well set off.)

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 12 Kowloong Metropolis → 12-14 Lamia's Poison (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lamia]: ...F-finally, I\'m in position.
"In position," as in near the light wall. Luna did not spell it out loud, but the three Ascendants are fully aware that certain results are expected in this operation.
As the war rages on in Kowloong, the balance slowly shifts. The Ascendants have occupied quite a few outer areas and turned them into domains of the virus.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 12 Kowloong Metropolis → 12-15 Corporation (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Rows upon rows of screens of assorted sizes broadcast the battle as it rages on in every part of Kowloong.
The warring sides, driven by their own agendas, have turned Kowloong into a maelstrom that threatens to devour everything.
[Qu]: Pathetic. Despicable. Deplorable—outrageous!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 12 Kowloong Metropolis → 12-16 Hawk Hunt (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Corrupted]: —!!
Overflowing in this section of the city are corrupted Phecdas. Their bodies wrecked, their weapons broken.
[Phecda Leader]: Don\'t go soft. Destroy them!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 12 Kowloong Metropolis → 12-17 Mermaid of Hatred (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lamia]: I will release them as promised, so you should...
[Lamia]: Mngh... What is it this time? Why do things never go my way?!
Lamia has Kamui and Chrome surrounded by the Corrupted, but her next command is interrupted by a ranged attack.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 12 Kowloong Metropolis → 12-18 Shield (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Corrupted]: Urgh—
[Guard Captain]: Keep the reinforcements coming! Don\'t let the Corrupted breach our defenses!
[Guard]: Roger!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 12 Kowloong Metropolis → 12-18 Shield (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Chrome]: Kamui, what on earth are you doing?
[Kamui]: I\'m... keeping the hole open...
As expected, the explosives tear a crack in the light wall. Yet the explosives were only meant for combat, not wall-breaching. The light wall takes minimal damage.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 12 Kowloong Metropolis → 12-19 Crisis (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[No. 21]: No. 21, functional output lowering.
[Corrupted]: —!!
[Vera]: Work till you actually freeze. You know how much of a hole your maintenance cost is putting in our budget?!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 12 Kowloong Metropolis → 12-20 Onboard Entertainment (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Forsaken Soldier]: ...
[Watanabe]: ...
Akdilek\'s train rocks and chugs along. Since there are no passenger seats, the Forsaken are leaning against the walls to keep balance.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 12 Kowloong Metropolis → 12-21 Promise (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Commandant...
[Celica]: Mr. President, Lucia is awake.
A long, long nightmare. A nightmare where Commandant is nowhere to be found.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 12 Kowloong Metropolis → 12-22 Inside the Light Wall (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Ayla]: Wow...
[Liv]: ...Did we make it through?
By the time you reach the light wall as instructed by the president, Gabriel is nowhere to be seen. Only a strange rift is torn in the wall.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 12 Kowloong Metropolis → 12-23 At the Door (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Huaxu]: The Babylonia members and the Ascendants have both arrived near the Observatory. Dispatching guards now...
[Qu]: Send guards to clean out the Corrupted before they damage the relics.
[Huaxu]: That course of action will lower our chances of victory.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 12 Kowloong Metropolis → 12-24 The Warden (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: Just a few floors away from reaching the top. Gotta say the inside of this tower looks just like that of the Nighter...
[Qu]: You got it backward, Babylonian.
Walking down the stairs is the familiar feminine figure of Qu, yet vastly different from her imposter on the ship. Her footsteps ring in majesty as she approaches.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 12 Kowloong Metropolis → 12-25 Plume (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You run upstairs like Lee told you to, carrying the signal transmitter Ayla gave you. Finally, you reach the top of the Observatory.
What greets you is a heavenly dome dotted with stars. At your feet is a grass field, and around you are purplish-red flowers. The current war seems to have left this place untouched.
And then, you find yourself flying. Caught completely unaware, you were sent crashing into a railing.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 12 Kowloong Metropolis → 12-25 Plume (EB)
SummaryContent: Cinematic / Action cutscene (no dialogue text).

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 12 Kowloong Metropolis → 12-26 Hope (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
—It\'s over.
You don\'t know which one of you said that first, but it\'s over.
The whole city lies in shambles, with buildings wrecked and roads clustered with debris. To make matters worse, the spread of the Punishing Virus has sealed off even more of Kowloong.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Hidden Current_01 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Asimov]: What is it?
[Hassen]: I just discovered something.
Hassen hands over a hard drive with "Top Secret" printed on it.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Hidden Current_02 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
On the other side, Roland, who has just received the evacuation order, is expressing his doubts to his companions.
[Roland]: Why did this end so quickly?
[Gabriel]: ...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Hidden Current_03 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Asimov]: ...
Judging by photograph, it appears Luna did take something from the Arctic route Union after all.
But it is hard to tell what it is from this angle.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Decision Altitude (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Asimov]: The situation remains urgent. After confirming that there is no abnormality with the last section here, immediately proceed to the next area.
Your surroundings begin to distort immediately after departing the redundant block.
Asimov\'s voice from the comms echoes inside your head.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → A Familiar Sight (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: ...Something\'s off.
After completing the immersion process and removing the obstructive data wall, the four of you arrive at Parliament Square in the virtual space.
Have you not remembered being pushed into the frame, you would have felt as if you were "teleported" to Parliament Square directly from the bridge.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → A Familiar Sight (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: So... this is... virtual space...
[Lucia]: It\'s different from both reality and virtual reality—how astonishing.
[Lucia]: We went through the immersion process only to find ourselves somewhere like Babylonia... The sense of discrepancy is exhilarating.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Unexpected Bolt (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Luna]: Huaxu, how is the infiltration coming along?
[Huaxu]: The area under my control has decreased 12.7%, and Babylonia has regained power by 6.1% compared to an hour ago. Babylonia is still in freefall.
[Luna]: ...What changed?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Unexpected Bolt (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bianca]: What is it?
[Bianca]: Didn\'t I tell you...
[Lee]: I just spoke with Asimov on the comms to confirm the missions assigned to the members of the Purifying Force.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Fake Friendship (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Hassen]: ...What?
[Asimov]: A comprehensive data camouflage... How is that possible?!
[Lee]: We aren\'t sure. We can only guess that Huaxu is capable of such power.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Profile of Bait (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: We need to find a suitable method to track their whereabouts, or at least uncover enough intel to establish a starting point... Right?
[Lee]: Liv, scan the entire block for data. If it was machine or AI logic, we should be able to detect a pattern...
[Lee]: "Nay all speech, even the commonest speech, has something of song in it." Such is the case for humans, so, too, does it apply to machines.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Fragile Relationship (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: ...Found her!
[Liv]: It\'s the fake "Bianca"... Huaxu\'s signature.
[Lee]: ...Finally slipped up, didn\'t you?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Breaking a Deadlock (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
On the other end of Eden 16-B Leisure Module.
[Lucia]: So?
[Liv]: The results of the scan show that... the area is calm. Not even a single trace of the regular programs is detected.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Breaking a Deadlock (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Bridge of Babylonia.
[Karenina]: The jumper is set! Can we transfer the signal?
[Asimov]: Not yet. There must be an issue with the power.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Shutting (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Meanwhile...
Murray has already disassembled the large terminal in the archives and connected cables of various sizes to a peculiar-looking module.
He looks at the jerry-rigged bionic access terminal and smiles wryly.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Huaxu (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Huaxu]: ...Hostile presence detected within proximity.
[Lee]: Looks like we can\'t just ask you to give up the invasion yourself, now can we?
[Huaxu]: You have no authority to issue that order.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Huaxu (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Huaxu]: Request connection to root server... Request connection to root server...
[Lee]: It won\'t work. We\'ve cut off all contact between your sub-terminals and the root server.
[Huaxu]: ...Disconnection confirmed. Withdrawing connection request to the root server.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → S.S.D.D (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Ten minutes after the Gray Ravens have left the immersion frame...
[Hassen]: Considering the sudden nature of the occurrence, I\'ll keep this briefing short.
[Hassen]: Huaxu\'s intrusion was connected to multiple access points. Even Asimov couldn\'t determine the actual location of Huaxu in such a short time.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Enhance Inverse (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
With a violent shake, the transport plane lands next to the Support Force\'s supply vehicles.
[Bridget]: Fortunately, they didn\'t crash into the ruins.
Struggling to adapt to the harsh sunlight of the outside world, you open your eyes to the laughter of the Chief Support Officer. However, the virtual space still appears before you.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Recover Clue (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Shortly after, Asimov contacts you on the comms as anticipated.
[Asimov]: ...Do you copy? I\'m assuming you\'ve disembarked by now.
[Asimov]: There should still be visual interference from the virtual space, right? Don\'t worry about it for now.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Enemies in Sight (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Not long after leaving the supply vehicle, you find the street covered with red spikes and pools of red liquid.
[Lucia]: What is it?
[Liv]: Maybe it\'s the manifestation of the Punishing Virus. I\'ve seen similar images in the database.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Crimson Tide (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: A horde of Corrupted has gathered in this area, but there aren\'t that many virtual projections appearing.
[Lucia]: Do we not have enough data?
[Lee]: It\'s time-consuming to extract data from active Corrupted, not to mention the sheer number of them.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Crimson Tide (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
