After finally putting an end to the danger, Lee finishes setting up the security terminal.
[Spear of F.O.S.]: Security terminal activated. Establishing connection >>>>>>>> …
As the terminal signal reaches full strength, the virtual projections begin to become more apparent.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Shades of the Past (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Climbing up the long and narrow steps, you come upon a relatively safe area, finally allowing you to unload the heavy mods and empty air cylinder.
You search all the accessible floors but find no one. Only the rooms lying in ruins remain unsearched.
[Liv]: But there aren\'t any signs of activities in these rooms.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Piper (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After removing the mini storage terminal from the square auxiliary device, the security terminal connected to the Spear of F.O.S. gently vibrates.
[Spear of F.O.S.]: New recording found. Update the currently generated projection?
[Lee]: Update.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Hetero-Creature (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
With your combined efforts, you have defeated the last of them. However, among their familiar mechanical bodies, you find some unfamiliar Corrupted.
[Liv]: What are these things?
[Lucia]: Looks like the fused Corrupted on the train.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Plunder & Sacrifice (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After defeating the Corrupted along the way, the four of you finally reach the end of the street.
[Lee]: Gather data, then pinpoint Roland and the boy.
[Spear of F.O.S.]: Acquiring target data [>>>>>>>>] Complete.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Past & Future (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Not long after pressing onward, a familiar figure appears among the projections in the ruins.
[Liv]: Is that... the boy we just saw?
A boy stands on the lofty ruins, looking out at the destroyed block.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Blood Link (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: We\'re almost done searching the area, but we didn\'t turn up any clues.
[Lucia]: This is all we can see on the map. Where should we go next?
Just when everyone is at a loss, a flustered researcher catches everyone\'s attention.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Continue Forward (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The four of you follow the planned route out of the ruins and into an area interspersed with abandoned factories.
[Murray]: I already know the general situation. I\'ll contact you again if there are any new developments.
[Murray]: There\'s no need to worry.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Full of Thorns (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Walking along the designated route, the four of you walk cautiously among the dilapidated ruins.
[Liv]: This place is completely different than what I remember. How long has it been?
[Lucia]: Really? For me, this place feels more and more familiar, but I can\'t remember why.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → We Were Here (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You input the data on the Ascendants into the Spear of F.O.S., this time generating the projections of Alpha and Luna.
[Liv]: What are they doing here?
[Lee]: We\'re approaching the Ascendants\' base. It\'s not that surprising to see their projections.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Shattered Fragments (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The riot in front of you lets out a strange roar, then turns into remains like before.
[Lucia\'s Projection]: It\'s abnormal for Commandant to not respond. Murol, Xun, we\'re pulling out.
[Lucia]: ...I remember saying that before, but...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → City of Fakes (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
With the surging Red Tide at their backs, the silhouettes of buildings appear before them.
Bridget races the mobile supply vehicle along the winding road. Even though you had grown accustomed to riding in transport crafts to and from Babylonia, the jostling speed of the vehicle was unbearable.
Right as you are about to vomit, the vehicle finally comes to a stop.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Red Tide's Guidance (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: This is...
[Liv]: Look here, Commandant.
Looking in the direction Liv is pointing, you see dilapidated high-rises around you. But then...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Welcoming Ceremony (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After walking down the corridor for nearly ten minutes, you finally arrive at a room similar to the entrance of the bomb shelter.
[Lucia]: That\'s...
Following Lucia\'s line of sight, you look around to see a room full of Corrupted.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Welcoming Ceremony (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Corrupted]: —!
[Lucia]: !
[Corrupted]: ...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Curtain (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
City 075, Core Area of the underground cavern.
[Luna]: ...
The holo-map in front clearly shows red dots moving around the city. Based on their distance, it is obvious that they are closing in.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Unexpected Support (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
City 075, platform of the underground cavern.
Lee and Lucia are counting the remaining serum and ammo on the entry platform of the cavern. Liv is attempting to sync their intel with Babylonia. She looks unsure when she reopens her eyes after a while.
[Liv]: Communication... disconnected...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Ascension Secrets (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: This ring-shaped underground facility consists of different sectors that serve different purposes, including the Living Area, the Armament Area, and the Industrial Area.
[Lee]: All of them were built encircling the Core Area, and from what the blueprint told us, each of them consists of a pathway to the Core.
[Lee]: We\'ve entered through Area B, which is designated as the Industrial Area.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Ascension Secrets (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Spear of F.O.S.]: Initiating virtual spatial recreation with Spear of F.O.S. >>> Complete.
[Spear of F.O.S.]: Beginning spatial recreation.
Roland struggles to speak as he blocks Gabriel\'s strike with his chain blade.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Test (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Gabriel]: I do not understand it, Miss Luna.
[Luna]: What do you mean?
[Gabriel]: Your goal.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Question (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Having breached the blockade, Gray Raven arrives at the bridge that leads to the Core Area.
The wide span of the bridge extends forward indefinitely, until it reaches into the darkness that hides an enormous structure, the destination of this journey.
Despite your inability to gauge the depth and structures beneath the bridge, nothing screams "danger" louder to you than the occasional noises of the turning gears and the ominous blinking red light.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Question (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Commandant!
A bomb explodes less than five meters away from you. Liv immediately opens a Protective Field.
Roland takes this opportunity to fall back further to the entrance of the Core Area. Despite the unrelenting attacks from the Gray Ravens, his reaction has been nothing short of a walk in the park.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Fury of the Agent (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Gabriel]: ...As a devotee, I merely wish to rectify any uncertainty of yours.
[Gabriel]: Your kindness, I worry, will destabilize the resolve of the Ascension-Network.
[Gabriel]: The Network requires an agent of absolute power. Hesitancy and mercy are not the attributes of the devoted.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Fury of the Agent (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
What follows is a one-sided massacre.
The Hetero-Creatures have not even closed in on Luna when they are obliterated by a massive surge of energy. The moony young girl dances inside the storm of Red Tide and severed limbs, her frame untainted.
Their roles have reversed. With a wave of the hand, Luna switches the allegiance of the creatures, and they are now charging at Gabriel.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Master of Ceremony (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Are you okay, Commandant?!
Roland\'s stun grenade has not dealt any actual damage. It seems like he only meant to stall your advances.
[Lucia]: The road to Core Area\'s blocked from the inside. There\'s nothing we can do on this end.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Cross the Bridge (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Seeking a way to cross the bridge, you have returned to the city ruins outside, where the Support Force has established a temporary base of operation.
[Bridget]: Oh, that was quick?
[Bridget]: Do you need help?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Huaxu's Projection (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: The Core Area is up ahead.
[Liv]: Once we\'re inside, we might be facing more than just Roland alone. The other Ascendants...
[Lee]: It\'s not unwise to wait for backup before advancing. What do you think, Lucia?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Visitor (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The ground begins to tremble after Huaxu enters the circular contraption, which appears to be a platform lift.
[Liv]: Is this one of Huaxu\'s traps?
[Lee]: No point trying to be safe in the enemy\'s den. If Huaxu wanted to harm us, it would\'ve been done already.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Crimson Resolve (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The low hum of vibration signifies the end of the giant platform\'s descent.
Huaxu departs the elevator right away, ignoring everyone\'s watchful gaze.
[Lucia]: Let\'s follow. Stay alert.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Divergence Point (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: ...
Deep inside her M.I.N.D., someone seems to be waiting for Lucia.
[Lucia]: Alpha?!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Sealed Past (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After leaving her two teammates, Lucia rushed to the destination as fast as possible, but all that remained was a sea of wreckage, with no sign of survivors.
[Lucia]: ...Commandant! Where are you...
No matter how many times Lucia requested a response in her comms, there was no reply from the commandant. Lucia began to feel uneasy.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Shards of Remorse (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The Corrupted arrived in waves. Lucia, with her wounded leg, struggled to hold on. Even with the large amount of enemies she had defeated, she still could not change a thing...
More of them gathered in the periphery of her vision, ready to destroy this waning line of defense.
[Hiro]: Lucia... enough. My corruption... I\'m too far gone.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Chaotic Memories (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Lucia moves forward while thinking about Luna.
Perhaps influenced by this longing, the M.I.N.D. growls and blocks all the pathways around her.
[???]: These are the humans you believe in... Sister...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Lost Heart (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Alpha slowly opens her eyes in a barren field set aflame.
[Lucia]: She\'s corroding my consciousness. Can\'t believe the M.I.N.D.s connection is capable of that...
Huaxu\'s connection has twisted their M.I.N.D.s together, but Alpha\'s intense fury caused her part to further expand. It will not be long before she consumes Lucia\'s.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Lucia (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Focusing on the Mind Beacon above, Lucia strives to drift upward within the dark pit.
Having gotten over her attachments and accepted her regrets, Lucia escapes the abyss before the M.I.N.D.s merge beyond the divergence point.
[Lucia]: ...I\'ve made it! The merge hasn\'t crossed the divergence point, and my consciousness hasn\'t been devoured!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Lucia (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Luna]: Lucia... Don\'t go...
The defeated Luna slowly dissipates, but Lucia still steps forward and holds her in her arms, gently caressing her face.
[Lucia]: Please forgive me... I have to keep my promise and find you out there, so I cannot stay. No matter what you choose this time... I\'ll be with you.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → To the Future (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Lucia opens her eyes and finds Liv and Lee before her in an intense battle with Roland.
Facing only half of the Gray Ravens, Roland does not fight as hard as he did, and instead pushes the two around with sporadic attacks, seemingly trying to stall for time.
And you, standing nearby, carry multiple injuries as if you have just been through a gruesome battle.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Polyphage Abyss (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
With Alpha stuck with Roland, you carry Huaxu\'s key and swiftly leave the Core Area platform lift.
[Liv]: The Punishing Virus is highly concentrated up ahead. Let me treat your wounds here now.
[Liv]: (Nods) I got this.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → A Perfect Disguise? (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
As you look for a way in, Murray happens to come through in your comms.
[Murray]: Signal\'s finally back. What\'s your status?
[Lee]: ...?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Audio Analysis (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
As expected, it does not take long before that person calls again.
[Murray]: Lee, have you guys reached the transport pod I mentioned?
[Lee]: "Murray," or whatever you want to call yourself... Maybe you thought you did a good job mimicking him, but you could not fool me.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Mermaid's Gift (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Following the tracks left behind by Lamia, the four of you soon reach a platform in an open area.
[Lee]: Is Lamia here?
[Liv]: Something isn\'t quite right...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Mermaid Caught Up (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lamia]: Stop it... I surrender...
Lamia barely resists, surrendering immediately after being discovered.
[Lee]: Are you... really an Ascendant?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Horrifying Marks (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Only cracked and shattered rocks remain when you arrive at the epicenter.
[Liv]: There was a fight here.
[Lucia]: Only an Ascendant is capable of this level of destruction.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Cannibalism (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Once again using the mountaineering wire from the Support Force, you successfully capture the Hetero-Creature.
[Lamia]: I\'m still tied, so...
Lee loosens the steel wire around Lamia\'s arms while pointing his gun at her head.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Cannibalism (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The two ivory figures clash in mid-air, striking each other with incomprehensible speed.
Just the energy spilled from their attacks has left frightening marks on the surrounding cliffs.
But Luna has the upper hand the whole time, taking the high ground in their duel before knocking the creature to the ground, creating a massive crater.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Resolve (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The Polyphage\'s silhouette becomes more apparent the further you follow Lamia down underground. The closer you are, the more its colossal size becomes evident, as well as the malevolence that seeps in.
Eventually, there is only a rift standing between the Polyphage and you. Below it, the Red Tide roils and crashes to the sides of the cliff.
[Lamia]: Hmph... This is where I come in. After all, you wouldn\'t be able to pull this off...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Mermaid's Purpose (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lamia]: Tch... What a clingy bunch. Should\'ve loosened it up a bit.
[Lee]: Think again.
Lee catches a reflection of red light in his peripheral and instinctually leaps in your direction.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Huge Threat (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Gabriel]: So you have made your way here.
[Lucia]: Gabriel...!
Not only are Lucia\'s preemptive strikes easily countered by the humanoid Hetero-Creature next to Gabriel, but she is also pushed back several feet away.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Huge Threat (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: ...Did we do it?
Lucia\'s last strike has hit the exposed Hetero-Core. The Polyphage lets out a screeching, distorted scream, its attacks clearly slowing down.
[Lee]: Is there no stopping it even when we wrecked the Hetero-Core?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Confession (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Despite the difference in their strength, Roland has still managed to stall Alpha long enough. It is clear who is winning by the end of the fight, yet Alpha cannot fathom why Roland is dead set on stopping her.
[α]: You should know that there\'s no way you\'re beating me...
Alpha removes her blade from the side of Roland\'s abdomen, and vital fluid pours out from the wound.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Race Against Time (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Like newborn babies flapping their limbs, a hunting claw extrudes from the head of the Polyphage and waves around, preying.
[Lee]: The top of the Polyphage is displaying a massive energy response. That should be where Luna is.
Like an immune system of a living organism, a large number of Hetero-Creatures react to Gray Raven\'s arrival by overwhelming them like a flood.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Race Against Time (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: The enemies are hatching faster than we can beat them! We\'re not going to get anywhere if we\'re locked in this endless fight.
[Lee]: Liv and I will stay here to keep the path open. Lucia, take Commandant and breach the encirclement and get to the Core!
[Liv]: That\'s right, Lee and I can both support you with ranged attacks, so you can make use of your explosive capabilities to get through!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Awake and Destroy (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Luna]: ...
Lucia can see Luna through the transparent Energy Core at the top of the Polyphage.
The revelation that Luna was an Ascendant during their encounter in the Kowloong Metropolis had Lucia shaken back then. Her thoughts tangled up in her M.I.N.D. like a disordered ball of yarn.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Awake and Destroy (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Deep underground.
[Roland]: Oh... How things have changed.
Roland sits at the bottom of a crater, watching the Red Tide pouring down from the broken pipes. Beside him lies the other ashen Hetero-Creature, now completely lifeless.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Invader (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Murray]: Phew...
[Murray]: It\'s just like what Asimov said. Even with a makeshift bionic terminal, the Spear of F.O.S. can act as a visual proxy for hacking.
[Murray]: Well then, let\'s get working.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Multi-line Operation (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Dominik Memorial Park, Gestalt virtual space.
Moving the video screen of the Eden 16-B region before his eyes, Murray watches the battle with a bemused expression on his face.
[Murray]: The "Veritas" model...? I didn\'t know the Purifying Force was sent here.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Paradox (Part C)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Murray]: I knew it wouldn\'t be that easy.
[Murray]: If so...
[Murray]: I better hurry up and finish President Hassen\'s mission.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Earth's Fulcrum (Part D)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Sneaking before the database terminal, Murray connects his primed data weapon to the database.
[Accessing Gestalt Core Database: 3-3-2-2-S-Luden]
[Authority Level Required: (&*T*&Ytby]

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Rough Marks (Part E)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Asimov]: The signal is leaving the database.
[Yata]: V, what do we do?
[Valeria]: I\'ll intercept him. Yata, after he leaves, go extract the records to get what we need.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Cat & Mouse (Part F)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
When an infiltration devolves into a game of cat and mouse, the one at a disadvantage is always the one with fewer preparations.
—Just like Murray right now, and the pursuer behind him.
Murray chucks another defensive program behind him, marking the imminent end of the weapon stock he prepared.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Scarab (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A massive explosion flattens the entrance of the concrete pipe, completely burying the path.
With the target lost, the pursuer can only roll to the side to slow down.
Beside her, air flickers in scale-like shadows, slowly revealing a humanoid shape.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Clamber (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Yata]: V.
[Valeria]: Yes?
Climbing onto the wall with her appendages, Yata checks the next waypoint. Valeria soon follows.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → "Bad Boy" (Part C)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Murray is walking on the Eden 16-B road, checking his handheld terminal from time to time.
Up high, two pairs of eyes—Valeria and Bazhi—are monitoring him from both sides.
[Valeria]: Point A, target confirmed.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Bait (Part D)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Murray]: ...
Hiding in an inconspicuous corner on the streets, Murray is fiddling with his terminal and controlling the lure program in his guise.
Valeria and Yata are closing in on him, creeping to around ten meters behind.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Question (Part E)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Valeria]: Are we clear yet?!
[Yata]: Another 300m!
[Yata]: Two hundred meters!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Traveler (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
While Babylonia is falling...
—Somewhere in the universe is a once bustling town. Now devoid of any occupants, the buildings and houses have become nothing but concrete and rebar gravestones.
Only the occasional red streams can be seen coursing around the crystalline pillars.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → "Great Antenna" (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Rohacchi]: Na. Nami.
[Nanami]: ...?
[Rohacchi]: I. Question.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Dialogue (Part C)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Together, Martin and Rohacchi push the weighty hatch open. Dust and debris billow in the underground space.
As they settle, a terminal in the underground chamber can be seen faintly glowing in green.
[Martin]: You think this\'ll do?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Journey Continued (Part D)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Disconnecting the cable, Nanami\'s face is veiled behind her upraised arm.
And so, Martin and Rohacchi do not catch her saddened expression.
[Nanami]: Phew...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Memory 1 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bridget]: Hey, you guys arrive at the right time.
[Bridget]: I\'m caught up in all these rescue missions here and I\'m in over my head. Would you be able to help?
[Bridget]: Come on. It\'s got to do with the Red Tide, and we can\'t really ask the newbies for help. I\'m sure Gray Raven is a lot more experienced.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Memory 2 (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Having prepared yourselves sufficiently, you re-enter the area that the Red Tide has invaded.
Tinted bloody red by the Red Tide, the place is like a wound cut open.
A female Construct is wandering amidst the red puddles, seemingly looking for something.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Memory 3 (Part C)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Some time has passed since the Gray Raven escorted Ruolin back.
[Bridget]: You came at the right time.
She looks the same as always, but there is something about her that betrays her composure.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Tide Direction 1 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Standing at a vantage point, Gabriel looks at a map of the city. Red dots seem to be moving toward the city from every direction.
[Gabriel]: Not only does it not work, it has also attracted vermins...
[Gabriel]: The signal jammer is functioning well. This underground facility is holding up better than I expected.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Tide Direction 2 (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: Gray Raven... Hang in there.
[Kamui]: Speaking of which, you haven\'t said a thing so far. People won\'t even know you\'re here if you don\'t say something, Wanshi.
[Wanshi]: ...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Tide Direction 3 (Part C)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Camu]: ...Tsk.
Camu is standing on a crumbling building in the abandoned city. The Red Tide rumbles under his feet.
[Camu]: How annoying. Can\'t just wade across it either.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Tide Direction 4 (Part D)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Chrome]: Alright. Sample collected.
[Kamui]: Without the protective gear, I\'m sure we\'d be infected if we got any closer... What a creepy thing.
Though sealed in the airtight container, the sample is still attempting to flow toward the Red Tide as if it is alive. It also continues to produce small Hetero-Creatures.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Blood Well 1 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After getting rid of all the Corrupted in the area, you spot someone familiar in the data you have picked up.
[Liv]: This is... the girl who was looking for her sister. Based on the timestamp, this happened not long after she hung up the phone...
[Liv]: I wonder if she did find her sister... Should I replay the record?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Blood Well 2 (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You have found more of Liadrin\'s records, but the timestamps show that they are not from the distant past. Instead, these happened very recently.
Fatally wounded, Liadrin wanders alone in the ruins while Gabriel and Lamia watch her from the roof of a half-collapsed building.
[Lamia]: Let\'s just toss her to those guys that are snooping around... Do you think it\'s worth it?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Voiceless Self 1 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Some years ago—never mind how long precisely—a certain rumor has spread out among the scavengers.
[Young Scavenger]: T-they say that there are p-plenty of resources in those abandoned ruins.
[Young Scavenger]: A-apparently some organization brought them there to rebuild the ruins.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Voiceless Self 2 (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
They witness the Red Tide and its projections first hand, then figure out the strength of the mobsters around the ruins. After carefully selecting a weaker group, they beat them up and take their place.
The next day at dusk, the cocky mobsters somehow show up on the street with more scars and bruises than the night before.
Forced by a group of scavengers, they kneel on the desolate street and disappear along the Red Tide.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Voiceless Self 3 (Part C)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
On that night, after Shrek starts snoring, Bella sneaks out of the room with a pack of cans and a bag of biscuits.
[Bella]: I remember a few of the teenagers on the west side still have some books. I can trade with them...
When the sky starts to light up, Bella returns to their temporary base with the rest of her supplies and a copy of Cardman Rider Genesis.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Voiceless Self 4 (Part D)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Shrek]: ...
[Red Tide Projection]: ...
[Shrek]: I was planning on complaining how hard it was to look for you that day. But, never mind.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Blasphemy 1 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
"I saw stars in the abyss."
————
Gabriel awakens to the belt that has formed from the gears interlocking, articulating, and fitting with one another.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Blasphemy 2 (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Red tides ripple against Gabriel\'s feet, and hetero-creatures now swarm around him.
Countless substances dissolve and reform in the tides, becoming part of the hetero-creatures.
A Corrupted wandering around Gabriel is suddenly crushed into pieces by Gabriel\'s giant hand. The pieces are then unceremoniously discarded into the Red Tide, attracting the hetero-creatures.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Adverse Impact 1 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The skies are pitch black, the chill of the night wind threatening to rob her of every last bit of warmth she has.
She reaches out her hand trying to catch a glimpse of the moonlight spilling over, yet her hand does nothing other than blocking her own sight.
[Lamia]: Well, doesn\'t seem like I stand any chance to win.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Adverse Impact 2 (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: So she agreed?
[“421”]: She couldn\'t say no.
[???]: Cheers to yet another success of yours?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Faith Praises 1 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: The data we\'ve collected from this area is all relatively new. It should be able to show us a record of the Red Tide\'s rapid expansion.
People tread silently in a jungle of concrete.
Hunger, disease, insanity, disability...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Faith Praises 2 (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
It takes them a while to finally find a strong enough building.
Just when they have finished settling in for the night, a group of armed young scavengers appears.
[Armed Hoodlum]: Who gave you the okay to stay here?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Faith Praises 3 (Part C)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The group brings the new scavengers up to speed with the state of affairs. The new scavengers appear unconvinced, but still agree to investigate the waves with them when they can be heard.
When they return, they start talking about the projections they have seen in the Red Tide in great detail.
Then the beans are spilled, reaching every last scavenger in the building. All the scavengers start talking about the Red Tide.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Engraver 1 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
This is a dark underground building. The dust in the air and the cobwebs in the corners are signs that it has been years since anyone lived here.
A soft blue fluorescence light appears before a robot, and the projection shows the face of a young man following a brief distortion.
[Murray]: Well, it seems like the connection is fine.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 13 Fake Ascension → Engraver 2 (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bai Gui]: It seems like we failed to bring down Babylonia.
[Qu]: That\'s fine. I\'ve never wanted to end human suffering that way, anyway.
[Qu]: When a plan fails, we just move on to the next one.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 14 Imprisoned Sight → 14-1 Game in a Cage (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Overcoming countless adversities and witnessing just as many lay down their lives, the intrepid heroes continue to search for hope on this most harrowing journey.
Most people did not know that this journey would be unworthy of adulation. From the moment they set forth, they were doomed to a life entangled in shadows.
Reading this file enshrouded with deceit, the names of these heroes remain unknown.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 14 Imprisoned Sight → 14-2 Conceal (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Chrome opens his eyes to see the familiar dark room and Asimov\'s solemn face.
[Chrome]: You\'ve been working hard, Asimov. How is the test data?
[Asimov]: You\'ve reached a high enough degree of synchronization and proficiency to pass the test.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 14 Imprisoned Sight → 14-3 Return to Core Area (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Gloomy clouds blanket the sky. Golden rays of light struggle to penetrate the clouds as if attempting to save what remained of Earth.
The transport craft carrying the Strike Hawk trio breaks through the dark clouds and lands steadily on a patch of open land covered in yellow sand.
As soon as the hatch door opens, a blonde figure rushes out. He looks around and shakes his head in disappointment.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 14 Imprisoned Sight → 14-4 Untraceable (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Chrome follows the Punishing concentration in the direction of footsteps and enters a patch of scorched ruins.
Even though the footsteps begin to fade, Chrome discovers a pack of unusual Hetero-Creatures.
Compared to those previously discovered, they more closely resemble an organism that once existed on Earth—scorpions.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 14 Imprisoned Sight → 14-5 Gaze of the Abyss (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After planting the explosive device and retreating to safety, they detonate the bomb. Amid a thunderous boom and plume of smoke, an indistinguishable figure jumps into the pit with lightning speed.
[Kamui]: Someone\'s there?!
[Chrome]: Follow them!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 14 Imprisoned Sight → 14-6 New Woes (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Following the final blow from Kamui, the fish-like Hetero-Creatures in the greenhouse are torn to pieces.
[Kamui]: All that\'s left is you!
Kamui swings his greatsword, but his attack is deflected by a mysterious force. A tall figure saunters out from within the shadowy depths as if paying no mind to the enemy.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 14 Imprisoned Sight → 14-7 Recycle Prisoner (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After a chaotic flash of red, Gabriel disappears above, leaving only Cinderelik floating in the air as she is pulled by four fish.
She quietly looks down at the platform below like a doll hanging on a rope to dry.
Suddenly, Hetero-Creatures begin to pile up on the platform lift. Along with them, the Punishing concentration also begins to rise. Fortunately, the trio\'s special reinforcements for this mission barely manage to keep the corruption rate just below critical.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 14 Imprisoned Sight → 14-8 Perfectionism (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The massive frame in front of them crumbles into a pile of countless remains, scattering on the floor. Numerous neuro-cables and parts protrude from its hulking arms—some of which are still covered with Babylonia\'s manufacturing logo.
[Chrome]: ...
[Kamui]: It\'s not like you to frown at Corrupted, Captain.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 14 Imprisoned Sight → 14-9 Fated Maze (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Their surroundings begin to disintegrate. The flickering lights and image of Vonnegut begin to drift in space.
[Chrome]: My visual module is being hacked...!
[Vonnegut]: Oh? Is that all?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 14 Imprisoned Sight → 14-10 No Response (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Climbing the ladder, the ground underfoot begins to rumble slightly.
The source of the rumbling not only comes from Camu fighting against the enemy down below...
...But also from the Hetero Tide rushing toward Chrome from above.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 14 Imprisoned Sight → 14-11 Project Winter (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
In the glare of white light, Chrome opens his eyes.
The scene and sounds before him are like a false curtain of night. It is chaotic and difficult to distinguish.
A familiar figure is standing to the side, silently watching him on the maintenance table.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 14 Imprisoned Sight → 14-12 Extra Mission (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You arrive at the transport craft twenty minutes in advance. In addition to Lucia, who was already waiting, you see Lee and Liv also standing there.
[Liv]: Commandant...!
[Liv]: Because Lee and I have been worried sick about you...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 14 Imprisoned Sight → 14-13 Hidden Area (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The team approaches the previously collapsed entrance. However, to their surprise, it remains open as if welcoming everyone.
[Chrome]: Based on our previous expedition, it\'s unlikely that agent Luna is in here. Our top priority should be cleaning up any Red Tide we come across.
[Chrome]: As for Vonnegut, we don\'t have much intel, but according to Gabriel, there\'s likely another agent nearby. This is a stealth mission. Avoid direct confrontation with them at all costs.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 14 Imprisoned Sight → 14-14 Hetero-Hive Mother (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Just as they are about to leave, a voice suddenly comes from the darkness of the exit.
[Cinderelik]: What are you going to do to Mother?
A girl with a broken wing descends the staircase. In one hand, she holds the mysterious remains of something, and in the other hand, she holds a slender crystal pyramid, dwarfing her small, delicate figure.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 14 Imprisoned Sight → 14-15 Starry Sky (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
An instructor once asked in class...
[???]: What is the most dangerous enemy?
[???]: Overwhelming power? Shrewd tactics? No, the answer is more simple.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 15 The Last Spark → 15-1 Right Under the Rose (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Babylonia, 24 hours before Cerberus receives their mission.
Having walked along the long, narrow corridor, Nikola stands before the old, wooden door at the end, and he pushes it open to enter the room.
Unveiled before his eyes is a crass, tasteless, yet ridiculously luxurious study. Nikola takes a look around the room and frowns.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 15 The Last Spark → 15-2 Strike (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Earth, two hours after Cerberus\' mission is abruptly terminated.
Canines prefer to move in packs. Once separated, their survivability and strength are greatly diminished.
Right now, Kurono is treating Cerberus as if they are real dogs.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 15 The Last Spark → 15-3 Seaborne Graveyard (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The bell-shaped nozzle ignites as the oxygen-fuel mixture propels the aircraft.
The transport craft lifts off at the speed of a rocket. The number on the altimeter climbs; by the time you soar above the clouds, moonlight floods the windshields as if welcoming you to a whole new world.
And yet, you are in no mood to appreciate the scenery or to celebrate being free.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 15 The Last Spark → 15-4 Atlantis (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Hassen]: I know what you\'re thinking, Commandant.
[Hassen]: We both know that the Punishing Virus first appeared within the chamber of the first zero-point reactor before spreading and infecting the whole world.
[Hassen]: That\'s right. The "first" zero-point reactor.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 15 The Last Spark → 15-4 Atlantis (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After defeating the last Corrupted on the landing pad, Vera relaxes for a second.
But the city does not stop sinking when the last Corrupted is defeated.
There is only one possibility—the city sinking is not related to the Corrupted attack.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 15 The Last Spark → 15-5 Enter the City (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A long time ago, before the apocalypse.
Like everyone else visiting the seaborne city for the first time, Lustrous is trying to view it and soak in its entirety.
If the Golden Age is a crown, then this is one of the brightest jewels on it.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 15 The Last Spark → 15-5 Enter the City (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A Corrupted tries to sneak up on you from behind, but Vera nails it to the metal wall of the boat with her banner spear before it can touch you.
Having made sure that it is no longer moving, she kicks it off the boat.
[Vera]: Some of them are not mechanoids native to the city.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 15 The Last Spark → 15-6 Return (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Four hours before the two Babylonia visitors arrive on Atlantis.
Another uninvited guest is also visiting the city.
She arrives from the depth of the ocean. Being the coward she is, she has brought along all the Corrupted she encountered on her way here. She looks like a returning queen with her army behind her.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 15 The Last Spark → 15-7 Graveyard for the Arrogance (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The pyramid-shaped main island is superimposed above a large, circular chasm, where water pours down its edge and forms one majestic, annular waterfall, plummeting into the seemingly bottomless abyss.
Wide roads connect the main city and the six towering gray spires around it, still standing steadfast despite how long they have been abandoned.
After defeating the Corrupted, your boat enters the main city unscathed.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 15 The Last Spark → 15-7 Graveyard for the Arrogance (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Vera]: This isn\'t ending any time soon.
The two of you take down another wave of Corrupted, and Vera\'s frame is overheating from the continuous intense fights.
Vera immediately understands what you mean. She picks you up and carries you over her shoulder, leaping into a building.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 15 The Last Spark → 15-8 Another Journey (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
In the 19th century, a textile factory in Manchester kickstarted the Age of Steam and the first Industrial Revolution.
And Lustrous believes that the zero-point reactor in Atlantis will kickstart the next Industrial Revolution.
The beds in Manchester were never cold. When the workers woke up to work, the previous shift returned home and slept.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 15 The Last Spark → 15-9 Up or Down (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
There is nothing else useful in the office apart from the researchers\' journals.
The two of you exit the building and return outside.
You can see lightning in the distant sky.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 15 The Last Spark → 15-9 Up or Down (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Vera]: These electromagnetic barriers are only set up to counter outsiders. It seems like a basic defense system on the base.
[Vera]: IDs that aren\'t in the city\'s records will be stopped.
[Vera]: Yep. Have you also noticed it?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 15 The Last Spark → 15-10 Light of the Zero-point Energy (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After following Vera and breaching several laboratories with force, you have finally arrived at the innermost area of the city.
This place is designed to be tightly sealed. Some of the gates, however, have fallen into disrepair, and water has poured inside.
But the water disappears again after you cross the last enclosed defense line.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 15 The Last Spark → 15-11 Raise Your Torch (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The recording is over.
All the questions you have on the way here have been answered.
There was no evacuation, no bodies. Everyone stayed until the last possible moment. This brain above the Atlantic Ocean did not stop thinking until the end.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 15 The Last Spark → 15-11 Raise Your Torch (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Having removed all the obstacles in your way, you have discovered Lamia\'s tracks on the way to the observatory.
Long and deep scratches graze the metal walls, marks that can only be made with her twinblade.
[Vera]: She\'s indeed after the data of the zero-point reactor.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 15 The Last Spark → 15-12 The Last Human (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After that first and last meeting—
[Lustrous]: I thought there would be more opposition.
Lustrous looks slightly surprised.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 15 The Last Spark → 15-13 Across the Waves (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The sky opens up and rain pours down as if water from the whole world is converging here.
Vera jumps onto the roof and finds the humanoid-hybrid Ascendant standing not far away. Lamia lifts her head slightly, looking at the sky, letting the rain hit her face.
Despite not expecting her to listen, Vera still raises the banner spear in her hand and points it at Lamia, threatening her loudly.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 15 The Last Spark → 15-13 Across the Waves (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The twinblade and the banner spear clash with each other, creating an ear-piercing ring.
The air seems to be humming as well. Invisible ripples extend outward in the rain every time the blades meet.
Taking advantage of a gap in Lamia\'s defense, Vera\'s spear strikes at Lamia, piercing a raindrop that is about to hit the butterfly on her chest. Before the spearhead connects, a large wave hits them from the side.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 15 The Last Spark → 15-14 Her Flag (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The city is about to sink, and this is when the storm stops.
You look out, and the city is gone. The horizon reverts to a flat plane, the top of the six spires now tiny dots, barely noticeable. Even the tallest main city is fully submerged, save for the roof of the observatory.
The wind howls, and the waves rumble.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 18 Her Last Bow → 18-1 Journey (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Sniper]: Why?
This is the first thing Sniper-PK43 says after his power is rebooted.
[??]: Hmm? Why what?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 18 Her Last Bow → 18-2 House of Love (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Snow covers everything as far as they can see, and high-rises and roadside structures are buried beneath unmelting ice. Human settlements are ruined beyond recognition.
This is the first time Sniper-PK43 leaves his building. Walking in the city he was once tasked to guard, he creates a little white mist with every step he takes as his legs press and lifts the quiet, unmoving snow.
Carefully he walks as if afraid of ruining the planet he sets foot on. Then he finds a giant wave of snow coming from the highway before him.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 18 Her Last Bow → 18-3 Search (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: C\'mon! Snipey, say "cheese"!
[Nanami]: Can you show a smiley face on your screen?
The signal light on Sniper-PK43 flashes yellow.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 18 Her Last Bow → 18-3 Search (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: Look, there\'s something strange on this machine.
Nanami jumps off the mech and kneels down next to the frozen "traveler" on the roadside, poking at the fabrics on it.
[Nanami]: He seems to be carrying a bag...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 18 Her Last Bow → 18-4 Return (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Nothing can grow on land in the deadly winter. The chilling wind is howling in the sky. The entire earth is blanketed in snow.
Nanami ventures forward in knee-deep snow. Every single step takes enormous effort. As she looks around, she can still barely recognize the shape of collapsed buildings covered by snow. They look like giant tomb stones.
The earth is now a frozen grave, its epitaph is the evidence of all the creatures that once lived on it. Only traces of their life can be found under the snow.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 18 Her Last Bow → 18-4 Return (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: So what are you doing here?
[Mechanoid]: We, are, robots of the aviation center.
[Mechanoid]: We\'ve been waiting for more friends, but, nobody came.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 18 Her Last Bow → 18-5 Truth (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Gestalt]: Simulation ended.
Nanami opens her eyes again and finds herself standing in a data space. She hears an emotionless female voice.
She takes big steps forward, calling the non-physical existence.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 18 Her Last Bow → 18-6 Reencounter (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Arctic Route Union. After solving Amberia\'s berserk problem with Martin and the other bionic mechanoids, Nanami decides to lead the machines onto a new journey.
[Nanami]: Follow the sound of piper Nanami\'s saw! I\'ll take you to a new place to live!
After experiencing the Ever-Winter in Gestalt\'s simulation, Nanami begins to consciously awaken some machines on her journey.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 18 Her Last Bow → 18-7 War (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Nanami has never seen a battlefield like this.
The ground is charred black under the moonlight. The smell of sulfur spreads in the air as fires slowly burn in the ruins.
Dead bodies of humans, Constructs, and mechanoids remain tangled in a fight. Broken mechanoids speak with their stammering voices, "Free will for machines."

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 18 Her Last Bow → 18-7 War (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The mysterious mechanoid is clearly familiar with this area. After evading the Constructs\' pursuits, they stop in a rural area, where countless discarded mechanoids pile up.
The moon casts its light by Nanami\'s feet. She can smell the dirt, oil, and blood in the wind.
[???]: Master Nanami...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 18 Her Last Bow → 18-8 Church of Machina (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
On the plaza beyond the tower, countless mechanoids can be seen working on removing snow and strengthening the ground.
They are fast and orderly. Barely communicating with one another, they still function perfectly fine as a team.
From underground, the main building stems all the way up to the surface. Vaguely, one can still tell what it used to be—a starship, now buried.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 18 Her Last Bow → 18-9 Last Hope (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
One of the input ports of the furnace is located behind the Church of Machina. Most of the recycled metals are compiled here, carried into the furnace by a conveyor belt where they are melted, then used to build the outer walls of the Church.
After deliberating with Haicma and Spooner, Nanami came to this place alone, paying attention to her surroundings all the way.
[Nanami]: Just come out, will you? I don\'t have much time.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 18 Her Last Bow → 18-10 Cage (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Haicma]: Nanami, as per your request, we\'ve located a facility with a high level of calculating capacity around here.
Haicma and Spooner learn about Zero\'s atrocity against humankind when they join Nanami again. Haicma casts Nanami a worried glance.
[Nanami]: Okay. Thanks!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 18 Her Last Bow → 18-11 Freedom (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
With the medic bot\'s guidance, the group navigates their way through the labyrinth of pipes and arrives at an open, bigger underground space.
Right beside them, separated by a glass wall, is a room—with humans in it.
[Nanami]: Wait... Haicma, there are humans inside!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 18 Her Last Bow → 18-11 Freedom (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: It\'s okay now. I will set you free!
Nanami runs to a bed and unties the human from it. She wants to disconnect him from the entangled tubes, but there is no place to start with.
[Human]: No...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 18 Her Last Bow → 18-12 Divergence (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The group finally arrives at the spacious hall. Located at the end of the "core," the terminal blinks in blue; a flashing cord showing that the terminal is in operation stretches up to the ceiling. Nanami seems to have seen this scene before, except it\'s nothing like what she saw.
Standing before them is an entire army\'s worth of "Gear" machines—against the three of them.
The red mechanoid girl is standing at the very front of "Gear", staring at Nanami as she walks toward her.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 18 Her Last Bow → 18-12 Divergence (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Zero]: Sage, please... please just tell me exactly what I need to do to walk down the path of revelation alongside you...
The mesmerized mechanoid girl chants Nanami\'s title as she walks up the stairs. She stares at Nanami piously like a lost fanatic pursuing the will of her god.
[Zero]: You healed me, Sage, yet you broke me down again... when I have cleared your path of all obstructions and brought you your favorite humans. Is it wealth you want? Or is it wisdom? I am willing to wield my sword a million times over for you, but I just can\'t imagine having to live without you...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 18 Her Last Bow → 18-13 Determination (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
When she opens her eyes again, Nanami finds herself back in the digital world. It seems like she managed to link herself up to the terminal after all.
Before Nanami says anything, she hears Gestalt\'s cold, hollow voice through the space.
[Gestalt]: The machines that have awakened are bound to rule this planet. It is history\'s choice.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 18 Her Last Bow → 18-14 Find the Answer in the Future (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
As far as the conception of consciousness goes, humankind and the machines are different in one regard—that is, humankind is unable to recall when exactly they first became conscious in life.
Was it during infancy, when they first developed memories and emotions? Or from the very first cry after they left their mother? Or could it be traced all the way back to when the zygote was formed in the oviduct, and was about to rapidly self-divide?
This topic is more philosophical than biological. But the same question is very easy to answer for mechanoids.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 18 Her Last Bow → 18-18 Awakening (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Nanami\'s thoughts start to drift away after wandering and fighting through countless worlds.
She is facing a dark, void space. No planets or stars can be detected nearby, nor is she able to receive signals of any frequency. Even the temperature in this area is closer to the absolute zero.
She just curls up in the vacuum, letting the abyss consume her.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 18 Her Last Bow → 18-19 Answer (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Universe]: Is this what you\'ve been thinking?
Awake from the absurd dream, Nanami is still drifting in space.
She hears a voice among the stars, speaking a language different from any human language she is aware of. Her ears have captured the sound and somehow understood it.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 18 Her Last Bow → 18-20 Girl From the Future (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Nanami stands at the library\'s entrance.
In fact, it is not exactly a library. At the end of the empty, clean space is a large window that spans from floor to ceiling. The stars outside make Nanami realize she is inside a spacecraft.
She walks in and sees some picture books, fictions and even video game disks arranged nicely on the shelf.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 18 Her Last Bow → 18-21 Farewell (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Eden continues to rotate. Given what might happen if "Empyrea" is deployed, Babylonia has put in place everyone deployable in preparation for any contingencies.
So when Murray leaves the president\'s office, he only sees an empty corridor.
[Murray]: ...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 19 A New Divide → 19-1 Brazen Fire (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Norman]: A long, long time ago...
[Norman]: There was a bunch of happy rabbits. Every day they enjoyed a meal of carrots that grew from the earth. Their lives were blissful, free from worry.
[Norman]: One day, they discovered that carrots bathed in the moonlight would become even sweeter and tastier. The gears in their little brains started turning...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 19 A New Divide → 19-2 Dream Machine (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
—About three months ago, or a week after the twins appeared in the Pulia Forest Park Ruins.
Looking down from Babylonia, the threat from the flying Hetero-Creatures is ever-present.
Babylonia has paid a heavy price trying to reestablish the nightmare route between itself and the surface... but no ace pilot has expected to get past enemies that would not hesitate to throw their lives away.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 19 A New Divide → 19-3 Scire Rebirth (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
It has been a week since Karenina and Teddy accepted the job and arrived at the lunar base. After completing the Omega Prototype, Karenina began work on a new project.
[Teddy]: M.I.N.D. compatibility test complete. Frame stability rate... Hey, try to move your right hand.
[Karenina]: Like this...?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 19 A New Divide → 19-3 Scire Rebirth (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The tests on the new frame are over quickly. The new frame "Scire" has proven to operate adequately in low gravity.
[Yarha]: Good job... The results are better than what we expected, Karenina.
[Karenina]: Tch. It\'s over already? I was just getting started.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 19 A New Divide → 19-4 Zero Rest (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Zero-point energy was once the ultimate vision of the future from the people in the Golden Age. Everyone knew about it. Everyone was staring at it.
However, the development of zero-point energy was always a mystery. The only foundation of all its research was that it existed. Even experts in the energy sector could only start with trial and error.
After countless failures, almost all the researchers in the laboratory have lost patience, their spirits broken. Frustration fills every corner of the room.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 19 A New Divide → 19-5 Gazing Into the Night (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Yarha is adjusting the data on his terminal in the dimly lit Construct Laboratory. Projected before him in the holo-screen is a white-colored Construct slowly taking shape.
Ever since he took the assignment to design the new specialized frame, Yarha has had to stay in this room.
Even with how focused Yarha is, the slightest breeze or movement around him makes him double-check his surroundings before returning to his work.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 19 A New Divide → 19-6 Always In Character (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: "Who can doubt that in times to come, when the true history of my famous deeds comes to light, the wise man who compiles them, when he begins to recount my first sally so early in the day, will write in this manner—"
[???]: "No sooner had rubicund Apollo spread over the face of the wide and spacious earth the golden strands of his beauteous hair, no sooner had diminutive and bright-hued birds with dulcet tongues greeted in sweet, mellifluous harmony the advent of rosy dawn..."
[???]: "...who, forsaking the soft couch of her zealous consort, revealed herself to mortals through the doors and balconies of the Manchegan horizon, than the famous knight..."

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 19 A New Divide → 19-7 See You Later... Or Not? (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
"Knock"... "Knock"...
Someone is knocking on the door to the bedroom in the dead of night... albeit very gently as if trying not to startle the people inside the room.
Not getting any response, a girl with black hair pokes her head from behind the door.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 19 A New Divide → 19-8 Ceaseless Maniac (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Roland]: Hey, are you sure this is the way? And why aren\'t you flying me there if you have wings...
Roland slows down and sighs, complaining intentionally—he has to figure out a way to stall and get rid of the woman before him.
[Voodoo]: Fine by me. As long as you\'re not worried about falling from the sky and turning into a piece of junk.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 19 A New Divide → 19-8 Ceaseless Maniac (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Voodoo?]: You\'re dead, you\'re dead, you\'re dead! I\'ll eat your pretty face! I\'ll write my name on your body with your vital fluid!
Voodoo accelerates and climbs before retracting her wings mid-air, dashing toward Alpha. Right as she is about to hit the ground, her form shifts, and she extends her claws like a wolf, striking Alpha with her slashes.
[α]: Mad dogs... should die in ditches.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 19 A New Divide → 19-9 Disastrous Omen (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
All her equipment is packed. The zero-point reactor has restarted. The Omega Weapons are entering production... The duty of the Engineering Force is complete, and it is time for Karenina and her team to leave the Moon.
Karenina takes a look at her workplace of the last month one last time. From an unknown site to the familiar space it is now, this place has been nothing but memorable.
[Teddy]: What\'s wrong? Are you going to miss this place? What about requesting a transfer? I know a guy at the Union who can pull some strings.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 19 A New Divide → 19-10 Captain Clown (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
An enormous metallic object bursts through the dark clouds, ascending at incredible speed. On its shell is a symbol that proclaims it a spaceship from Babylonia.
But there are no sailors manning the ship at the moment. A lone, posturing captain stands on its bow, confronting the hostile wind until his ship escapes the chains of gravity.
[Roland]: Wasn\'t expecting to actually start the ship on my own... I guess the piloting skills I learned for my character back then haven\'t been completely forgotten.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 19 A New Divide → 19-10 Captain Clown (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Soon, all the remains of the Hetero-Creatures are completely devoured by the monster in the container without leaving a trace of the Punishing Virus behind.
[Roland]: That was thorough...
Roland juggles the container in his hand. The flesh inside does not look any different, even after devouring all the Hetero-Creatures.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 19 A New Divide → 19-11 Mortal Belief (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Yarha]: Aaargh!
Half-lying on the floor, Yarha draws his pistol and keeps shooting the Corrupted before him, finally taking it down before it can reach him.
[Yarha]: Ha... W-what the hell... I\'m not exactly a bad shot.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 19 A New Divide → 19-11 Mortal Belief (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Karenina]: Over there... The core of the zero-point reactor is right ahead!
The Punishing Virus concentration keeps rising as Karenina moves forward. The M.I.N.D. boilover alert from her frame constantly reminds her that the specially designed Inver-Device has reached its limit without connecting to a commandant.
But the increasing concentration only proves that she has come to the right place.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 19 A New Divide → 19-12 Story of the Future (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Collins]: Great, the success of the new specialized frame just gave us a more "proper" excuse to win more influence in the Parliament.
[Rebecca]: "Proper" just doesn\'t sound right when it comes from you.
[Collins]: You really have wronged me. You know, I never liked to break the rules. It\'s just that... sometimes the cost of breaking the rules is too low.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 19 A New Divide → 19-13 Undermine Determination (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Karenina]: No! ****... I can\'t get close at all!
Karenina tries to manually shut down the power supply to the zero-point reactor, but the abnormal gravitational waves have impacted a larger area than she thought. She cannot reach the engine at all.
[Karenina]: I must go back to the propulsion lab... Maybe I can shut down the reactor remotely.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 19 A New Divide → 19-13 Undermine Determination (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
When Karenina gets back to the propulsion lab, she sees many Engineering Force crew along with the uninjured Kurono researchers.
Yarha is standing by the side and taking care of the wounded crew. His eyes light up when he sees Karenina.
[Yarha]: Karenina? We have treated the injured crew. There are still Corrupted...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 19 A New Divide → 19-14 What Is Hope? (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
President Hassen announced a 30-minute break from the World Government\'s executive meeting due to the unexpected message from Karenina. Liszt must find enough reason to support his proposal during this time.
Liszt puts down the very brief incident report sent along with Karenina\'s message. It only mentions a Punishing Virus leak accident of unknown reason in the lunar base, which caused the zero-point engine to go haywire.
[Liszt]: We can\'t let her destroy the zero-point engine...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 19 A New Divide → 19-15 Paths Forward (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Yarha]: What now? I sent the message, but there\'s no reply... Shall we wait for Babylonia\'s decision?
[Teddy]: No way they can make it so fast... We must go now if we are to destroy the zero-point engine.
Teddy gets up on her feet and folds the portable terminal, but Karenina stops her.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 19 A New Divide → 19-16 Enemy of Humankind (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The agent named Luna curls up in a dark dream—or maybe it is not a dream but the boundary of her vague M.I.N.D.
She can only hear her own voice. All the noises from the Ascension-Network are no longer to be heard.
[Luna]: I\'m still alive... My consciousness is still here.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 19 A New Divide → 19-17 Hearts Intertwined (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Not far from the lunar base where nobody can notice, a ship from Babylonia slowly descends onto the Moon\'s surface.
After the cabin door opens, an agile figure leaps off the ship and lands on the Moon, knocking up the very fine lunar soil and leaving his footprints.
[Roland]: Oh c\'mon... I can forgive you for not putting up a red carpet, but you should have at least sent some fans to welcome Roland the superstar.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 19 A New Divide → 19-18 Undying Will (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Karenina]: Out of my way!
Karenina keeps dodging the incoming gravitational waves and knocking the Corrupted away.
In less than an hour\'s time, the gravitational waves are affecting a smaller radius but with significantly greater intensity. Some of the buildings in the lunar base are already decomposed into large debris.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 19 A New Divide → 19-19 Remembrance of Pain (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: Who... am I?
The girl takes a look at her white body, which seems different from what she perceives as "human." It is made of machines, just like the "robots" in the stories she read before.
[???]: Am I a robot? I\'m no human...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 19 A New Divide → 19-19 Remembrance of Pain (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[(Recording)]: Every year, when it comes to your birthday, Luna... I always prepare a gift for you like before, even in the years before I was called "Alpha".
[(Recording)]: I know all too well this is pointless folly... No matter how many gifts I prepare, I cannot change the fact that Luna is never coming back.
[(Message)]: That day when I saw you standing in front of me again, I made a vow to myself. On each of your birthdays in the future, I would stay by your side no matter what…

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 19 A New Divide → 19-20 Radiant Beam (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Teddy]: Karenina? Hello? Karenina... Do you copy?
Teddy\'s voice spreads across the entire lunar base. Karenina can also hear her in the comms device.
[Karenina]: Copy! You\'re too noisy... I\'m busy right now.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 19 A New Divide → 19-20 Radiant Beam (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The pale monster is pushed to its limit. Its tissues cannot generate as fast as they are destroyed. The body made up of Hetero-Creature cells and other miscellaneous debris begins to disintegrate.
[Pale Mutant]: ...?!
It struggles to get up, only to realize its broken body cannot support its weight and collapses to the ground once again.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 19 A New Divide → 19-21 Curtain Call (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The representatives gave their answer in the World Government\'s emergency meeting, approving Karenina\'s decision and giving her the right to destroy the zero-point engine.
Still, it will inevitably cause a series of problems... The lunar base, the reactor, the ground battlefield, Kurono...
The biggest problem is that the comms to the lunar base are still not restored. Babylonia is unable to confirm whether Karenina and her team have successfully destroyed the engine, or whether they can safely return.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 19 A New Divide → 19-22 Return to the Far Moon (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Luna]: Sis! What happened to the rabbits in the end?
[Lucia]: They stayed on the Moon.
[Luna]: What were they going to do after they stayed on the Moon?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 20 Across the Ruined Sea → 20-1 Scarlet Revelation (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Corrupted]: Rawrgh!
As the last Corrupted falls, the blue-hued space falls silent once again. Several tropical fish stare at the uninvited "guests" through the thick glass that houses them.
[Construct A]: Threats cleared. No more hostile signals detected.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 20 Across the Ruined Sea → 20-2 Crazy Words (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bianca]: Chiko\'s squad was heading toward the administrative room...
Bianca is explaining the information she retrieved through the Phantom Tracer to her team when a call to her terminal suddenly interrupts her.
[???]: How was the Phantom Tracer, Stigmata?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 20 Across the Ruined Sea → 20-2 Crazy Words (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Broadcast]: Dear esteemed guests, the undersea tunnel to the lower second floor has been repaired. Please enter in an orderly manner.
[Broadcast]: You can find restaurants, entertainment facilities, and 24-hour dolphin performances on the lower second floor.
[Broadcast]: Copperfield Aquarium wishes you a wonderful day.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 20 Across the Ruined Sea → 20-3 Crimson Undercurrents (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nikola]: Are you certain?
[Bianca]: We haven\'t investigated the lower third floor and the west wing ourselves yet, but the evidence we\'ve collected so far is proof enough.
[Bianca]: The Ascendants have amassed a large amount of Red Tide at the reservoir on the lowest level of the aquarium through the underground waterways.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 20 Across the Ruined Sea → 20-4 Song of Faith (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The whole aquarium violently shakes, the structures that support the whole place squeaking disconcertingly.
Even more worrying are the numerous cracks on the tempered glass that separates the water.
[Bianca]: This place is collapsing!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 20 Across the Ruined Sea → 20-5 Monster and the Witch (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The surging Red Tide pours over Bianca, quickly drowning her. She can feel every inch of her artificial skin burning, but the pain leaves just as soon as it arrives.
But that is not because things are getting better. On the contrary, the infection has greatly disrupted Bianca\'s sensors, turning the scorching pain into a summer breeze.
She remembers the Red Tide flooding over her. Her infection rate having long passed the safety threshold, she will not be surprised if she rises as a Corrupted at any moment.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 20 Across the Ruined Sea → 20-6 Before the Daybreak (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Hassen]: Calculate expected loss.
[Gestalt]: Calculation complete. Given an 87.1% casualty, the success rate of the mission is 28.4%.
[Hassen]: As expected, General Wells\' proposal is the one with the highest chance of success.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 20 Across the Ruined Sea → 20-7 I Haven't Changed (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
—The collapsed aquarium sinks to the bottom of the sea along with the bodies of those who had fallen.
Was it wrong for her to choose to save lives first?
If she could be more decisive... Will she be better off?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 20 Across the Ruined Sea → 20-8 Assemble Again (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
As the night falls, the shallow sea engulfed in a thin mist begins to darken. The visibility is gradually diminishing, and an intangible fear begins to surge in every corner.
[Purifying Force Member]: ...
A Purifying Force soldier walks out of the fog. He slowly heads toward the water full of red and dark colors and cluelessly reaches out his hand, as if he is trying to touch the peaceful sea surface.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 20 Across the Ruined Sea → 20-9 Hand in Hand (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Coincidentally, Lee and Liv bump into each other in front of the Babylonia HQ. Lee waves the document in his hand.
[Lee]: Liv? Are you here to submit the application too?
Liv is slightly surprised. She chuckles and takes out an application exactly the same as Lee\'s.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 20 Across the Ruined Sea → 20-9 Hand in Hand (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Cover me, Lee!
[Lee]: Already on it!
Lee continues to shoot with one hand, while loading a high-explosive magazine with the other. He fires high-temperature flames that can evaporate the seawater toward the area with dense Hetero-Creatures.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 20 Across the Ruined Sea → 20-10 When We Are Together (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The storm continues. Endless rainfall has reduced visibility to a minimum...
But the most terrifying fact is that the number of Hetero-Creatures has not reduced at all. They seem to be as endless as the rain... and equally ruthless.
[Teddy]: No matter how many Hetero-Creatures we have killed, the next wave always comes straight away... Are they really not afraid to die?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 20 Across the Ruined Sea → 20-10 When We Are Together (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The storm is about to end. Someone is dragging their feet on a secluded beach, slowly coming near.
[Vanessa]: I knew they would be fighting... The scale is pretty large.
She gazes into the distance. Her eye seems wounded and squints in the day-breaking sunlight.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 20 Across the Ruined Sea → 20-11 Their Marks (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The sound of a downpour is echoing in the deepest part of her memories and M.I.N.D.
Constructs are not bothered by rain. Still, Chiko takes out her coat and puts it above their heads, just like what ordinary humans would do.
[Chiko]: This is so bad.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 20 Across the Ruined Sea → 20-11 Their Marks (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: ...It\'s a crimson sea.
The girl with long grey hair sits quietly next to the window, gazing into the galaxy outside.
To the people living on the Earth, an incredibly long time has passed. The battles fought against despair had turned into history, and history turned into legends. The legends were carved in the civilization\'s legacy, which eventually became fairy tales that parents told their children.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 20 Across the Ruined Sea → 20-12 Lithos (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
An inexplicable, ominous scent of death is lingering in the air. The putrid odor of rotten flesh has already begun to spread with the wind.
In the beginning, there were only a few monsters. But as the sea surface continues to surge, more have returned from death, crazier than ever.
The sky is a bloody red. People have forgotten who they are and where they come from. The only thought in their mind is to hold the crimson monsters off at all costs. Once they enter the land, they will slaughter everything in sight.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 20 Across the Ruined Sea → 20-13 Time to Say Goodbye (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
When the lifeless Lithos falls to the sea surface, a lot of Corrupted suddenly show up in the water, stopping Bianca from retrieving Lithos\' frame.
At the same time, the Omega Weapons are running at maximum power during the entire battle. The Red Tide that once spread across the entire sea surface has been properly contained.
Sieged by humans, the giant Hetero-Humanoid on the sea surface is also showing signs of fatigue.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 20 Across the Ruined Sea → 20-13 Time to Say Goodbye (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
