After calling "Bianca" for one last time, Chiko fell in the sea. She didn\'t sink to the bottom, but turned into numerous Punishing Virus particles that gradually disappeared in the air.
Bianca reaches out but cannot hold anything.
The sea breeze seems to have brought Chiko\'s unfinished words.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 20 Across the Ruined Sea → 20-14 Key of the Future (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The remaining cleanup work progressed smoothly. Thanks to the coordinated efforts of all teams, the remnants of Hetero-Creatures on the west side were soon wiped out completely.
You reported the casualties and loss of equipment to Babylonia and were told the shuttle had already departed.
Liv stayed in the west to perform emergency treatment on the wounded soldiers. Lee and Lucia went in other directions to continue searching for survivors. Meanwhile, you are staying in the command center to help the seriously wounded Constructs stabilize their M.I.N.D.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 16 Evernight Beat → 16-1 World Government Conference (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The silence of the conference hall is broken by Hassen\'s footsteps.
He makes his way to the other end of the long cold desk and sits down, taking in the sight of this building with a history as old as Babylonia.
The huge conference hall is only filled by a few people, others are participating as holograms projected on their seats. The symbols of the Judicial Court, Executive Court, Control Court, and the military army makes this spacious hall appear to be even more solemn.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 16 Evernight Beat → 16-2 Antagonism (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Collins]: No... No, hell no!
Collins throws the thick stack of files into the air before lying on the black walnut table in the study, his arms and legs stretched like a snow angel.
[Collins]: The stuff we made with Luna\'s data is nothing but an empty shell.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 16 Evernight Beat → 16-3 After Story (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Babylonia\'s artificial sun has set for now. Apart from some soldiers on patrol and the lively crowd in the markets, most people have fallen asleep.
As for you, you are sitting in front of the desk inside the Gray Raven break room, going over the recent mission logs.
The logs have been arranged from left to right chronologically by Liv. Your fingertip flips over a page, and another memory is reawakened in your mind.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 16 Evernight Beat → 16-3 After Story (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The moon is hanging high above the city by the time your work to support the conservation area is over.
Defensive artillery runs silently at the city outskirt. Building repairs inside the conversation area are not over; people set up tents at the foot of the CPF, resting and dining by the sporadic campfire and the moonlight.
You can hear the conversation of two soldiers from a nearby tent. They have kept their voices low to avoid disturbing others\' rest, but you still manage to hear them, having sat close by.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 16 Evernight Beat → 16-4 Search for Coordinates (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Let\'s hear him out, Commandant.
[Chrome]: Sorry to disturb you at this hour.
Chrome does not respond to that directly. He gives you a slight smile, and you both understand each other perfectly.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 16 Evernight Beat → 16-5 Hetero-Sapien (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Rapid footsteps approach from beyond the door, the retinal scanner outside announcing the name of the visitor. The door opens, and Hilda enters the bridge, standing before Hassen and Nikola.
[Hassen]: How did it go? Did we find it?
[Hilda]: All the data suggests that the Hetero-Hive Mother is located inside CPF 040 at the center of the Pulia Forest Park Ruins. Or what used to be CPF 040.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 16 Evernight Beat → 16-6 Assemble (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The transport craft drags its light-blue flaming tail across the sky. You have finally returned to the frontline.
Your exposed skin, uncovered by the exoskeleton, can feel the moisture in the air, meaning there is sufficient rain in the area, which explains why the Pulia Forest Park Ruins could last on the barren earth until now.
There is no time to rest after the transport craft lands. Orders are issued to gather everyone together.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 16 Evernight Beat → 16-7 Pulia Forest Park Ruins (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Although Hans has given everyone ten minutes to ready up and get to know one another, the oppressiveness around the camp has made it hard for any of you to begin introducing yourselves.
Each of you knows what enemies you will face inside the Forest Park Ruins. A single mistake now in preparing your equipment can mean losing your life to the Hetero-Sapiens later.
Lucia takes Lee and Liv to the edge of the forest to scout. You sit on a rock in the distance, checking the weapon in your hand.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 16 Evernight Beat → 16-7 Pulia Forest Park Ruins (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Encountering the Hetero-Sapiens in real life is much more intense than seeing them in videos.
Their bones are fractured by Egret\'s firepower, their fragments hitting your exoskeletons with a dull thud.
Their bodies turn cold as they lie on the ground among their remains, motionless.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 16 Evernight Beat → 16-8 Clockwork (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Given the physical feedback we got when fighting the Hetero-Sapiens, we once believed they didn\'t consist of any sensory organs for pain.
[Liv]: But we got a completely opposite conclusion after our analysis. Their sensory receptors are incredibly active.
Liv points to the Hetero-Sapien diagram before her.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 16 Evernight Beat → 16-9 CPF 040 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The comms interference is solved with the help of the comms amplifiers from Harley Jo.
You continue your journey toward CPF 040 after Hans has reported your discoveries to Babylonia.
As the waves of Hetero-Sapiens in your sight are defeated one by one, your field of view begins to broaden.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 16 Evernight Beat → 16-10 Arrival (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Another gate inside the CPF was blown apart. Before the dust settles, Constructs in their protective goggles breach the broken door, their weapons firing, and the smoke clears to reveal Hans\' team standing.
[Construct A]: Hetero-Sapiens on the left, down.
[Construct B]: Flammable canisters on the right, secured.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 16 Evernight Beat → 16-11 Evacuation (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Since the twins appeared before you, the Hetero-Sapiens have been growling deafeningly while the Hetero-Plants tip their branches and leaves toward the ground.
A celebration, as well as a show of submission.
The sharpest blade might slay the dragon, but it will not stop a calamity.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 16 Evernight Beat → 16-12 Death of Humankind (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After noticing the situation inside the tower, Harley Jo and Yata have extended the extraction points further inward, finally reuniting with all of you just now.
Following Harley Jo and Yata, everyone inside retreats according to the extraction points they established. The sea of Hetero-Sapien remains around the area speaks silently of what the two have encountered.
The enemies\' howls rise from within the tower. Despite the retreat being incomplete, Hans knows he can no longer wait.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 16 Evernight Beat → 16-13 Unidentified Twins (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Run. Keep running.
Harley Jo and the others, having returned to the ground, are speeding through the forest with Egret leading the way.
The area surrounding CPF 040 is aflame from Egret\'s bombardment, stopping the Hetero-Sapiens from catching up.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 16 Evernight Beat → 16-13 Unidentified Twins (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
As the twins stand before the heavily wounded Liv, ready to deal her a lethal blow, a flash of blinding light appears in the sky, illuminating the battlefield, turning night into day.
A ray of light pierces the dark—the hope that humanity has been waiting for.
The Longinus Arsenal has finally arrived.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 16 Evernight Beat → 16-14 Silent Scream (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
It has been several hours since the twins left the main battlefield of the Pulia Forest Park Ruins.
The large transport craft mentioned in the transmission finally appears in the form of the burning carcass of a plane, crash-landing before the teams that retrieved the sample of the Hetero-Hive Mother.
Eventually, the different teams could only manage to save the pilot, and they begin their retreat on foot.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 16 Evernight Beat → 16-15 The Rudder of Mankind (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The solemn Parliament Hall is once again holding a meeting. Emergency gatherings like this always spell a pivotal moment in humanity\'s survival.
The decisions made in such meetings will also alter the fate of humankind.
[Hassen]: How are the Gray Ravens?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 21 Spiral of Chronos → 21-1 His Life Behind the Scenes (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Babylonia, 08:00 a.m.
Commandant Office.
The pure white blackout curtain rises automatically with the sound of the door opening, allowing the cold daylight to dip in through the window panes. The artificial sky outside is now a clear, early-morning blue.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 21 Spiral of Chronos → 21-2 The Key Deep Within (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Babylonia, 12:30 p.m.
[Lee]: Recover data.
...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 21 Spiral of Chronos → 21-3 Brothers (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: ...And that\'s that. I had to stop when the earthquake hit, and I only managed to come back with this data.
[Asimov]: And this deserted robot you found there just so happened to have the data we needed. Now, that seems anything but a "coincidence" to me.
[Asimov]: It\'s almost as though someone baited you there just to show you all of that—and then destroyed it right away.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 21 Spiral of Chronos → 21-4 Crack (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Earth, 02:30 p.m.
Aboard a transportation craft that\'s making its way through the stratosphere.
The ground gradually sharpens into view as the aircraft descends through the clouds, leaving a trail in its wake.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 21 Spiral of Chronos → 21-5 Signs and Abnormality (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The fall was endless.
Aside from the soul-crushing pain, this is what Lee remembers most vividly from being turned into a Construct.
To this day, Lee still remembers the day he was turned into the Construct he is now at Kurono\'s lab—which, unlike the trial area at the Science Council, was a dark, cold lab in the basement.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 21 Spiral of Chronos → 21-5 Signs and Abnormality (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The few seconds it took for Lee to exit battle simulation mode seem like an eternity.
A blinding flash of light engulfs his vision. Within the depths of his sight, the twisting spiral tower emerges and collapses repeatedly, while the surroundings blur and shift at a rapid pace through the passage of time.
[Lee]: ...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 21 Spiral of Chronos → 21-6 Silence (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Leaving the Science Council, Lee and Murray walk side by side down the hall leading out of the building.
This is when Lee would usually ask Murray about his work and health—except Lee doesn\'t say a thing after saying what he did just now, giving Murray no choice but to tag along.
[Murray]: Uhm... well?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 21 Spiral of Chronos → 21-7 Spiral Tower (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The alarm begins blaring the same time the ground roars in rage, plunging the entire conservation area into chaos and screams.
In the distance, a dilapidated building totters on the brink of collapse, its steel framework squeaking as it sways violently. As far as anyone can see, everything is shaking.
Unable to stand firmly and on their wits\' end, people hold on to whatever objects they can find and keep their bodies low to wait the quakes out.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 21 Spiral of Chronos → 21-8 Gunshot of Catastrophe (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The bullet aims precisely at Hassen\'s heart, leaving him no time to react. He can do nothing but watch as the enraged guard pulls the trigger, unleashing a furious yell.
"Bang—"
The deafening roar of the gunshot reverberates within the expansive Parliament Hall, its echoes gradually dissipating into a profound silence.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 21 Spiral of Chronos → 21-9 Flash of Destruction (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Advancing to the liaison officer\'s coordinates, a disorienting timelessness surrounds you. Intense heat and palpable tension blur your thoughts. Sweat trickles down, a reminder of the toll.
As the summit of the spiral tower comes into view, it presents a striking image—a sharp, red thorn piercing the fabric of the horizon, appearing both majestic and ominous. It seems to suspend itself above the planet, resembling the Sword of Damocles that may fall upon one\'s head anytime.
However, no matter how far you have journeyed toward that trenchant blade, it remains out of reach, perpetually hanging near the edge of the sky.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 21 Spiral of Chronos → 21-10 "Hyperreal" (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: ...
[Lee]: Signals... Over here!
Babylonia has never witnessed such horrors since its birth.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 21 Spiral of Chronos → 21-11 Wild Gambler (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Classified Laboratory, Science Council.
The once-bustling area, always filled with blinking instruments and fast-walking researchers, now lies in ruin. The remnants of broken vessels and shattered equipment litter the floor, bearing witness to the violence that has befallen this place.
Fortunately, the frame compartment remains unscathed, protected by bulletproof glass from those frenzied researchers, offering a glimmer of hope amidst the chaos.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 21 Spiral of Chronos → 21-11 Wild Gambler (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Amidst the roar of the bell-shaped nozzle, the transport craft performs a perfect glide and leaps right into the starry sky.
For Constructs, this level of acceleration has merely no impact. As Lee pulls the lever, the Mach number on the control screen rises rapidly.
The view of the crimson spiral tower grows increasingly distinct on the screen.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 21 Spiral of Chronos → 21-12 Gazing Upon Reality (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
As the crimson light of the spiral tower pierces through the sky, the malfunctioning artificial sky of Eden glows red, presenting a sight of a crumbling mirage.
The paradise that once embodied peace and order has now been reduced to an uncontrollable hell.
A young man dashes through the panicking crowd, searching for someone familiar amidst the throng.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 21 Spiral of Chronos → 21-13 Broken Heart (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
In the transport craft, Lee leaves the still tumultuous Babylonia at full speed.
The radar blares incessantly, signaling imminent danger. In ten minutes, he will encounter the Hetero-Creatures that once obstructed the path to Earth.
Ever since the Pulia Forest Park catastrophe, Hetero-Creatures have acquired the ability to fly and asserted their dominance in the virus-laden airspace.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 21 Spiral of Chronos → 21-13 Broken Heart (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A blinding flash of light engulfs his vision. Within the depths of his sight, the twisting spiral tower emerges and collapses repeatedly, while the surroundings blur and shift at a rapid pace through the passage of time.
As helpless as an unguarded dike, he can only resign himself to being devoured by the deluge of information, awaiting its relentless consumption.
The familiar feeling throws him back to that simulated battle, yet every fiber of his being is acutely aware of the palpable sense of reality that envelops him.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 21 Spiral of Chronos → R0-1 Fragment - 00 - T324 (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
As Lee extends his hand toward the solitary answer within the ocean-vast picture, his consciousness navigates through an unfathomable multitude of paths in one mere moment.
[?]: The tower itself manifests the spacetime continuum. You can think about it this way: here you may encounter "possibilities" that transcend the confines of your own world.
[?]: Originally isolated, these possibilities are affected by the Punishing Virus, intertwining within the "tower" of the spacetime continuum. Here both the past and the future take tangible form, shaped and molded by your cognition.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 21 Spiral of Chronos → R0-1 Fragment - 00 - T324 (EB)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: It\'s relatively safer here, let\'s stop here for a bit of maintenance.
Lee had wanted to find an excuse and leave, but after seeing how the injured Construct was carrying his teammate, he changed his mind.
[Construct]: I\'m fine, he\'s the one who needs attention.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 21 Spiral of Chronos → 21-13R Crossed Spacetime (Part C)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
As the crimson light of the Hetero Tower looms ever closer, the craft, on the verge of transforming into a blazing fireball, rushes toward its own destruction.
Lee quickly seizes the parachute he prepared after seeing the "vision." In one swift motion, he kicks open the cabin door and propels himself into the open air. A deafening explosion erupts behind him the next moment, its flames blossoming fiercely.
Ignoring the persistent phantom pain coursing through his body, Lee opens the parachute and swiftly extracts his weapon. With determined focus, he unleashes a barrage of gunfire upon the Hetero-Creatures relentlessly pursuing him.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 21 Spiral of Chronos → 21-13R Crossed Spacetime (EC)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
By utilizing the electromagnetic observation device, all the complicated gravitational changes and abnormal spaces in the tower are now visible, even the passages that were hidden by the "tower" are there clear as day.
If he had not decided to take the long way and check out those coordinates... he would not have thought to modify and include this device for normal uses.
It all seemed like a coincidence... but Lee could feel it, that something, or someone, was guiding him from above.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 21 Spiral of Chronos → R2-1 Fragment - 02 - T1203 (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
He runs for his life through the dark underground factory, a shower of bullets and lasers strike from behind, sparks flying from the metal racks they hit.
The safety door had long been shut when the alarm was first triggered. He could only keep dodging behind the huge machine tool and storage shelves. As he turns the corner, a laser beam catches his left arm, sending up a wave of excruciating pain.
At the same time, he slides into an inconspicuous air duct and crawls to the other side of the room.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 21 Spiral of Chronos → R2-1 Fragment - 02 - T1203 (EB)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The gray starry skies and murky tides slowly fade away. The corrupted realm constructed by Tifa\'s thoughts starts to crumble, reverting to the original state of Lee\'s M.I.N.D.
The dark swamp returns to Tifa, whose body is already in pieces. With her mobility lost, she could only crawl on the ground with all that is left in her.
The disintegration of the data which composes her starts at her fingertips, slowly edging up her limbs, and dissipating into thin air.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 21 Spiral of Chronos → 21-14 Eternal Beacon (EC)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The once-blocked road is now cleared.
The interior structure of the "tower" is changing according to Lee\'s actions. A spiral staircase appears in front of him and he ascends it without a second of hesitation.
No matter how many problems he will be faced with, he will find a solution to them all.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 21 Spiral of Chronos → R5-1 Fragment - 05 - T2421 (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Lee is not surprised at all to find that Watanabe also lied about "their stronghold being not far from here."
The real base of the Forsaken is located somewhere far from the scene. Night has already fallen when they finally get to their destination.
Watanabe is true to his word and even provides Gray Raven with the best treatment the Forsaken can, allowing them to replenish their supplies and perform maintenance with no more cover-ups or restrictions.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 21 Spiral of Chronos → R5-1 Fragment - 05 - T2421 (EB)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Murray]: Morian?
Murray looks surprised on the other side of the comms, as if he never expected his brother to call him at this time.
But a happy smile soon appears on his face.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 21 Spiral of Chronos → 21-15 Blood Ties (EC)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
He calmly issues command after command, directing Cerberus to move Simon and Noan to somewhere safe.
Planning the next move on the terminal, Murray has never felt as calm as he is now.
Tactics, deployment, and medical replenishment... That is not all, even unmemorable fragments of his past are all clearly displayed in his brain like books on a bookshelf.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 21 Spiral of Chronos → R8-1 Fragment - 08 - T3265 (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Lee is already used to the strange sensation that "traveling" through the spacetime continuum brings.
But what appears at the end of the quantum fissure this time is not a specific point in time, but a dimension of unfamiliar chaos.
A storm rages. Instead of clouds in the sky, there is an icy ocean in its place hanging upside-down with indiscernible homogeneous structures floating in it. Thunder can be heard reverberating from deep within the realm as if they were cries of sorrow and howls of the beast who devours all.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 21 Spiral of Chronos → R8-1 Fragment - 08 - T3265 (EB)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The memories flood into Lee\'s brain all at once.
He realizes that this is his M.I.N.D. It is a M.I.N.D. that has recorded all failures and deaths, the M.I.N.D. of all the "Lees" in the past and the future fighting different possibilities.
Due to some unknown reason, they have all intertwined and connected here, creating this dimension of chaos in front of him.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 21 Spiral of Chronos → 21-16 Hourglass of Time (EC)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
As if a candle flame burning out its last ounce of oxygen, the crimson glow at the core of the top of the tower slowly fades in a low buzzing sound.
His surroundings darken. He can hear a low rumble from deep down below the tower. Suddenly the tower lets out a struggling growl like a beast that got hit by a tranquilizer dart.
The bursting red tide immediately ceases its outflow as the core terminal shatters.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 21 Spiral of Chronos → 21-17 The Pulse of Dawn (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Lee stands on the highest spot of the Hetero Tower, staring at the giant core emanating a dangerous glow.
[Lee (?)]: But because you\'re so close to succeeding, it\'s the most dangerous... You should know that.
[Lee]: Yes... It\'s the same this time.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 21 Spiral of Chronos → 21-17 The Pulse of Dawn (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Two hours have passed since the Hetero Tower emitted the unknown electromagnetic radiation, and hoards of Hetero-Creatures still surround the puny army of humanity.
What is worse is that in the past, one had trustworthy teammates watching each other\'s backs in battle, but now, due to that eerie red glow, no one can be trusted.
—Not even oneself.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 21 Spiral of Chronos → 21-18 The End of Time (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
In between the pieced shards from spatial collapse, a completely different world is displayed in front of Lee.
The distorted dimension intertwines and rumbles, like an orchestra without a conductor, chaotic music notes fly out of the movement and become bitmap, they then become two-dimensional, rising up to transform into the platform beneath his feet, and lastly, into shapes he cannot comprehend.
The enormous amount of information floods into his brain but vanishes the next second. He experiences millions of years in his mind in that fleeting moment. He sees the birth and destruction of numerous galaxies through this odd-colored dimension, the pages of time are flips at the speed of light.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 21 Spiral of Chronos → 21-18 The End of Time (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
It felt like a second, yet it also felt like a million years.
Lee has already stopped keeping count of how long this battle has gone on for long ago. Time means nothing to him now.
In all the failures and resets, Lee captures all the key messages from the past and the future, and sends them to his past self, guiding them on their path here.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 21 Spiral of Chronos → 21-19 The Time Continues to Tick (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The scorching bullet casing is ejected out of the barrel and falls to the ground, hitting another casing, and squeakily rolls in a puddle that could have been water or blood.
This action has been repeated numerous times. Once the gun ejects an empty magazine, the Construct will immediately take out a new one, inspect it, and load it.
Which fallen teammate did they collect these from...? She could not even remember...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 17 The Surviving Lucem → 17-0 Nightmare of the World (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: What? Is this your first time meeting a stranger who wants a conversation for no reason?
[???]: No, I\'ve never thought about that. I\'m just saying you look like someone who thinks about that.
[???]: If so...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 17 The Surviving Lucem → 17-1 Pouring Rain (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Babylonia 09:30 p.m.
The cold lights once again illuminate the symbols of the five powers.
The gloomy space masks the anxious expression of each council member, allowing the hall to maintain solemnity and unity in front of the camera.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 17 The Surviving Lucem → 17-2 Sinking Island (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A whole night passed since Lucia and Lee brought back the Construct wounded in the rescue attempt back to the enclosed basement in the conservation area.
After Liv performed basic maintenance, he recovered most of his ability to participate in a new rescue mission.
Unable to return to Babylonia, the Constructs have become entrenched in a war of attrition. Issues caused by the damage to their frames and lack of maintenance chambers are beginning to wear on them.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 17 The Surviving Lucem → 17-3 Project Winter (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Hassen]: This is an impromptu internal meeting. Everybody, please keep all the information mentioned in this meeting confidential.
After the disaster broke out at the Pulia Forest Park Ruins, the council members have already participated in countless impromptu meetings.
An impromptu meeting used to mean an emergency. Now, it also means a difficult dilemma to overcome.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 17 The Surviving Lucem → 17-4 Will of Being Born (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
It\'s an unchanging, lifeless afternoon. The continuous drizzle pounds the ground and damp air flows into the dirt, increasing the cold bit by bit.
Someone with a guitar sits among several like-minded musicians, strumming weakly.
Someone takes out a pair of cards that were almost crumpled and slickly tosses them in front of their comrade\'s bed.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 17 The Surviving Lucem → 17-5 First, "Joy and Sorrow" (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Nightfall descends upon Earth once more. Liv steps out of the room where the two commandants are resting and looks out at the landscape outside the basement.
[Liv]: What can I do... to make Commandant regain consciousness...?
Dim moonlight covers the scarred earth in a veil of peace, obscuring the mountains of death for those still wandering out in the wilderness.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 17 The Surviving Lucem → 17-6 "The Great Evacuation" (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
In the dark room, Vanessa is stirring her porridge in her cup with an exquisite coffee spoon. Commandant Commandant is lying on the bed next to her, still unconscious.
[Liv]: ...
[Vanessa]: What\'s wrong? Surprised I\'m eating porridge from a cup?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 17 The Surviving Lucem → 17-6 "The Great Evacuation" (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
City 045 West Warehouse, 03:41 a.m.
Leaving the conservation area in City 043, they cross past several collapsed roads and buildings attacked by the Corrupted and Hetero-Creatures until finally arriving at their destination in City 045 five and a half hours later.
[Shrek]: Watanabe\'s situation isn\'t looking good either, but at least they promised to send a doctor and even offered to take in some refugees if the situation takes a turn for the worse. Thanks for letting me use your terminal.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 17 The Surviving Lucem → 17-7 "The Stayed-Behind" (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
City 043 Conservation Area Basement, 03:00 a.m.
Nearly five hours have passed since Liv and others set out. All refugees still able to move freely have been evacuated.
They have walked for five hours, but they still have not managed to evacuate the conservation area in City 043 due to the overall speed of the crowd.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 17 The Surviving Lucem → 17-8 Life and Death (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
05:38 a.m.
Driving the two rescue vehicles, Gray Raven races back to the conservation area before the barrage of Hetero-Creatures arrives.
Familiar with the way back and no longer carrying any wounded, they manage to make the trip in just three hours.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 17 The Surviving Lucem → 17-9 Second, "Freedom" (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
06:13 a.m.
Shortly after the main troop has evacuated, the ground quakes and reverberates due to some sort of explosion.
After the deafening noises fade away, the world goes quiet for another half a minute before the footsteps of a horde of Hetero-Creatures come from somewhere nearby.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 17 The Surviving Lucem → 17-10 Within Reach (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
02:07 p.m.
It has been 32 hours since she left the conservation area of City 043. The girl finally makes it back to this place, her leg fractured and broken.
[Liv]: ...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 17 The Surviving Lucem → 17-11 Third, "Giving" (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Liv properly buries Lindsey, Cali, Lina, and Stanley. Then, she takes Matches and leaves conservation area 043.
Along the journey, she remains silent. The voices of self-doubts overwhelm her mind. It isn\'t until she meets up with her companions that she finally picks herself up.
Upon returning to Conservation Area 046, Liv gives the bloodstained note back to its owner.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 17 The Surviving Lucem → 17-12 Fourth, "Ship" (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
What can I do now?
[Liv]: (Well... I need to keep treating the wounded.)
What else can I do?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 17 The Surviving Lucem → 17-12 Fourth, "Ship" (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The airship and transport escorting Liv are disappearing into the sky...
Beneath the fiery red clouds, a girl is walking alone in the wilderness, enveloped by a giant black shadow.
The high concentration of the Punishing Virus in this area has deterred even the best-equipped Constructs, but it doesn\'t affect the girl at all.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 17 The Surviving Lucem → 17-13 Countdown to Life (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
It has been 15 days since Liv returned to Babylonia. It is also the 15th day she has been adapting to her new frame.
The peaceful facade of Babylonia would have tricked her into believing that everything has gone back to normal... if not for the obstacles and pain she has experienced throughout the adaptation.
The Constructs that returned with Liv either have been sent to Star of Life, are currently being treated, or have their names recorded on the casualty list.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 17 The Surviving Lucem → 17-14 Assemble Again (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
It has been 15 days since the transport craft vanished into the sky.
Time is a pot that brews misery from the hunger and pain of those who have remained on the surface.
After the twins were hurt, they have since changed their course, heading north once again. This time, they are approaching from the plains on the east.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 17 The Surviving Lucem → 17-14 Assemble Again (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Cinderelik]: The twins have left, following the train.
[Vonnegut]: Good. They need to learn and grow on this journey.
[Vonnegut]: Otherwise, they would be nothing but food for the Red Tide even with the world at their back, unfit for their names.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 17 The Surviving Lucem → 17-15 End Train (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The twins have stopped their attack since Asslam severed its carriages. They simply follow the detached train from behind with their unique movement.
They watch, curiously, the inside of the train through where the carriages broke off, as if it is a headless rooster still moving about.
Countless Hetero-Creatures and Hetero-Sapiens converge at the sides of the twins, replacing the two observers as the assailants who attempt to breach the carriages.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 17 The Surviving Lucem → 17-15 End Train (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Time slows down in the twins\' visions. With ease, they approach Asslam, leaping into the air and launching a deadly strike at the fractured carriages once more.
Bodies of flesh and blood fall off the train amidst desperate cries, like scattered paper in the wind.
Before despair can tear him apart, Watanabe charges into the crowd of Hetero-Creatures, his two blades drawn.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 17 The Surviving Lucem → 17-16 Endpoint Countdown (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The slaughter lasted a whole night.
Of the 587 survivors who boarded the train before it departed, only 151 have survived. 23 Constructs remain, excluding those from the elite squads.
To rid the train of the Hetero-Creatures, they have launched three suicide bombings.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 17 The Surviving Lucem → 17-16 Endpoint Countdown (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
8 minutes and 49 seconds.
In the last 11 seconds of this dire battle, the train finally starts moving again.
The twins continue following the train without being drawn away by the departing crowd.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 17 The Surviving Lucem → 17-17 Smile of the Abyss (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: Tch...
The remaining carriages cross the barren field and enter a tunnel.
After a brief moment of darkness, the survivors are horrified to find the train encircled by Hetero-Creatures on both sides.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 17 The Surviving Lucem → 17-18 Gentle Monster (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Nngh...!
Feeling an intense pain as if her M.I.N.D. is torn apart, Liv finds her vision blurred, having to lean on the wall to keep her balance.
It has been 28 days since she returned to Babylonia.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 17 The Surviving Lucem → 17-19 Heaven of Pain (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
It has been 28 days since Liv left for Babylonia. This is also the 10th afternoon they have spent stuck in the church.
Dusk falls onto the blood stains covering the churchyard, hoping to conceal them, only to accentuate the crimson color.
After the twins left, the train finally came to a halt next to a forest in the middle of nowhere, its limit reached.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 17 The Surviving Lucem → 17-20 Ring "The Bells" (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The Corrupted attacking Changyu and Sophia fall before Chrome right afterward.
The next wave of enemies has already arrived before he finds the time to inspect them.
Like waves crashing against the shore, the enemies are seemingly never-ending. To stop them, Chrome has to be a dam.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 17 The Surviving Lucem → 17-22 Until No One Is Listening (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: If we can\'t defend this place, we\'ll be exposed to their attacks unprotected.
[Lee]: I\'ll leave the rest to you.
[Lucia]: Got it. We\'re all going to survive this.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 17 The Surviving Lucem → 17-23 Fifth, "Farewell" (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The time it has taken to change her frame is longer than usual because she is filled with anticipation and uncertainty.
Liv closes her eyes as two sets of eyes watch, but she wakes up to a flock of whispering crowds.
With an intense migraine in her M.I.N.D., Liv struggles to open her eyes, looking forward through the haze and darkness.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 17 The Surviving Lucem → 17-24 Sixth, "Death" (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Death has paved the night with its colors, the song of the young girl now a requiem.
The dark clouds tile the night eternal, and the wails of the dead linger on.
Crimson waves gather near the transport craft, once again trying to drag it to the ground.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 17 The Surviving Lucem → 17-24 Sixth, "Death" (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
As the ivory fire burns, the Hetero-Creatures turn into red mist, sinking into the young girl\'s frame.
The light underneath the dark clouds is extremely gentle. Even when those eyes have stayed shut for so long, they feel no pain when they greet the dawn.
[???]: Is that... light?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 17 The Surviving Lucem → 17-25 To Death → (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
By the time the mourning crowd has departed, Babylonia has hung up the artificial night sky.
Liv\'s name is marked alongside many others within the code on the war memorial, allowing the visitors to learn about their stories.
The lives behind those names, both humans and Constructs, have used their bodies to mend the rifts caused by the war, paving a road for humanity\'s future.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 17 The Surviving Lucem → 17-26 To Life → (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[??]: We did it... The last target is eliminated!
[???]: Please wake up, Liv! Why did you do something so dangerous?!
[????]: ...Let her rest. After this... there is nothing left to fight.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 17 The Surviving Lucem → 17-27 Scarlet Reflection (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: ...Liv!
Recovering from her infection, Lucia finally realizes what Liv\'s plan was.
[Lucia]: I don\'t want to lose anyone anymore!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 17 The Surviving Lucem → 17-28 Seventh, "Love" (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
With Lucia\'s hack, you have managed to defect the Polyphage inside Liv\'s M.I.N.D., establishing a remote connection.
After keeping Liv\'s fragile M.I.N.D. and vitals stable, you spend another half an hour fighting off Hetero-Creatures mid-flight.
The large fleet of transport crafts finally breaks through the clouds, landing around the church.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 22 Renaissance du Fantastique → 22-0 The Day Dream (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Ayla had her own little fantasies about what Earth would be like before her first assignment.
Having only read about Earth in textbooks, she\'d often imagine what\'s become of Earth now...
The kind of poetry people on Earth are now writing, and how drastically different their culture must be from that of the Golden Age.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 22 Renaissance du Fantastique → 22-1 Bal du moulin de la Galette (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
At Babylonia, in WGAA\'s Chairman Office
Allen sits before his table, his terminal projecting a virtual screen that shows an encrypted message. Allen stares quietly at the garbled letters and numbers—until a few knocks come from the door.
[Allen]: Come on in.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 22 Renaissance du Fantastique → 22-2 The Art of Painting (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A few days later, at the WGAA.
Two new faces now occupy Ayla\'s studio.
Commandant Sica and Trojan who are part of the newly formed "Iris Warbler" have been undergoing "emergency art training" with the help of Captain Ayla.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 22 Renaissance du Fantastique → 22-3 An Experiment on a Bird in the Air Pump (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
As if standing in front of infinite back-lit mirrors.
Each mirror reflects a helpless and confused self.
One knows that nothing can be grasped but one still tries in vain.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 22 Renaissance du Fantastique → 22-4 The Boulevard Montmartre at Night (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Even when they stepped foot on the ground, the sight in front of them still seems unreal.
What surrounds the city is a bunch of ruins, just as Babylonia\'s intel had stated.
Originally, Constellia was supposed to stretch on for tens of thousands of square kilometers, a scale as large as Kowloong. The numbered cities from the Post-Pandemic Age are like children\'s sand castles in comparison.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 22 Renaissance du Fantastique → 22-5 Composition 8 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The extension of the red carpet stops at a shut door.
This museum is the outermost one among all, Iris Warbler has reached here without a problem.
From the decorations, sculptures, and words on the outside, it no doubt screams "welcome" to all passersby.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 22 Renaissance du Fantastique → 22-5 Composition 8 (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The lobby alarm is still not disarmed, the mechanical statues continue to attack Iris Warbler.
The statues\' movements are not complex, but they have the advantage in numbers. No matter how many they defeat, there are always new ones that appear out of nowhere to replace them.
Sica cannot predict where the next batch of enemies will strike next, and since Iris Warbler is still a new team, their cooperation is far from flawless, if they continue on like this, it is just a matter of time for the mechanic statues to break though their defenses.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 22 Renaissance du Fantastique → 22-6 Winter Landscape (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The door opens and combines once more.
Compared to how they entered without thought last time, the four of them are much more cautious.
[Sica]: Hiss...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 22 Renaissance du Fantastique → 22-7 The Hunters in the Snow (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Sica]: Huff... We finally... won...
The blade of Ayla\'s gun lance flashes past, and "Rosetta\'s" huge body finally falls.
Sica holds the empty grenade gun, her body quivers due to exhaustion.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 22 Renaissance du Fantastique → 22-8 The Rooks Have Returned (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: Hey, Carl! Wake up! Come on!
Yesterday was the 23rd day since we left Murmansk Port.
According to plan, the Moses-class icebreaker "Naval" left Barentshavet on the 22nd day and entered the border of the Greenland Sea and the Norwegian Sea.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 22 Renaissance du Fantastique → 22-9 Isle of the Dead (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
In a pitch-black hall.
A meticulously decorated knight armor is placed in the center of the room.
Under the thick visor of the lifeless armor, light flashes irregularly as if it has a consciousness of its own.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 22 Renaissance du Fantastique → 22-10 Las Meninas (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Ayla]: ...Wow.
No matter how many times she has seen Kowloong, she is still stunned by its magnificence every time.
A city engulfed by rainbow-colored light, sparks flashing from the numerous buildings—even when it is a mini "exhibition" version, it is still breathtaking.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 22 Renaissance du Fantastique → 22-11 Le Reve (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Trojan]: Ayla, now!
[Ayla]: This should... end it!
With a graceful flourish of her tonfas, Trojan dislodges the glaive from "Qu\'s" grip, and then Ayla executes the coup de grace.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 22 Renaissance du Fantastique → 22-12 Moonlit Night on the Dnieper (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Trojan]: That mechanoid called Cervantes actually visited Kowloong and met the real Qu.
[Ayla]: Considering there are two exhibition halls dedicated to Kowloong, it is likely that he also visited the Nighter after the outbreak of the Punishing Virus.
[Ayla]: Now that I think about the Arctic hall and the unexplored ones awaiting us ahead, he may even have traversed around the entire world.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 22 Renaissance du Fantastique → 22-13 The Night Watch (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Spooner]: Haicma, behind you!
[Haicma]: Multiple hostile signals detected. Executing combat measures.
Having brought down his final adversary with a resounding stomp, Spooner pivots around, only to behold a scattered landscape of machine parts. Rendered lifeless, each piece lies cleaved in perfect halves, a testament to the surgical precision of Haicma\'s scythe.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 22 Renaissance du Fantastique → 22-14 The Ambassadors (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
General Staff Conference Room, Babylonia.
[Nikola]: Sorry, I\'m late.
Nikola bursts into the room with a messy stack of documents in his hand, his appearance bearing the marks of a relentless onslaught of battle deployments.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 22 Renaissance du Fantastique → 22-16 Marius at Minturnae (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After a night\'s rest, Ayla and her squad resume their exploration.
As they continue down the corridor, a magnificent building looms ahead.
[Ayla]: Looks like it\'s... a theater?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 22 Renaissance du Fantastique → 22-18 Knight, Death, and the Devil (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Ayla]: ...
[Ayla]: This place...
The curtain on the stage has descended, yet she finds herself still walking in endless darkness.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 22 Renaissance du Fantastique → 22-19 The Nightmare (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Ayla]: ...
The mechanoid vanishes from her sight as the darkness gradually recedes. This time, her consciousness is finally brought back to reality.
Ayla opens her eyes, disconnects from the device in silence, and puts it away.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 22 Renaissance du Fantastique → 22-20 Wanderer above the Sea of Fog (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The towering tree stretching toward the heavens is blazing tirelessly.
[Ayla]: ...Even for a recreated projection, it feels too realistic.
[Trojan]: The details are so incredibly convincing that it feels as though the person recreating them had witnessed the incident firsthand.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 22 Renaissance du Fantastique → 22-20 Wanderer above the Sea of Fog (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Gone are the Hetero-Creatures and Corrupted emerging from all directions, relentlessly seeking prey, as well as the echoes of roars and wails from Constructs filling the air.
[Ayla]: ...
With one knee planted on the ground, Ayla fixes her gaze upon the colorless Construct standing before her. In the fleeting moments before everything is consumed by the pale light emanating from the Longinus Arsenal, she stretches out her hand in a desperate attempt to grasp the Construct\'s hand.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 22 Renaissance du Fantastique → 22-21 The Realist (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Ayla]: ...Now we\'ve collected three pieces of Cervantes\' memory data.
[Ayla]: But I can\'t help but have this feeling that something\'s missing...
[Trojan]: Seriously... You\'ve gotta be the lamest detective I\'ve ever seen.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 22 Renaissance du Fantastique → 22-22 The Persistence of Memory (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Ayla]: Here\'s the fourth memory data chip. We breezed through that!
[Ayla]: But why did this replica show up here?
[Haicma]: ...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 22 Renaissance du Fantastique → 22-23 The Light of the World (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Carl]: Michele, it seems you\'re not feeling your best. Would you like me to escort you back to your room so you can get some rest?
[Michele]: No, Carl, I\'d prefer to go for a walk in the city.
[Carl]: You\'ve been engaged in continuous work for 18 hours. Following the doctor\'s guidance, you must secure a minimum of 70 hours of rest per week to prevent the deterioration of your health.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 22 Renaissance du Fantastique → 22-24 Lieder ohne Worte (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Haicma]: Space scan complete... Based on the map layout, the final exhibition hall lies ahead of us.
[Ayla]: The last...
As the gate swings open, they are immediately engulfed in an aura of solitude.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 22 Renaissance du Fantastique → 22-24 Lieder ohne Worte (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Fifteen minutes ago.
After trekking through the final indoor corridor, Sica\'s group arrives at a colossal circular room.
The room unfolds like a miniature palace, its dome-shaped ceiling adorned with the orbits of stars. Each of the stars emits a gentle, ethereal blue glow that bathes the interior.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 22 Renaissance du Fantastique → 22-25 The Last Judgment (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Ayla battles her way through the obstacles, determined to reach the epicenter of the explosion. She finally arrives, only to find the scene not as tumultuous as she had imagined.
Contrary to her expectations, the air around hangs heavy with an eerie silence, as though she has stumbled upon a desolate graveyard.
[Ayla]: What on earth is... going on?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 22 Renaissance du Fantastique → 22-26 Irises (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The girl\'s gunlance flashes with sparks.
She continues forward in the dim light. She watches from the shadow.
[???]: ...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 22 Renaissance du Fantastique → 22-27 Starry Night (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The platform slowly trembles and rises toward the roof of the giant windmill tower like a forgotten beast that just awakens.
As the platform moves up, the night view of the city can be clearly seen through the perfectly transparent eco-glass wall. Perhaps it was built to let the tourists enjoy the views of Constellia in the first place.
Ayla quietly walks to the wall. She stares at this unfamiliar city and the unfamiliar sky.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 22 Renaissance du Fantastique → 22-27 Starry Night (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Echo?]: Why...?
[Echo?]: You don\'t even have any special function equipped. How can a Construct push me (us) to this point...?!
The knight statue hovering behind "Echo" finally dims and ceases its movement after an intense fight.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 22 Renaissance du Fantastique → 22-28 First Steps (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Cervantes]: ...
[Dulcinea]: What are you looking at, Cervantes?
The first ray of sunshine has lit up the sky. The mechanoid girl stands under the windmill\'s shade, asking her silent creator.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 23 Wintry Shackles → 23-1 Her Traces (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
10:00 a.m. 8 kilometers outside Oasis.
[Singing]: ～In the desert is a lone traveling wolf...～
[Singing]: ～Without a pack or a sense of direction...～

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 23 Wintry Shackles → 23-2 Undercurrents and Omens (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
In a dark, concealed room, faint blue projections light up one after another.
Intentionally blurred projections turn them into ghosts hidden from history cloaked in oppressive darkness.
During the day, they are powerful council members, industry leaders, or generals who can sway the Babylonia headquarters...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 23 Wintry Shackles → 23-3 Reunion (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Channel Noise]: This could be a trap. Her sincerity could be covering for other intentions.
The sky darkens. Alpha\'s audio module begins to hear a familiar voice on top of her own footsteps.
[Alpha]: Babylonia wouldn\'t have set such a convoluted trap.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 23 Wintry Shackles → 23-4 New Possibilities (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
It is already nighttime when Luna and Alpha finish sharing their journeys.
[Luna]: Hetero-Creatures, the twins... So this is how far the Punishing Virus has evolved.
[Luna]: Gabriel\'s ambitions inevitably killed him in the end.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 23 Wintry Shackles → 23-5 Hetero Anomaly (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The storm carries the sand into the air. The red obelisk connects the earth and the sky, forming a suffocating cage and obscuring any sense of direction.
Coarse stones smash on her artificial skin, making loud clanging noises. Compared to the cuts, however, the shakes beneath her feet are more concerning.
Everywhere she looks is chaos. Hearing nothing but the howl of the wind, she finds everything surrounding her crumbling down amid the quake.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 23 Wintry Shackles → 23-5 Hetero Anomaly (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Fire and smoke cover the sky. Silence and death fill the air.
The shouting never stops. She clenches her weapon, as it is the only way to interact with this world.
She repeats the same action she has performed thousands of times, responding with the instinct she has forged with thousands of battles.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 23 Wintry Shackles → 23-6 New Filtering (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Chirping insects hide among the grass. Spherical bubbles reflect colorful lights.
The rotten wall has been painted white. The neglected lawn has been mown into a tidy green carpet.
The most eye-catching feature is a two-seater swing. Froggie sits on it, looking out of place among the surrounding flowers.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 23 Wintry Shackles → 23-7 Sad Cry (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
05:15 p.m. Area D12.
A few Constructs are guarding a transport craft as if waiting for something.
Seeing the transport craft approach, Alpha knows she is getting closer to her target.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 23 Wintry Shackles → 23-7 Sad Cry (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
05:30 p.m. Inside the transport craft.
After making sure that no reinforcement is coming, Alpha returns to the pilot seat in the transport craft.
[Alpha]: This transport craft doesn\'t have an official ID...?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 23 Wintry Shackles → 23-8 Choices (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
General Staff Conference Room, Babylonia.
Nikola pushes open the door and asks his question directly.
[Nikola]: How\'s the situation?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 23 Wintry Shackles → 23-9 Win-Win (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Sensing a faint tremble beneath your feet, you see the snowstorm before you. You are walking on clouds.
Where am I? That is the first question in your mind.
Unlike the ice field of ARU, there is brown soil and green sprouts here. This is not the North Pole.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 23 Wintry Shackles → 23-9 Win-Win (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Your bullets puncture the frail joints of the Corrupted accurately. You are not trying to take them down but slow their advance.
[Lee]: Copy.
You have intentionally led the Corrupted into one place, taking advantage of their predatory instincts. Their slowed movement means there is enough time for you to get to safety.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 23 Wintry Shackles → 23-10 Interwoven Fate (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Ion beams and lasers strike from afar, giving you a small breathing room. Still, your line of defense keeps retreating backward without Lucia\'s support.
This unusual ambush has caught you all by surprise, suffocating you like a tightening net.
That is when you hear an unfamiliar voice in your ear.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 23 Wintry Shackles → 23-11 Their Determination (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Discord]: Understood. I will change the cruising direction right now.
[Discord]: As for her condition...
Discord looks back at the girl sleeping in the isolation pod to check her condition before answering Nikola.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 23 Wintry Shackles → 23-11 Their Determination (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Crimson particles gather in Alpha\'s left hand, linking together her consciousness and Lucia\'s.
The noises in Lucia\'s M.I.N.D. gradually lowered, along with her level of infection.
[Lucia]: Were you trying to release your power and find a way to contain it through the battle just now?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 23 Wintry Shackles → 23-12  The Beginning (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Not as grand as one would imagine, nor does it have any unnecessary decorations. The building just sits quietly in the mountains like a black rock.
[???]: Is this the "North Asian Research Institute of Life Science and Evolution"?
After taking off his eye mask, the male researcher exclaims as he looks at the fortress that blends in perfectly with the surroundings.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 23 Wintry Shackles → 23-12  The Beginning (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After the last security robot fell to their blades, a brief moment of silence has returned to the empty lab.
Two of them start to check undamaged documents on the desks and terminals while maintaining a certain distance in between.
[Alpha]: What\'s this...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 23 Wintry Shackles → 23-13 Imprisonment (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Self-modification is destined to be a painful path. To change humanity itself means that all the social structures, ethics and morals built upon the biological foundation of humans will be reshuffled.
It will take a long time for humanity to ease the pains that emerge from the transition between old and new orders.
[Godwin]: I\'m so disappointed in you...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 23 Wintry Shackles → 23-13 Imprisonment (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Endless infected test subjects swarm out from all directions. Two of them, surrounded in the center, look like waves in a black ocean.
Alpha cuts a test subject in half with her dagger, then spins her hilt in a crescent to knock away another enemy approaching from her back.
The test subject is thrown into the air and frozen by a chilling tornado. It falls to the ground and shatters.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 23 Wintry Shackles → 23-14 Abyss (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The torch that was supposed to help civilization survive the winter has turned into deadly flames.
[Godwin]: Are you asking us to change our direction of research and design the Constructs for military use?
Godwin frowns at the request.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 23 Wintry Shackles → 23-14 Abyss (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
In a lab located at the bottom level of Fort Winter.
Seeing the data on the glaring screen, Godwin is finally unable to control his rage. He punches his desk.
[Research Assistant]: (Professor\'s mood seems to be getting worse recently...)

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 23 Wintry Shackles → 23-15 Captive Shadow (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
As she expected, when she opens her eyes, she sees the home that once belonged to Luna and her again.
[Luna]: Welcome home, Sister.
The winter frost has dissipated. New, green sprouts have grown. Somehow, Alpha is also returned to her former appearance.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 23 Wintry Shackles → 23-16 Bet-on Agreement (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A few hours ago, in Gray Raven\'s temporary camp.
[Lee]: Hacking complete. Turns out it\'s an encrypted comms address.
As Lee continues to work on it, the lengthy non-disclosure agreement has turned into a simple string of numbers and letters.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 23 Wintry Shackles → 23-16 Bet-on Agreement (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The clang of metal continues amidst fierce explosions. Cultivation tanks break away from their slots, falling into the magma.
[Lilith]: That\'s right! Who will burn out first, us or this place? Let\'s bet on it!
[Alpha]: The battle will end before that.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 23 Wintry Shackles → 23-17 Snowstorm's Pause (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Three hours passed after Gray Raven received the mission to support and rescue Lucia.
[Nikola]: Asking too many questions is not going to do you any good. You should stay out of this.
[Nikola]: ...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 24 Chaos Unsnarled → 24-1 White and Black (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The white snakes through the place.
Contrary to what she remembers of the place, however, this place doesn\'t have that same wall clock that tells her exactly what she needs to do.
The clock here doesn\'t play all the lyrics she remembers by heart until it strikes six.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 24 Chaos Unsnarled → 24-2 Dead Leaves (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[No. 21]: Section 6 from Zone B... Over here, Buddy.
No. 21 turns the electronic map on her terminal\'s screen at 450 degrees to make sure they\'re going the right way.
[No. 21]: This is quite a handful, isn\'t it?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 24 Chaos Unsnarled → 24-3 Hetero-Unity (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Bang! Bang!
[Liv]: Turn right 60 meters ahead and there\'ll be an internal path! It\'ll take us through the buildings!
[Lee]: Roger!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 24 Chaos Unsnarled → 24-4 Packs (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Canon]: This "Noctis" guy... Is he really as bad as you make him sound?
[No. 21]: Yes. Noctis is a lazy troublemaker.
[No. 21]: I\'m always there to handle his poop every time Captain is mad at him.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 24 Chaos Unsnarled → 24-5 Dried Traces (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Vera]: Are the patients all gone?
Vera rushed her way to the conservation area, having learned about what had happened.
Having quickly purged the encampment, Vera asks Salans to quickly tally up the people there.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 24 Chaos Unsnarled → 24-5 Dried Traces (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[No. 21]: Tracks. They went that way.
No. 21 points at the Hetero-Creature tracks she just discovered. It\'s a drag mark.
[Vera]: Salans, is there anything out of the ordinary at the northwest base recently?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 24 Chaos Unsnarled → 24-6 The Price of Sacrifice (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A slimy, sticky crawling sound echoes through the dim room.
Inside a simple "corral" made of piles of boulders and rebars, a few flora and fauna-like Hetero-Creatures are wandering about.
The monsters walk past one another without any aggression. Instead, they move together as a group toward the edge of the "corral."

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 24 Chaos Unsnarled → 24-7 The Smell She Desires (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Vera]: I\'ll take the left, and you\'ll take the right, No. 21. Shorty, stay close to us.
[Lilin]: I\'m not short! I... I am not done growing yet!
[No. 21]: Right.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 24 Chaos Unsnarled → 24-8 Twisted Forest (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Bzzzz—bzzzz—
[Construct]: Odd, the communication signal is disrupted, but it was still working yesterday.
[Noctis]: Is this stuff jammed?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 24 Chaos Unsnarled → 24-9 Lost Shadow (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Commandant, the wounded and priority evacuees have finished boarding.
[Liv]: Should we get them going immediately?
The transport craft that Vera\'s team brought is now filled with people. The majority are elders and children, with only a few individuals being carried on stretchers.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 24 Chaos Unsnarled → 24-10 Different Vessels (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Canon]: I was seven when I first saw them...
[Canon]: It was a lone little wolf seeking refuge in a tree hole. Exhaustion and hunger weighed heavily upon its weakened body, leaving it no strength to flee.
[Fading Voice]: As I walked closer, it showed its fangs to me threateningly, but I could see its paws trembling.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 24 Chaos Unsnarled → 24-11 Hands (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
It\'s so c-cold... H-help me...
Anyone... Please... Grab my hand...
[Refugee Leader]: Alright, alright, you can let go now.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 24 Chaos Unsnarled → 24-12 Black Rebellion (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lilin]: No... Pfft...
No. 21 seizes the opportunity when the enemy\'s "joint" is immobilized by Vera\'s blade. With her claw blades spread wide, she unleashes a fierce slash, tearing apart the purple-green hands with ruthless precision.
The monster emits human-like mumbles as chunks of flesh, varying in size, fall from its body, akin to a freshly sliced open stomach.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 24 Chaos Unsnarled → 24-13 Death of a Lone Walker (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
For days, the little wolf has been observing the lone wolf from a safe distance.
Despite her strong desire to learn how to survive on her own, she finds herself unable to suppress her curiosity.
Can a lone wolf really last on its own?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 24 Chaos Unsnarled → 24-14 The Lone Wolf's Border (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[No. 21]: Ngh...
The shock caused by M.I.N.D. fluctuation forcefully severed the remote connection, stirring up intense pain and stunning No. 21\'s senses.
She shakes her head, trying to make the swirling world stop.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 24 Chaos Unsnarled → 24-15 Cradle's End (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[No. 21]: We lost them.
[Vera]: ...Okay.
During the relentless pursuit of Hetero-Creatures, the alloy part on Vera\'s leg becomes severed, pushing her mobility to its absolute limit.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 24 Chaos Unsnarled → 24-15 Cradle's End (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A rampaging dark shadow abruptly emerges, catching everyone off guard, as it forcefully breaks free from the confines of the forest. The once expansive forest now appears to shrink and contort into an egg shape.
Amidst the interplay of searchlights and darkness, the shadow springs forth with remarkable swiftness and height, resembling an untamed bird soaring out of a black egg.
Driven by an unwavering determination to be born into this world against all odds, the creature must, in turn, use its newborn claws to destroy the other world known as its "cradle."

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 24 Chaos Unsnarled → 24-16 The Freedom Defined By Herself (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A few days later, in a confidential Babylonia meeting.
[Hassen]: ...The Task Force is still monitoring the situation and investigating the "Hetero Zone" even now.
The projections in the conference room switch between several satellite images tainted in purplish red. The Task Force appears like a dark gray dam in the photos, blocking off an ocean of omens.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 25 Everglowing Justice → 25-1 Buried Nightmare (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: Ah... ▇▇▇... My ▇▇▇▇... Brilliant...
[???]: ▇▇▇... Don\'t be afraid...
[???]: Run... Run out of this place!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 25 Everglowing Justice → 25-1 Buried Nightmare (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: Ah... ▇▇▇... My ▇... Brilliant...
[Echo]: !!!
The unsettling whispers keep haunting her until the first glow of daylight stings her eyes.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 25 Everglowing Justice → 25-2 World Without Order (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
This is a conservation area that sits at what is currently detected as the border of the Clean Zone.
With the CPF and the Inver-Hetero Tower, there is almost no Punishing Virus here. But with its proximity to the edge of the Clean Zone, this area is still occasionally disturbed by Hetero-Creatures and Corrupted.
However, "occasionally" has been happening... a little too frequently these days.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 25 Everglowing Justice → 25-3 Connected Clues (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Opening the dated report, you find entries of people from Conservation Area 109 who went missing in the past few quarters due to "Hetero-Creature attacks."
The data... is indeed highly unusual.
The people lost in Hetero-Creature attacks should have been healthy adults laboring outside, but most of them mentioned in the report fall into the age brackets of 10 to 15 and 50 to 60.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 25 Everglowing Justice → 25-4 To Each Their Own (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Dim light simulated by the weather system shines through the windows of the conference room in the Babylonia Headquarters.
The morning meeting is coming to an end. An oppressive air fills the room as Nikola frowns while reading the remaining few reports.
[Nikola]: ...Any news on the Kurono test subject?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 25 Everglowing Justice → 25-4 To Each Their Own (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Echo]: Hff...
Echo breaths heavily beside you, struggling. Even with your help, the effects of the interferences on her M.I.N.D. are still going to take some time before they wear off.
[Echo]: Why... would that thing show up here...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 25 Everglowing Justice → 25-5 Utopia (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Echo]: Utopia... was a wonderful place. I\'ve lived there for as long as I can remember.
[Echo]: They took in many children and Constructs. Some Constructs formed the Aurora Squadron, while others were charged with maintaining the operation of Utopia.
[Echo]: The person in charge of Utopia... was Dr. Pickman.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 25 Everglowing Justice → 25-6 Unspoken Pain (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The dawning sun rises above the horizon, outlining the silhouette of Conservation Area 112.
[Echo]: It\'s right ahead... Ugh.
[Echo]: My M.I.N.D. is hurting a little bit. I guess it\'s the aftereffects of yesterday\'s interference.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 25 Everglowing Justice → 25-6 Unspoken Pain (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Echo]: ...Aargh!
Echo sits up abruptly, clutching her forehead in pain.
Lee has shot down the M.I.N.D. disruptor from afar, but the aftereffects are not likely to subside anytime soon when it comes to M.I.N.D. interferences.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 25 Everglowing Justice → 25-7 Price and Compensation (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Wells sits in a corner in silence. The air in the room is as still as a frozen lake.
[Hassen]: Commandant has entered Conservation Area 112 as planned.
[Nikola]: Conservation Area 112... It\'s about time to restart the investigation on Silver Falcon.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 25 Everglowing Justice → 25-8 Blooming in Despair (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Echo]: ...I was the cause of all these sins.
[Echo]: Utopia might not have existed if it weren\'t for me.
[Echo]: Dr. Pickman was always doing experiments, and he would occasionally ask for our help. Although we didn\'t understand what he was doing, we were all happy to lend a hand.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 25 Everglowing Justice → 25-9 Anyder (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
There has been a wave of new Hetero-Creature attacks around here recently. Several Constructs who went out patrolling disappeared, and the people inside the conservation area are rightfully scared.
[Conservation Area Staff]: Hey! You there! Don\'t move!
[Conservation Area Staff]: Who are you?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 25 Everglowing Justice → 25-9 Anyder (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
To your surprise, the residents you "saved" do not look happy after you chased the Aurora Squadron away.
[Disappointed Man]: Dammit... Did we miss the chance?
[Disappointed Man]: Why? Why would you do this?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 25 Everglowing Justice → 25-10 Following the Wind (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
It is late at night. The soldiers of the Aurora Squadron have entered the woods before you. In order to keep an eye on them, Echo and you have set up a simple camp here.
[Echo]: They\'ve stopped. Their base must be nearby.
[Echo]: I\'m not.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 25 Everglowing Justice → 25-11 False Dream (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Against a sky in which the stars hang far and wide apart, the low hums that the armor emits are reminiscent of alarm calls.
[Echo]: ...Commandant?
Your body wakes right up and readies itself for a fight after years of being on the front lines.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 25 Everglowing Justice → 25-11 False Dream (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Echo\'s M.I.N.D. has stabilized. She seems to be trying to wake up from her Deep M.I.N.D.
This place isn\'t safe. You need to get out of here as soon as you can.
[Echo]: Ughh... Commandant!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 25 Everglowing Justice → 25-12 Arrow of Freedom (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Echo]: Is he coming with us?
Echo says as she fiddles with the campfire on the ground.
Lee hasn\'t quite changed his attitude about your decision after your brief discussion, but he stays around for recon as told anyway.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 25 Everglowing Justice → 25-13 Ashes of Absurdity (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Echo]: ...Here it is.
[Echo]: This is where Lena will be probing next, based on the mark she left in the last flying fortress.
This flying fortress appears deserted as well—but having survived the trap earlier, you know better than to let your guard down now.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 25 Everglowing Justice → 25-13 Ashes of Absurdity (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The fall is endless.
It all seems like broken pieces of a nightmare—showing every single moment that everyone has lived through, happy or sad.
Searing flames lie at the bottom of the abyss, blurring even the clearest of eyes.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 25 Everglowing Justice → 25-14 Delayed Justice (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The hall turns into a sea of noise as soon as the people inside are informed of the new proposition—one designed to reinforce the elimination of illegal labs and illicit experiments.
[Councilman A]: Illegal experiments? Help us out here and give us a clear definition.
[Councilman A]: What are we supposed to make of the Star of Life and Science Council if we regard in vivo testing as the definition of an illegal experiment?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 25 Everglowing Justice → 25-15 Path of Judgment (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: They\'ve approved Lucia\'s and Liv\'s support application, Commandant.
[Lee]: Surprisingly fast this time.
[Lee]: Any news from them?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 25 Everglowing Justice → 25-16 Reunion (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
In Utopia\'s lab, Pickman looks happily at the "sample" before him.
[Test Subject]: ...
[Pickman]: Subpar and definitely nowhere close to Alisa, but this... makes a bare pass nonetheless, I suppose.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 25 Everglowing Justice → 25-16 Reunion (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: ...Operation data cracked!
The flying fortresses on the outer circle slowly come to a stop, following the heavy roars of machines and the grinding of gears, forming a weird shape around the central flying fortress.
[Liv]: I cracked Utopia\'s central control system using the encryption key I got from Asimov and locked all the smaller flying fortresses around the central flying fortress...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 25 Everglowing Justice → 25-17 King of Nutshell (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Conference room, Babylonia.
Sitting in a corner, Wells keeps his gaze on the Silver Falcon badge in his hand.
[Nikola]: The Gray Ravens are now around the coordinates provided by the Kurono test subject and have discovered the target flying fortress.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 25 Everglowing Justice → 25-18 Embracing Death (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The bloody fog in the skies has cleared away to reveal the pale clouds behind. Collapsing on the ground, the horrendous test subject seems one last coup de grace away from his demise.
Her frame broken and her fingers shaking, Echo struggles to her feet, puts an arrow on her bow—and aims it straight at the test subject.
[Echo]: Father...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 25 Everglowing Justice → 25-19 Everglowing Justice (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
"Project Cthylla has been proven fallacious and unviable."
