"Some of the plan\'s objectives are indeed achievable, but research findings of M.I.N.D. are the most important experiment results that can be obtained from the project."
"I shall continue probing into the vast territory of M.I.N.D. from which we still have a great deal to learn—and the world shall one day see what my endeavor has to show for."

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 25 Everglowing Justice → 25-21 Mournful Separation (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Crimson is the frozen land through which cracks run.
Swarming up this way through the mud as they let out beastlike howls are seemingly endless Corrupted.
She lies on the ground surrounded by broken limbs. She\'s unable to think, her M.I.N.D. filled with vital fluid that now reeks of grass.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 26 Cradle Parade → 26-1 Cradle Slaughterhouse (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
—Excerpt—
April 1st, April Fool\'s Day. Fate has decided to crack a cruel joke. The Gray Raven Commandant has vanished.
The transport craft back to Babylonia got ambushed. All emergency items got wrecked, and even the parachutes turned out to have massive holes, only spotted once they were open.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 26 Cradle Parade → 26-2 Unexpected Visitor (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
From the silent wreckage emerges a visitor Lithos never expected.
[Lillian]: I...
The long-unconscious "child" rubs her messy forehead, striving to regain her clarity and return to her original form.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 26 Cradle Parade → 26-3 Lost Soul (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
As Lamia deftly avoids Lithos, the lost soul trapped in the depths of the pit begin their own battle to break free and flee.
Your limbs are trapped by shackles, firmly anchored to the table and the floor, granting only limited movement to your upper body.
Luckily, the shaky sensation suggests the handcuffs aren\'t securely fastened. If not for this weakened body, it is possible to break free through sheer strength alone.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 26 Cradle Parade → 26-4 Missing Mermaid (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
On the Ascendants\' side, Lamia has also vanished, disguised as Lillian.
[Lillian]: ...
[Lillian]: How did things end up like this...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 26 Cradle Parade → 26-5 Stir of "Ingredients" (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Lamia glances around, observing the Red Tide Projections murmuring like souls in the River Styx.
[???]: People with a stable M.I.N.D... they\'re scarce now, most of them already assigned...
Upon their broken voices, Lamia, out of curiosity, moves closer, only to barely make out the words uttered.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 26 Cradle Parade → 26-6 If Together (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
On April 15th, the Gray Raven Commandant has been missing for a full 15 days, and the entire squad has calmly been in a berserk state for 15 days.
This elite squad has endured hardships unimaginable to ordinary people and has steeled themselves for the painful farewells that death may bring.
But there\'s always a consensus in their hearts—that if that day must come, it should be on the battlefield or by the aging commandant\'s bedside.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 26 Cradle Parade → 26-7 Parade of Despair (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After a grueling six hours of nonstop battles, the trio finally reaches the entrance to the passage Shorthalt spoke of.
Counting the time spent backtracking through debris for supplies, it\'s been over ten hours since you awoke.
If everything here is under Lithos\' control, how long will it be till his "final shot" finds you?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 26 Cradle Parade → 26-8 Wrongtimed Rose (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Shorthalt]: Looks like everyone\'s safe.
[Shorthalt]: All I found were research materials on the M.I.N.D. I can\'t understand half of it but picked them up anyway. We can bring them to the Science Council once we escape.
[Shorthalt]: In those reports, I spotted the names Kugawa Kurono, Cinderelik, Loki, Voodoo, and Cthylla.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 26 Cradle Parade → 26-9 Caught Right On (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Once the call is cut off, Lamia temporarily reverts to her original appearance. She stares down at her legs, indistinguishable from a human\'s, lost in thought.
[Lamia]: ...The orphanage...
Back in Atlantis, she had wished countless times to leave the place sooner and see what the real world was like.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 26 Cradle Parade → 26-10 Storm Impending (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The illusion collapses, and the surrounding scenery reverts to its "original" state.
[Lamia]: I did it...!
Lamia stares down at her hands in disbelief. This is the first time she\'s defeated a Transcendant all by herself... and it\'s Loki, no less, who\'s an adept attacker.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 26 Cradle Parade → 26-11 Unleashed Torrents (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
About an hour and a half later...
Everything is in place. The trio retreat to a safe zone and activate the detonator.
With a loud bang, the great tree and all the replicated memories stored beside Cthylla turn to ashes in the blaze.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 26 Cradle Parade → 26-12 Deepsea Suffocation (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You\'re neither Cthylla—who tends to slowly lose her mind if she loses the egg—nor Lamia—who thrives with the egg.
The collapse sends you straight into the pool at the bottom, tumbling into a deep well along with the current.
The rumble of the earthquake continues in the distance, and it sounds as though some gigantic monsters are fighting where you can\'t see them.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 26 Cradle Parade → 26-13 A Fish Back in Water (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The torrents of fate drag into the deep sea all those who have drowned. Suffocated, they\'re all on the verge of death.
In endless despair, only one feels reborn.
[Lamia]: ...I can do all these things now.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 26 Cradle Parade → 26-14 Daughter of the Sea (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
If they were suddenly freed from their shackles, stepped out of the cave, and forced to look directly at the fire and accept that all they used to see were mere illusions...
...they would surely feel pain in the process...
...And confusion, too.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 26 Cradle Parade → 26-15 Driftwood (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
At the bottom of the well, the commandant has a dream related to "Mother."
Her appearance is still that of a young girl, making her anything but a "mother." It is, therefore, logical to conclude that she was merely assigned the title "Mother".
And that\'s that. It\'s got to be that.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 26 Cradle Parade → 26-16 Wandering Grass (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Before facing this "Noan", you\'ve asked "the other" Noan a question.
[Noan]: Would I have left with Lithos had I never been stopped?
[Noan]: ...Well, quite likely, because he\'d always try to stop me from recalling all the good memories.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 26 Cradle Parade → 26-17 Downstream (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The two of you navigate through countless collapsed passages toward the control room.
All along the way, Hetero-Creatures come pouring out of the collapsed walls like animals trying to flee a forest fire, every last one highly aggressive.
To them, one of you is a traitor who deserves nothing but death, while the other a sacrifice to be captured. One single mishap is all it takes for the two of you to become their prey.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 26 Cradle Parade → 26-18 His "Cat" (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Having eliminated the Hetero-Creatures that had been tailing you, you perk up and turn your attention back to the old news you\'d just found.
Apart from the incident report, most of these documents are just like "clippings"—they\'re nothing but bits and pieces of old news.
Someone was after this certain Professor Kilgore Trout, and these seem like what came out of his pursuit.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 26 Cradle Parade → 26-19 Insufficient Balance (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You tuck away the documents you just found and continue searching for hope in this maze of a control room.
After 2 hours of battle and search, the trio finally comes across the transmitter that Lithos has been using to communicate with the world outside.
You tinker with it hoping it would work, but see that there are no signals.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 26 Cradle Parade → 26-20 Mask Fusion (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lamia]: ...
Following the blurry phantoms, Lamia reaches a console piled with numerous monitoring devices.
Turning the screen on, she sees the only useable program and quickly calls up its instruction manual.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 26 Cradle Parade → 26-21 Promised Demise (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lamia]: ...Huff... Ah...
Emerging from the looping illusion, Lamia can\'t stop herself from shaking.
She glances at the human commandant—covered from head to toe in wounds—in front of her and "Noan" who stands so far away she can barely see him.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 26 Cradle Parade → 26-21 Promised Demise (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Having been pierced multiple times, Lithos\' body all but completely shatters on the ground.
How many deaths is this now? It doesn\'t matter. No one cares.
At best, this tedious life of his causes the best of heroes nothing but disgust.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 26 Cradle Parade → 26-22 The Final Chessboard (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
When Lamia is done washing herself clean of the blood and rejoins the human, "Noan" has succeeded in luring Cthylla away.
"Noan" barely manages to dodge Cthylla\'s vital hits even as he gives up attacking her altogether and concentrates fully on dodging her attacks.
[Lamia]: ...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 26 Cradle Parade → 26-23 Bidding Farewell (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A young man crawls in moments after Lamia has left.
He drops a blanket next to you and throws up his arms to show that he had no luck finding anything useful.
[Noan?]: Lithos is now Cthylla\'s second consciousness. I\'ve sealed off some entrances but had no luck finding the things I stored up before.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 26 Cradle Parade → 26-24 Parade of Corpses (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Cradle Parade
April 1st, early morning. One full year has passed by since the Gray Raven Commandant went missing.
Containing the commandant\'s body, the whale-shaped coffin breaks free of the deep sea\'s confinement with the other 612 souls lost here.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 26 Cradle Parade → 26-26 Starlit Wish (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The egg\'s consciousness is quickly dissipating.
Before long, "she" will be completely shattered and turn into a bunch of chaotic data that, just like all the normal Hetero-Creatures, is completely worthless.
Holding the dimming chunk of red in her arms, the mermaid slowly makes her way toward the exit of her dream, where the single-winged girl stands.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 26 Cradle Parade → 26-27 "931206" (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Several months later.
A woman who seems out of place enters the dimly light temporary base.
[The Merciful One]: It\'s been a while.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 28 Polaris Bond → 28-0 Shimmering Well (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Councilor A]: ...So, without understanding Kowloong\'s internal affairs, Babylonia has no reason to negotiate with you.
[Councilor A]: Especially not with Huaxu and that Transcendant missing. No, we can\'t form an alliance with you now.
[Councilor A]: And I\'m not even done yet!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 28 Polaris Bond → 28-1 Accomplice (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Asimov is still going through the report with a long face when you finish reading the last page of it and close the file.
[Duheng]: Let him finish reading it.
Having introduced herself as "Duheng", this councilor of Kowloong shakes her head, signaling that she doesn\'t mind Asimov taking his time with reading the report.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 28 Polaris Bond → 28-2 People of Kowloong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
To celebrate his eightieth birthday that\'s coming up in two days, Ma has made a reservation at The He\'s on North Twelfth Street.
The He\'s isn\'t an overly big restaurant. At most, it can fit only eight tables.
Ma is thinking about inviting some old friends from the Nighter and several old acquaintances who came back home over the years. In total, they could fill two tables, which would be quite lively.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 28 Polaris Bond → 28-3 Imminent Crisis (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[The Pulao Crew]: Did it work?!
[Pulao]: Hmm... I wouldn\'t say that. These things are still under discussion...
Pulao sits with a wry smile in the duty room of the base, surrounded by members of the Pulao Crew. The members come in all shapes and sizes.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 28 Polaris Bond → 28-3 Imminent Crisis (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Pulao]: Fall back!
[Hetero-Creature]: Raaargh—!
Pulao swings her Dragonbane with all her might and slices the Hetero-Creature climbing up the hill in half.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 28 Polaris Bond → 28-4 Choice (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Ma]: Argh... Zhishi?
[Zhishi]: There\'s an emergency—
[Mr. Hu]: Ouch!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 28 Polaris Bond → 28-5 Path of Demise (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A girl walks in with a large suitcase. She puts the suitcase on the ground, making a hollow sound that echoes through the empty church hall.
[???]: I\'m back!
[??]: Huh?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 28 Polaris Bond → 28-5 Path of Demise (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Worker]: Mr. Wang! All units at low temperature!
A dusty worker, covered in black and gray soot, pokes his head out from the messy factory floor and shouts loudly.
[Xianqi]: Okay!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 28 Polaris Bond → 28-6 Reencounter (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Hanzhao, Pulao Crew]: Doctor! Doctor!
These people look like they have just escaped from hell. They are covered in open wounds and a crimson color that is a mix of Punishing and blood.
[Hanzhao, Pulao Crew]: Somebody help!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 28 Polaris Bond → 28-7 The Two Rays (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A big screen shows the full map of Kowloong. Chaofeng places the terminal on a stand and addresses the hundreds below.
[Chaofeng]: I\'ll keep it brief. Our mission is to reactivate the "Light Wall" in Kowloong.
[Chaofeng]: Fuxi from Kowloong gave us this suggestion since we cannot keep sending soldiers and teams to fight these Hetero-Creatures.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 28 Polaris Bond → 28-7 The Two Rays (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Receiving Terminal]: Hey...
[Receiving Terminal]: Huh?
[Receiving Terminal]: This is taking forever! What time is it?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 28 Polaris Bond → 28-8 Entering the Gate (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Chaofeng]: You promised this wouldn\'t happen!
Chaofeng\'s roar is echoing in the command room. A broken pen lies quietly by the map table.
[Chaofeng]: Remember what you said! You said restarting the Light Wall would solve everything!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 28 Polaris Bond → 28-9 Abandoning Hope (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Within the pitch darkness, a tall wall constructed of light and shadow looms, displaying a continuous stream of data and images.
A slender figure stands alone, facing this towering structure.
[Qu]: Huaxu, report the situation.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 28 Polaris Bond → 28-10  Destiny (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
This is a marvel of human engineering.
They excavated a cavern 1200 meters deep without harming the expansive modern city above, reconstructing an "ancient city" with a volume of 22 million cubic meters.
In an era where the world\'s attention is captivated by the grandeur of deep space, this stands as humanity\'s most profound and ancient homage to this planet—

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 28 Polaris Bond → 28-10  Destiny (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A silhouette resembling a peacock descends from the sky, pinning the last Corrupted that breached the defense line to the ground.
No one dares to approach her.
[Lucia]: Qu...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 28 Polaris Bond → 28-11 Regicide (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bai Gui, Chiwen Crew]: Lady Qu.
Bai Gui, waiting at the doorway, bows to Qu as she enters the hall. Nonetheless, Qu proceeds without pausing, striding inside with the data humanoid hovering beside her.
[Qu]: Mm.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 28 Polaris Bond → 28-11 Regicide (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After Qu acquiesced to people seeking refuge in the deeper parts of Tabula Akasha, an increasing number has been settled within this central control room.
This hall, with its robust constructivist style, stands in stark contrast to the architectural aesthetics of Tabula Akasha and even the entirety of Kowloong. It appears out of place here, perhaps more fitting for the Arctic Route Union instead.
[Chaofeng]: But regardless... according to Qu, this central area is the safest place in Tabula Akasha.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 28 Polaris Bond → 28-12 Proverbs (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
There are no living beings in Tabula Akasha.
While such a statement was entirely correct in the past, it may not be entirely accurate now.
Once isolated and desolate, this place has now turned into the last refuge for the people of Kowloong.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 28 Polaris Bond → 28-12 Proverbs (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Pulao!
By the time you see Pulao, she is already surrounded by corpses and debris. The Hetero-Creatures and Corrupted are slowly pulling back after the initial wave of assaults.
Lee, stationed high in the control room, shoots a bullet, ripping open massive wounds on the Hetero-Creatures surrounding Pulao. They writhe for a moment before collapsing.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 28 Polaris Bond → 28-13 Eulogy (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After withstanding the fiercest wave of Hetero-Creatures\' assaults in the central control room of Tabula Akasha, the frenzied rush toward the core of Tabula Akasha has significantly abated. Some even appear to be falling back.
Opportunities in war are fleeting. Just minutes ago, Gray Raven seized the moment of the Hetero-Creatures\' withdrawal and pushed through to the surface of Tabula Akasha, meeting up with the Strike Hawk members in the northwest engineering tunnel.
Now, apart from vital security measures, the remaining combat forces in Tabula Akasha have regressed the front line to the "surface" beneath the dome of Tabula Akasha.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 28 Polaris Bond → 28-13 Eulogy (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: Ghost! I saw a ghost!!!
[???]: Don\'t panic! Hold your ground!
[???]: H-h-h-he passed through!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 28 Polaris Bond → 28-14 Different Battlefields (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Never before in your recollection has there been such a tumultuous scene.
Following your graduation from F.O.S., while you may not have overseen large-scale battles encompassing hundreds of thousands of individuals, you do have experience in cooperative battles involving thousands.
This time, however...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 28 Polaris Bond → 28-15 The Originator (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: Hello.
A voice hovers in mid-air above her head.
When she wakes up again, Qu finds herself sitting in an armchair, as if she has just drifted off while reading and taken a brief nap.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 28 Polaris Bond → 28-16 Clear and Turbid (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The bright sunlight struggles to permeate this somewhat chilly archive. The scent of old paper lingers amidst the rows of bookshelves, creating an ancient yet somewhat unpleasant fragrance.
For some reason, she finds herself addicted to this smell.
Just like that, she moves delicately and silently through the sunlight filtering between the bookshelves—

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 28 Polaris Bond → 28-17 Bright and Dark (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
At times, even Qu herself can\'t distinctly recall that night.
But she knows one thing: her chances of seeing her father are becoming fewer and fewer.
Everything her father said to her on that day is coming true one by one.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 28 Polaris Bond → 28-18 Undying Light (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Time is the father of truth and history. When it decides to strip its capricious child of its swaddling clothes, there always follows an endless stream of piercing cries.
As Qu sifts through these historical swaddles, she stumbles upon a story that would never appear in Kowloong\'s official records, leading her into uncharted territories.
Time marches on, and under their family\'s guidance, Qu and Dai grow into adulthood.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 28 Polaris Bond → 28-19 The Mask (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
She found herself at the center of a vast network, emerging as a solitary leader.
She banished her brother who had plotted a rebellion and watched her other brother, indifferent to politics, depart for the Science Council.
But her heart remained untouched.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 28 Polaris Bond → 28-20 Looking Into the Future (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Years later, as future generations crafted the epitaph of this era, they would inscribe the following words:
In an age where boundless energy unleashed unprecedented productivity, clean electricity suffused every aspect of life. The skies were free of industrial smoke; food was synthesized with precision by machines.
Advances in biomedical and prosthetic technologies extended human lifespans, yet the pursuit of immortality was abandoned, for the future of a civilization lies in its ability to evolve and iterate—a true legacy is found in the lives of its progeny.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 28 Polaris Bond → 28-21 Hell and Wars (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The beast devours, flames consume, and a boiling river of blood churns everything in its path.
The crimson sky, neither day nor night, makes it impossible to discern where the sun sets. Cries for help echo from all directions, only to dissipate futilely in this forest of death.
Enter this gate—

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 28 Polaris Bond → 28-21 Hell and Wars (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Here, time seems a divine grace stripped away.
This place is dominated by guns, bacteria, steel, blood, fire, and death.
Load, aim, shoot, and eject.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 28 Polaris Bond → 28-22 Inferno and Revenge (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
What a magnificent city!
The world is cast as a reflection in a mirror, showing only this city within its glassy confines.
The golden city, where humans, mechanoids, and Constructs coexist peacefully, dons its most enchanting regalia at night.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 28 Polaris Bond → 28-23 Heaven and Sparks (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: Hi. Nice to meet you.
When Qu opens her eyes again, she finds herself watched over by a demure young girl sitting quietly at her side.
[Qu]: Who are you...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 28 Polaris Bond → 28-23 Heaven and Sparks (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The crimson "Huaxu" swirls with a digital storm, rampaging across the confines of this fabricated room.
Its behavior is imbued with a madness that the true Huaxu should never exhibit.
[Huaxu]: Now I am become death...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 28 Polaris Bond → 28-24 Resurrection (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
War never changes.
The flames of war burning out the Chamber of Commerce and Kowloong are on the verge of engulfing the entire Tabula Akasha.
[Qu]: Kow...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 28 Polaris Bond → 28-25 Project Gestalt (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
When Igor Lvovich Landau grabs onto the handle of the airtight laboratory door, his thoughts suddenly drift to an afternoon 20 years ago. He left the lab and went on a stroll with Professor Tsiolkovsky on Vasily Island\'s seaside path.
In the past, people would have described that day as "sunny."
He can recall how the heat from the small experimental reactor in the control room drifted to the Neva River by purified condensate and gradually disappeared beyond the bay.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 28 Polaris Bond → 28-26 Hell (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
This will be Schulz Roseum\'s last night in this trench. His mission is to travel 130km to deliver an assault plan to Fort Budleigh for the frontline garrison. He will set off at dawn in three hours. The horse is ready.
[Schulz]: Got a cigarette? Or booze?
Schulz nudges the night watch soldier next to him and shakes the white metal flask in his hand. The metal is shining brightly beside the small campfire even in the dead of night.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 28 Polaris Bond → 28-27 Magic and Magician (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Landau tries to calm himself by calculating the geometric fractals on the wooden wallpaper in the glow of sunset.
Yet every time he lies on the bed counting those patterns, he is reminded of that night in rural Siberia, when his grandmother was knitting sweaters with sticks as thick as a finger while telling him religious stories.
Her sweaters had the most intricate patterns, but Grandma was just an ordinary woman who had survived several wars.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 28 Polaris Bond → 28-28 Questions to the Stars (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[??]: Welcome, Mr. Korolev, Miss Schwartz, Miss Valentina, and Mr. Landau...
A large robot is blocking the airlock door. A few colorful ribbons are hanging from its mechanical arms. The ribbons don\'t float in the air because of the simulated gravity on the space station.
[Korolev]: Alright, alright!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 28 Polaris Bond → 28-29 Inferno (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
I am Schulz Roseum. I write poems, novels, and sometimes reviews.
The stories I write are wild, diverse, and always extreme. I can be a soldier in a trench in a story, and a pioneer piloting a spaceship heading to the edge of the universe in the next.
Who knows? Isn\'t that how stories should go?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 28 Polaris Bond → 28-30 Children (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The A31 launch platform\'s tarmac is packed with people. The Siberian cold is making people tightly grip their thick coats and scarves, but the windless icy air isn\'t dampening anyone\'s enthusiasm and curiosity.
[Reporter]: We are now looking at the core command module of the "Dawn-III" deep spaceship. It is the pioneer of "Project Orient", which is jointly conducted by the World Astronomical Study Assembly and the Science Council...
Frost is clinging to the reporter\'s mustache. He tries his best to describe the scene to viewers behind the screen with his freezing lips.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 28 Polaris Bond → 28-31 Heaven (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Clenching a pocket watch, Schulz sits by the farthest porthole on the bridge. He gazes at the light spot twelve light-years away, waiting for the verdict of the ship\'s tribunal.
He bought this pocket watch 230 Earth years ago from a roaming group of merchants who gathered artifacts from before human civilization departed the Milky Way.
No one knew where they got these items. Rumor had it that they also possessed a unique device used for controlling sequences from ancient eras...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 28 Polaris Bond → 28-32 Isaac (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The sun is shining brightly this day, without a cloud or gloomy drizzle in sight.
As Clara Schwartz, the head of Science Council Section 2, concludes her eulogy, only the midsummer breeze rustles across the shores of Ladoga Lake.
[Schwartz]: ...Lustrous.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 28 Polaris Bond → 28-33 The Uncrowned King (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nozzle]: Could you... talk to me in another way?
[Nozzle]: Having two voices in my head like this is going to affect my creativity.
[Nozzle]: People will say I\'ve got Cyberpsychosis! But from an artist... that\'s something to be expected, I guess.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 28 Polaris Bond → 28-34 Pulling the Trigger (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Chaofeng]: No way! Absolutely not!
[Chaofeng]: You\'re not completely sure about this. And remember, we\'re still inside the Tabula Akasha. If we expose all our systems to the enemy, it\'s like walking right into a trap.
[Villier]: So what? You think you can survive on your own? You\'re outnumbered.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 28 Polaris Bond → 28-35 Leaving Wonderland (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Less than two minutes after Qu disconnected from you, a violent earthquake reveals the results of the Huaxu restoration, though it remains unclear whether the outcome is good or bad.
Deep growls echo continuously, and the memory projections that have been wandering the battlefield vanish.
With the disappearance of the memory projections for unknown reasons, the Hetero-Creatures begin to rise from the ground again, but this time, they all begin moving underground.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 28 Polaris Bond → 28-35 Leaving Wonderland (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
She is stranded in a deep, void darkness.
Her once splendid attire is now in tatters, her limbs incomplete, and her chest and abdomen irregularly exposed with ghastly hollow wounds.
But everything is as it should be, just like she experienced in countless simulations.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 28 Polaris Bond → 28-36 Battle of the Sovereigns (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
It\'s been over ten minutes since the Hetero-Creatures began to retreat.
As the Hetero-Creatures retreated from Kowloong, they left the many preserved brick buildings from the Chamber of Commerce era and ancient Kowloong almost untouched, as if they had been deliberately spared.
After the surface of the Tabula Akasha collapsed, the Babylonian support forces, initially stationed on the outskirts, quickly shifted to rescue operations. Transport planes flew over the thousand-meter dome of the Tabula Akasha, bringing Kowloong residents safely back to the ground.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 28 Polaris Bond → 28-37 Polaris Bond (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
"It has been nine hours since the Hetero-Creatures completely retreated from Kowloong."
"Among the 643729 registered Kowloong residents under the Nighter\'s jurisdiction, 2451 died as Kowloong Crew in battles before the evacuation to the underground city of Tabula Akasha."
"248 people sacrificed themselves in the operation to reboot the Light Wall."

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 30 Stars Ensnared → 30-1 The Finale (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Lucia once told Luna a story about imprisoned stars when she was little.
—Long, long ago, humanity had not yet learned how to venture into the starry sky.
The vast starry sky holds endless mysteries, and shooting stars are seen as blessings from heaven. Make a wish before they land, and that wish shall come true.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 30 Stars Ensnared → 30-2 Nightmare (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
April 5th—One year after the disappearance of the Gray Raven Commandant, and eight months before Gestalt data wall would be torn down.
Lamia returns to Luna with a bag of nuts after escaping from the underwater incident.
[Lamia]: ...Miss Luna, I am sorry for being late. I took a detour to get some gifts.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 30 Stars Ensnared → 30-3 Departure (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
December 15th, 10 minutes after Gestalt\'s data wall was opened.
The chaos in Babylonia hasn\'t affected the surface yet. Lamia appears before Luna with a small bag of milk cookies after being away for more than half a year.
[Lamia]: Miss Luna?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 30 Stars Ensnared → 30-3 Departure (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Luna finally reaches her goal after destroying the last enemy in her path.
A crystal hourglass sits within interwoven rotating rings. Fine particles of unknown material slowly trickle down.
[Luna]: Meaningless symbols, useless constraints...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 30 Stars Ensnared → 30-4 Rip (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Agent Zero and Selene have become one, transforming into the "dark star" wreathed in electrical arcs, descending upon Babylonia in their newfound form.
The most peculiar-looking predator to date has broken free from its ancient chains, entering a pasture where it can hunt at will.
Piercing alarms echo through the spaceport, mingling with chaotic shouts—a maddening cacophony that sets everyone on edge.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 30 Stars Ensnared → 30-5 Convergence (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
On December 15th, Spaceport A1, the central transit hub of the space fortress, one of the petals that belong to the most dazzling flower in Babylonia, is engulfed in the highly-concentrated Punishing Virus. The vast crimson glow looms ominously, almost as if it could devour everything in its path.
At last, the influence of the Punishing reaches a boundary and stops. After one hour and thirty-two minutes, the spaceport, completely transformed by the Punishing corruption, rips itself away from Babylonia like a living creature, bit by bit, and begins to fall toward Earth.
The turbulence from the tear affects all of Babylonia, forcing it off its original orbit and triggering a cascade of structural failures across vast sections.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 30 Stars Ensnared → 30-6 Last Verse (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Just as Luna predicted, while they carry out their operation, a dark figure stands in a corner of the ruins, withdrawing their gaze from the Inver-Hetero Tower.
[Lithos]: Are you leaving, sir?
A young man walks over, cradling a small crimson doll wrapped in a blanket.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 30 Stars Ensnared → 30-7 Search for Cradle I - Advance Team (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
By the time you reach the location Lamia marked on the terminal, it\'s well past midnight.
With no clouds to obscure it, the forest is bright enough at night to clearly see the Ascendants standing ahead, even without using any artificial lights.
[Luna]: ...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 30 Stars Ensnared → 30-9 Search for Cradle II - Host and Guests (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Cradle greets her guests with an elegant smile and a courteous bow.
[Cradle]: Since you\'ve come all this way to find me, there must be something you wish to discuss?
[Lamia]: How did you know... that we came specifically to find you?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 30 Stars Ensnared → 30-10 Breaking Point (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Following behind Cradle, the group ventures into the deepest part of the Hetero Zone.
Everyone stands by the crimson pool, watching as she submerges her hands into the Red Tide.
[Cradle]: Go ahead. I\'ve shaped the Red Tide here into an "ordered" pattern. Just find the right interface, and it should ease the burden on you.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 30 Stars Ensnared → 30-11 Shattered Mirror (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Luna and the forest fall silent as one.
Alpha calls out her name, only to notice that the frame made of the Red Tide is showing signs of decay, like a deteriorating human body.
You direct Lamia to control the Punishing Virus in her body, allowing Liv to examine the slumbering figure.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 30 Stars Ensnared → 30-11 Shattered Mirror (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
In that instant, your gaze plunges into hell itself.
Her silhouette melts into the sea of crimson.
[Luna]: Only through my eyes will you understand this place.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 30 Stars Ensnared → 30-12 Beyond the Boundary (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
At long last, Luna slowly opens her eyes.
Moonlight cascades over her form, painting silver edges around the crimson stains.
People rush to gather around the two, bombarding them with questions about the situation.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 30 Stars Ensnared → 30-13 Knocking on the Door (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
As the night sky fades, the first rays of dawn peek over the horizon.
Under the watchful eyes of the Purifying Force and Scarab, the Ascendants escort Luna toward the Inver-Hetero Tower.
[Bianca]: We\'ve reassigned everyone who saw the agent. We need to keep this quiet.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 30 Stars Ensnared → 30-13 Knocking on the Door (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
This labyrinth poses no challenge to Luna—the barriers that once stopped another are now easily pushed aside.
Just as Vonnegut said, this tower is no obstacle for agents.
As Luna touches the incomplete Gate, she senses the dormant Punishing within it, flowing backward through time.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 30 Stars Ensnared → 30-14 Abandonment (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Meanwhile, the Red Tide\'s edges are unusually active.
Viscous crimson matter wraps around the fragments, forming a twisted shape amidst bubbling chaos.
"No, something\'s off..."

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 30 Stars Ensnared → 30-15 Body and Shadow (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
As Luna approaches the top level, the "Gate", activated by the combined power of Selene and Agent Zero, reveals a dark tunnel stretching into the depths.
One more step, and she can leap into another timeline...
Yet, the fallen form continues to struggle against control.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 30 Stars Ensnared → 30-15 Body and Shadow (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Their bodies are violently pulled through the "Gate", plunging into the space closest to the tower\'s core.
The Punishing from their bodies steadily corrupts the blue core, while the core, modified by Lee, absorbs that same destructive power.
It starts with the clash of swords, but soon, heavy breaths join the metallic symphony.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 30 Stars Ensnared → 30-16 Glimpse (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Tap—tap—
As Luna emerges from the tower, even the gentle sunlight blinds her. She squints and sees a blurry figure.
You stand in silence. Just as Luna opens her mouth to speak, you raise a hand to silence her and tap your earpiece.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 30 Stars Ensnared → 30-17 Memories (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Luna\'s condition is worse than anticipated—during the search for Cradle, her exhaustion triggered a severe M.I.N.D. fluctuation.
With no other options, you must perform a premature M.I.N.D. connection—a rehearsal for the upcoming Red Tide confrontation.
Coarse sand scratches your ankles as thick clouds blot out the sky, casting the world in shadow.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 27 Aeon Reforged → 27-1 Funeral (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Aeon Reforged
Today, we\'re gathered here to mourn someone important.
He was my best student, everyone\'s reliable comrade, and the Forsaken\'s most trusted leader.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 27 Aeon Reforged → 27-2 Golden Age (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Where do we go from here?
It\'s something people never stop talking about no matter the era.
Where does life originate? How is consciousness born? What is at the end of the universe?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 27 Aeon Reforged → 27-3 Starting Point (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Anyone who has turned 18 and has no major criminal record can make friends with people using Gestalt\'s matching system.
[Trillard]: In a society increasingly connected through communication rather than personal relationships, providing convenience for citizens to communicate is our duty.
[Trillard]: Isn\'t it our job to bridge gaps for strangers so they can break out of their old circles?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 27 Aeon Reforged → 27-3 Starting Point (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: Hey, rookie!
Even in complete darkness now, Watanabe can "see" the world around him shaking violently.
Finding himself once again in touch with reality, he feels a burning pain.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 27 Aeon Reforged → 27-4 Cross (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Ballard is now the only one still standing in the once-crowded square.
Having listened to Watanabe\'s eulogy and Ballard\'s awakening declaration, the soldiers return to their posts, waiting for the signal fire to burn.
Ballard places his hand on the monument that\'s been through the erosion of rain and time and wipes the dust away.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 27 Aeon Reforged → 27-5 Before the Outbreak (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Backhaus]: You rascals, better not disgrace me in your new units!
[Albert]: I can\'t... can\'t breathe...
[Watanabe]: Bruce, move over a bit.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 27 Aeon Reforged → 27-6 True Heart (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
To this day, Ballard still remembers that fateful day.
At first, when the lights went out, communications went silent, and the machines shut down...
People thought it was just a massive power overload or a major electromagnetic interference.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 27 Aeon Reforged → 27-6 True Heart (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
False solace teetered on the brink of collapse. Before the body became ethereal, the pain came first.
[Watanabe]: So this... is the truth...
His knees are quickly becoming feeble. Having found a way out, the blood in his body pours toward his chest.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 27 Aeon Reforged → 27-7 The Great Transfer (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: Right-angle pliers... Watch the hydraulics.
[Watanabe]: ...
He wanted to open his eyes but could only manage a small slit, through which he saw nothing but blinding white light.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 27 Aeon Reforged → 27-8 Gestalt Crisis I - The Tunnels (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
"Project Acadia Transfer" will be the largest strategic relocation effort in human history and will be implemented in three phases.
Phase One
Mobilizing global transport forces to move a total of 1.5 million engineers, technicians, raw materials, and essential equipment to the spaceport elevated at an orbital height of 10,000 kilometers.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 27 Aeon Reforged → 27-8 Gestalt Crisis I - The Tunnels (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Construct Soldier]: We\'re out of fuel for the cutter!
After being repeatedly blocked by the safety doors, Watanabe decides to forcibly dismantle them.
However, the Science Council already considered this in its design, so each safety door costs a large amount of fuel to cut.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 27 Aeon Reforged → 27-9 Gestalt Crisis II - The Deep Well (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After passing through five layers of verification—authentication card, biometric scan, graphic password, quantum key, and dual-lock security—Asimov finally enters the heavily protected room.
[Ishmael]: Mr. Asimov, remember to do this month\'s routine check.
With him are representatives from the five major functional departments. They are here to monitor others and be monitored.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 27 Aeon Reforged → 27-9 Gestalt Crisis II - The Deep Well (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Broadcast]: Attention! Gestalt\'s core program has been tampered with. Execute Level 1 protocol!
[Broadcast]: Attention! Gestalt\'s core program has been tampered with. Execute Level 1 protocol!
The piercing alarm echoes throughout the underground space. Moments later, another alarm sounds and overlaps with it.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 27 Aeon Reforged → 27-10 Orbit Threat I - Moths to Flame (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
This is the bow window, the only spot in Babylonia where you can see the distant home planet in its entirety.
Hassen often sat here alone when there were no annoying meetings.
Metallic debris, devoid of luster, floats quietly around Earth.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 27 Aeon Reforged → 27-11 Orbit Threat II - The Nameless Soldier (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Jada]: This modification plan won\'t work!
[Jada]: How many times do I have to say it? The ecological dome is essential! Are we to rely solely on the spaceport for all our organic resources?
[Manager]: Are you kidding? This is equivalent to building a new Eden I. There\'s no way we can meet the deadline.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 27 Aeon Reforged → 27-11 Orbit Threat II - The Nameless Soldier (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Narrowly dodging Korolev\'s energy beam, "Tall Guy" feels his left arm go numb.
The burnt smell of protein fills his nostrils, reminding him of the fire that took his voice and face.
[Korolev]: According to space station regulations, members are obliged to assist Korolev with demonstrations.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 27 Aeon Reforged → 27-12 Orbit Threat III - Operation Eden (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The variable cycle engine roars under the combination of fuel and combustion agents.
The transport craft breaks the sound barrier in a flash, leaving a conical sonic boom cloud in the air, climbing at a speed of 8km/s.
[Watanabe]: Dad...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 27 Aeon Reforged → 27-12 Orbit Threat III - Operation Eden (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Watanabe]: Is this... the space station?
After passing through countless debris and almost reaching the space station, Watanabe finds it hard to believe what he is seeing.
The once-white hull is now covered in red growths and spherical structures eerily spread over the entire core module.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 27 Aeon Reforged → 27-13 Death of the Mediocre (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Hans]: Report the losses...
After losing contact with the space forces, the command center immediately dispatched an aerospace squadron to investigate.
But soon, falling debris forced them to alter their original plan.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 27 Aeon Reforged → 27-14 Turmoil (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Strange Resident A]: Hey buddy, it\'s time for the shift change.
[Strange Resident B]: You\'re late, you son of *****. I\'ve been waiting forever.
The other resident retrieves a liquor flask and takes a few swigs.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 27 Aeon Reforged → 27-15 The Great Evacuation (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Noctis]: Standby, standby! Just how much longer are we gonna keep on standing by?
In the spacious lounge, Noctis is throwing punches with all his strength toward the air.
[Noctis]: **** the standby!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 27 Aeon Reforged → 27-16 Forsaken (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The desert night remains profoundly tranquil, amplifying the crisp crackling of the campfire.
Watanabe stays watchful as he meticulously disassembles his joints, removing the accumulated sand lodged within.
Lubricant, once plentiful in Babylonia, has become a precious resource after he escaped to the surface.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 27 Aeon Reforged → 27-17 Deadly Gift (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Zong]: Jada, how much longer will it take for the commandant and Watanabe to wake up?
[Jada]: I wish I could know, too...
She tinkers with the devices before her, but eventually abandons the futile task, realizing that it merely provides a fleeting illusion of solace.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 27 Aeon Reforged → 27-18 Awakening (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
She is observing...
She watches as one group unwittingly walks into a meticulously laid trap set by another.
Following a brief exchange of words, an eruption of intense gunfire breaks out.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 27 Aeon Reforged → 27-18 Awakening (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The battle soon comes to an end, and the defensive armor becomes more of a hindrance than a help.
With limited vision, the agile figure eludes capture. When the squad leader finally comprehends the situation, he finds himself left standing alone.
[Squad Leader]: Aahhhhh!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 27 Aeon Reforged → 27-19 Silent Frontline (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Forsaken Rookie]: Hey, man, you got a smoke?
[Forsaken Veteran]: You\'re on guard duty. Aren\'t you worried about getting busted by the squad leader?
[Forsaken Rookie]: Come on, we\'re not like those Constructs on the other side. Our bodies don\'t allow us to be on high alert all the time.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 27 Aeon Reforged → 27-20 Broken Tail (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Emerging from the shadows is the "Scorpio" who nearly led you and Noctis to your deaths.
However, in stark contrast to before, he now exudes a more menacing aura, veering toward madness rather than mere ruthlessness.
[Nigel]: Gray Raven Commandant...? Now that\'s an unexpected twist.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 27 Aeon Reforged → 27-20 Broken Tail (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nigel]: Even so... I still can\'t secure victory for him?
Under continuous assault from both his foe and himself, his frame has reached its utmost limit.
A faint cracking sound resonates from within as the artificial skeleton, designed to facilitate movement, succumbs to the overwhelming strain.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 27 Aeon Reforged → 27-21 Direction (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
BOOM!
The scorching sensation still lingers on your back. The dizziness is taking a while to fade away.
[Zong]: Cough... cough... Watanabe, Commandant, Jada... Are you guys okay?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 27 Aeon Reforged → 27-22 After That (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A cool breeze awakes your slumbering mind.
You adjust your ill-fitting coat and focus.
Opening your terminal to check the time, you realize you have been asleep for half an hour.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 27 Aeon Reforged → 27-24 Passing On (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Soldier]: Die!
Spiteful words echo alongside the gunshot.
[Soldier]: Ugh... Aargh...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 27 Aeon Reforged → 27-25 Rescue Mission (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Forsaken Soldier A]: Looks like it\'s going to rain again...
[Forsaken Soldier B]: Yeah. I\'ve brought some raincoats. Do you want one?
[Forsaken Soldier A]: You\'re always so prepared.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 27 Aeon Reforged → 27-26 Orbital Strike (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Ballard]: So Nigel failed too...
Hearing the footsteps at his door, Ballard does not even turn around.
[Watanabe]: ...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 27 Aeon Reforged → 27-27 Echoes from the Golden Age (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Hassen]: I\'m sure you\'re all aware of the reason for this emergency meeting.
Hassen\'s gaze sweeps over all the attendees.
[Hassen]: (There\'s a lot more people than usual. Are they finally taking it seriously...?)

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 27 Aeon Reforged → 27-28 Buried in Flames (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The countdown reaches zero, but the beam of divine punishment never descends on them.
Instead, the sound of comms keeps ringing.
Calls from the frontlines, the rear, the food production plants, the factories...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 27 Aeon Reforged → 27-28 Buried in Flames (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A gentle breeze brushes his face, bringing the scent of fresh grass.
[Shin]: Watanabe, give your mother a bouquet.
[Watanabe]: ...Okay.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 27 Aeon Reforged → 27-29 Reshaped Spine (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Watanabe
I think I\'m no longer with you by the time you hear this.
I don\'t know how long it will take for this message to reach you.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 29 Source Beacon → 29-1 Tide of Doom (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Teddy]: ...!
[Teddy]: ...Your dreams reflect your thoughts, huh? Can\'t believe I\'m revisiting those memories after all this time...
The terminal on the table persistently chimes for notifications.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 29 Source Beacon → 29-1 Tide of Doom (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
In this afternoon at Babylonia, unexpectedly, no sunlight filters through the clouds in the artificial sky.
[Nikola]: These are the most recent coordinates reported by Strike Hawk at the edge of the Clean Zone. This is where they transmitted data from before, indicating the boundary of the Hetero Zone\'s expansion, and here...
[Nikola]: This is where the last terminal data was sent from the missing Construct squad.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 29 Source Beacon → 29-2 Golden Echoes (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Leonardo]: Charles Norman, the former Chief Executive Officer of Norman Mining Corp, has been absent from thirteen management meetings.
[Leonardo]: Per Chapter 5, Article 11 of Norman Mining Corp\'s internal regulations, in the event that the Chief Executive Officer is absent from over twelve management meetings, the Supervisory Board is entitled to commence a vote to elect the next Chief Executive Officer.
Bong—

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 29 Source Beacon → 29-3 Survivors (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
With the simple ceremony complete, new tombstones and fresh hopes hang from the branches.
[Lucille]: You\'ve got everything packed? We need to leave soon.
[Lucille]: I\'m sure we\'re gonna find ourselves a new home...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 29 Source Beacon → 29-4 Questions and Answers (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[XX Babylonia]: Leonardo of Norman Mining Corp to Face Fierce Competition! There Is No Telling Who Will Be the Next CEO!
[XX Babylonia]: Victoria claims to hold "Dominik\'s Legacy". The board members...
[Trojan]: Still taking it easy, Mr. Norman?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 29 Source Beacon → 29-4 Questions and Answers (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Teddy]: ...Found it.
Teddy cracks a string of code that\'s too complicated to be read and finds a loophole in it.
[Teddy]: There you are.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 29 Source Beacon → 29-5 A Singular Choice (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After another long journey, the small group of refugees finally reaches a place that seems safe.
Bright sunlight pierces through the shadowy forest, casting a beautiful yet unrealistic haze over everything.
[Lucille]: Phew... Let\'s set up the camp!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 29 Source Beacon → 29-6 The Three of Them (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Karenina]: TEDDY!
[Karenina]: Did you hack into my terminal and change the alarm settings again?!
[Teddy]: If you mess up the traction calculations again, I\'ll hack into your sleeping pod and lock you inside.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 29 Source Beacon → 29-7 Project Herald (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Teddy]: Hey, Commandant.
[Teddy]: You\'re 1 minute and 21 seconds late. Hmm, how should I punish you?
[Teddy]: Um, you don\'t need to apologize.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 29 Source Beacon → 29-7 Project Herald (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The vast testing ground lies silent. Only the hum of machinery can be heard. Everyone is eagerly waiting for the report that is about to be deciphered.
[Asimov]: It\'s a schematic of the Inver-Device.
[Researcher A]: Just as I thought! It\'s the Inver-Device!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 29 Source Beacon → 29-8 Dove (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You are the doves returning with olive branches.
You are the adventurers paving the way to gold and glory.
You are the "Heralds" sent by Norman Mining Corp.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 29 Source Beacon → 29-9 Newborn Ruins (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kaully]: Huff... Puff...
[Kaully]: Captain? You alright?
[Crowe]: I\'m fine... I guess.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 29 Source Beacon → 29-10 Good Old Days (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The Very First Zero Point Reactor?! Norman Mining Corp has acquired crucial intelligence about Dominik!
Victoria Takes the Helm! Supervisory Board members in favor of Project Herald! Does Dominik still exist?!
[Leonardo]: Sigh...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 29 Source Beacon → 29-11 Shimmering Lines (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[?]: Commandant... Commandant!
Someone is calling your name...
[?????]: ...All vital signs are normal now. The patient is still not awake probably because the excessive adenosine accumulation in the brain is causing a physiological imbalance...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 29 Source Beacon → 29-11 Shimmering Lines (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The terminal has deciphered an identical Inver-Device schematic.
The projection of the schematic hovers and spins silently as if mocking or pitying something.
[Teddy]: ...I really hate being manipulated around like this.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 29 Source Beacon → 29-12 Prayer (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The red winds blow through the ruins as gloomy raindrops pursue the frantic steps of the refugees.
The pervasive Red Tide seems to always anticipate their next move, closing in on them, urgently pushing them onto an unknown path.
Exhausted and groaning in pain, they continue forward. As time passes, their supplies have gradually dwindled, and the energy of their vehicles is also running out.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 29 Source Beacon → 29-13 Songless Path (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Once again, the Norman Mining Corp transport shuttle is preparing for takeoff.
Just like last time, the spaceport is bustling with the lively chatter of people.
[Staff Member 1]: Wow... I thought none of the last batch made it back? Why are we still seeing so many people this time?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 29 Source Beacon → 29-13 Songless Path (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Ugh...
[Liv]: Stop, Lucia! You can\'t fight anymore!
[Lucia]: We\'re almost there. I must...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 29 Source Beacon → 29-14 Embers of the Stars (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Mika]: ...This is a valid sequence. Record the numbers. Has the re-examination report for Teddy come out?
[Researcher A]: No issues. Her adaptation rate is quite high.
[Mika]: When applied to the external interface model, this test module can stably increase the adaptation rate by about 0.8%...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 29 Source Beacon → 29-15 The Will of Civilization (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Just as the information from Liv reported, once you entered the designated area on the map, your communications with Babylonia began to falter.
[Lee]: Seems like the Punishing Virus is disrupting our comms again.
[Lee]: Whenever the virus levels spiked previously, we\'d encounter similar disruptions, though never this severe.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 29 Source Beacon → 29-15 The Will of Civilization (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The vibrant Red Tide fades, leaving behind Cradle\'s dissipating shadow.
[Teddy]: Dammit... Are you some indestructible sewer creature?
[Cradle]: ...Your strength is beyond my expectations.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 29 Source Beacon → 29-16 Guardian (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Victoria]: And then what? What happened next?
[Teddy]: And then? Some fool lay on the Star of Life for too long before finally getting up.
[Teddy]: Still dreaming of becoming a Construct... Hmph, only to realize your brain can\'t even fill the smallest M.I.N.D.?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 29 Source Beacon → 29-17 "The Wall" (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The testing ground, once bustling day and night, was now silent, its bright lights dimmed. Asimov stands by the control panel, meticulously verifying the coordinates.
[Asimov]: Any new discoveries?
[Teddy]: It\'s still those data walls. Ever since they appeared, they\'ve scattered and blocked the core areas.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 29 Source Beacon → 29-18 Black Box (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Gazing at the peculiar machine that seems poised to turn against you at any moment, you shoot an uncertain glance at Asimov and Teddy, who stand nearby.
[Asimov]: Hmm...
[Asimov]: It may appear strange, but this is indeed the form that emerges from assembling it according to Nanami\'s blueprints.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 32 To the Galaxies → 32-1  A River of Blossoms (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The stars start to twinkle in the mysterious universe as if they were breathing.
[??]: ...Phew.
The stardust-filled universe parts like a lifting curtain, revealing a gray-haired girl sitting in a corner of this small world.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 32 To the Galaxies → 32-2  A Future Yet to Be (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A knock at the door shatters the deathly stillness of the room.
[???]: Commandant.
The commanding tone that brooks no argument reveals the visitor\'s identity—it is Vanessa.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 32 To the Galaxies → 32-3  Irreversible End (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
She sits indifferently in this corner of the snowfield as howling winds whip around her. The mutated Red Tide intertwines with snowflakes, creating twisted patterns like corroded marble.
[Luna]: ...
[Luna]: Huff...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 32 To the Galaxies → 32-3  Irreversible End (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
As the mutated Red Tide recedes, Luna returns to her seat at the mountain peak, her exhaustion plain to see.
While Emma escorts the rescued patrol back to the settlement, Vanessa stands guard at the foot of the mountain. This is what you see when you reach the peak of the mountain.
"How are you?" You find it impossible to ask the question, simple as it is.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 32 To the Galaxies → 32-4  Fate's Onslaught (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
At first, everyone thought the Gray Raven Commandant and Lucia were sent on a unusual but ordinary mission.
Gray Raven always seemed to work miracles. They always came home winning fights deemed impossible. The Clean Zone even had a victory celebration prepared for them as soon as they had gone inside the Hetero Tower...
Except the Inver-Hetero Tower glowed red again, and the banner meant to celebrate Gray Raven\'s victory was never hung.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 32 To the Galaxies → 32-5  Rose in Winter (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Under the hazy moonlight, the silver-haired mechanoid enters a nearby abandoned warehouse in a rush.
[Vanessa]: A mechanoid...
[Vanessa]: ...You don\'t actually think Babylonia knows nothing about those self-proclaimed Church of Machina folks, do you?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 32 To the Galaxies → 32-6  Solitary City (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Kowloong, much earlier—
—It seems like any other day, and nothing seems out of the ordinary. Neither good nor bad.
On a day like this, where the people of Kowloong remain oblivious, disaster stirs like a snake emerging from the ashes, its forked tongue flickering with a hiss.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 32 To the Galaxies → 32-7  Apocalypse Voyage (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Your mind burns in the darkness as your consciousness rots away—every cell in you seems to be breaking apart and reconstructing itself...
Mottled colors fill your vision. Time means nothing to you anymore... until a voice pulls your mind from the bottomless abyss.
[??]: Be careful now, The Star...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 32 To the Galaxies → 32-8  A Small Star (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
As the mutated Red Tide assaults the outer defense of the Gray Tower, Aya the medical robot sprints toward the Church of Machina, its tiny mechanical legs scurrying frantically as it carries a wailing semi-awakened mechanoid on its back.
Following Nanami\'s orders to return and gather her friends, The Star feels flustered. She stammers in response to her friends\' calls.
[The Star]: G-got it! Aya! This way!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 32 To the Galaxies → 32-8  A Small Star (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: Phew!
[Nanami]: Thank goodness Haicma made it back in time! No way I could have saved all these people otherwise...
[Nanami]: It\'s just a shame we lost some supplies while we were at it...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 32 To the Galaxies → 32-9  Blended Worlds (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The mechanoids line up obediently, waiting to be checked by Zavier, while Nanami hums a tune nearby as she plasters her new frame with all sorts of random stickers.
[Zavier]: All done! Everything\'s working fine! Next time I\'ll probably get a new electron beam cannon!
[Zavier]: Hey there, The Star! Didn\'t see you there! Are you sure you don\'t want the new laser visor? It\'s Zavier\'s latest special model!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 32 To the Galaxies → 32-10  Chaos (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: So this is where you\'ve been... Found you!
[Haicma]: She has already devoured several nearby supply warehouses. Trailblazer has seen her before, but she seems completely incapable of communication...
[Nanami]: No worries! Leave it to Nanami!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 32 To the Galaxies → 32-10  Chaos (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Chaos]: ...
[Nanami]: Hah—you\'ve got nowhere left to run!
Under Nanami\'s relentless assault, the doll-like girl is driven into the farthest corner.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 32 To the Galaxies → 32-11  Anchor (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Zavier]: My—supplies!!!
In the Church of Machina\'s hall, Zavier clutches his head in despair while Cervantes stands to the side, methodically counting their lost supplies.
[Cervantes]: ...Fuel depleted... Engine propellant depleted...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 32 To the Galaxies → 32-12  With the Flow (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
As they journey north, the cold in the air begins to freeze on the starship\'s viewport.
[Zavier]: Fuel... antifreeze...
[Zavier]: We\'re running out of antifreeze, too. The antifreeze we have left isn\'t enough to winterize all the mechanoids aboard the starship.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 32 To the Galaxies → 32-12  With the Flow (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The starship\'s airlock bursts open as several battered Constructs stumble in behind Nanami.
[Carson]: Ain\'t working. Can\'t reach them... What should I do...
[Nanami]: You\'re severely injured. You need to get yourself treated before you die.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 32 To the Galaxies → 32-13  Into the Unknown (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
On the other end of the line, Celica has a deep furrow on her face.
[Celica]: A trap?
[Carson]: Yes... We detected life signals inside this conservation area, and we decided to proceed with the rescue operation since the threat level readings were very low.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 32 To the Galaxies → 32-14  Beyond the Ruins (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
However, Nanami does not join this rescue operation.
She walks Haicma through the "100 Guidelines for Human Protection" and entrusts her with full authority over the rescue operation.
[Nanami]: Haicma, I\'m leaving everything here to you and Spooner!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 32 To the Galaxies → 32-15  Spider Silk (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
With Nanami\'s final touch, power flows through the facility, bringing its systems back to life.
Nanami lets out a long breath, hesitates for a moment, then speaks tentatively.
[Nanami]: Hi there, Mecha Babushka!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 32 To the Galaxies → 32-16  River of Time (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The starship departs from humanity\'s last outpost.
When Nanami returns to the Church of Machina, everything proceeds according to plan.
The Church of Machina helps Babylonia rescue a considerable number of humans and Constructs. Soon after, the nightmare returns—wave after wave of winged Hetero-Creatures begin attacking Babylonia\'s transports.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 32 To the Galaxies → 32-17  Grand Entrance (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A heavy, transparent veil hangs before her.
The transparent barrier remains completely unscathed.
[Nanami]: It\'s been so long, so long that I thought Commandantforgot about me or something...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 32 To the Galaxies → 32-17  Grand Entrance (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Sniper]: Hello?
As Sniper-PK43\'s power reboots, his vision is filled with an unfamiliar yet somehow familiar face.
The armored girl quickly brushes away the snow that\'s accumulated on his frame.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 32 To the Galaxies → 32-18  Towards a Farther Star (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: Right up ahead!
As you trudge through the deep snow, a massive white-domed building emerges dimly beyond the treeline.
[Nanami]: Bet they\'ll be super happy!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 32 To the Galaxies → 32-19  Cursed Wisdom (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Through countless strange worlds, Nanami never lets go of your hand.
[Nanami]: Hold on tight, and you\'ll be safe—
After countless shifts between worlds, just as you\'re about to follow Nanami to the next area, an abnormal force suddenly grips your spine.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 32 To the Galaxies → 32-20  All Roads Lead to This Moment (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
All simulated timelines and spaces will eventually converge here.
Brilliant meteors streak across the cosmos, and lush rivers silently multiply.
[Nanami]: Gravity manifests—

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 32 To the Galaxies → 32-20  All Roads Lead to This Moment (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Haicma]: Please follow me. Someone is waiting for you.
With an inviting gesture, Haicma steps aside to lead the way.
[Haicma]: She is both the core of Discovery and its guardian, which is why she\'s able to peer further into the future.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 32 To the Galaxies → 32-21  Time Marches On (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
She sits by the porthole, gazing at the endless expanse of the cosmos.
The stars shimmer in the void as they drift at a pace too slow for the naked eye to perceive.
Magnificent ancient stars undergo fusion in the celestial river, erupt silently, and then fade away just as silently.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 32 To the Galaxies → 32-22  Trajectory (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Though she no longer continues writing her "Earth Observation Diary", she still gazes at that small planet from time to time.
Everything is moving forward according to fate\'s trajectory.
Babylonia departs from Earth, leaving the humans staying behind to struggle desperately on the planet.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 32 To the Galaxies → 32-23  Let's go! (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: I know the answer you seek, and it\'s right here.
[Nanami]: But this "answer" far exceeds what I can simply give away.
[Nanami]: If you truly wish to obtain it, then face my trial.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 32 To the Galaxies → 32-24  A Gift for Tomorrow (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: Here you go, Commandant!
A small, luminescent star finds its way into your palm.
[Nanami]: Well, I haven\'t figured that out myself.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 32 To the Galaxies → 32-25  After Departure (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Nanami sits by the starship\'s window.
It has been ■■■■■■■ days since she left Earth.
Countless stars shed light on the glass. Here, the concept of "time" has gone. Each blink of the stars marks a second she\'s away from Earth.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 31 Shaper's Ripples → 31-1  Echoes of Nightmare (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
No one really knows when it begins, but you, as Gray Raven Commandant, keep having strange dreams.
In the dream, your vision drifts free from your body, floating over the world like a ghost.
Sometimes, it slips back into the body it\'s bound to, letting you personally relive the distant past of "her".

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 31 Shaper's Ripples → 31-2  Caged Bird in the Court of Time (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The Pyroath frame completes every test procedure, and with everything set, it\'s time to head out.
Amid the bustling crowd, you check Dominik\'s Invitation letter in hands again—now activated by the "Key" Cervantes provided. (Tap the underlined text for details)
You recall again the day you spotted that "letter" in the data stream.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 31 Shaper's Ripples → 31-3  Golden Time Court (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You follow Chaos\'s trail into the cramped alleys of Constellia, only to find a soldierly figure standing in your way. He\'s got a purple-haired kid in his grip—someone who seems oddly familiar.
[Lithos?]: S-sorry.
[Unknown Mercenary]: You little punk—I\'ve finally got you! Now tell me: where\'s the guy who took my instant noodles?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 31 Shaper's Ripples → 31-3  Golden Time Court (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
In just ten seconds after reaching the art gallery steps, a surge of Red Tide sweeps across the street.
[Lucia]: Keep your distance. Getting too close to that Red Tide can get you infected.
[Rose]: Infected...?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 31 Shaper's Ripples → 31-4  The Loom of Calamity (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Cradle,
How would you describe this era?
It\'s a time of peace with cutting-edge technology, vibrant and resplendent.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 31 Shaper's Ripples → 31-5  Oblivion Butterfly (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The ground quakes violently, splitting open to reveal a terrifying chasm. The street yawns wide like a ravenous mouth, swallowing every last thing on the surface.
A Red Tide bursts from the fissure like a spring, flooding the sunken street in an instant. Only surging waves and swirling eddies remain, announcing that the collapse below is far from over.
[Lucia]: The underground parking lot is already underwater.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 31 Shaper's Ripples → 31-6  The Sunken City (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Vonnegut remains quiet, his eyes fixed on the doll that scrambles out of the rift and returns to the tower.
[Chaos]: ...
He opens his palm, revealing a tiny "fruit" thrumming with life.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 31 Shaper's Ripples → 31-7  The Ark of Decay (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Cradle]: And that Commandant will be pinned down by a pack of useless "rotten wood."
You glance up at the folks Cradle labels "rotten wood." They\'re all looking at each other, terrified.
[Barley]: So... any conclusions yet?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 31 Shaper's Ripples → 31-8  How can you "transform into a butterfly"? (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Having dispatched the Hetero-Creature in front of her, Chiko carefully lowers Yuko—who\'s been on her back—and pauses for a quick breather.
[Chiko Kirishima]: We\'ve got 14 more floors before we hit the highest observation deck. Let\'s take a quick break—Yuko\'s wound won\'t stop bleeding.
She\'s checking Yuko\'s stomach wound, all the while keeping an ear out for any signs of trouble.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 31 Shaper's Ripples → 31-9  Record: Descend (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
On that day, humanity once more stands at a crossroads that leads to its ultimate end.
The moment Gestalt\'s data wall opens, the hall plunges into darkness. Only crimson warning lights frantically flash across the screen.
The entire Babylonia begins to shake in sync with Gestalt\'s tremors.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 31 Shaper's Ripples → 31-10  Record: Rotting Wood (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Human leader Dominik became aware of "MY" existence.
December 24, 2160, Christmas Eve
Fresh from another confrontation with Vonnegut, Agent Zero steps into the Golden Age through a rift in the Hetero Tower, processing the node records from her narrow victory.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 31 Shaper's Ripples → 31-11  Record: Hero (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Emerging from her memories, Cradle notices that the Red Tide\'s surge into the streets is occurring one hour later than her initial calculations.
Meanwhile, the Gray Raven Commandant has been in a slumber for over an hour in Lucia\'s arms.
That woman carried her commandant while rescuing Rose, managing to reach the exhibition hall before the Red Tide\'s arrival.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 31 Shaper's Ripples → 31-11  Record: Hero (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Mercenary 1]: Don\'t go! Stay away from those employees!
Just as everyone is about to leave, two mercenaries suddenly rush down the stairs from the other side, blocking the group\'s path.
[Lucia]: The employees? What\'s wrong with them?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 31 Shaper's Ripples → 31-12  Record: Widower (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Once again, Cradle approaches the Hetero Tower\'s core, a sight she hasn\'t seen in a very long time.
Directly ahead, Vonnegut\'s gaze fixes upon her.
[Cradle]: We meet again, Mr. Vonnegut.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 31 Shaper's Ripples → 31-13  Record: Harvest (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
