Outside the Inver-Hetero Tower, time silently flows through the deep night, surging towards dawn.
The force fields sealing this place do not reject the drifting snowflakes from outside, allowing the New Year snow to fall through Constellia.
Cradle, after a long slumber, finally awakens from the stagnant Red Tide.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 31 Shaper's Ripples → 31-14  Why do you "transform into a butterfly"? (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A massive crimson tide suddenly erupts from the dark passage, smashing through the walls in its path like a raging torrent.
Everyone watches anxiously as Lucia finally steps into the elevator.
The pale light casts an eerie glow on the flustered faces, while the roaring tide relentlessly chases you from beneath the ascending elevator.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 31 Shaper's Ripples → 31-15  Lost in an Endless Dream (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Before it all unfolds, here is a secret that Lucia would keep forever hidden.
In truth, the moment she entered Constellia, her Pyroath frame received messages from the future. In those glimpses, she saw nine different endings that would unfold after leaving Constellia.
That was why she remained so quiet all along, deliberately avoided Deep M.I.N.D. connection, and constantly checked on the commandant\'s well-being through physical touch.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 31 Shaper's Ripples → 31-16  Death Loop (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Awakening from a blinding light, Lucia finds herself back in the underground tunnel of Constellia.
Nearby, the petite doll is intently operating a device almost as tall as herself.
[Lucia]: What are you doing?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 31 Shaper's Ripples → 31-17  Birth of Planets (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
As bodies disintegrate in the high concentration of Punishing, a white light engulfs every living silhouette.
This marks the end of the information Lucia can process.
However, your dream was not over yet...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 31 Shaper's Ripples → 31-18  Until the sun rises. (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The 76th time rewind, and the 3rd entry into Constellia.
The soft light of dawn gently sweeps aside the veil of night at the city\'s periphery, casting its gentle glow across the heavens. In silence, Constellia ushers in the new year.
You have been sleeping for twelve hours and still shows no signs of waking.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 31 Shaper's Ripples → 31-19  Froggie and the Four-leaf Clover (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
As soon as you walk out of the infirmary, waves of commotion from beyond the side corridor door wash over you.
Peering through the fire safety window, you see the summoned mercenaries standing in a semicircle, their gestures betraying fear and tension.
Some clutch their weapons close to their chest, scanning their surroundings as if expecting some great threat to emerge at any moment.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 31 Shaper's Ripples → 31-20  A canal that leads to the Galaxy (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Mercenary Captain]: Hey.
As soon as you return to the infirmary, the mercenary captain approaches.
[Mercenary Captain]: We\'ve finished our discussion. Everyone trusts you and agrees to this operation. If the outside world remains safe, we\'ll send reinforcements to assist you.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 31 Shaper's Ripples → 31-21  The Search for Tomorrow (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Taking advantage of Cradle\'s momentary pause, you step once again into the nightmare-shrouded elevator.
No sooner do you enter the hidden floor than the Red Tide surges through the shadowy tunnel alongside its master.
Even with the sharp decline in Hetero-Creatures, Cradle, born from both Red Tide and Hetero Tower, remains nearly invincible.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 31 Shaper's Ripples → 31-22  Pyroath of the Long Night (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: What are you doing?! Are you going to stop me again?!
[Vonnegut]: That\'s what I should be asking! Killing Cradle here won\'t do us any good!
Vonnegut seems to harbor a deep, primal fear of the torn space before him.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 31 Shaper's Ripples → 31-23  What's "Transform into a Butterfly"? (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Having bid farewell to her most precious one, Lucia steps into what will become her long imprisonment.
Through glimpses of "future information," she sees herself standing before the rift. Among the nine possible futures, she knows this path will lead to the fewest losses.
Even still, multiple possibilities await at the end of this path.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 31 Shaper's Ripples → 31-23  What's "Transform into a Butterfly"? (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The end of the dream is engulfed by an endless white fog.
Time seems to fade away, and all sound ceases to exist.
Everything disappears, dissolving into the true domain of the Fog.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 31 Shaper's Ripples → 31-24  Slaughterhouse #5 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
At the end of the white fog, the Gray Raven Commandant sinks into a new dream.
In this dream of a mad man, perspectives spiral into chaos. He possesses multiple identities, often unable to distinguish who he truly is.
At times, he is a renowned professor; at others, his consciousness drifts through the manic delusions of countless murderers.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 31 Shaper's Ripples → 31-25  The Final Interview (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After seven full days of slumber, you struggle to sit up. The sutured wound on your abdomen appears nearly healed.
The house exudes a vintage charm, with daily necessities scattered about. A thin layer of dust blankets the corners, contrasting with the pristine gleam of frequently visited spaces.
Upon closer inspection, you notice scratch marks on his couch. Could there be a cat in this house?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 31 Shaper's Ripples → 31-26  "The Bridge Across Dreams" (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Three more days pass, and at last, your body has fully recovered.
Under Vonnegut\'s watchful gaze, you step into the crimson Hetero Tower once more.
Alone, dodging Hetero-Creatures and Red Tide within the Hetero Tower, you finally return to the starting point after a long, grueling journey.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 31 Shaper's Ripples → 31-27  Homecoming Butterfly (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Tremors shudder through the air as Vonnegut lowers his hands maintaining the force field, allowing the rift to stir before everyone.
Your heartbeat quickens as you instinctively move a step ahead.
As you step forward, a figure tumbles out from within, taking several unsteady steps before barely regaining her balance.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 31 Shaper's Ripples → 31-28  Victim of Suicide Epidermic (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The petite figure slams violently against the tower wall, as fine lines spread out like a spider\'s web, accompanied by the faint sound of fracturing.
[Cradle]: Lu... ci... a...!
A guttural moan escapes her throat as Cradle\'s composed demeanor crumbles, her eyes ablaze with hatred as Lucia charges towards her.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 31 Shaper's Ripples → 31-29  Shaper's Ripples (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The agent\'s hands gradually lower to his sides.
Though he can no longer fight, the spikes pursue him relentlessly, as if chasing down a sworn enemy who has thwarted them for years, determined to fight to the bitter end.
His form, scarcely resembling a human now, wrestles against the spikes piercing through him, as he strains to produce fragmented words.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 31 Shaper's Ripples → 31-30  In the first light... (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The vehicle races through endless wastelands and ruins, carrying everyone onboard for three days and nights without rest.
Throughout the journey, all three of you have barely uttered any words. Only the roar of the engine and the endless stream of passing scenery fill your senses.
You keep picking up the pulsing Hetero Tower core from the bumpy seat, wanting to confirm that this one possibility still exists, yet hoping that everything before your eyes is just a haunting nightmare.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 33 Wither to Shine → 33-1  The Hymn of Time (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
In a corner of another world, humans sleep eternally.
[Middle-aged Man]: Half a bottle left... Gotta be careful with this.
Underneath the ragged, holey cloak, his big frame shows no sign of importance.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 33 Wither to Shine → 33-2  A Never-Ending Winter (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Prefab houses, like shipping containers, stand in neat rows behind barbed wire and guard towers. As far as one can see, snow-covered mountains stretch on forever.
The gray walls still keep out the cold but look pretty small against the mountains and wilderness.
Putting up thicker walls to keep the heat in is just a quick fix—the generator fuel will run out eventually.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 33 Wither to Shine → 33-3  Sink Silently Into the Sea (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Patrol Member]: There\'s an abandoned town 12 kilometers north along the river—the same location listed in the patrol team\'s routine report last week.
[Patrol Member]: We\'re short on people, and the water collection team gets the vehicles first, so we haven\'t gotten the supplies yet.
[Emma]: If I remember right, the report didn\'t mention any Mutated Red Tide activity?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 33 Wither to Shine → 33-3  Sink Silently Into the Sea (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The world turns into a dark red spider web.
Liquid, liquid, liquid. Strangely, your lungs don\'t resist.
You open your eyes, and the spider web clings to your eyeballs.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 33 Wither to Shine → 33-4  Cradlesong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
People are gathered around the camp, relaxing after work.
A middle-aged man stands by the vehicle, counting supplies and writing them down.
[Refugee 1]: Have you finished counting everything... yet?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 33 Wither to Shine → 33-5  In the Snowstorm (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The waves rise.
A strange underwater scene appears before you.
[Shorthalt]: What a surprise, finding the Gray Raven Commandant here in this shithole.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 33 Wither to Shine → 33-6  Murky Moonlight (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Winter drags on.
Luna stands on the peak, calmly observing the Mutated Red Tide below.
She can "see" the Mutated Red Tide birthing alien "life" that doesn\'t belong here.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 33 Wither to Shine → 33-6  Murky Moonlight (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Damp moonlight seeps through the dark trees.
[Vanessa]: The enemies aren\'t following us.
[Vanessa]: What\'s the situation on your side?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 33 Wither to Shine → 33-7  Death Knell (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
It has been 5212 days since the Gray Raven Commandant entered the Hetero Tower.
[Luna]: Let\'s stay here for now.
Luna closes her eyes wearily. She has repeatedly tried using the Ascension-Network to simulate potential futures, but all she sees are dead ends.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 33 Wither to Shine → 33-8  "Tomorrow" (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The black sky swallows what little light and hope you have left.
[Emma]: ...Our speed is about 6-7 kilometers per hour. The coordinates are confirmed. We\'re still heading to Aerospace City.
Resources are low, the Mutated Red Tide is out of control, and most electronics are down, so you are navigating the old-fashioned way.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 33 Wither to Shine → 33-9  Burn (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[????]: ...
As she flips through the pages, fragments of stardust dance in the air, forming shimmering characters on the worn paper.
[Ishmael]: So, we\'ve finally reached this point...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 33 Wither to Shine → 33-10  Ishmael's Fable (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lithos]: ...
[Lithos]: You\'re a bit late. Did something hold you up?
The frail Ascendant stands to the side, looking up at the massive tree bathed in Red Tide.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 33 Wither to Shine → 33-11  Flames Blanketed by Snow (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Muddled consciousness drifts in the ocean\'s depths.
Waterlogged vision, waves crashing, whispers and howls in bubbles hitting your brain with every tide—
Cold air fills your lungs, the taste of dust snapping you back to reality.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 33 Wither to Shine → 33-12  Firewood (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Rosa]: ...It\'s done.
After obtaining the new Red Tide sample and resources, Rosa has dedicated herself to working day and night with the team\'s recovered core device, finally creating new filters.
The first small-scale filter springs right into action, steadily diminishing the rising corruption levels that had been intensifying with each passing day.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 33 Wither to Shine → 33-13  Another Choice (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Here, time becomes a blank void of insignificance. Alongside the dissolution of time\'s grasp, your mind has also shed its sense of self.
Bones dissolved, flesh corroded and torn apart, your body shatters then reconstructs. When the searing agony reaches its peak, it turns into a void within your mind.
Your thin silhouette drifts through the muddy Red Tide, like water dissolving into water.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 33 Wither to Shine → 33-14  "High Wall" (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The herbal tea releases faint, warm mist into the snowy air. The higher-dimensional being, who identifies herself as Ishmael, sits quietly across you, appearing in no rush to receive an "answer".
Gazing at the slowly rising sun in the distance, your thoughts are involuntarily carried to a place higher and farther by the chilling wind.
Should you choose to enter the Red Tide and compete with the newborn Agent Zero for authority, or choose to re-enter the Hetero Tower and attempt to "pass through the Gateway"?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 33 Wither to Shine → 33-15  Ominous Sparks (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The blinding light sears painful trails across your retinas as the spiral tower replays its horrifying movements in endless slow motion.
The moment you step into the Hetero Tower, countless bizarre information floods in like a bursting dam, overwhelming your mind\'s protective barriers. Intense pain strikes your brain as if high-voltage electricity is coursing from head to toe.
Towering crimson crystals stand within the Hetero Tower, its interior contorting and warping to cast one distorted shadow after another.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 33 Wither to Shine → 33-16  Stairs at the Edge (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The space crumbles in an instant as twisted time and space blend into disordered rhythms, alternating through chaotic tracks to create a symphony without structure.
Nebulae spin into disrupted shapes as your dimensional perception gradually blurs. You can no longer discern how long the battle here has lasted—is it one second? Or ten thousand years?
You stand alone, facing the vast cosmic domain yet showing no trace of fear.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 33 Wither to Shine → 33-17  Spiral Tower (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The crimson mist gradually disperses, the grotesque crystals fade away, and you slowly open your eyes.
The overlapping wounds from the infinite battle etched on your body have been tenderly smoothed away.
The eternal darkness of night dissipates, and the Hetero Tower reverts to its peculiar former state, shrouded in dense white fog.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 33 Wither to Shine → 33-18  "Gravekeeper" (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
—Pull the timeline back to the day before the Hetero Tower\'s arrival.
All else fades into insignificance, as this single fragment of knowledge is etched indelibly into your consciousness.
As if a person in prolonged drought spotting an oasis, conflicting emotions of exhilaration and apprehension violently tear at your thoughts.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 33 Wither to Shine → 33-19  At the Cost of Life (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
An illusion, drawing indefinitely close to death, grips your senses and nerves.
A mournful buzzing echoes through the dark depths of the sea.
April 1st, April Fool\'s Day. Fate has decided to crack a cruel joke. The Gray Raven Commandant has vanished.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 33 Wither to Shine → 33-20  Dangerous Place (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The first day at F.O.S.
The campus is adorned with welcome projections, while the school anthem drifts through the air above the auditorium.
[Student A]: Hey, hello there! Is this your first day at F.O.S.?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 33 Wither to Shine → 33-21  "Born" Again (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A woman draped in a pristine white cloak walks into the dimly lit base.
[Ishmael]: ...It\'s been a while.
Her gaze falls upon the red egg placed beneath the small Tree of Life.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 33 Wither to Shine → 33-22  Lone Shadow in Corridor (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Chaotic pain floods the M.I.N.D.
M.I.N.D... not the brain...
A crimson spiral tower materializes and crumbles at the periphery of your sight, space fractures and then mends, while red light penetrates the dim sky.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 33 Wither to Shine → 33-22  Lone Shadow in Corridor (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
"Spit" out by the inverted world, the two appear once again on that empty platform. The spiral staircase still reaches from heaven to earth, yet the Gateway they just entered has vanished into nothingness.
[Vonnegut]: What did you just do? How did we enter that space?
The agent, now lucid, gazes at Chaos.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 33 Wither to Shine → 33-23  Death Reenactment (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Cradle enters the Hetero Tower. Cradle has "returned" to the Hetero Tower.
The Hetero Tower trembles slightly, welcoming the one who once was its master. Before long, Cradle locates the core within the tower.
[Cradle]: ...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 33 Wither to Shine → 33-24  Gazing From Above (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The gaze from the dream detaches from the body, overlooking the entire world like a ghost from above.
┛┛▅saw▃▄▁▆past▁▄▁▅▃▄▁▆┛┛▁▄▁...
[Student A]: Hello, do you need any help? I just noticed you seemed a bit out of it...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 33 Wither to Shine → 33-25  Four-Winged White Raven (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Ishmael]: ...
At the center of the "buildings" with varied exteriors stands a colossal four-winged white raven.
Stars and planets form iridescent light bands, encircling a dark sun.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 33 Wither to Shine → 33-25  Four-Winged White Raven (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The gate slowly closes.
A book with a four-winged white raven engraved on its cover slowly materializes in Chaos\' hand.
Light gray curves twist and intertwine, forming lines of complex text. Bowing her head, she stares at the heavy tome.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 33 Wither to Shine → 33-26  Heat Death in Time (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Ishmael changes out of her researcher\'s uniform and sits by the table, gazing at the star-filled sky beyond the window.
Outside, stars are scattered evenly across the sky, their brilliance undiminished by the hot star overhead. Magnificent structures with bold, sweeping curves interweave across the landscape, gleaming in the starlight.
The girl is waiting for the appointed time to arrive—

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 33 Wither to Shine → 33-27  The Punisher (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[News]: The Galactic Research Institute has reportedly made a groundbreaking discovery of the Code Virtual Particle substance!
[News]: In efforts to simplify communication, the Galactic Research Institute has officially named this substance "Substance-0" following extensive research!
[News]: Now, please join me in welcoming the Director of the Galactic Research Institute to unveil this extraordinary discovery to us!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 33 Wither to Shine → 33-28  Double Spirals (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The storage of "information" cannot be reversed.
Under Cradle and Vonnegut\'s manipulation, the Hetero Tower has continuously grown, diffracting into infinite new layers.
Chaos persistently organizes the jumbled Hetero Tower.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 33 Wither to Shine → 33-29  "Annihilation" (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Chaotic threads swirl around Chaos like tangled hemp, floating in the boundless cosmic void. Her M.I.N.D., having endured countless tears and healings, has become nothing but a blank slate.
Information from an entire civilization floods into her memory. Languidly, she cradles the planet wrapped in layers of threads, gazing bewildered into the darkness of time.
A faint will flickers like a dying spark in her murky M.I.N.D.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 33 Wither to Shine → 33-30  Gear (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The weaving of time is nearly complete.
Meanwhile, Nanami\'s effort to converge the causality threads is also approaching its end.
Ishmael gently touches the forehead of Chaos, accelerating the process.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 33 Wither to Shine → 33-30  Gear (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Ishmael]: ...
[Ishmael]: What a stubborn little one.
Standing before the massive stellar ring, Ishmael flips through the book in her hands.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 33 Wither to Shine → 33-31  Gift from the Stars (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The false daylight suddenly spins in view.
In a daze, everything within the mind flashes through, cycling endlessly.
[Student A]: Hey, hello there! Is this your first day at F.O.S.?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 33 Wither to Shine → 33-32  Vision at Dawn (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Thump—
The dull beating of a heart echoes in the dark abyss, profound and lingering.
Thump—

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 33 Wither to Shine → 33-33  Lucia (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
I...
I am Lucia.
I\'ve decided to start writing here to keep track of things. Perhaps text can better preserve the feelings I want to remember, and the words I didn\'t know how to express at the time.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 34 Dream till the Timeless End → 34-1 Improper Thought (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: The Gray Raven Commandant is invited to an opera by Ayla during vacation in Babylonia. Meanwhile, a confrontation between Iris and Enora Lueya starts somewhere else.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 34 Dream till the Timeless End → 34-2 Operation Theater (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: The commandant comes to Ayla's studio. Attracted by Ayla's paintings, the commandant develops abnormal feelings.\nIn the meantime, Iris and Dandelion are looking for Jonathan in the theater.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 34 Dream till the Timeless End → 34-2 Operation Theater (After Battle)
SummaryContent: After the chaos, Dandelion leaves with Jonathan under the protection of Iris.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 34 Dream till the Timeless End → 34-3 Straightforwardness (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: A series of anomalies put the commandant on guard. The commandant and Ayla go to the Star of Life for a check-up. Here, the two come across Asimov. And it turns out what happened at the Science Council seems to have something to do with their situation.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 34 Dream till the Timeless End → 34-4 Protagonist (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Babylonia starts an investigation on the abnormal phenomenon Gray Raven Commandant experienced. At the same time, Jonathan learns about the situation and his upcoming fate from Iris and Dandelion.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 34 Dream till the Timeless End → 34-5 Faceless (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Gray Raven Commandant carries out an investigation with Teddy's assistance. The clues are pointing directly to an unregistered frame named Capriccio. Ishmael at the Control Court also seems to have something to do with it.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 34 Dream till the Timeless End → 34-6 The Time-Stealing Puppet (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Following the lead, Gray Raven Commandant and Ayla arrive at a warehouse in the conservation area on the ground. However, unknown enemies appear and block their way. A battle starts.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 34 Dream till the Timeless End → 34-6 The Time-Stealing Puppet (After Battle)
SummaryContent: After the battle smoke clears away, Gray Raven Commandant finds themselves standing in an unfamiliar place and runs across a stranger.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 34 Dream till the Timeless End → 34-7 Understanding (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Using the alias F.O.S., Gray Raven Commandant gets to know the girl named Iris. The two go on a journey to Bane.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 34 Dream till the Timeless End → 34-8 Partner (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: In disguise, Gray Raven Commandant and Iris sneak into Montali International Airport and successfully carry out "an attack without any casualties".

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 34 Dream till the Timeless End → 34-9 Reasoning (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Teddy and Ayla investigate on Gray Raven Commandant's disappearance. In Babylonia, Asimov has a new finding with the abnormal device left by the invader...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 34 Dream till the Timeless End → 34-10 Leaving for the New World (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: The operation at the airport was a success. Jonathan plans to head to Bane. On the way, Iris and F.O.S. spot an abandoned stage...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 34 Dream till the Timeless End → 34-11 Afterglow (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: They have a short, peaceful stay on the grassland on their way to Bane.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 34 Dream till the Timeless End → 34-12 Mid Point (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: The four arrive at Bane's capital. At the first light of dawn, Iris finally makes up her mind to say goodbye to her conductor.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 34 Dream till the Timeless End → 34-12 Mid Point (After Battle)
SummaryContent: Iris had a great day with her conductor. In the twilight, the time has come to say goodbye.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 34 Dream till the Timeless End → 34-13 Turning Around (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: "It's all over." The Gray Raven Commandant says goodbye to Iris. However, back to their original timeline, the commandant realizes that things are far more complicated than they imagined.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 34 Dream till the Timeless End → 34-14 Reverse Chronology (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Ishmael remembers all the conversations she had with Selena. Meanwhile, the commandant, following the lead of the "Capriccio" frame, finds Ishmael and obtains the information about Enora Lueya.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 34 Dream till the Timeless End → 34-15 Echo (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Iris chooses to confront Enora Lueya alone while the commandant realizes something is wrong. With Ishmael's hint, the commandant decides to return to Iris's timeline...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 34 Dream till the Timeless End → 34-16 Clarity (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Through the "echoes", the Gray Raven Commandant "sees" with the help of Hamlet the moments of receiving these letters and Iris... Or Selena, perhaps.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 34 Dream till the Timeless End → 34-17 Homecoming (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Across the immeasurable time and space, the Gray Raven Commandant finally catches up with Selena before she banishes herself and stands beside her before Enora Lueya.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 34 Dream till the Timeless End → 34-17 Homecoming (After Battle)
SummaryContent: Enora Lueya has been defeated. She struggles desperately but accidentally sees the Gray Raven Commandant's sealed "memories"...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 34 Dream till the Timeless End → 34-18 Prefacing (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: At the end of the story, everyone is back where the journey started and lives happily together...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 35 Echoes Adrift → 35-1 Monologue (After Battle)
SummaryContent: Bianca's mind wanders through the sandstorm, with towering ruins appearing on both sides. The sand beneath her feet gradually turns to mud, and she sinks into a whirlpool—

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 35 Echoes Adrift → 35-2 Aquarium (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Lucia and the commandant accept a support mission at the Copperfield Aquarium. Meanwhile, the commandant experiences a faint sense of deja vu again, glimpsing a vision of Chiko and Bianca sinking into the Red Tide in the sea.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 35 Echoes Adrift → 35-3 Endless Cycle (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: In the aquarium, Bianca and several Purifying Force members have found some "Scarlet Revelation" members, but still no trace of Chiko.\nMeanwhile, Vonnegut and Lithos are attempting to use the Red Tide to incubate a fusion of Chiko and the dismembered remains of Hetero-Humanoid twins.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 35 Echoes Adrift → 35-4 Deja Vu (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: The Commandant's "warning" makes Babylonia adjust the mission's priority. Strike Hawk and Gray Raven are dispatched, with Cerberus joining them from another direction.\nThe "tropical fish" in the aquarium records Chiko and Bianca's exploration here.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 35 Echoes Adrift → 35-5 Mire (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: The councilors of Babylonia refuse to deploy Omega Weapons to help contain the Red Tide at the aquarium. Asimov brings news that Bianca's Stigmata frame has developed severe M.I.N.D. deviation, suggesting they may need to activate her new frame—Crepuscule.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 35 Echoes Adrift → 35-6 Rebirth & Future (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: While exploring level B2 of the aquarium, the commandant and the others encounter Lulu, a Construct claiming to be a member of "Scarlet Revelation."

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 35 Echoes Adrift → 35-7 Monster, Monster (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Based on the commandant's intelligence, Cerberus locates the Red Tide's drainage outlet. However, due to insufficient Omega Weapons, Vera decides to bomb and sink the ship, using their limited Omega Weapons to block the water exit.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 35 Echoes Adrift → 35-8 Desperate Red Tide (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Countless Hetero-Creatures emerge from the Red Tide in the aquarium. Bianca is severely injured while covering the retreat. Grace from Scarlet Revelation struggles to escape with Bianca on her back.\nMeanwhile, Bianca's new frame—Crepuscule—has arrived along with the Engineering Force.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 35 Echoes Adrift → 35-9 Human (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Just as the Purifying Force members can no longer hold out, the commandant and the others successfully join Bianca.\nKarenina and Teddy from the Engineering Force have entered the aquarium, bringing Bianca's Crepuscule frame with them as support.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 35 Echoes Adrift → 35-10 Shifting Story (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: The Red Tide surges as the commandant has strange visions once again. This time, however, Babylonia has already taken preemptive measures—but will they be able to save Chiko?\nVonnegut's voice echoes through the loudspeaker, inviting the commandant to a designated area for a talk.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 35 Echoes Adrift → 35-11 Platform (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Bianca experiences a vision within her M.I.N.D. Chiko struggles to push her out of the Red Tide.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 35 Echoes Adrift → 35-11 Platform (After Battle)
SummaryContent: After switching to her new frame, Bianca rushes to the commandant's side. On her way, fragments of memories surface in her mind—some perhaps from this timeline, others seemingly from elsewhere.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 35 Echoes Adrift → 35-12 Kill Chiko (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: In a final effort, Chiko transmits information to the commandant through "deja vu." The commandant suddenly wakes up to find Vonnegut right before them.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 35 Echoes Adrift → 35-13 Tears (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Lithos finds the escaped Chiko and leads her through the underwater tunnel beneath the aquarium to a small island. There, Lithos places Chiko on an altar at the center of the island to proceed with the incubation.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 35 Echoes Adrift → 35-14 Falling (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: The commandant reunites with Bianca, but their return path completely collapses under Vonnegut's control. With no other choice, Bianca and the commandant must continue forward through the underwater tunnel beneath the aquarium.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 35 Echoes Adrift → 35-14 Falling (After Battle)
SummaryContent: Chiko's "incubation" succeeds, but her more complete M.I.N.D. allows her consciousness to take dominant control of the body. In her Haywire state, Chiko kills Lithos.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 35 Echoes Adrift → 35-15 Her Farewell (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Following the tunnel beneath the island, Bianca and the commandant discover Chiko, who has been reborn within the island's depths.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 35 Echoes Adrift → 35-15 Her Farewell (After Battle)
SummaryContent: Bianca defeats Chiko, who had been "re-incubated" by Lithos, and "purifies" the Red Tide in the area. From Chiko's shell, a Heteromer Shard crystallizes.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 35 Echoes Adrift → 35-16 Heteromer Shard (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Upon returning to Babylonia with the Heteromer Shard, the commandant unexpectedly glimpses Nanami's future when touching the shard...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 35 Echoes Adrift → 35-17 New Future (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Humans extract an astonishing amount of information from the Heteromer Shard. Perhaps things can truly develop in the most favorable direction.\nWill it really be that way?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 35 Echoes Adrift → 35-18 Custom Movie (EX)
SummaryContent: Bianca's M.I.N.D. suffers severe deviation. Within the Red Tide, Chiko crafts a dream for her where they live as ordinary children in Babylonia.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 35 Echoes Adrift → 35-19 False Loop (EX)
SummaryContent: Chiko never agreed with Bianca's ideas, yet she always wondered what would happen if she let this naive fool continue on her path.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 35 Echoes Adrift → 35-20 Bianca's Story (EX)
SummaryContent: Chiko leaves, having done her utmost to push Bianca out of the Red Tide. She leaves Bianca with the right to choose—if given the choice, would Bianca want to be a witch, or a Holy Maiden?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 35 Echoes Adrift → 35-21 "Faith" (EX)
SummaryContent: The lack of supplies and the heavy rain make Grace wonder how to lead these Scarlet Revelation followers onward.\nIn this moment of uncertainty, they discover an invitation to a "trial."

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 35 Echoes Adrift → 35-22 "Trial" (EX)
SummaryContent: Could the "trial" be real? Grace leads the small Scarlet Revelation team to the seaside, but remains skeptical throughout.\nThe followers wait anxiously for their entrance into eternal life. Eventually, Grace decides to split up—Lulu will stay behind at the camp while she takes others into the aquarium to undertake the "trial"...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 36 Dreams Rewound → 36-1 Karma (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: The Merciful One watches over it all. The seeds have already been sown, and their fruits are about to ripen. She observes as the Gray Raven Commandant journeys through this river of time.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 36 Dreams Rewound → 36-2 Lost Tower (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Vanessa gives a report on the Kurono Orphanage. The Science Council applies the recovered technology to Hyperreal frames. With the Gray Raven Commandant present, Lee undergoes a frame replacement.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 36 Dreams Rewound → 36-3 "They" (After Battle)
SummaryContent: After receiving the new Hyperreal frame, Lee has an unexpected glimpse of a deeper version of himself within the M.I.N.D.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 36 Dreams Rewound → 36-4 New Born City (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Ayla receives the Kaleido frame. Her mission is to use it to form a special team led by a Commandant for high-risk operations on behalf of the Archaeological Team. Their first mission is already underway. During the operation, the Iris Warbler squad uncovers the existence of Constellia...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 36 Dreams Rewound → 36-5 Breaking Free (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Luna "sees" Alpha standing before the crystal cluster that holds her. She "sees" Alpha and Lucia enter Fort Winter, and "sees" Alpha carry Lucia away. She senses the unrest of the Punishing Virus.\nMeanwhile, in the Dead Zone, Vera and No. 21 go missing while on a mission inside a conservation area...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 36 Dreams Rewound → 36-6 Seawater Hangs Suspended in the Sky (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Vonnegut watches The Cradle as it grows. Lithos hesitates at the door, then steps in to report: Kugawa Kurono is dead—killed by his adopted daughter, a girl named Alisa. The M.I.N.D. fusion experiment at the Utopia branch has failed.\nNow, Vonnegut cares about only two things: Cthylla, who will soon hatch Chaos, and the mysterious "Tower" that has yet to arrive.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 36 Dreams Rewound → 36-7 Raging Tide (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: The Forsaken officially join the Oasis faction and reach a trade deal with Babylonia. Babylonia agrees to help upgrade some of the Forsaken's Central Purification Filter cores, and in return, Oasis provides them with much-needed supplies.\nAfter hearing about Babylonia's new technology, Kowloong also proposes a deal, hoping to cooperate on building a maritime defense line against the Punishing Virus.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 36 Dreams Rewound → 36-8 Tabula Akasha (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Qu "dies" and is brought back to life. Inside the Tabula Akasha, she lives through countless "stories."

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 36 Dreams Rewound → 36-8 Tabula Akasha (After Battle)
SummaryContent: After clearing out the digital specters from the Tabula Akasha, Babylonia sends personnel to help Kowloong upgrade their defense Light Wall. Once the task is finished, the commandant records the keyword from the "invitation."

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 36 Dreams Rewound → 36-9 Data Space Phantom (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: At the Science Council, Teddy locates the internal data wall inside Gestalt. The Parliament decides to open it.\nWith help from Teddy and Asimov, the commandant uses the "invitation" to meet Dominik, who exists within Gestalt.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 36 Dreams Rewound → 36-10 Dark Star (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: The data wall is opened, and Dark Star is born. Selene falls from Babylonia to the surface with one goal: eliminate Luna and seize full authority granted by the Ascension-Network. The network only supports one agent. If Selene fully takes shape, Luna will perish. She must act before that happens. Alpha and Lamia lead the Red Tide to her location. Luna absorbs a massive amount of it, pushing herself beyond her limits in an attempt to break free from the Ascension-Network.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 36 Dreams Rewound → 36-10 Dark Star (After Battle)
SummaryContent: At the final moment of Luna's standoff with Selene, Roland arrives with the Gray Raven Commandant and squad. The Commandant helps Luna stabilize her still-forming M.I.N.D. With this support, Luna defeats Selene and gains full control of the Ascension-Network.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 36 Dreams Rewound → 36-11 Absurd Hypothesis (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: As Lucia syncs with the Pyroath frame, her once-faded memories begin to sharpen. But she can't tell if they're real or just illusions brought on by M.I.N.D. fluctuations. What she remembers doesn't match reality—there's no crimson tower, and she's never seen the so-called "Clean Zone."

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 36 Dreams Rewound → 36-12 Endless Fog (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: During a mission, Lucia becomes separated from the other three. She sees a white mist and enters a strange realm. Inside, she encounters strange shadows and sees many who are supposed to be "dead"—

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 36 Dreams Rewound → 36-13 Predestined Ending (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Near Zero-point Reactor No. 1, the Gray Raven squad finds Vonnegut preparing to restart the reactor.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 36 Dreams Rewound → 36-13 Predestined Ending (After Battle)
SummaryContent: In his final moments, Vonnegut flees deep into the reactor. Lucia follows and finds him lifeless at the heart of a Punishing Virus outbreak.\nOnce Vonnegut is defeated, the Red Tide surges. As Lucia stands still, a flood of memories rushes into her mind—

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 36 Dreams Rewound → 36-14 New Fruit (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: The Merciful One closes the book. "Everything changed because of you, Gray Raven."\nThe Commandant asks about Nanami and the Hetero Tower, and the Merciful One answers each question.\nBut the true future is still out there, waiting for the Gray Raven Commandant to face it and discover it firsthand.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 38 Sightline Breach → 38-1 Fate of the Hacker (After Battle)
SummaryContent: Two incidents have occurred in Elysium during the night. In an apartment on Arclight Avenue, a Construct girl named Christina is found dead. On the other side of the city, Agent Moore is investigating Jack's disappearance in the sewers.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 38 Sightline Breach → 38-2 Investigate (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Inspector Teddy and her partner Moineau follow a lead in the Christina case that points to the sewers beneath the docks. There, they encounter Moore in the midst of combat.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 38 Sightline Breach → 38-2 Investigate (After Battle)
SummaryContent: Inspector Teddy and her partner Moineau follow a lead in the Christina case that points to the sewers beneath the docks. There, they encounter Moore in the midst of combat.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 38 Sightline Breach → 38-3 Bouquet (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Teddy, Moineau, and Moore return to the Criminal Investigation Bureau, each having had a terrible day.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 38 Sightline Breach → 38-4 Do Constructs Dream of Electric Sparrows? (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: The next day, the Chief of the Criminal Investigation Bureau summons Teddy, Moineau, and Moore to announce that the Christina and Jack cases are being merged.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 38 Sightline Breach → 38-5 The damaged... (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Moore invites Teddy and Moineau to his home for dinner, during which they learn about a psychologist named John from a television program.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 38 Sightline Breach → 38-6 BWV 478 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: On the third day, Teddy, Moineau, and Moore split up to investigate the Jack case. Teddy and Moineau look into Jack's restaurant, while Moore heads to Psychologist John's clinic. The three obtain a lead on another girl, Norman.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 38 Sightline Breach → 38-7 Killing a Sparrow (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Teddy, Moineau, and Moore go to track down a girl named Norman. Upon noticing their arrival, Norman flees.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 38 Sightline Breach → 38-7 Killing a Sparrow (After Battle)
SummaryContent: Teddy, Moineau, and Moore go to track down a girl named Norman. Upon noticing their arrival, Norman flees.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 38 Sightline Breach → 38-8 Night Talk (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: At night, Moineau finds Teddy on the rooftop. Norman's unusual cause of death has made Teddy suspicious of Moineau.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 38 Sightline Breach → 38-9 The Truth (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: After parting ways with Moineau, Teddy returns to the office. By decoding the data chip Christina left behind, Teddy uncovers the truth.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 38 Sightline Breach → 38-9 The Truth (After Battle)
SummaryContent: After parting ways with Moineau, Teddy returns to the office. By decoding the data chip Christina left behind, Teddy uncovers the truth.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 38 Sightline Breach → 38-10 Prelude (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Two months ago in Babylonia, Hassen was holding a private meeting with Nikola. During their conversation, it was revealed that Hassen was deeply worried about Babylonia's current state.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 38 Sightline Breach → 38-11 Night and Rose (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Memories of the past surge relentlessly, revealing the moment when their destinies became intertwined.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 38 Sightline Breach → 38-11 Night and Rose (After Battle)
SummaryContent: Memories of the past surge relentlessly, revealing the moment when their destinies became intertwined.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 38 Sightline Breach → 38-12 World of Bliss (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Two months ago in Babylonia, after concluding his meeting with Nikola, Hassen initiated a communication with Teddy.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 38 Sightline Breach → 38-13 Truth (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: As Teddy recounts her story, Moore also begins to remember the truth.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 38 Sightline Breach → 38-14 Neural Wandering (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: In present-day Babylonia, World Government councilor Yan Zhen gazes at Earth, lost in memories of the past. He has a meeting scheduled with Hassen soon.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 38 Sightline Breach → 38-15 Don Quixote (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: With mixed emotions, Yan Zhen makes his way to Hassen's office.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 38 Sightline Breach → 38-16 Rebirth (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Having completely abandoned his human identity, Yan Zhen becomes an Ascendant. He uses Punishing to contaminate Elysium, intending to seize its core.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 38 Sightline Breach → 38-17 Paradiso, Canto III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Severely wounded, Teddy chooses to connect to Elysium's core supercomputer, only to discover something unexpected within.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 38 Sightline Breach → 38-18 Variable (After Battle)
SummaryContent: The reborn Teddy confronts the Ascendant in battle once more.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 38 Sightline Breach → 38-19 Gravity (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Babylonia is falling, Hassen remains unconscious, and Nikola directs Constructs from various squads to manually shut down the engines.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 38 Sightline Breach → 38-20 Falling (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: With Punishing still not eliminated and Gestalt unable to restart, Teddy opts to use Elysium's core quantum supercomputer as a backup plan to prevent Babylonia from falling.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 38 Sightline Breach → 38-21 New World (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: The fall of Babylonia has been prevented, and a new chapter now begins to unfold.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 37 Where Nightmares Dwell → 37-1 Formless and Soundless (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: A presence lurks in the darkness, attempting to pry into Liv's M.I.N.D...\nSo, what exactly is M.I.N.D.?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 37 Where Nightmares Dwell → 37-2 Forbidden History (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: The commandant wakes up in Conservation Area 368. This time, the pair is tasked with a special mission: to find the people who know about the "Phylotree".

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 37 Where Nightmares Dwell → 37-3 Another Starting Point (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: A Conservation Area 368 resident who snuck onto Babylonia holds the clue about the "Phylotree"?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 37 Where Nightmares Dwell → 37-4 Twilight (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Liv compiles a shortlist of just seven suspects who might have the information they need.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 37 Where Nightmares Dwell → 37-4 Twilight (After Battle)
SummaryContent: After an unexpected fight, the two find the vehicle "accidentally" damaged by Hetero-Creatures. Now, they have no choice but to return to the conservation area.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 37 Where Nightmares Dwell → 37-5 Conservation Area 368 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Conservation Area 368 is eerily quiet. The doctor on the list doesn't appear to be human. What is her true purpose here? Under the cover of night, the two move to investigate.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 37 Where Nightmares Dwell → 37-6 The Web Weaver (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: When the two arrive, Dr. Melinoe seems prepared. She admits that she once worked as a "psychologist" in the mining area...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 37 Where Nightmares Dwell → 37-7 Uncertainty (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Finding no further clues in the conservation area, the two make for the mining area again. However, they discover something unexpected on the way there...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 37 Where Nightmares Dwell → 37-8 Among the Mountains (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: The mine is a dark void pierced by scant light. The tracks they follow are fresh, and one set is seemingly a child's. What would a child be doing here?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 37 Where Nightmares Dwell → 37-9 Dazed Nightmare (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: After a quick check of the child's condition, the two decide to leave the mine for now and take her back to the conservation area. A minor tremor shakes the mine, but nothing seems to happen.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 37 Where Nightmares Dwell → 37-10 The Veil Between (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: A moment of clarity hits Liv as she realizes this entire conservation area is an illusion. Meanwhile, the commandant continues to struggle forward with the child.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 37 Where Nightmares Dwell → 37-11 Shrouded in Darkness (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Melinoe enters the mine, revealing that the lost child is one she once rescued. As a mechanoid, she couldn't raise a human and had entrusted the child to a local family.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 37 Where Nightmares Dwell → 37-12 Liv's Choice (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: With the terrible signal in the mine, Liv tries everything she can to contact the commandant. But why are Hetero-Creatures now showing up in the safe zone?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 37 Where Nightmares Dwell → 37-12 Liv's Choice (After Battle)
SummaryContent: Terminal communications fail in the mine. Liv takes a grave risk, touching the scars in her own M.I.N.D. to reforge the connection with the commandant.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 37 Where Nightmares Dwell → 37-13 Vision Interference (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: As the commandant hides with the child from Hetero-Creatures in the mine, "Liv" suddenly shows up... Who is behind the "illusion" here?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 37 Where Nightmares Dwell → 37-14 "Illusion" (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Phantoms swarm more frequently, and the one controlling these illusions has even accessed Liv's M.I.N.D. Meanwhile, Liv finally fights her way to the safe zone, hoping to rendezvous with the commandant...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 37 Where Nightmares Dwell → 37-15 One Day (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Liv witnesses Commandant's "death" with her own eyes. Running her fingers over the bullet, she contemplates everything that has happened here...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 37 Where Nightmares Dwell → 37-16 Family (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: This is a "home"... one built together by Commandant and Liv.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 37 Where Nightmares Dwell → 37-17 Frozen Time (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Melinoe sees the entire "illusion" for what it is. Though part of her is tempted by this peaceful life, she is determined to give the child what it wants...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 37 Where Nightmares Dwell → 37-18 A Long Dream (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: In the dead of night, the "child" opens her bright golden eyes. She gazes at Liv, a greedy desire swelling within her tiny frame.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 37 Where Nightmares Dwell → 37-19 Closing the Net (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Liv and the commandant shatter the illusion, but Melinoe quickly weaves new ones using the "child's" power. The "child" wants to devour Liv and the commandant, and she will certainly do as it wishes...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 37 Where Nightmares Dwell → 37-20 When the Dream Ends (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Liv's counterattack breaks Melinoe's concentration. The illusions fade, revealing the truth: they never left the mine.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 37 Where Nightmares Dwell → 37-21 The Lab (After Battle)
SummaryContent: Melinoe's treatment records reveal that her very being is an amalgamation of countless negative emotions.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 37 Where Nightmares Dwell → 37-22 Don't Look Back (After Battle)
SummaryContent: Flesh has sprouted where it was never meant to; she is never meant to be a mother, yet she has become one for a "human."

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 37 Where Nightmares Dwell → 37-23 Cocoon of Love (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Melinoe must be stopped at all costs, before that child can cause any more harm.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 37 Where Nightmares Dwell → 37-23 Cocoon of Love (After Battle)
SummaryContent: Melinoe wove an enormous web for the "child," and in doing so, she became trapped herself.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 37 Where Nightmares Dwell → 37-24 "Birth" (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Back in the conservation area, everyone seems to have completely forgotten Melinoe and the child. Life appears unnervingly normal... but is that really so?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 37 Where Nightmares Dwell → 37-25 Tree of Life (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Hassen opens his eyes, awakening from his long reverie.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 39 Withering Crown → 39-1 First Encounter (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: The Arctic Route Union is under siege. Corrupted, freed by a glacial collapse, swarm its defenses. To repel them, you and Rosetta ready yourselves for an airdrop into the heart of the battle.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 39 Withering Crown → 39-1 First Encounter (After Battle)
SummaryContent: The Frostheart Emperor, who once ruled the Arctic Route Union, appears before everyone with his Frostheart Warlords. His goal is clear: to amalgamate the world once more.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 39 Withering Crown → 39-2 Old Comrade (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: At the base, you meet Dark Aries and familiar faces from the Commune. They brief you on the old Sophiasburgh, the Frostheart Emperor, and his Frostheart Warlords. Just as you reach a conclusion, an explosion erupts, and an Ursa bursts in.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 39 Withering Crown → 39-3 Prepare for Amalgamation! (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: The Frostheart Emperor's frame appears connected to the "Sefirah", and to complete it, he entrusts the battlefield to his "Warlords". Meanwhile, at the alliance camp, a technician named Mina struggles to solve a critical problem: Rosetta's new frame refuses to fully activate.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 39 Withering Crown → 39-4 Sophiasburgh (1) (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Everyone in New Sophiasburgh mobilizes to support the frontlines; yet amid these efforts, some begin to question: Why fight against the Frostheart Emperor at all?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 39 Withering Crown → 39-5 Battle Begins (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: To defeat the Frostheart Emperor, Babylonia and the Arctic Route Union form an alliance. As commander, Rosetta proposes a bold strategy: a full offensive.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 39 Withering Crown → 39-6 Separate Battles (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Dark Aries leads the alliance forces in battle against Rumyantsev and Fyodor, two of the Frostheart Warlords. Simon opts for a tactical withdrawal strategy to gradually wear down the enemy; meanwhile, Asimov makes contact with Mina.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 39 Withering Crown → 39-7 Frostheart Warlords (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Rosetta defeats Dulova, one of the Frostheart Warlords, capturing the port area and discovering Dulova's ability to summon bionic whales back to the Arctic. Seeing her victory, Simon executes the plan and withdraws, causing the other two Warlords' assaults to strike empty ground.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 39 Withering Crown → 39-8 Mission Report (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Despite securing your position within the city, the alliance forces face a precarious situation. After exchanging intelligence with the frontline troops and with Diana, who is supporting distant ports, Rosetta asks you to rally the troops.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 39 Withering Crown → 39-9 Sophiasburgh (2) (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: In New Sophiasburgh, people argue heatedly about the frontline situation, the threat of Corrupted production lines, and whether to surrender. Ultimately, sounds from the battlefront interrupt their deliberations.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 39 Withering Crown → 39-10 Causes of War (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: The Frostheart Emperor's forces also assess the battlefield situation, with some time still needed before his frame adjustments are complete. Observing this, an Ascendant emerges from the shadows, questioning the Emperor about the purpose behind his world "amalgamation."

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 39 Withering Crown → 39-11 Before the Next Battle (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: With the next battle looming, Rosetta invites you to join her in preparing for the fight ahead.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 39 Withering Crown → 39-12 The Ram vs. the Mantis (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: As war breaks out, Fyodor exploits the chaos, deploying bionic whales to breach the alliance base's perimeter. The defenders, however, are waiting. A fierce battle ensues, ending with Palma's victory over Fyodor. Yet the situation only grows more dire.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 39 Withering Crown → 39-13 Creative Thinking (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: The base has already relocated to the seaside, where Asimov, Mina, and Dr. Bear once again discuss how to resolve the M.I.N.D. issues with Rosetta's new frame, "Malkuth". Through their ongoing deliberations, Asimov seems to glimpse a potential breakthrough.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 39 Withering Crown → 39-14 Sophiasburgh (3) (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Hetero-Creatures suddenly emerge in the supposedly secure rear area while distress calls from Babylonia's logistics personnel reach New Sophiasburgh. Amidst this chaos, Evan makes a bold suggestion.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 39 Withering Crown → 39-15 Disorder and Chaos (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: The Ascendant working behind the Frostheart Emperor is Duryodhana. After her chaotic entry onto the battlefield, she commands her Hetero-Creatures to steadily tighten the noose around the alliance forces. To defeat her, the only solution is to successfully activate Malkuth with proper authorization. Fate, however, has other plans.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 39 Withering Crown → 39-16 Ultimate Amalgamator (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: The first to complete the frame and become the Ultimate Amalgamator is not Rosetta, but the Frostheart Emperor. A crimson aurora bathes the earth, and even the Hetero-Creatures become mere extensions of his will.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 39 Withering Crown → 39-17 Head-on Showdown (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Though the alliance has lost the initiative, hope remains. If Derek can reach the designated location, Rosetta will be able to harness that power to fully activate her frame.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 39 Withering Crown → 39-18 Capture Luck (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: The perseverance finally turns the tide of battle. The relentless battle yields its reward: the moment of "luck" has finally arrived as hoped.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 39 Withering Crown → 39-19 Malkuth... (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Through their united effort, the group secures Derek's arrival at the critical site. There, their collective will coalesces into raw power, fusing with Rosetta's frame and forging it into the new Ultimate Amalgamator.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 39 Withering Crown → 39-20 Paramount (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Strike forth in this unmatched form!

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 39 Withering Crown → 39-20 Paramount (After Battle)
SummaryContent: Rosetta breaks through the enemy frontline, carving a path to the palace. Simultaneously, Asimov explains his plan to Mina for unlocking Malkuth. Upon hearing it, Mina seizes her equipment and charges directly toward the Corrupted.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 39 Withering Crown → 39-21 People of the Snow (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Together, the people of New Sophiasburgh and Babylonia's logistics team forge vital connections in aid of activating Malkuth. Yet this is only the beginning. Both children and adults know the true battle is still to come.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 39 Withering Crown → 39-22 The Final Amalgamation (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Zack, the Frostheart Emperor, seeks to use the "amalgamated world" to combat the Punishing Virus and ensure humanity's—and his homeland's—survival. Rosetta, however, sees his methods as a path to ruin. To prove their opposing ideals of justice, the two now meet in a final confrontation.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 39 Withering Crown → 39-22 The Final Amalgamation (After Battle)
SummaryContent: Defeated by Rosetta, Zack offers no excuses. After entrusting his most crucial matters to her, he returns to the palace and reminds Duryodhana of their original agreement: "For humanity. For the homeland I love."

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 39 Withering Crown → 39-23 Amid the Dawn (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: The war has ended, but the world moves on. Rosetta opens her heart to you, while the Ascendants are already preparing for their next move.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 40 A Better Tomorrow → 40-1 The Weight of Truth (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: After many years, Nirvatia returns to her devastated homeland—Carthaki.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 40 A Better Tomorrow → 40-2 Security Director (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Asimov orders Nirvatia to change her mission and prioritize assisting the Gray Raven Commandant, who is trapped in the radiation zone.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 40 A Better Tomorrow → 40-3 Gray Raven Commandant (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: After the Gray Raven Commandant and Nirvatia successfully rendezvous, a massive golden tree suddenly sprouts from the center of the radiation zone.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 40 A Better Tomorrow → 40-4 The Girls (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: During the Post-Pandemic Age, Nirvatia transfers to Carthaki Experimental Secondary School, where she meets the hot-tempered Jagienka and the gentle, kind-hearted Margaret.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 40 A Better Tomorrow → 40-5 Classroom Duel (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Trying to outshine Nirvatia in front of Margaret, Jagienka breaks classroom rules, resulting in all three being punished with a long-distance run by their instructor Major Li.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 40 A Better Tomorrow → 40-6 Silent Distance (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Nirvatia's illness relapses, and the commandant helps her inject her medications. Meanwhile, Jagienka arrives at the edge of the radiation zone with a letter signed by Nirvatia, where she meets her childhood friend Zhang.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 40 A Better Tomorrow → 40-7 Children of The Tempest (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Nirvatia comes to Jagienka's defense, slightly improving the relationship between them. Afterward, the three girls attend a rally of the Carthaki Scouts, each of them brimming with enthusiasm for the future.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 40 A Better Tomorrow → 40-8 Defense of Carthaki (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Jagienka and Margaret celebrate Nirvatia's birthday, but the Corrupted attack Carthaki that very night. The three spring into action and are eventually awarded the title of "Dominik Patrol".

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 40 A Better Tomorrow → 40-9 Moses by the Riverbank (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Jagienka arrives at Carthaki Satellite City and meets Commander Li, who persuades her to help the city's residents fight against the Corrupted and escape their dangerous situation.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 40 A Better Tomorrow → 40-10 The Long Winter (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: In the radiation zone, Nirvatia and the commandant take a brief rest when a massive tree in the distance suddenly begins to grow, causing the ground to shake. Nirvatia senses signs of a life form.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 40 A Better Tomorrow → 40-10 The Long Winter (After Battle)
SummaryContent: Nirvatia and the commandant defeat Margaret's phantom and rescue refugees who were being held hostage by the Ascendant John Doe. Everyone decides to retreat and head to the Satellite City across the river.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 40 A Better Tomorrow → 40-11 Rescue Mission (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: After defending Carthaki, Margaret frequently disappears without warning, returning to school completely exhausted. To discover where she's going, Nirvatia and Jagienka kidnap Major Li.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 40 A Better Tomorrow → 40-12 Nothing Today (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Nirvatia finds Margaret deep within the Carthaki Research Institute and discovers she is actually a Construct. Suddenly, an explosion erupts in the facility, and Margaret stays behind at the blast center to protect Nirvatia.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 40 A Better Tomorrow → 40-13 Ownerless Letter (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Ascendant John Doe besieges Carthaki Satellite City. Nirvatia and the Gray Raven Commandant arrive just in time and join forces with Jagienka to defeat him.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 40 A Better Tomorrow → 40-14 Heroes Are the People (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: After the Great Akdilek Explosion, survivors relocate to the Satellite City across the river. Nirvatia deceives Jagienka in order to reach Babylonia and is branded a traitor by the Carthakians.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 40 A Better Tomorrow → 40-15 Goodbye, Carthaki (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: In Babylonia, Nirvatia makes death threats against the government during a livestream, demanding the truth about Carthaki be revealed. Meanwhile on the surface, Jagienka attempts to assassinate a high-ranking Babylonia official. After both fail, they separately encounter their mentors Asimov and Arnold.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 40 A Better Tomorrow → 40-16 Racing Against Death (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Commander Li and Jagienka decide to lead the Satellite City's people to break through the siege, while Nirvatia chooses to return to the radiation zone with the Gray Raven Commandant to destroy the Golden Oak.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 40 A Better Tomorrow → 40-17 Operation Hebron (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: After successfully seizing the "Graveyard", Jagienka is ambushed and severely wounded. It turns out that Zhang on the hospital bed has been John Doe in disguise all along.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 40 A Better Tomorrow → 40-17 Operation Hebron (After Battle)
SummaryContent: In the radiation zone, the commandant and Nirvatia find themselves surrounded by the Red Mist. At a critical moment, Nirvatia pushes the commandant into an elevator shaft, staying behind alone to cover the retreat.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 40 A Better Tomorrow → 40-18 Golden Oak (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: The Red Mist quickly catches up with the evacuation team, trapping Commander Li and the refugees in illusions woven by the Punishing Virus.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 40 A Better Tomorrow → 40-19 Comrades (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: The destruction of the Golden Oak by the commandant and Nirvatia creates a thunderous explosion that breaks Jagienka and Commander Li free from their hallucinations. Realizing there's no way back, the two decide to turn around and head back into danger to help the Gray Raven Commandant.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 40 A Better Tomorrow → 40-20 The Last Bullet (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Jagienka pilots a fighter jet while Commander Li controls a cruiser. Under their coordinated attack, the Golden Oak comes crashing down with a thunderous roar.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 40 A Better Tomorrow → 40-21 Echoes of a Cherished Wish (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Severely wounded, Nirvatia breaks free from encirclement and staggers toward the core of the Golden Oak.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 40 A Better Tomorrow → 40-21 Echoes of a Cherished Wish (After Battle)
SummaryContent: Margaret, who has briefly regained her senses, falls back into madness. Just as she is about to harm Nirvatia, Jagienka arrives in time, whose bracelet somehow restores Margaret's sanity.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 40 A Better Tomorrow → 40-22 The Master and Margaret (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Having regained her senses, Margaret extracts the Seedling from her own body to save her friends. At that same moment, Ascendant John Doe, who has been lurking in the shadows, launches a surprise attack against the group.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 40 A Better Tomorrow → 40-23 A Better Tomorrow (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: The group successfully repels John Doe, who retreats with Margaret's corpse. After the incident, the commandant and Nirvatia jointly conceal the existence of the Seedling, while the mysterious organization behind Lesti appears to have begun mobilizing.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 41 Homecoming Voyage → 41-1 Hunt (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: In the second year after the Punishing Virus outbreak, young Lucia takes Luna out to hunt geese. But when Lucia lifts one of the dead birds, its body suddenly changes into a form she knows all too well...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 41 Homecoming Voyage → 41-1 Hunt (After Battle)
SummaryContent: After the F.O.S. starship disappears, Asimov receives an abnormal audio signal and sends the Commandant to investigate the old F.O.S. site on the surface.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 41 Homecoming Voyage → 41-2 Prism Plaza (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: After the F.O.S. starship disappears, Luna detects constant interference in the Ascension-Network. Alpha follows the anomaly and leaves alone. Meanwhile, the Commandant and Lucia are sent to investigate the old F.O.S. site on the surface. At Prism Square, they meet Alpha, who has followed the same trail. Then a sudden wave of dense fog swallows all three of them.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 41 Homecoming Voyage → 41-3 Strayed (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: In the Fog, the F.O.S. starship has been trapped for 21 days. Supplies are gone. Communications are down. Strange creatures continue to pour out of the rifts. Vanessa leads the survivors in holding the safe zone. Students grow stronger in battle. Instructors stand firm against despair. This starship once carried humanity's hope. Now, it's like an insect sealed in amber.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 41 Homecoming Voyage → 41-4 Dead End (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: The Commandant and Lucia wake in the Fog and find themselves aboard the missing F.O.S. starship. At the edge of the safe zone, Vanessa detects three green signals: Alpha, Lucia, and the Commandant. Their identities are confirmed, and Vanessa begins explaining the ship's situation. Then a fourth signal appears on the tactical radar, in the exact same location as "Chimera," the creature behind the disaster.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 41 Homecoming Voyage → 41-5 Old Friend (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Chimera's scream tears through the Fog, and waves of monsters surge toward the safe zone. Instructor Lester falls. The F.O.S. flag goes down. Alpha senses Chimera's sorrow and goes to face her alone. Though wounded, Vanessa continues to command support for the communication tower. As long as the tower stands and the distress signal keeps transmitting, there is still hope of reaching Babylonia.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 41 Homecoming Voyage → 41-6 The Exiled Dreamer (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Deep in the Fog, Chimera carries the out-of-control [Crown], her memories in disarray as she searches the endless mist for her "old friends." A massive rift opens beside the communication tower. Valen's teammates all give their lives. He fights to connect Babylonia's channel to Vanessa's terminal, then leaps down and detonates the explosives, protecting the tower with his life.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 41 Homecoming Voyage → 41-7 Into the Fog of Nightmares (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Communication is restored. In the brief window they have, Asimov explains the conditions for returning: activate the deep-space beacon inside the F.O.S. Monument, then restart the main engine. Elsewhere, Alpha chases after Chimera as it runs in pain. A battle is about to begin.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 41 Homecoming Voyage → 41-7 Into the Fog of Nightmares (After Battle)
SummaryContent: Despair envelops the safe zone. Student Nia steps forward to raise morale. She lifts the F.O.S. flag and charges into battle. In the Fog, Alpha catches up to Chimera. Chimera speaks the name "Lucia." Before Alpha can recover from the shock, Chimera pulls her into an embrace, and together they fall into the depths of the Fog.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 41 Homecoming Voyage → 41-8 The Way Here (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Chaotic fragments of memory flood Alpha's M.I.N.D. Among the familiar paths, she sees a blurred "starting point."

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 41 Homecoming Voyage → 41-9 The End Is the Beginning (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: The 21st exploration of the Hetero Tower ends in failure. The Vanguard comes so close, but still falls short. Dominik disappears. Chaos Contamination remains. The world is not saved; instead, it falls into an even deeper disaster. In the ruined wasteland, the Vanguard finds the only survivor: a small child named "Lucia." They bring her back to the last research facility.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 41 Homecoming Voyage → 41-10 Alpha (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: When Lucia was young, her parents were often absent, so she raised her little sister on her own until Chaos Contamination arrived. The Vanguard holds a meeting and decides to move forward with Project String: developing Sefirah technology and sending it to other worlds. It is Dominik's final hope. At the base, Lucia quietly helps the adults with daily tasks, bringing a touch of home to the cold facility. At night, Leora tells her stories about starlight: heroes who became light and flew to other planets to carry the flame, and the last, smallest hero, Alpha.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 41 Homecoming Voyage → 41-11 Seeking Home (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Chris' Chaos Contamination erupts, and he returns to the base in a mutated form on Lucia's birthday. Nemo is forced to kill him. At the same time, development of the Sefirah is finally complete, and the Vanguard prepares to set out and deliver it.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 41 Homecoming Voyage → 41-12 Gazing from Afar (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Leora says goodbye to Lucia, and Lucia obediently agrees to stay at the base and wait. But just before Leora leaves, Lucia finally says what she has been afraid of all along. The two embrace and cry together. Then the Vanguard leaves with the Sefirah, and Lucia is left alone to guard the base.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 41 Homecoming Voyage → 41-13 Setting Sail (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: In the empty base, Lucia tries to live strongly in her own way. She tends the dandelions, maintains the facilities, and fights off monsters. As time passes, the base falls little by little. Lucia is forced to the top floor, but the Vanguard never returns. In the end, she sets out alone, carrying the sacrifices of the adults and holding the "Sefirah" close...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 41 Homecoming Voyage → 41-14 Lucia (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Lucia is born into a new world and grows up with a happy childhood. Still, she dreams of the Fog from her past life, and of the people she lost. She resolves to become stronger so she can protect others. Sixteen years later, Dominik establishes F.O.S. Military Command College. Lucia passes the selection and becomes part of its first class. At the opening ceremony, she watches Dawn-III launch into the sky and meets her classmates Joanne and 【kuroname】.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 41 Homecoming Voyage → 41-15 The Opening Drill (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: In the holographic exercise after the first week of school, Lucia and 【kuroname】 serve as opposing team leaders. Their fierce match ends in a draw, and both of them stubbornly get back on their feet. For the first time in a long while, Lucia feels happy. She has finally found someone who can stand as her equal.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 41 Homecoming Voyage → 41-16 Falling Sky (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: F.O.S. College's Airborne Command Post was hijacked midair during one of its rotation training flights to the ground. At the critical moment, Lucia, 【kuroname】, and Joanne work together, with help from their classmates, to stop the hijackers.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 41 Homecoming Voyage → 41-17 Wish Upon the Stars (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: During her year at F.O.S., the familiar nightmares still return. But this time, Lucia has more companions: 【kuroname】, Joanne, Ophelia, Adelyde, and many others. Through everyday life together, they build deep friendships. On one happy birthday night, her friends celebrate for her under the stars behind the mountain. Lucia makes a wish: that everyone can move safely and happily toward tomorrow.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 41 Homecoming Voyage → 41-18 Graduation (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: During a mission at the lunar base, Lucia and 【kuroname】 open their hearts to each other, with space and Earth as their witnesses... Years later, F.O.S. holds its first graduation ceremony.
