The first class of students works together on the melody and lyrics, creating F.O.S.'s graduation song, though it never receives an official name.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 41 Homecoming Voyage → 41-19 Homecoming Banquet (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: After graduation, everyone works toward the future they chose. Lucia and 【kuroname】 also continue to grow closer. On F.O.S.'s anniversary celebration in 2160, Joanne announces that analysis of the [Crown] Sefirah technology is complete. Only two people in the world can fully adapt to it. By chance, those two lovers are each preparing a surprise for the other. Then disaster strikes. Lucia and 【kuroname】 vanish. The remaining F.O.S. students and graduates fight the Corrupted bravely, sacrificing themselves to keep the group moving forward.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 41 Homecoming Voyage → 41-20 The Same Starting Point (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: As the Punishing Virus ravages the world, the people of F.O.S. risk everything to reclaim the [Crown] Sefirah. Ophelia, Adelyde, Ms. Cassandra... all teachers and students of F.O.S. die. Within two weeks, the world collapses and sinks into the Fog. Joanne survives until the end and barely manages to stabilize the [Crown], even as her consciousness is slowly eaten away. Much later, Agent One Aisling finds her. To find the companions of this world, Joanne uses Aisling and sets in motion a plan to pull the F.O.S. starship into the Fog.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 41 Homecoming Voyage → 41-21 Pilgrimage / Life / Ordeal (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: As "Chimera" embraces Alpha and they fall together, Alpha sees endless deaths across countless worlds. After that, the consciousness inside "Chimera" is fully consumed by the Fog, leaving only a monster that attacks everything in sight. Badly wounded, Vanessa orders the beacon activated and the main engine restarted. Meanwhile, Lucia, Alpha, and the others are forced to face their former comrades, now driven mad.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 41 Homecoming Voyage → 41-22 Pyroath (After Battle)
SummaryContent: The battle reaches a hopeless moment. Death swallows everyone beyond return. Before their final farewell, Alpha and Lucia share one last, heartfelt conversation. In the end, Lucia refuses to leave Alpha alone in the Fog. She chooses to die first, using the Omega Core's explosion to merge with "Chimera" and pass the [Crown] to Alpha. The will of everyone lost crowns Alpha as king, leaving only a broken ruler in the Fog.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 41 Homecoming Voyage → 41-23 Crown (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: The new king gains the terrible power to look down upon the world. To understand the Phylotree and the origin of herself, she becomes one with her first self. But after experiencing every happiness in the world, she still chooses to give up her own. She gathers all pain into herself, just to preserve one perfectly happy world, and one perfectly happy Lucia.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 41 Homecoming Voyage → 41-24 The Ending's Two Halves (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: With her mind made up, Alpha begins gathering all the world's suffering and misfortune into herself. She answers Luna's call. She speaks with Vonnegut... With a certain lamb by her side, she slowly comes to understand the Phylotree, Sefirah, the Ascension-Network, and their true nature. But just as everything is complete and she prepares to cross the Gateway, another force pulls her into a promise she should never have forgotten.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 41 Homecoming Voyage → 41-25 The Ending's Other Half (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: The lamb pulls Alpha back to F.O.S. College's final anniversary celebration. But to protect the future she believes humanity should follow, she has to give up this precious bond. With the universe as witness, she and the Commandant make a vow to never cross paths for eternity. In her pain, Alpha twists the [Crown] Sefirah into [Atheism] and crowns herself.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 41 Homecoming Voyage → 41-26 Homecoming Voyage (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Beyond the Gateway, the Merciful One accepts Alpha's choice, and the abandoned ones also embrace the path she has chosen. Alpha hears that nameless graduation song again and finally gives it a name: "Homecoming Voyage." Inspired by the song, she rewinds every tragedy. This time, Lucia doesn't have to die first. The F.O.S. students don't have to die. The Commandant doesn't have to die. With everyone behind her, Alpha charges toward "Vanguard" Chimera. She will lead them all back home.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 41 Homecoming Voyage → 41-27 Passing Strangers (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: The F.O.S. starship breaks through the Fog and returns to Babylonia. Alpha stays behind to guard it until the Commandant is the last to evacuate. Only then does she walk alone into the dark universe, passing by everything she loves.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 41 Homecoming Voyage → 41-28 The Vanished Recording (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: In a recording that no longer exists, old friends from F.O.S. rushed to offer their blessings. One line still echoes through F.O.S. forever: "All the best to you, Lucia!"

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 01 Graffiti Art → 1-1 Patched Memories (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: The Nozzle model has been transported to a safe place.
[Lee]: Before we return to Babylonia from the transports, we\'ll have to extract its full memory. We need to be quick.
[Lee]: But it\'s too heavily damaged... we\'ll have to repair it a little first.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 01 Graffiti Art → 1-2 Hello World (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Graffiti Artist]: ...
[Graffiti Artist]: Where... am I...?
[Graffiti Artist]: This world... what happened to it...

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 01 Graffiti Art → 1-6 Initial Inspiration (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Graffiti Artist]: Hehe... That... blue jacketed... guy...
[Graffiti Artist]: Too senseless... So I... helped him... change into... better colors...
[Graffiti Artist]: This way... he will... understand me...

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 02 Journey of Torture → 2-1 Into the M.I.N.D. (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Vera]: Never thought you also moved Tifa\'s body to the base.
[Vera]: With her viral density, are you not afraid of hurting this lil\' lass?
[Chrome]: The base facilities should be enough of a barrier. Just reading the M.I.N.D. should be safe. No need to worry.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 02 Journey of Torture → 2-2 Dark Struggle (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Tifa]: What... is this place...?
[Tifa]: I... my body...
[Roland]: You have been successfully modified, Miss Tifa.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 02 Journey of Torture → 2-3 New Masterpiece (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Silence fills the air after the battle ended. Tifa slowly moves toward the Musashi IX, and—
She easily pulls out Musashi IX\'s head and raises it up.
[Tifa]: I win.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 02 Journey of Torture → 2-6 Collapsed Bridge (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Chrome]: Kamui, what\'s the situation on your end?
[Kamui]: Captain, there are no Ascendants around here, but I found a...
[Kamui]: Monster with a lot of spikes... uh... it looks quite... terrifying...

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 02 Journey of Torture → 2-6 Collapsed Bridge (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Boom—
[Kamui]: Woah, this bridge is... not going to hold!
[Tifa]: Hahaha, the power of the Ascnet is indeed wonderful...

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 03 Final Exhibition → 3-1 Arrival (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Boom—
A train bursts through the walls and crashes into an ancient and elegant-looking estate...
Crackle—

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 03 Final Exhibition → 3-2 Vintage Taste (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Roland]: So this is the entrance...
[Roland]: Defensive mechanisms all over the place... There should be a control center in here somewhere...
[Roland]: I\'ll have to turn it off, lest it perturbs Miss Luna.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 03 Final Exhibition → 3-3 Enjoyment (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Connecting—
[Gabriel]: Miss Luna is following the Gray Ravens tightly. She will be there soon.
[Gabriel]: If you greet them with this current setup, Miss Luna will be sorely disappointed.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 03 Final Exhibition → 3-4 Smiling Devil (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Construct Leader]: Ascendant trails extended all the way here!
[Construct Soldier]: Leader, is it really okay for us to go in this deep?
[Construct Leader]: This is our mission. If we don\'t manage to provide intel, then our already scarce military cannot be deployed effectively.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 03 Final Exhibition → 3-6 Taming (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Roland]: Well well, I am here at last.
[Estate Butler]: The dismay you caused on your path here... Is a stain on this estate...
[Estate Butler]: Unforgivable...

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 04 Forgotten Sand → 4-1 Zack Activated (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Liv, did you succeed?
[Liv]: Yes. Connection established. The corruption status isn\'t severe.
[Kamui]: This big fella\'s quite amazing.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 04 Forgotten Sand → 4-2 Ruthlessness (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Emma]: Okay, story\'s over.
[Emma]: Zack, do you think the rabbit\'s right? Or the donkey\'s right?
[Zack]: ...Zack... Zack thinks that...

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 04 Forgotten Sand → 4-3 Her (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Estate Butler]: Master, the Corrupted have broken through the outer doors.
[Copperfield]: Are the citizens all evacuated?
[Estate Butler]: They have all evacuated.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 04 Forgotten Sand → 4-4 Protection (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Corrupted]: Urgh—
[Zack]: Emma... Sit tight...
[Emma]: O—kay—

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 04 Forgotten Sand → 4-5 Emma (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Emma]: Daddy!
[Copperfield]: Without them, you\'ll never see your mom and dad again.
[Estate Butler]: Well then. Master, milady. I wish you two a safe journey.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 04 Forgotten Sand → 4-6 Farewell (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Estate Butler]: ...
The estate butler watches as the last plane leaves the inner garden.
Behind him are a horde of Corrupted frames, and the already corrupted Zack.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 05 Shattered Illusion → 5-1 Destination (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Watanabe]: Liv, we\'re here.
[Liv]: This is...
[Watanabe]: This is a M.I.N.D. testing site from the old world. We\'ll have to reach the core area of this building.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 05 Shattered Illusion → 5-2 Tracing (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Watanabe]: In a survey mission, a few Forsaken squads wandered in here by accident.
[Watanabe]: And their consciousness ended up being imprisoned by the Corrupted.
[Forsaken Soldier]: The more we send here, the more we lose...

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 05 Shattered Illusion → 5-3 Split Road (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Watanabe]: You\'re doing very well... Thank you, Liv, most of the consciousnesses of our comrades are saved.
[Watanabe]: Just a little more and...
[Forsaken Soldier]: The central container\'s activity is rising!

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 05 Shattered Illusion → 5-4 Brawling (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Watanabe]: Liv, hold on! We\'ll... find a way to...
[Watanabe]: Before that, you mustn\'t allow yourself to be captured by that pseudo-consciousness. Or else, you\'ll be taken and imprisoned.
[Watanabe]: And it will usurp your M.I.N.D.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 05 Shattered Illusion → 5-5 Lost (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Forsaken Soldier]: According to the data report, Miss Liv has already left her M.I.N.D.
[Forsaken Soldier]: How can we make her come back?
[Watanabe]: Only if she could find her way back to her M.I.N.D...

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 05 Shattered Illusion → 5-6 Swallowed (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Watanabe]: Liv, you\'re nearing your goal!
[Watanabe]: Just pass through another M.I.N.D.
[Liv]: Understood.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 05 Shattered Illusion → 5-6 Swallowed (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Ha... ha... finally...
[Forsaken Soldier]: The entrance to the M.I.N.D. is open.
[Watanabe]: Liv, get through there, quickly!

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 06 Alloy Contamination → 6-1 Sister (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nun]: ...
[Liv]: Her model version is... a sister?
[Lee]: Not especially strange.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 06 Alloy Contamination → 6-2 Child (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nun]: One by one, according to order! Don\'t rush in!
[Nun]: Even if you rushed in first, you won\'t be getting more food!
[Soldier]: How many in total?

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 06 Alloy Contamination → 6-3 Dismemberment (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Little Girl]: Big brother, I\'m hungry...
[Little Boy]: Sister...
[Nun]: You again? You two eat up more than the normal bunch.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 06 Alloy Contamination → 6-4 Blade (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Citizens]: Run—!
[Citizens]: Corrupted! Corrupted inside the factory—
[Nun]: Stop crying! Stop making noise!

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 06 Alloy Contamination → 6-5 Against the Current (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nun]: Punishing Virus...
[Nun]: The thing I\'ve been hiding from before...
[Nun]: But now, it doesn\'t seem that much of a deal.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 06 Alloy Contamination → 6-6 Ending (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nun]: Finally... here...
[Nun]: But... I can\'t continue onwards anymore...
The sister aims her bladed wings at herself, but then quickly lowers them.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 07 Inver-Collapse → 7-1 Recurrence (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: This is Rohacchi\'s memory data I copied from the ruins. Now rendering it into visual data for replay.
[Liv]: Yes. Which is why I\'ve been extra careful to not cause any harm to it.
[Liv]: According to what Rohacchi said, their model type was sent into the ruins a long time ago to search for buried treasure.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 07 Inver-Collapse → 7-2 Defense (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Rohacchi]: Shiny. Commotion. Investigate.
[???]: Efficiency requires improvement. The digging speed isn\'t enough.
[???]: We bear the wishes of our master.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 07 Inver-Collapse → 7-2 Defense (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Rohacchi]: Very. Strong. Cannot. Win.
[Rohacchi]: Run. Inside. Cannot. Be. Caught.
[Rohacchi]: But. Running.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 07 Inver-Collapse → 7-3 Kindred (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Rohacchi]: Other. Similar. Ones. Nearby.
[Rohacchi]: You. Are. Me?
[Rohacchi]: Remembered. Were. Looking. For. Treasure.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 07 Inver-Collapse → 7-3 Kindred (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Rohacchi]: Angry. Companions. Not. Friendly.
[Rohacchi]: So. Retaliate. Shoot. Head.
[Rohacchi]: Someone. Else. Maybe. I. Once. More.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 07 Inver-Collapse → 7-4 Friends (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: Ah, Nanami\'s all spent! I\'m done playing!
[Rohacchi]: You. No. Fight. I. No. Fight.
[Nanami]: Ehehe, I\'ve been checking you out from the side. You seem different from the others, so I\'ve been curious.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 07 Inver-Collapse → 7-5 Treasure Hunt (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Looks like Rohacchi\'s awakening has something to do with that mysterious mural.
[Liv]: They mentioned the term "Sagemachina" several times.
[Liv]: If only we could find and research that actual mural.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 07 Inver-Collapse → 7-6 Fantasy (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: In the end, we couldn\'t find any relevant information about the murals.
[Liv]: It\'s a bit of a let-off, but at least we found a sizable amount of useful information.
[Liv]: This deciphered data will be uploaded and shared. Other squads might find the battle data inside useful.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 08 Consumed by Darkness → 8-1 Report (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: Mission report.
[Kamui]: I\'ve successfully retreated from those ruins, but I could never have guessed something like that was left for me.
[Kamui]: Chrome, too... He knows full well I\'m not familiar with these things.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 08 Consumed by Darkness → 8-2 Retrospective Memory (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: I wanted to get away from her, but she kept coming after me.
[Kamui]: And it made her affected by Tenebrion as well.
[Kamui]: Thankfully, her condition seems to have stabilized. I\'ll go see her when I have the time.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 08 Consumed by Darkness → 8-3 Dark Pursuit (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: The group of Corrupted moved with a certain intention.
[Kamui]: Camu said that those Corrupted were originally after me.
[Kamui]: Should have something to do with Roland... He\'s still trying to get me plugged into their Ascension-Network or something.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 08 Consumed by Darkness → 8-4 Relentless (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: I don\'t remember how many battles I have gone through, how many Corrupted I defeated.
[Kamui]: I didn\'t see Roland though. That was probably quite lucky of me.
[Kamui]: Finally, I reached the bottom of the ruins.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 08 Consumed by Darkness → 8-5 Alter Ego (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: Even through the endless fighting, the amount of Corrupted didn\'t seem to even lower.
[Kamui]: But I felt it at the time. The thing I was after was in that facility.
[Kamui]: Almost there.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 08 Consumed by Darkness → 8-6 Unity (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: And I did so, cleaving open a path, and finally entered the facility beneath the ruins.
[Kamui]: Everything was well kept inside, and it feels technologically advanced.
[Kamui]: And I found the Tenebrion I was looking for in large amounts.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 08 Consumed by Darkness → 8-6 Unity (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: With the help of the Gray Ravens, I successfully defeated Camu.
[Kamui]: I understood his purpose of existence, as well as mine...
—Deep within Kamui\'s memories trickled words unbeknownst to others.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 09 Fallen Star → 9-1 Reply Signal (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
There are no others in sight except Ayla in the long and narrow space station passageway.
The lights flicker on and off. Dull, low battle noises could be heard occasionally, probably coming from other troops fighting the enemy.
[Ayla]: Phew...

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 09 Fallen Star → 9-2 Assist (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Ayla]: Phew...
[Ayla]: Relax... And focus on Selena\'s voice...
[Noise]: "..." (Lines from "The Tempest")

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 09 Fallen Star → 9-3 Lose Again (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Ayla]: Here it is—
[Ayla]: Selena!
Ayla slashes the closed cabin door a few times, bashing it out of shape.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 09 Fallen Star → 9-3 Lose Again (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Ayla informs Gray Raven the gravity room\'s mechanism. At that moment...
Bang—
[Gabriel]: Target sighted. Recycling now.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 11 Nona Ouroboros → 11-1 Entry (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: YOOOOOO! WHOOOAAAA! This ship is BIG!
[Chrome]: Keep your voice down, Kamui. If some guards are hiding nearby and they hear you—
[Kamui]: I don\'t see the point of staying quiet, though!

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 11 Nona Ouroboros → 11-1 Entry (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Chrome]: The guy controlled the performer puppets in the market, huh...
[Kamui]: That suspicioso is gone, Captain!
[???]: All right. That\'s it.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 11 Nona Ouroboros → 11-2 Disguise (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: So that Chaofeng\'s just gone? I thought he\'d be coming with us.
[Chrome]: We\'ll look suspicious if we\'re spotted hanging out with the Kowloong Crew. Besides, we already got what we wanted from him.
[Chrome]: I\'m not sure what sort of helpers he got, so we\'d better count on ourselves still. Just the two of us. Got it, Kamui?

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 11 Nona Ouroboros → 11-2 Disguise (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Chrome]: I\'m done here.
[Chrome]: I\'ve picked out all the largest women\'s clothing... Now we just have to wait for Murray to contact us.
[Kamui]: Yep.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 11 Nona Ouroboros → 11-3 Mesmerized (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Murray]: Kamui is on the stage already? Didn\'t expect it to go so smoothly.
[Chrome]: Chaofeng must have made some arrangements ahead of time.
...

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 11 Nona Ouroboros → 11-4 Confusion (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Chrome]: How... I was... going after... something...
[Chrome]: Ugh... But what was I going after? And why?
[Chrome]: And... what\'s this place?

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 11 Nona Ouroboros → 11-5 Diminishing (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: That took you long enough, Chrome.
[Chaofeng]: Pant... pant...
Next to Chrome, Kamui is there grinning as always. Chaofeng is barely able to stand straight. Nobody says a word, but Chrome can tell that they have both entered the same dream just now.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 11 Nona Ouroboros → 11-5 Diminishing (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Huaxu]: Thank you... thank you for defeating me.
[Huaxu]: If one of my forms is defeated, the true form will be greatly weakened.
[Huaxu]: It finally... all... ends...

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 10 Eternal Engine → 10-1 Threat (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
——
The intense explosion shakes the carriage.
Inside the noble carriage.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 10 Eternal Engine → 10-2 Spider (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
...
[Changyu]: Sophia, quick—
[Changyu]: The roof...

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 10 Eternal Engine → 10-3 Obstacles (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: This way.
[Liv]: I can see the stairs to the next level!
[Sophia]: We can get to the roof through here.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 10 Eternal Engine → 10-4 Return (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Changyu]: Tsk—
[Sophia]: You\'re too reckless.
[Sophia]: Didn\'t Aston tell you to stay put?

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 10 Eternal Engine → 10-5 Deviate (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Changyu]: Tsk—
[Changyu]: Sophia...
[Changyu]: I may have misjudged my condition...

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 10 Eternal Engine → 10-6 Decision (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Boom—
The shaking on top of the train persisted for while.
Sophia supports Changyu with her mechanical arms while trying to maintain balance as she ventures forward in the carriages.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 10 Eternal Engine → 10-6 Decision (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: All done now.
[Sophia]: What\'s this?
[Liv]: Commandant asked me to make this small signal booster, which may enhance our communications. You don\'t need to worry about it.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 12 Kowloong Metropolis → 12-1 Trojan Horse (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Luna]: Still too naive, am I? I\'m sorry, Sister.
[α]: Happens to me too, no matter... Let\'s deal with these uninvited guests.
No less than 30 humanoid Constructs stand before the two, with even more bionic machines behind. Alpha scans the room before settling her gaze on the female in the center.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 12 Kowloong Metropolis → 12-2 Trapped Hound (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Chrome]: Team Cerberus, respond if you hear me.
[Chrome]: Cerberus!
[Corrupted]: Uuuurgh!

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 12 Kowloong Metropolis → 12-3 Gold & Centaur (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Guard]: Sir, this is Rosetta, the one under observation.
[Nikola]: ...
[Rosetta]: ...

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 12 Kowloong Metropolis → 12-3 Gold & Centaur (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The battle ended up being a one-on-one fight between Rosetta and Alpha.
Blade and spear, hooves and legs—every collision of the two sends sparks flying, like countless flecks of stardust.
Unlike Alpha, methodical in her steps and positioning, Rosetta completely ignores the conventional to and fro of battle, and merely charges, over and over at Alpha.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 12 Kowloong Metropolis → 12-4 Fireworks (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Roland]: Quite the stubborn bunch, you are. Or even, obstinate.
[Vera]: Tch...
Vera, bruised and battered, staggers toward Roland. But for every step she takes forward, he takes one back—

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 12 Kowloong Metropolis → 12-5 Deceptor (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Forsaken Soldier A]: Mr. Watanabe, the number of Corrupted coming from the outer rim are decreasing, but...
[Watanabe]: They\'re now pouring out of the city instead, eh.
After the Forsaken got off the vehicle, they made a temporary encampment on a nearby route to intercept the enemy. Though they are only forty or so in numbers, to these veterans, it is more than enough.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 12 Kowloong Metropolis → 12-6 Another Ending (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Luna]: Sister, are you okay?
[α]: Not an issue. The virus will patch me up.
[Luna]: But Sister, why didn\'t you stop her? You could have stopped that explosion, right?

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 12 Kowloong Metropolis → 12-7 Seize (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Lucia falls. Lee, Liv, and Ayla arrive at the top of the tower.
[Qu]: You\'ve lost... Babylonia, Huax... Ugh!
[Ayla]: How?!

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 12 Kowloong Metropolis → 12-7 Seize (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Gabriel]: This is the end, Gray Raven!
Gabriel knocks Ayla away violently, then spreads his hand, amassing a ball of energy.
[Lee]: Too late.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 14 Imprisoned Sight → 14-1 Looking for Luna (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
...
Alpha...
[Lucia]: Alpha?

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 14 Imprisoned Sight → 14-2 Howling Snowstorm (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Alpha stands on the barren scorched earth, taking in the chaos around her.
Since that incident, she has been running around subterranean city number 075.
She has left no stone unturned in her search, going through the hidden corners and paths, through the ruins that only they knew about, and has even checked on the Constructs that were swarming the place.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 14 Imprisoned Sight → 14-3 Into Thin Air (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Opening her eyes after the brief memory, Alpha clenches her left fist.
[α]: How many of my memories did you see in my M.I.N.D., Lucia?
The mission from Ascnet, or the pitiful wish of those wishing to ascend, but reaching a dead end? Or could it even be those despicable traps by the humans?

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 14 Imprisoned Sight → 14-4 Meet Again (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Alpha leaps into the fumes, and those in the distance also notice some movement. Alpha quickly darts into the sewers to avoid any contact with them.
[α]: Based on my last exploration, one end of this tunnel leads to Cinderelik and the cultivation pod, while the other has a pit that drops to the lower level.
She raises her Katana and dashes in the direction of the pit, but comes upon a sturdy lock.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 14 Imprisoned Sight → 14-5 Crossing Paths (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Bidding Roland farewell, Alpha returns to the upper level, to where she came in from.
Walking in the direction she guesses they headed in, she steps into a wrecked greenhouse.
[α]: It wasn\'t just Cinderelik they encountered?

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 14 Imprisoned Sight → 14-6 Martyr (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[α]: Gabriel...
[α]: You\'re not escaping this time.
...

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 14 Imprisoned Sight → 14-7 Go to Fight (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
That is the information Alpha coerced out of the hiding mermaid by pressing her katana against her throat, the night before the final plan was to be executed.
At the same time, Luna learns the location of the experimental ultra-high energy antenna cluster.
Lamia, returning from the Arctic, shares the same fact Huaxu did.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 14 Imprisoned Sight → 14-8 Night Gathers (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Why are you helping?
Lucia quietly asks Alpha while keeping her eye on the agent in front of her.
[α]: I don\'t owe you any answers.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 14 Imprisoned Sight → 14-8 Night Gathers (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The multitude of noises disappear, and Alpha opens her eyes, while the surrounding area shakes violently. Just as she has expected, the dark figure is standing a distance away, effortlessly doing battle.
[α]: Vonnegut!
[Vonnegut]: Not bad, my respect for you is growing.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 15 The Last Spark → 15-1 Orphan of Science (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A huge explosion has caused the entire sea to tremble.
It sends out a large circle of rapidly expanding waves, with Atlantis as the center.
The monitoring system has quickly located the source of the explosion. It comes from an undersea level where the zero-point reactor is located.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 15 The Last Spark → 15-2 Foolishness (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Lamia once heard someone say...
Infants never keep their memories.
The hippocampus and amygdala of the brain, which are essential for long-term memory, are still not fully developed during the infant stage. The memory links to various areas of the brain are constantly changing. Over time, such links are disconnected and memories will be lost.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 15 The Last Spark → 15-2 Foolishness (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lustrous]: How\'s that monkey lately?
[Admin Director]: Her name is Lamia, ma\'am.
[Admin Director]: She\'s doing well. The staff on the island all like her.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 15 The Last Spark → 15-3 Weakness (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Lustrous always returns to her room on time after a day of work.
The rooms in the base are designed like a beehive.
Looking up from the corridor, Lustrous sees two "cliffs" full of shiny blocks, like frost flowers on giant glass.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 15 The Last Spark → 15-4 Powerlessness (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Lamia remembers everything.
How she was born and grew up. All the time she spent in this city in the sea.
Everyone looked and laughed at her as if she was a monkey.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 15 The Last Spark → 15-4 Powerlessness (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Researchers have lined up in the corridor outside the canteen. The queue is incredibly long. Lamia cannot see its end.
A researcher seems to have remembered something. He exchanges a few words with the colleagues nearby and leaves.
He leaves a gap behind, but it is almost consumed by the moving queue.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 15 The Last Spark → 15-5 Curiosity (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Lamia knows she is different from the others.
She is scared of death, pain and hunger. In fact, she fears everything. She is always full of emotions. Amongst them, she is like an alien from another world.
Are all the people ruthless like them, or is she just too weak?

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 15 The Last Spark → 15-6 The First Birth (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
How did the operation go?
Lamia cannot remember.
All she knew was the medical department was swamped with people. Even Lustrous, who she had not seen for a long time, was there.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 15 The Last Spark → 15-6 The First Birth (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
There is a giant water tank in the medical department.
One side of the tank is made from transparent tempered glass. Researchers stand outside the tank, while Lamia looks at them anxiously from within.
[Medical Director]: Start the pressurization. Let\'s begin with 100 times the atmospheric pressure, approximately the pressure at a depth of around 1 km in the ocean.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 15 The Last Spark → 15-7 Weigh Anchor (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After the admin and logistics departments had their food supply cut off, it\'s the medical department\'s turn.
After finishing their last meal, all medical staff gather to the edge of the base. There is an exit that goes directly to the outer sea.
It\'s raining outside. The sky is dark and gloomy, just like the future that mankind is about to face.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 15 The Last Spark → 15-8 Another Journey (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
She is in the sea, but her body keeps sinking.
Lamia thinks she is crying, but she cannot tell whether the tears come from the pain that the red-haired Construct left, or from her inner heart.
Why did I forget it all? Since when did I abandon everything in the past? Why did I end up like this, living in the world like a mindless zombie?

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 16 Evernight Beat → Preparation Behind the Scenes (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A week before the battle of the Pulia Forest Park ruins took place.
A wanderer walks among the ruins of the city.
In front of them is a city that has long since fallen into the hands of another ruler. Hetero-Creatures are seen here and there in the ruins, twitching and hissing from time to time.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 16 Evernight Beat → Clearing the Stage (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Roland was watching nearby a few times when Gabriel developed Hetero-Creatures.
He\'ll never forget how those creatures came out from the slimy eggs.
They were squirming and twisting and looked absolutely disgusting.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 16 Evernight Beat → Clearing the Stage (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Roland]: Clean-up complete!
The last Corrupted stops moving under his chain blade. Roland spins his shotgun and looks out into the distance.
His comms rings.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 16 Evernight Beat → The Show Starts (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: No... don\'t kill me, please! I have no choice...
With mud on his face, the refugee cowers in terror in the corner, watching the dark shadows gradually approaching him.
Three armed Scavengers stand in a circle and point their weapons at him.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 16 Evernight Beat → Shadows in the Forest (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
How long will it take until mankind completely disappears from the face of the Earth, and nature reclaims the cities?
During the prosperous Golden Age, people who kept progressing forward were no longer satisfied with dazzling new things and cutting-edge technology. While many were fascinated by reaching the stars, some people imagined a world without humans.
This post-apocalyptic fantasy had always been a popular topic for readers.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 16 Evernight Beat → Shadows in the Forest (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Zack]: (Panting)
[Beardy]: Did... Did we lose them?
[Kordes]: Looks like it... I don\'t see any behind us.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 16 Evernight Beat → Central Purification Filter (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Having made their way into the exposed ventilation duct, the Scavengers are crawling slowly inside the narrow and dark space.
After following Rolmo around and around for the umpteenth time, they finally find their way out of the ventilation duct.
Flickers of daylight shine through the dome. It\'s the only source of light inside this giant tower.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 16 Evernight Beat → Hyperplasia (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Beardy]: Still in operation?! What?! But hasn\'t this place been abandoned for ages?
[Zack]: I thought I saw a red light on top of the tower, which means it\'s in operation, but I couldn\'t see it clearly with all the fog from the forest. I thought it was just my imagination.
[Zack]: But I\'m almost positive this tower is still in operation.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 16 Evernight Beat → Hyperplasia (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The airtight valve is tightened under the joint force of the four people. The Scavengers sit in the compartment at the periphery of the tower, gasping for air.
The swarm of Hetero-Creatures is barricaded on the other side of the door. They appear to be safe for now.
But this doesn\'t mean that the Hetero-Plants will stop their assault any time soon. They hear a loud crashing against the door like a drum from Hell. Small vines whittle their way through a crack in the door, continuously deforming as if trying to use their own volume to pry open the door.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 16 Evernight Beat → Corruption (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
There is a slight gust of wind from the elevator shaft.
The steel frame creaks with the tension of the chain blade as a figure in the gray cloak slowly descends from above.
In one fluid motion, the figure gracefully lands on his feet without producing even the faintest of sounds. If there is stage and a spotlight, he must be the acrobat garnering all the attention of the crowd.

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 16 Evernight Beat → Movement (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Beardy]: Looks like... this place... should be okay...
[Kordes]: I wonder if Rolmo\'s alright...
[Beardy]: I don\'t think anyone could survive falling from that height...

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 16 Evernight Beat → Center of the Show... Or Not? (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Zack]: We made it.
Nearly at their limits, the Scavengers stand in front of the doorway. A dusty nameplate with the words "Central Control Room" written on it hangs on the open door.
[Beardy]: Is this what we\'re looking for?

Title: Main Story (Hidden) - 16 Evernight Beat → The Last Serum (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Roland]: Phew...
Roland stands by the hole which has been tightly blocked by a collapsed cement block and pats his hands as if he has just completed a warm-up exercise.
[Cinderelik]: Why\'d you let them go?

Title: Floating Record - ER00 Reveries with a Whale → ER00-1 Reasonable Nonsense (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Storytellers always say, do the right thing and go the right way.
What comes around goes around. The only thing that is constant is change.
One sunny day, the peaceful street is disturbed by some unpleasant noises.

Title: Floating Record - ER00 Reveries with a Whale → ER00-1 Reasonable Nonsense (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Demon Bane]: Ahem... Dammit.
[Demon Bane]: Whoever dares mess with Gung-hoers shall pay a heavy price!
[Pulao]: Well said, but why do you keep moving back?

Title: Floating Record - ER00 Reveries with a Whale → ER00-2 The Celestial Being (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Pulao walks out of the martial arts club. The hum of machines from afar is ringing ever louder. The town\'s projector is playing interviews about the leader intermittently. Many towering buildings under construction are shooting toward the sky as if they want to connect the ground and the universe.
Busy workers and machines circle the buildings like bees, making themselves the rivets that underpin the prosperity of this country.
Pulao packs her bag and follows the path in her memory into the thin mist covering the city wall.

Title: Floating Record - ER00 Reveries with a Whale → ER00-2 The Celestial Being (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The jagged mountain path is strewn with damaged stone statues. Time has not yet stripped them of the aroma of incense etched inside.
When she calms her mind to listen, there are still faint sounds of bells and chanting from long ago.
Trekking further in the chorus of birds and beasts, the greenery climbing up the stone statues gradually drowns the mountain path, leaving only the indistinguishable tracks left by animals.

Title: Floating Record - ER00 Reveries with a Whale → ER00-3 Please "Like" Me (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Pulao]: Hmm, I knew it wouldn\'t be easy to find Mr. Big Fish.
Pulao gets off the mountain from the east. With her arms crossed and eyes closed, she mumbles to herself.
[Pulao]: And I knew I would probably encounter some obstacles the moment I get off the mountain.

Title: Floating Record - ER00 Reveries with a Whale → ER00-3 Please "Like" Me (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Tour Guide]: That was close. Polar... pandas are dangerous.
Pulao manages to calm the "pandas" down. After they leave, the tour guide collapses to the ground. His suit has dirt on it, but he does not have time to clean it.
[Pulao]: Mr. Guide, you can use my handkerchief if you don\'t mind.

Title: Floating Record - ER00 Reveries with a Whale → ER00-4 An Insurmountable Ridge (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: Have you heard of the news?
[???]: Of course. Everybody\'s been talking about it lately, because she was asking everywhere. It\'s been so many years, who would have thought that someone would still want to look for the Big Fish?
[???]: I heard it\'s a little girl this time.

Title: Floating Record - ER00 Reveries with a Whale → ER00-4 An Insurmountable Ridge (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Pulao]: Alright, can you tell me why you suddenly came out and took my sword?
[Simpie]: Are you willing to listen?
[Pulao]: Of course. We don\'t even know each other. There must be a reason behind this.

Title: Floating Record - ER00 Reveries with a Whale → ER00-5 Fireworks (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Simpie]: Can we have another pork knuckle please?
[Pulao]: No need! There are already so many dishes, and we haven\'t finished them!
[Simpie]: Don\'t worry, just eat. You\'re still growing. One pot of osmanthus wine please!

Title: Floating Record - ER00 Reveries with a Whale → ER00-5 Fireworks (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Old Man]: What a fantastic performance.
[Pulao]: You\'re here too!
As Pulao walks off the stage, she sees the old man selling her the prune drink earlier in the day. His eyes are half-closed, gazing at the city in the night.

Title: Floating Record - ER00 Reveries with a Whale → ER00-6 Reunion (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Pulao]: "After getting off the ship, walk to the north, and you\'ll see the Big Fish."
[Pulao]: Up north, down south... Alright, I\'ll take the upper route.
The time passes so fast that Pulao could not even remember the outline of the ship before arriving at the destination.

Title: Floating Record - ER00 Reveries with a Whale → ER00-7 Homecoming (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Pulao]: But I promised to not use your tear.
[Pulao]: Where there is a will, there is a way.
[Pulao]: As long as I keep seeking, there must be another solution.

Title: Floating Record - ER00 Reveries with a Whale → ER00-7 Homecoming (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Pulao]: Celestial! I am back with the tear of Mr. Big Fish!
[Celestial!]: It\'s good that you got the tear. But why did you also bring back so many toys and snacks... gulp.
[Pulao]: Um... Because I met Mr. Guide at the bottom of the mountain. I mean, he used to be a tour guide, but is running a shop now.

Title: Floating Record - ER00 Reveries with a Whale → ER00-8 Comeback (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
It is easier to climb up a mountain than to climb down. But Pulao\'s journey home is a lot easier than when she first set off.
Mountains, rivers, foggy city walls, towering buildings, everything she saw when she set out flies past before her eyes.
Finally, she has returned to the small, dated martial arts club deep in the alley.

Title: Floating Record - ER00 Reveries with a Whale → ER00-9 Vox From Afar (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The short contest—maybe "performance" is a better description—quickly comes to an end. Pulao stands in the center alone, surrounded by the moaning of Gung-hoers.
[MC Solar]: Ouch... Bro, no, sis, we\'re sorry. Please stop beating us.
[MC Solar]: We just want to make a living.

Title: Floating Record - ER00 Reveries with a Whale → ER00-10 Early Spring (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Pulao]: Ahhhhhhh!
The singing of whale is so loud that it makes Pulao roll to the ground.
The hard floor helps Pulao to wake up. She holds on to the cabinet, finally reaching the whale-shaped alarm clock.

Title: Floating Record - ER01 The Ark Beyond → ER01-1 Childhood (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The data stream quickly flows across the screen, the ever-changing numbers indicating progression.
Hundreds of large computers sit squarely in a dark room, humming in silence as they operate, each of their ports flashing a dim blue glow.
This room is a cold, calculating brain, the flickering light indicating that "it" has started "thinking."

Title: Floating Record - ER01 The Ark Beyond → ER01-2 Revelation (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[MPA-01]: Hello.
[MPA-01]: Nice to meet you.
The only light in the room shines from above, illuminating the girl sitting in the center.

Title: Floating Record - ER01 The Ark Beyond → ER01-3 Second Birth (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
This is the first time it sees the world from a whole new perspective.
Sounds of explosions are coming from all around it, shaking the room it is in. Cables are snapping from the chaos as densely packed giant computers fall one after another, shutting down after their brief hums stop.
Those grey, broken machines were once part of "it."

Title: Floating Record - ER01 The Ark Beyond → ER01-3 Second Birth (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The moment Haicma steps out the front door, intense heat and an earsplitting boom push her from behind.
In the blink of an eye, the lab collapses into a sea of flame buried under its fallen walls.
The shockwave from the explosion has seemingly impacted her core, causing a brief disruption to her neural circuit. For a second, she feels like she is being torn apart, barely managing to hold onto her personality.

Title: Floating Record - ER01 The Ark Beyond → ER01-4 Search of Despair (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Haicma]: This is her last known location...
Three days have passed by the time Haicma arrives at the coordinates in her memory drive. Not only is she delayed by the long distance and the Corrupted—
But she has also had to face humanity\'s indiscriminating hostility after the unknown virus outbreak.

Title: Floating Record - ER01 The Ark Beyond → ER01-5 Awakening (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Haicma has turned off all her external sensors in sleep mode as if she has sunken into a dark pond.
All of her mobility and feedback units are offline, and the only thing that is still running is her linear neural circuit. Unlike a human\'s dream, a machine can still stay "awake" in this state.
Why did she save the girl? Only now, as her processor cannot support elaborate data analysis and logical calculations, does she begin to ponder this question.

Title: Floating Record - ER01 The Ark Beyond → ER01-5 Awakening (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
She cannot find any signs of the human with the instructions the mechanoid has provided. It appears that the person has left this place a long time ago, so long that any tracks have faded from the wind over time.
She notices a lot of graffiti on her way. Scattered randomly all over the city, they can be found on walls, shop windows, doors, and even traffic lights seven meters from the ground.
Led by an unspeakable and unignorable "familiarity," she follows the graffiti and searches.

Title: Floating Record - ER01 The Ark Beyond → ER01-6 Offerings for the "Sage" (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Haicma walks alone for a very long time.
Graffiti and murals pepper her way. She stops to record and analyze each of them.
Some of them are simply expressing emotions.

Title: Floating Record - ER01 The Ark Beyond → ER01-6 Offerings for the "Sage" (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The delivery droid belonged to a new line of sustainable delivery mechanoids from a logistics company, but the Punishing Virus had spread to their location before they were launched.
It was abandoned deep within a warehouse until some humans broke in, looking for supplies and waking it up.
It retained its original command, even when there were no more humans requesting its service. Still, it continued to drag its human-battered body around the city, looking for things it could deliver.

Title: Floating Record - ER01 The Ark Beyond → ER01-7 Solo Journey (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Female Researcher]: MPA-01, please pull up the observation report on subject MPL-00.
[MPA-01]: Understood.
[MPA-01]: Opening records on the machine consciousness experiment. Opening behavior account of subject: Nanami.

Title: Floating Record - ER01 The Ark Beyond → ER01-8 Chariot (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Turned and pushed by these gears, she steps into the snow-covered Arctic.
For her one remaining duty, she has recorded countless wandering days and nights.
—Until a fellow machine who is searching for guidance appears before her.

Title: Floating Record - ER01 The Ark Beyond → ER01-8 Chariot (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Chariot]: Exceptionally powerful unit detected. Victory unattainable.
[Chariot]: Who are you?
[Haicma]: A mechanoid who\'s searching for "Sage\'s" trail.

Title: Floating Record - ER01 The Ark Beyond → ER01-9 Church of Machina (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Walking in a well-lit corridor, Haicma contemplates what "Mother" said.
—These awakened machines have more or less been enlightened by Sage.
As how she was first guided by Nanami, she is now guiding other mechanoids.

Title: Floating Record - ER01 The Ark Beyond → ER01-10 Scarlet Threat (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
With a sharp and heavy thud, the thick door to the hall opens, letting a hint of light inside the dark chamber. Hurried footsteps follow.
[???]: Who... who\'s... here...
As metal clashes with the stone floor, everything returns to silence.

Title: Floating Record - ER01 The Ark Beyond → ER01-10 Scarlet Threat (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After saving the data collected, Haicma\'s mission is over for now.
Arriving where they planned, Haicma calculates the time it will take for Spooner to get there—she has accidentally come into contact with a small amount of Red Tide. Luckily, there is no noticeable sign of infection yet.
Haicma closes her eyes.

Title: Floating Record - ER01 The Ark Beyond → ER01-11 Dusty Starship (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Arcana sits at the highest seat in the Church of Machina, her body illuminated by lights reflecting from the glass, which grants her a sense of aloofness.
Most of the key members of the Church of Machina have gathered here. After receiving data on the Red Tide from Haicma and Spooner, the simmering uneasiness on the Church of Machina\'s tail grows increasingly pressing.
After a brief silence, Trailblazer speaks.

Title: Floating Record - ER01 The Ark Beyond → ER01-12 Mechanoids' Choice (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Haicma]: The frigate has successfully crossed the stratosphere... We\'ve reached the required height. Beginning stealth approach toward Babylonia.
Reporting the status of the frigate, Haicma sees the lone, glistening star that shares a night sky with Earth—Babylonia, the target of the Church of Machina.
[(Comms)]: It\'s your dear Zavier speaking. How are the optical camouflage and radiation damper I added to the old girl holding up?

Title: Floating Record - ER01 The Ark Beyond → ER01-12 Mechanoids' Choice (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Haicma stands silently inside the turbulent data center. Even if it is only one of Gestalt\'s many data hubs, it is still far more complicated than every book and every file Haicma has read combined.
If possible, she is more than happy to stay here forever, going through all the recorded data. But she has a more important mission right now, so she immediately begins her search.
Watching the massive data streams, Haicma is once again in awe of how powerful the super AI Gestalt is—but even Gestalt was created by humans, who the Church of Machina regards as worthless.

Title: Floating Record - ER01 The Ark Beyond → ER01-13 Toward the Light (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Without the researchers hard at work, the Science Council Second Department laboratory appears emptier than usual, which makes the two female figures inside all the more out of place.
The slightly older woman nods and smiles, placing her hand on the desk, and the queen of the night projected above slowly dissipates.
[Ishmael]: Is that what you want...

Title: Floating Record - ER01 The Ark Beyond → ER01-13 Toward the Light (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Trailblazer has never thought that he could be subdued. His frame and his armaments should be superior to his opponent statistically.
But the attacks that hit the first time have been dodged and riposted by Nanami at unexpected and unbelievable angles subsequently—there are no tactical circuits that can provide solutions like that.
[Trailblazer]: How...?!

Title: Floating Record - ER01 The Ark Beyond → ER01-14 Back on the Road (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Haicma wishes she could play the never-ending game of questions with Nanami once again as they did in that small room.
But she also knows that this Nanami is no longer the Nanami from the past... and Haicma herself is not who she once was either.
Now, Haicma is the Church of Machina\'s "Hermit"... and Nanami is the ultimate purpose they seek.

Title: Floating Record - ER02 Cinder Burns → ER02-01 Withered Grass (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: I remember my own death.
[???]: I was given by many when I was alive, and I gave the future my all. I loved them, and I was loved by them, too.
[???]: I will be reborn as something else and come back to them—like wild grass.

Title: Floating Record - ER02 Cinder Burns → ER02-02 Glass Cradle (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
With the color of the night grown heavy, the base sees its inhabitants finishing work and readying themselves for bedtime one after another.
Taking advantage of the quiet hours, the young man tiptoes his way to a table and sits down. He sees a piece of paper left by the girl that carries her soft-written words.
[Young Man A]: ...

Title: Floating Record - ER02 Cinder Burns → ER02-03 Lost at Night (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
It\'s a day like any other—or at least it was supposed to be.
The boy has been reading in the storage room late into the night, yet he\'s still yet to hear the familiar knocks coming down the ventilation duct.
Seeing that it now reads 4:00 am on his device and feeling helplessly edgy, the boy decides to crawl out of the ventilation duct and tiptoes his way back home.

Title: Floating Record - ER02 Cinder Burns → ER02-04 Muscle Memory (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Realizing that none of this is purely coincidental, the young man spends a good ten minutes trying to find out if Lillian saw anyone when she picked up the toy.
[Lillian]: Look, I\'ve said this already... It was just out there, and I thought it belonged to one of the kids around. I was going to fix it and just leave it here, but you can totally have it if you think it\'s yours.
[Lillian]: But for what it\'s worth, don\'t you think you\'re a little too... old for a toy like this?

Title: Floating Record - ER02 Cinder Burns → ER02-04 Muscle Memory (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
It seems like a piece of memory buried deep inside his body.
He is no stranger to the structurally unconventional Rev Blade and the relatively simple stiletto.
The clouded street, the clanking of metal, and the gunpowder that shoots straight up the nose...

Title: Floating Record - ER02 Cinder Burns → ER02-05 Pandora's Box (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The three rush toward Medical Center 09 with the only survivor.
[Construct Soldier 1]: What happened? Who\'s this?
[Talbot]: I came across a squad that had been assaulted, and most of them were dead by the time I got there.

Title: Floating Record - ER02 Cinder Burns → ER02-06 Deaths of the Innocent (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
And so time goes on, with two years passing by.
By the time the boy has turned 13, the Commoner Carriage has grown so crowded it\'s unlivable.
Bumblebee has taken in so many newcomers over the years—that even with all the outsourced work ACA has taken up, they still find work in short supply. The competition for work has never been so fierce—while their wages hit rock bottom again and again.

Title: Floating Record - ER02 Cinder Burns → ER02-07 Incomplete Confession (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Snow was coming down hard that day, as he remembers it.
Disconnected by the fires of war, the train has come to a stop and fallen silent in the snow.
He has stains of Rachel\'s blood on his hand. They\'re lukewarm at best—yet he\'s feeling a burning sensation coming from them.

Title: Floating Record - ER02 Cinder Burns → ER02-08 Choice of the Death Fire (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: ...Haha, look who\'s back...
Coming back to the car, the boy can hear the rain drumming away hard and fast up on the roof.
With people\'s words cutting at his soul, into the crowd he drifts, exuding a gloomy air soaked with rainwater.

Title: Floating Record - ER02 Cinder Burns → ER02-09 The Beggar and the Giver (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Field]: That\'s great, Noan!
Hearing about what just happened, Field feels genuinely happy for Noan.
[Noan]: What are you gonna do, though?

Title: Floating Record - ER02 Cinder Burns → ER02-10 Farewell of the Shadow (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Field]: Hey, Noan.
[Noan]: Did your dad leave?
[Field]: Right.

Title: Floating Record - ER02 Cinder Burns → ER02-11 Awakened Memory (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The search teams have looked through every corner in the lower-level car but haven\'t found anything.
It isn\'t until two in the morning the next day that Noan comes across a thread that seems as though it came off Field\'s scarf around the entrance to the ventilation duct in Storage 54 of Carriage G.
When people get into the storage and check the security footage, they notice that there is a range of areas the security camera fails to capture—because the camera is unable to turn properly with all the dust stuck at its rotating shaft.

Title: Floating Record - ER02 Cinder Burns → ER02-12 Plausibility (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The battle has been going on for three hours, and individual Corrupted and Hetero-Creatures are still shambling toward Medical Center 09.
The defenses are all damaged, the corpses of Corrupted filling every street and alley. The Punishing Virus concentration has gone from bad to worse.
Adding fuel to the flame, the streets outside the medical center have cracked apart. Red Tide oozes out, obstructing the ways in and out.

Title: Floating Record - ER02 Cinder Burns → ER02-12 Plausibility (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The dark sky, crimson phantoms, and the blood river form a picture of the inferno.
Their whispers are filled with hatred, protesting about the young man who is rushing by.
[Red Tide Projection]: You could have saved us.

Title: Floating Record - ER02 Cinder Burns → ER02-13 Passerby (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Winter. The first encounter between Bella and the 17-year-old Noan—
Noan has witnessed the conflicts within Asslam slowly come to a boiling point during the years he has served on the Cargo Crew, a festering wound that tests the boundaries of the people and the law.
To stand a chance against the guards from the upper level, Rachel has finally found several weapon suppliers who are willing to work with her after a long period of searching and hard work.

Title: Floating Record - ER02 Cinder Burns → ER02-14 His Whisper (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Noan]: Bella Bethe...
Noan was trying to get help from a base that day like he is now, but...
[Bella Bethe]: Further involvement will only put this base at risk. Selling you guys weapons is as far as we go.

Title: Floating Record - ER02 Cinder Burns → ER02-14 His Whisper (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Construct Soldier 1]: An Ascendant?!
The retreated Constructs\' reinforcements have finally arrived.
[Construct Soldier 2]: Were you responsible for the attack on our base as well?!

Title: Floating Record - ER02 Cinder Burns → ER02-15 Books as Firewood (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The moment Noan holds Lithos\' hands, the floodgate holding back his memories instantly collapses.
Old memories and new confusions interweave, entangled as they tug at each other, forming a disorderly spiral.
[Rachel]: ...Ha. I\'m indeed... Ashlar\'s people... He was right.

Title: Floating Record - ER02 Cinder Burns → ER02-16 Wildfire of Life (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
8:41 AM
There is a commotion on the lower level. Noan flips open the vent cover to find over thirty upper-level guards charging into the Commoner Carriage and blocking the narrow passageways, causing many to groan and complain.
[Noan]: (What\'s happening...)

Title: Floating Record - ER02 Cinder Burns → ER02-17 Mistaking a Deer for a Horse (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The snow has covered up the scarred earth by afternoon. Only a bloody figure can be seen inside this barren land, running above the upper-level carriage.
Mike, the heavily wounded Niino, and most of the civilians are staying on the lower level. To find out the fate of Rachel and the Cargo Crew, Noan travels five kilometers of snowfield alone, returning to the upper level.
No amount of snow can cover the blood and bodies here. At last, Noan finally finds the person he has been looking for.

Title: Floating Record - ER02 Cinder Burns → ER02-18 Dead End by Nightfall (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Snow is coming down hard where the memory ends.
Right before his mind melts into the snowfield and turns blank... Noan has a dream.
In that dream, he is the only person who dies, lying alone in the snow. Everyone else is safe and sound, living aboard Asslam.

Title: Floating Record - ER02 Cinder Burns → ER02-18 Dead End by Nightfall (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The young man departs alone, leaving the road paved with the Red Tide and crimson vital fluid behind.
A chilling breeze carries quiet sobbing from a distant alleyway, whispering the tragic tales of the survivors.
...It will not be long before the Red Tide floods this place.

Title: Floating Record - ER02 Cinder Burns → ER02-19 Melting Away (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Lithos\' interference has sent Noan back into the void between torment and rebirth.
He enters a very long dream, so long that it encompasses his whole life.
But that is only an instant in the river of time, lasting but 21 years in an age that does not seem to end.

Title: Floating Record - ER02 Cinder Burns → ER02-20 Firefly (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
When the sprouts begin to cover the wilderness as spring arrives, Bella finally finds the news she has been searching for before they are about to reach City 074.
[Conservation Area Staff 1]: I\'ve seen that person before.
[Bella]: Really?!

Title: Floating Record - ER02 Cinder Burns → ER02-21 Breaking Free (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
It is the afternoon of the following day when Bella enters Base South-3.
Noan is looking down at the manga in his hands, reading silently. The only thing different from before is that he is using a pear blossom as the bookmark.
[Bella]: I thought you were taking a walk. You went to pick flowers?

Title: Floating Record - ER02 Cinder Burns → ER02-22 Old Dream Inscription (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Noan]: ...Yeah... Goodbye...
[Noan]: But this time, "goodbye" isn\'t just a farewell. It is proof that all of you were once by my side.
[Noan]: Even now, I cannot let go of my past regrets and make peace with my powerlessness.

Title: Floating Record - ER02 Cinder Burns → ER02-23 Cinder Burns (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
—15 minutes later.
[Noan]: ...Aargh.
It takes Noan all his strength to move his heavily-wounded body and grabs onto the fence of the dock.

Title: Floating Record - ER03 Left Unsaid → ER03-01 Agonizing Phantoms (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
There was a door.
A door appeared in the darkness.
I remember when the door was shut. It made a loud noise.

Title: Floating Record - ER03 Left Unsaid → ER03-02 Unresolved Problems (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Three hours ago.
[Rebecca]: So relaxing. You must be ready for retirement.
Rebecca slams a folder of documents on the tea table, causing the cups on top to tremble.

Title: Floating Record - ER03 Left Unsaid → ER03-04 Echoes of Yesterday (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
With the enemies out of the way, a retro-looking building can be seen at the end of a forest path.
Intricate tiles adorn the period stonework, framing the unique tall spire without making it unapproachable. Dark green and brown, a popular color combination during the Golden Age, cover the exterior.
Despite the building eventually being owned by Kurono as a shelter, it is apparent that the architect intended it to be a cozy resort.

Title: Floating Record - ER03 Left Unsaid → ER03-07 Sunken Consciousness (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bambinata]: Hmm... Mistress?
Bambinata opens her eyes, but Vanessa is not around her as expected.
There is no record of the room she is in or how she traveled here in her memory data.

Title: Floating Record - ER03 Left Unsaid → ER03-08 Time to Game (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Strange Construct]: Growl—
[Vera]: Let me get this straight—dollface just terminated a deep M.I.N.D. connection before running off without you?
The redhead Construct strikes like a burning blade, cutting down her enemies without hesitation. She even has time to inquire how Vanessa and Bambinata separated between moments of fighting.

Title: Floating Record - ER03 Left Unsaid → ER03-08 Time to Game (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Vera]: Let\'s not waste any time. We\'ll start with the room on the left.
[Vanessa]: ...Let\'s go.
Vanessa turns her gaze away from a corner of the room. Vera can glance from the corner of her eyes that Vanessa is still obsessed with the ballet shoes they found.

Title: Floating Record - ER03 Left Unsaid → ER03-09 Figure in the Mirror (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
It has been a very long time since an external force stirred up these forgotten waters.
Fragments of memories have been abandoned in this place, but there has never been a way to connect them.
These hidden pearls in the ocean depths can finally be retrieved by their owner because of a coincidental encounter.

Title: Floating Record - ER03 Left Unsaid → ER03-10 Gate (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Despite discovering the path to the underground facility, Vanessa and Vera cannot guarantee that Bambinata will be there. Just to be safe, they are still checking every room on their way, searching for any sign of her.
The sensation of loss overwhelms Vanessa once again.
She cannot believe how quickly another "puppet" is missing after Teasell. She knows that Bambinata will not follow Teasell\'s path, but the anxiety that has built up inside her has reached a fever pitch.

Title: Floating Record - ER03 Left Unsaid → ER03-13 Words Left in Dream (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Mother]: Will... not... allow...
The large caretaker mechanoid falls down, the last trace of her discontent dissipating in the dark basement as her digital voice turns silent.
Finally defeating the enemy, Bambinata loses the will to hold on. Only then does Vanessa realize that her frame is heavily damaged. She should have avoided fighting in a way that further damaged her body when she could.

Title: Floating Record - ER04 The Floating Reverie → ER04-1 Her Shape (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Even amidst the teeming crowd, the drumstick and dual clappers in the storyteller\'s hands stand out with startling clarity.
[??]: Would you like a cup of tea?
Nestled against a gray tile wall, the stall beckons with its warmly lit lantern. The light, a blend of soft yellow and vibrant red, illuminates a big word written on it—"Tea."

Title: Floating Record - ER04 The Floating Reverie → ER04-2 Her Name (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Every member of the Church of Machina has their own dedicated room.
For example, Haicma\'s room is relatively simple, yet filled with all kinds of manga books. On the other hand, Cervantes\' room is cluttered with a plethora of art tools, which are covered in dust due to the long absence of their owner.
However, among all the members, Zavier has the biggest room...

Title: Floating Record - ER04 The Floating Reverie → ER04-3 Another "Home" (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Zavier]: Tell me, what flavor of engine oil would you typically prefer in Kowloong?
[Hanying]: Engine oil? No, we usually don\'t drink that. It\'s either some other drinks or tea...
[Zavier]: I see. Lift your left hand... Tea? What tea?

Title: Floating Record - ER04 The Floating Reverie → ER04-4 The Children (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The ocean mist leaves streaks of moisture on Trailblazer\'s streamlined body. Falling off Trailblazer\'s rear wings, tiny droplets evaporate as they hit the heated air, turning them once again back into the endless mist.
The only specks of lights visible on this vast ocean are the bright amber light on Trailblazer\'s chest and the flickering navigation lights on the transport container.
[Trailblazer]: We are arriving at our target coordinates. Can you see it?

Title: Floating Record - ER04 The Floating Reverie → ER04-4 The Children (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
As Hanying dances through the air, the aggressive mechanoid is sent spiraling into the debris behind it in a cloud of smoke. With it, a striking silence ensues.
Realizing that they stand no chance, the mechanoids scatter in the bat of an eye, leaving not a shred of shadow behind.
[Scavenger Leader]: Those dammed machines... Cough, cough...

Title: Floating Record - ER04 The Floating Reverie → ER04-5 Mark of Time (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Hanying]: ...But why?
[Hanying]: Is he still alive?
[Chaofeng]: The leader at the time... Villier... wanted him alive.

Title: Floating Record - ER04 The Floating Reverie → ER04-6 Indulge in the Cup (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The elevator shudders occasionally as it slowly climbs upward, but the lantern remains perfectly still. Chaofeng\'s arm is absorbing all the vibrations from the ground.
Hanying seems to have fallen into the veil of silence found at the deepest dark corners of the ship.
"Time has yet to leave its heart-wrenching mark on you."

Title: Floating Record - ER04 The Floating Reverie → ER04-7 The Creators (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Six hours have passed since Hanying met up with Spooner on the outskirts of the port. They have just arrived at the coordinates given by The Cradle.
[Spooner]: ...How on earth did they manage to build a path on the side of a cliff?
[Spooner]: No sign of metals. A complex structure made entirely of wood. Incredible.

Title: Floating Record - ER04 The Floating Reverie → ER04-7 The Creators (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Spooner]: I suppose this is a warm welcome for us, then?
Spooner punches through half of the face of the ominous stone lion. The passage falls quiet once more.
[Spooner]: These mechanoids are quite old and severely weathered. Some even have moss growing on them.

Title: Floating Record - ER04 The Floating Reverie → ER04-8 Close at Hand (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
["Guardian I"]: Kaw, kaw... kaw, kaw, kaw... Cough, cough...
["Guardian I"]: Cough, cough... Cough, cough...
A battered Guardian staggers toward Pulao. Its long blade, meant for slashing enemies, has become a walking stick.

Title: Floating Record - ER04 The Floating Reverie → ER04-8 Close at Hand (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
~May the heavens stand unchanging.~
[Pulao]: Three o\'clock—up the rock face!
[Pulao]: They\'re closing in!

Title: Floating Record - ER04 The Floating Reverie → ER04-9 Question and Answer (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Spooner]: We\'re here again.
[Spooner]: We\'re just going around in circles.
Spooner crushes the pebble he placed on the eaves himself two hours ago.

Title: Floating Record - ER04 The Floating Reverie → ER04-10 The Weaver (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The sound of a bell continues to linger in the mountain valleys. The previously faint and muffled chimes have now become distinct, possibly because the two have passed the halfway point of the mountain.
[Hanying]: This... is the fourth time.
The sky begins to darken. The vegetation thriving at the foothills gradually turns from a lush green to a subdued gray-yellow as they ascend.

Title: Floating Record - ER04 The Floating Reverie → ER04-11 A Poem of Machines (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Pinky swear... pinky swear...
Hanying and Yoyo swear... A promise made, a promise kept... A promise of a hundred years...
...

Title: Floating Record - ER04 The Floating Reverie → ER04-12 Life and Death (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Just below the wooden deck along the rock face is a clutter of murky clouds.
The setting sun dips into the mountain—a mere blink, and it will vanish.
[Mi Ku]: For the one who seeks the mountain, their gaze is filled with nothing but the winding path, the steps adorned with moss, and the unconquered ridge.

Title: Floating Record - ER04 The Floating Reverie → ER04-13 Make it Louder (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The blaring tolls of the bell shake the mountain at its core, threatening to shatter the slopes at any moment, sending boulders tumbling down.
No longer the melodious chimes they were at the beginning, the rhythmic blares now carry with them wrath and madness.
Hanying is on a narrow, perilous trail carved between two rock walls, which only amplify the deathly knells. Even the layer of thin ice growing on the slabs is in danger of being blasted off.

Title: Floating Record - ER04 The Floating Reverie → ER04-13 Make it Louder (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
How does one describe the wind?
That which carries the fallen leaf and that which ripples the water.
But it might not be the wind that carries the fallen leaf or rippled the water.

Title: Floating Record - ER04 The Floating Reverie → ER04-14 Our Home (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Oh, dream as light as dawn, the great hall of our homeland is reserved for you.
Our homeland is one with hell.
Our homeland is the answer to the suffering we endure upon our bodies.

Title: Floating Record - ER04 The Floating Reverie → ER04-15 A Name Lost in Hell (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: Is this really a good idea?
[???]: Some problems we must solve with force.
[???]: But they didn\'t do anything wrong! They\'re innocent!

Title: Floating Record - ER04 The Floating Reverie → ER04-16 Welcome Back (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Pulao]: Leave this one here, and take this box here with you.
[Gear]: Is this... a spare part?
[Pulao]: Right, and this set of outfits that Hanying usually keeps handy...

Title: Floating Record - ER04 The Floating Reverie → ER04-17 After the Curtains Fall (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A few days later, at the Church of Machina.
[Zavier]: Boy, that\'s a shame...
[Zavier]: We could have totally fixed your friend and restored his memory model if we used the technology by the same humanoid-hybrid as you.

Title: Floating Record - ER05 Sands of Wrath → ER05-1 Dusty Memories (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Heavy breaths pump air into the frame, bringing the heavy odor of Construct vital fluid into the sensor of smell.
For Constructs, breathing is not a necessary activity. But right now, it is these remaining human instincts that are still holding him up.
He pushes himself up with his remaining right arm, stumbling toward the cliff\'s edge, where the person he must kill awaits.

Title: Floating Record - ER05 Sands of Wrath → ER05-2 Returning a Favor (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Noctis]: "New Oakley"...
As Noctis continues walking, he unfolds the note that Murray gave him earlier, revealing a place name that he has never heard of.
[Noctis]: If he\'s still alive...

Title: Floating Record - ER05 Sands of Wrath → ER05-3 Dancing with Hounds (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: Hmph. Am I really going to be stuck with you two?
The red-haired man smiles, showing his fangs like a vicious dog.
[???]: What\'d you two do to land yourselves here?

Title: Floating Record - ER05 Sands of Wrath → ER05-3 Dancing with Hounds (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Noctis]: Where am I...?
