Noctis slowly opens his eyes. He gets really confused by the sky that seems extremely close, and decides to just space out.
[???]: Captain... He\'s awake.

Title: Floating Record - ER05 Sands of Wrath → ER05-4 Defector (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Noctis]: ...
Even the latest shuttle of Babylonia will still inevitably experience intense vibration when struck by sudden turbulence.
[Noctis]: ...

Title: Floating Record - ER05 Sands of Wrath → ER05-5 The Town of Outlaws (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
As the light transport vehicle speeds through the wilderness, it sends dust into the air, greatly obscuring the view.
Your proud sense of direction as a commandant is completely useless at this moment. It does not take long for you to become completely lost.
Fortunately, your perception of time has not dulled to the point of not noticing anything unusual. It\'s already getting close to dusk. Based on your speed, you should have reached your destination 30 minutes ago.

Title: Floating Record - ER05 Sands of Wrath → ER05-6 Late Night (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Noctis]: This is crazy...
Noctis leans against the window, staring at the street below. It is already late in the night, but there are still quite a few people wandering.
[Noctis]: At least 5 are watching us. The entire town would know if we ever go out.

Title: Floating Record - ER05 Sands of Wrath → ER05-7 New Blood (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Noctis]: I give up! This thing ain\'t working at all!
Frustrated, Noctis throws his terminal onto the bed and paces back and forth in front of the window.
Two of you wasted the whole morning trying to modify the terminal in order to contact Babylonia.

Title: Floating Record - ER05 Sands of Wrath → ER05-8 Buried in Sand (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Construct A]: What\'s the point of just giving this to me?!
In a decrepit camp, a Construct smashes a metal object onto the face of the other Construct.
[Construct B]: ...

Title: Floating Record - ER05 Sands of Wrath → ER05-9 Sunset and Alcohol (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Noctis]: This is weird...
The terminal suddenly emits a lot of noise. Noctis recalls that he was fiddling with it in the morning.
[Noctis]: Hello, Commandant? Can you hear me? Hope I didn\'t break it... How unlucky.

Title: Floating Record - ER05 Sands of Wrath → ER05-9 Sunset and Alcohol (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
All of a sudden, the terminal begins to emit nothing but white noise. You have no idea what happened to Noctis.
You only know his approximate location before the signals disappeared, based on the distance displayed on the terminal.
He seems to be still within the town and not far from you. However, he warned you to not leave the inn. What if it is a trap...?

Title: Floating Record - ER05 Sands of Wrath → ER05-10 Alive or Dead (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Meanwhile, at Oasis.
[Forsaken Soldier]: Our leader left with a team of our men to take care of the Hetero-Creatures that showed up, and we\'re having trouble getting hold of them because there is strong magnetic disruption where they are. How many times are you going to make me repeat that?
[Forsaken Soldier]: We already asked the instructor to come down and he\'s on the way here, but you can go ahead and tell me what you need while we wait.

Title: Floating Record - ER05 Sands of Wrath → ER05-11 Harvest Festival (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Strange Resident A]: Hey, Commandant, give me the usual thing! A glass of ice water!
This guy comes here every day and orders nothing but a glass of ice water...
You whip out a sign and put it on the bar counter—that reads, "No free ice water during the Harvest Festival."

Title: Floating Record - ER05 Sands of Wrath → ER05-11 Harvest Festival (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Daemon]: Why? Why... Stay away from me!
In a dark corner, a hand can be seen lifting Daemon off the ground against the wall.
[Noctis]: C\'mon, what\'s the matter? Thought you were quick on your feet?

Title: Floating Record - ER05 Sands of Wrath → ER05-12 Malicious Visitor (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Noctis]: For ****\'s sake...
Noctis is about to throw a punch on the bar counter—but decides against it with a quick glance at his surroundings.
[Noctis]: Just how are you even keeping your head so cool...

Title: Floating Record - ER05 Sands of Wrath → ER05-12 Malicious Visitor (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You fell out of contact with Noctis from signal disruption when he entered the deserted brewery, and you can\'t help but worry for him.
But having been assigned the job of a bartender... you know that you should probably focus on what\'s at hand here.
This bar becomes packed with people around midnight because of the Harvest Festival, and you know that you need to get yourself and the place ready before all the people come.

Title: Floating Record - ER05 Sands of Wrath → ER05-13 Golden Days (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Max]: Uhm...
On the big desk in front of Max lies an open envelope, with its letter in his hand.
[Max]: This is ridiculous...

Title: Floating Record - ER05 Sands of Wrath → ER05-14 Town in Danger (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You\'re no stranger to injuries, but you\'ve never once felt as weak as you do now.
You can still think with a clear head, but the left side of your body is quickly growing weak from the numbness spreading from your left shoulder.
If what Noctis said is true, this "poison" will gradually spread across your entire body and reach the organs, eventually stopping your heart.

Title: Floating Record - ER05 Sands of Wrath → ER05-14 Town in Danger (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Oakley]: Max...
Standing in the sea of gold is the love of Max\'s life.
[Max]: A-are you here to take me with you now...? I...

Title: Floating Record - ER05 Sands of Wrath → ER05-15 Three Evil Hounds (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Hearing the scream, Noctis wastes not a single second rushing back to the bar... except it seems too late.
Beside the table he has left the Gray Raven Commandant, two hazy figures stand in the faint light—working away at the person on the table with some sort of device.
[Noctis]: ****! Let go now!

Title: Floating Record - ER05 Sands of Wrath → ER05-16 Showdown at New Oakley (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The sharp sounds of sirens blast through the air shortly after Noctis leaves, shattering the tranquility that followed the festivities.
With it, the Inver-Device sitting on No. 21 jumps to its end as she looks at the long road out of town through squinted eyes.
[No. 21]: Something... is coming this way.

Title: Floating Record - ER05 Sands of Wrath → ER05-16 Showdown at New Oakley (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
At long last, the townspeople drove all of the Hetero-Creatures away, and the Forsaken that had tried to breach the town have all been eliminated.
Most of the buildings in town survived the attack, with only a few having been damaged.
[Strange Resident A]: I just need the tavern to still be around by the end of it... it\'s all I need to live on!

Title: Floating Record - ER05 Sands of Wrath → ER05-17 Raging Fist (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
When "New Oakley" was newly established, this warehouse was used for storing weapons—weapons that the townspeople used to fend themselves from the Corrupted and all sorts of threats, that is.
"New Oakley" only started to slowly let go of her weapons after receiving armed protection from the Forsaken...
Only to eventually find herself under threat... by none other than the Forsaken.

Title: Floating Record - ER05 Sands of Wrath → ER05-17 Raging Fist (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Noctis]: Nigel!
Without holding back, Noctis lands a punch squarely on Nigel, sending flashes of lightning through his body.
The punch sends Nigel flying. Having given that last punch his all, Noctis collapses into a kneel on the ground.

Title: Floating Record - ER05 Sands of Wrath → ER05-18 Partner (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Noctis]: So... you were saying you didn\'t find his body, huh...
[Vera]: No, and this is the only thing the townspeople found after hours of digging through the place.
Vera pulls out a pair of sunglasses that\'s snapped in half—one that Noctis knows belongs to Nigel.

Title: Floating Record - ER06 When Day Breaks → ER06-1 Fissure in the Wilderness (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Heavy-duty vehicles traverse the uneven terrain under the slanting rays of the setting sun. Roaring engines kick up thick clouds of orange sand, swirling in their wake.
In a railcar, an old radio fights its way back to life with a weak and hoarse crackle.
[Radio]: Families—bzzzz—of the Konstantin disaster survivors—must unite—bzzzz—

Title: Floating Record - ER06 When Day Breaks → ER06-2 Extra Cost (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bridget]: So this is Support Force... Oh! I\'m so sorry! Are you alright?
Bridget accidentally bumps into a female Construct carrying a big stack of documents when she takes a step back to get a better view of the expansive training grounds.
[??]: N-no, no, no. It was my bad. I\'m so sorry!

Title: Floating Record - ER06 When Day Breaks → ER06-2 Extra Cost (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
As the real-time rescue simulation system powers down, Bridget stands breathless in the training arena.
[Trojan]: —Bridget, what were you doing just now?
[Bridget]: Ma\'am! I was carrying out a rescue mission!

Title: Floating Record - ER06 When Day Breaks → ER06-3 "The Seeker" (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
On the day of Support Force recruit graduation, Babylonia\'s weather simulation system creates a brilliantly sunny day.
[Ruolin]: Bridget... Over here!
Impressed by this year\'s recruits, Support Force Captain approves limited funds for a modest graduation ceremony.

Title: Floating Record - ER06 When Day Breaks → ER06-4 Konstantin (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Support Force Captain]: All right, let\'s review Support Force mandate.
[Support Force Member]: Efficiently manage on-field demands—
[Support Force Member]: Ensure precise coordination, targeted support, and timely assistance—

Title: Floating Record - ER06 When Day Breaks → ER06-5 Scales of Life (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bridget]: There\'s someone over there!
The bullet travels much faster than the sound of the shot and grazes Hyde even though Bridget rushes in to shield him.
[Hyde]: Argh!... Ahh!

Title: Floating Record - ER06 When Day Breaks → ER06-6 Coincidence (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You\'ve been in more dangerous situations, but Bridget\'s vivid recounts of how "Trojan fell off the cliff" and how she "barely managed to hang onto the edge" still make your heart race.
[Bridget]: Yes, of course.
[Bridget]: When I regained consciousness, I was already back with Support Force.

Title: Floating Record - ER06 When Day Breaks → ER06-7 Returning to the Mine (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bridget]: All right, one last time. Recite Support Force mandate—
[Support Force Member]: Efficiently manage on-field demands, ensure precise coordination, targeted support, and timely assistance, and hold on to every spark of hope, no matter how small!
[Bridget]: Excellent! Now go—victory will always be ours!

Title: Floating Record - ER06 When Day Breaks → ER06-7 Returning to the Mine (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bridget]: Commandant, Lucia.
The deeper they venture into the mine, the weaker the signal becomes. The thick layers of earth block most radio waves, and the terminal shortwave communication channel established in a hurry produces nothing but garbled, static-filled voices.
[Bridget]: Has there been... any unusual activity?

Title: Floating Record - ER06 When Day Breaks → ER06-8 Second Collapse (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The second incident strikes sooner than anyone has expected. Shortly after the rested scouts disperse, a violent tremor rocks through the mine shaft.
Deep rumbling and the sound of falling rocks echo from the path behind, spreading through every corner of the mine.
Upon returning to the hall with the rest of the group, Bridget immediately stands out in the center of a gathered crowd. Her face is grim as she grips An Jie, whose face bears fresh scratches.

Title: Floating Record - ER06 When Day Breaks → ER06-9 Underground Tower (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Three days have passed since they lost contact with the outside world.
They\'ve gone from feeling tense to anxious, and they\'re just feeling exhausted.
Even An Jie, who was initially under suspicion, seems affected. She\'s been remarkably well-behaved for the last three days.

Title: Floating Record - ER06 When Day Breaks → ER06-10 Confusion (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
While Konstantin Mining Facility might seem mundane enough on the ground, its underground structures resemble those of a magnificent inverted tower when viewed in isolation.
Mining tunnels sprawl in all directions, nearly hollowing out the entire foundation beneath the wilderness, with all the small labs dotting the branches of these tunnels.
With easy access to raw materials, these researchers hardly ever leave their posts, completely absorbed in their work.

Title: Floating Record - ER06 When Day Breaks → ER06-10 Confusion (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
On the way back to the temporary camp, An Jie maintains her silence. Only when passing the cliff marked with broken trails of blood does she come to a halt.
[An Jie]: ...They threw my deputy off this cliff here...
[An Jie]: If you find his body while clearing the mine tunnel, please give him a proper burial for me.

Title: Floating Record - ER06 When Day Breaks → ER06-11 Double Mystery (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A poignant air now pervades the temporary camp.
Silla\'s remains have been retrieved and properly laid to rest, but the knowledge of lurking enemies keeps everyone on edge.
[Bridget]: An Jie, are you just going to stay quiet?

Title: Floating Record - ER06 When Day Breaks → ER06-12 Lost Connections (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
When the mission assignment meeting comes to an end, a figure shows up and stands in your way.
[Trojan]: Commandant, do you have a moment to talk?
As those words hang in the air, Lucia comes to a halt next to you.

Title: Floating Record - ER06 When Day Breaks → ER06-13 Alternate Solution (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Thud—
Bridget suddenly slams her fist onto the table, causing the already unstable video feed to flicker and blur for a moment.
[Bridget]: Never!

Title: Floating Record - ER06 When Day Breaks → ER06-14 Hidden Secrets (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bridget]: While some problems have been taken care of, I can\'t seem to shake the feeling that there is more down the road...
[Bridget]: Sigh. Looks like we won\'t be leaving these mines anytime soon.
[Bridget]: Pfft. Hahaha, I never thought I\'d see this side of you.

Title: Floating Record - ER06 When Day Breaks → ER06-15 Homecoming (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After thorough exploration, Bridget finally stops in front of a mining tunnel that shows less structural damage than the others.
[Bridget]: Yes, of course.
She gently taps the rocks before her with a wrench and tilts her head to listen to the resonating sound.

Title: Floating Record - ER06 When Day Breaks → ER06-16 Risky Situation (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bridget]: And last but not least—let me go over our battle plan one more time!
[Bridget]: Engineering Force will help us activate any working elevators in the mine, while Lucia and Gray Raven Commandant lead everyone to the designated location.
[Bridget]: Once you reach your position, start reinforcing the mine tunnels immediately to prevent any cave-ins. And no slacking off!

Title: Floating Record - ER06 When Day Breaks → ER06-16 Risky Situation (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The mine lies in darkness, with only the weak red lights of malfunctioning machinery blinking in the gloom.
That last hit seems to have damaged parts of Trojan\'s frame. Vital fluid leaks from her forearms and ankles and drips steadily onto the ground.
[Bridget]: Why didn\'t you go with them?

Title: Floating Record - ER06 When Day Breaks → ER06-17 The Brink of Collapse (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
With only a partial map and hazy memories to guide them, Trojan leads Bridget forward, picking their way through the dark, damp mining tunnel.
[Bridget]: So there really is a monitoring center here...
[Trojan]: Of course. Those with guilty consciences fear real demons the most.

Title: Floating Record - ER06 When Day Breaks → ER06-18 For the Honor (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The drill\'s deafening roar fills the air as muddy water seeps through the rock layers, rising to ankle level.
[Karenina]: —We\'re breaking through! Get out of the way if you can hear this in there!
A sliver of daylight pierces through the gaps between weathered rocks into the dark mine tunnel.

Title: Floating Record - ER06 When Day Breaks → ER06-19 Back Into the Depths (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Beep—beep beep beep—beep—beep beep beep—
A rhythmic buzzing pierces through Trojan\'s hazy consciousness. As she instinctively tries to move, pain surges through her body.
[Trojan]: Hnngh—hnngh—

Title: Floating Record - ER06 When Day Breaks → ER06-20 Last Stand (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Thud—
Bridget charges back into the room and drops into the chair with a clang. She wastes no time booting up the monitoring system.
She types on the keyboard while frantically patting herself down.

Title: Floating Record - ER06 When Day Breaks → ER06-20 Last Stand (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The giant\'s body crashes to the ground with a thunderous impact, sending a ring of dust billowing into the air.
Bridget staggers forward and attempts to raise her weapon—but fails, having exhausted herself completely.
As Skych lies on the ground, the madness in his eyes fades away, leaving behind a glimmer of clarity.

Title: Floating Record - ER06 When Day Breaks → ER06-21 Escaping the Cage (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The terminal crackles with static.
[Karenina]: —Bri—bzzz—dget! Answer me if you copy!
[Bridget]: Karenina?!

Title: Floating Record - ER06 When Day Breaks → ER06-22 Final Twist (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bridget]: What happened next? I just met up with Karenina and others, then returned to earth—
[Support Force Member]: Ah...
Scattered sighs and murmurs fill the air as the story comes to an end.

Title: Floating Record - ER07 Soaring Beyond → ER07-1  Rusty Snowfield (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
She opens her eyes.
The chill of melting snow surges in, flooding this dark chamber untouched by natural light.
A fine drizzle drips from the ceiling—remnants of last night\'s dew.

Title: Floating Record - ER07 Soaring Beyond → ER07-1  Rusty Snowfield (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Cargo Crew Soldier A]: Tsk... So the transport wasn\'t carrying cargo but a living person. Are you alright, miss?
[Cargo Crew Soldier A]: By the way, why are you in the transport?
[Hanying]: Hmm... My memories are a bit hazy.

Title: Floating Record - ER07 Soaring Beyond → ER07-2  Key and Firefly (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Children]: Zavier, come play with us!
[Children]: Zavier, why is Hanying sleeping again?
[Zavier]: Be good, kids. I\'ll play with you once she wakes up... Strange, the Gray Tower data flowing into the "cocoon" seems irregular...

Title: Floating Record - ER07 Soaring Beyond → ER07-3  Fading Signals (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The room\'s occupant stares intently at the curved monitor ahead, completely ignoring the streams of data flowing across the surrounding terminal screens.
In the center of the monitor is a detailed topographic map marked with coordinates. A cluster of yellow dots emits faint white ripples within the deep blue closed curves, creating a few contour lines that quickly fade away—only to start again.
After confirming the image, the young man\'s fingers fly across the keyboard as he cross-references and verifies the data.

Title: Floating Record - ER07 Soaring Beyond → ER07-4  Tomb Passage (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Cargo Crew Soldier A]: Hey, this is for you, lady from Kowloong.
She rummages under her seat for a while before pulling out a rifle—a makeshift weapon cobbled together from various parts, looking barely functional.
[Cargo Crew Soldier A]: Judging by your moves earlier, you should know how to handle this. We might face more attacks on the way, so you can borrow it for now.

Title: Floating Record - ER07 Soaring Beyond → ER07-4  Tomb Passage (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Hot brass casings scatter across the floor of the carriage, the steel barrel of the machine gun glowing faintly with a red-blue heat.
The battle against the infected mechanoids proves this new frame\'s absolute power, but it also raises doubts among Hanying\'s newfound companions.
[Cargo Crew Soldier B]: ...You got impressive skills, I\'ve seen it for myself before.

Title: Floating Record - ER07 Soaring Beyond → ER07-5  Lost City (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The astronaut-shaped mechanoid seems unaware of being followed.
It weaves nimbly between holographic beacons, treating the faint red flashes not as warnings of danger, but as if they were forming a wide path across the damp soil.
The trackers maintain just the right distance from the mechanoid, ensuring there is always cover within sight to hide behind if needed.

Title: Floating Record - ER07 Soaring Beyond → ER07-6  Grant Me Protection (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[????]: Come see me.
[Aleksei]: ...Hmm?
For a moment, his mind drifts into a daze.

Title: Floating Record - ER07 Soaring Beyond → ER07-7  The Negotiator (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Dimitri, the aerospace mechanoid, shifts his gaze toward the frail young girl who has distanced herself from the others.
[Dimitri]: Miss Yula...
[Yulia]: ...

Title: Floating Record - ER07 Soaring Beyond → ER07-8  Shadow of the Past (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
"After the resistance group leaves, Yulia closes her eyes wearily."
[Yulia]: ...What a lively scene.
"Despite her words, there isn\'t a trace of liveliness reflected in her expression."

Title: Floating Record - ER07 Soaring Beyond → ER07-8  Shadow of the Past (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The air grows thick with tension as the negotiation reaches an undeniable deadlock.
Using your Babylonia background, Liv and you succeed in reaching out to the governor via the autonomous mechanoid stationed at the entrance of the Administrative Hall. However, his attitude proves to be quite bizarre.
As a visitor from Babylonia, your starting point lies too far from the gravity well. The notion of "kinship" is nothing but empty rhetoric.

Title: Floating Record - ER07 Soaring Beyond → ER07-9  What Selfishness Means (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Hanying sneaks through the streets that were dead silent just moments ago.
The fate of the convoy and her recent discoveries suggest underlying tensions, yet she never expected the situation would escalate into open warfare this soon.
Just hours after entering the city, the chaos is already spiraling out of control.

Title: Floating Record - ER07 Soaring Beyond → ER07-10  Equivalent Exchange (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The setting sun hangs low over the dumping ground at the city\'s outskirts, enveloping the metallic graveyard in a somber, golden hue.
In contrast to the city ablaze with firefights between hunters and their prey, this place feels like a separate world sealed off behind a mystical barrier.
Veronica walks past numerous mechanoid remains, each a testament to her kin\'s suffering sealed away in this place. This place has always been somewhere she wished to avoid.

Title: Floating Record - ER07 Soaring Beyond → ER07-11  Masquerade (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The lengthy access code provided by Aleksei effortlessly unlocks the Administrative Hall\'s main gate. Beyond its corridors awaits the spacecraft docking area.
Veronica likely selected this location to confine her human captives due to its ample space and convenient surveillance capabilities.
A spacecraft hangs high from the ceiling, its black and white thermal tiles glistening immaculately, making this behemoth look more like a meticulously preserved exhibit.

Title: Floating Record - ER07 Soaring Beyond → ER07-11  Masquerade (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The biting wind howls through the open hangar gates, its icy chill lingering within the metallic confines of the docking bays.
The fierce battle from moments ago has left the air heavy with heated tension.
[Hanying]: His moves are fierce but not smooth.

Title: Floating Record - ER07 Soaring Beyond → ER07-12  Balance Beam (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
An endless stream of notifications is flooding the screen of Celica\'s terminal in rapid succession.
But she has no time to process any of them.
The corridor outside the conference room is bustling with people. Celica weaves through the crowd and stops before an automatic door.

Title: Floating Record - ER07 Soaring Beyond → ER07-13  Her Footsteps (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Human Soldier A]: Argh—
A red gleam races toward him in his field of vision. The soldier feels his body violently thrown backward before it hits the wall with a thud and helplessly slides down to the ground.
He strains to make out his attacker\'s identity through the thick gun smoke.

Title: Floating Record - ER07 Soaring Beyond → ER07-13  Her Footsteps (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After an electronic voice announces, "Access Granted," the control room\'s door slowly opens, revealing a familiar figure in dark crimson standing at the entrance.
[Aleksei]: Phew... Good thing it\'s you and not Hanying.
[Veronica]: I told you she\'s not a threat.

Title: Floating Record - ER07 Soaring Beyond → ER07-14  Internal Conflict (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A thin silhouette stands behind the curtain wall, the thick bulletproof panels shielding him from the deafening gunfire outside.
Hundreds of meters below him, rows of mechanoid guards are escorting captured resistance soldiers through the streets.
Gunfire continues to echo through the nearby districts.

Title: Floating Record - ER07 Soaring Beyond → ER07-15  Beacon in the Mist (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Natural light pours through the rectangular opening, carving a trapezoidal patch of soft brightness against the dim interior.
Hanying stands beneath the red emergency lights of the maintenance tunnel when a sudden comms request comes through.
[Hanying]: Cervantes...

Title: Floating Record - ER07 Soaring Beyond → ER07-16  Her Resolve (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The majestic bridge towers against the horizon as biting winds sweep up flurries of snow from the ground. From the far end of the bridge, the setting sun casts its blinding rays.
[Hanying]: ...Veronica!
[Veronica]: What a nuisance.

Title: Floating Record - ER07 Soaring Beyond → ER07-16  Her Resolve (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Veronica]: !!!!!
[Aleksei]: Ha... Hahaha...
[Veronica]: Aleksei—!

Title: Floating Record - ER07 Soaring Beyond → ER07-17  Buried Among Stars (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Hanying]: Phew...
[Hanying]: All of this... feels just like the "dreams" I used to have.
[Hanying]: From observer to participant to outsider... I was like a reader of a book, standing within its pages and experiencing its story firsthand.

Title: Floating Record - ER08 The Long Goodbye → ER08-1  Scout (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Wanshi]: Huff... Puff...
[??]: Walk forward. Do you see it?
The child lifts his head as a gust of wind disperses the mist, sending his white curls dancing into the corners of his eyes.

Title: Floating Record - ER08 The Long Goodbye → ER08-2  Shade (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Sandy]: Phew... That was way too close. The Hetero-Creatures almost had me buried.
[Wanshi]: I\'m the scout who sent out the Red Tide anomaly alert. I came here to be on standby after receiving the support request.
[Greg]: Thank God you showed up... Really appreciate it...

Title: Floating Record - ER08 The Long Goodbye → ER08-2  Shade (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
As you walk up to Wanshi, wind rushes through the passage behind, carrying what seems to be the metallic scent of blood.
Acting on instinct, you carefully dodge aside and raise your gun at the darkness behind you.
Only static crackles through the comms. Wanshi doesn\'t respond.

Title: Floating Record - ER08 The Long Goodbye → ER08-3  Correction (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Drip. Drop.
Drip. Drop.
In the endless darkness, water drips next to the ear.

Title: Floating Record - ER08 The Long Goodbye → ER08-4  Fledgling (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
As the volunteer gently urges Wanshi forward for self-introductions, his eyes immediately catch sight of the blue-purple hair among the crowd.
Evidently, he noticed Wanshi, too.
More obvious still is how clearly unwelcome Wanshi appears to be.

Title: Floating Record - ER08 The Long Goodbye → ER08-5  Dreamer (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Several months pass as Wanshi settles into a routine life. On this day, after classes and activities end, Wanshi heads back to the dormitory alone instead of walking with the others.
Earlier in the dormitory hallway, he spotted several Constructs standing awkwardly behind a volunteer, interacting with children under the volunteer\'s guidance—the Youth Center has recently started accepting commissions, occasionally bringing Constructs here to carry out assigned tasks.
Wanshi recalls the Constructs at the emergency center and the fluids. He has learned that it\'s vital fluid—it\'s just like human blood, and losing too much of it means "death" for a Construct.

Title: Floating Record - ER08 The Long Goodbye → ER08-5  Dreamer (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The intruders become targets for the Hetero-Creatures, which surge and snap their jaws as they move en masse toward the three outsiders in the abandoned research facility\'s basement.
After unlocking the door with the found keycard, Wanshi, Rosetta, and the Raven\'s Commandant immediately dash through the gates of the Cultivation Area.
Fortunately, the door is exceptionally sturdy—even the Hetero-Creatures cannot break through for now. The three of them finally have a moment to catch their breath.

Title: Floating Record - ER08 The Long Goodbye → ER08-6  Popular Literature (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The feathered dreamcatcher has hung above Wanshi\'s bed for many years.
Perhaps the dreamcatcher really did work, shielding Wanshi from countless nightmares. When he first woke up in the Star of Life\'s hospital bed, the chaotic tangle of memories in his mind had already been buried deep within.
After a peaceful night\'s rest at the Youth Center, he wakes up to face the moment of choosing his future career path.

Title: Floating Record - ER08 The Long Goodbye → ER08-7  Swap Futures (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
At night, in the Youth Center\'s hall, a tall Construct wanders aimlessly.
The Construct, here to "do someone a favor", lets out a sigh while gazing at the artificial sky above.
[Shorthalt]: Sigh.

Title: Floating Record - ER08 The Long Goodbye → ER08-8  What Is Salvation? (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The transport aircraft cruises steadily through the air.
While most people in the cabin rest with their eyes closed from exhaustion, Melvie\'s gaze remains fixed on a woman sitting diagonally ahead of her.
The woman has Kowloong features but straight silver-white hair. She appears young, cradling a small bundle in her arms.

Title: Floating Record - ER08 The Long Goodbye → ER08-9  Colorful Farce (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After meeting with Wanshi, Melvie pushes open the door to the Construct Maintenance Department office and places a document on Chiron\'s desk.
She gets straight to the point.
[Melvie]: Do you know about this research institute?

Title: Floating Record - ER08 The Long Goodbye → ER08-10  Renegade (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
In the "Cultivation Area" in the basement of the abandoned research institute, the sound of Hetero-Creatures gnawing and clawing behind the door sends chills down one\'s spine.
Having just "fled" into the Cultivation Area, the three have more pressing concerns than being bothered by these sounds.
They\'re still processing the horrifying implications about Shorthalt.

Title: Floating Record - ER08 The Long Goodbye → ER08-10  Renegade (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A tremendous roar echoes through the room, and dust billows up where Wanshi stands at the far end. The piercing screech coming through the comms channel forces you to cover your ears in pain.
The sudden bombardment disrupts Wanshi\'s visual modules, causing his vision to blur as he staggers backward and crashes heavily to the ground.
[Rosetta]: What\'s happening?!

Title: Floating Record - ER08 The Long Goodbye → ER08-11  Crumbling Silence (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Many years ago—
Even the prosperous Kowloong cannot escape the Punishing virus\'s destruction across the land. A mother stares in despair at the collapsed building before her.
Flames rage as the Corrupted, gleaming with crimson light, surge forward in a mass.

Title: Floating Record - ER08 The Long Goodbye → ER08-12  Keeping Demons (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Today is when Theodore and Aviana will undergo modifications and testing. The researchers have high expectations for both children.
[Elderly Researcher]: Bring them in.
[56]: Theodore hasn\'t been doing well lately. I suggest we wait a while longer.

Title: Floating Record - ER08 The Long Goodbye → ER08-13  Toys and Kaleidoscopes (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The M.I.N.D. completely collapses, erupting into a tempestuous storm. Wanshi doesn\'t resist, submitting quietly to its depths.
All memory data, deeply buried in the whirling void, breaks free at once.
[Wanshi]: ...

Title: Floating Record - ER08 The Long Goodbye → ER08-14  Backtrack (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The surrounding kaleidoscope shards fade to darkness, and the silhouettes within dissipate with them.
The one Wanshi touched also fades to darkness as 056 leads the test subjects down the dimly lit corridor.
He grasps at thin air, catching nothing.

Title: Floating Record - ER08 The Long Goodbye → ER08-15  Obscured (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Doctor]: I hear we\'re getting another batch of newcomers today. You always get so excited at times like these, Professor.
[Hippocrates]: Of course, seeing all these young people so talented and passionate about medicine... I should cherish these moments before retirement.
[Doctor]: Could this be your secret to staying young—oh! Good morning, Dr. Little Wan! Still sporting those dark circles under your eyes, I see!

Title: Floating Record - ER08 The Long Goodbye → ER08-16  Refutation (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The desperate work continues late into the night, as the artificial sky slowly shifts to its nocturnal state.
Wanshi leans against a piece of equipment, silently staring at the aftermath before him.
The gaunt professor approaches, peeling off his gloves stained with vital fluid. He tries to help Wanshi up, but Wanshi clutches his head and waves him away.

Title: Floating Record - ER08 The Long Goodbye → ER08-17  Silent Night (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
That evening, Wanshi, now a seasoned member of the Construct Maintenance Department, meticulously inspects his tools alongside Professor Chiron as they both check their protective suits and prepare for the next operation.
[Chiron]: How are you finding the work here, Wanshi?
[Chiron]: The head of pediatrics visited yesterday. He said you\'re working harder than ever, and warned me not to overwork you. He threatened to take you back to his department if I don\'t look after you better.

Title: Floating Record - ER08 The Long Goodbye → ER08-18  Meds and Deceit (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A transport vehicle makes its way through the city\'s ruins.
[Shorthalt]: We should reach the conservation area in about half an hour. We\'re making good progress.
[Shorthalt]: This is the largest conservation area in the region. Once the detected Corrupted horde gets any closer, we\'ll have to evacuate everyone... Fortunately, other Construct squads are here to assist with the relocation. We won\'t be outnumbered.

Title: Floating Record - ER08 The Long Goodbye → ER08-18  Meds and Deceit (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The battle-scarred Construct stands atop their M.I.N.D., gazing down at the vast expanse of memory data below.
This place... this is where he first found them, all those years ago. The memories come flooding back.
[Wanshi]: At that time, I did find those missing kids.

Title: Floating Record - ER08 The Long Goodbye → ER08-19  Before the Dawn (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After a grueling escape, the survivors finally reach the temporary shelter.
[Shorthalt]: Reports are coming in that even the elite squad is overwhelmed. No reinforcements are arriving. We\'re trapped here for now.
[Shorthalt]: The Corrupted are swarming out like a disturbed hornet\'s nest. I\'ve never seen a swarm this size outside the Dead Zone. This is a disaster.

Title: Floating Record - ER08 The Long Goodbye → ER08-19  Before the Dawn (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Girl]: That Corrupted was chasing after Mr. Doctor, I saw it clearly.
[Girl]: Will it go after him?
[Boy]: ...I don\'t know.

Title: Floating Record - ER08 The Long Goodbye → ER08-20  The Long Goodbye (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Many years ago—
The bullet pierces through Wanxu\'s body.
Blood splatters everywhere.

Title: Floating Record - ER08 The Long Goodbye → ER08-21  Lucid Dreamer (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The Commandant\'s hand grabs Wanshi and pushes him away. Other hands also spring into action, joining in to force him back as if answering a silent call.
He looks again to see the snowstorm, which has now halted. The ice-bound rivers slowly melt, preparing to flow backwards.
They surge forth once more, carrying both despair and desire, screaming and rejoicing—the river\'s tale was never just about suffering, for hope has always been intertwined with despair.

Title: Floating Record - ER08 The Long Goodbye → ER08-22  Mint (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Wanshi leaps into the void, followed by Commandant and Rosetta—both in pursuit of "Wanxu" and the truth.
Though their paths diverge, they all move toward the same purpose.
To seek the truth, to save others, to cut out the poisonous roots left by the previous generation, and...

Title: Floating Record - ER08 The Long Goodbye → ER08-22  Mint (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Shorthalt feels like he has heard a shout.
It is an overcast day. He sits on the ground after a fierce battle, looking around to find nothing but ruins and bodies still shrouded in gunsmoke. Only Wanshi remains by his side, busy repairing his cracked arm.
[Shorthalt]: Was I hearing things...? Did you hear anything?

Title: Floating Record - ER08 The Long Goodbye → ER08-23  Infant (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The Gray Raven Commandant\'s concerns prove justified—after slaying the scorpion-like enemy, Wanshi finds a relatively clean spot and lies down.
Someone has disabled the research facility\'s signal jamming, finally exposing this long-abandoned facility to everyone\'s view.
As Wanshi gazes up at the shattered Kaleidoscope above, his terminal receives intermittent communications through Strike Hawk\'s internal channel.

Title: Floating Record - ER08 The Long Goodbye → ER08-24  The Present and Essence (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After going through detailed inspection procedures and navigating numerous corridors, you finally stop in front of a sealed laboratory.
With his back to the window, Asimov is working on some laboratory equipment while Wanshi lies on the examination bed, connected to M.I.N.D. monitoring devices. The screen displays the current stability of his M.I.N.D. readings.
The previously stable connection suddenly shows an abnormal fluctuation, and Wanshi\'s eyes flutter in response.

Title: Floating Record - ER08 The Long Goodbye → ER08-25  EX - Birthday (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Wanshi]: One, two...
[Wanshi]: Three.
The bullet leaves the chamber and finds its mark, precisely striking the Corrupted wandering through the ruins.

Title: Floating Record - ER08 The Long Goodbye → ER08-26  EX - This Journey (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Shorthalt can\'t believe his rotten luck—Shiva\'s jinx actually came true for him.
At his mission destination, he ran into deserters and an Ascendant. When he regains consciousness, he finds himself in completely unfamiliar surroundings, his limbs all removed, and even his M.I.N.D. throbbing with pain.
[Shorthalt]: Tsk, am I locked up here?

Title: Floating Record - ER09 Crescent Sun → ER09-1 Candy Express (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Night creeps over the isle of flowers, gradually devouring the lifeless campus beneath the twilight\'s shadow.
Deep within the ruins, atop the academic building where wails of anguish echo...
Leaning against the rust-stained railing, the girl\'s gaze is drawn to the flower-like lights in the distant sky.

Title: Floating Record - ER09 Crescent Sun → ER09-2 Into the Summer (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The Scarab squad transport aircraft departs from Babylonia and enters automatic cruise mode.
Valeria leaves the pilot seat and walks steadily toward the back of the cabin.
[Valeria]: Let me go over the mission brief.

Title: Floating Record - ER09 Crescent Sun → ER09-3 The Absent One (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
An explosion rips through the side door of the transport, half-buried in mud at the edge of the dense forest.
White smoke rises from two smoke grenades as shadows dart through the haze.
Without warning, the belly-mounted turrets open fire, spraying bullets into the surrounding trees.

Title: Floating Record - ER09 Crescent Sun → ER09-4 Silent Chorus (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Evening winds howl through the dark, dense forest.
Yata pursues the Construct that took Shiva, occasionally glancing back to check her surroundings.
[Yata]: Finally lost them... I wonder how V and Discord are doing...

Title: Floating Record - ER09 Crescent Sun → ER09-4 Silent Chorus (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Yata]: Hello there. Are you waiting for someone?
[???]: Hmm... Yes? Can I help you?
[Yata]: Oh, I\'m Yata. I\'m a first-year student, too.

Title: Floating Record - ER09 Crescent Sun → ER09-5 The Track Queen of Misono (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
—With deepest respect and gratitude for all you\'ve done for me.
—How many years have flown by since those days of school life...
—When we look back, we\'re surprised by how fast time went by...

Title: Floating Record - ER09 Crescent Sun → ER09-6 Utopia (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A modern reception room that harmoniously blends Western and Kowloong architectural styles.
Outside the window, cherry blossom trees stand in the courtyard, their pink and white petals dancing in the breeze.
A bouquet of hydrangeas sits in a shallow vessel within the wall alcove.

Title: Floating Record - ER09 Crescent Sun → ER09-7 The Perfect Fit (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Reika Saotome]: As far back as the Golden Age, many scholars had already proposed different interpretations of the concept of collective unconscious.
[Reika Saotome]: However, regardless of which theoretical approach we examine, they all share the same fundamental understanding.
[Reika Saotome]: Namely, it is an innate, instinctive component deeply rooted in the deepest layer of the human unconscious.

Title: Floating Record - ER09 Crescent Sun → ER09-8 Steady Speed Ahead! (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Host]: With that, we conclude the opening ceremony of the Second Hydrangea Island High School Track and Field Championship.
[Host]: We thank all of you for your participation, and of course...
[Host]: We extend our gratitude to our host, Misono High, for their generous support and these excellent facilities.

Title: Floating Record - ER09 Crescent Sun → ER09-9 Summer, Fireworks, and... (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The curtains along the wall are drawn aside, revealing a hidden door that opens from within.
The private ward is equipped with a single hospital bed and a window.
Yuka rises from the bed, pressing a cotton ball against her right arm with her left hand.

Title: Floating Record - ER09 Crescent Sun → ER09-10 Eternal Night Fog (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
In a private facility near the Hydrangea Medical Research District, within its bright, semi-automated compound...
Outside the ward, an exhausted Reika stands with Kouhei, who maintains a serene composure.
[Reika Saotome]: Kouhei, how is Yuka\'s recovery coming along?

Title: Floating Record - ER09 Crescent Sun → ER09-12 Yesterday Once More (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Yuka Saotome?]: Yata, are you really leaving?
[Yuka Saotome?]: Where are you running off to, leaving me here all alone?
[Yuka Saotome?]: I worked so hard to build a proper school life for you...

Title: Floating Record - ER09 Crescent Sun → ER09-13 The Defeatist (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Female Club Member 1]: Why are we at school? Shouldn\'t we be having this party at a buffet restaurant?
[Female Club Member 2]: Who knows? The school probably has something special planned. Maybe there\'s a surprise in store?
Inside the activity room, Yata sits with her legs crossed on a chair, yawning with an expressionless face.

Title: Floating Record - ER09 Crescent Sun → ER09-14 Three Eyes, Six Hands (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
...
Walking through the frigid waters, surrounded by an endless sea...
In the distance, where the sky meets the sea, twinkling stars dot the horizon.

Title: Floating Record - ER09 Crescent Sun → ER09-15 The Best Choice (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nikola]: Construct?
[Asimov]: Hmm, according to Scarab\'s intelligence, this woman called Yuka is at the core of the experiment.
Minutes ago, the communication anchor set up by Yata successfully restored contact with Babylonia and began transmitting mission intelligence in real-time.

Title: Floating Record - ER09 Crescent Sun → ER09-15 The Best Choice (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Medical Officer]: Your name is... Yata?
[Yata]: Yes.
[Medical Officer]: Yata, your physical parameters are excellent. You meet all the surgical requirements.

Title: Floating Record - ER09 Crescent Sun → ER09-16 "Memory Projection" (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
She attempts to calibrate the audio-visual module but still has a hard time sensing her surroundings.
[????]: Shiva, Shiva.
[Shiva]: Vale... ria...

Title: Floating Record - ER09 Crescent Sun → ER09-17 A Fated Farewell (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
As the battle comes to an end, the lecture hall\'s outer wall gives way, and Yuka crashes through into the adjacent classroom.
Where flower petals once lay scattered, now only a dim, decrepit space remains.
Dust blankets everything, the room dilapidated and devoid of life.

Title: Floating Record - ER09 Crescent Sun → ER09-18 The Dreamer's Dream (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Reika Saotome]: Here\'s my entry application for the island. I\'ve brought all the required documents. Is everything in order?
[Documentation Officer]: Dr. Saotome, your documentation is indeed complete, however...
[Reika Saotome]: What\'s wrong?

Title: Floating Record - ER09 Crescent Sun → ER09-19 In the Wake Of (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Yata]: And that is what happened.
[Yata]: After returning from Hydrangea Island, I became Scarab\'s new captain.
[Yata]: Though to be fair, V pretty much forced me into it.

Title: Floating Record - ER10 Deceivers' Rapture → ER10-1 Croupier, Tailor, Assassin, Spy (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Lilith helps her aunt Madam Monzano kill Kurono agent Rosewater.

Title: Floating Record - ER10 Deceivers' Rapture → ER10-2 Eight-Shot Revolver (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: After the unexpected death of her foster parents, Lilith starts to run the Las Prados Casino with Madam Monzano. The two notice Kurono members in the city.

Title: Floating Record - ER10 Deceivers' Rapture → ER10-3 City and Stars (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Before breaking free from Kurono, Monzano was in charge of researching the sustainability of the colony ship biosphere. Capehart, the Kurono councilor who works with Kilgore Trout, takes over the related projects, which draw Kurono's attention.

Title: Floating Record - ER10 Deceivers' Rapture → ER10-4 Cat & Mouse (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Kurono agent Rosewater is assassinated. Monzano takes away his "foster daughter" Discord, who's also a Kurono agent. Lilith and her childhood friend Discord meet again.

Title: Floating Record - ER10 Deceivers' Rapture → ER10-5 Carbon Change (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: While Discord stays with Monzano for more intel, Monzano attempts to turn her as well. The Project Winter is on track. Monzano asks Lilith to sneak into the Fort Winter to clear her hostiles and collect intel.

Title: Floating Record - ER10 Deceivers' Rapture → ER10-5 Carbon Change (After Battle)
SummaryContent: While Discord stays with Monzano for more intel, Monzano attempts to turn her as well. The Project Winter is on track. Monzano asks Lilith to sneak into the Fort Winter to clear her hostiles and collect intel.

Title: Floating Record - ER10 Deceivers' Rapture → ER10-6 Marshmallow Layer Cake (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Discord asks Lilith to escape Monzano together. The Zero-point Engine Ignition Experiment fails, and the Punishing Virus breaks out.

Title: Floating Record - ER10 Deceivers' Rapture → ER10-7 Apocalypse Day (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: A great evacuation starts in Las Prados. Monzano transfers all the citizens including Lilith to Babylonia and abandons Discord.

Title: Floating Record - ER10 Deceivers' Rapture → ER10-8 Written in Babylon (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Vonnegut becomes an agent. Lilith accepts the Construct modification surgery in Babylonia.

Title: Floating Record - ER10 Deceivers' Rapture → ER10-8 Written in Babylon (After Battle)
SummaryContent: Vonnegut becomes an agent. Lilith accepts the Construct modification surgery in Babylonia.

Title: Floating Record - ER10 Deceivers' Rapture → ER10-9 The Newcomer (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Discord accepts the Construct modification surgery and joins the Purifying Force, starting an investigation on Project Winter.

Title: Floating Record - ER10 Deceivers' Rapture → ER10-10 Against Their Will (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Discord used to be a homeless child in Las Prados. After Rosewater adopted her, Discord entered the orphanage established to cultivate candidates for early Construct human experiments and met Lilith for the first time.

Title: Floating Record - ER10 Deceivers' Rapture → ER10-11 Market Garden (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Lilith starts a battlefield test with the prototype Constructs, during which they access the Ascension-Network and obtain the Punishing Code given by Vonnegut.

Title: Floating Record - ER10 Deceivers' Rapture → ER10-12 Culture Medium (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Lilith releases the Punishing Virus in Babylonia. The contagion causes initial chaos but is soon controlled.

Title: Floating Record - ER10 Deceivers' Rapture → ER10-12 Culture Medium (After Battle)
SummaryContent: Lilith releases the Punishing Virus in Babylonia. The contagion causes initial chaos but is soon controlled.

Title: Floating Record - ER10 Deceivers' Rapture → ER10-13 The Pioneer (After Battle)
SummaryContent: Monzano partly implements her M.I.N.D. transfer experiment by using the Punishing Virus as the medium.

Title: Floating Record - ER10 Deceivers' Rapture → ER10-14 Lesson for All (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Kurono shuts down the orphanage and integrates the experiment candidates into the newly founded Kurono intelligence agency. Lilith is adopted by the richest person in Las Prados, whereas Discord is grounded by Rosewater in the name of "protection." The two separate for the first time.

Title: Floating Record - ER10 Deceivers' Rapture → ER10-15 Crimson Disease's Veil (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: The virus concentration in Babylonia is rising. Monzano takes advantage of this and carries out the experiments. Lilith creates a space where the Ascension-Network's filtering can be implemented.

Title: Floating Record - ER10 Deceivers' Rapture → ER10-16 Hunter's Logic (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: The Ascension-Network causes a large-scale defection of Constructs. Discord runs into an unknown Construct in the wilderness during mission and starts to question where Monzano and Lilith's true whereabouts.

Title: Floating Record - ER10 Deceivers' Rapture → ER10-17 City in a Bottle (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Kurono decides to investigate the Ascendant's activities with the help of the army. Lilith reveals her true intention to Monzano. The two have a falling-out.

Title: Floating Record - ER10 Deceivers' Rapture → ER10-17 City in a Bottle (After Battle)
SummaryContent: Kurono decides to investigate the Ascendant's activities with the help of the army. Lilith reveals her true intention to Monzano. The two have a falling-out.

Title: Floating Record - ER10 Deceivers' Rapture → ER10-18 King's Gambit (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Kurono exposes Babylonia's secret—the ecological experiment bunker built by Monzano. Kurono invites the army to start an investigation and conceals the fact that Project Winter remains active.

Title: Floating Record - ER10 Deceivers' Rapture → ER10-19 Silver Rain (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Discord and the Purifying Force enter Monzano's underground facilities and confront Lilith. Out of the two's shared objective, Lilith fights Monzano.

Title: Floating Record - ER10 Deceivers' Rapture → ER10-19 Silver Rain (After Battle)
SummaryContent: Discord and the Purifying Force enter Monzano's underground facilities and confront Lilith. Out of the two's shared objective, Lilith fights Monzano.

Title: Floating Record - ER10 Deceivers' Rapture → ER10-20 The Selection (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Lilith takes out the air strike force sent by the army with the power of the Ascension-Network. Vonnegut invites Lilith to join.

Title: Floating Record - ER10 Deceivers' Rapture → ER10-21 Exodus from the Park (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Lilith starts to take Vonnegut's assessment and meets Lithos. Luna is caught by Kurono and locked up in the lunar base. Meanwhile, Lilith feels interested in Alpha.

Title: Floating Record - ER11 Begin Anew → ER11-1 Prologue (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: A mysterious armed force appears around City 141, fighting against the Corrupted. The Commandant is ordered to sneak into City 141 to carry out an investigation.

Title: Floating Record - ER11 Begin Anew → ER11-2 Ungraceful Meetup (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: The Commandant's transport vehicle has been attacked on the way to the city. In the battle against the Corrupted, there seems to be a faint figure of a mysterious girl...

Title: Floating Record - ER11 Begin Anew → ER11-2 Ungraceful Meetup (After Battle)
SummaryContent: The commandant comes across the body of a student in the ruins. Out of respect for a soldier, the commandant takes her onto the transport vehicle.

Title: Floating Record - ER11 Begin Anew → ER11-3 Weapons of War (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: The commandant comes alone to a college named Gestrig, where students are called weapons, participating in endless battles. Here, the commandant runs into Jetavie, the mysterious girl who fought alongside the commandant. She seems to be very interested in the commandant.

Title: Floating Record - ER11 Begin Anew → ER11-4 A Familiar Nightmare (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: The bell suddenly rings when the commandant is exchanging information with girls named Bai and Ewig. Another battle starts. Due to the limitations of the secret investigation, the commandant is not able to participate. The commandant has a nightmare where Jetavie has passed away.

Title: Floating Record - ER11 Begin Anew → ER11-5 Counterclockwise (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: After the battle, the students support one another back to the college. The commandant sees Jetavie in the clock tower while she's fixing herself. She hopes the commandant can participate in the next battle.

Title: Floating Record - ER11 Begin Anew → ER11-6 Shackles (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Another battle begins. A battle that Jetavie drags the commandant into. Thanks to the commandant, there are no casualties. Meanwhile, someone seems to be secretly plotting to lure the Corrupted to attack the city.

Title: Floating Record - ER11 Begin Anew → ER11-7 Reborn (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: The Commandant is warned by Martha for disobedience to orders. After the battle, Jetavie suspects that the attack from the Corrupted was targeted and decides to investigate City 141 following the lead of Bai's diary.

Title: Floating Record - ER11 Begin Anew → ER11-8 The Journal's End (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Following the lead of the diary, Jetavie comes to a milk tea shop. She invites the commandant for a short rest here.

Title: Floating Record - ER11 Begin Anew → ER11-8 The Journal's End (After Battle)
SummaryContent: The last page has been turned. Every location mentioned in the diary has been investigated. Ewig suddenly realizes something and feels empty inside.

Title: Floating Record - ER11 Begin Anew → ER11-9 Matrix (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: A man named Horst comes to the commandant, hoping the latter can give up commanding the students. Jetavie and the Conductor follow him to a heavily guarded ruins.

Title: Floating Record - ER11 Begin Anew → ER11-10 Truth of Annihilation (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: The Commandant and Jetavie search around in the Matrix and find the transmitter that controls the Corrupted. However, the Corrupted are already there when they leave the Matrix.

Title: Floating Record - ER11 Begin Anew → ER11-11 Migration (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Jetavie and other students guide the crowd to the college to take shelter. However, things don't look good as the Corrupted have already broken into the downtown area and the students' control is in Horst's hand.

Title: Floating Record - ER11 Begin Anew → ER11-12 The Real "Reality" (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Due to the emergency shutdown of other students, Jetavie has to defend the college on her own.

Title: Floating Record - ER11 Begin Anew → ER11-12 The Real "Reality" (After Battle)
SummaryContent: In her trance, Jetavie sees the Matrix again. After a fierce struggle, she still chooses to keep on fighting, protecting the broken reality.

Title: Floating Record - ER11 Begin Anew → ER11-13 Chosen One (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Jetavie struggles back to a safe corner but reaches the verge of a consciousness collapse due to energy exhaustion. The commandant accesses the memory data as the Chosen One through the deep link to Jetavie. Through another "cycle," the commandant salvages Jetavie's collapsing consciousness.

Title: Floating Record - ER11 Begin Anew → ER11-14 Dark Theme Park (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Jetavie and the commandant get back on track thanks to the Task Force's timely support. The two follow the traces left by the clown to a factory that looks like an amusement park.

Title: Floating Record - ER11 Begin Anew → ER11-14 Dark Theme Park (After Battle)
SummaryContent: Jetavie and the commandant find some training data of the clown by a control panel in the factory. This entity was generated based on the Leibowitz Commandant. Endless trainings have caused a degeneration of its mind. Now it regards destruction as a game.

Title: Floating Record - ER11 Begin Anew → ER11-15 The Jester's Requiem (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Jetavie and the commandant arrives in the depths of the factory, ready for the final battle against the clown.

Title: Floating Record - ER11 Begin Anew → ER11-15 The Jester's Requiem (After Battle)
SummaryContent: Having defeated the clown, Jetavie and the commandant return to Babylonia. The two successfully solve the man-made crisis and free other students.

Title: Floating Record - ER11 Begin Anew → ER11-16 Brother (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Horst had a serious illness when he was little. His parents therefore bought an Android that looked exactly like him. When he's back home again, there was no longer a place for him, which gave birth to his extreme view about smart robots and eventually resulted in the tragedy of himself and City 141.

Title: Floating Record - ER11 Begin Anew → ER11-1 Prison (YA)
SummaryContent: New researcher Herta has been taken to a lab, the owner of which is a girl called Yui who became extremely weak in a series of sampling experiments. Manager Horst doesn't seem to be concerned about it and forces her to submit the model of the Chosen One as soon as possible.

Title: Floating Record - ER11 Begin Anew → ER11-2 Shatter (YA)
SummaryContent: Due to the overfitting problem of the Chosen One, Yui attempts to perform a memory sampling with Herta's help. In the experiment, she remembers being beaten by her father in her childhood.

Title: Floating Record - ER11 Begin Anew → ER11-3 Someone to Rely On (YA)
SummaryContent: Abandoned by her father, Yui went on a solo journey of finding her mother. Just when she's in the joy of finally getting the love of her mother, she suddenly realizes that she's nothing but a "ticket" in her mother's eyes. When the Corrupted come, she's pushed to the exit by the kids in the sewer, yet a Corrupted catches her by her ankle at the exit. She has to struggle to get out alone.

Title: Floating Record - ER11 Begin Anew → ER11-4 VI (YA)
SummaryContent: The sampling ends. The experiment has given birth to a rather interesting model. Yui names it VI. However, Horst suddenly breaks in and takes VI away. The stimulation test on VI causes things to fall onto the floor and break. Worried about VI, VI rushes out.

Title: Floating Record - ER11 Begin Anew → ER11-5 Instinct (YA)
SummaryContent: During the dreadful test, signal of the Chosen One suddenly breaks in and blocks the pulse for VI. When both models are on the verge of collapse, Yui links them back from the test.

Title: Floating Record - ER11 Begin Anew → ER11-6 Memory Blockade (YA)
SummaryContent: The commandant wakes up from the immersion in Babylonia with no memory of what just happened. A girl who calls herself "Lesti" briefly explains why the commandant was chosen for the mission and the cause of the memory loss.

Title: Floating Record - ER11 Begin Anew → ER11-7 Erroneous Death (YA)
SummaryContent: Yui's adjustment has help VI's model overcome the risk of collapse. However, Horst asks Yui to give him the model capsule for the sake of experiment progress. In this critical moment, the Chosen One appears again and uses the illegal data as evidence to stop Horst. Enraged, Horst accelerates the experiment at the risk of it going out of control.

Title: Floating Record - ER11 Begin Anew → ER11-8 Her "Rebirth" (YA)
SummaryContent: It's VI's birthday. However, when Yui's back with the gift "White Case", she sees many haywire Corrupted around the Matrix. Worried about VI's safety, Yui rushes to the lab without hesitation.

Title: Floating Record - ER11 Begin Anew → ER11-9 Jetavie (YA)
SummaryContent: Back to VI's side, Yui is already seriously injured. To keep VI alive in the high Punishing concentration, Yui has to activate the awakening training codenamed Derivation. Before passing out, Yui opens the link port to the Chosen One, forming a connection to the commandant's consciousness. A trial cycle of the commandant and VI has thus started.

Title: Floating Record - ER12 Spark to Wildfire → ER12-2 Rolling Snow (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: In 2160, Vera, a cadet at the Military Academy, participated in a counter-terrorism operation where she rescued the lone survivor.

Title: Floating Record - ER12 Spark to Wildfire → ER12-2 Rolling Snow (After Battle)
SummaryContent: The Control Court suspects the survivor is actually "Haynes," the terrorism suspect.\nVera is assigned to monitor the suspect.

Title: Floating Record - ER12 Spark to Wildfire → ER12-3 All in Vain (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Vera arrives at the military hospital and boldly initiates contact with the suspect to gather intelligence.\nJust as she confirms this person is "Haynes," the subject the Control Court is seeking who requires higher security measures, the Punishing Disaster erupts. In the ensuing chaos, Haynes takes his own life.

Title: Floating Record - ER12 Spark to Wildfire → ER12-4 Reincarnation (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Years later, Vera, now a Kurono Construct, encounters a scene eerily similar to the eve of the Punishing Disaster.\nTo save you, a human from the F.O.S. Military College, she improvises by using precious test materials meant for her mission to seal the wound on your abdomen.

Title: Floating Record - ER12 Spark to Wildfire → ER12-5 Leaving for the New World (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: You suffered head trauma, occasionally experiencing memory lapses. Vera exploits this to deceive you and quickly learn about your situation.\nBefore the two of you can exchange more information, a horde of Corrupted reaches the temporary medical station, forcing Vera to evacuate with you.

Title: Floating Record - ER12 Spark to Wildfire → ER12-6 Murky Sea (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Now—after finding the "key" among the Hummingbird's Remains, the Gray Raven Commandant and Vera follow Kurono member Haniff aboard a ship to begin their journey in search of the "secret treasure," only to be attacked by an Ascendant impersonating "Lloyd."\nThe ship is destroyed, throwing everyone into the sea. The Gray Raven Commandant's ankle is ensnared by a curious Hetero-Creature, nearly causing them to drown.

Title: Floating Record - ER12 Spark to Wildfire → ER12-7 Flying Off (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Back to the past—Kurono Construct Vera attempts to bring you to the Kurono base to deliver the materials needed for her mission. However, you repeatedly offer help to others along the way, causing an ever-growing number of refugees to follow the two of you.

Title: Floating Record - ER12 Spark to Wildfire → ER12-7 Flying Off (After Battle)
SummaryContent: The group enters a bombed area where, after another F.O.S. student sacrifices himself, you take a box containing abnormal virus samples from his hands. It needs to be delivered to a base with analysis capabilities.

Title: Floating Record - ER12 Spark to Wildfire → ER12-8 Convergence (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: The group receives help from a kind-hearted, dog-loving "Madam Wang" and arrives at a nearby conservation area where they learn the details of this abnormal situation. Your classmates Vanessa and Simon also happen to be in this conservation area.\nTo transport the important virus samples, a makeshift team composed of Kurono Constructs, F.O.S. students, and conservation area personnel is formed.

Title: Floating Record - ER12 Spark to Wildfire → ER12-9 Hatching (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Now—inside a gene bank on a solitary island, a Hetero-Creature has begun to "evolve," and has been named "Eve."\nEve attempts to understand human genes, memories, and emotions. After leaving the gene bank, it discovers the Gray Raven Commandant adrift in the ocean. But before it can extract more information from you, Vera forcefully yanks you out of the sea.

Title: Floating Record - ER12 Spark to Wildfire → ER12-10 Recovery (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: The Gray Raven Commandant, rescued from the sea just in time by Vera, regains consciousness. Earlier, the three of them were swept onto a solitary island by an Ascendant. Vera engaged it in battle, forcing it to reveal its true form. After a tense confrontation, the Gray Raven Commandant realizes they must kill "Eve" to prevent the evolving Hetero-Creature from spreading and growing stronger.\nMeanwhile, Babylonia also begins to take action. Kurono, seizing the opportunity, decides to dispatch the transport aircraft closest to the island to provide assistance, and "conveniently" deliver a test frame belonging to Vera.

Title: Floating Record - ER12 Spark to Wildfire → ER12-11 Iteration (After Battle)
SummaryContent: The Garnet frame is nearly beyond repair. The support transport aircraft reaches the island but quickly crashes. The Gray Raven Commandant discovers a never-before-seen new Vera frame in the aircraft wreckage and initiates the frame synchronization process, but the data synchronization progresses extremely slowly.\nTo prevent the Hetero-Creature from evolving further, the desperate Gray Raven Commandant decides to lead Haniff into the gene bank to eliminate "Eve."

Title: Floating Record - ER12 Spark to Wildfire → ER12-12 Surprise Troop (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Back to the past—The makeshift team gets off to a rough start, encountering a fierce battle. Fortunately, a Construct named Leia arrives just in time to help evacuate people from Conservation Area 062, reportedly bringing back a suspect in this disaster.\nDuring the evacuation, Vera is shocked to discover that the "suspect" captured by Leia is named Haynes.

Title: Floating Record - ER12 Spark to Wildfire → ER12-13 Flesh and Blood (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: This "Haynes" is identical to the old man who took his own life in front of Vera. He has accepted Gabriel's guidance and is now implementing a new plan. Under Haynes' operation, the virus spreads once again, and the sample container protected by you becomes damaged. In this critical moment, you use testing material from your own abdominal wound to seal the container's breach.\nStunned by your choice, Vera decides to help you achieve your goal.

Title: Floating Record - ER12 Spark to Wildfire → ER12-14 Junior (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Now—the Gray Raven Commandant, carrying Vera on their back as she undergoes data synchronization, enters the gene bank with Haniff.\nThe Gray Raven Commandant recognizes the F.O.S. badge on Haniff, who then reveals his true purpose: he came to find someone named "Haynes," a name deeply connected to his life.

Title: Floating Record - ER12 Spark to Wildfire → ER12-15 Divergence (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: The Gray Raven Commandant and Haniff find "Eve", discovering that it's fond of mimicking them.\nBesides this, the two overhear a conversation between the Ascendant and an old man, learning that they are the masterminds behind this catastrophe, and that countless embryos lie dormant, waiting to hatch deep within the gene bank.\nTaking advantage of the disagreement between the two "villains," the Gray Raven Commandant uses "Eve" and the Hetero-Creature to fight against the Ascendant. However, both the commandant and Haniff sustain serious injuries, forcing them to split up—Haniff goes to find and destroy the remaining embryos, while the commandant stays behind to confront the enemy and protect Vera until she awakens.

Title: Floating Record - ER12 Spark to Wildfire → ER12-16 Blade Dance (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Meanwhile, Vera's Geiravor frame nears the end of its data synchronization: the memory data replays the final moments she spent with you years ago. To fulfill your objective, she pulls out her frame's plug, cuts the rope, and watches as the severely wounded you rushes toward the base with the sample container.\nAs she sacrifices herself, she realizes that all of this is merely data being replayed within her M.I.N.D., and decides to return to reality. In the real world, you—the one who has grown to become the Gray Raven Commandant—needs her.

Title: Floating Record - ER12 Spark to Wildfire → ER12-17 Evolve (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: For this "reunion" years in the making, Vera and the Gray Raven Commandant fight with all their might.\nVera wrests control of the Geiravor frame from Kurono's system. Vera: Geiravor awakens at the critical moment, slays Eve, and saves the commandant.

Title: Floating Record - ER12 Spark to Wildfire → ER12-18 Lingering Silence (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Vera eliminates all the Hetero-Creatures blocking their path and leads the commandant deep into the gene bank to catch up with Haniff and to kill another "Haynes".\nHaving revisited their shared past in different ways, the two have much to say to each other, but time is against them.

Title: Floating Record - ER12 Spark to Wildfire → ER12-19 Living Fire (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Haniff finds the embryos and prepares to activate the base's self-destruct sequence, but is stopped by the elderly Haynes. Haynes reveals the truth about his identity and invites him to become the next "Haynes." But Haniff decides to end the Haynes cycle with his own hands and engages him in combat.\nVera and the Gray Raven Commandant arrive just in time. Vera takes the killing blow from Haniff and slays Haynes, and together they watch as the gene bank is engulfed in destructive flames.\nBut the crisis isn't over yet—the Ascendant is still alive. Vera decides to stay behind and challenge the Ascendant at her full power.

Title: Floating Record - ER12 Spark to Wildfire → ER12-20 Good Night (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Before breaking herself once more, Vera remembers her original purpose. She recalls why she decided to help the commandant back then, and sees clearly the connection between them.\nThis time, she willingly becomes the commandant's blade, gladly accepting to burn until nothing remains in their hands.

Title: Floating Record - ER12 Spark to Wildfire → ER12-20 Good Night (After Battle)
SummaryContent: Vera defeats the Ascendant. The original "Lloyd" bows its head and dissipates into the old world.\nFrom afar, Lilith seems to sense something interesting.

Title: Floating Record - ER12 Spark to Wildfire → ER12-21 Time of Dawn (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Having unleashed her frame's full power, Vera indeed goes haywire. Within her burning M.I.N.D., through the voices of old friends, she revisits the heroic choices she witnessed throughout her life.\nShe believes this is her end, but fate doesn't allow her to leave—the commandant doesn't allow her to leave.\nRefusing to accept such a hasty conclusion, the commandant forcibly connects with the haywire Construct, reclaims her will, and guides the blade back to its sheath.

Title: Floating Record - ER12 Spark to Wildfire → ER12-22 Profile (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Babylonia's support forces rescue all three people from the island, with no casualties. In a dream, the commandant recalls various memories from the past—the eve of graduation, and the red Construct who helped deliver the virus sample to its destination.\nUpon opening their eyes again, Vera is right there.\nVanessa arrives with all members of Egret to visit, while the surviving Haniff makes his own choice. Meanwhile, the commandant receives a package of unknown origin containing the name tags of all previous "Lloyds".

Title: Floating Record - ER12 Spark to Wildfire → ER12-23 EX - Some Kind of Hero (EX)
SummaryContent: In the wastelands of Las Prados, the Gray Mako Squad from "Babylonia" begins to question if a new world exists beyond the "Red Line." During their 103rd secret exploration, the Gray Mako Squad finally get their chance to venture beyond the "Red Line," only to be brutally killed.\nThe surviving member, Lloyd, discovers that all of Las Prados is merely a Punishing Virus testing ground for "Babylonia."

Title: Floating Record - ER12 Spark to Wildfire → ER12-24 EX - There's Only One Way (EX)
SummaryContent: The Gray Squad is reduced to Lloyd alone. He conceals his true self and secretly begins preparing for a mass escape.\nFinally, one day, he uses the Punishing Virus to contaminate the testing ground's central hub, leading all Constructs in an escape from "Babylonia." Only after fleeing do they discover that the entire "Babylonia" was a fa?ade, the whole station merely an experimental facility built on the ground.\nAll the escaped Constructs perish in the windswept sands of Las Prados. Once again, Lloyd alone survives.

Title: Floating Record - ER12 Spark to Wildfire → ER12-25 EX - Poster Hero (EX)
SummaryContent: Lloyd is fortunate to be rescued and brought to the real Babylonia by two Constructs. Cherishing this "new world" and each of his comrades, he fights ferociously and claims to possess the ability of "Recall," gradually earning the title of "Undying Lloyd."\nBut the Ascendant Gabriel destroys everything, killing Lloyd's comrades and taking half of his skull in an attempt to guide him down the path of ascension.

Title: Floating Record - ER12 Spark to Wildfire → ER12-26 EX - Cliff (EX)
SummaryContent: Lloyd refuses Gabriel's invitation and insists on returning to Babylonia, only to discover they've already replaced him with an impostor to maintain the lie of Recall. Having lost his place, Lloyd begins wandering the earth.\nOnly after witnessing his once-respected Leader fall to become a "villain" does Lloyd realize the error isn't solely with the Punishing Virus. Human civilization has begun rotting from within.\nHe resolves to cleanse humanity of its putrid flesh and become the precipice of the new world.

Title: Floating Record - ER14 Ideal Cage → ER14-1 Arena (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: At the end of the Golden Age, crowds of spectators eagerly await the brutal mechanoid gladiator battles to begin. Among them, a gladiator named Veronica is about to step into the arena for the very first time.
