Title: Floating Record - ER14 Ideal Cage → ER14-2 Lockless Cage (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: This gladiatorial arena doesn't just imprison mechanoids trying to break free—it also traps a number of unfortunate humans within its walls.

Title: Floating Record - ER14 Ideal Cage → ER14-3 Opening Lines (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: A young mechanic named Serra meets Veronica for the first time in an atmosphere thick with tension and hostility, and their encounter is far from pleasant.

Title: Floating Record - ER14 Ideal Cage → ER14-4 Caged Wish (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Over time, a friendship begins to grow between Serra and Veronica. Meanwhile, in the hidden corners of the arena, the watchful eyes of the "Master" fix upon the one-of-a-kind Veronica.

Title: Floating Record - ER14 Ideal Cage → ER14-5 Mutated Parts (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Serra, who longs for freedom, refuses to let the arena chain her down. Beneath her careful disguises, she sets her secret plan into motion.

Title: Floating Record - ER14 Ideal Cage → ER14-6 Stars and the Soaring Bird (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Beneath a simulated starry sky, Serra and Veronica make a pact to escape. Yet in the shadows, another pair of human eyes watches closely, waiting for the right moment to strike.

Title: Floating Record - ER14 Ideal Cage → ER14-7 No One Escapes (After Battle)
SummaryContent: Betrayal is born from trust once given, and human greed consumes what little selfless friendship remains. Both Veronica and Serra become victims of this cruel trap.\nAnd behind it all, the arena's "Master", Dolores, smiles as she reaps the rewards of their suffering.

Title: Floating Record - ER14 Ideal Cage → ER14-8 The Price of Flight (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Under Dolores' coercion, Serra is forced into a vile plan: steal Veronica's powerful mechanical body for the disabled "Master".\nWhen faced with her former friend's fury, the desperate girl offers no defense for herself.

Title: Floating Record - ER14 Ideal Cage → ER14-8 The Price of Flight (After Battle)
SummaryContent: In the midst of crisis, Veronica finally understands Serra's true intentions. Raising her lance once more, she resolves to carve a bloody path to freedom for them both.

Title: Floating Record - ER14 Ideal Cage → ER14-9 Beyond Falsehood (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Across the vast snowfields, Veronica and Serra taste true freedom for the very first time. But moments later, Veronica realizes it is nothing more than a hollow dream.\nShe remains trapped inside the prison-like arena, never having left at all.

Title: Floating Record - ER14 Ideal Cage → ER14-10 Final Battle (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: After the Punishing Virus outbreak, the once magnificent arena now lies in ruins, yet Dolores still calmly awaits Veronica's arrival.\nWith her mind twisted beyond recognition, she prepares to unleash her ultimate weapon and complete her plan.

Title: Floating Record - ER14 Ideal Cage → ER14-10 Final Battle (After Battle)
SummaryContent: Everything has come to an end. The bloodlust and cheers of the arena are buried beneath smoke and dust. Veronica, free once more, spreads her wings and soars into the open sky.

Title: Floating Record - ER14 Ideal Cage → ER14-11 Until the Flowers Bloom (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: In the vast expanse of the free world, Veronica walks in silence. At the end of it all, she bids farewell to her human friend, Serra.

Title: Floating Record - ER14 Ideal Cage → ER14-12 Waning Moon (EX)
SummaryContent: In a lavish manor, young Dolores lives in carefree bliss under her parents' loving care. But this short-lived happiness ends abruptly when her mother falls gravely ill.

Title: Floating Record - ER14 Ideal Cage → ER14-13 Cold Rain (EX)
SummaryContent: Her mother's death drives her father to lock himself away in his laboratory for years. Rumors spread, and in time Delores learns the horrifying truth—he is trying to transfer her mother's consciousness into a mechanoid.

Title: Floating Record - ER14 Ideal Cage → ER14-14 Nocturne (EX)
SummaryContent: Years of illness and isolation twist Dolores into paranoia and suspicion. After eliminating everyone and everything that stood in her way, a wicked idea takes root in her mind—the creation of a mechanical gladiator arena.

Title: Floating Record - ER13 Woven Prologue → ER13-1 Godfather (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: In the garbage dump on the outskirts of Las Prados, two forgotten vagabonds suddenly hear a cry when rummaging for food.

Title: Floating Record - ER13 Woven Prologue → ER13-2 Needle (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: The girl grew up under the old tailor's care, but the cozy tailor workshop is now facing a major crisis.

Title: Floating Record - ER13 Woven Prologue → ER13-3 Threading (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: The conspiracy unfolds. The girl jolts awake from her slumber as a massive fire erupts in the dead of night, forcing her to flee the workshop.

Title: Floating Record - ER13 Woven Prologue → ER13-4 Beneath the Platform (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Discord enters Polard Orphanage, an agency established to cultivate candidates for early Construct human experiments and meets a girl named Eleanor.

Title: Floating Record - ER13 Woven Prologue → ER13-5 Wielding Shears (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: The truth buried for years finally comes to light, but the maid hesitates in the face of the real culprit. Severely wounded, she pleads with Eleanor for an order.

Title: Floating Record - ER13 Woven Prologue → ER13-6 Room Without a View (After Battle)
SummaryContent: In the viewless room, Discord becomes deeply trapped in illusion under "Eleanor's" companionship, gradually losing herself.

Title: Floating Record - ER13 Woven Prologue → ER13-7 Storm Impending (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: As a maid of the Monzano family, Discord clears all opposition to serve Madam Monzano. She once yearned for freedom but ultimately bows to the new order and is sent back to Kurono to be transformed into a Construct.

Title: Floating Record - ER13 Woven Prologue → ER13-8 Dhole Days (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: After joining the Purifying Force, Discord finds herself in a difficult situation, unable to even remember what she cares about. In a daze, she seems to recall someone asking her the same question before.

Title: Floating Record - ER13 Woven Prologue → ER13-9 Scream (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: In a Scarab squad mission, Yata pulls Discord out of a dream of her past. Now the squad's captain, Yata resolves to inherit Shorthalt's will and save her comrades no matter what.

Title: Floating Record - ER13 Woven Prologue → ER13-10 Concerto (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Scarab's commandant Valeria applies for a new frame for Discord. To replace her as she recovers from mental exhaustion caused by mending Discord's M.I.N.D., the Gray Raven Commandant joins Scarab on an infiltration mission in Las Prados.

Title: Floating Record - ER13 Woven Prologue → ER13-11 Waiting for Shiva (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: The Gray Raven Commandant helps Discord stabilize her M.I.N.D. In the subsequent confrontation with an Ascendant, Discord gets infected by the Punishing Virus and falls into a deep coma.

Title: Floating Record - ER13 Woven Prologue → ER13-12 The Final Three Acts (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Within her inner sandbox, she finishes sorting through her memories, cutting away her past self, and decides to raise the scissors—

Title: Floating Record - ER13 Woven Prologue → ER13-13 From Afar (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Scarab brings back new experimental data. After waking up, Discord will embark on a new path with her companions, weaving new melodies together.

Title: Arcade Anima - Path of Remembrance → How to Prepare Food for A Massive Group (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Three years after the Great Evacuation.
Three years since Watanabe left Babylonia and wandered on the surface.
Traveling across the globe, joining different camps, meeting survivors... The past few years have not been any quieter for him than the ones he spent fighting Corrupted.

Title: Arcade Anima - Path of Remembrance → Emergency Support Manual (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A few hours later, at the outskirt of Humanity Corp\'s camp.
The barrel raises half an inch, aiming for the red light dozens of yards away. The shooter holds his breath—then fires.
[Corrupted]: Rrrgghh...

Title: Arcade Anima - Path of Remembrance → PTSD Intervention (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Explosion after explosion threatens to deafen everyone on the field.
Zachery has seen such explosions in the past. Old records show that people used to level abandoned buildings with explosives.
But that is too inelegant for a mechanical engineer like him. The construction mech he designed would be able to safely demolish even the most robust high-rise.

Title: Arcade Anima - Path of Remembrance → The Outline of Soil-based Cultivation Techniques (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The sun is always blinding in the desert. Even the reflections from the metal shards in the sand are bright enough to get people covering their eyes.
And when it shines on the remnants of destroyed livelihoods, the cruel display is not a sight to behold.
Away from the debris, some people are clothed in robes only. They would have been hiding somewhere shaded on a normal day.

Title: Arcade Anima - Path of Remembrance → The Journey Remembered and Continued (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After the destruction of the Corrupted Colossus, the remnant of the damaged camp is left where it was.
The tattered tents are beyond repair, the flattened pots and weapons no longer usable. They were once the tools people relied on to survive, but now they lie in the sand, waiting for the shifting dunes to bury them.
But sand has already covered them before that day arrives.

Title: Floating Record - ER15 The Dying Sun → ER15-1 Fantasist (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: During adaptation to his new frame, Aeternion, Kamui repeatedly falls into nightmares due to M.I.N.D. turbulence. After regaining consciousness through the connection with Gray Raven's Commandant, Asimov cautions him that he'll need to actively work to overcome the problem.

Title: Floating Record - ER15 The Dying Sun → ER15-2 False Sun (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Nikola convenes an emergency meeting to confirm the current status of the Aeternion frame. He then orders Kamui and the Gray Raven Commandant to head to a surface military base, Ezette, to retrieve a communications device capable of contacting F.O.S. and to search for any potential survivors.

Title: Floating Record - ER15 The Dying Sun → ER15-3 Broken Bones (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Before the surface mission, the rest of Strike Hawk arrives to encourage Kamui and help set up M.I.N.D. anchors. During the transport, Kamui brings up the Golden Sun's exclusive designation, [SU-0], and shares his hope to become a sun that brings light to everyone.

Title: Floating Record - ER15 The Dying Sun → ER15-4 Ezette (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Kamui and the Gray Raven Commandant enter Ezette. From the message left behind, they learn that survivors, after an attack, retreated to the communications room and are now waiting to be rescued. Kamui guides the commandant to the archive room to obtain clearance to pass, recounting memories of his parents as they move.

Title: Floating Record - ER15 The Dying Sun → ER15-5 Blood Ties (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Kamui remembers taking the only family photo he has with his parents when he was little. A misunderstanding over a dress—and the lessons that came with it—taught him to keep his word. He tries to recall the other child in the photo, but his personal dossier reveals that the "parents" he remembers were not his biological parents.

Title: Floating Record - ER15 The Dying Sun → ER15-6 Shattered Mirror (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Kamui recalls being adopted by Odile and her husband as a child, while their biological son Azael was often hostile toward him. After a serious conflict, Odile arranged for both of them to undergo a trial in the restricted zone. With the trial approaching, Kamui and Azael sneaked toward the arsenal to finalize their preparations.

Title: Floating Record - ER15 The Dying Sun → ER15-7 Eclipsed Void (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Having survived life-threatening dangers together during the trial, Azael grew completely open with Kamui. But Odile's emergency recall cut their progress short, forcing them to return early. On the way back, they uncovered something strange and rescued an orphan named Catrayv. Odile brought all three boys back to Ezette, where they finally learned that the world had been devastated by a disaster called the Punishing Virus.

Title: Floating Record - ER15 The Dying Sun → ER15-8 Setting Sun (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: After the Punishing Virus outbreak, Kamui and Azael temporarily took over Ezette's management and realized something was wrong with the elite unit led by Odile. After investigating, the three boys confronted Odile and her husband, only to learn they were part of the World Government's Project Barleycorn, a genetic modification program using them as expendable test subjects. Their argument with their parents ended in a bitter, unresolved break.

Title: Floating Record - ER15 The Dying Sun → ER15-9 The Dead and the Departed (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: The three boys apologized under the pretense of celebrating Odile's birthday, temporarily reconciling with their parents. But Ezette was suddenly attacked by the Corrupted, and Odile and her husband sacrificed themselves to protect the children.

Title: Floating Record - ER15 The Dying Sun → ER15-9 The Dead and the Departed (After Battle)
SummaryContent: Back in the present, Kamui defeats his parents, who have mutated into the Corrupted. He finds the will and solar essence they left behind, absorbs it, and waits for his memory to be restored.

Title: Floating Record - ER15 The Dying Sun → ER15-10 Lowly as Ants (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Ezette was taken over by World Government military forces, and Kamui, along with the other children, was drawn into Project Barleycorn. During the training, tensions flared as a girl named Carol collapsed. Kamui took the initiative to help and calm everyone down. When government official Marlis arrived to persuade Ezette to disband voluntarily, she was refused, only for her to storm off in anger. Leif quietly allowed everyone to take Carol back to the dormitory to rest.

Title: Floating Record - ER15 The Dying Sun → ER15-11 Closest, Yet Furthest (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: The trainees cared for Carol in the dormitory while Kamui taught them the traditional Ezette song. Leif sent medicine and supplies for Carol, and the boys remembered his kindness. Shortly after, the modification metrics showed abnormal fluctuations, and the members realized Ezette was about to be ordered to begin relocation operations. Unwilling to be sent to their deaths, they began planning an escape.

Title: Floating Record - ER15 The Dying Sun → ER15-12 Wandering Sun (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: On the run, the trainees were attacked by the Corrupted. Ezette's soldiers rushed to their rescue and sacrificed themselves in the process. After a conflict erupted between the military and the trainees, both sides openly shared their concerns. Following their reconciliation, the military forces led by Leif prepared to carry out the relocation operation themselves. Inspired by Kamui, all trainees volunteered to join in, and Ezette officially launched the relocation operation codenamed Solar Exodus.

Title: Floating Record - ER15 The Dying Sun → ER15-13 The Mortal and the Mourner (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Back in the present, Kamui rushes to the communications room and discovers Marlis holding the Ezette survivors hostage. She massacres them all and declares she will put Kamui to the test, offering him a chance to rescue Carol in exchange.

Title: Floating Record - ER15 The Dying Sun → ER15-13 The Mortal and the Mourner (After Battle)
SummaryContent: The battle ends with Marlis taking Carol's life and taunting Kamui that he is not the true Golden Sun and cannot save his own family. Kamui rushes to the essence storage room, Ezette's last line of defense, recalling the same crisis the base faced years ago.

Title: Floating Record - ER15 The Dying Sun → ER15-14 Sunspot (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: In a flashback, Kamui and two others tracked down Kai, who had fled, and brought him back to Ezette. During the training, the group discussed Project Barleycorn's current bottleneck: the modifications had stalled, and an increasing number of members were becoming "failed products," known as Sunspots. For that reason, Kamui pushed himself too far and collapsed. Leif consoled the boys, and Azael followed up by contacting Marlis again, searching for a workable solution.

Title: Floating Record - ER15 The Dying Sun → ER15-15 The Sun-Seeker and the Ash-Bearer (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Ezette received a distress signal from a research facility and, after conducting reconnaissance, launched a rescue operation. However, the team was ambushed by overwhelming Corrupted forces and ended up trapped for days. When the Sunspot members led by Kai realized they still could help, they chose to drain their own essence to power Kamui and the others, sacrificing themselves so their friends could live.

Title: Floating Record - ER15 The Dying Sun → ER15-15 The Sun-Seeker and the Ash-Bearer (After Battle)
SummaryContent: As a result, Kamui, Azael, and Catrayv achieved a breakthrough, but it came at the sacrifice of most of their friends. Young Kamui was overwhelmed by grief, having gained power at such a brutal cost, and realized this was not the outcome he had ever truly hoped for.

Title: Floating Record - ER15 The Dying Sun → ER15-16 Home and Ruins (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Back in the present, Kamui is convinced that he isn't the true Golden Sun, but at least Azael and Catrayv are still alive. He leads the commandant to the essence storage room, expecting to reunite with his family, only to open the door and find his home reduced to ruins.

Title: Floating Record - ER15 The Dying Sun → ER15-17 Following the Same Road (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Inside, Kamui discovers Catrayv's final message. Unable to survive Marlis' assault, Catrayv entrusted Kamui with the last remaining solar essence. At once, massive waves of Corrupted and Hetero-Creatures surge in. During the retreat, the commandant is gravely wounded protecting Kamui, plunging him once again into guilt and despair.

Title: Floating Record - ER15 The Dying Sun → ER15-18 No Way Out (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Twenty years later, humanity's defenses steadily collapse, driving a retreat back to the surface Ezette base. The commandant finally succumbs to lingering injuries and their aftereffects. Kamui is engulfed by despair, but to keep his promise to protect humanity, he numbs his feelings and forces himself to continue rescuing survivors.

Title: Floating Record - ER15 The Dying Sun → ER15-19 Phoenix (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: During a routine patrol, Kamui receives a distress signal from three children. He races to save them, but is killed when the area collapses into ruins. As flames devour his surroundings, his fading consciousness fights to stay alive, helped by the M.I.N.D. anchors set by Strike Hawk and his connection to the commandant. When he regains awareness, he breaks the illusion and attacks the approaching figure of "Catrayv," calling out Azael's name.

Title: Floating Record - ER15 The Dying Sun → ER15-20 A Crime Forced Upon You (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Back in reality, Kamui sees through Azael's disguise and confronts him. Azael insists Kamui must be fused into him, just like every family member he slaughtered. Kamui refuses without hesitation, and their fight erupts. As they battle, the two revisit the defining moment that tore them apart.

Title: Floating Record - ER15 The Dying Sun → ER15-21 Why We Love and Why We Hate (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Once again, the trio found themselves trapped at the same impasse. Their investigation revealed genetic defects within them, an answer that shattered Ezette into despair. Kamui was devastated, but unwilling to give up, and he vowed to keep searching for a way to save his family. Azael, overwhelmed by hopelessness, turned to Marlis and the Punishing Virus, sealing Ezette's doom.

Title: Floating Record - ER15 The Dying Sun → ER15-22 Be Free for Me (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Kamui's application to the World Government finally went through, but before it could be acted on, a transformed Azael shattered the peace. With his own hands, he slaughtered every member of their family to fuse them as one, leaving Kamui as the only one able to escape. Ever since, Azael had waited, using this moment to spring a trap: luring Kamui to his death and trying to complete his vision of unity for their family.

Title: Floating Record - ER15 The Dying Sun → ER15-23 The Fool and the Hero (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: In the present, Kamui and Azael clash, each holding to their convictions. Kamui's resilience and unshakable resolve unsettle Azael, but Azael admits there's no way back for him now. Still, Kamui steadies himself for the chase, determined to use his own strength to give them all the release they need.

Title: Floating Record - ER15 The Dying Sun → ER15-23 The Fool and the Hero (After Battle)
SummaryContent: After his defeat, Azael learns what happened from that application years ago, realizing he was the one who crushed Ezette's rising hope with his own hands. Reflecting on Ezette's core creed brings Azael to full clarity, and he decides to end his own life to ensure Kamui's success.

Title: Floating Record - ER15 The Dying Sun → ER15-24 The Orphan (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: After Azael's death, Kamui sinks into melancholy, but confiding in the commandant helps him rediscover clarity in his convictions and ideals. At last, he comes to terms with Ezette's past and departs alongside Strike Hawk. Going forward, he will carry the hopes of his entire family and companions—past and present—pushing ahead with unwavering resolve.

Title: Floating Record - ER15 The Dying Sun → ER15-25 Family Day (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: After returning to Babylonia, Kamui brings back the Family Day tradition. He claims they're recording their first Family Day video while goofing around with Strike Hawk as usual. Nikola and Hassen examine the device Kamui brought back and uncover F.O.S.-related clues. Meanwhile, aboard the F.O.S. starship, Vanessa and her team face a worsening crisis.

Title: Arcade Anima - On the Brink of Abyss → On the Brink of Abyss (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The sky is gray, the air damp. The surroundings reek of suffocating rust.
A lightning bolt flashes past the sky, cleaving the clouds. "Blood" pours from the "wound."
It is rain... Rain is pouring down.

Title: Arcade Anima - On the Brink of Abyss → Between the Acts (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Watching her sister leave, Luna stops herself from calling Lucia back.
[Luna]: (Lucia... just needs more time.)
Similarly betrayed by humans, Lucia should feel the same hatred as Luna. She would not have passed the filtering otherwise.

Title: Arcade Anima - On the Brink of Abyss → Hesitation (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Lucia walks aimlessly among the city ruins.
The city feels fresh after the rain, with the dust and ashes in the air washed away.
Lucia has not taken her time to walk on this ravaged planet ever since she finished her Construct training and began to serve.

Title: Arcade Anima - On the Brink of Abyss → Lone Boat (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Huff... puff... Ugh...
Lucia\'s frame is releasing immense heat. The startled humanoid-hybrid Construct tries to touch Lucia, but she quickly retracts her hand.
[Lamia]: Are you alright—ouch! You\'re burning!

Title: Arcade Anima - On the Brink of Abyss → The Path Chosen (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nikola]: Unlike the others, you have greater potentials.
[Lucia]: Greater potential?
[Nikola]: That\'s right. Your bodies have a greater affinity to Tantalum-193, which means you can become Constructs.

Title: Arcade Anima - Come Play! → Mysterious Challenger?! (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Girl On Her Own]: Hello? Are you still there?
[Girl On Her Own]: C\'mon, I really need you to pull yourself together...
[Girl On Her Own]: I wonder what\'s going to happen down the road. Oh, silly me. Why don\'t I just ask you to spill some beans for me!

Title: Arcade Anima - Come Play! → Mysterious Challenger?! (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: Uhm... doing a bit worse than I did before. Another try it is, then!
The old display screen before Nanami flashes and shows the start screen—and with it, Nanami picks up the game controller again...
All the while unaware of the fact that she is no longer alone in her room.

Title: Arcade Anima - Come Play! → Unexpected Duo (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: Hello...
The girl knocks gently on the half-broken door. As expected, no one answers.
She would occasionally find human survivors hiding behind doors, but they always screamed and ran away when they saw her—strangers are no less frightening in a world ravaged by the Punishing Virus, as human as Nanami is.

Title: Arcade Anima - Come Play! → Challenger and Challenged (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: Ahoy! We\'ve arrived!
Flying on Power at incredible speed, Nanami and Arcana arrive at the coordinates of the signal in less than half a day.
[Nanami]: We\'ll have to find the signal ourselves starting from here... Hop!

Title: Arcade Anima - Come Play! → Born for the Game (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: Get out! I said I don\'t want to take the pills!
[Maid]: Master Oakes, Dr. Richard has said that if you refuse to take your medications, your condition will...
[Oakes]: Lies! He said that I would be back to school if I took the pills, but I\'m still stuck at home... I won\'t take them anymore... Cough...

Title: Arcade Anima - Come Play! → Let's Play Together! (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Mechanoid]: Have you finished?
[Arcana]: We apologize... We viewed many irrelevant memories, and that feels inappropriate, even with your consent.
[Mechanoid]: It doesn\'t matter as long as you don\'t affect my operation.

Title: Arcade Anima - Come Play! → Let's Play Together! (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Arcana]: Although we have defeated that wave of Corrupted... this server is going to be infected sooner or later, Sage.
The mechanoid\'s challenge will have to cease when that happens.
[Arcana]: If you want him to fulfill his wish, perhaps we should secretly hack the server and increase his score...

Title: Arcade Anima - Heart Compass → Zero Adjustment (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Before a giant window wall of the bridge, a few operators from CC gather around a Construct that\'s busy working away on the virtual panel.
Dozens of variables for coordinates flash under the pair of amber eyes. After carefully verifying the data, the Construct lets out a sigh, and the Inver-Device on her head sags down.
She does a quick wave to close the virtual panel and turns to face the anxious operators.

Title: Arcade Anima - Heart Compass → Phonon Drag (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Karenina]: **** it! Why!
Karenina shot open the door in a fit of rage and slammed on the desk a stack of paper stamped with red ink.
[Karenina]: This is the third time they rejected my internship application. Is the Science Council ****ing nuts? I was the top scorer among all the candidates on the written test!

Title: Arcade Anima - Heart Compass → Phonon Drag (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Wise stood motionlessly by his desk. He was looking at the old mechanical watch on his wrist. It looked decades old with a clock face full of scratches.
He stared at the hand that ticked silently until a mail popped up in his terminal.
[Wise]: ...

Title: Arcade Anima - Heart Compass → Edge Dislocation (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bianca]: Karenina!. There you are.
[Karenina]: Hey, what brought you here?
Karenina is a little surprised to see Bianca come through the door.

Title: Arcade Anima - Heart Compass → Invisible Light (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After confirming the coordinates of the base, Bianca ordered the rest of her team to infiltrate from different exits to eliminate the guards, while Bianca herself and Karenina entered deep into the base.
The base was already partly abandoned but still held some clues that were valuable to them.
The long hallway was empty with no one else but Karenina and Bianca, and the only thing they could hear were their own footsteps.

Title: Arcade Anima - Heart Compass → Oscillating Universe (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Wise is standing in the lab at the usual stop, opening the metal box he hasn\'t touched for years.
A sextant lies silently inside a foam beside a card covered in various handwriting.
He picks up the card and silently reads every word that he has already memorized by heart.

Title: Arcade Anima - Land of Bliss → Drowning (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Sshk...
Blood gushes from the neck, splattering onto the face of the next person.
The searing stimulus forces an involuntary scream from his throat.

Title: Arcade Anima - Land of Bliss → To Flame (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
32 days have passed since Group 013 of the Kurono Special Force arrived at Seaside Town.
The second to last line of defense collapses after yet another battle.
The three Constructs have retreated deeper underground with the surviving refugees. All of them are wounded.

Title: Arcade Anima - Land of Bliss → To Flame (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The cave-in happens before she can uncover more of the truth. Hush slams into her from the side—and that is the last thing Vera remembers before she falls unconscious.
She was probably struck.
She struggles within her M.I.N.D. as if churning through boiling seawater. Against such overwhelming pain, she cannot break free no matter how hard she tries.

Title: Arcade Anima - Land of Bliss → Cliff Fall (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
44 days have passed since Group 013 of the Kurono Special Force arrived at Seaside Town.
The three Constructs are all severely damaged, but fortunately, the very people they have protected reach out and pull them back from the frontlines.
They continue "patching up" themselves among the refugees for two days until their maintenance kit completely fails and their nano-reinforcement materials run out.

Title: Arcade Anima - Land of Bliss → Pure Land (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Hey opens the door, gripping the "Key" as she looks down upon the horde of Corrupted below.
[Vera]: You think you can lure away this many Corrupted by yourself? You\'re delusional!
[Hey]: So you need to stay behind—it\'s the only way those refugees might have a chance to survive.

Title: Arcade Anima - Land of Bliss → New Dawn (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Standing in the lightless "prison", you stare at the man seated in a chair beyond the bars.
Though you cannot make out his face clearly, you can tell from the occasional sounds he makes that he is probably quite young.
You executed Vera\'s "cast away" scenario half a day ago and was taken away by the Aurora Squadron.

Title: Arcade Anima - Candle Light Torment → What is Redemption? (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A morning in late winter.
It\'s been a while since the Gray Raven Commandant shook loose from the grasp of the "April 1 disappearance incident" and its aftermath.
However, the same thing happens again with Dark Aries.

Title: Arcade Anima - Candle Light Torment → Path to Redemption (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Palma]: So... that\'s why you had a brawl with those assholes and left the Clean Zone right under their noses, leaving me to deal with endless "greetings" from my former colleagues in the Purifying Force?
Having evaded numerous pursuers, you two found the motorcycle Noan had prepared beforehand a few miles away from the Clean Zone and are now racing toward the destination.
[Noan]: It\'s best to keep the number of people involved to a minimum. Acting rashly can easily jeopardize Commandant Simon\'s safety.

Title: Arcade Anima - Candle Light Torment → The Dead Are the Wax (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Noticing that Palma and Simon have already moved to a secure spot, Noan immediately throws the flash grenades and hand grenades he had prepared beforehand.
By preemptively lowering the sensitivity of his visual and auditory receptors, he fights a way through the narrow prison corridor.
Just as Noan prepares to venture alone toward Bethe\'s location, the terminal dropped by the defector leader abruptly rings, indicating an incoming call...

Title: Arcade Anima - Candle Light Torment → The Dead Are the Wax (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bethe\'s Voice]: ...Tsk! Noan! Hurry over and help!!
[Bethe\'s Voice]: Your "replica" has stirred up some real trouble busting in here!
[Noan?]: ...

Title: Arcade Anima - Candle Light Torment → The Living Are the Wicks (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
As the dust from the collapse gradually settles, the imprisoned corpses finally regain their freedom, scattering under the winter sky.
From beneath the layers of rubble, a frail and elderly figure emerges.
He struggles to free himself from the weight of the corpses piling above him, managing to squeeze half his body out.

Title: Arcade Anima - Candle Light Torment → Painkiller (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The biting chill hints at impending snowfall.
Hauling Noan back up to the tower\'s summit, your face drains of color as you struggle for air.
[Noan]: Yeah.

Title: Extra Story - EX00 Frozen Darkness → Narwhal (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[α]: So, any findings?
[Roland]: That Narwhal appears to be a creation born in the times when bionic restoration was the craze.
[Roland]: A few of them were released into the wild to be "domesticated" by nature, so to speak.

Title: Extra Story - EX00 Frozen Darkness → Returning to Surface (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Aircraft System]: —Prepare to depart L-7 returning orbit—
[Aircraft System]: —Moving through low Earth Corrupted ring—
[Aircraft System]: —All systems normal—

Title: Extra Story - EX00 Frozen Darkness → Forest Guard (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Commandant! Commandant, wake up!
You open your eyes to a world of freezing cold...
The white vapor from your breath clouds the dark gray sky before you...

Title: Extra Story - EX00 Frozen Darkness → Aurora (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
By the time you arrive at the camp, the sky has long turned to night.
[Diana]: Our base is deeper south of the forest.
[Diana]: But since you said you are going to New Murmansk up north, I\'ve brought you here to our temporary camp.

Title: Extra Story - EX00 Frozen Darkness → Aurora (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[??]: Hey! You there!
[??]: Halt!
A man with an electromagnetic harpoon gun appears from the side of a container.

Title: Extra Story - EX00 Frozen Darkness → Gazing from Afar (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[α]: That\'s what I thought...
[α]: It\'s... warning the humans...
[α]: No, not just that...

Title: Extra Story - EX00 Frozen Darkness → Crossed Blades (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[α]: How\'s that?
Red currents flash as they enshroud the Narwhal\'s long horn, illuminating the rare excitement on Alpha\'s face.
[Derek]: ——▆▂——▄█▆——!!

Title: Extra Story - EX00 Frozen Darkness → Crossed Blades (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Clang—!
[α]: Your strength has left quite an impression.
[Rosetta]: (Pants)

Title: Extra Story - EX00 Frozen Darkness → Persistence and Courage (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The fight between Alpha and Rosetta leaves the already devastated port in further disarray.
[Sailor]: Our port...!
[Fisher]: Those... damn monsters!

Title: Extra Story - EX00 Frozen Darkness → Reason to Fight (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Evan]: Why...
[Evan]: Why are you all hurting Miss Rosetta?
[Evan]: Why... Why are you hurting someone who\'s trying to protect you?!

Title: Extra Story - EX00 Frozen Darkness → Machine Tide (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Sailor]: Corrupted! Corrupted have made landfall!
[Fisher]: Dammit, there are too many of them!
[Sailor]: Open fire!

Title: Extra Story - EX00 Frozen Darkness → Chaos (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Lee!
[Lee]: Urgh...
[Lee]: I\'m alright. I was just a little careless.

Title: Extra Story - EX00 Frozen Darkness → Reunion (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Clang—!
[Lee]: Gyah—!
As the situation becomes increasingly chaotic, Rosetta\'s M.I.N.D. is reaching boiling point.

Title: Extra Story - EX00 Frozen Darkness → Failure (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Stop... right there...
Alpha loses interest in Lucia when it is clear that she is no longer in any shape to fight.
[Derek]: ——▄——▆▁——▃

Title: Extra Story - EX00 Frozen Darkness → Failure (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Boom—!
Rosetta\'s massive frame arcs into the air and falls into a warehouse in the port.
[α]: You still moving?

Title: Extra Story - EX00 Frozen Darkness → Hope (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Urgh...
By the time Lucia regains consciousness...
Several humanoid hybrid Constructs from the ARU appear before Lucia, clearing out the remaining Corrupted.

Title: Extra Story - EX01 Grand Blue → EX01-1 HelloWorld (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Hello there, friend.
Yes, I know. How foolish it is, to imagine a friend for myself, isn\'t it?
But, foolish though I may be, I\'m willing to believe that you are good, or at least, one that is trustworthy.

Title: Extra Story - EX01 Grand Blue → EX01-2 Summer Beach Fun (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: Yooooooo look! We\'re nearing the sea! The sea is BLUE! It\'s totes different than in the Nighter!
[Chrome]: Kamui, can you just stay still in your seat...
[Chrome]: You shouldn\'t drop your guard even on a vacation, otherwise you might not be ready for possible emergencies.

Title: Extra Story - EX01 Grand Blue → EX01-2 Summer Beach Fun (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Cathy 6337]: Everyone, this is, the proud feature of Venus Splash Park—Morning Star Beach!
[Cathy 6337]: Please have fun and relax for now! We will be following the tour schedule and enter the theme park in one hour.
[Lucia]: Have fun and relax, huh...

Title: Extra Story - EX01 Grand Blue → EX01-3 Chat about the Future (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: (Inhales)
[Lucia]: (Exhales)
[Kamui]: Capt., look! It\'s the beach! A beach that\'s just like the holos!

Title: Extra Story - EX01 Grand Blue → EX01-4 Cat and Mouse - Fake (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The hurried pace, the footprints without a care for direction, the beach decorations that the person must have ran into...
These are all signs that the Construct under pursuit knows nothing about counter-tracking.
For someone to run in so flustered a fashion, they must, at the very least, be worth chasing.

Title: Extra Story - EX01 Grand Blue → EX01-4 Cat and Mouse - Fake (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: The gates are open!
[Chrome]: That Roland... He connected a high-voltage device to the gate...
[Chrome]: If we\'d tried to destroy or go over it earlier, we\'d probably be burned to a crisp.

Title: Extra Story - EX01 Grand Blue → EX01-5 Transcendant (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
As Chrome begins calling for a transport fleet from Babylonia, Kamui stirs awake.
[Kamui]: You people...
Kamui hops and takes on a combat stance in one motion, wielding his greatsword and pointing it at you.

Title: Extra Story - EX01 Grand Blue → EX01-5 Transcendant (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Roland]: Tch...
Camu roars angrily, launching heavy blows at Roland with the greatsword in his hand.
[Roland]: Hah... Thought you could only bark like some rabid dog, turns out you can bite.

Title: Extra Story - EX01 Grand Blue → EX01-6 Uncontrolled Reality (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
It took you and the others ten minutes to reach Camu.
As soon as Liv is done with Camu\'s emergency repairs, Camu pulls himself up, trying to go after Roland.
[Asimov]: I advise you to calm down.

Title: Extra Story - EX01 Grand Blue → EX01-6 Uncontrolled Reality (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: ...What a long detour. Looks like Roland deliberately laid those trails to mislead us.
[Lee]: But no matter what, his trails vanished here. That\'s for sure.
[Lucia]: There\'s a... hatch, hidden on the foundation wall...?

Title: Extra Story - EX01 Grand Blue → EX01-7 Into the Abyss (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Camu descends the narrow and inclined tunnel as if in free fall.
Soon, an enormous expanse unfolds before Camu\'s eyes—
[Camu]: ...Tsk.

Title: Extra Story - EX01 Grand Blue → EX01-8 Searing (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Right when you are about to lose your patience, Camu finally contacts you.
[Camu]: I found the control room. The connection underground is very unstable. I just found a place where I have signal.
[Asimov]: Good. Commandant, transfer the visuals over. I\'ll run the analysis right away.

Title: Extra Story - EX01 Grand Blue → EX01-9 It's Gonna Work (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Camu]: Alright, pick a path you like.
[Camu]: ...What is it? I\'ll find my own way to the surface.
You hear the rumbling of mechanical movement coming from all over the theme park.

Title: Extra Story - EX01 Grand Blue → EX01-10 System Warnings (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: The Ferris wheel... It\'s on!
Just when everyone is about to investigate the aftermath of the explosions just now, the Ferris wheel suddenly lights up.
[Lucia]: ...Could this be the doing of the Ascendants?

Title: Extra Story - EX01 Grand Blue → EX01-10 System Warnings (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Meanwhile, on the other end of the explosions...
[Camu]: ...Well, time to look for a way out now.
——WARNING, WARNING——

Title: Extra Story - EX01 Grand Blue → EX01-11 Ant Venom (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Pain. Pain. Pain...
For Vera, pain is what makes life, life.
—But there is no pain to be found here. To the uninitiated, the quietude of this place might even hint at inner peace.

Title: Extra Story - EX01 Grand Blue → EX01-12 Scientific Solutions (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Explosions! All members, be on the alert!
[Liv]: I\'ve located where the detonation signal came from!
[Liv]: We can make it in time if we surround them now!

Title: Extra Story - EX01 Grand Blue → EX01-13 Dead End (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
—Venus Splash Park underground construction center.
——WARNING, WARNING——
—Structural damage to multiple supporting columns within the park—

Title: Extra Story - EX01 Grand Blue → EX01-14 Countdown (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
...
...Hear...
...You hear...

Title: Extra Story - EX01 Grand Blue → EX01-14 Countdown (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You and the others are waiting anxiously, when a familiar dark figure finally appears in front of you.
[???]: —
[Camu]: ...You guys sure are flashy.

Title: Extra Story - EX01 Grand Blue → EX01-15 Bloody Confession (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Hello there, friend.
Ah, forget it, "friend." What nonsense it is. By now, you should have already realized that this is just a madman\'s ravings with an imaginary friend.
Have you ever wondered what it would be like, on the day you die?

Title: Extra Story - EX01 Grand Blue → EX01-16 M.A.D (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Gabriel]: I\'ve been waiting for you.
[Gabriel]: I apologize for hindering you from achieving your purpose.
[Gabriel]: Miss Luna wishes for this, so please understand.

Title: Extra Story - EX01 Grand Blue → EX01-16 M.A.D (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Vera dodges Gabriel\'s aerial charge, and slashes at Gabriel\'s calf with her blade as he zips past her.
But Gabriel makes a turn in the air in time, dodging Vera\'s attack and putting distance between them.
[Gabriel]: Power, reaction speed, ductility.

Title: Extra Story - EX01 Grand Blue → EX01-17 The End of Childhood (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
...
Who—Where—When? Why is everything dark?
Is this what death feels like?

Title: Extra Story - EX01 Grand Blue → EX01-17 The End of Childhood (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Shark-speare]: Let\'s... play...
[Shark-speare]: L-le-let\'s...
Shark-speare crumbles, letting off distorted noises, then collapses in front of you.

Title: Extra Story - EX01 Grand Blue → EX01-18 Rose Stem (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
It all still feels so surreal...
Is it because of the intense series of events? Now that everything is finally over, you instead feel like being in a dream.
A few days after that, Babylonia sent the Support Force and Engineering Force to Venus Splash Park\'s vicinity...

Title: Extra Story - EX01 Grand Blue → EX01-19 Your Life Story (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Some time passes after that, and when everything is finally returning to normal...
[Sophia]: Ice cream, anyone...? Ice cream made with spare electrolyte fluid in the ice cream machine.
[Nanami]: Yaaay! Gimme one, gimme one! Vanilla salt soda flavor!

Title: Extra Story - EX01 Grand Blue → EX01-20 The Necessary Black Sheep (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Asimov]: Commandant, do you have a moment?
[Asimov]: Regarding both of the two separated consciousnesses, though minute, they both display stability decrease over time.
[Asimov]: Whether it\'s because of the effect of Tenebrion or something else, this kind of continuous decline is not a situation we\'d like to see.

Title: Extra Story - EX01 Grand Blue → Stranded-01  Prepare for Winter (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Jamilah]: ...It\'s a complete failure. Looks like we\'ve still overestimated our power.
[Watanabe]: The Ascendants are formidable foes after all. Though that "Huaxu" thing\'s taken, we still kept the city intact in the end... Sort of.
After the battle in Kowloong, Akdilek and the Forsaken returned to their campsites to rest. The leaders are now sitting and discussing the next issue.

Title: Extra Story - EX01 Grand Blue → Stranded-02  Statue (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Selena]: ...
[Roland]: ...
[Gabriel]: Roland, are you still studying this female?

Title: Extra Story - EX03 Lost Chapter → Theater Ruins-01  Black Guardian (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Record ID: HX-GA-25133-Kowloon local. Confirm recovery?
[Huaxu]: Recovery confirmed. Verify keywords "Kowloong"" and ""Art"?
Verifying keywords "Kowloong"" and ""Art"... Confirmed.

Title: Extra Story - EX03 Lost Chapter → Theater Ruins-01  Black Guardian (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Young Lad]: Where do you think you\'re going!
The young lad blocks the rebels\' escape and knocks over their chieftain.
Seeing their leader fall, the thieves kneel down in fright and surrender.

Title: Extra Story - EX03 Lost Chapter → Theater Ruins-02  Requiem (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Record ID: HX-GA-49447-Kowloon End. Confirm recovery?
[Huaxu]: Recovery confirmed. Verify keywords "Kowloong"" and ""War"?
Confirmed.

Title: Extra Story - EX03 Lost Chapter → Theater Ruins-02  Requiem (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
War has long since ravaged this city... Perhaps, for too long.
The once prosperous and orderly city streets are now broken into dusty and disorderly ruins.
After killing the last Corrupted in the barricade, Qu could finally take a breath as the remaining soldiers evacuated the heavy artillery.

Title: Extra Story - EX03 Lost Chapter → EX03-1 Dusty Memory (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
"Testing. Okay. Recording should be up and running."
The processed electronic sound from a small machine on the ground echoes in the cramped carriage.
"Well, here\'s your pay for the information... I guess we should call this a deal?"

Title: Extra Story - EX03 Lost Chapter → EX03-1 Dusty Memory (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Transport Drone]: Ticket received from Pulao Crew. Initiating automatic stop.
[Changyu]: (Panting)
[Guardian]: Ticket dispatched.

Title: Extra Story - EX03 Lost Chapter → EX03-2 Theater Crisis (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Changyu]: I\'m back!
[Director]: So you do know to come back?
[Changyu]: ...It\'s not like I did anything illegal.

Title: Extra Story - EX03 Lost Chapter → EX03-3 Against the Current (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Another bright day begins to break. Laoyu gets up and washes up as normal, then moves the dried wood from the shelf to the warehouse.
Laoyu is unsure why he continues to do this, other than the fact that not doing so would make his day feel incomplete.
[Laoyu]: H-heave—ho!

Title: Extra Story - EX03 Lost Chapter → EX03-4 Changing Tide (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Changyu]: East City\'s Xujiu Street... Wang\'s Pawn Shop, this is the last store.
Changyu is standing in front of a building and sifting through his memories. Seeing that it is still the same building as before, he enters the premises.
In the pawnshop, a middle-aged man is sitting behind the counter, looking down at the panel in his hand. In his other, an old copper coin is being absentmindedly twirled.

Title: Extra Story - EX03 Lost Chapter → EX03-4 Changing Tide (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Gangster A]: Don\'t underestimate us!
[Changyu]: Mmmph...!
A thug laying on the ground suddenly grabs Changyu by the ankle, preventing him from leaving. Seeing this, the thug\'s cohorts rush toward Changyu, and the brawl continues.

Title: Extra Story - EX03 Lost Chapter → EX03-5 Reunion (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Director]: Why are you all banged up?
[Director]: Sigh...
The director wants to scold Changyu, but all he can muster up is a sigh.

Title: Extra Story - EX03 Lost Chapter → EX03-6 Battle of Changban (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A deafening explosion rumbles outside the city. Changyu is standing in front of the theater, watching the Kowloongers flee toward the port or head toward the grounds for Tabula Akasha.
Yusheng is standing at the end of the street. He bows toward the theater, then turns to exit the city with a gun holstered on his back.
The huge rifle is all the more apparent hanging on his thin back.

Title: Extra Story - EX03 Lost Chapter → EX03-7 Disconnected (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Hearing Changyu\'s lyrics, a middle-aged man begins to take action. He slams into a Corrupted that passed by a Pulao soldier attempting to charge the crowd.
[Middle-aged Man]: ～Else, wherefore would one walk the earth?～
The man tries his best to pin the Corrupted down, paying no heed to the Corrupted stabbing him in the chest.

Title: Extra Story - EX03 Lost Chapter → EX03-7 Disconnected (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Pulao Crew D]: Get out of here, monsters!
Right as a Corrupted is about to put an end to an exhausted Changyu, the Pulao soldier chasing after him finally arrives on the scene.
Running over, he shoots the Corrupted to prevent it from approaching Changyu.

Title: Extra Story - EX03 Lost Chapter → EX03-8 Answer (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Record ID: HX-GA-21243-Kowloong. Confirm recovery?
[Luna]: What\'s this?
[Huaxu]: In response to your request, I will explain the breaking point of it all.

Title: Extra Story - EX03 Lost Chapter → EX03-9 Before the Storm (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Qu]: Is anyone willing to carry out this mission?
[Moyuan]: I\'ll go. Bai Gui has been busy doing business with Akdilek recently.
[Bai Gui]: Indeed, Moyuan would be more suitable. Sending others over to the World Government would turn exchanging words into exchanging blows.

Title: Extra Story - EX03 Lost Chapter → EX03-10 Will of Kowloong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Darkness—endless darkness.
I no longer remember how long I\'ve been walking in darkness.
But the pain of losing something precious is still unforgettable.

Title: Extra Story - EX03 Lost Chapter → EX03-10 Will of Kowloong (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
On the bridge, Chi Ling headshots a Musashi VI opposite of them, then charges forward with two Pulao soldiers to cover Qu and then retreat behind the defensive line.
When the three approach, Qu grabs a rifle from a Pulao soldier and empties the clip under the bridge.
Once the gunfire stops, the roar from the Corrupted falls silent.

Title: Extra Story - EX03 Lost Chapter → EX03-11 Legacy (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Pulao Crew]: Damn it, up there!
Hearing the soldier shout, the people on the frontline look up as fiery red mechanical clusters zip past the cloudy sky.
[Qu]: Shoot them down.

Title: Extra Story - EX03 Lost Chapter → EX03-11 Legacy (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Chi Ling feels like the distance from the City Gate to the East City District were opposite ends of the world.
Every step seems to require every ounce of his remaining strength.
The Corrupted roar, drowning out his headset and causing him to lose contact with his troops a few minutes prior. The roar even echoes through the channel, so Chi Ling simply removes his headset and holds it in his hand.

Title: Extra Story - EX03 Lost Chapter → EX03-12 Homecoming (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Defense turrets bombard the battlefield. High-pitched laser rifle blasts punctuate the roar of assault rifles.
[Qu]: Thirty degrees portside, fire!
After making great sacrifices, Kowloong has finally stabilized the defensive line. However, just as Qu commands the troops to re-consolidate the line, a loud rumble is heard above the city gate.

Title: Extra Story - EX03 Lost Chapter → EX03-12 Homecoming (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The fight ends. Moyuan falls to the ground, letting the rain wash over her.
[Moyuan]: Home... I want to...
Qu places her weapon between Moyuan\'s eyebrows. Qu\'s rain-soaked hair covers her eyes, obscuring her expression.

Title: Extra Story - EX03 Lost Chapter → EX03-13 Tabula Akasha (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
————
[Qu]: All enemies clear on line III to VIII. Calling all survivors in all districts. You copy?
[Qu]: ...Is it too late already?

Title: Extra Story - EX03 Lost Chapter → EX03-14 Unnamed War (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Power supply initiating self-test. Scanning active partitions. Loading program.
>>80%>>92%>>100%...... Entering system.
Receiving sound waves. Processing environmental data. Verifying program<<<<< Current status: Secure.

Title: Extra Story - EX03 Lost Chapter → EX03-15 Unexpected Encounter (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The end of the passage glows red from the alarm.
Unable to see the other side of the wall, HNB1 readies his weapon and nods to HBG3. Whatever comes in will be destroyed by their coordinated attack.
————

Title: Extra Story - EX03 Lost Chapter → EX03-16 Area of Defense (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Dead silence hangs over the road, only punctuated by the sound of footsteps moving forward and the occasional explosions in the distance.
The smell of oil and rust fills the air. The world seems to have been frozen in place.
[HNB1]: It\'s so empty here...

Title: Extra Story - EX03 Lost Chapter → EX03-16 Area of Defense (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Little Girl]: Nngh...
[HNB1]: Can you keep going?
[Little Girl]: I\'m... I\'m okay...

Title: Extra Story - EX03 Lost Chapter → EX03-17 Little Promise (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Somewhere far away, through the cold darkness, through the smoke and war, our city burns in the flames of war.
Through my database simulation, I can feel the city bleeding. I can see blown-up bodies lying in the ruins of their homes. I can feel flags trembling in the hands of survivors.
Souls of the dead. Souls of the dying. Souls of the living.

Title: Extra Story - EX03 Lost Chapter → EX03-18 Duty of Tai'E (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The three of them set out before dawn.
[HBG3]: We are getting closer and closer to the war zone.
The ground still remains hot from the battle, making their journey arduous as they climb over the ruins.

Title: Extra Story - EX03 Lost Chapter → EX03-18 Duty of Tai'E (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[HNB1]: When I went to look for food, I went into a food processing plant.
[HNB1]: There\'s something off about the factory. It\'s empty, but it\'s still operating.
[HNB1]: I climbed over a noise barrier and entered the factory. The noise from the machines was deafening.

Title: Extra Story - EX03 Lost Chapter → EX03-19 Farewell (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Time is up.
A group of Corrupted roars at him. They spread what were once limbs, and countless sharp claws pierce his body.
He holds the girl tightly, as his armor is shredded to pieces.

Title: Extra Story - EX03 Lost Chapter → EX03-19 Farewell (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
He moves. Toward the evacuation point.
The sun is rising from the south, casting a slanted ray of bright yellow light. He sees a shimmering dot in the north, like a star, glowing faintly.
He walks. Slowly. Forward.

Title: Extra Story - EX02 Firn Night → EX02-1 Arctic Reunion (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Near the reserve operation area of Babylonia, several squads are busy carrying supplies and weapons.
[Lucia]: Looks like there\'s an emergency mission.
[Liv]: Everyone\'s on edge. Hopefully, the mission isn\'t too serious.

Title: Extra Story - EX02 Firn Night → EX02-2 Reinforcements (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Rosetta]: Commandant, other transport crafts were intercepted by air defense. According to their crash trajectory, they should\'ve landed near us.
After defeating the enemy, Rosetta proposed to join the others from Babylonia.
Rosetta walks... or rather, floats beside you as she speaks.

Title: Extra Story - EX02 Firn Night → EX02-3 Captain and Tide (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The base is just an hour of snowmobile ride away. It is surrounded by a wall fortified with cannons, with warships docked offshore.
[???]: ...Quite the reinforcements, Babylonia! They\'re all wounded!
After dismounting the snowmobile and entering the base, you see a disgruntled man accompanied by guards blocking the way.

Title: Extra Story - EX02 Firn Night → EX02-4 Snowy Skirmish (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Clank... Clank... Clack... Clank...
The massive weight of the mech leaves deep impressions in the snow. Each step is like a toddler learning to walk.
Clank... Clank...

Title: Extra Story - EX02 Firn Night → EX02-4 Snowy Skirmish (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Fisher A]: Cough... Cough...
[Rosetta]: Are you guys all right?
[Fisher A]: We don\'t need no sympathy from ya sinners.

Title: Extra Story - EX02 Firn Night → EX02-5 Speedster (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Atiel]: Ohoho, you can run, but you can\'t hide!
[Children]: Hmph... W-we won\'t lose to you Babylonian devils! Everyone, attack!
[Evan]: Buddy up! Swimming by, complete! Supersonic Derek Wahoo!

Title: Extra Story - EX02 Firn Night → EX02-6 United Nightmare (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
It was a perilous battle, but it ended in victory for the Arctic Route Union.
Civilians rushed in to see if the residential regions were intact. Simon also left with the crowd, saying that he needed to look into something with Atiel.
Leaving only you, and the Forest Guards, all lost in contemplation.

Title: Extra Story - EX02 Firn Night → EX02-7 The Past (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: What\'s the meaning of this? Why did they mention Amberia\'s name?!
[???]: Oh. You think I\'m playing her like a puppet?
[???]: Are you not?

Title: Extra Story - EX02 Firn Night → EX02-8 Research Building (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
With the information from the captain, everyone hurried to the special research lab used to create and research humanoid-hybrid Constructs.
[Atiel]: I can\'t believe the "Amberia" that brought destruction upon the ARU still lives...
[Simon]: According to the captain... That means all those people that were captured were just scapegoats.

Title: Extra Story - EX02 Firn Night → EX02-9 Codes (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Atiel]: Hey, Simon! By the looks of the stuff here, I think we made it to the database room.
[Simon]: Hang on, let me have a look...
[Simon]: Hey, Diana. Are you familiar with this system?

Title: Extra Story - EX02 Firn Night → EX02-10 Inver-Narwhal (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Construct]: Good thing we rendezvoused in time. Quickly, escort the civilians to the safe zone. Everyone else, keep an eye on the bionics!
[Fisher]: Err\' damn cannonslinger, get your asses over \'ere!
The base is in turmoil. One group of humans is engaging with the bionics approaching the base, while another is hastily preparing for the next wave of attacks.

Title: Extra Story - EX02 Firn Night → EX02-11 Blood Trail (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Forest Guards]: Found her tracks. Over here!
The attack may have failed, but you managed to place a tracker on Atiel.
Leaking vital fluid and broken Construct parts are visibly scattered on the white snow. Leaving the battle, the Forest Guard have dispersed, trying to track Atiel\'s whereabouts.

Title: Extra Story - EX02 Firn Night → EX02-12 Frozen Battlefield (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Diana]: I can\'t believe there\'s such a large cave here...
Walking into the entrance, everyone arrives at a strange underground world.
[Diana]: There\'s a production line over there...

Title: Extra Story - EX02 Firn Night → EX02-13 Ice Venture (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Diana]: Rosetta, Commandant! Are you okay?
During the battle, the trap in the underground base suddenly activated, completely isolating the upper and lower layers.
[Diana]: There\'s a few injured, but what about you?!

Title: Extra Story - EX02 Firn Night → EX02-14 Another Battlefield (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Amberia]: ——
[Rosetta]: Amberia... Just like the records, no—even more terrifying...
The grotesque form of Amberia in "person," is the direct embodiment of her terrifying image in the past tales.

Title: Extra Story - EX02 Firn Night → EX02-15 Amberia (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Simon]: Gather up and defend! Keep an eye on your companions!
[Simon]: Zone 2, switch places with Zone 4! Move!
[Bionic Machine]: ROAR!!!

Title: Extra Story - EX02 Firn Night → EX02-16 The Unlucky (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
In the surreal projection of M.I.N.D. space, you see another Amberia—the real Amberia.
Guided by the narwhal\'s voice, you see the true master of the bionics, Amberia, in the deepest recesses of her mind, festered by nightmares.
[Amberia]: Who is it...? You\'re not Derek? Who are you?

Title: Extra Story - EX02 Firn Night → EX02-16 The Unlucky (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
When the pain pierced through my body, a thought flickered into my mind.
I\'ll destroy everything. I\'ll give everything up.
But in the end, I couldn\'t. I didn\'t have it in me.

Title: Extra Story - EX02 Firn Night → EX02-17 Farewell to Nightmare (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
——
After Rosetta\'s final blow, Amberia is completely engulfed by the explosion. The cave begins to collapse from the aftermath.
[Rosetta]: Yeah. Commandant, you might want to lighten up your mech.

Title: Extra Story - EX02 Firn Night → EX02-18 We Lucky Few (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You shine a light on the surrounding area, but you still find yourself enveloped in darkness.
[Rosetta]: Your mech ejects the pilot in case of danger. Kinda lucky I managed to catch you before the cave collapsed, Commandant.
Right before the cave collapsed, Rosetta dropped her weapons and rushed over to protect you from the falling debris.

Title: Extra Story - EX02 Firn Night → Snow Tracks-01  On snow (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Construct A]: Affiliation unknown, and there are no bionic machines infected with the virus in the group. Has the route alliance been fighting them?
[Construct B]: From our observations over our visit, this does seem to be the case. This is something that only happens in this polar region.
[???]: The numbers on the report shouldn\'t have any mistakes, right?

Title: Extra Story - EX02 Firn Night → Snow Tracks-02  Test Subject Rosetta (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Rosetta]: ...So the frame is completed?
[Nikola]: The tech department told me this. Do you feel like something\'s wrong?
[Rosetta]: Centaur kit...

Title: Extra Story - EX02 Firn Night → Snow Tracks-03  Depart (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Gabriel]: Roland, have you seen Lamia?
[Roland]: No. Why are you looking for her?
[Gabriel]: I just want to check on everyone\'s condition at all times. Lamia is not that stable, and I worry that she will do something strange.

Title: Extra Story - EX04 Echo Aria → EX04-1 Operation Red Tide (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
5:30 a.m. Universal time
On a transport craft in low Earth orbit...
The engine emits a low and steady hum. After some time, the crews\' ears become accustomed to the sound. Rather than finding it disruptive, the uniform rhythm is like white noise lulling the crew with the desire to sleep.

Title: Extra Story - EX04 Echo Aria → EX04-2 Lone Hawk (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
On the desert wasteland, jagged rock formations jut out of the ground through which the Red Tide flows.
Wanshi squats on a towering rock formation.
The Red Tide quietly trickles below.

Title: Extra Story - EX04 Echo Aria → EX04-2 Lone Hawk (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Despite the dense layer of clouds overhead blotting out the sun, the Earth\'s surface is still scorching hot.
The sand carried in the scorching wind stings your face.
[???]: ……▁▅▃……▃……▆……

Title: Extra Story - EX04 Echo Aria → EX04-3 Land for No "Man" (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You walk with Wanshi for what feels like ages.
With drinking water exhausted and your legs equally so, you never knew hiking could be so difficult.
The desert is not a place for talking. With sand assaulting your every orifice, opening your mouth is just an invitation for a mouthful of sand.

Title: Extra Story - EX04 Echo Aria → EX04-4 Abyss of Gravity (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Time is fleeting like sand through an hourglass.
The sun hangs on the western horizon, shedding light across the lower half of the sky and turning to night upon reaching this far.
The dry air and radiational cooling have caused the surrounding temperature to drop rapidly. Scorching heat turns to frigid cold in an instant.

Title: Extra Story - EX04 Echo Aria → EX04-5 Never Ending (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Ayla]: Really? Is that what you think?
[Ayla]: Nothing strange about that.
[Ayla]: But she is different. Even though she\'s never been to Earth herself, she\'s had all sorts of unrealistic fantasies about it.

Title: Extra Story - EX04 Echo Aria → EX04-5 Never Ending (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Refugee]: D-don\'t come any closer!
Right at that moment, a bullet pierces the head of the Hetero-Creature.
It writhes on the ground but continues to breathe. That is, until a sharp blade cuts it in half.

Title: Extra Story - EX04 Echo Aria → EX04-6 Ashes to Ashes (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Construct A]: Didn\'t you see those monsters just now? If you stay here, they\'ll kill you before Babylonia does.
[Refugee B]: If that is what fate has in store for us, then so be it.
[Refugee B]: Our bodies will turn to dust, and our souls will return to the earth.

Title: Extra Story - EX04 Echo Aria → EX04-7 Reason to Fight (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The outline of the refugee camp gradually fades into the distance and the temperature begins to drop rapidly.
Unlike the wilderness, the few refugees scattered throughout the camp were enough to dispel the cold from their breath alone.
But now, the cold wind holds you in its frigid embrace.

Title: Extra Story - EX04 Echo Aria → EX04-7 Reason to Fight (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Wanshi]: Looks like we don\'t need to waste our time here.
[Wanshi]: The kid has already gone back.
[???]: ——▆——▃——▆▇

Title: Extra Story - EX04 Echo Aria → EX04-8 Voice of Yesterday (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Before Ray began to understand the world around him, he had already forgotten his mother\'s face.
From very early on, he was raised by his father and grandma.
His grandma has always lived in the shadow of hatred.

Title: Extra Story - EX04 Echo Aria → EX04-9 Whalesong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A few hours ago...
[Hans]: Babylonia, come in.
[Celica]: Who shall I connect you to, Commander Hans?

Title: Extra Story - EX04 Echo Aria → EX04-9 Whalesong (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Fall.
Burn.
Crash.

Title: Extra Story - EX04 Echo Aria → EX04-10 Siren (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Wanshi]: ...Ugh... agh...
Caught off guard, the white Strike Hawk is lifted by the ominous black monster.
But right then, his last bullet hits the monster\'s chest that is emitting faint blue light.

Title: Extra Story - EX04 Echo Aria → EX04-11 Requiem (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Every time she gazes at the blue planet, she has an inexplicable feeling in her heart.
The blue planet known as Earth is said to be the cradle of mankind.
But in reality, she never regarded the planet as her home.

Title: Extra Story - EX04 Echo Aria → EX04-12 Cradle of Immortality (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The sun probes from the eastern horizon. The morning glow pierces the darkness and fades to black upon reaching this far.
An invisible boundary divides the sky. The distant east shines with the first rays of morning, warm and bright. Yet the sky above remains cloaked in darkness, cold and deep.
This is a race toward the rising sun. Under the guidance of the Strike Hawk, you flee the deep and distant darkness as you set out for the bright and warm horizon.

Title: Extra Story - EX04 Echo Aria → EX04-13 Silent Battlefield (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: Wanshi, why did you put such a strange tasting can in your maintenance capsule?
[Wanshi]: Uh... You ate it?
[Kamui]: Not even Camu could\'ve choked that down.

Title: Extra Story - EX04 Echo Aria → EX04-14 Gear? (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Troy]: Looks like the battle here was especially brutal, even the foundation is deformed.
After confirming that there are no signs of life up ahead, Troy puts down his scope and walks out of the corner of the ruins.
[Troy]: Wanshi, everything checks out on my side. I\'m going to head down the tilted foundation and investigate.

Title: Extra Story - EX04 Echo Aria → EX04-14 Gear? (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
"Gear" grabs Wanshi by his head and lifts him off the ground.
[Gear?]: As I was saying... What are you fighting for?
[Wanshi]: ...

Title: Extra Story - EX04 Echo Aria → EX04-15 Gamble (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The light blue flame at the bottom of the transport craft burns up the debris on the landing site, creating a circular area for hovering.
The wind pressure generated by its hovering blows the clothes worn by the Construct sitting on the ground.
[Pilot]: This is Mother Goose-3. Sorry for the wait, Kamui.

Title: Extra Story - EX04 Echo Aria → EX04-16 Awaken (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The pure white world is stable and sweet.
The world is no longer pale as Wanshi regains consciousness. He realizes he is inside a building.
The surrounding walls are covered with neat and orderly knife scratches as if someone was counting something. However, there are far too many scratches to count now.

Title: Extra Story - EX04 Echo Aria → EX04-17 Echoes of the Past (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The mechanical arm on the workstation swings back and forth as the sphere bot hands various tools to Arnold.
[Wanshi]: Three centimeters to the left. Cut the artificial skin, then open the upper mechanical cover.
[Arnold]: Is this it?

Title: Extra Story - EX04 Echo Aria → EX04-18 Encounter (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: Find anything, Captain?
[Chrome]: Negative. You?
[Kamui]: Sigh... Negative.

Title: Extra Story - EX04 Echo Aria → EX04-19 Frog in the Well (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After who knows how long, Arnold is just about to finish maintenance on Wanshi. With no room for error, sweat drips down his cheeks.
[Arnold]: ...
[Wanshi]: ...

Title: Extra Story - EX04 Echo Aria → EX04-20 Journey's End (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The moon once again hangs in the night sky. Wanshi helps Arnold open the pressure valve and return to the surface.
Following the sound of a building collapsing in the distance, Arnold pats Wanshi on the shoulder.
[Arnold]: Hehe... Get goin\'.

Title: Extra Story - EX04 Echo Aria → EX04-20 Journey's End (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Wanshi stares at the enemy before him. Time seemed to stop momentarily. The air is so quiet; all he can here is his own breath and "Gear\'s" footsteps.
[Wanshi]: (1...)
[Wanshi]: (2...)

Title: Extra Story - EX05 Inscription of Labyrinth → EX05-1 The Forgotten Children (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
On the surface outside of the development zone of City 075, during the emergency evacuation from Operation Red Tide—
A wave of golden yellow dust whirls in the air on the barren desert, followed immediately by deafening rock music and bursts of angry shouts.
A folding truck, tilted, is trekking forward in an S-shaped path with only two of its wheels speedily while maintaining physics-defying balance, a feat that would have Archimedes risen from his grave and clapped.

Title: Extra Story - EX05 Inscription of Labyrinth → EX05-2 Suspiria (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
There is only silence. Occasionally, chirpings from birds can be heard, disrupting the monotonous quietness as if a sharp beak piercing the veil of the night sky.
With a sudden, explosive smash, the vined metal door in front falls to the ground.
Specks of metal and broken leaves scatter in the air. Amidst the dusty aftermath, a pair of legs step on the dry, fallen leaves on the floor, the barren land crackling under their weight.

Title: Extra Story - EX05 Inscription of Labyrinth → EX05-3 The Mist (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The dawn is gray and dark. Heavy clouds linger in the sky, an unbearable depression interweaving with the fog, affecting everyone stepping into these woods.
[Vera]: Progress report, 21.
[No. 21]: Roger.

Title: Extra Story - EX05 Inscription of Labyrinth → EX05-3 The Mist (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The orb-shaped Corrupted are scattered on the floor, twitching occasionally, the needles within ejecting haphazardly.
An Ascendant would not have made such a scene. If anything, this looks like a crudely made trap.
...Like a warning, asking you to leave.

Title: Extra Story - EX05 Inscription of Labyrinth → EX05-4 Kairo (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Vera]: Good. Fantastic discovery.
[Vera]: But it\'s got nothing to do with our mission, so let\'s stick to the target coordinates.
[Noctis]: But surely a sign that obvious is trying to catch our attention?

Title: Extra Story - EX05 Inscription of Labyrinth → EX05-5 Let the Right One In (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After a short walk toward your destination, No. 21 walks past the precinct Noctis mentioned.
But unlike how he described it, the vehicles are hardly "parked" outside—they are stacked together haphazardly, like a child leaving toys behind. You wonder how Noctis managed to pull a functional car from this pile.
[No. 21]: Cars.

Title: Extra Story - EX05 Inscription of Labyrinth → EX05-6 Insidious (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
With No. 21 pointing the way, you do discover signs of battle in the hospital reception. The device used to detect abnormal M.I.N.D. fluctuation that she has brought along has not stopped beeping either.
You cannot find more information even with the device afterward.
[No. 21]: This... feels familiar.

Title: Extra Story - EX05 Inscription of Labyrinth → EX05-6 Insidious (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Under No. 21\'s continuous attacks, the sound of immobilized Corrupted breaking apart barely manages to come through.
She does not stop, however. Her laser cannon fires shot after shot.
She finally stops, panting, her eyes opened wide. She is afraid.

Title: Extra Story - EX05 Inscription of Labyrinth → EX05-7 Cabin in the Woods (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: ...Don\'t run around...
[???]: ...You\'ll make me worried, running around like this.
The sound of girls playing echoes on the trail in the woods. The nonexistent sunlight shines through the withered branches, almost warming up your face while leaving the lower half of your body cold and chilly.

Title: Extra Story - EX05 Inscription of Labyrinth → EX05-7 Cabin in the Woods (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
With a crisp "ping" from the spring in the lock, the door opens.
Your vision twirls and a dream-like scene unfolds before you.
The entrance is clean and tidy, with sunlight shining through the window from outside. You can almost smell the freshly baked bread in the air. The tiny speckles of dust spin and float in the light.
