Title: Extra Story - EX05 Inscription of Labyrinth → EX05-8 The Skeleton Key (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
No. 21 steps inside.
The floor is tiled with dark, dirty, moldy wood, squeaking every time she steps on it as if it is going to break any moment.
Confetti can be found among the dirt in the corner of the living room and on the spiderwebs on the roof, ironically celebrating the gloomy idleness.

Title: Extra Story - EX05 Inscription of Labyrinth → EX05-8 The Skeleton Key (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
No. 21 stands in the entryway for a long time, not moving.
[No. 21]: ...Huh?
[No. 21]: ...Is that what human childhood looks like?

Title: Extra Story - EX05 Inscription of Labyrinth → EX05-9 The Thirteenth Floor (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Despite not knowing what is happening, Lucia seems to have sensed the impending danger, and she follows her mother\'s instructions and takes Luna to the second floor.
You ask, perplexed, but Lucia does not answer. You can only follow closely behind.
You two run into the bedroom at the end of the corridor. Lucia closes the door before running to the window and checking on her mother.

Title: Extra Story - EX05 Inscription of Labyrinth → EX05-9 The Thirteenth Floor (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
No. 21 rushes toward the basement after the battle is over.
Standing before the door to the basement—no, it is not a door anymore. Bloody handprints and scratches left by metal claws envelop it, turning it into a silent gravestone.
No. 21 gently opens the door and steps in.

Title: Extra Story - EX05 Inscription of Labyrinth → EX05-10 Hour of the Wolf (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
No, 21 rushes outside. Where the door was is now a crumpled ruin, and you hear coughs amid the smoke and broken walls.
[??]: Couldn\'t you make sure the measure was correct?!
[???]: What\'s the matter as long as we can get inside? Isn\'t this perfect?

Title: Extra Story - EX05 Inscription of Labyrinth → EX05-11 The Chasers (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The storm howls. Small rocks fall from the cliff as the metal beast spreads his bladed wings, pulling up rocks and fallen leaves around him, adorned with the moon as a crown.
He baths in the blood-red moonlight, his shadow stretching infinitely, and he looks like a claw extended right out of the moon.
The next moment, he suddenly bursts into a twisted growl. His body twitches, arching into an unnatural curve, and you are baffled by what is happening.

Title: Extra Story - EX05 Inscription of Labyrinth → EX05-11 The Chasers (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
...It is not typical for you to say something like this, yet, for some reason, you cannot help but say it.
As if your soul has also been freed from that interrogation room, and you are standing with Cerberus here and now.
You can feel the exhilaration in your heart as it beats and your blood boils.

Title: Extra Story - EX05 Inscription of Labyrinth → EX05-12 Sixth Sense (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Their deafening rotor blades spinning, several transport crafts land on the field before you. A troop of Constructs in black walk out, armed with unrecognizable weapons, and flank Cerberus in a pincer movement.
Alarmed, both No. 21 and Noctis tense up. Vera, however, does not appear startled at all, looking at the leading Kurono Construct with disdain.
[Kurono Construct]: Your operation has been terminated. Put down your weapons and follow our orders. We\'ll take over here.

Title: Extra Hidden - EX01 Grand Blue → EX01-1 Shome (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The sound of anxious back-and-forth pacing fills the research room, deep in the facility.
[Shome]: It\'s been too long...
It is a dimly-lit room, the interior flickering under the weak jaundice of the lighting. To the Ascendant Shome, however, brightness has long since lost its meaning.

Title: Extra Hidden - EX01 Grand Blue → EX01-2 Crushed Bones (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Roland]: Miss Luna, we have fully investigated Venus Splash Park.
[Roland]: According to that scar-faced man, that place should be Shome\'s final destination. But...
[Luna]: Worry not. He has no reason to lie about this. A non-fatal betrayal is pointless.

Title: Extra Hidden - EX01 Grand Blue → EX01-3 The Forgotten Land (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Wind blows over the vast desert, sweeping up sand and dust into a storm.
In this weather, it is as if the desert is covered by a thick layer of fog.
A cacophony of engine noises cut through the midst of the sand and dust. As the noise approaches, a white-haired girl in red bursts out of the sandstorm on a black motorcycle, leaping into the air.

Title: Extra Hidden - EX01 Grand Blue → EX01-3 The Forgotten Land (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[α]: Not bad. Go on.
Alpha lunges at Watanabe. Watanabe crosses his daggers to block Alpha\'s perforating thrusts.
[Watanabe]: What are you people scheming again?

Title: Extra Hidden - EX01 Grand Blue → EX01-4 Venus Splash Park (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lamia]: Is this Shome\'s destination?
[Gabriel]: Indeed. The private water park that Shome\'s grandfather built for him—Venus Splash Park.
Roland is standing beside Gabriel and looking around. The park facilities are old, but not dilapidated. Some service-type robots are aimlessly wandering around, giving the place an even lonelier air.

Title: Extra Hidden - EX01 Grand Blue → EX01-4 Venus Splash Park (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Luna is sitting on a bench in the plaza. In the center of the plaza is a huge shark statue.
Under the shark statue is an eastern-looking family crest with a name inscribed in gold—Shark-speare.
Luna is absentmindedly glancing at a poster next to the bench. It shows a comical image of Shark-speare holding its arms over its head and running away.

Title: Extra Hidden - EX01 Grand Blue → EX01-5 Game Starts (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Roland is lying leisurely on the Ferris wheel, juggling his chain blade out of boredom.
Suddenly, he pauses. He stands and straightens himself, looking at the sky.
[Roland]: Ha! Those gray birdlings really took the bait.

Title: Extra Hidden - EX01 Grand Blue → EX01-6 Ascension-Network (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
In appreciation, or perhaps out of mere amusement, Luna stretches out a hand and gently pats Lamia\'s face.
[Lamia]: M-M-Miss Luna...
[Luna]: Good work. You did well. Step back and wait for everything to end.

Title: Extra Hidden - EX01 Grand Blue → EX01-7 Suspicions (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Luna is standing alone in the entrance of the Venus Splash Park, looking at the beach. Gradually, she opens her mouth.
[Luna]: What is it?
As if on cue, Roland hops down from a nearby building. His once-damaged frame seems to have been perfunctorily repaired.

Title: Extra Hidden - EX01 Grand Blue → EX01-8 A Trivial Moment (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[α]: How did it end?
[Luna]: The way it should. The betrayer becomes betrayed, dying in the dream that is his childhood.
[Luna]: Shome\'s end will be a good wake-up call to his like.

Title: Extra Hidden - EX01 Grand Blue → EX01-8 A Trivial Moment (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[α]: Sorry. Must have woke you up.
Finished with the skirmish, Alpha returns to the bench to find Luna long awake. Luna merely shakes her head at Alpha\'s apology.
[Luna]: It\'s okay.

Title: Extra Hidden - EX02 Firn Night → EX02-1 Nanami and Martin (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: WA, HA, HA ,HA!
[Nanami]: WA, HA, HA!
[Nanami]: WA, HA!

Title: Extra Hidden - EX02 Firn Night → EX02-2 Bionic Machine (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: We got \'em planes good, Mort! Now what?
[Martin]: I... I don\'t know.
[Nanami]: You don\'t?

Title: Extra Hidden - EX02 Firn Night → EX02-3 Black Figure on Snow (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Martin]: Nanami, over there!
[Nanami]: Ohoho!
Nanami\'s goal is unrealistic, but if... on the off chance that Nanami succeeds... That would be pretty nice for everyone.

Title: Extra Hidden - EX02 Firn Night → EX02-4 Different Opinions (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bionic Machine]: Ugh... I can\'t hear the mother-frame anymore... What are you?
[Nanami]: Nanami is Nanami!
[Martin]: He\'s not asking for your name...

Title: Extra Hidden - EX02 Firn Night → EX02-5 Roaring (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Martin]: Nanami, what do we do now...?
Ever since the angry bear model and his supporters left, Nanami has been as still as a rock. Feeling like an eternity has passed, Martin decides to pat Nanami on her shoulder.
[Nanami]: WA, HA, HA ,HA!

Title: Extra Hidden - EX02 Firn Night → EX02-6 Resonance of Anger (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Construct]: We can\'t win! These are bionic machines built purely for war! We\'re just some spec ops Constructs!
[Construct Captain]: Shut your trap and just fight!
[Bionic Machine]: ROAR!

Title: Extra Hidden - EX02 Firn Night → EX02-7 The Black Figure (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: You\'re a Corrupted!
[Bionic Machine (?)]: Urgh!!!
[Nanami]: And you\'re a Corrupted!

Title: Extra Hidden - EX02 Firn Night → EX02-8 Nanami and Bionics (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bionic Machine]: ROAR!
[Staessen]: Keep fighting! Don\'t you ever fall back!
With Lamia\'s retreat, the Corrupted begin to withdraw. The battle, however, has still yet to cease.

Title: Extra Hidden - EX03 Lost Chapter → EX03-1 Silence (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Luna]: Huaxu, are you there?
[Huaxu]: I don\'t know what "there" refers to, but I am currently in my active start-up cycle. Next start-up cycle is in...
[Luna]: I don\'t care about that.

Title: Extra Hidden - EX03 Lost Chapter → EX03-2 Exile (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Roland]: Gabriel, do you think Miss Luna has been acting quite strange recently?
[Roland]: She\'s even appearing on the battlefield.
[Gabriel]: Our leader appearing on the battlefield boosts troop morale. It shouldn\'t be considered strange.

Title: Extra Hidden - EX03 Lost Chapter → EX03-3 Mutual Destruction (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Hassen straightens his back. He is standing in front of the huge porthole on the command bridge.
The pale blue planet before him takes up most of the porthole view, slowly rotating. He observes in silence.
A peculiar atmosphere filled the bridge; the crew rarely saw Hassen\'s quiet side.

Title: Extra Hidden - EX03 Lost Chapter → EX03-3 Mutual Destruction (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Staessen]: Humans... How pathetic we are sometimes...
[Staessen]: Never dying when they should... And when they realize they must live, they try to end it all again.
[Luna]: What are you trying to say?

Title: Extra Hidden - EX04 Echo Aria → EX04-1 Air Transportation (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The pale blue breathing light pulsates overhead as per regulation. The roaring engine reverberates in the somewhat spacious transport cabin.
[Broadcast]: Mother Goose-7 reporting in. T-minus ten minutes until arrival.
The confines of the transport craft afford little recreation. No snacks. No one shooting the breeze while awaiting landfall. No one laughing or smiling as they disembark to meet the enemy\'s fire.

Title: Extra Hidden - EX04 Echo Aria → EX04-2 Chief Commander (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You stand at the landing zone and watch the transport craft take off.
In the FOB erected by the vanguard forces, numerous teams are moving about the base, strengthening fortifications and adjusting comm lines.
Corrupted remains piled outside of the base allude to a small conflict while the base was being erected. A tall Construct is throwing debris on either side of the street to clear a passageway for personnel and vehicles.

Title: Extra Hidden - EX04 Echo Aria → EX04-3 Under the Trap (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Lee\'s blue figure passes through the dilapidated buildings. As he advances, each Corrupted on his way, without exception, is shot precisely through their memory shells by him.
[Lucia]: Lee, you\'re moving too fast. The commandant and Liv don\'t have the same mobility as Attacker Constructs.
[Lee]: Don\'t overdo yourself if you can\'t keep up.

Title: Extra Hidden - EX04 Echo Aria → EX04-4 Rapid Descent (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
With a swift slash, Lucia smashes through the rooftop door and rushes onto the roof with her katana at her hip.
[Lucia]: No enemies acquired. Area secure.
Confirming that there are no Corrupted on the roof, Lucia turns and nods to other Gray Ravens in the corridor.

Title: Extra Hidden - EX04 Echo Aria → EX04-4 Rapid Descent (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Commandant, looks like Lee found something. He and Lucia are on their way back to our position.
After enduring the stress of providing long-ranged support for Lucia and Lee, Liv finally sighs in relief and turns to look at you.
[Liv]: Good thing you\'re here, Commandant. I couldn\'t have done this without you.

Title: Extra Hidden - EX04 Echo Aria → EX04-5 Night Break (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
...
[Commandant A]: Zone C 1st to 13th Street: 32% clear.
...

Title: Extra Hidden - EX04 Echo Aria → EX04-6 Secret of Victory (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Lucia, Lee, where did you two go?
[Lucia]: I had to help Lee get something. We already knew where it was, but then Lee suddenly disappeared.
[Liv]: Hmm... Did Lee run into any danger?

Title: Extra Hidden - EX04 Echo Aria → EX04-6 Secret of Victory (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The Gray Ravens gradually approach the factory on 39th Street. As the team presses onward, more and more Corrupted begin to appear before you.
Lucia takes the lead in cutting off the Corrupted. However, several Corrupted use this opportunity to attack her.
Seeing the oncoming attack, Lucia leaps into the air and slices down through the approaching Corrupted. With the failure of the Corrupted\'s attack, Lee\'s gunfire penetrates their memory shells, giving them no further opportunity to attack.

Title: Extra Hidden - EX04 Echo Aria → EX04-7 Exchange of Resources (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: The main roads connecting the target city with the surrounding area have been blocked by electrified wire meshes.
[Vanessa]: This is taking longer than anticipated. Are you sure that you\'re working to the best of your ability?
[Vanessa]: Forget it. I\'ll follow up on your shortcomings once the mission is complete.

Title: Extra Hidden - EX04 Echo Aria → EX04-8 Gray Raven's Edge (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Ngh... I acted without thinking. Commandant... Are you okay?
The pink force field around Liv barely manages to leave space to maneuver around in the pitch-black ruins.
[Liv]: Seems like I had a flashback while unconscious... Guess I\'ll have no choice but to confront my demons.

Title: Extra Hidden - EX05 Inscription of Labyrinth → EX05-1 Like Fate (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Roland]: ...
[Roland]: ...Get down.
Roland drags something over a steep slope.

Title: Extra Hidden - EX05 Inscription of Labyrinth → EX05-2 Collection (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
What happened to Lamia was a long story.
But we need to go through it to explain why she ended up in The Merciful One\'s camp.
So, let\'s begin.

Title: Extra Hidden - EX05 Inscription of Labyrinth → EX05-3 Nothing (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Many years ago, at the film set of "The Mandhasti Real Park"—
In the studio, a fictional father was teaching his fictional son how to use a rifle.
This is the bolt. This is the safety. Here is the magazine, and the trigger is here.

Title: Extra Hidden - EX05 Inscription of Labyrinth → EX05-4 Free Riding Guide (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lamia]: ...Eek...
[Roland]: Not again?
[Lamia]: Um, at our 7 o\'clock...

Title: Extra Hidden - EX05 Inscription of Labyrinth → EX05-5 Luna's World (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Roland and Lamia walk past a sign with "Welcome home!" and a few unrecognizable letters. The town is surrounded by forest, with borders that resemble the texture of black velvet.
The morning dew soaks the air, wetting Roland and Lamia\'s artificial skin through leaves. The sensors send a chilling signal to Roland\'s M.I.N.D.
The moment he comes close to the town, he feels a familiar pulse.

Title: Extra Hidden - EX05 Inscription of Labyrinth → EX05-5 Luna's World (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Roland hears the sound of rubbing mechanical joints. He knows the "uninvited guests" have also arrived.
[Roland]: (I probably should leave... or maybe not?)
[Roland?]: What? Do you still want to look at the Task Force guys up close?

Title: Extra Hidden - EX05 Inscription of Labyrinth → EX05-6 Break-in (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Roland walks through the town, following the clumsy but straight-forward messages left by the unknown opponents.
They seem to have realized that Roland cannot be stopped by the trivial attempts. Apart from the occasional few that quickly vanished in sight, Roland no longer sees any Corrupted in front of him.
[Roland]: ...

Title: Extra Hidden - EX05 Inscription of Labyrinth → EX05-7 Non-lethal Joke (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Lamia nods and leaps onto a roof nearby.
Roland reaches out to the rusty gate.
The dust-covered bolts are moved, leaving a circle of light yellow ashes between the inner and outer rings.

Title: Extra Hidden - EX05 Inscription of Labyrinth → EX05-7 Non-lethal Joke (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Crisp, unguarded footsteps can be heard outside the mansion. The person seems to be unaware of Roland and Lamia\'s presence.
But that\'s still a sign, telling Roland no matter what he wants to do, he better be quick.
[Roland]: Tsk...! I\'ll just have to rush a little.

Title: Extra Hidden - EX05 Inscription of Labyrinth → EX05-8 Lopsided Recall (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Roland and Lamia stay hidden and watch the Task Force member enters the mansion.
The moment she steps inside, Roland recognizes her. She is a member of the Task Force squad "Cerberus."
It was them who held off Gabriel in Venus Splash Park and drove him away. Roland knows he must not underestimate them.

Title: Extra Hidden - EX05 Inscription of Labyrinth → EX05-8 Lopsided Recall (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
He follows the clueless girl while she searches around. Roland has already inspected the place thoroughly, but she seems to be able to see things that he cannot.
Interesting. Is the information only visible... to those that meet all the criteria? Roland feels like he is getting close.
After a series of seemingly pointless searching and relocating, the girl linking to the Commandant of Gray Raven runs downstairs.

Title: Extra Hidden - EX05 Inscription of Labyrinth → EX05-9 Cage Battle (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Roland]: ...
The girl in black never shows up again, but Roland sees marks of Punishing on the ground pointing to another place.
These marks aren\'t visible to those without Punishing affinity. Roland knows the message is specifically left for him.

Title: Extra Hidden - EX05 Inscription of Labyrinth → EX05-9 Cage Battle (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Voodoo]: The thing... Mister asked me to reveal to you...
[Voodoo]: "Loki" has already done so.
[Voodoo]: But, from the look of it, you don\'t seem to be worthy.

Title: Extra Hidden - EX05 Inscription of Labyrinth → EX05-10 Ending Citation (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[No. 21]: —I\'m not alone either.
[Vera]: Noctis, 21, finish him!
Voodoo is no match for Cerberus. Her defeat is inevitable.

Title: Extra Hidden - EX05 Inscription of Labyrinth → EX05-11 Fisher (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Roland leaves Cerberus and walks out of the town. He then arrives at the ruins underneath the mountain.
[Roland]: Goddamn Lamia...
Roland expected her to run, but she did it at a very awkward time.

Title: Extra Hidden - EX05 Inscription of Labyrinth → EX05-12 Undecided Middlegame (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Vonnegut]: I can give you what you want.
Another agent. How interesting.
But Roland isn\'t surprised at all.

Title: Interlude - Metamorphosis → Undying (Part C)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Soldier]: The adjacent area has been cleared.
[Soldier]: Are... are you sure that you don\'t need a filter?
[Nikola]: It\'s nothing more than a placebo.

Title: Interlude - Metamorphosis → Separated (Part C)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A few minutes later, a massive fireball with a long and fiery tail falls near Nikola from the sky.
It slows. The large, grid-like main cabin with the Star of Life Medical logo on its side could be seen from the ground.
The rubble crumbles from the thrust produced by the engine.

Title: Interlude - Metamorphosis → Falling (Part C)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Nikola stood in front of Lucia\'s surgery pod in the dim cabin of the transport craft, knocking the glass slightly with his finger, and watching Lucia lying inside through the glass.
The pilot of the transport craft walked inside the cabin and salute Nikola at his back.
[Pilot A]: Sir, report! Lucia and the surgery pod have been loaded, we can take off at any time. Er, are you...?

Title: Interlude - Metamorphosis → Reunion (Part C)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
It was eerily quiet.
A moment later...
[Gabriel]: Miss Luna, I\'m going to open it, please take a step back.

Title: Interlude - Metamorphosis → Escape (Part C)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Lucia moves quickly through the city\'s shadow. Human armies can be seen marching through the streets as she approaches the designated area.
Lucia turns to face the other way after confirming the direction. When she sees no trace of the Corrupted, she feels relieved and slows down.
[Lucia]: They haven\'t caught up yet, so as soon as I can get back to the team...

Title: Interlude - Metamorphosis → Tears (Part C)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After several days, the sky had begun to rain heavily.
Behind the ruins Lucia\'s hiding in, the sound of Roland\'s footsteps reverberated.
This time Roland was not as relaxed as before.

Title: Interlude - Metamorphosis → The First Sight (Part C)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Above the City Central Purification Filter 015, Alpha slowly opens her eyes.
[α]: Luna.
[Luna]: What\'s the matter? Lucia?

Title: Interlude - Escape to Somewhere → Struggle (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Luna]: Lucia, what did you find today?
[Lucia]: ...It\'s not a bad haul. I found this.
[Luna]: Is that... canned meat? Yay!

Title: Interlude - Escape to Somewhere → Trespassers (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nun]: Looks like we\'re at the right place. The Central Purification Filter is still running in this city.
[Nun]: Its efficiency is decreasing, but it should still last a few months.
[Black-clad Man]: If you weren\'t bringing a whole group of children, the army would have never guard you on your journey.

Title: Interlude - Escape to Somewhere → Warm Food (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Luna]: Lucia, are we finally safe now?
[Lucia]: Yes, at least we can feed ourselves if we work every day... No more unnecessary risks...
[Luna]: That\'s great...

Title: Interlude - Escape to Somewhere → Frog Plushie (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Luna]: Lucia, you\'re back!
[Lucia]: Luna... I found a... doll... outside...
[Lucia]: I think you might like it, so I... brought it back for you...

Title: Interlude - Escape to Somewhere → Price of Naivety (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Lucia and Luna return to the surface...
[Luna]: Lucia...
[Lucia]: We don\'t have a choice...

Title: Interlude - Escape to Somewhere → Price of Naivety (EB)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Corrupted]: Urgh...
[Corrupted]: ...
[Human Soldier]: Sir, report! We found two little girls!

Title: Interlude - Escape to Somewhere → Lingering Warmth (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nun]: Where... did you go?
[Nun]: And with so many supplies, as well.
[Lucia]: ...

Title: Interlude - Escape to Somewhere → Lingering Warmth (EB)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Human Soldier]: If we hadn\'t found you on the road, you would have already been dead.
[Lucia]: Luna... Where\'s Luna?
[Human Soldier]: ...

Title: Interlude - Escape to Somewhere → Star in the Dark (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Lucia rushes out of camp and into the fluttering snow...
[Lucia]: Luna...
[Lucia]: Without Luna, everything\'s...

Title: Interlude - Treasure → Your Name (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Technician]: Consciousness upload at 60%.
Nikola stands stoically by a technician in a white labcoat as he frantically rattles off reading after reading.
[Technician]: Sir, are you sure about this? This is in violation of...

Title: Interlude - Treasure → Vague Emotions (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After a while, Commandant and I have gotten used to regular drills in Babylonia\'s simulated training environments.
Though I longed for the battlefield, I couldn\'t step foot on it, as long as Gray Raven remained short-handed.
[Commandant A]: Hey, if it isn\'t "top gun" over there.

Title: Interlude - Treasure → Gray Raven (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nikola]: Despite some organizational hiccups, Construct Lucia passed all the required assessments.
[Technician]: Do you mean to send her into combat, sir?
[Nikola]: Yeah.

Title: Interlude - Treasure → Alpha (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
I noticed my memory fragmentations long ago.
I have no recollection of the last days of the old Gray Raven. In my memories, we were together one day, and in the next, I was suddenly and inexplicably alone.
I could not find info about my previous commandant, nor could I access the files on my former comrades. It was as if it was only me all along.

Title: Interlude - Treasure → Alpha (ES)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Riot]: —
All that was left of the Riot form was warped metal and broken circuitry. Some of its systems were still functioning, enough to shed ominous light through the dents and gashes in its carapace, but nothing else.
[Lucia]: It\'s abnormal for Commandant to not respond. Murol, Xun, we\'re pulling out.

Title: Interlude - Treasure → Twin Blades of Will (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[System]: M.I.N.D. to frame pairing in progress. Construct systems connected.
Surrounded by the sounds of pitched battle and the thunderous note of something shattered, I dodged and weaved around the Corrupted barring my way, my thoughts wholly focused on the M.I.N.D. pairing.
"This frame has yet to receive its final calibrations."

Title: Interlude - Treasure → Twin Blades of Will (ES)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
...
Memory 1
Memory 2

Title: Interlude - Treasure → Determination (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Celica]: Pairing successful!
[Celica]: The frame\'s special configuration has been fully awakened. All signal tactics available for use!
[Asimov]: I didn\'t think she could do it.

Title: Interlude - Treasure → Cherished Memory (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Commandant]: Are you alone?
[Lucia]: I\'m...
[Lucia]: It\'s just me.

Title: Interlude - Under a Pale Moon → Uninvited Guest (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Mother, how have you been lately?
[Liv]: I\'ve been well. Mr. Tree\'s growing well and even sprouted flowers a few days ago! If only... you could see them.
[Liv]: Ah, Mother, you must be wondering if I\'ve been lonely. I\'ve been fine though, Father... brought home a new... mother, and new brothers and sisters, so I haven\'t been lonely.

Title: Interlude - Under a Pale Moon → Out of Place (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Father]: ...This is an important dinner. All the important figures will be here. I want to introduce everyone to the gracious support known as my family with this opportunity.
[Mother]: Oh, honey, we\'re a family. This is what I should do, right? Children?
[Brother]: Yes, Mother—

Title: Interlude - Under a Pale Moon → Honor (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Mother]: Look at my lovely son and daughter! Oh, they look absolutely fabulous...
[Father]: Liv, why aren\'t you dressed up yet?
[Liv]: I...

Title: Interlude - Under a Pale Moon → Collapsed Pride (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
...Unknown virus causing a pandemic... Panicking people, malfunctioning and crazed machines... Attack... Military... Frontlines... Medical... Warfare... We urge you to keep calm and...
[Mother]: I will never agree to this! I-if my children become infected... That\'s a battlefield! Even if it\'s not the frontlines, it\'s too dangerous! I will never agree to this!
[Father]: ...No one, not any organization, not any person can run from this duty... Nobody! That includes me! And this family!

Title: Interlude - Under a Pale Moon → To a New World (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Soldier]: Then, we will be bringing Miss Liv away.
[Mother]: Understood.
[Soldier]: Aren\'t you going to... have a few words with her?

Title: Interlude - Under a Pale Moon → Flower on Battlefield (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Officer]: ...Retreat. Abandon the current battlefield. I repeat—all ground units retreat. Extract from your positions.
[Soldier]: ...But... there\'s not enough time for a retreat, there\'s a large number of wounded still in there...
[Officer]: ...I know! But we have no choice! The Corrupted here is an army! The longer we stay here, the more of us die!

Title: Interlude - Under a Pale Moon → Flower on Battlefield (EB)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Sensor]: Beep, beep, beep-beep!
[Liv]: It\'s... somewhere near... Remember the teachings from tactics class... First, analyze the geography, and if the rescue target is an adult male, walk a sloped path according to the size ratio...
[Liv]: Continue crawling...

Title: Interlude - Under a Pale Moon → White Dress (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Mother]: Is it all ready? Liv, they\'ll be picking you up... soon.
[Brother]: Father\'s made arrangements already. When you\'re in the war zone, just work safely in the back as a medical officer. As for father... he\'s got work still and can\'t be here. You understand, right?
[Sister]: Um, that white dress of mine, you\'ve always liked it, didn\'t you? I can tell... You can have it.

Title: Interlude - Devour → XX Month/XX Day, Sunny (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: Ahem, this is Nanami, I\'m nine years old! And today I\'ll be recording my life with a digital diary!
[Nanami]: Nanami is definitely not recording this because it is required homework...
[Nanami]: By recording my daily life, Nanami will get to look back and remember all the good times! That\'s what the teacher\'s been telling Nanami!

Title: Interlude - Devour → Day XX, Expectation (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: Today, Nanami is freshly eighteen! Nanami\'s an adult now.
[Nanami]: Well then, what should I record?
[Nanami]: Aha, right! When we\'re eighteen, we can match with others with the "Gestalt" system and find more friends.

Title: Interlude - Devour → Day XX, Fissure (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: It\'s been so long since the last record.
[Nanami]: Everybody has stopped going to class. Mommy and Daddy are also staying at home.
[Nanami]: It\'s got something to do with a strange virus.

Title: Interlude - Devour → Day XX, Decision (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: The name of the virus is—Punishing.
[Nanami]: ...Whose... Punishing? Humans...? Us?
[Nanami]: Is, is it all because of Nanami...? The virus... it\'s spreading and turning the entire city into hell.

Title: Interlude - Devour → Day XX, Anomaly (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: Why are there... machines... in Nanami\'s arm?
[Nanami]: I... I\'m a machine? Why...
[Nanami]: Is that... Jane...? Ah, those blue eyes... really like Mommy\'s... Why... is... she... running?

Title: Interlude - Devour → Day XX, Truth (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: I found... Mother... She\'s with Jane... They\'re... okay... Thank God...
………………
[Crowd]: The troops! The troops are here!

Title: Interlude - Devour → Day XX, Truth (EB)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Guard A]: She\'s running!
[Guard B]: Do we have to shoot her? She still looks...
[Guard A]: She\'s ran into the mass of Corrupted!

Title: Interlude - Devour → Day XX, A New Journey (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: All gone... Humans... have they all left?
[Nanami]: Activating repair sequence—
………………

Title: Interlude - Friendship → Pulse Strike (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[System]: Rebooting... System rebooted.
[System]: Mission information updated.
[System]: Mission level: High, Hazard: High, Clearance: High, Insufficient mission data.

Title: Interlude - Friendship → Barren Land (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
——!
[Nanami]: War zone 049, landing successful!
[Nanami]: The viral density is so high here, hmm... Oh, the density differs from layer to layer...? Lower layer\'s pretty low... I wonder what that layer\'s for?

Title: Interlude - Friendship → Between Friends (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: Amy Amy, I\'m Nanami!
[Amy]: ...
[Nanami]: Hm...? Why isn\'t Amy talking to Nanami?

Title: Interlude - Friendship → Hunting Ground (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Scavenger A]: Pant... pant... Finally, there you are!
[Nanami]: Hm? Did you need Nanami for something?
[Scavenger A]: The leader says there are results from the investigation! Some scavengers found traces of Constructs, come with us!

Title: Interlude - Friendship → Born as Human (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Amy]: ...
[Amy]: ...Nanami?
[Amy]: Nanami?

Title: Interlude - Friendship → Beyond Friendship (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Amy]: ...
[Garrison]: You\'re awake.
[Amy]: ...Leader. I-is everyone okay?

Title: Interlude - Friendship → Secret of the Hunting Ground (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
...
[Robert]: Humans starve, humans die, humans get sad, and humans also make friends.
[Robert]: Amy taught me the last one.

Title: Interlude - 421 → Core Parts (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Morian]: I\'m back—
[Murray]: Welcome back, Morian.
[Morian]: You\'re up...? How are you feeling?

Title: Interlude - 421 → At What Cost (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Doctor]: Your younger brother requires immediate care. His condition will grow dire if he doesn\'t get a heart transplant as soon as possible.
[Doctor]: Of course, I know about your situation... Finding a donor, the cost, and the queue... They\'re all—What I\'m trying to say is, you might want to be prepared.
[Morian]: Murray... Now\'s not the time for me to drown myself in research, at least... at least until I have the money for him.

Title: Interlude - 421 → Thug in a Suit (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Murray]: You\'ve been coming home early recently, Morian.
[Morian]: Your brother\'s doing a great job, finishing his work early. That\'s why he\'s home early to spend more time with you, Murray.
[Murray]: A mechanical engineer... and working for a big company! Morian, you\'re amazing! And you look so cool in this outfit as well! I wonder if I\'ll get to be like you someday...

Title: Interlude - 421 → Little Robot (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Teenager]: ...Getting such a large sum of money in this short amount of time is impossible.
[Morian]: I need this money.
[Teenager]: In that case... there\'s a rumor.

Title: Interlude - 421 → Robotic Heart (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Professor]: Your Tantalum-193 affinity is almost perfect. You\'ll be an excellent subject.
[Professor]: Also, you asked, and I checked—your HLA matches with your younger brother\'s. But, are you sure about this?
[Morian]: As long as you keep your end of the bargain—the money for the surgery, an urgent slot for the operation, a guaranteed normal life for Murray afterward, and... my heart transplantation.

Title: Interlude - 421 → So Close, Yet So Far (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Murray]: M... Morian?
[Morian]: Murray? You...
[Murray]: Morian! What\'s happening? Why are you locked up in this... this...?

Title: Interlude - 421 → Binary - Assemble (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: How is it, adapting to the new environment well?
[Lee]: Yes, it\'s all good. You don\'t have to worry.
[Lee]: Not to mention, you should know exactly how I\'m doing, shouldn\'t you?

Title: Interlude - Fostered by Blade → Physical Training (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Instructor]: 997, 998, 999...
[Instructor]: 1000!
[Watanabe]: Ha... Ha...

Title: Interlude - Fostered by Blade → Imagine the Future (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Watanabe]: —Ouch!
[Watanabe]: Be more gentle, Bruce!
[Bruce]: I\'m always gentle.

Title: Interlude - Fostered by Blade → Snow Rescue (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Watanabe]: Well, looks like your wish got granted early even though it\'s just temporary. How does it feel to join the Ground Forces?
[Bruce]: The mass outbreak of the virus... The front lines probably don\'t look good if they\'re recruiting trainees like us...
[Watanabe]: You still want to fight on the front lines?

Title: Interlude - Fostered by Blade → Don't Stop (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Corrupted]: —! —!
[Soldier]: ...Those zombie-like mechanoids... are the Corrupted?
[Bruce]: ...No matter what they are, all that threatens humanity must be eliminated! Formation! Attack!

Title: Interlude - Fostered by Blade → Don't Stop (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bruce]: ...Don\'t stop! Watanabe!
[Watanabe]: ...!
[Watanabe]: Ugh... this stench of blood...

Title: Interlude - Fostered by Blade → Saving Hope (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A group of people in ragged clothing slowly emerge through the raging snowstorm.
[Commotion]: We—we\'re saved!
[Commotion]: Finally! We\'re safe!

Title: Interlude - Fostered by Blade → Who's the First (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Girl]: Wait...
[Girl]: No... This can\'t be... Father—Father Snow...?
[Corrupted]: Bi...

Title: Interlude - Fostered by Blade → Oasis Squad (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bruce]: Watanabe! This is the prize for coming in first in the squad rankings! Instructor said to open it together with you.
[Watanabe]: Why so mysterious... Hm...? A combat knife?
[Watanabe]: Can\'t the instructor be more creative? A Gurkha knife... Well, at least it\'s a good knife. So who came in first? You or me?

Title: Interlude - Frozen Heart → Sand Pit (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Tom]: How many times do I have to tell you? This is our sandpit!
[Katie]: Stop coming to our turf! We\'re not going to play with you! Go away!
[Karenina]: That hurt...

Title: Interlude - Frozen Heart → Crazy Old Nutter and Little Dummy (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Karenina]: Gra-Grandpa, I\'m back. The city\'s been secretly throwing out lots of weird trash in the past few days. I collected them all and traded them for some rye bread!
[Karenina]: It\'s not a lot... But we won\'t have to starve for the next few days!
[Old Man]: Karen, Karen you\'re back! Grandpa is not hungry, so little Karen can have all the bread.

Title: Interlude - Frozen Heart → Hidden in Danger (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Karenina]: Phew.
[Old Man]: Little Karen is so strong, Grandpa can\'t even move it a bit!
[Karenina]: Of course I\'m strong, I used to be strongest on the streets...

Title: Interlude - Frozen Heart → Stolen Hope (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Karenina]: ...Couldn\'t find much today.
[Karenina]: It\'s getting cold anyway, guess I\'ll head back earlier. Grandpa must still be waiting for me.
——————————————————————————

Title: Interlude - Frozen Heart → Light Lost (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Katie]: Tom! Wh-what was that?
[Tom]: Wha—?! What are those?!
[Commotion]: Ahhh! Help! The Corrupted! They\'re in the city! It\'s over! It\'s all over!

Title: Interlude - Frozen Heart → The Punishment (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Karenina]: You two.
[Karenina]: Scram!
[Katie]: Ahh—

Title: Interlude - Frozen Heart → Spiral of Causality (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Old Researcher]: Failure. Failure again...
[Researcher]: Professor, you haven\'t rested in quite a while.
[Old Researcher]: I can\'t, not now. Every time we fail, we lose another life...

Title: Interlude - Snow Prayer → May We Be Blessed (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Snow]: ... Bless us, O Lord, and these, Thy gifts, which we are about to receive from Thy bounty.
[Snow]: Through Christ, our Lord. Amen.
[Bianca and Children]: ... Bless us, O Lord, and these, Thy gifts, which we are about to receive from Thy bounty.

Title: Interlude - Snow Prayer → Forgotten Church (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bianca]: What\'s wrong, Father?
[Snow]: I heard you have been giving away your food to others, Bianca...
[Snow]: Here are some food, Bianca...

Title: Interlude - Snow Prayer → Prayer & Faith (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bianca]: The ultimate God, Almighty.
[Bianca]: You are my faith, I follow your will and walk the path you pave.
[Bianca]: Please will you listen to your pious believer\'s prayers...

Title: Interlude - Snow Prayer → To the Light (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Snow]: Miyi\'s back...
[Snow]: Bianca, my child, do not be upset.
[Snow]: Miyi has finished his purpose, he came back, and he protected the bag till the very end.

Title: Interlude - Snow Prayer → Protection & Judgement (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bianca]: Is everyone ready? Hold your neighbors tight and keep the children close. We\'re moving now to the Southern Diocese.
[Bianca]: If we do not live within God\'s reach, then I will bring us all to where God can see us.
[Bianca]: Even if our prayers are unheard, and salvation never comes, I do not intend to merely sit and wait—

Title: Interlude - Snow Prayer → Protection & Judgement (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Corrupted]: ——!!————!!
[Bianca]: ...A headshot.
[Bianca]: Sister, we will take care of the rest of them.

Title: Interlude - Snow Prayer → Snowfall (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Commotion]: F-finally, safe...
[Bianca]: You\'re the guy that soldier mentioned...
[Watanabe]: Bruce...?

Title: Interlude - Snow Prayer → Snowfall (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bianca]: Wait...
In front of them, stands a Corrupted in tattered clothing, which could still be recognized as a clerical uniform.
On his neck hangs a bloodied, and very familiar cross.

Title: Interlude - Snow Prayer → Losing Myself (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Snow]: God has taught us to be holy, righteous, loving, giving; to love the enemy, fast, pray; to walk in the light, to not be greedy, not to judge; to be sincere and to stay on the path.
[Snow]: ...To love.
[Snow]: But what is love to a... mechanoid? Does love really exist?

Title: Interlude - The Land of the Fallen Star → Retreat (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
2025/6/3 8:20
Babylonia Ground Frontier, Airforce Base 28, Battle Preparation Room
[Watanabe]: ...

Title: Interlude - The Land of the Fallen Star → Reminisce (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
June 3rd, 10:19
Babylonia Ground Frontier, Airforce Base 28, Battle Preparation Room
[Watanabe]: ...That\'s... what happened.

Title: Interlude - The Land of the Fallen Star → Infiltrate the Airport (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Hassen]: All units ready. Starting countdown.
[System Voice]: 0.578032407
[System Voice]: 13:52:23...

Title: Interlude - The Land of the Fallen Star → Ambush (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Watanabe]: Huh—
[Watanabe]: Die!
[System Voice]: Halcyon 2, prepare for launching.

Title: Interlude - The Land of the Fallen Star → Standoff (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Watanabe]: ???
[Cyril]: I was going to make the introduction myself. How rude of me.
[Watanabe]: Why...?!

Title: Interlude - The Land of the Fallen Star → Standoff (ES)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[AWACS]: Dagger 1, Babylonia has taken back the launch center of Airforce Base 28. Do you copy? I repeat. Do you copy?
Watanabe and Cyril\'s frames clash, then separate.
A duel between elite soldiers doesn\'t always require a spectacle of flashy skills or intricately woven vapor trails in the azure sky. Sometimes, the difference between life and death is decided in a single stroke.

Title: Interlude - The Land of the Fallen Star → Final Choice (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Watanabe]: You looking for me?
[Hassen]: Take a seat. I wanted to talk about the retreat operation and some other news.
[Watanabe]: ...There\'s no need.

Title: Interlude - The Land of the Fallen Star → Finding Oasis (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Like a prisoner who just broke out of a prison in the desert, the sun shines madly on the dunes. The air is filled with scorching heat and dry dust.
Watanabe walks on yellow sand. Summer wind quickly blasts over the sand, bringing salty air from some unknown distant sea and the smell of gasoline from abandoned factories before disappearing again into the horizon.
He smells gun smoke, which is then quickly erased by the dry summer wind.

Title: Interlude - Lost Verity → Lily (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
City 173, outside the Holy Church - Nov 3rd, 10:29 AM
[???]: Hey, Lofte. You on patrol duty today? What are you looking at outside the church?
[Lofte]: Oh hi, Toby. Yeah, I got thrown all the patrol missions ever since you took time off to nurse your injuries.

Title: Interlude - Lost Verity → Bold Request (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
City 173, Holy Church - Nov 13th, 09:41 AM
It has been ten days since Toby\'s last delivery of supplies. An air of unease has spread throughout the church.
[Sister A]: We haven\'t seen Toby ever since his last delivery here.

Title: Interlude - Lost Verity → Bold Request (ES)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The battle quickly finished. Peace returns to the church.
Toby is struggling to get on his feet. "Blood" keeps coming out of his "wounds", but he is still smiling.
[Bianca]: What\'s with your body...

Title: Interlude - Lost Verity → Daedalus (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
In the church devoured by the shadows of the night, all that could be heard was weeping, screaming, and scolding. And in the midst of the chaos, is the bloodstained Bianca standing in front of the statue of God.
[Sister A]: She\'s the "witch"! She\'s the one who killed Toby!
[Sister B]: It really is because of her... All those who have disappeared, they are all probably...

Title: Interlude - Lost Verity → Dreams (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
City 171, Prague Estate - 11:50 PM
An extravagant crowd gathers in the Estate\'s great hall, losing themselves in the fine wine and relaxing music.
Bianca stands alone by the French windows with a wine glass in hand, looking out at the faraway scenery.

Title: Interlude - Lost Verity → The Truth (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
City 173, Inside Daedalus Security Product Storage - 03:16 AM
As the storage lit up, Bianca could see what the merchandise stored here was—rows and rows of restrained Constructs.
[Wen]: This isn\'t a place you should be in.

Title: Interlude - Lost Verity → The Ending (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
City 173, Daedalus - 04:44 AM
A Bianca covered in electricity finally arrives in front of Wen, leaving a trail of Daedalus member corpses behind her.
[Bianca]: It\'s over, Wen.

Title: Interlude - Lost Verity → Invite (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
City 173, Star of Life Temporary Hospital - 11:50 AM
[Doctor]: President Hassen, she was unconscious in a pool of blood when we found her. Most of her sensory modules had been cut off, resulting in her not noticing the severe damages on her body.
[Doctor]: Or should I say... she noticed but didn\'t care anymore.

Title: Interlude - Crimson Sunset → Chit-Chat (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: Lucia!
[Lucia]: ?
[Kamui]: Heard it\'s a big mission this time!

Title: Interlude - Crimson Sunset → First Team (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Koya]: You seem excited. Are you sure you can keep your M.I.N.D. stable like that?
[Kamui]: Don\'t you worry, I know what to do.
[Koya]: Looks like someone\'s looking forward to the next mission.

Title: Interlude - Crimson Sunset → Battle-Type Construct (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[System Voice]: That is the plan for the operation.
[System Voice]: You must be reminded again that this operation is very important and comes with certain risks.
[System Voice]: There is a large number of Corrupted in the battle area. Teams must work closely together to achieve the goal of liberating the area.

Title: Interlude - Crimson Sunset → Large-scale Extermination Mission (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: Ha... Ha...
[Kamui]: There are too many... enemies...
[Kamui]: They keep coming out... It seems they won\'t stop at all...

Title: Interlude - Crimson Sunset → Dilemma (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Koya]: Ah... Hah...
[Koya]: No... The operating speed of the action module continues to slow down!
[Teammate A]: Koya— Aaargh!

Title: Interlude - Crimson Sunset → Sparks of Farewell (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Koya]: Up to 90 percent of the action module is damaged...
[Koya]: I can\'t hold on anymore...
[Koya]: Just leave me here... Go and meet up with your team!

Title: Interlude - Crimson Sunset → Dark Side (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: Where am I?
[Kamui]: I...
[Kamui]: I should still be on that battlefield!

Title: Interlude - Curtains and Canvases → Colors (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Babylonia - Center of Basic Public Education - 9:00 am
[Ayla]: Here, and there. And then...
[Ayla]: Hmm, not bad. Just a bit more here...

Title: Interlude - Curtains and Canvases → The Beginning (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Meka]: Okay, everybody, time to go! Today, we are going to—
[Children]: Virtual Center! Virtual Center!...
[Meka]: Alright, alright. Who leaked the information...? It\'s Virtual Center!

Title: Interlude - Curtains and Canvases → The Beginning (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Ayla]: Aha... Robots playing characters. So weird, but so interesting!
[Ayla]: I like their lines. Feels like ancient characters who have revived in modern times.
[Ayla]: ...Ahh, I wonder what\'s going to happen next!

Title: Interlude - Curtains and Canvases → Friends (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Three years have passed.
Once unsure about her future, Ayla has long since found her direction in life.
As long as she continues on this path, she will become the person she dreamed to become one day.

Title: Interlude - Curtains and Canvases → The Letter (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Meka]: It\'s been a while since she last came to visit. Everything okay?
[Ayla]: You mean Selena? Oh, yeah. Stuff happened.
[Meka]: Hmm, I just hope you didn\'t fight. People your age always have different opinions.

Title: Interlude - Curtains and Canvases → The Letter (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Alonso]: I long to hear your story, which must take the ear strangely. I believe we all do.
[Duke Prospero]: Sir, I invite your highness and your train to my humble cave.
[Duke Prospero]: At a convenient moment, which will be soon, I\'ll explain everything and all these strange occurrences will become clear.

Title: Interlude - Curtains and Canvases → A Gift (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Babylonia, Civilian Area.
UT. 19:15. The battle between the space station and Babylonia is about to commence.
[Ayla]: Selena mentioned "the real world."

Title: Interlude - Curtains and Canvases → Farewell (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Dear Miss Meka,
When you see this letter, I\'m already on my way to WGAA.
Finally, I have found my path, one that may separate me from a lot of things.

Title: Interlude - Curtains and Canvases → The Other (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Electronic Voice:]: Message has been sent via the nearest relay point.
[Selena]: ……Ayla
[Selena]: ...I\'m sorry.

Title: Interlude - Flawless → No.1 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: What ponderance pondereth thee, Captain?
[Chrome]: ...
When Chrome is deep in thought, Kamui is always the one to interrupt him. It\'s been like this ever since Chrome first took over his current position.

Title: Interlude - Flawless → Dialogue (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Household Robot R2]: Facial scan complete... Verifying identity... Verification complete: Langston Smith.
[Household Robot R2]: Welcome home, Langston Smith.
[Langston]: I\'m home.

Title: Interlude - Flawless → Connection (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Babylonia, F.O.S. Military Command College, Connection Lab
Verification successful. Langston.
[Connection System]: Connection Pod activated.

Title: Interlude - Flawless → Proud Work (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Langston]: ...
[???]: Is your name... Chrome?
[???]: You have perfect Tantalum-193 heteropolymer adaptability and beautiful biological readings. Looks like we have a high chance of success.

Title: Interlude - Flawless → Available Resource (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[John]: You asked for me, Commander?
The files lie spread out on the desk. Besides the routine paper, there\'s also a brief report outlining resort findings.
It\'s the first time the military has recently received a successful report in Construct modification.

Title: Interlude - Flawless → Available Resource (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[John]: Strike Hawk. This is the next squad you\'ll be leading.
[Chrome]: What happened to the original squad, Mr. Smith?
[John]: It\'s useless now, and this isn\'t what you need to focus on. The Science Council has it all sorted out.

Title: Interlude - Flawless → Leader (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: Cap...
[Kamui]: Captain.
[Kamui]: Captain! Captain!

Title: Interlude - Flawless → Leader (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: Should I be calling you Chrome or Smith, Cap?
[Chrome]: Chro... no, call me whatever you want. I decide to what, and to whom, I respond.
[Kamui]: Sounds nice, hehe.

Title: Interlude - Flawless → Scar (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nikola]: Smith, your son. So the next Smith has already been picked?
[John]: Have you heard the story about the hero, Nikola?
[Nikola]: Didn\'t know you had a taste for that kind of story.

Title: Interlude - Front Sight Focus → Hyena (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Eternal Engine "Asslam", Commoner Carriage
[Angry Man]: Come back here!
[Angry Man]: You\'re ****ing dead meat if I ever catch you!

Title: Interlude - Front Sight Focus → Wrench (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
"Hyena" rarely leaves her hiding place in the day.
Unless there was a commotion loud enough requiring her to check it out.
[Hyena]: (This is too big of a commotion even for the inspection team...)

Title: Interlude - Front Sight Focus → Sophia (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Andre]: Let me introduce you all to our new recruit.
[Andre]: Her name is... I\'ll just let her introduce herself because I don\'t know her name.
[Hyena]: Some call me... "Hyena".

Title: Interlude - Front Sight Focus → Catastrophe (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Andre]: Alright, you lot! The time has come! Inspection of the outside of the train! I want every one of you who\'re going out to check if their buckles are secured!
[Andre]: The people in the noble carriage told us that they saw there\'s skin damage at the back of the train from their verandas, so remember to bring your welding tools and skin patches!
Thus is the start of a new day for the inspection team... Or should I say, just another day for them.

Title: Interlude - Front Sight Focus → Sworn Enemy (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
And that was how...
Sophia stumbles trying to make her way past the carriages, until no Corrupted can be heard behind her.
She runs until she finally finds a lit-up carriage, and uses the last bit of her energy to barge in.

Title: Interlude - Front Sight Focus → The Truth (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Sophia]: The tenth intersection from 2266, and then left.
[Sophia]: We\'re here.
Sophia could see the extravagant swan fur carpet of the royal carriage from her spot through the vents.

Title: Interlude - Front Sight Focus → The Truth (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The royal guards shackled Sophia and brought her to the royal carriage.
Someone is already waiting in the center of the hall.
[???]: ...

Title: Interlude - Front Sight Focus → When the Day Comes (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Jamilah\'s Letter]: Perhaps the anti-royalists thought they could smear the name of Akdilek behind my back and force me into submission.
[Jamilah\'s Letter]: But they failed to acknowledge my strength and that I have no intention to become their puppet of a princess.
[Jamilah\'s Letter]: That night, when Sophia was brought in front of me. I held my head high and told her the truth.

Title: Interlude - Valkyrie → The Redheaded Death (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Construct A]: Hey, how\'s it going on your end?
[Construct B]: The mission\'s finally complete... but there were a lot of things I couldn\'t retrieve.
[Construct A]: At least you\'re alive...

Title: Interlude - Valkyrie → Construct - Vera (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Doctor]: Vera, I need to stay here and observe the serum reactions. Can you take care of the patients that just came in?
[Vera]: Got it.
Be it flesh-and-bone soldiers or newly-turned Constructs, all personnel must familiarize themselves with the tense atmosphere on the battlegrounds. It is how things have always worked, and part of their on-site training.

Title: Interlude - Valkyrie → Evacuation (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Squadron Leader]: So you\'re one of the newbies?
[Vera]: Yes. Nice to meet you.
After receiving permission, Vera is now officially qualified to join missions as a soldier.

Title: Interlude - Valkyrie → Shrouded in Darkness (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Vera]: They all relied on their own ideals, their experience... and then they just died, leaving me here alone with the pain.
[Vera]: They were all the same.
[Vera]: I joined the Military Academy... studied tactics... all because I wanted to do something... for someone.

Title: Interlude - Valkyrie → Embrace the Pain (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Familiar Construct]: Whoa... So she ended up in our squad, huh...
[Vera]: ...
[Construct Leader]: Ah. So this is the redheaded Death—

Title: Interlude - Valkyrie → Among the Agonies (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Corrupted]: —! —!!
Hordes of Corrupted are swarming towards her direction. Vera shuts the entrance tight and activates the defense facilities by herself.
Gunfire relentlessly assaults the location, while Vera slays enemy after enemy with her blades.

Title: Interlude - Valkyrie → Among the Agonies (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After Vera massacres heaps of Corrupted, another horde surrounds them.
[Corrupted]: —!
[Familiar Construct]: Uh...

Title: Interlude - Valkyrie → File: Iron Maiden (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Construct]: Ugh... Cough...
[Vera]: A total wipeout, huh.
[Tifa]: Your turn, Captain?

Title: Interlude - Like Shadow → The Eve (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: If you want to live, you need to be calm in all situations and not let your rage consume you.
The clanging of blades resound in the open space. Two warriors are in the middle of a duel.
They are both wielding greatswords and using similar maneuvers, but it is obvious that the older one is way more experienced.

Title: Interlude - Like Shadow → Soldier (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Camu]: I\'ve become a Kurono soldier. Life\'s pretty good.
[Camu]: And...
[Camu]: Oh, right. Listen, Master, I\'m gonna beat you one day.

Title: Interlude - Like Shadow → Pact (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Corrupted]: —!
[Soldier A]: Whew... It\'s over, eh?
After taking out all the attackers, the group blanks out for a moment, collectively forgetting what they had been doing before the battle began.

Title: Interlude - Like Shadow → Incinerate (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Mao Zhen]: Your next mission is to burn down a city that has been occupied by the Corrupted.
[Camu]: Master! Aren\'t you Master?
After the suspicious death, Camu and his squad continue performing their missions. One day, while the group is resting, the image of Mao Zhen suddenly appears on the big screen in front of them all.

Title: Interlude - Like Shadow → Incinerate (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Camu]: Where\'s everyone? Say something if you hear me!
—
Bombs continue to fall, and yet the intended targets are unharmed.

Title: Interlude - Like Shadow → Crawling (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Camu]: Why... why...?
After they flee the city, Camu stalks off away from the other survivors under the moonlight.
He tears off his shirt, revealing his battle-hardened body—or should he call it his serum-ravaged body?

Title: Interlude - Like Shadow → Avengers (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Guard A]: They\'ve broken through Section B! Seal all relevant gates!
[Guard B]: Where are the guard bots?
[Guard A]: The connection was cut before we could activate them. They\'ve already occupied the area. We can\'t get inside to fix the machines!

Title: Interlude - Like Shadow → Avengers (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The two duel, wielding identical weapons. One of them is an incomplete Construct, the other a part-Corrupted.
The Corrupted thrusts his greatsword forward, in a move just like the past... and the Construct blocks it just as easily.
[Camu]: Mao Zhen! I thought you were my Master. Why would you treat me like this?

Title: Interlude - Like Shadow → Kamui (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Camu]: Uh...
Camu wakes up under blinding lights. He sees nothing but an expanse of white. He can sense the clutter and several people around him, though.
[Camu]: Are you...?

Title: Interlude - Untainted Prayer → Forest Girl (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The heavy snowfall in the forest outside of New Murmansk is finally coming to an end, leaving a thick layer of snow delicately balancing on the leaves.
[Reindeer]: (Bleats)
A fawnling comes tumbling out of the forest and falls beside a tree.

Title: Interlude - Untainted Prayer → Being Normal (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
By the time Puff had finished his business with the Fishing Guild and selected a carving knife in the market, it was already noon.
[Port Manager]: Hurry, and pack up shop. Business is over today.
[Knife Seller]: The hell! I just sold me first shivvy!

Title: Interlude - Untainted Prayer → Being Normal (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bionic Machine]: Rargh! Ga—!
Rosetta thrusts her spear into the bionic\'s power connectors, destroying it completely.
However, she seems to have mistaken the size of the tide. An almost endless horde of bionics are still charging out of the snowy forest.

Title: Interlude - Untainted Prayer → The Only Chance (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
It has been years after that tide. Puff is no longer prohibiting Rosetta from meeting others. Like today, Rosetta is even occasionally tasked with buying supplies from the port.
[???]: Rosetta, over here!
A girl from the fur shop waves at Rosetta, whom she immediately recognizes in the crowd of people.

Title: Interlude - Untainted Prayer → Journey's End (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Rosetta]: Day 21 since we left New Murmansk. Sunny with a slight breeze...
Rosetta watches the narwhal tow itself forward from the bow of the ship. She soon returns to writing on her logbook.
[Rosetta]: We were lucky. When the Guardian Spirit tried to escape, we landed a harpoon on its back so that it couldn\'t outswim us.

Title: Interlude - Untainted Prayer → Pray for Life (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Rosetta jumps onto the narwhal and gently carries Puff back to the boat. Only then did she realize that part of Puff\'s body is beginning to rot.
[Rosetta]: How\'d this happen! But you didn\'t get hurt, Grandpa...
[Puff]: The Punishing... Damnit... And at a time like this...

Title: Interlude - Untainted Prayer → The Last Forest Guard (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Rosetta]: Even though Derek dragged us back at almost full speed, there was still no sign of land after more than ten days.
Rosetta sighs. She closes her logbook and walks on deck to check on Puff.
Now, not only is Puff showing serious signs of the Punishing Virus, but so too is Rosetta.

Title: Interlude - Untainted Prayer → The Last Forest Guard (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Rosetta]: Ngh...
Suffering from the Punishing Virus while carrying Puff on her back, Rosetta can no longer summon up the strength to continue onward and falls to one knee.
[Bionic Machine]: GAAWR...!

Title: Interlude - Untainted Prayer → The Salvation of You (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
In the mountains far from New Murmansk, an old man is living alone, carving wooden figurines.
The wood carving is incomplete, but the outlines of a girl can be made out.
A knock rings from outside the door. The old man quickly hides the wood carving.

Title: Interlude - Dream of the Past → The Nighter (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Dusk on the Nighter begins with the extended sound of a trumpet, signaling the commencement of the night bazaar.
Noises converge on the deck where the neon signs wake, while lanterns shaped as dragon heads take flight, encircling the central tower. The dazzling view of the Nighter by night rises on the dark horizon.
The stage before the tower becomes the center of the Nighter during the bazaar, where merchants come to bid in the famed Trade Fair. Folks gather for the displays, as do the rich and powerful in their loges.

Title: Interlude - Dream of the Past → Mystery (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Merchant A]: Fresh livers freshly harvested from fresh bodies! Check it out!
[Merchant B]: Looking for prosthetics? Here\'s your one-stop-shop for all your mechanical body parts!
[Merchant C]: Toasty pupas, fresh off the grill!

Title: Interlude - Dream of the Past → Scar (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Huainan enters his room to find Changyu sitting cross-legged by his bed. A map covered in scratches and marks is laid flat on the table, its folds smoothed out by a pencil-chewing Changyu, buried in thought.
[Huainan]: Hey, what\'s up?
[Changyu]: What took you so long? And where have you been lately?

Title: Interlude - Dream of the Past → Dream (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The minimalist tavern Changyu chose is a little ragged but well-supplied. With the token he stole, Changyu has no trouble getting into a place of this caliber to rent a room. A simple one, to avoid attention.
Right now, he is sitting by the bed cross-legged, listening to the singing outside. The antique television in the room is playing movies of generations past, and the moonlight has tainted Changyu\'s shadow blue.
Someone opens the door to the room.

Title: Interlude - Dream of the Past → Nightmare (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The theater was a magnificent building, donned with emerald-tiled roofs and ruby-colored walls. It saw a long line of guests and ushers in front of its gate, who filled the air with greetings and shouts.
[Singing From Nowhere]: ～With righteous anger are heroes born...～
[Singing From Nowhere]: ～Aloof to pain, to death, one\'s just deserts～

Title: Interlude - Dream of the Past → The Truth (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The wind hits the windows and slips through its frame, thumping, howling.
Huainan is right there on the other side—his hair is a mess, his sunken eyes showing no emotions. Changyu has never seen him like this, as if a deadly blizzard is brewing under his skin, ready to be unleashed.
They stand opposite each other, eyes locked. A shiver goes down Changyu\'s spine.

Title: Interlude - Dream of the Past → The Truth (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Huainan falls to the ground with a loud thud.
"Take care of yourself."
Changyu\'s head is abuzz with the horrid cries and clashes in his dreams. The screams taunt him, haunt him... until even the noises turn quiet, and all that remains is the last word of a pointless fight.

Title: Interlude - Dream of the Past → Past (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
"Since then... and how long has it been? Anyway—I have not heard about him anymore."
"Not that I have any proof... but I can\'t shake the feeling that, for someone who was so hellbent on getting what he wanted, he must still be out there somewhere."
"But if I ever see him again..."

Title: Interlude - Dijiang → Origin (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Darkness dissipates, and I awake once more from my slumber.
This body no longer requires sleep, but I still try to keep to the normal schedule of humans.
Grinding gears reverberate in my ears. Making my way through this dark path through the stratum, I arrive at a familiar city that should have died out during the Golden Age.

Title: Interlude - Dijiang → History (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
In this light gold room with a lofty roof, bookshelves line both sides with various data panels and texts in chronological order. The half-suspended display monitor shows the current position of its occupants.
Flags of previous Kowloong dynasties hang on the wall at the end of the bookshelf. Some have faded with time. Others that show burns from the flames of war hang from the top of the dome.
This is the archives of the Kowloong Chamber of Commerce. It is a symbol of history and glory. It stands in the corner of the KCC as a witness to the footprints of humanity\'s ancestors.

Title: Interlude - Dijiang → Illusion (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Qu]: There you are, Villier.
[Villier]: You made it. Looks like the press conference is over.
[Qu]: Looks like it. Without the stars of the show that is...

Title: Interlude - Dijiang → Illusion (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Villier]: Looks like malicious code was uploaded five hours ago. The machine was still at the Pulao Crew\'s ordinance factory at that time.
[Qu]: That\'s not a place someone can just waltz in all willy-nilly.
[Villier]: Got that right. Its anti-tracking software is really sophisticated, too. Redundant code is generated every 10 minutes to hide the malicious code.

Title: Interlude - Dijiang → Cloud (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A huge barricade surrounds me as I wander the Kowloong Chamber of Commerce. Nothing from the outside world involves me, as if I am a ghost.
I somehow stumble upon a residential area. People are outside putting up lanterns and decorations in anticipation for the election. Others gather in discussion over who they want to vote for.
[Boy]: Hey! Who do you think\'ll win the election?

Title: Interlude - Dijiang → Chaos (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Villier shows Qu the details on the mutiny. She watches as the number of casualties continues to escalate.
[Villier]: It seems that the attack on us a while ago was just a prelude. This time, he\'s raised his flags against us in direct opposition.
[Qu]: Where are they now?

Title: Interlude - Dijiang → Chaos (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Yin]: Damn it! I can\'t believe I lost...
[Yin]: Why have you left me alive? Are you trying to embarrass me?!
[Qu]: Go. I won\'t condemn you.

Title: Interlude - Dijiang → Theme (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: We did it.
[Qu]: Is that... so...?
[???]: Yes. Now you can go out and see for yourself.

Title: Interlude - Dijiang → Reign (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Kowloong Metropolis—96 hours until the arrival of the Ascendants and the other forces.
[Huaxu]: Lady Qu, why did you decline Luna\'s request?
[Qu]: Huaxu, I know I must hand you over to Luna—

Title: Interlude - False Hope → Shattered Hope (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nikola]: How\'s it going...?
The Kurono researcher briefly salutes Nikola as he enters the research lab before shifting his gaze intensely back at the modification bay separated by a pane of glass.
[Researcher]: Looks like everything is going surprisingly smoothly. The orphans have already completed body modifications.

Title: Interlude - False Hope → Lightless Night (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Luna]: ...Are you going out tonight, Lucia?
[Lucia]: Yeah, we\'re all out of food, and it\'s too dangerous to go out during the day... There are the Corrupted, and the bad people...
[Luna]: But... I\'m too scared to sleep here all alone...

Title: Interlude - False Hope → Dirty Monsters (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
In the morning, over a dozen Kurono troops dressed in new uniforms line up outside of their tents—troops recently reborn as Constructs. A new spark for humanity\'s future.
A few weeks after Luna\'s corruption and Collins\' arrival, the Kurono Research Lab has had a series of successful experiments, even transforming a number of Collin\'s troops into Constructs.
Their hearts are filled with trepidation. After all, they are merely children at this point, having no idea what the ramifications of being a Construct are.

Title: Interlude - False Hope → Unblessed Birth (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: (Coughs)
In the silent disposal plant, something resembling a person suddenly coughs and pushes away the pile of remains and corpses stacking on top.
[???]: I\'m... still alive?

Title: Interlude - False Hope → Unblessed Birth (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Luna]: Sis... Lucia, look! I did it... I killed all of the Corrupted!
[Letty]: Yup, not bad... But I don\'t need you anymore.
Wiping out all of the Corrupted, all Luna wants is praise from her sister. Instead, all she gets is a bullet.

Title: Interlude - False Hope → Iron Will (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
In the smoky ruins of Underground City 019, a woman in nuns\' clothing stumbles through the alleys. By the look of the cables and parts left exposed on her injured legs, she is not a human but a mechanoid. She has no name. Instead, others refer to her as "Sister" based on her appearance.
[Sister]: ...
She looks back nervously from time to time, as if she is afraid that something will catch up with her. Finally, she stops behind a building. Several Corrupted appear at the end of the alley and other Corrupted block the way she came.

Title: Interlude - False Hope → Farewell for Reunion (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Luna]: Lucia, are you really there...?
[Luna]: Can I even stand before you and call you my sister anymore?
[Luna]: Will you... even want to see me?

Title: Interlude - False Hope → Farewell for Reunion (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Huff... Puff...
Struggling to catch her breath, Lucia aims her katana at the Corrupted in front of her.
[Corrupted]: Urgh—!

Title: Interlude - False Hope → Dialogue between the Strongs (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Channel Noise]: (She is an anomaly. Even within the boundaries of knowledge, her birth was special.)
[Channel Noise]: (She is the enemy of human will, but at the same time, she seems more human than humanity itself.)
[Channel Noise]: (Unpredictability will throw the world into chaos once more.)

Title: Interlude - Starry Tales → Turandot (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
If the Pantheon still existed today, it probably won\'t stand any more impressive than this.
A giant chandelier, beautiful and extravagant, hangs from the magnificent dome, illuminating the mural of The Last Judgement above with its refracted lights from multiple angles.
No one knows if there are any discrepancies between that and the original. No one cares whether the details match the records for that matter.

Title: Interlude - Starry Tales → Divine Comedy (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
It has been a while since she has become a Construct, but her days has not been quite as chaotic and dramatic as she has imagined.
Most of the World Government Association of Art\'s Constructs belong to the Archaeological Team, and have been nicknamed "donkeys" by the military\'s official Task Force.
This is because they are just like the 16th-century archaeologists who were embedded into the expeditionary armies, receiving the highest level of protection just like a donkey positioned in the center of an infantry formation.

Title: Interlude - Starry Tales → Divine Comedy (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Task Force Member]: There\'s no way our weapons can penetrate its armor! It\'s so dense... What is that thing made of?
[Task Force Cpt]: Even if we can\'t penetrate its armor, we should at least break off a piece of that shell! We have to bring a sample of it back to Babylonia.
A Task Force Construct suddenly gives a huge roar and dashes toward the deadly being with his weapon held high.

Title: Interlude - Starry Tales → Faust (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Selena does not know how long she has knelt there for.
