For a moment, she forgets she isn\'t a human anymore, but a Construct.
Why does she feel sick to her stomach? Why are there tears streaming from her eyes?

Title: Interlude - Starry Tales → Tempest (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Until the Construct she is holding in her arms is no longer emitting activity signals. Selena lays him down gently, then leaves the room of dead bodies without looking back.
She has to survive.
No matter what happened, she has to survive.

Title: Interlude - Starry Tales → Tempest (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
No matter where she hides, the Corrupted called Korolev is always hot on her trail and always finds her.
She tries fighting but fails miserably, convincing her that she has no hope of defeating an enemy like this.
Eventually, she somehow coincidentally finds herself in the place she was looking for—the communications room.

Title: Interlude - Starry Tales → Epilogue (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Selena has a dim recollection of seeing a flower in Babylonia\'s greenhouse.
A real flower.
Babylonia rarely wastes precious resources on growing decorative flowers, so the beauty of that purple flower blooming in the greenhouse really stood out.

Title: Interlude - Starry Tales → Auguries of Innocence (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
How much time has passed?
What is the world outside like now?
What am I... doing?

Title: Interlude - Starry Tales → Between the Acts (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A figure stands on the hill, silently gazing at city No. 075 in the distance.
The ruined city is host to a large number of red Punishing crystal clusters that erupted from the ground, giving the impression of a giant tombstone.
She stares at it for a long time.

Title: Interlude - Silent Night → The Beginning of Lies (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Wanshi]: Hook up the artificial heart, use the suction device to suck the vital fluid away, block the local pain signals, and transfer the feedback to the external terminal.
[Assistant A & B]: Understood.
The assistants help prepare the Construct on the maintenance bed according to Wanshi\'s instructions. Wanshi changes into dustproof clothes and stands in the center of the maintenance room. An assistant approaches him at that moment.

Title: Interlude - Silent Night → Indifference (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After leaving the office, Wanshi walks through the corridor of the Star of Life. Through the porthole, he can clearly see the planet where humans originate—Earth.
[Hassen]: Constructs... will be human\'s hope to return to the Earth, the spark to ignite the flame of victory...
[Hassen]: ... may peace be with every child of Earth...

Title: Interlude - Silent Night → Growing Fear (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Wanshi stood frozen in the middle of the outer corridor in the Star of Life, staring around blankly.
Both sides of the corridor are stacked with various medical equipment for surgeries on Constructs. They do not require aseptic processing the whole time like equipment for human surgeries, and are casually folded over each other in the corridor.
Several special connecting wires stabilizing the Inver-Device hang down from the edge of the folding equipment. They are sorted as Attacker, Support, and Tank.

Title: Interlude - Silent Night → Long Night (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Wanshi]: The next time you can\'t hold on, just activate the recall, alright?
[Wanshi]: Get rid of the wounded frame and let your M.I.N.D. return to Babylonia.
[Wanshi]: Like returning to the state before your birth, protected and warm.

Title: Interlude - Silent Night → Flag (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: Well, we\'re about to enter the CPF area. You can take off the protective mask now.
[Wanshi]: ...
Wanshi takes off the protective mask that Kamui handed over to him earlier. The air pours into his nose while the wind high above sweeps across Wanshi.

Title: Interlude - Silent Night → Flag (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
As the battle gets more intensified, the area around the CPF, which was relatively safe, is shrouded in gunfire.
The continuous explosions shatter the shelter where Wanshi has been hiding. He rushes out while the firepower from the Corrupted weakens, trying not to be buried by the collapsed shelter,running toward the building on the side which seems to be safer.
Halfway there, Wanshi sees a badly injured Construct on the ground. His frame is covered with scars from the Corrupted attacks.

Title: Interlude - Silent Night → Deep Sleep (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: The next round of the Corrupted attack is coming.
[Old Construct]: Got it.
[Old Construct]: Tell all the injured Constructs to go hide in the shelter near the CPF. Sync with all squads and push the front line further to guarantee safety around the Filter.

Title: Interlude - Silent Night → Deep Sleep (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Before anyone can make a move, the Corrupted roars and turns toward the Constructs on the way, rushing toward Wanshi at the back.
Watching it getting closer, Wanshi keeps pulling the trigger. The explosive shells hit the opponent\'s legs accurately but fail to stop the Corrupted from moving.
[Thompson]: Wanshi!

Title: Interlude - Silent Night → The Conversation that Never Existed (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bianca]: Chiko, were you involved in the mission recorded in the file "Jett 713642"?
[Chiko]: Yeah. It was a long time ago.
[Bianca]: It\'s a bit strange, here.

Title: Interlude - The Chess Player → Banquet (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Stepping back into the Smith Estate, Chrome feels an odd sense of nostalgia.
He has never returned home with this sensation in the past. Since becoming a Construct, his home has been the lounge he shares with Strike Hawk. His communications with John have mostly been done through his comms.
The furniture in the estate looks identical to how it was when he left. Even the vases and framed paintings have not moved an inch.

Title: Interlude - The Chess Player → Layout (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Black Knight moves to C6. White Pawn advances one square to C2.
[Chrome]: Bishop, C8 to G4.
[John]: Your intention to attack is obvious.

Title: Interlude - The Chess Player → Martyrs (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The game continues on the chessboard.
The White Knight maintains its advances while the Black pieces defend.
[John]: C4 to F7.

Title: Interlude - The Chess Player → Martyrs (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: Capt! We\'ve made contact with the squad near the Dead Zone! They\'re heading for the rendezvous in Zone C!
[Wanshi]: Retreat route secured. Ready to receive the squad.
[Chrome]: Good job.

Title: Interlude - The Chess Player → Path (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Standing before the door of the Construct Maintenance Department, Chrome stares as the room lights up, and he clutches his fists.
[Construct]: Why... did you come...
[Chrome]: I won\'t let my people die in front of me.

Title: Interlude - The Chess Player → The Chess Player (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[John]: ...You have changed, indeed.
[John]: But I still have more pieces than you this time.
[John]: Are you just trying to get a pointless draw out of this game?

Title: Interlude - The Chess Player → The Chess Player (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The White King has not been able to move all this time, while the Black Bishop on E7 will get checkmate in two moves.
The two players can both see where the game is going.
[John]: We both know how this ends, don\'t we?

Title: Interlude - The Chess Player → Stratagem (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Asimov]: Go to this address tomorrow.
[Asimov]: I\'ll do a simple test on you first to determine the coordination and synchronization rate between your M.I.N.D. and the specialized frame.
[Asimov]: Any request you have on the frame, you can tell me then.

Title: Interlude - The Chess Player → Fledging Eagle (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nikola]: Congratulations, John.
[Nikola]: Specialized frame and a specialized Inver-Device... We finally have some measurable results. Chrome never disappoints.
[John]: You look delighted.

Title: Interlude - Albus Spectrum → Cage (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
At 6 o\'clock, No. 21 opens her eyes to see herself lying on a pure white bed approximately six feet long.
She hears the lyrics, "Put your head on my shoulder. Whisper in my ear, baby." playing through the speaker. It only plays this one line; no more, no less.
At 7 o\'clock, she finishes washing up and is spared a brief moment of silence.

Title: Interlude - Albus Spectrum → Wild Beast (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kurono Researcher]: Yarha, the leader is looking for you...
[Kurono Researcher]: How can you still be working at a time like this? Pulling another all-nighter?
The man sitting at his desk waves his left hand in dismissal, not even bothering to lift his head up from the screen.

Title: Interlude - Albus Spectrum → Wild Beast (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The Co-Bot attached firmly to the glass begins to move. A purple beam of light fires from the laser cannon floating behind No. 21, shattering the ballistic glass.
Even though Kurono boasts an impeccable defense system, it is powerless in stopping the ashen monster that they have built.
The white Construct leaps over the shattered glass like a leopard and lands on top of the console.

Title: Interlude - Albus Spectrum → Choice (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
At 6 o\'clock, No. 21 opens her eyes to see herself lying on a gray bed.
This room is completely different from the one at the Institute. It is not pure white in color. It is mostly black or gray.
Also, there is no music. But she hears the sound of birds chirping nearby through the window.

Title: Interlude - Albus Spectrum → Journey to Light (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[No. 20]: When you leave the institute... 21, what do you want to do?
[No. 21]: Want to do? I don\'t understand.
[No. 20]: Ugh... Don\'t you like doing anything?

Title: Interlude - Albus Spectrum → Return (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
In the training ground below, the last Corrupted falls to the ground following Vera\'s final strike.
Standing next to her, No. 21 waves gently. The Co-Bot jumps down from a pile of Corrupted and scurries to her side.
[Kurono Leader]: ...Marvelous. Absolutely marvelous.

Title: Interlude - Albus Spectrum → Homeward (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After searching for a moment, Vera uncovers a secret door behind a huge bookcase.
They quickly break down the bookcase and open the access point.
A mildewy odor of rotting paper comes out from the depths of the corridor. No. 21 sniffs the odor... then sneezes quietly.

Title: Interlude - Albus Spectrum → Homeward (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
In the deep and dark corridor, falling rocks rain down on No. 21\'s back. The rocks repeatedly force her to her knees, but she gets up again and again.
No. 21\'s small frame is unable to completely shelter Vera. No. 21 leans over Vera to protect her head, arms wrapping around her tightly from behind, lifting her from under her arms.
The Co-Bot lifts Vera up by her legs. Then they proceed to arduously drag her out one step at a time.

Title: Interlude - Albus Spectrum → Cerberus (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
No. 21 sees her face reflecting on the clean glass. Her image is projected onto an area of flat buildings.
The colors here are bright; the sunlight is supple. Everything seems to be composed of neatly cut white squares.
A few hours prior, she and Vera were put into a Sleeping Pod. After a steady journey, they finally ended up here.

Title: Interlude - In the Name of a Hero → Hero And Death (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
White smoke bursts out of the Cerberus lounge door the moment it is opened.
Vera cannot help but let out a few coughs. She frowns at the dust on the hem of her outfit, then brushes away more smoke and dust that keeps coming out.
[???]: Captain\'s back. Noctis is dead.

Title: Interlude - In the Name of a Hero → Redemption in Falsehood (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
"Bzzz... Does anyone... copy...? Squad... Bzzz... encountered... We need assistance! Please..."
Vera picks up a cracked communication device from the ground. The auto-playing message has come to a stop, as if the device has completed its final duty.
[Vera]: Signal source found. This must be the target location... But...

Title: Interlude - In the Name of a Hero → Redemption in Falsehood (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Vera finishes off her enemies with ease. They did pose some threats, but she is used to this kind of chaotic, one-against-many skirmish.
On the other hand, Lloyd can hardly get up. He looks to be in pain.
[Vera]: Hey, don\'t tell me you are hurt...

Title: Interlude - In the Name of a Hero → Cruel Truth (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Construct Soldier]: Help... Can someone... help... me...
[???]: Still alive?
[Construct Soldier]: That red, long hair...

Title: Interlude - In the Name of a Hero → Idealistic Edge (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: Hey, your M.I.N.D. is stable. Time to wake up.
The moment Lloyd regains consciousness, he hears a voice. But before he can tell who is speaking, a sharp pain swarms all over his M.I.N.D., forcing him to open his eyes.
[Lloyd]: Gargh... Argh...

Title: Interlude - In the Name of a Hero → Ovation in Flowers and Rain (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Vera]: So what\'s with this urgent "assignment"? Why did you summon me here halfway through my mission? That could catch unnecessary attention.
Nikola does not answer her question. Instead, he seems to be lost in thought, hesitating—a rare sight for Vera.
[Vera]: If you have nothing else to say, I\'m going back. I hate wasting time...

Title: Interlude - In the Name of a Hero → Follow the Banner (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
It is late in the night. While Constructs are all equipped with night vision, the besieged soldiers still feel like danger is approaching out of their instinct.
Danger, subsequently, spreads anxiety...
[Construct Soldier]: Captain, did Lloyd really flee from battle...?

Title: Interlude - In the Name of a Hero → Follow the Banner (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Announcement]: "After investigation, the desertion charge held against Construct soldier Lloyd has been lifted. The headquarters has identified his action as tactical breakthrough."
[Announcement]: "Lloyd used discretion and decided the situation was impossible for the entire Construct troop to safely escape. He single-handedly broke through the encirclement in order to distract the Corrupted and seek reinforcements."
[Announcement]: "Due to unknown communication interference, Lloyd was unable to contact the HQ and was hence incorrectly marked as a deserter."

Title: Interlude - In the Name of a Hero → Praise for the Future (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The Corrupted with dark wings slowly descends upon the hill. Its grotesque appearance sends shivers down Lloyd\'s and Yanna\'s spines.
[Gabriel]: Do you seriously think you can run away with that wounded Construct?
Gabriel looks unrushed, not even looking away from the book in its hand.

Title: Interlude - A Great Show → Ad Time (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
—Hola, amigo!
If someone tells you to make a wish...
What would you ask for?

Title: Interlude - A Great Show → Sidelights (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Roland]: Ugh... I feel like I\'m about to pass out.
Roland crashes onto the couch with a loud thud and lets out a relaxing sigh.
[Roland]: Who\'s been writing the script recently? The new writer\'s completely missed Mandy\'s personality. Nothing ever goes as planned. It\'s always up to me to get the job done. What am I supposed to do if they really put him in danger?

Title: Interlude - A Great Show → Popcorn Scene (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Mandhasti]: Roland...
[Roland]: Mandy?! Why are you here?!
[Mandhasti]: Yes, why indeed? I said that I trust you. Why else would I escape and come looking for you?

Title: Interlude - A Great Show → Action Scene (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Mandhasti]: Roland? Roland?
[Mandhasti]: Roland, what\'s wrong? What\'s with the daydreaming?
[Roland]: ...Huh? Oh.

Title: Interlude - A Great Show → Prologue (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Roland]: (Gasps for breath)
[Roland]: It\'s been a long time since this conference room has seen any use. It\'s covered in dust. The prop team always fails to clean up the place. Cough.
[Roland]: Least I managed to avoid those mechanoids. I need a rest. Phew...

Title: Interlude - A Great Show → Cleanup after Performance (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The scene before him is pitch black.
A moment later, it is all white.
Black and white push into his field of vision as if wrestling at odds. The two colors seem to have their own consciousness. They fight with each other for some unknown glory.

Title: Interlude - A Great Show → Stinger that Nobody Is Watching (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Luna]: As an "Ascendant", your power will be at my disposal.
[Roland]: And what makes you say that?
[Luna]: I created you. I am your "Creator".

Title: Interlude - Blue Bird → Ascent (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
"And there appeared a great wonder in heaven; a woman clothed with the sun, and the moon under her feet, and upon her head a crown of twelve stars."
Light pierces through the heavy, impermeable clouds. Birds rise above the empty church as a sudden gust blows across.
The gust soon grows into a gale that catches the attention of every living thing, from crouching humans to fighting Constructs, even the creatures who were bred from the Red Tide have paused their slaughter. They all look at the light.

Title: Interlude - Blue Bird → Descent (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
"\'Men of Galilee,\' they said, \'why do you stand here looking into the sky? This same Jesus, who has been taken from you into heaven, will come back in the same way you have seen him go into heaven.\'"
A chirping white dove ascends from the thorns, taking Liv back from the painful memory.
It flaps its wings to fly away, but ends up getting caught in the crimson Punishing waves.

Title: Interlude - Blue Bird → Epiphany (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
"She once read about an article amongst many Golden Age works Yarha collected.I see the invisible bursts of gamma radiation from giant stars converting into pure energy by their own mass. I see the flashes that flicker from the far side of the universe.—Just like all the births and demises she is witnessing."
The overwhelming gunfire pulls Liv back from the temporary connection. In her blurred vision, she sees the blood-soaked dove standing on a thorn in front of her eyes. It is flapping its wings and chirping loudly as if chanting a battle anthem.
The bird shakes off crimson Punishing Virus from its wings, revealing the white plumes under... It has become an egret.

Title: Interlude - Blue Bird → Epiphany (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The next morning, all the remaining soldiers of Base 068 safely arrived at the nearest depot.
I risked being demoted and gave my commander a guarantee to put together a Construct army toward Base 068.
I told him we left lots of supplies that needed to be retrieved. There might also be survivors who didn\'t manage to retreat in time.

Title: Interlude - Blue Bird → Christmas (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
"I will not leave you comfortless: I will come to you—along with others, she longs for the arrival of immortality."
She is awakened by hazy voices in her M.I.N.D.
"My spirit hath rejoiced in God my Savior."

Title: Interlude - Blue Bird → Annunciation (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Countless spikes rise from the crimson sea and pierce through the limping egret that has been following Liv. The white bird screeches, blood flowing from its chest.
It sings the most euphonious and mournful dying song, like a nightingale that crimsons the rose with its heart\'s blood.
As the egret struggles, its blood-soaked plumes begin to fall.

Title: Interlude - Blue Bird → Resurrection (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Countless memories of her own flood in.
She remembers now. She is Liv. Callie held her hands and watched her grow up. Officer Yelena showed her the direction of her life. Gray Raven formed a bond with her.
[Mother]: Come back, Liv.

Title: Interlude - Blue Bird → The Prophecy of Simeon (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Yarha encountered a couple of Corrupted during his escape. He rolled down some rocks and fell into a ruin.
He had a blackout. After his ears stopped ringing, he began to moan in pain. For one moment, he thought he was already dead. Would it be better to die from falling as a deserter than dying on the battlefield as a hero? He didn\'t know.
While unconscious, he feels like someone is grabbing his shoulders and pulling his body.

Title: Interlude - Song of Flowers → The Shepherd (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
—If the Pantheon still existed today, it probably won\'t stand any more impressive than this.
A giant chandelier, beautiful and extravagant, hangs from the magnificent dome, illuminating the famous mural above with its refracted lights from multiple angles.
No one knows if there are any discrepancies between that and the original. No one cares whether the details match the records for that matter.

Title: Interlude - Song of Flowers → The Little Girl Lost (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
—This is a record.
Not something as official as a report nor as private as a diary. They\'re just words, like something you would say to a friend when you talked about your day.
I wish to record my current situation in the form of letters.

Title: Interlude - Song of Flowers → Festival of Innocence (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Cold, hunger, unprompted fatigue and pain keep hitting Flora\'s body in waves.
Her throat dry, her voice harsh-sounding, the weariness from speaking the lines for so long is tormenting her.
She wants to be comforted and cared for as every child does.

Title: Interlude - Song of Flowers → Festival of Vicissitudes (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Pieter]: Selena. Selena?
[Pieter]: You\'ve been standing here for a while ever since we entered this area. What\'s wrong?
[Selena]: Umm...

Title: Interlude - Song of Flowers → Festival of Vicissitudes (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
As the bass\' song quiets down, drowning in the sound of the crumbled stones, Selena cannot help but raises a hand and salutes the veteran before her.
Then it hits her that she was not watching an opera in the audience seats. The story she just heard was not fictional.
The bass singer has steadily recited a mission report—except Pieter sang it with his old yet flexible voice as if he was performing a solo in a historical epic.

Title: Interlude - Song of Flowers → The Fly (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Flora]: ～Oh, blood and blades.～
[Flora]: ～An impressive battle it was, my brave comrades! But the fight is yet over, for our land is corrupted still, I\'m afraid.～
[Flora]: ～So stand! Stand! Behind you your homeland you shall guard and defend!～

Title: Interlude - Song of Flowers → The Fly (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Flora]: ～Oh! Look! Do you see?～
[Flora]: ～There, my comrades carried; there, the ship departs! Infinite is the love it holds, eternal will the dreamers last!～
[Flora]: ～Away it sails! My hope it hails!～

Title: Interlude - Song of Flowers → Songs of the New Bard (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Ayla]: Yours, Ayla...
[Allen]: Earth to Ayla?
[Ayla]: Hmm... Ah, I\'m sorry.

Title: Interlude - Song of Flowers → Echoes of the Ancient Bard (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
She walks forward.
She has been walking for a very long time, uncertain where to go.
But when she reaches this place, she feels like she should stay here for a while.

Title: Interlude - Night Mayfly → Night Boat (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Father]: Are you sure you just want this plushie, Yoyo?
The girl named Yoyo turns around with a panda plushie in her arms, nodding at her father enthusiastically.
[Yoyo]: Dad! This panda is called "Master", and it can talk! It can also fly...

Title: Interlude - Night Mayfly → Night Boat (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The night rain begins to shower the Nighter, covering its fluttering lights with a haze. People speed up under their umbrellas, not noticing a small figure running breathlessly among them in the rain.
Or... perhaps they have been desensitized by what they have seen. It is just another night when another soul fails to survive the Nighter, devoured silently in the dark.
[Collar]: //Target\'s threat level rising. Priority level: C—

Title: Interlude - Night Mayfly → Ancient Pouring Glass (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Upon the tallest tower on the Nighter, a Construct in a mask is half-kneeling on the floor, her head lowered, waiting quietly for her actual mistress.
Soon, the Construct hears her mistress\' familiar footsteps, and an imposing woman steps forward from the dark hall. The Construct lowers her head further.
[???]: Rise, Yazi.

Title: Interlude - Night Mayfly → Return of a Distant Dawn (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Familiar lights sway above Yoyo. She opens her eyes, violently coughing.
The long-missing air in her throat tastes like honey. Yoyo even wonders if she has forgotten how breathing feels like.
[???]: You\'re finally awake...

Title: Interlude - Night Mayfly → Dream Song (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
It has been a few years since the greatest calamity in human history—the Punishing Virus outbreak. Most civilizations on the planet\'s surface have been completely wiped out.
Once, the cities\' skylines at night are brighter and more beautiful than the starry night sky. But now, the civilizations that shone in the dark are gone, replaced with darkness dimmer than space.
But one lone star shines in this dark void. Its faint light flickers as if the nights never arrive; it laughs as if there have never been any tales of sorrow.

Title: Interlude - Night Mayfly → Sadness of Farewell (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The performance was a success, but Hanying\'s impromptu "performance" has still gotten her an earful from the troupe leader.
[Hanying]: Could it be... him? But that\'s impossible...
She has no idea how her code signature as a mechanoid was leaked, but the only person in theory who knows the code... is her creator.

Title: Interlude - Night Mayfly → Song of Fragrance (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Huaxu]: The Nighter will dock in approximately 70 hours. The open market we are hosting on the dock will be our closest one to Kowloong.
[Huaxu]: I will be controlling the mechanoid with Qu\'s appearance remotely and monitor the market myself. I have changed the classification level from B to C based on the citizen feedback we received...
Villier, however, does not seem to care about this. He is just focusing on calibrating Huaxu\'s data.

Title: Interlude - Night Mayfly → Song of Fragrance (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The figure in teal is thrown out, her chest marked by a gaping wound—Lady Qu, the master of the Nighter, plummets to the ground.
Behind her, another figure accelerates and dashes, ready to annihilate "Qu" with a claw strike.
[Hanying]: //Execute Order [Destroy Target]

Title: Interlude - Night Mayfly → New Farewell Song (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
As one of the best shops selling mechanical components on the Nighter, Jinman\'s Emporium only has one customer on the day the ship docks for a market.
It has been closed for a while since the Corrupted attack a few days ago. Some of the usual customers were poached by other competitors.
But Jin Man is not worried. He is confident that his business will boom again in three months—but now, he has to figure out how to solve the problem at hand.

Title: Golden Vortex - Weaved Destiny → M I-1 Follower (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Karenina]: ...This is the Golden Vortex, isn\'t it?
[Karenina]: (Sends message) This is Karenina. I\'m in position.
[Karenina]: (Sends message) So I just have to find this antigen, right? Hey... Hello? Anyone?!

Title: Golden Vortex - Weaved Destiny → M l-4 Human Experiment (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Karenina]: Why is this Nanami so damn elusive?
[Karenina]: Can\'t shake her off when you\'re stuck with her. Can\'t find her when you need her.
[Karenina]: I\'ll focus on the mission, I guess. Gray Raven has joined the operation as well. I must complete it before that Lucia.

Title: Golden Vortex - Weaved Destiny → M l-6 Starting Again (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Karenina]: From the report of the retriever, I\'m sure those residues are almost identical to the antigen.
[Karenina]: Can\'t believe how fast it is for me to complete the mission, having traveled such a long way.
[Karenina]: (Looks at the pinky bone in her hand) ...

Title: Golden Vortex - Weaved Destiny → M l-7 Resistance (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After blowing up a few more walls, Karenina runs into another Construct underground...
[Karenina]: Why are you here...?
[Kamui]: You almost blew me up!

Title: Golden Vortex - Weaved Destiny → M l-9 Merge (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Karenina]: Tch... of course it\'s you.
[Nanami]: (Removes her weapon from the guard) Huh? Oh! You\'re both here!
[Karenina]: Do you have to make such a fuss?

Title: Golden Vortex - Weaved Destiny → M l-11 Vision (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: Nat... Nanami can see Nat and her servants...
[Karenina]: Nat?
[Nanami]: Nat, Queen of Gold. She claims to be the creator of the Golden Vortex.

Title: Golden Vortex - Weaved Destiny → M l-13 Tracking the Sound (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: (His mechanical arms press against the door to the chamber) It... won\'t budge...
[Karenina]: My bombs aren\'t doing anything to it either...
[Karenina]: We took down all the guards, but we\'re stopped by a door?!

Title: Golden Vortex - Weaved Destiny → B ll-1 Deterrence (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Tired Corrupted]: (Its arm jams as it raises its weapon) ...
[Kamui]: Relax, I can still take on another dozen of you. So come at me, bro! Show me what you got! No one goes easy on me!
[Tired Corrupted]: (Its power supply warning goes off while its frame lets out black smoke) ...

Title: Golden Vortex - Weaved Destiny → M ll-1 Hospitality (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Roland]: How... embarrassing of me...
[Roland]: I was going to buy myself some time—w-with a trick or two...
[Roland]: But this antigen is—a-affecting me—w-way more than I thought it would...

Title: Golden Vortex - Weaved Destiny → M ll-3 Seeking Help (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Roland]: (Picks up the head of a guard) Its... central nervous system is still intact...
[Roland]: Nat mustn\'t have guessed that...
[Roland]: Even when the Punishing Virus is waning... I can still hack into mechanical parts...

Title: Golden Vortex - Weaved Destiny → B l-1 Communication Disorder (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: Hey-hey, you... you good?
[Damaged Corrupted]: ...
[Nanami]: Poor thing... Your buddies dumped you because you\'re hurt, didn\'t they?

Title: Golden Vortex - Weaved Destiny → M ll-4 Blockage (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Roland]: Did my Corrupted... get stopped by the guards... Why aren\'t they here...
[Roland]: It won\'t be long... before the Punishing Virus is completely gone here..
[Roland]: Unless...

Title: Golden Vortex - Weaved Destiny → M ll-6 Mutual Destruction (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: (Reaches the top of the building) We\'re finally out... huh?
[Nanami]: The guards are still after us.
[Roland]: Nat isn\'t going to... let me go so easily...

Title: Golden Vortex - Weaved Destiny → M ll-7 Annihilation (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
(Lifts the fuel tank pinning his right leg) ...
(Walks in the ruin underground) ...
[Roland]: (Does not find any antigen) The antigen is gone...

Title: Golden Vortex - Dream of Sands → M I-1 Maverick (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Forsaken]: That\'s the main building of the Golden Vortex ahead of us, sir.
[Watanabe]: Can\'t believe there\'s something this creepy in this desert...
[Watanabe]: If we guessed it right, the people we\'re looking for is inside there.

Title: Golden Vortex - Dream of Sands → M I-3 Risk Transfer (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Watanabe]: (Puts down the mechanoid head) None of these guards are properly communicating with each other... but taking down anyone of them and the whole area\'s alerted.
[Watanabe]: Probably has something to do with the dual alarm system I found out. It\'s impossible to not trigger it at this stage.
[Watanabe]: As I\'m in the enemies\' territory, there\'ll just be more and more guards I\'ll need to assassinate.

Title: Golden Vortex - Dream of Sands → M II-1 Saving the Earth (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bianca]: The Punishing Virus concentration here is way lower than the danger threshold...
[Bianca]: I\'ve never seen anything like this in all my years serving on the surface.
[Bianca]: ...If this desert holds the secret of an "antigen" to the virus, then it made sense that Babylonia would create a joint operation here in such short notice.

Title: Golden Vortex - Dream of Sands → M I-4 Old Habit (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bianca]: Even with the roaring engine from the main building...
[Bianca]: ...I can still hear your every move.
[Bianca]: (Draw the bow) Show yourself!

Title: Golden Vortex - Dream of Sands → M I-6 Choice (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Watanabe]: I can\'t let her know I\'m here to save my people...
[Watanabe]: Those who\'re trapped inside are on the Purifying Force\'s kill list.
[Watanabe]: It\'s already difficult to rescue someone in a heavily guarded place...

Title: Golden Vortex - Dream of Sands → M I-8 Relic (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Watanabe]: (Takes down the guard) ...
[Watanabe]: This...
Inside the shell of the guard is a Forsaken pendant, the string that holds it already snapped.

Title: Golden Vortex - Dream of Sands → M II-3 Queen's Treat (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nat]: As you can see, this is my chamber.
[Nat]: You want to see Liv, right? Here... I will show you the image.
[Nat]: Liv is in the northeastern part of the desert, a temporary base of your Joint Task Force.

Title: Golden Vortex - Dream of Sands → M I-12 Queen's Request (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nat]: "Static Seal". That is how I will cure the Punishing Virus.
[Nat]: Every single sand carries millions of these "Static Seal" nanobots.
[Nat]: They flow with the wind and suppress the Punishing Virus in the air.

Title: Golden Vortex - Dream of Sands → M I-10 Promise (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Delirious Forsaken]: ...All infected! We\'re done for... Infected!
[Bianca]: What are they talking about? Infected... is it the Punishing Virus?
[Watanabe]: Help me keep them down! The guards are going to...

Title: Golden Vortex - Dream of Sands → B-1 Off Form (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: Roland! Give up already... Do you think you can get away after such a long fight with me? Don\'t be a fool!
[Roland]: I do remember you talking this much the last time I had your face under my boot.
[Kamui]: Hey, you\'re not looking very well! You got a stomach ache? Need a lie-down from the heat?

Title: Golden Vortex - Dream of Sands → M I-11 Promise Keeper (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Watanabe]: You\'ll be able to rappel down the wall to the desert after we take down this wave of guards.
[Forsaken A]: Retreat with us, sir!
[Watanabe]: ...

Title: Golden Vortex - Dream of Sands → M II-5 Hostage (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Delirious Forsaken]: Don\'t touch me... Leave me be... I\'m fine—I-I\'m fine...
[Delirious Forsaken]: (Sways back and forth) The Queen... The Queen...
[Bianca]: They\'re all... humans!

Title: Golden Vortex - Dream of Sands → M II-7 Two Ways of Rescue (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Forsaken]: Th... thank you. I... I\'ve been marking the days on the wall with my fingernails... over a hundred days... finally...
[Bianca]: What happened after you were locked up here?
[Forsaken]: What happened... I... I can\'t quite remember...

Title: Golden Vortex - Dream of Sands → M II-8 Golden Antibody (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The retriever has analyzed the skin tissues of the Forsaken and isolated two components.
[Bianca]: That... that can\'t be!
[Bianca]: There\'s the Punishing Virus... and the antigen...

Title: Golden Vortex - Dream of Sands → B-3 Negotiation (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: Show me what else you\'ve got!
[Roland]: I\'m not going after... after you and Babylonia right now.
[Kamui]: ...Oh?

Title: Golden Vortex - Dream of Sands → M I-13 For Commandant (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Watanabe]: Has the Purifying Force found an antibody yet?
[Bianca]: You\'re reading too much into it. I know less than you.
[Bianca]: Did they get out safely?

Title: Golden Vortex - Golden No More → M-1 Hound or Eagle (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: (Sends an 8-bit document to Lucia) "Lucia, check out the guards\' formation. Getting disordered."
Outside the chamber, multiple alarms are sounding at areas under attack. The Queen\'s guards are struggling to prioritize...
[Lucia]: (Replies the 8-bit document) "Understood."

Title: Golden Vortex - Golden No More → M-4 Unity (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nat]: (A new model of mechanoid guard appears behind Nat) I cannot believe you were able to find an opening...
—!
[Lucia]: (The key successfully unlocks the door of the chamber) ...I\'ll clear the obstacles. Everyone, charge!

Title: Golden Vortex - Golden No More → M-5 Total Alert (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The sound of a giant machine operating comes through the wall...
[Lucia]: ...What is that? Another royal guard?
[Nanami]: That\'s not it! Something\'s in the wall...

Title: Golden Vortex - Golden No More → M-7 Prelude of Pandemic (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: I checked it again in case there was a mistake...
[Lee]: Data shows that most of the functions in the Golden Vortex have stopped running.
[Lucia]: Someone\'s helping us... Is it Kamui?

Title: Golden Vortex - Golden No More → M-8 Climb (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
...!! ...!!
[Lee]: (Shoots the guard leaping toward you) The guards are still on us.
[Lee]: Nanami... puts down the head.

Title: Golden Vortex - Golden No More → B ll-1 Expansion (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Karenina]: ...Ugh—Aargh!
After falling into Nat\'s trap, Karenina has been tumbling inside the vent for a few minutes...
[Karenina]: (Stops herself falling by wedging her weapon within the vent) ...

Title: Golden Vortex - Golden No More → B lll-2 Scorching Hot (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Guard]: Power supply damaged... Insufficient power in weather engine Group B...
[Bianca]: (Nails the guard to the wall with an arrow) That\'s weird... It\'s broadcasting the warning about the power supply, but Nat\'s not here, and it\'s the only guard present...
[Bianca]: What\'s its motive?

Title: Golden Vortex - Golden No More → M-9 Gambit (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nikola]: A failure! What a catastrophic failure!
[Nikola]: Babylonia\'s reputation is dragged through the mud!
[Nikola]: All teams involved in this operation must be held responsible!

Title: Golden Vortex - Golden No More → M-12 Dynasty (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nat]: (Stands on the royal guard\'s shoulders) Cannot... forgive...
[Nat]: Roland had the opportunity to do it because of you...
[Nat]: Babylonia... Ascendants...

Title: Golden Vortex - Golden No More → B l-1 Master Gamer (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
————
[Kamui]: (Forces his way through dozens of guards himself) Aah...!
[Nat]: That is the Construct... We cannot have him here...

Title: Golden Vortex - Golden No More → B l-3 Exit (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After escaping to the outskirt of the Golden Vortex, Roland is once again exposed to the gold dust. Forcing the Punishing Virus input into his frame, it soon begins to malfunction...
[Roland]: If Kamui hadn\'t barged in, I would\'ve recovered every last bit of intel on the Golden Vortex...
[Roland]: I really shouldn\'t return empty-handed as an Ascendant...

Title: Golden Vortex - Golden No More → M-14 Collapse (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nat]: (The damaged parts of her frame break off) ...!
[Nat]: Cannot... c-cannot...
[Nat]: (Picks up the fallen parts) The Queen cannot...

Title: Golden Vortex - Golden No More → M-15 Source of Disaster (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
All of you, including Lucia, gather around the monitor in the cabin...
You watch the Golden Vortex, this majestic architectural wonder in the middle of the desert, collapses and falls.
[Lucia]: Pilot, keep circling the area.

Title: Border Pact - Port Kyaranta → NO.32 Port Hub (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You arrive in the frigid Port District...
This place reminds you of Murmansk somehow...
[Sophia]: I dislike the cold, but Miss Celica requested my deployment.

Title: Border Pact - Port Kyaranta → NO.32 Port Hub (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Area clear!
[Lee & Liv]: Area clear!
[Lucia]: Strange—there are a lot fewer Corrupted than expected in the port.

Title: Border Pact - Port Kyaranta → NO.33 Unloading Area (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Lee, the flanks!
[Lee]: Son of a—they\'re all holed up in the corners!
[Lee]: We\'re cut off by the explosion. The only way is forward!

Title: Border Pact - Port Kyaranta → NO.33 Unloading Area (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: The vault doors are... right there!
[Lee]: ...In range! Commandant, I need your authorization!
[Lee]: Got it! Now, time to... Huh? Access denied?

Title: Border Pact - Port Kyaranta → NO.34 Core Management Area (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Sophia]: Hinges——16... Regulators——4... Security valves——multi-layered...
[Sophia]: Alright. So a cutting it here... and here should...
...

Title: Border Pact - Port Kyaranta → NO.34 Core Management Area (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: I see the tower!
[Sophia]: Start the reboot sequence!
...

Title: Border Pact - Glazed Arch → NO.35 Reunion Pavilion (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Incessant chatter fills the transport aircraft. Conversations from the ATC channel burrow into your ears through your personal terminal.
[Pilot]: Mother Swan-6 to Babylonia Control. Now approaching route 3-3-4. New area up ahead. Request confirmation of route validity.
[Celica]: Babylonia Control to Mother Swan-6. Route 3-3-4 and airspace ahead are both clear. Drop cargo at point Papa-Sierra-14.

Title: Border Pact - Glazed Arch → NO.35 Reunion Pavilion (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Corrupted]: ■■■■■!
[Karenina]: Agh! You lil\' twat! Ew, it\'s all sticky and gross!
Karenina slams her massive cannon onto the Corrupted, creating a massive dent in its face. The metallic frame crumbles, and even more of the rotten muck lands on Karenina\'s arms and legs.

Title: Border Pact - Glazed Arch → NO.36 Dream Terrace (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You and the others follow the lonesome figure of Karenina. She eventually stops and hunches near the entrance to the theater. She seems to be peeking at the area inside.
[Lucia]: Karenina...?
[Karenina]: Shh—

Title: Border Pact - Glazed Arch → NO.36 Dream Terrace (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Karenina]: Is it over yet?
[Ayla]: Almost. Just another twenty secs!
[Ayla]: Five seconds!

Title: Border Pact - Glazed Arch → NO.37 Cloud Passage (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Karenina]: Ugh, getting up here was surprisingly hard.
[Lee]: Looks like there are some more Corrupted wandering around the place. Perhaps they used to be glass cleaners before the pandemic.
[Karenina]: Hey, Ayla said people would light firecrackers after plays like this ended.

Title: Border Pact - Glazed Arch → NO.37 Cloud Passage (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Sophia]: All systems green. This CPF can be reactivated immediately.
[Sophia]: Reactivation sequence commencing.
Tied to the same circuit as the great theater, the CPF rebooting sequence causes a temporary short in the theater control systems.

Title: Border Pact - Yazaki Reclaimed Land → NO.38 Maintenance Tunnel (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A slight breeze drifts through the empty streets. Distant sobs whisper of bitter farewells.
[Celica]: Testing, testing... Ahem, what\'s the situation over there?
[Lee & Liv]: All clear.

Title: Border Pact - Yazaki Reclaimed Land → NO.38 Maintenance Tunnel (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: There are small androids along our path... There they go again... they seem to be holding picture frames.
[Liv]: From a distance, they look... just like real children...
[Bianca]: The Corrupted have us surrounded. I\'ll provide cover.

Title: Border Pact - Yazaki Reclaimed Land → NO.39 Shopping Town (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: What\'s that stalking us?
[Lee]: Not a Corrupted. Who are you?
[Liv]: Let me patch you up.

Title: Border Pact - Yazaki Reclaimed Land → NO.39 Shopping Town (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: The trapped person... It\'s the kid I saw, the one with the picture frame!
[Bianca]: In the commotion, he ran off towards the playground over there.
[Nanny]: That must be... the child the master wants me to find... I must protect him...

Title: Border Pact - Yazaki Reclaimed Land → NO.40 Yazaki Park (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanny]: Found you!
[Nanny]: It\'s you...!
The nanny rushes toward the bawling child, while in the shadows, a sharp blade flashes into sight—

Title: Border Pact - Yazaki Reclaimed Land → NO.40 Yazaki Park (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
As the last of the Corrupted are dispatched, a tiny metallic hand falls limp in the "Mother\'s" arms, the picture frame clenched within clatters to the ground.
[Bianca]: Viral load within acceptable range.
[Lee]: The orphanage should be around here.

Title: Border Pact - Bayside Fort → NO.41 Counter Corridor (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: Wow, this place is massive! I didn\'t know there\'s a whoppin\' fortress here on the sea!
[Watanabe]: Don\'t rock the boat...
Seeing that he can\'t get Nanami to listen, Watanabe turns to the rest of you, who are sorting out equipment.

Title: Border Pact - Bayside Fort → NO.41 Counter Corridor (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: Ha, we\'re finally through!
[Nanami]: All these twists and turns... so annoying! And there\'s a whole bunch of Corrupted to beat up around every corner!
[Watanabe]: Why are you in such a hurry? We need to take it slow.

Title: Border Pact - Bayside Fort → NO.42 Anti-Direct Hit Partition (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: ...A defensive wall?
[Watanabe]: And not just one.
This part is just the light refraction layer... around 20 centimeters thick.

Title: Border Pact - Bayside Fort → NO.42 Anti-Direct Hit Partition (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: The path is clear now!
[Watanabe]: Get inside!
Once you all make it into the stairwell, Watanabe secures the airlock.

Title: Border Pact - Bayside Fort → NO.43 QR Passageway (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Watanabe]: Bingo.
[Watanabe]: It\'s a quick reaction passageway. The CPF can\'t be that far away.
[Watanabe]: The alert squad is the quick reaction force in the fortress. They often also serve as the last line of defense for important figures.

Title: Border Pact - Bayside Fort → NO.43 QR Passageway (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Clear!
[Lee]: All clear over here!
[Watanabe]: The CPF casing is open! Come take a look!

Title: Border Pact - Southwood Road → NO.44 Bamboo Garden (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Southwood Road...
Less than a thousand kilometers from Kowloong Metropolis.
It was a scantily populated seaside area even back in its heyday, nothing compared to the major East Asian cities.

Title: Border Pact - Southwood Road → NO.44 Bamboo Garden (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: Yet another day...
[???]: What day is it today?
A tiny, dirty finger reaches out, scratching a scar onto the burnt wall.

Title: Border Pact - Southwood Road → NO.45 Hospital Buildings (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Commandant.
[Liv]: She\'s on the table. Hopefully in time...
[Lee]: ?

Title: Border Pact - Southwood Road → NO.46 Underground Factory (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Karenina]: Huh?
[Karenina]: Psh, what d\'you mean, "can I handle it"?
[Karenina]: No one but Karenina can handle this, is what you say!

Title: Border Pact - K-44 Defense Line → NO.47 Titan Trench (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Bexonidas is deep in thought.
"Deep in thought" might not be the best way to put it. He\'s holding an assault rifle, after all, and it\'s aimed at the observation post, jutting out of the distant trench.
The tendons of his finger are wound tight, suspended over his rifle\'s double-action trigger. Within a tenth of a second of receiving the order to fire, his trusty weapon will unleash the rage he\'s been saving up this entire time.

Title: Border Pact - K-44 Defense Line → NO.47 Titan Trench (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Watanabe]: This should be enough.
[Watanabe]: 19-1, this is Skyking. Titan Trench is secure. I repeat, Titan Trench is secure.
[Bexonidas]: 19-1 copies, moving to next observation post.

Title: Border Pact - K-44 Defense Line → NO.48 Hangar Passage (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Bexonidas and Halam unload the cumbersome auto grenade launcher stand from its position together. Squad 19-1 is pulling out of the observation post.
This auto grenade launcher has been with Squad 19-1 for six years. Halam, the grenadier, is probably the only one who remembers how many grenades it\'s fired.
However, it hasn\'t been used even once in this observation post. All 60 grenades still lie safely in the pack on Halam\'s back.

Title: Border Pact - K-44 Defense Line → NO.48 Hangar Passage (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
An hour later...
[Gryphon]: Sarge, can we break radio silence yet?
[Bexonidas]: Almost!

Title: Border Pact - K-44 Defense Line → NO.49 Residential Area (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Watanabe]: 19-1, this is Skyking. Do you copy?
[Watanabe]: ...
Without a word, Watanabe turns off the radio. Squad 19-1 is still MIA.

Title: Border Pact - K-44 Defense Line → NO.49 Residential Area (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Watanabe]: Any news?
[Forsaken]: An hour and forty minutes ago, signals of a huge moving horde had appeared around the residential area and the Titan Trench.
[Forsaken]: They met up around the hangar passageway, but then moved another 30 kilometers in the opposite direction after they converged.

Title: Border Pact - Cape Nohama Air Base → NO.53 Ghost Coast (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The wind is roaring. Standing on the decrepit ruins, the man gazes from afar at the abandoned city on the icy plains, one hand combing the stray strands of windblown hair outside of his eyes.
From where he\'s standing, he can see a cluster of ramshackle buildings covered by snow. Not a single human can be spotted.
[???]: I sense something approaching.

Title: Border Pact - Cape Nohama Air Base → NO.53 Ghost Coast (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After the battle, sudden loud, noisy singing comes drifting over from the distance.
～Living in the hustle, hanging with my fellows...～
～Riding with me is my homie and my rifle...～

Title: Border Pact - Cape Nohama Air Base → NO.54 Quick Reaction Passage (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After the crew passes through a block of buildings, a colorful large-wheeled snowmobile comes into sight. On top of it sits an unfamiliar man, dressed in thick but tattered winter clothes. Behind him is the source of the deafening music: a radio.
[Liv]: Biological signal detected... It\'s a human man.
[Watanabe]: ...

Title: Border Pact - Cape Nohama Air Base → NO.54 Quick Reaction Passage (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Yamamoto]: ...Now that was something.
[Liv]: Commandant... the rapid-reaction channel is up ahead.
[Liv]: ...Oh!

Title: Border Pact - Cape Nohama Air Base → NO.55 Radar Station (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Did Mr. Gravekeeper really just leave us?
[Forsaken]: That\'s what he does.
[Lee]: Pressing forward will put Commandant at risk, but as long as we reach the base in time, the situation should be under control.

Title: Border Pact - Cape Nohama Air Base → NO.55 Radar Station (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The Forsaken mill in and out of the radar station, checking signals and performing maintenance.
Lucia is uploading her mission report, while Liv stands next to the ocean, gazing into the distance. Lee, on the other hand, is recording his battle notes.
[Watanabe]: ...So you have nothing to do?

Title: Border Pact - Achilles → NO.50 Bunker Dune (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Celica]: Have you all arrived safely?
...
[Celica]: Well, you\'re in one piece, so that counts.

Title: Border Pact - Achilles → NO.50 Bunker Dune (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Pulao]: Whew...
Enemies eliminated, Pulao is about to set off before Bianca drags her back by the collar.
[Bianca]: Mechanical structure detected. Four o\'clock. Distance 15 meters.

Title: Border Pact - Achilles → NO.51 Reinforced Passage (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Continuing down the underground tunnel, darkened walls and dim light replace the sun and the heat.
Suddenly, you hear the barely perceptible pop of a tripwire. Before you can react, Lucia\'s already on the move.
With a flash of her blade, Lucia intercepts the bolts. They fall to the ground, bent and deformed.

Title: Border Pact - Achilles → NO.51 Reinforced Passage (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Pulao]: You...! Stop, all of you!
[Lee]: ...?
[Pulao]: Just do as I say!

Title: Border Pact - Achilles → NO.52 Data Center (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The echoes of Pulao\'s dainty footsteps on the concrete ground come to a halt. Following a few taps, Pulao\'s little face is lit up by a glowing display screen.
Cold, artificial light shines through the slowly opening blast door, casting elongated shadows behind your figures.
[Pulao]: ...Everyone, we\'re here.

Title: Border Pact - Achilles → NO.52 Data Center (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Without Lee at our side, the squad scrambles to fend off the attackers.
[Lucia]: These mechanoids... Aren\'t they the prototypes used in the performance troupe?
[Pulao]: ...

Title: Event Story - Eternal Throne → Stars and Sands (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The wheels turn and hit the rails like a rhythmic heartbeat. The wind howls as it presses against the sealed windows.
The sky darkens, and the warm, yellow glow of the moon melts into the night sky, peeking through the gentle clouds, sprinkling bits of its glow throughout the carriages.
Lee tilts his head as he leans on a table, maintaining his pistols. Liv gazes outside the windows, while Lucia sits beside her, lost in thought.

Title: Event Story - Eternal Throne → Chaotic Carriages (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: Next up is the Industrial Carriage in the middle of the train. Repairing it is crucial but dangerous, as the production system there is the second most critical part in keeping the train running, apart from its engine.
[Lee]: From the train\'s blueprint, we\'re eight carts away from the Industrial Carriage, excluding the corridors. We\'ll be going through the Commoner Carriage.
Lee clicks on the map, and a scan of the interior of the Commoner Carriage expands on the holo-screen.

Title: Event Story - Eternal Throne → Baby Dream (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: The Industrial Carriage is right ahead of us.
[Lee]: This has been going unexpectedly smoothly.
[Liv]: All thanks to Sophia... I\'m glad you\'re alright.

Title: Event Story - Eternal Throne → Endless Tunnel (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Sophia]: Commandant.
[Sophia]: Part of the train\'s self-diagnostic system failed so the axle temperature detecting system didn\'t work when the axle boxes overheated which means the alarm didn\'t sound and the emergency repair didn\'t happen...
[Sophia]: ...

Title: Event Story - Eternal Throne → Gronin Station (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: Most of the train\'s functions are back online.
[Lee]: ...
[Lee]: We\'re approaching the edge of the human inland city.

Title: Event Story - Summer Pockets → Summer Afternoon (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Babylonia Gray Raven Lounge
[Kamui]: Commandant—Ah, Liv and Lee, you\'re here too. Great! Let\'s all play a game together!
As usual, Kamui strolls cheerily and breezily into the Gray Raven Lounge, greeting the preoccupants.

Title: Event Story - Summer Pockets → Virtual Swimsuit (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Game Narration]: Humans. Drawn always by the beach. All too human.
[Game Narration]: Dazzling summer sun, and blue skies... the beach is absolutely the best place to spend a summer vacation.
[Game Narration]: You might not be able to go to the beach for a vacation for various reasons, and can\'t meet your friends from other places, so for those of you with these problems, we have the best holiday plan for you!

Title: Event Story - Summer Pockets → Truth or Dare (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The summer beach, the fierce sunshine, and, the young boys and girls in swimsuits—
[Liv]: Ha!
The beach volleyball cuts a beautiful arc through the air.

Title: Event Story - Summer Pockets → Truth or Dare (EB)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: ...
[Liv]: When I was answering the questions, I detected abnormal fluctuations in the virtual space...
[Liv]: It felt like someone was forcing access...

Title: Event Story - Summer Pockets → War on Beach (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Not long ago—
[Nanami]: Oh? Looks like there\'s a party in the Gray Raven lounge!
[Nanami]: Let Nanami see what the Gray Ravens are up to!

Title: Event Story - Summer Pockets → War on Beach (EB)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Lee, who has successfully protected the watermelon, comes over with it in his arms.
Lee, hugging a watermelon and kicking up sand as he dashes through the beach, and the Nanami on his tail, raising her chainsaw like a psychopath—you cannot help but laugh at this absurd sight.
[Liv]: I never thought Lee would...

Title: Event Story - Summer Pockets → The "Surprise" (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Lee and Liv are protecting the watermelon from the evil that is Nanami. Nanami is off to one side, staring at the watermelon and sulking.
[Kamui]: Lee, you might turn out to be a good competitive swimmer.
[Lee]: Why so?

Title: Event Story - Summer Pockets → The "Surprise" (EB)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The group forms a circle around the three watermelons on the ground.
[Kamui]: I can\'t believe we went through all that for these melons.
[Liv]: But... Were there so many watermelons in the beginning? I remember there being just one for the mission reward...

Title: Event Story - Summer Pockets → A Brief Holiday (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Babylonia Gray Raven Lounge
After clearing the game, the group rests their controllers and sits together to discuss their impressions.
[Liv]: So this is what a game is like, huh... It\'s a lot more different than what I thought they were.

Title: Event Story - Summer Pockets → Special Gift (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Ayla]: Oh! Commandant!
You are walking along the corridor when Ayla\'s voice suddenly rings out from behind. She catches up to you with two packages in her arms.
[Ayla]: Commandant! That thing you talked about! It\'s done!

Title: Event Story - Elegy Of Nightmare → Elegy Of Nightmare - 1 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Hassen]: Commandant, I know you just came back from your previous mission, but you\'ve been assigned on another mission.
[Hassen]: It\'s the ARU. They need support.
[Hassen]: Yes. Everything appears to be normal, but our recent observations have picked up an abnormal signal.

Title: Event Story - Elegy Of Nightmare → Elegy Of Nightmare - 2 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: "Once upon a time, there lived a king and queen. They were kind and wise, and the people lived happily under their rule."
[???]: "But the king and queen had a problem—they were childless. So the king and queen prayed with the people to God and asked for God to give them a child."
[???]: "And God responded to their wishes. One day when the queen was bathing, a frog emerged from the water and said to the queen:"

Title: Event Story - Elegy Of Nightmare → Elegy Of Nightmare - 3 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: ...
[Lee]: The abnormal signal should be coming from this area. The increase in bionics should indicate that we are approaching the core.
[Liv]: Those were...

Title: Event Story - Elegy Of Nightmare → Elegy Of Nightmare - 4 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: Just like the frog predicted, something incredible happened. Nine months later, the queen gave birth to a lovely baby girl.
[???]: Overjoyed, the King quickly held a feast and invited relatives, friends, and witches throughout the kingdom.
[???]: Twelve golden plates were prepared for the witches. However, there were a total of thirteen witches, for which one was not invited.

Title: Event Story - Elegy Of Nightmare → Elegy Of Nightmare - 5 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Report, Commandant. We have confirmed that the abnormal bionic signal has been destroyed.
[Liv]: Are these data fragments that we\'ve collected a part of Amberia\'s "dream"...?
[Lee]: This is the fragmented data left by Amberia in the Virtual M.I.N.D. of the bionics. It\'s not unlike a dream.

Title: Event Story - Elegy Of Nightmare → Elegy Of Nightmare - 6 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: The princess gradually grew older. Just as the witches blessed her, she grew into a beautiful, intelligent, and gentle girl.
[???]: On the day of her 15th birthday, the princess visited an ancient tower deep within the castle. It seemed as if she was guided by an incredible power. She climbed the tower and reached the room at the top.
[???]: In the middle of the room stood a spinning wheel that should\'ve long since been burned by the king. A strange old woman was spinning with a spindle.

Title: Event Story - Elegy Of Nightmare → Elegy Of Nightmare - 7 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The final bionic was vaporized before you, and Lucia put her blade away.
[Lucia]: Liv? Whatcha looking at?
[Liv]: The data you collected on Amberia from the battle just now... Was heavily fragmented and disorderly.

Title: Event Story - Elegy Of Nightmare → Elegy Of Nightmare - 8 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: "The tip of the spindle pricked the princess\'s finger. When the drop of blood landed, she fell into a deep sleep."
[???]: "Then the king, the queen, the guards, and all the people and animals in the castle fell asleep. Even the fire in the stoves stopped burning. The entire castle fell into deep slumber."
[???]: "Huge thorns appeared from within the ground and tightly wrapped the castle."

Title: Event Story - Elegy Of Nightmare → Elegy Of Nightmare - 9 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: ...
[Liv]: So, the ARU used the refugees that survived the riots as test subjects for humanoid-hybrid modification experiments.
Liv\'s tightly clasped hands trembled slightly.

Title: Event Story - Elegy Of Nightmare → Elegy Of Nightmare - 10 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: "And sometimes, the sleeping princess would dream."
[???]: "She would dream of the sunny courtyard, the gentle chirping of larks, the fragrant rose bushes, and her father and mother smiling warmly at her."
[???]: "In her dream, she met her beloved prince. They formed a family and lived happily together."

Title: Event Story - Elegy Of Nightmare → Elegy Of Nightmare - 11 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: The bionics in this area... are much more violent than the others.
[Liv]: We\'re closing in on Amberia\'s position. Looks like the bionics have become more violent due to the data fragments.
[Liv]: This feeling is... hatred.

Title: Event Story - Elegy Of Nightmare → Elegy Of Nightmare - 12 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Asimov]: Commandant, there\'s good news and bad news. Which one do you want to hear first?
[Asimov]: By the look on your face... Forget it. We found Amberia\'s location. I\'m sending you the coordinates now.
[Asimov]: However, her integration level is much higher than anticipated. She\'s approaching 100%, which is near critical mass...

Title: Event Story - Elegy Of Nightmare → Elegy Of Nightmare - 13 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
["Amberia"]: Rrgh... Ngh... Ahhhh!!!!
Amberia raised her hands as if wanting to grasp at something, then she gradually began to disintegrate at the fingertips.
The blasphemous black fog enveloping her dispersed, and she looked as if she was praying.

Title: Event Story - Joint Warfare → Joint Warfare (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Celica]: Here is a summary of recent reports, President Hassen.
[Hassen]: Thank you.
[Hassen]: ...Just as I thought.

Title: Event Story - Virtual Horizon → Ⅰ SP-01 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nikola]: It\'s 16:33. You\'re late by three minutes.
[Nikola]: Hah... Maybe I should make an appointment the next time I want to see you, hmm?
[Nikola]: Forget it. Let\'s make haste. Asimov, are the equipment ready?

Title: Event Story - Virtual Horizon → Ⅰ SP-02 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Asimov]: The greatest feature of the "Virtual Horizon" command system is its capability to train a commandant\'s adaptability when forming temporary teams.
[Asimov]: Which is why you aren\'t provided with a fixed one. Commandants will have to draft random personnel and form a temporary team to deal with various battle scenarios.
[Asimov]: This removes the unstable factors of in-battle command, and you can instead focus on team formation for Constructs.

Title: Event Story - Virtual Horizon → Ⅰ SP-03 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Corrupted]: Rargh!!!!!
[Veritas]: My duty is to purify the battlefield.
[Corrupted]: !?!?

Title: Event Story - Virtual Horizon → Ⅰ SP-04 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[-AI-]: Virtual combat has ended. Result calculations complete. Low enemy elimination rate... Mission failed.
[-AI-]: Recommended Stategy: Lotus has sustained heavy injuries. Use her to lure in enemies and destroy them with an area attack.
[-AI-]: Why? This is the only option for maximizing efficiency to yield the most optimal results.

Title: Event Story - Virtual Horizon → Ⅱ SP-01 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Asimov]: Oh, you\'re here... I\'ll leave this week\'s test to you.
[Asimov]: Nikola isn\'t here this time. I think he\'s got to handle some application procedures for the "Virtual Horizon" system.
[Asimov]: Don\'t know why he\'s all worked up about it, but getting to continue development on a worthwhile system is a-okay with me.

Title: Event Story - Virtual Horizon → Ⅱ SP-02 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Blast]: Outta my way!
[Dawn]: This isn\'t going well...
Blast\'s attack envelops Dawn, who is engaged in hand-to-hand combat, throwing the battle into immediate chaos.

Title: Event Story - Virtual Horizon → Ⅱ SP-03 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[-AI-]: Commandant, now randomly assigning Constructs to suppress the area—
[Storm]: The heavens call me, the earth calls me, humanity calls me!
The "Virtual Horizon" randomly displays three Constructs for you to choose from.

Title: Event Story - Virtual Horizon → Ⅱ SP-04 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You finally make it to the final stage of the mission, but you are met with an arduous battle.
[Storm]: That\'s quite a crowd! Nanamideon, activate!
Storm swings her chainsaw menacingly at the hostiles, even just scratching an enemy causes it to explode into scrap metal.

Title: Event Story - Virtual Horizon → Ⅲ SP-01 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Rosetta]: Commandant... Are you conducting a command system test this week?
[Rosetta]: Is it about the "Virtual Horizon" command system...? I suggest that you stop using it.
[Rosetta]: No... It\'s best that Babylonia no longer connects to it.

Title: Event Story - Virtual Horizon → Ⅲ SP-02 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Hassen]: I don\'t understand why you\'re so eager to test out that command system...
[Nikola]: You don\'t understand its true value.
[Hassen]: I get it. It\'s necessary for us to have a training mechanism for commandants on standby, but it doesn\'t have to be "this" one.

Title: Event Story - Virtual Horizon → Ⅲ SP-03 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Asimov]: Rosetta? Why are you here all alone... Where\'s our dear lab rat?
[Rosetta]: If you mean the commandant—currently testing the command system.
[Asimov]: Oh boy, that\'s trouble... Forget it, I\'ll go look...

Title: Event Story - Virtual Horizon → Ⅲ SP-04 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
This week\'s missions quickly reached the end. The battle was smooth, maybe even a little too smooth.
[Elite Enemy]: Gah...?!
[Arclight]: Let\'s end it all!

Title: Event Story - Virtual Horizon → Ⅳ SP-01 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
(Bzz—)
The continuous ringing in your ear finally stops. Before you is a strange but familiar scene. At that moment, your ears are filled with more familiar sounds.
[???]: Commandant... What are you doing there?

Title: Event Story - Virtual Horizon → Ⅳ SP-02 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Ann]: Garghhh—!
Another black data steam bursts out of Ann.
The two data streams converge to form a giant black figure.

Title: Event Story - Virtual Horizon → Ⅳ SP-03 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Although the Constructs manage to fend off the monster\'s attack, that is not of much help to bettering the situation...
The rudimentary attacks from the Constructs do little to the monster.
[Ann]: Commandant, you\'re stuck here... It must be the one doing this.

Title: Event Story - Virtual Horizon → Ⅳ SP-04 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The monster is powerful, even summoning countless bionics to fight for it.
But up against the battle-hardened Constructs of "Virtual Horizon"...
[Entropy]: I\'d advise giving up.

Title: Event Story - KI.GAL Archives → SP-01 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The screen emits blue glimmers of light, and brilliant stars can be seen through the dome glass.
This is one of the few places in Babylonia where you may gaze up and observe the universe. It is not staring at the earth, but at what is beyond it.
[Female Construct]: I strongly advise against bringing anyone here. Without a permit, entering this restricted area puts both parties\' lives in danger. The Purifying Force does not require permission to open fire in this spot.

Title: Event Story - KI.GAL Archives → SP-02 (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nikola]: You granted the Gray Raven Commandant access to False Words?
[Hassen]: Right. Instead of leaving them to collect dust in the archives, why not show them to someone who has the potential to accomplish the goal?
[Hassen]: It\'s also a good way to practice.

Title: Event Story - Micawberism Cloisters → Micawberism Cloisters (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
In the ashen city, a girl sits on a broken beam in front of the ruins, her head swinging from one side to the other as she recites dialogues from who-knows-where.
[Nanami]: Even though we are in this apocalyptic urban jungle, and it is not an easy quest, we still have to gain it!
[Martin]: Gain what?

Title: Event Story - Babel Tower → Sands of Infinity (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Babylonia — Asimov\'s Lab
[Asimov]: I gave you a notification so long ago and you only come by just now. I\'m starting to wonder if you\'re whole team\'s lazy like you.
[Asimov]: Dodging the question, are we?

Title: Event Story - Babel Tower → The Theme Park (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Asimov]: You are now speaking to a pre-programmed personality AI construct... Knowing your tardiness, I\'ve left this behind. Anyhow, please learn the importance of being on time.
[Asimov]: >>Calibrating systems...
[Asimov]: Straight to the point, eh? Works for me.

Title: Event Story - Babel Tower → Aurora Sky (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Asimov]: You\'re on time for once. Looks like you\'ve had some time to reflect, huh?
[Asimov]: So do you know why I called you here?
[Asimov]: Good. Spares me the effort to explain.

Title: Event Story - Babel Tower → Bai Ze Chamber (Part C)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Asimov]: It\'s rare to see you arriving earlier than me. I suppose you\'re looking forward to this operation.
[Asimov]: Very well.
[Asimov]: So you do realize you have a different perception of time...

Title: Golden Vortex - Golden Core → M-1 Unveiling the Golden Veil (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: This is it! Commandant, we\'ve arrived at our destination.
[Liv]: We\'ve gone through one sandstorm after another, and I thought we would see something different after we\'re through... But it\'s just more desert
[Lee]: Right, we were sent here in such a rush, after all.

Title: Golden Vortex - Golden Core → M-3 Mystery of the Light Pillar (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Has Liv run into any danger?
[Lee]: You\'ve been sending a message every 20 seconds. If something\'s wrong, you\'ll be the first to know.
[Lucia]: I... I\'m just worried.

Title: Golden Vortex - Golden Core → B II-1 Value of Existence (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Goldfinch entered the Golden Vortex through the sandstorm according to the planned timeline.
[Browning]: What a... shitty place. This joint operation has—G-Goldfinch at the forefront...
[Browning]: Our mission is to scout the area... But—I-I think—w-we can contribute more...

Title: Golden Vortex - Golden Core → B II-4 Contribution (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Browning]: She\'s ignoring the distractors!
[Browning]: Retreat! We\'re no match for her!
[Goldfinch Member]: 12 o\'clock!

Title: Golden Vortex - Golden Core → M-5 Lone Raven (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: Lucia... That\'s enough. If it was going to work, it would\'ve worked already... We\'ve lost contact with Liv.
[Lucia]: ...Let\'s turn around to find her immediately.
[Lee]: (Peeks from your hiding place) The moment we entered this group of buildings, we had already alerted all the guards.

Title: Golden Vortex - Golden Core → M-8 Royal Guards (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Right, Commandant—I\'ve noticed as well. These guards seem to be pushing us further inside intentionally.
[Lucia]: Still, we can\'t do anything even though we have figured that out. Commandant, I hate being played.
[Lucia]: I\'ll come up with an emergency plan immediately. We have to be prepared for the worst-case scenario...

Title: Golden Vortex - Golden Core → B III-1 Red Light, Green Light (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: Lee\'s mission log, volume 28.1... I\'m carrying out an operation on my own. This footage is for my personal use only. Refer to Gray Raven\'s mission report for actual details.
[Lee]: Greenwich Mean Time 07:07. These mechanoid guards are all lined up facing the "golden light beam." They are... saluting something.
[Lee]: The objective of this solo operation was to search for my missing teammate Liv. Now, however, I\'m stuck here...

Title: Golden Vortex - Golden Core → B III-3 Big Gamble (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: Lee\'s mission log, volume 28.2... I\'m stuck behind this box, trapped by the ranged attacks of the guards...
[Lee]: Their attack pattern is incredibly dense with no noticeable weak points... I\'ve no way of escaping...
[Lee]: For real... Not a single window of opportunity...

Title: Golden Vortex - Golden Core → M-9 Letter of Invitation (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: I can\'t take these guards down... fast enough...
[Lucia]: Commandant! I can\'t last much longer if this continues... You have to run for the opening I create as soon as the alarm on my frame pings!
[Lucia]: I will fight to my last breath to make sure you can get out!

Title: Golden Vortex - Golden Core → M-11 Queen's Arrival (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: The data\'s correct. This warning call was from Liv\'s comms.
[Lucia]: I see... I don\'t recommend going forward. We should immediately retreat and locate Liv, and wait for reinforcement.
