As you discuss among yourselves how best to retreat, one mechanoid guard with only its skeleton frame left stands up and drags its broken body before you all.

Title: Golden Vortex - Golden Core → B I-2 Digging Site (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Browning, is the distractor working?
[Browning]: Device—f-functional...
[Liv]: That\'s great! I\'ll contact Lucia immediately...

Title: Golden Vortex - Golden Core → B I-4 Aftermath (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Browning]: Liv... H-help—m-me...
[Liv]: Browning... your leg...
[Browning]: Ignore it—d-device is functional...

Title: Golden Vortex - Golden Core → B I-6 Cheap Shot (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Browning...?
[Browning]: ...
[Liv]: My weapon?!

Title: Golden Vortex - Golden Core → B I-7 Explosive Encounter (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: I\'m safe! Luckily I detonated the weapon in time...
[Liv]: Browning...?
[Browning]: ...

Title: Event Story - Venus Skit → 01 Karenina (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: And so, wars waged around the trinity of swimsuits...
[Nanami]: After all, becoming hope for all that is good means that—ack—cough, cough!
[Sophia]: Here. Water.

Title: Event Story - Venus Skit → 02 Lucia (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
In today\'s "Endless Eight Corridor: Caribbean Swimsuit Empire"...
I\'m still your bard.
[Nanami]: Rohacchi said this...

Title: Event Story - Venus Skit → 03 Vera (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Once again, here at a new episode of "Endless Eight Corridor".
[Sophia]: Question.
[Nanami]: ?

Title: Event Story - Venus Skit → 04 Camu (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[X]: I\'m X.
[Lucia]: ...!!!
[Leviathan]: I see... It all makes sense now...

Title: Event Story - Venus Skit → 05 Gabriel (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Luna]: Speak.
[Gabriel]: Miss Alpha has completed her mission perfectly. Shome is moving just like we expected him to.
[Roland]: As for me... The hunting grounds are ready. He should have no qualms dying with the funeral we\'ve prepared him with.

Title: Event Story - Venus Skit → 06 Shome (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A few days after the meeting...
[Roland]: Miss Luna, did you require my presence?
[Luna]: Yes. About our plans...

Title: Event Story - Venus Skit → 07 Luna (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Somewhere near the Caribbean Sea...
[Roland]: Pah. This is what Miss Luna had in mind?
[Roland]: She can\'t get it through to "her", so she\'s picking on some weakling who has ties to her?

Title: Event Story - Venus Skit → 08 Roland (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Ever since becoming a Construct, Shome has not been sleeping well.
Constructs do not require sleep, but pretending to be asleep helps Shome think.
That used to be the case for Shome, but ever since becoming a Construct, he has not been sleeping well.

Title: Event Story - Starry Conversations → Prelude Starry Conversations (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
This is a familiar night.
The fight is over. One by one, each deployed squad returns to Babylonia.
While technically on leave, you cannot afford to delay your mission report. After all, you have finally gathered some useful intel after days of fighting.

Title: Event Story - Starry Conversations → Bianca Starry Conversations (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bianca]: If you insist, Commandant.
Bianca opens the box to find a metallic bookmark with the magpie bridge carved on it. The execution is not perfect, but the design is properly intricate.
[Bianca]: This is...

Title: Event Story - Starry Conversations → Lucia Starry Conversations (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Meteorites?
The cube-shaped display box housed a few small pieces of meteorite samples inside. Each one of them is labeled with where it originates, but only two of them are familiar names.
[Lucia]: Are you also interested in space as well, Commandant?

Title: Event Story - Starry Conversations → Liv Starry Conversations (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: "Anything I Want"?
Liv picks up the stack of cards inside the box and notices a note sticking at the back.
"Go home and stay with your partner on this rare night of Valentine\'s Day! Use this present well. That\'s the most I can do for you!"

Title: Event Story - Starry Conversations → Lee Starry Conversations (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: How do you have the time to make something like this when you\'ve barely rested recently...
Lee puts down the terminal in his hand and takes the mystery box resignedly.
[Lee]: I wonder if I should admire your endless energy or scold you for your poor time management.

Title: Event Story - Starry Conversations → Kamui Starry Conversations (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: A mystery box? So you don\'t know what\'s inside either?
[Kamui]: Oh, the anticipation! What do you think it will be?
Smiling cheerfully, Kamui tears open the wrapping paper and reveals a corner of the box.

Title: Event Story - Starry Conversations → Nanami Starry Conversations (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: Wow! Can Nanami open it? Now?
With your approval, Nanami immediately goes after the wrapping paper, but she suddenly stops before tearing it apart. She shakes the mystery box, and it makes a quiet grating sound inside.
[Nanami]: If this is a mystery box, won\'t it be cool if Nanami can guess what\'s inside before opening it?

Title: Event Story - Starry Conversations → Karenina Starry Conversations (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Karenina is calibrating her weapon when you enter the room. Seeing how busy she is, you decide to wait on the side for a little while.
Time passes. Having noticed you long ago, Karenina eventually explodes amidst the silence.
[Karenina]: Are you here to snooze? Say something! Do I need to tell you to do everything?!

Title: Event Story - Starry Conversations → Watanabe Starry Conversations (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Watanabe looks a little stunned when you hand him the mystery box.
[Watanabe]: You went all this way to give me this?
[Watanabe]: Isn\'t that a little... And I thought it was some kind of emergency.

Title: Event Story - Starry Conversations → Ayla Starry Conversations (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Ayla]: This... Did you join the event from Astrology Club today, Commandant?
[Ayla]: Sigh. Are they still using this old design for their box?
[Ayla]: Hehe, bingo! But all I really did was make some changes to their design.

Title: Event Story - Starry Conversations → Sophia Starry Conversations (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Sophia]: So that\'s the model of the transmitters the micro camera uses.
The shell of the micro camera in Sophia\'s hands has already been taken apart as she carefully inspects its construction.
[Sophia]: This?

Title: Event Story - Starry Conversations → Chrome Starry Conversations (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Chrome]: A mystery box... What an interesting concept. Should I open it now?
[Chrome]: Do you think I\'d mind? I\'ll treat it with great care as long as it\'s a gift from you.
Chrome carefully unwraps the box. There is a tie clip inside adorned with the pattern of the Summer Triangle, with a sky-colored crystal in place of one of the stars.

Title: Event Story - Starry Conversations → Vera Starry Conversations (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Vera]: Are you expecting me to get teary-eyed by your surprise?
Vera takes out the thing inside the box, pinching it with her thumb and index finger—it is a translucent fish-shaped decoration filled with glitters.
Far from intricate, it actually looks pretty rough. You cannot help but feel tricked by the "captivating" sales pitch.

Title: Event Story - Starry Conversations → Camu Starry Conversations (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Camu quickly opens the box you handed him. Inside is a necklace with an abstract, metallic bird-shaped pendant.
While you explain what the pendant represents, you also tell Camu the stories of the Valentine\'s Day.
[Camu]: Do you enjoy this kind of convoluted plot?

Title: Event Story - Starry Conversations → Rosetta Starry Conversations (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Rosetta]: So... a game of chance.
Having heard your description of the mystery box, Rosetta lets out a subtle sigh. After a brief consideration, she has seemingly made up her mind.
[Rosetta]: Can I delegate the task of opening the box to you, Commandant? I don\'t need to be the one to open it if we\'re hoping to share the surprise.

Title: Event Story - Starry Conversations → Qu Starry Conversations (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Qu]: I must say I\'m glad to see how much attention you\'ve given to Kowloong traditions.
Qu takes the gift and gracefully unwraps it as if she is fondling an antique.
[Qu]: ...Seven-hole needles? Even I have not seen it in a long time. Some of those cultured hobbyists you mentioned were apparently attentive enough to do such thorough research on Kowloong customs.

Title: Event Story - Starry Conversations → Changyu Starry Conversations (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Changyu]: You also know about these loot boxes? Not bad, Commandant. I know you\'d fit in with us merchants on the train.
[Changyu]: Alright, alright. My bad. That said, do you want to make a bet before we open it?
[Changyu]: Let\'s wager if I\'m going like what\'s inside. It\'s a mystery box, after all. This will make the unboxing more exciting!

Title: Event Story - Starry Conversations → Luna Starry Conversations (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Luna]: You should be aware of the consequence of coming to me privately, right?
You hand your gift to Luna, but she does not take it immediately.
[Luna]: What is worth all your effort just to give me this...?

Title: Event Story - Starry Conversations → Wanshi Starry Conversations (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Wanshi]: Yawn... So... why did you wake me up again?
Wanshi yawns, his eyes completely unfocused. He does not look awake at all.
[Wanshi]: A mystery box? Oh. You did say you don\'t know what\'s inside either.

Title: Event Story - Starry Conversations → Selena Starry Conversations (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Selena]: I suppose the ripples this art piece is trying to create are not what it appears on the surface...
It has been more than ten minutes since you and Selena unwrapped the box, and you have been trying to understand what you are looking at to no avail.
Objectively, it is a piece of craftwork made with twisting copper wires, but the chaotic shape has made it very difficult to decipher what the artist wants it to represent.

Title: Event Story - Starry Conversations → No. 21 Starry Conversations (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[No. 21]: Sniff. It doesn\'t smell suspicious. Should be safe.
[No. 21]: Noctis gave me a box last time. It exploded when I opened it and covered my face with grease.
[No. 21]: He also gave me a box the time before that. My hands were stuck to the box with glue when I opened it.

Title: Event Story - Starry Conversations → Roland Starry Conversations (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Roland]: Hahaha! What a fitting gift from a Babylonian. Do you usually use this as well?
You walk toward Roland, hoping to see what is inside the box, but he steps sideways and evades you. Reading the book in his hand, he keeps chuckling once in a while.
[Roland]: Do you want to know? I\'ll read it to you.

Title: Event Story - Starry Conversations → Pulao Starry Conversations (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Pulao]: Whoa! I know this! This... is a mystery box, isn\'t it?!
[Pulao]: I once had to buy six of them to get the finger puppet I wanted... Sob...
[Pulao]: Now, let me give it a good shake... Hmm. Feels like something soft and fluffy.

Title: Event Story - Starry Conversations → Haicma Starry Conversations (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Haicma]: Quickly flip through it to see the result? Understood.
Haicma is holding a flipbook in her hands. Flipping through it will reveal an animated sequence formed by connecting the images on the subsequent pages.
This small book tells the story of how the weaver girl and the cowherd from the myths met on the magpie bridge on Valentine\'s Day.

Title: Event Story - Starry Conversations → Noan Starry Conversations (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Noan]: ...A gift for Valentine\'s Day... Valentine\'s Day?
[Noan]: Yeah. I\'ve met my share of people from Kowloong before. They mentioned their customs and the story behind it, but I never saw them celebrate it.
[Noan]: Thank you, then. I didn\'t know you were supposed to give gifts on this day. I would have prepared something for you otherwise.

Title: Event Story - Starry Conversations → α Starry Conversations (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[α]: Forget about how pitiful this thing is. Just your choice of color is... sigh.
Alpha stares at the ribbon inside the mystery box. Dark green and intricately made, the ribbon has the words "α Lyrae" sewed at the end in silver.
[α]: Alpha Lyrae?

Title: Event Story - Starry Conversations → Bambinata Starry Conversations (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bambinata]: Hmm... A mystery box... Do you wish Bambinata to open it with her eyes closed, Commandant?
[Bambinata]: Okay, Bambinata understood.
With care, she takes the gift and opens it gracefully on the table.

Title: Event Story - Starry Conversations → Hanying Starry Conversations (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You and Hanying open the mystery box together, and discover a piece of indigo-dyed silk.
[Hanying]: It looks like a dancer\'s ribbon, with star-shaped embellishments.
[Hanying]: On countless starlit nights aboard this ship, I danced with ribbons just like these... It brings back memories.

Title: Event Story - Path of Stars → Prelude (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Service Officer]: All rise!
[Service Officer]: Salute!
[Hassen]: No need for formalities. Sit down.

Title: Event Story - Path of Stars → Wuming City - 1 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Pilot]: We\'re above Malacca Strait and will arrive in Wuming City soon!
As the pilot says this, a city landscape emerges from the distant horizon.
Wuming City, with a population of 33,600, is an important supply point along this route.

Title: Event Story - Path of Stars → Wuming City - 1 (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Mayor]: Great... that should buy us a few more days.
[Mayor]: Maybe we can hold out until the expedition gets back...
[Mayor]: As you can see, our Central Purification Filter had a malfunction.

Title: Event Story - Path of Stars → Wuming City - 2 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
They must have spotted you somewhere along the way. That\'s why they\'re chasing you...
Before you know it, you find yourself near the ruins of a farm.
You wonder why it\'s awfully quiet here...

Title: Event Story - Path of Stars → Wuming City - 3 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After securing the route, you finally have time to take a look at the enormous architectural complex in front of you: the old Wuming.
Unmanned factories, automated distribution warehouses, towering apartment buildings—this impressive sight makes one wonder how many people could be accommodated here if all those facilities were operational.
But they have been reduced to rubble by a series of foolish mistakes committed by humans in the Post-Pandemic Age.

Title: Event Story - Path of Stars → Wuming City - 3 (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The enemy comes crumbling down, and the checkpoints along the route finally turn green.
That means Wuming City\'s fleet can finally hit the road and bring back the Central Purification Filter parts that can save thirty thousand lives.
The mayor will undoubtedly appreciate your effort—and will probably have a feast of local cuisine prepared to welcome you back.

Title: Event Story - Path of Stars → Enclave - 1 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nikola]: Like all legendary retreats in this world, Misty Enclave is just another place full of mysteries, with a deceptive facade.
[Nikola]: It doesn\'t matter if you have killed people, betrayed your master, or taken things that aren\'t yours. As long as you\'re ready to abandon your identity, this place can be your home.
[Nikola]: And your target is a person who goes by the name Zack. This mission is a secret from Hassen, so don\'t go around talking about it.

Title: Event Story - Path of Stars → Enclave - 1 (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: The injured refugees need immediate medical attention.
[Liv]: Hang in there, people. I\'m going to patch you up.
[Refugee]: Ow... Easy...

Title: Event Story - Path of Stars → Enclave - 2 (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: Finally got you.
Meanwhile, Lee hands a tiny patch to Lucia behind his back. Lucia pats the smuggler on his shoulder.
[Lucia]: Tell me, why are you being hunted by the KCC?

Title: Event Story - Path of Stars → Enclave - 3 (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: This took longer than expected.
[Smuggler]: The legendary Gray Raven is really something.
[Zack]: It\'s an honor to unveil my second face to you.

Title: Event Story - Path of Stars → Monastery - 1 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Are you alright, Commandant? Do you need me to carry you?
[Lee]: Commandant, stay calm and breathe deeply. You\'re experiencing hypopnea.
[Lee]: If you don\'t steady your breathing soon, you will risk emphysema.

Title: Event Story - Path of Stars → Monastery - 2 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You don\'t know how long you\'ve been trekking on the snow-covered mountain...
You feel you\'re about to freeze when a campsite appears in the far distance.
It might not be the mission location as marked on the map, but...

Title: Event Story - Path of Stars → Monastery - 2 (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The person looks to be the leader of the refugees clumsily expresses thanks.
[Refugee]: We\'re told that this mountain is home to the Grand Elder.
[Refugee]: They say faithful believers in the Grand Elder will be fed pancakes and goat milk.

Title: Event Story - Path of Stars → Monastery - 3 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
...
The "stone house" the refugee leader mentioned is visible through the binoculars.
In fact, it\'s just an abandoned church with one wall missing.

Title: Event Story - Path of Stars → Monastery - 3 (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After defeating the Corrupted, you finally join the crowd in the stone house.
But strangely, everyone is focused on chanting something unintelligible and no one is bothered by your intrusion.
Your group soon reaches the stone tablet.

Title: Event Story - Path of Stars → Tower - 1 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Pilot]: As you can see through the porthole, we\'re close to the mission location.
It\'s an island.
Technically, a corner of an island.

Title: Event Story - Path of Stars → Tower - 2 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Ahead of you, some people are caught in a scuffle with the Corrupted.
They seem to be the recovery team Sagawa talked about.
[All members]: Understood!

Title: Event Story - Path of Stars → Tower - 2 (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: I can\'t thank you enough!
[Komori]: Yes! And you must have been sent by Sagawa!
[Komori]: If it weren\'t for you, we would never have made it back in one piece...

Title: Event Story - Path of Stars → Tower - 3 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You escort Towerfolk citizens through the city...
Celica has even dispatched a transport squadron to help with the operation, but the airport for transport aircraft is some distance away from the settlement.
In other words, you have no choice but to cross this abandoned urban district.

Title: Event Story - Path of Stars → Tower - 3 (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Aboard the aircraft leaving the giant tower, Sagawa and the elder are both quiet.
As the Corrupted swarm and topple the white giant tower, they take one last look back.
[Elder]: ...So, where is Babylonia taking us?

Title: Event Story - Path of Stars → Shipyard - 1 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Pilot]: Approaching Abyssea Shipyard.
[Pilot]: Please wait. Connecting to the ground.
[Pilot]: Observation point 4-3. This is Mother Swan-17. You may speak now.

Title: Event Story - Path of Stars → Shipyard - 1 (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: Ha! We\'re saved!
[???]: What? Miss Celica didn\'t tell you about me?
[???]: I\'m Devil 7! From Abyssea 11!

Title: Event Story - Path of Stars → Shipyard - 2 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Devil 7]: Welcome aboard!
[Lee]: Despite the resemblance, this ship is not in very good condition.
[Devil 7]: Oh, they say this ship is the sister ship of that Kua-Er grade ship.

Title: Event Story - Path of Stars → Shipyard - 3 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: I knew something was off...
Seems like the abandoned unmanned factory is back in operation...
But what comes off the assembly line are no ordinary Mechanoids, but the Corrupted with high Punishing levels.

Title: Event Story - Path of Stars → Shipyard - 3 (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Roland]: ...
[Roland]: Unfortunately, I don\'t have time for you people.
[Roland]: And isn\'t it a bit cruel for you to do this to someone who\'s badly injured?

Title: Event Story - Legend of the Executor - GR → Legend of the Executor - Prelude (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: Alright, that\'s the end of our mission here. Hooray! Time to enjoy the holiday!
After checking his gear, Kamui collapsed to the ground, lazily asking our opinions like a Labrador.
[Liv]: But the HQ asked us to be on stand-by... I don\'t think we should enjoy ourselves too much...

Title: Event Story - Legend of the Executor - GR → Legend of the Executor - 1 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
I found myself in a strange place after entering the game. I took a few steps around, and realized this must be the spawn point of this game.
I didn\'t see anyone around, but Kamui mentioned we would be playing in teams.
I anxiously opened the menu and selected the Member section.

Title: Event Story - Legend of the Executor - GR → Legend of the Executor - 2 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[System]: "This way to the palace."
There was a wooden sign on the side of the road. The direction on the sign pointed to a castle-like building.
[Vera]: So are we going there to find the King and pick up quests from him?

Title: Event Story - Legend of the Executor - GR → Legend of the Executor - 3 (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After going through a lot of hardship (majority of which came from the other three teammates), we finally arrived at the palace.
All the NPCs and enemies here seemed to be configured by Celica. In particular, the people we knew would become NPCs even if they were not actually in the game...
[King]: Oh, you must be the heroes who travelled from afar. Welcome!

Title: Event Story - Legend of the Executor - GR → Legend of the Executor - 4 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Camu]: That Hassen was definitely lying to us.
[Karenina]: Why do you say that?
[Camu]: Just based on my experience. I have seen similar plots in the games that Kamui played.

Title: Event Story - Legend of the Executor - GR → Legend of the Executor - 5 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Vera]: Is it really that easy? We simply arrived at the Demon General\'s Castle by destroying the Demons along the way.
[Karenina]: There weren\'t any split paths. Some looked like open roads, but there were invisible barriers.
[Camu]: It\'s easier this way. When Kamui was playing games, I often wanted to stop him from doing all those repetitive side quests.

Title: Event Story - Legend of the Executor - GR → Legend of the Executor - 6 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After defeating the enemies, we quickly ran up the stairs and went through many battle scenes that didn\'t really match the background settings.
[Karenina]: These scenes have nothing to do with our main plot!
[Camu]: I guess Celica only had access to these materials. We\'re lucky that we aren\'t stuck. When I watched Kamui play other games...

Title: Event Story - Legend of the Executor - GR → Legend of the Executor - 7 (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Zanzibaron]: Grrrrr—gargh!
Zanzibaron made some unpleasant sounds and kept rolling backward, until smashing into the wall.
[Camu]: This is only possible in games. In reality, the enemy should have broken apart from our power long ago.

Title: Event Story - Legend of the Executor - GR → Legend of the Executor - 8 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Who are you...? No!
[Liv]: Wait!
——

Title: Event Story - Legend of the Executor - GR → Legend of the Executor - 9 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Thinking about it, Commandant must have formed a team with Vera, Camu, and Karenina, is that right?
[Lee]: I guess so, if there are only two teams. Must be very dangerous... Vera has always had her eyes on Commandant, not to mention Karenina and Camu.
[Lucia]: But they can\'t do anything in the game world, can they? At least Commandant\'s teammates all hate to lose.

Title: Event Story - Legend of the Executor - GR → Legend of the Executor - 10 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Villager]: The heroes are here!
Lucia, Lee, and Kamui were surrounded by armed villagers before they even entered the village.
[Lucia]: What\'s going on...?

Title: Event Story - Legend of the Executor - GR → Legend of the Executor - 11 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Villager]: Sorry for attacking you. It was a misunderstanding. It\'s really kind of you to escort us back.
[Lucia]: No problem. We wanted to come here in the first place.
After clearing up the misunderstanding, three of them moved together with the villagers and returned to the village after defeating nearby Demons.

Title: Event Story - Legend of the Executor - GR → Legend of the Executor - 12 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Villager]: Screw you! You filthy "heroes"!
[Vera]: Don\'t cry on the ground. Man up a little, will you? How\'s the potion collection going, Camu, Karenina?
[Karenina]: Why are you the one giving orders?!

Title: Event Story - Legend of the Executor - GR → Legend of the Executor - 13 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Commandant? I didn\'t expect to see you here. Why are you here anyway?
[Vera]: The question is ours to ask.
I knew there were two teams, but I didn\'t expect to meet them so early outside the Demon General\'s Castle.

Title: Event Story - Legend of the Executor - GR → Legend of the Executor - 14 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Ha!
[Guard]: ————!
Lucia\'s team defeated Hassen\'s personal guards. He then stopped the fight just when the remaining guards were about to attack.

Title: Event Story - Legend of the Executor - GR → Legend of the Executor - 15 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Granton]: Never thought I, Granton, would be so embarrassed by heroes.
Thanks to the recovery potions, we blasted through the castle with ease and finally reached the second Demon General, Granton.
[Granton]: I don\'t know about the first two heroes, but... Do you two really believe what the King said?

Title: Event Story - Legend of the Executor - GR → Legend of the Executor - 15 (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Granton]: Ouch... No, not the artifact...
[Camu]: Cut the nonsense.
Granton finally passed out after a heavy kick from Camu, who also took the artifact.

Title: Event Story - Legend of the Executor - GR → Legend of the Executor - 16 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: Commandant.
[???]: Commandant!!!
I heard a voice in the dark, so I opened my eyes.

Title: Event Story - Legend of the Executor - GR → Legend of the Executor - 17 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
We met many other Demons underground. Interestingly, there seemed to be two types of Demons.
Simply speaking, some Demons were like animals. They only attacked out of instinct, and we were unable to communicate with them.
And most enemies we met here belonged to this type.

Title: Event Story - Legend of the Executor - GR → Legend of the Executor - 18 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: There really is an exit...
[Karenina]: Wait, so those conclusions were just your guesses all along?
[Lucia]: Yeah, I was planning to take another direction if there was no exit. Just don\'t stay still.

Title: Event Story - Legend of the Executor - GR → Legend of the Executor - 19 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: Even in a game, we still have to regroup after every battle.
Even though we needed to find Liv as soon as possible, maintenance and preparation must never be treated with a light heart.
[Lucia]: Our equipment has durability. Spending a little more time now may save us big troubles in future battles.

Title: Event Story - Legend of the Executor - GR → Legend of the Executor - 20 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The search for Liv continued, but we unexpectedly found the castle of another Demon General.
[Kamui]: So what do we do now? Shall we enter the castle, or keep moving?
[Lucia]: I\'m not too sure either. What do you think, Commandant?

Title: Event Story - Legend of the Executor - GR → Legend of the Executor - 21 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: Karenina, watch your HP. Are you sure you are okay?
[Karenina]: Hah? What\'s the problem?
Karenina was being shot by the arrows from a triggered trap. Kamui looked very concerned.

Title: Event Story - Legend of the Executor - GR → Legend of the Executor - 22 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: I must give you credits for making it all the way here, heroes of the revelation.
[Golden Jegan]: And in front of you is Golden Jegan, one of the four Demon Generals.
[Karenina]: The last two guys had unusual names, but yours is just way too weird.

Title: Event Story - Legend of the Executor - GR → Legend of the Executor - 22 (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Golden Jegan]: Gargh... I, Golden Jegan, have fallen so easily... What a shame...
After Golden Jegan was defeated, he took out the artifact fragment that he had been protecting just like other Demon Generals. This was probably a system setting.
[Lucia]: The battle is over.

Title: Event Story - Legend of the Executor - GR → Legend of the Executor - 23 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Everybody, run!
[Villager]: Why are you helping us? You are a hero!
[Liv]: Because you are asking for help! Just run for now!

Title: Event Story - Legend of the Executor - GR → Legend of the Executor - 24 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Are you hurt, Demon King?
[Demon King]: I\'m good. Thank you, Holy Maiden.
[Liv]: Can you stop calling me the Holy Maiden? It\'s so embarrassing. Just call me Liv.

Title: Event Story - Legend of the Executor - GR → Legend of the Executor - 25 (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Are you sure we are not lost?
The Demon King and Liv were heading toward the next Demon General\'s Castle. Liv was a little concerned with the rapidly changing scenes around them.
[Demon King]: Of course. Don\'t you underestimate the power of Demon King.

Title: Event Story - Legend of the Executor - GR → Legend of the Executor - 26 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Vera]: Where are you going? I don\'t mind following you all the way to the Demon King\'s Castle.
[Vera]: But as you can see, Camu\'s not very patient.
[Camu]: Leave me out of this.

Title: Event Story - Legend of the Executor - GR → Legend of the Executor - 27 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
——
[Kamui]: I hear gunshots!
Following Golden Jegan\'s instructions, the team arrived at a ruin. They moved even faster and continued the search for the artifact.

Title: Event Story - Legend of the Executor - GR → Legend of the Executor - 28 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: I see. So you took Liv away from her spawn point when she first logged into the game, and you had been moving together until just now.
[Demon King]: I thought I could at least get one artifact fragment back and gain some power, but we bumped into the two heroes working for the King.
[Demon King]: In the end, Liv tried to protect me and was taken by them. Fortunately, I met you.

Title: Event Story - Legend of the Executor - GR → Legend of the Executor - 29 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: But Karenina had a point. I say we separate the two artifact fragments for better safety.
[Lee]: Commandant takes one, and the other one stays with Lucia or myself.
[Kamui]: Wait, what about me and Karenina?

Title: Event Story - Legend of the Executor - GR → Legend of the Executor - 30 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[King]: Welcome, heroes from afar.
I heard that line back in the King\'s palace. He repeated it once again when we arrived, just like a normal NPC.
In front of us was a huge, empty space. The strange-looking building in the center was probably the hidden Demon King\'s Castle.

Title: Event Story - Legend of the Executor - GR → Legend of the Executor - 31 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Demon King]: The artifact! They have taken the artifact! What to do!?
[Karenina]: (Cough...)
[King]: Hahaha, good job! Well done, Camu, Vera!

Title: Event Story - Legend of the Executor - GR → Legend of the Executor - 32 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The structure of the Demon King\'s Castle wasn\'t too different from the previous ones. Before arriving at the center, we had to go through corridors with lots of traps.
Just when we defeated the guards and started heading further inside the castle, Kamui triggered the traps. He never let us down.
[Kamui]: Whoa!

Title: Event Story - Legend of the Executor - GR → Legend of the Executor - 33 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
When we finally got to the altar, Liv was kneeling on the ground, exhausted. The King picked up the complete artifact next to her.
[King]: Oh, you still have the strength to make it here. Too bad...
[King]: I already have the Goddess\' artifact!

Title: Event Story - Legend of the Executor - GR → Legend of the Executor - 34 (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[King]: What are you going to do? Nothing will work against me! Don\'t you understand?
Everyone was doing their best against the King and his guards, but no one could land the last hit.
[Karenina]: What\'s going on? He already has an HP bar, but we still can\'t beat him!

Title: Event Story - Legend of the Executor - GR → Legend of the Executor - 35 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[King]: What is this...!!!!
Not only the King, everyone was shocked and stopped to look at the light.
The artifact and the Demon King merged together, turning into a blazing sphere, then transformed into a strange surface that resembled a portal.

Title: Event Story - Legend of the Executor - GR → Legend of the Executor - 36 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: It\'s over, King!
[Vera]: Time to say goodbye.
[King]: Dammit, why? Vera, Camu, why did you betray me!? I promised you a victory!

Title: Event Story - Legend of the Executor - GR → Legend of the Executor - 36 (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[King]: Gargh!!! Dammit, I—
[King]: —I will be back!
Unlike his formidable strength, the King\'s last words were very unimpressive.

Title: Event Story - Legend of the Executor - GR → Legend of the Executor - 37 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Why do we still have to fight... We already defeated the King...
Liv was in grief after the Demon King made her announcement. They had been moving together ever since she joined the game. To her, the Demon King was already a friend.
[Lucia]: But that is the Demon King\'s wish, isn\'t it?

Title: Event Story - Legend of the Executor - GR → Legend of the Executor - The End (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Demon King...
[Demon King]: Holy Maiden, you\'re finally here. And you, heroes.
[Vera]: I would prefer not to be classified together with them.

Title: Event Story - Legend of the Executor - GR → Legend of the Executor - The End (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
When the Demon King was finally defeated, everything around us turned blurry. I felt a force grabbed me and threw me away.
[Lucia]: Commandant!
When I realized, it was all dark around me. There was a light spot in the distance. It was where we fought moments ago.

Title: Event Story - Wendigo → Wendigo - 1 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Thud!
The hammer strikes the nail, ringing as it sinks into the ground.
With another heavy blow of the hammer, the nail is buried deeper into the frozen soil, until it strikes a hard layer of ice.

Title: Event Story - Wendigo → Wendigo - 2 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: There are still quite a few hostile bionics around.
[Lee]: There aren\'t as many as before. New Murmansk should become safer now that Amberia has been silenced.
[Lee]: Speaking of, Commandant. You and Rosetta completed the mission together, huh. We were doing data collection for Lucia at the time.

Title: Event Story - Wendigo → Wendigo - 3 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: We should be near, I think...
[???]: ...I knew it.
[???]: Looks like I was right scouting ahead of time.

Title: Event Story - Wendigo → Wendigo - 4 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Diana]: We\'re here. The Maria is anchored at the abandoned dock.
[Lee]: So... we\'re having a dinner party out in the wilds? Why not at the settlement?
[Diana]: The Arctic is sparse in vegetation. If we light such a large bonfire at the settlement, that would give away our position.

Title: Event Story - Wendigo → Wendigo - 5 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Staessen]: You made it.
[Staessen]: It sure was no easy feat to suppress Amberia. You\'ve been of great help to the ARU.
[Staessen]: Please help yourself to the venison and sardines.

Title: Event Story - Wendigo → Wendigo - 6 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Wait...!
[Lucia]: Evan! Get back here!
[Lee]: He likely didn\'t catch you. Human hearing isn\'t as good as Constructs. Besides, he\'s probably in the forest by now.

Title: Event Story - Wendigo → Wendigo - 7 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: None... There are a lot of tracks here... They\'re all over the place.
[Liv]: But none of them trail off of the forest path.
[Liv]: Evan should be going along this path.

Title: Event Story - Wendigo → Wendigo - 8 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Evan]: Eeek——!!
[Bionic Machine]: ——! ——!
[Evan]: Stop! Don\'t come any closer!

Title: Event Story - Wendigo → Wendigo - 9 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The dozen of tall Constructs stand out conspicuously in the crowd. Staessen picks you and the others out in a glance.
[Staessen]: You\'re back.
[Diana]: Apologies for my unauthorized departure, Captain Staessen, but Commandant and I brought Rosetta and her companions back.

Title: Event Story - Wendigo → Wendigo - 10 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The Border Commune...
An autonomous organization formed by refugees who fled when a segment of the Arctic defense line collapsed.
The ARU could not bear to let them cross the vast permafrost wasteland and find their own way. So, when they came near New Murmansk, the ARU took them in.

Title: Event Story - Wendigo → Wendigo - 11 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Staessen]: Some people are against them residing in the ARU, but I can\'t blame them.
[Staessen]: There are not just refugees from the Green-Vanostok Line, but also from Central Asia and Western Europe.
[Staessen]: I must be clear. The ARU can only feed so many mouths.

Title: Event Story - Wendigo → Wendigo - 12 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Rosetta]: How is everyone? We\'re used to venturing on long journeys like this one, but this might not be the case for you and the others.
[Staessen]: I may have gotten older, but when I was younger, I could march on the snowfield for eight straight days and nights.
[Staessen]: A short walk like this is nothing for these ol\' bones.

Title: Event Story - Wendigo → Wendigo - 13 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Rosetta, who should have been ahead to clear the way, is instead waiting for you and the others on the snowfield.
[Rosetta]: We\'re almost there, so I\'ve been waiting here for you.
Rosetta points her spear off into the distance through the misty snowfield, following her spear tip, you see familiar port facilities at the edge of the snowy forest.

Title: Event Story - Wendigo → Wendigo - 14 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Rosetta]: The abandoned dock the liaison mentioned is up ahead.
[Lee]: I can\'t help but feel like we\'re walking into a trap. Regardless of our first encounter or during dinner last night, he had a strange look about him whenever this place is mentioned.
[Staessen]: Yeah, I\'m not sure either...

Title: Event Story - Wendigo → Wendigo - 15 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???A]: Staessen, my man! Haven\'t seen you around these parts in a while.
[???B]: Yeah, it\'s been quite some time.
[Staessen]: Yeah, the ARU has had their hands full with Derek and Amberia. We\'ve left you out in the cold.

Title: Event Story - Wendigo → Wendigo - 16 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Sergey and Antonov take you and the others near the dock, where two huge red ships are berthed in the shallow water.
The two ships have been reinforced and connected with boards and other structures. A large number of houses and equipment are arranged both on and around the ships.
It seems to be dinnertime. Bright lights are illuminating the ships; shouts and noises can be faintly heard in the distance.

Title: Event Story - Wendigo → Wendigo - 17 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Staessen]: Everything\'s just not going to plan...
[Staessen]: What do you think, Commandant?
[Staessen]: ...?

Title: Event Story - Wendigo → Wendigo - 18 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Diana]: Fifty Forest Guards and I have come to provide support.
[Rosetta]: Thank you for your efforts, everyone. The mission is simple. Protect the civilians and supplies en route to the ARU\'s port settlement.
[Diana]: Are these refugees joining the ARU...? They don\'t seem like it.

Title: Event Story - Wendigo → Wendigo - 19 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Rosetta]: Cavalry, spread out left and right to set up a safe zone for the civilians!
[Lucia]: The Gray Ravens can help as well.
[Rosetta]: Well then, you can help scout and bring up the rear. We\'ll be counting on you.

Title: Event Story - Wendigo → Wendigo - 20 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Rosetta]: Halt.
Rosetta raises her spear, and the squad comes to a halt.
[Lee]: What\'s wrong?

Title: Event Story - Book of Toro → Book of Toro - 1 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Summer is already coming to an end, but it feels just as hot and humid, like the special phenomenon named "second summer" in some Golden Age text.
But such weather should never occur in Babylonia. The truth is, an accidental breakdown of the air conditioning system has brought summer to everybody.
[Kamui]: This—is—so—hot! Can\'t we find a cooler place?

Title: Event Story - Book of Toro → Book of Toro - 2 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: Gargh... Now we should be safe...
[Michael]: ...
[Kamui]: ...Whoa! It\'s Michael!

Title: Event Story - Book of Toro → Book of Toro - 2 (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Narration]: The giant killer falls right in front of you, and you finally hear the long-awaited siren.
[Narration]: It was an extremely dangerous night. Fortunately, it\'s all over—for now.
As the narrator speaks, the killer\'s remains decompose into ashes and disappear in the air.

Title: Event Story - Book of Toro → Book of Toro - 3 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Narration]: It is a rainy night. The city looks like a wet castle made from mud under the street lamp\'s yellow light.
[Narration]: You are standing in a deserted graveyard located on the outskirts of this damningly corrupted city.
[Narration]: You are standing around the most unremarkable grave stone, waiting with your hands together.

Title: Event Story - Book of Toro → Book of Toro - 4 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: I knew it! This must be "The White Owl"!
[Kamui]: The lead actor only had this one movie. An accident took his life during the filming. I was so upset!
[Lee]: I wonder what movies you have been watching...

Title: Event Story - Book of Toro → Book of Toro - 4 (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Gang Leader]: Why... I had the upper hand this time...
[Gang Leader]: Is this my destined ending...
[Kamui]: Commandant, how about saying a famous line to him?

Title: Event Story - Book of Toro → Book of Toro - 5 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Darkness slowly fades away, and you find yourself inside a house of Golden Age style. Someone is knocking on the door.
[Child]: Trick or treat!
[Child]: What Evan? I ain\'t no Evan!

Title: Event Story - Book of Toro → Book of Toro - 6 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Narration]: You have almost walked around the entire town, but it looks just as peaceful.
[Ayla]: Speaking of which, Kamui, are you familiar with this movie? Anything worth noting?
[Kamui]: Not really... If a movie is always so peaceful, I\'ll get bored really soon... Wait, what\'s that?

Title: Event Story - Book of Toro → Book of Toro - 6 (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Shop Owner]: geb!geb!
The man who just sold you licorice and twisters realizes your threat to the ritual. His body begins to undergo a terrible transformation, and so does everyone else around him.
They shed their skins, exposing their bio-robotic bodies. Even their sizes start to change—the fat ones become fatter, and the skinny ones get even slimmer.

Title: Event Story - Book of Toro → Book of Toro - 7 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Ayla]: Looks like our answer is just behind this door.
[Ayla]: Are we ready?
[Kamui]: If we help you get the hidden data inside this disc, will WGAA reward us for it?

Title: Event Story - Book of Toro → Book of Toro - 8 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After checking multiple times, you push open the door before you.
Just like the numerous doors you have already opened, the scene behind this door makes no sense at all from an architectural perspective.
[Kamui]: When I\'m back to reality, I will probably be disappointed if I don\'t see a ruin after opening a door.

Title: Event Story - Book of Toro → Book of Toro - 8 (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Book of Death]: AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
[Narration]: Unable to accept its loss, the Book of Death makes a horrifying growl—
[Narration]: But that cannot deny its imminent failure. As the battle comes to a rest, the Book of Death inevitably starts to decompose from inside.

Title: Event Story - Book of Toro → Book of Toro - 9 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Everyone has left except Ayla.
[Ayla]: ...
Staring at the blank sky, Ayla suddenly begins to speak.

Title: Event Story - Blazing Trails → Lone Walker - 2 Blazing Trails (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Broadcast]: Attention. Attention. Ground-to-air attack detected. Generating defense.
[Broadcast]: Attention. Attention. Ground-to-air attack detected. Generating...
[Soldier]: Blow that defensive barrier generator! Ain\'t nothing we can do when the barrier is up and running!

Title: Event Story - Blazing Trails → Lone Walker - 3 Blazing Trails (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
>>>Trailblazer Log, Entry Number 8940.
Four hundred forty-six hours into mission. Information pertaining to "the Punishing Virus" has been obtained from deserted robots. Hazard Level: Extremely High. Rejecting any potential infection risks. Infection is to be determined as failure of mission.
Strategy employed: Targeting all [Central Purification Filter] facilities. Limiting activities to areas with CPFs only prior to traveling to mission zone. Interzone travels to be conducted through high-altitude flights to reduce infection risks.

Title: Event Story - Blazing Trails → Departure - 1 Blazing Trails (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
>>>Trailblazer Log, Entry Number 8980. Significant distance remains until destination. Expected power insufficiency. Power recharge necessary. Mission target exhibits no worrying signs of health.
[Weixian]: Are you hungry, Steely? You seem a little wobbly.
>>>Trailblazer Log, Entry Number 9234. Stable source of power secured. Trailblazer is not specialized for speed. Proceed with caution.

Title: Event Story - Blazing Trails → Turning Back - 1 Blazing Trails (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
50 meters until reaching target location Section D of Zone Three. Mission target...
...Mission target appears nervous.
[Trailblazer]: Why are you feeling nervous?

Title: Event Story - Blazing Trails → Turning Back - 9 Blazing Trails (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Trailblazer has been running for God only knows how long. When he has finally made it through the pitch-black trench and seen the sun again, Trailblazer\'s camera is awash with a sea of red.
From the other side of the horizon, Trailblazer sees Corrupted coming in waves—which quickly turns into a megatsunami past which Trailblazer cannot see.
[Trailblazer]: Firepower severely surpassed. Severe power shortage. Extreme infection hazard.

Title: Event Story - Blazing Trails → Companion - 7 Blazing Trails (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Pss. Pss.
Trailblazer puts his hands together in silent respect at the heap of soil—over which a stone slab has been erected in place of a gravestone.
This, according to Weixian, is how one should commemorate the dead...

Title: Event Story - Reversed Order → I Reversed Order (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
In Constellia, the massive prediction machine stands quietly, covered in colorful blinking lights. The mechanoid girl with white hair takes her place beside it, inspecting every set of data in her hands.
[Dulcinea]: Clear loaded simulation history.
"History cleared."

Title: Event Story - Reversed Order → II Reversed Order (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The simulation begins, and they see the girl with purple hair walking alone on the screen. Not far ahead of Echo stands a familiar Construct with pink hair waving the paintbrush in her hand.
[Cervantes]: Oh? You\'re choosing Ayla as the data sample for the first simulation?
[Dulcinea]: Indeed. Ayla and Echo had encountered each other in Constellia before. She is the best choice to kickstart this simulation.

Title: Event Story - Reversed Order → III Reversed Order (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Cervantes seems quite surprised when the white-haired Construct appears on the screen.
[Cervantes]: Haicma... Why have you chosen her data sample? Is there a special reason?
[Dulcinea]: I wonder what will happen when the rational "Digital Heart" encounters the impassioned Construct that carries an enormous guilt?

Title: Event Story - Reversed Order → IV Reversed Order (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Cervantes]: Ah... her.
A woman dressed in Kowloong attire sits on a raised platform on the screen.
[Cervantes]: Is this data... found in the Kowloong hall?

Title: Event Story - Reversed Order → V Reversed Order (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Dulcinea]: Lucia of Gray Raven?
Dulcinea leans forward slightly, closely inspecting the data sample Cervantes just entered.
The Construct with black-and-red hair looks slightly puzzled by her situation for a second before quickly guarding the door to the stage as commanded.

Title: Event Story - Reversed Order → VI Reversed Order (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Dulcinea]: This is...
The small figure sitting on a giant mech on the screen seems to have noticed the gazes from beyond the screen, smiling and waving at the figures in the real world.
[Dulcinea]: The Sage from the Church of Machina?

Title: Event Story - Reversed Order → VII Reversed Order (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
On the screen, the "Guardian of Order" has finally obtained the "Codex of Order".
Since what happens after "order is restored" was not programmed, Echo can be seen sitting on a rock nearby after reading the "Codex of Order", looking slightly disappointed.
[Cervantes]: A spectacular simulation.

Title: Event Story - Special Dispatch - Sand Table Simulation → I Leave the Rest to You! (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After finishing washing and getting dressed, Rolla steps out of her bedroom to find her mother busy plating the breakfast.
[Mother]: You\'re up? Come finish your breakfast and go to school.
[Rolla]: Hmm...

Title: Event Story - Special Dispatch - Sand Table Simulation → The Graduation Exam Will End Shortly... (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
F.O.S. Military College, 6:00 PM
As the graduation test nears its conclusion, some people display visible signs of anxiety, some adopt a facade of nonchalance, while others seem genuinely at ease as they have already decided their future paths.
[Bieble]: Ah... This is it... Seems like getting a perfect score is impossible at this point.

Title: Event Story - Special Dispatch - Sand Table Simulation → Announcement of Graduation Exam (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
F.O.S. Military Command College, 6:00 PM
After another day of theory classes, the students of F.O.S. pack up their terminals, preparing themselves either for their minor programs or to head home.
A student, whose nametag displays the name "Bieble" on his chest, calls out to his nearby friend.

Title: Event Story - Special Dispatch - Sand Table Simulation → First Base Station Point Breached! (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bieble]: Phew... Turns out it\'s not that hard after all. Much easier than I thought it would be.
Walking out of the holographic simulation pod, Bieble stretches his body, relieving the stiffness from lying down for too long.
He pulls out the premade food and electrolyte water from the refrigerator, and as he waits for the food to heat up, he takes out his notebook and begins to memorize the notes.

Title: Event Story - Special Dispatch - Sand Table Simulation → Just Trying... (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Babylonia Residential Area, 8:00 PM
[Freeman]: Let\'s call it a day.
After turning off the program in the sandbox system, Freeman walks out of the holographic simulation pod.

Title: Event Story - Special Dispatch - Sand Table Simulation → A Noob Question! (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Haniff]: This should do.
After confirming his ranking, Haniff exits his holographic simulation pod.
The room is as narrow as a small box, confining almost like a prison cell.

Title: Event Story - Special Dispatch - Sand Table Simulation → Solution (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
At dinner time, Rolla\'s home is always enveloped in a profound silence. Three sets of tableware are arranged in a triangle on the table, symbolizing the emotional distance among the family members.
[Rolla]: Mother, I want to talk to you about something...
[Mother]: Rolla, have you forgotten the rules in our family?

Title: Event Story - Special Dispatch - Sand Table Simulation → Can Anyone Help Me? (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bieble]: During an attack, troops must be able to quickly assemble and engage the enemy from various angles and disperse promptly once the operation is concluded...
[???]: Bieble?
[Bieble]: It\'s essential to consider the fact that many people may not support the Task Force in the operation location...

Title: Event Story - Special Dispatch - Sand Table Simulation → The Importance of Base Stations (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Cinematic / Action cutscene (no dialogue text).

Title: Event Story - Special Dispatch - Sand Table Simulation → I Have the High Ground! (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Even after he steps out of the simulation pod, those dreadful scenes continue to haunt Freeman\'s mind.
Since this is not a movie or a game, it is only natural that there is no rating system or prior warning of potential discomfort.
Every aspect, from the enemies to the casualties, has been meticulously recreated in the most realistic way possible.

Title: Event Story - Special Dispatch - Sand Table Simulation → Time to Give Up (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: No. 1364, the test is not over yet. Why did you stop?
[Haniff]: You ask me why... It\'s obvious—I can\'t proceed from this point.
[???]: Your reason?

Title: Event Story - Special Dispatch - Sand Table Simulation → Anonymizer On... (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Mother]: Rolla, how\'s your graduation test going?
Rolla\'s mother pushes open the door, where the lock has been removed, and walks inside.
[Rolla]: ?!

Title: Event Story - Special Dispatch - Sand Table Simulation → Message System Usage & Penalty Notice (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Dominik Memorial Plaza, 15:00
[Haniff]: Oh, hi, Rolla. Didn\'t expect to see you here.
[Rolla]: Good afternoon.

Title: Event Story - Special Dispatch - Sand Table Simulation → One Last Point... (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bieble]: Are we finally close to the last checkpoint?
With the checkpoint they had just passed emanating a green glow of completion, Bieble shifts his gaze toward the final one.
The bright red reminder serves as a stark display of its inherent danger. However, the signal lights of all the strongholds surrounding it have gradually turned green, making it a desolate red island.

Title: Event Story - Special Dispatch - Sand Table Simulation → Standard or Special? (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bieble]: I haven\'t seen Freeman around recently. What\'s he been up to?

Title: Event Story - Special Dispatch - Sand Table Simulation → A Solution for Communication Interference (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
F.O.S. Military Command College, 19:00
The old man is carefully reading through the application displayed on his terminal. Seated across the desk, Freeman nervously intertwines his fingers.
[Instructor]: I\'ve finished reading your application.

Title: Event Story - Special Dispatch - Sand Table Simulation → Fight Till the End. (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
At the physical examination office, several people around Freeman\'s age are waiting for the results.
Amidst the silence, the only sound that breaks the stillness is the voice of the military staff as they call out names.
[Staff Member]: Freeman.

Title: Event Story - Special Dispatch - Sand Table Simulation → Don't Stop! (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: No. 1364, your position after graduation has been decided.
[Haniff]: Finally got me a job, huh?
[???]: After graduation, you will join the Aurora Squadron.

Title: Event Story - Special Dispatch - Sand Table Simulation → Making Great Use of Antiques (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: No. 1364, report your schedule today.
The emotionless voice resonates within the confines of the small room, initiating a routine conversation that unfolds every night.
[Haniff]: I left at 16:00, arrived at the shopping street at 16:12 and bought a serving of grilled artificial meat there...

Title: Event Story - Special Dispatch - Sand Table Simulation → Feasibility of Feint Tactic (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After yet another silent dinner, Rolla doesn\'t return to her room as usual.
[Rolla]: Mother, can we have a talk?
[Mother]: What do you want to talk about?

Title: Event Story - Abyssal Melody → Chapter 1 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Supervisor]: Phew... Guess this is where I\'m calling it a day.
Checking the time on her terminal, the woman with glasses closes her diary and puts it away in a drawer.
[Supervisor]: Never thought the guys at the security department would say yes. Am I lucky or what?

Title: Event Story - Abyssal Melody → Chapter 2 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Irritated, the nicely equipped Construct turns off the voice recorder hanging by his collar.
[Soldier]: This is one hell of a rain. Shouldn\'t have made that bet!
He wipes the water stains off his eyes. Constructs can\'t possibly catch a cold, but it still bothers them when they get rained on.

Title: Event Story - Abyssal Melody → Chapter 3 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Supervisor]: What did just say?! That Ryan was a fake?
[Soldier]: Yes, and we found Ryan out cold in a pipe at the medical department.
[Soldier]: And according to himself, he had been out of it for over half a day by the time we found him.

Title: Event Story - Summer Memoir → Evening Breeze of Constellia (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Splash—splash—
Warm waves wash over your feet, taking away the fine sand beneath you with every retreat.
The soft sand slips away with the water, tickling you ever so gently.

Title: Event Story - Summer Memoir → Summer Memoir (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Ayla]: Commandant! Over here!
Ayla, Sophia, and Teddy are standing together, waving at you from the other end of the promenade by Constellia\'s seaside art park.
While you are still climbing the stairs, Ayla and the others have already reached the observation deck at the end of the promenade.

Title: Event Story - Summer Memoir → Summer Analogy (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The night sleeps quietly in the summer breeze. The gentle waves of the sea embrace her.
She has seen many seas. Seas that are full of dead stars, seas that have become fossils of the past, seas that call forth lightning and storms.
She has walked many of them.

Title: Event Story - Summer Memoir → Answer of Stars (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Her hand pauses on a discordant note, interrupting the music.
She gazes long and hard at the piano keys, the morning mist in her mind firmly entrenched between the black and white.
She knows she must traverse this misty fog.

Title: Event Story - Summer Memoir → Summer Echoes (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Following the map, you walk on the roads of Constellia, your footsteps echoing clearly in the deserted streets, a sign that this area, not yet fully built, rarely sees visitors.
The summer sky is so bright that the beach in the distance is almost dazzling.
It is almost the time you are supposed to meet Lee for diving.

Title: Event Story - Summer Memoir → Scattered Waves (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: Now...
Lee, wearing his diving suit, stands knee-deep in the water and speaks with a serious tone.
[Lee]: Let\'s start with the basics of snorkeling before we start diving. Once you\'ve got the hang of it, we can consider more challenging dives.

Title: Event Story - Summer Memoir → Lone Summer Light (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Having fallen asleep to the sunset, you are woken by the clear moonlight outside. Pushing open the door, you see the stars glisten in the sky, painting the night in a cold silver.
The ocean breeze has dissipated any hint of drowsiness in you. Awake, you decide to take a walk to the shimmering shore in this comfortable weather.
You walk along the foamy traces left by the waves, not realizing how far you have traveled. By the time you turn around, all the lights are far behind you.

Title: Event Story - Summer Memoir → Glowing Warmth (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The moon has fully sunk under the horizon, casting a muted silver glow in the distant sky.
Noan springs the firefly into life, placing it in his palm and letting its warm glow dispel the darkness before dawn.
He lowers his head in silence for a moment before he slowly and softly speaks.

Title: Event Story - Skylark Nightsong → Prelude Skylark Nightsong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: We\'re here, Commandant.
Having escaped the turbulence of the transport craft, you take a deep breath as you step onto the ground. Looking up at the massive city, you are still amazed by its magnificence.
After the battle with Echo, Cervantes left Constellia in the hands of Babylonia with barely an instruction.

Title: Event Story - Skylark Nightsong → Lee - 1 Skylark Nightsong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: ...You want me to enter the maze with you, Commandant?
[Lee]: You made the right choice.
[Lee]: We\'ll definitely unravel the system and the mechanics of how this maze works.

Title: Event Story - Skylark Nightsong → Lee - 2 Skylark Nightsong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Lee is used to the smoke and fire of the battlefield. Standing in such a romantic environment, he seems slightly restless.
[Lee]: Ahem... Weren\'t we taking a photo together? Let\'s get it over with and leave.
[Lee]: Don\'t you have reports you haven\'t finished?

Title: Event Story - Skylark Nightsong → Lucia - 1 Skylark Nightsong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Exploring a maze... It\'s been a while since we last did a mission like this, Commandant.
[Lucia]: I\'ve prepared for every possible scenario.
[Lucia]: I\'ve finished inspecting our emergency supplies. Let\'s get going.

Title: Event Story - Skylark Nightsong → Lucia - 2 Skylark Nightsong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: It looks like an ordinary stage.
Gift boxes and pink corals scatter around the stage. You can tell that the mechanoids put in a lot of effort to decorate this place.
[Lucia]: Indeed. The colors of the stage and those boxes look very adorable.

Title: Event Story - Skylark Nightsong → Liv - 1 Skylark Nightsong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Do you want me to explore the maze with you, Commandant?
[Liv]: Then, allow me to perform combat preparations. I\'ll start by taking stock of our emergency supplies...
[Liv]: I suppose... the WGAA members must have cleared the hazardous material out of this place beforehand.

Title: Event Story - Skylark Nightsong → Liv - 2 Skylark Nightsong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Actually standing on a stage like this feels so different from seeing them in a projection.
Liv closes her eyes, seemingly allowing herself to fully experience the moment.
[Liv]: What a rare experience...

Title: Event Story - Skylark Nightsong → Bianca - 1 Skylark Nightsong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bianca]: Is there a new mission, Commandant?
[Bianca]: Celica sent me a message and said you might need my help, so I immediately came over.
[Bianca]: We need to explore this maze together...?

Title: Event Story - Skylark Nightsong → Bianca - 2 Skylark Nightsong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bianca]: Why is the stage decorated this way?
[Bianca]: It feels like a church, except it\'s lighter...
[Bianca]: Spring? I should have put on a more fitting coating, then.

Title: Event Story - Skylark Nightsong → Nanami - 1 Skylark Nightsong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: Whoa! Look at your new outfit, Commandant!
[Nanami]: I didn\'t know that was possible... It\'s settled, then. Next time, you\'ll dress up as Power!
[Nanami]: Hehe! Then, Nanami will be able to... stay with you forever, Commandant!

Title: Event Story - Skylark Nightsong → Nanami - 2 Skylark Nightsong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: Phew! Nanami won!
Nanami dashes onto the stage ahead of you and turns to look at you smugly.
[Nanami]: I\'m still quick on my feet even if Power couldn\'t enter the maze!

Title: Event Story - Skylark Nightsong → Kamui - 1 Skylark Nightsong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: Commandant? Why are you here?
[Kamui]: We were busy for so long that Capt said we could choose from a few easier missions. This is what I drew.
[Kamui]: The mission is to... "assist a commandant to explore the Constellia maze"...

Title: Event Story - Skylark Nightsong → Kamui - 2 Skylark Nightsong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: What a huge stage!
[Kamui]: Do you think there will be echoes if I shout from here?
[Kamui]: AAAAAAHHH—!

Title: Event Story - Skylark Nightsong → Karenina - 1 Skylark Nightsong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Karenina]: Hmph.
[Karenina]: Just so we\'re clear—I didn\'t come all the way here from Babylonia for you.
[Karenina]: I only accepted this mission because Ayla asked me to help fix some of Constellia\'s buildings.

Title: Event Story - Skylark Nightsong → Karenina - 2 Skylark Nightsong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Karenina]: Hm...
Karenina stomps the floor, confused.
[Karenina]: There\'s nothing particularly special here...

Title: Event Story - Skylark Nightsong → Watanabe - 1 Skylark Nightsong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Watanabe]: ...Gray Raven Commandant? Is that you? Why are you dressed like this?
[Watanabe]: Any person would be alarmed if they got sent a vague message with nothing but a set of coordinates from you.
[Watanabe]: I thought there was an urgent reason we had to meet on this day.

Title: Event Story - Skylark Nightsong → Watanabe - 2 Skylark Nightsong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Watanabe]: What an exquisite place...
Watanabe stares at the stage beneath him and straightens his shirt subconsciously.
[Watanabe]: I can\'t help but feel out of place.

Title: Event Story - Skylark Nightsong → α-1 Skylark Nightsong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Alpha]: Inviting an Ascendant? To play a puzzle game together?
[Alpha]: You better know what you\'re doing.
[Alpha]: How bold.

Title: Event Story - Skylark Nightsong → α-2 Skylark Nightsong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Alpha]: That went smoothly.
[Alpha]: When will that door open?
According to the design, clearing the maze and walking past the path would give the two participants plenty of time to "express their feelings" on the platform.

Title: Event Story - Skylark Nightsong → Ayla - 1 Skylark Nightsong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Ayla]: Commandant? Is there something I can do for you?
[Ayla]: Really? Fantastic!
[Ayla]: Although I was the one who discovered it, I still haven\'t entered the maze to this day!

Title: Event Story - Skylark Nightsong → Ayla - 2 Skylark Nightsong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Ayla]: Whoa! That was quick!
[Ayla]: The path seems very long in the schematics, but time always passes quickly when I\'m with you, Commandant.
[Ayla]: How about you, Commandant? What do you think of the maze?

Title: Event Story - Skylark Nightsong → Sophia - 1 Skylark Nightsong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Sophia]: You\'re inviting me to the Constellia maze?
[Sophia]: Is that a new training exercise?
[Sophia]: I believe the aristocrats from the upper level once held a feast for this reason... but I don\'t really understand it.

Title: Event Story - Skylark Nightsong → Sophia - 2 Skylark Nightsong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Sophia]: I just need to stand on this stage?
Sophia looks kind of uncomfortable on the stage.
[Sophia]: It feels... strange.

Title: Event Story - Skylark Nightsong → Chrome - 1 Skylark Nightsong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Chrome]: You\'re inviting me... to explore that maze they just discovered?
[Chrome]: Of course. I\'d be honored to go with you.
[Chrome]: I hope we\'ll have a great vacation together.

Title: Event Story - Skylark Nightsong → Chrome - 2 Skylark Nightsong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Chrome]: Ah, my apologies, Commandant. I shouldn\'t have mentioned work while you\'re on leave.
[Chrome]: I... didn\'t expect us to clear the maze so efficiently.
[Chrome]: Even though we rarely fight together, I feel like you can always perfectly intuit what I\'m thinking for some reason, Commandant,

Title: Event Story - Skylark Nightsong → Vera - 1 Skylark Nightsong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Vera]: What? A maze?
[Vera]: Ah? Since when did the top commandant of Babylonia become interested in such a place?
[Vera]: Entertainment while we\'re on vacation?

Title: Event Story - Skylark Nightsong → Vera - 2 Skylark Nightsong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Jumping onto the stage, Vera stamps the floor, bored.
[Vera]: I shouldn\'t expect a Corrupted or something jumping out of here, should I?
[Vera]: Psst...

Title: Event Story - Skylark Nightsong → Luna - 1 Skylark Nightsong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Luna]: You\'ve found me. Does it mean that you\'re ready to forsake everything from your past?
[Luna]: ...You\'re just here for a maze?
[Luna]: That sounds interesting, though... Lead the way.

Title: Event Story - Skylark Nightsong → Luna - 2 Skylark Nightsong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Looking down from the stage, the beach, the ocean, and even the maze you just went through are unobstructed from your view.
Luna looks expressionless, standing on the steps.
[Luna]: No wonder it\'s decorated this way.

Title: Event Story - Skylark Nightsong → Camu - 1 Skylark Nightsong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Camu]: ...What? A maze?
[Camu]: I\'m not doing something this stupid and boring.
[Camu]: ...Why are you here? And why are you dressed up like this?

Title: Event Story - Skylark Nightsong → Camu - 2 Skylark Nightsong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Camu]: Oh? They are just decorations...
Camu rushes onto the stage and violently tears apart those beautifully wrapped boxes.
However, the mechanoids who built this place probably had no idea what to place inside the boxes. All Camu finds inside is just cardboard and styrofoam.

Title: Event Story - Skylark Nightsong → Rosetta - 1 Skylark Nightsong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Rosetta]: Commandant? What is it?
[Rosetta]: A maze? That is something you can only solve with a little "luck"...
[Rosetta]: Are you sure you want me to accompany you, Commandant?

Title: Event Story - Skylark Nightsong → Rosetta - 2 Skylark Nightsong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Rosetta]: Hmm... It seems that this is different from the "mazes" I encountered in the ARU.
[Rosetta]: I would always run into avalanches or ice calving when I patrol the "mazes" in the ARU.
[Rosetta]: But I suppose that\'s not something I have to worry about here.

Title: Event Story - Skylark Nightsong → Qu - 1 Skylark Nightsong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Qu]: You asked me to come all the way here to invite me to explore this... maze with you?
[Qu]: Although I\'m not interested, seeing how this is an invitation from my "partner"...
[Qu]: Fine. I\'ll check it out with you.

Title: Event Story - Skylark Nightsong → Qu - 2 Skylark Nightsong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Qu]: How empty this is. It\'s merely a stage to "talk."
[Qu]: Well? Do you have anything to say to me, my "partner"?
Qu gracefully stands in the center of the stage, her arm crossed, seemingly waiting for you to say something.

Title: Event Story - Skylark Nightsong → Changyu - 1 Skylark Nightsong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Changyu]: Hey! Commandant! Here! Here!
[Changyu]: I immediately came when I got your message!
[Changyu]: Are we going to the maze?

Title: Event Story - Skylark Nightsong → Changyu - 2 Skylark Nightsong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Changyu]: Sigh! What is this? It\'s just an empty stage.
[Changyu]: And here I thought some mechanoids would be selling souvenirs here. Isn\'t that what "tourism" is in the books?
[Changyu]: That said... This does look like the stage I used to perform on. Despite the different decorations...

Title: Event Story - Skylark Nightsong → Wanshi - 1 Skylark Nightsong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Wanshi]: Yawn... Shouldn\'t you let me lie down in my maintenance chamber for a little longer on this rare vacation...?
[Wanshi]: Gray Raven Commandant? Your outfit... I couldn\'t recognize you.
Wanshi does his best to stay energized and stares at you with his eyes narrowed.

Title: Event Story - Skylark Nightsong → Wanshi - 2 Skylark Nightsong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Wanshi]: Oh? It\'s just a stage?
[Wanshi]: If there\'s nothing else to do here...
Wanshi grabs a present from the side, seemingly ready to lie down right here...

Title: Event Story - Skylark Nightsong → Selena - 1 Skylark Nightsong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Selena]: You want to invite me to explore that maze together?
[Selena]: A spring maze... Looking Glass Vows, where the skylarks sing all night?
[Selena]: It sounds... romantic. I\'m interested... Do we need to prepare anything else?

Title: Event Story - Skylark Nightsong → Selena - 2 Skylark Nightsong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Selena]: ...I really like this stage.
Selena stands in the center of the spotlight on the stage with her hands closed before her chest and her eyes gently shut, seemingly feeling something.
[Selena]: Celebrating spring this way is quite romantic...

Title: Event Story - Skylark Nightsong → No. 21 - 1 Skylark Nightsong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[No. 21]: ...A maze?
[No. 21]: It\'s... no challenge to me.
[No. 21]: I\'ve remembered the scent. I can find it wherever it is.

Title: Event Story - Skylark Nightsong → No. 21 - 2 Skylark Nightsong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[No. 21]: ...Sniff. The scent is different.
