Smelling a light aroma in the air, you presume the mechanoids who built this place installed some air fresheners to mimic "fragrance."
Although a long time has passed, the light sweetness still lingers in the air.

Title: Event Story - Skylark Nightsong → Roland - 1 Skylark Nightsong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Roland]: Hola, amigo!
[Roland]: It\'s been a while... Do you miss me?
[Roland]: I miss you a lot... Can you feel it? The powerful yearning from your enemy?

Title: Event Story - Skylark Nightsong → Roland - 2 Skylark Nightsong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Roland]: Haha! There\'s a second act?
[Roland]: Such a pompous stage! This feels like some sort of weird game show from the Golden Age...
Roland takes a graceful stance on the stage.

Title: Event Story - Skylark Nightsong → Pulao - 1 Skylark Nightsong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Pulao]: Whoa! This building is so pretty!
[Pulao]: Is the "maze" you mentioned inside this place, Commandant?
[Pulao]: Oh! It sounds interesting!

Title: Event Story - Skylark Nightsong → Pulao - 2 Skylark Nightsong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Pulao]: What a huge stage!
[Pulao]: It\'s so different from the ones on the Nighter!
[Pulao]: Hm... It looks strange to me, but it still feels very delicate!

Title: Event Story - Skylark Nightsong → Haicma - 1 Skylark Nightsong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Haicma]: Inspecting database... 57600000 results on "maze" found.
[Haicma]: "Maze is a structure with convoluted paths that are difficult to navigate..."
[Haicma]: Are you asking me to send you this information?

Title: Event Story - Skylark Nightsong → Haicma - 2 Skylark Nightsong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Haicma]: Based on the design of the maze we just accessed, we need to stay here for fifteen minutes and "express our feelings."
[Haicma]: My database explains that "expressing our feelings" is a way to tell each other how we feel. This is how we know each other better.
[Haicma]: Is there something you want to ask me?

Title: Event Story - Skylark Nightsong → Noan - 1 Skylark Nightsong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Noan]: Commandant? Your outfit...
[Noan]: The maze activity?
[Noan]: I see. This maze is a special gallery in Constellia.

Title: Event Story - Skylark Nightsong → Noan - 2 Skylark Nightsong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Noan]: This is the stage. It looks like a place for a wedding.
Noan gazes at the stage with admiration.
[Noan]: I remember attending several weddings at places like this in the past.

Title: Event Story - Skylark Nightsong → Bambinata - 1 Skylark Nightsong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bambinata]: ...Mistress has ordered Bambinata to join you. What do you need Bambinata to do, Commandant?
[Bambinata]: ...A maze?
[Bambinata]: Bambinata has no objection.

Title: Event Story - Skylark Nightsong → Bambinata - 2 Skylark Nightsong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Stopping before the stage, you turn around to speak to Bambinata, only to feel a slight bump behind you.
You turn to find Bambinata crashing into you, unable to stop in time.
[Bambinata]: ...Is it time to stop?

Title: Event Story - Skylark Nightsong → Hanying - 1 Skylark Nightsong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Hanying]: Commandant? Why... are you dressed like this?
[Hanying]: I see. Should we enter the maze, then?
[Hanying]: If you\'re ready, let\'s go.

Title: Event Story - Skylark Nightsong → Hanying - 2 Skylark Nightsong (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Hanying]: Hm... It\'s a very different style from Kowloong.
Hanying tentatively spins on the stage while looking at the surrounding decorations.
[Hanying]: I feel like this place should be filled with those dancing, fantastical puppets.

Title: Event Story - The Meandering Three → CER-01 The Meandering Three (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Noctis]: Push harder, 21!
[Noctis]: Are your claws for show only?
[No. 21]: I\'m pushing. I\'ll destroy the car if I push any harder.

Title: Event Story - The Meandering Three → CER-04 The Meandering Three (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
On this endless, barren highway, the Cerberus vehicle soars across the field like a feral horse with Vera behind the wheel.
Generally, Vera\'s driving skills are the best among the Cerberus members. At least, she is much better than Noctis and No. 21, who would crash the vehicle in no time.
But sometimes, even Vera cannot say why their journey would go wrong when she is the one driving—as if the problem is not Noctis or No. 21, but the three of them together.

Title: Event Story - The Meandering Three → CER-07 The Meandering Three (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A wasteland is not just a barren field. It is also a land with hostile weather.
For example, the heat at noon can kill a horse, while the temperature at night can freeze a man.
[Beardy]: ...No! I refuse!

Title: Event Story - The Meandering Three → CER-14 The Meandering Three (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Old Resident]: Oh dear, if it weren\'t for you...
[Children]: Cat ears!
[No. 21]: Hiss...

Title: Event Story - The Meandering Three → CER-17 The Meandering Three (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Looking at how the residents thank them ceaselessly, Vera genuinely considers changing their name to Cerberus Volunteers.
Although Vera has already asked No. 21 to secretly remove the broken parts in their trunk that drew the Corrupted in the last battle...
Many buildings and facilities have been unnecessarily obliterated by Noctis\' mindless bombings during the fight. Before Vera could clean up his mess, however, the townsfolk already jumped to excuse them—

Title: Event Story - The Meandering Three → CER-24 The Meandering Three (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Time passes, and the sandstorm seems to gradually weaken.
[Noctis]: Dammit... Where did he go...
Noctis can see a dark shape about a few dozen meters ahead of him.

Title: Event Story - The Meandering Three → CER-29 The Meandering Three (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Vera]: Alright. Your turn.
[Noctis]: What? That was quick! I thought we were swapping every half an hour!
[Vera]: Yeah. That was half an hour.

Title: Event Story - The Meandering Three → CER-08 The Meandering Three (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Beardy]: Done. I\'ve told them about you, but I only told my guy that you took care of that asshole.
[Noctis]: Why? I thought they\'d appreciate us?
[Beardy]: People talk... He might have some henchmen in town.

Title: Event Story - The Meandering Three → CER-08 The Meandering Three (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Flaming red hair dances in the night like a bursting flame, flickering in the wind.
This burning hellscape is the perfect battlefield for Cerberus.
The Corrupted do not seem to want to tangle with the three of them, however, sprinting toward different directions like a stream evading unyielding rocks.

Title: Event Story - The Meandering Three → CER-18 The Meandering Three (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The sandstorm covering the sky rules over the wild land, hiding even the night behind its veil.
[Noctis]: Tch... I\'m bored.
Leaning outside the cave, Noctis has nothing to do on his watch. He dusts off the sand on him before heading back inside the cave.

Title: Event Story - The Meandering Three → CER-18 The Meandering Three (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
No. 21\'s claws are like frenzied yet precise scalpels, tearing apart the storm and the enemies.
In this weather, Noctis\' cluster bombs are not as effective as they can be. The three of them only break through the enemies outside their hideout by coordinating with each other\'s strength.
[Noctis]: Hey! Hello? 21... Cough... Ptooey... Captain?

Title: Event Story - The Meandering Three → CER-28 The Meandering Three (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Between the fire and the lightning, enemies appear one after another from underground as if they were hibernating in the storm.
[???]: Enemies... enemies... enemies...
Amidst the strange-looking enemies, a rusty and excessively and confusingly decorated mechanoid stands up from the sand.

Title: Event Story - The Meandering Three → CER-28 The Meandering Three (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: Enemies... Enemies...
[???]: Enemies...
Noctis grabs the mechanoid by its shattered breastplate with one hand. Before his other hand can strike, the mechanoid\'s fist lands on Noctis\' face first.

Title: Event Story - Lingering Stars → Prologue Lingering Stars (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You double-check the address one last time.
"Secret plan in preparation..." The email has only this line, along with coordinates in Constellia.
Signed with a panda clutching bamboo.

Title: Event Story - Lingering Stars → Lamia Lingering Stars (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lamia]: ...
[Lamia]: Eek?! G-Gray Raven Commandant?
[Lamia]: How... how in the world did you manage to track me down here?

Title: Event Story - Lingering Stars → Lucia Lingering Stars (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: You mean... a Valentine\'s Day gift?
Half an hour earlier, you\'d popped the question.
[Lucia]: Then... hold my hand.

Title: Event Story - Lingering Stars → Lee Lingering Stars (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Wandering aimlessly down the shopping street with Lee, you catch him eyeing a stall on the side.
Apparently, they\'re running some kind of challenge, with a nervous crowd huddled around watching contestants frantically assemble mechanical models.
[Vendor]: Three... two... one... Time\'s up! Challenge failed!

Title: Event Story - Lingering Stars → Liv Lingering Stars (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Commandant, did I interrupt?
You are so engrossed in the commercial street report that you don\'t notice Liv approaching.
[Liv]: Nothing urgent. Just saw you here and wanted to say hi.

Title: Event Story - Lingering Stars → Bianca Lingering Stars (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The night sky is already covered.
You find myself on a bridge, observing the bustling crowd on the far shore.
A sudden sneeze—a naughty breeze, perhaps.

Title: Event Story - Lingering Stars → Nanami Lingering Stars (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: Hmm... Let\'s do that next!
Nanami dashes past you, then jogs back.
[Nanami]: Hey—Commandant!

Title: Event Story - Lingering Stars → Kamui Lingering Stars (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Walking on the spacious streets of Constellia, a giant display board catches your eye.
[Kamui]: "Valentine\'s Day Limited: Golden Age Classic Movie Theater"?
[Kamui]: Sure! Commandant, let\'s go check it out too!

Title: Event Story - Lingering Stars → Karenina Lingering Stars (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Karenina]: Can\'t I just buy it? Don\'t you WGAA folks know how business works?!
Karenina slams her hands on the counter, drawing stares from passersby.
You want to greet her, but she seems to be arguing.

Title: Event Story - Lingering Stars → Watanabe Lingering Stars (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The new snack shop is selling Lovers\' Delights! They\'re a rare find, so Watanabe and you grab a bag each.
[Watanabe]: They must have timed their trial opening with Valentine\'s Day, huh?
[Watanabe]: Perfect, since the children have never seen these snacks before. Let\'s take some back for them to try.

Title: Event Story - Lingering Stars → α Lingering Stars (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After sorting out the last glitch, the cinema is up and running again.
But just to be safe, you run another check to make sure everything\'s shipshape before letting everyone in.
Weird, everything seemed fine just yesterday...

Title: Event Story - Lingering Stars → Ayla Lingering Stars (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The shop door swings open, ushering in a flurry of chatter.
[Female Customer]: Miss Ayla? Look, it\'s Miss Ayla!
[Male Customer]: Ayla... Could it be the Ayla who topped the "Monthly King ART"" popularity polls for ten months straight, the original creator and lead artist of ""Beautiful Angel ENDLESS"?

Title: Event Story - Lingering Stars → Sophia Lingering Stars (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You spot something rather unusual on the street.
[Sophia]: ACA... ACA...
[Sophia]: Mini Asslam... Mini Asslam...

Title: Event Story - Lingering Stars → Chrome Lingering Stars (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A classic cocktail glass slides across the table.
[Chrome]: Didn\'t think you knew how to mix drinks.
This is a pretty faithful recreation of the original. Ice, spirits, sugar, bitters, all shaken together. But using a synthetic alcohol electrolyte solution as the base? That\'s a first for you.

Title: Event Story - Lingering Stars → Vera Lingering Stars (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Vera]: ...
[Vera]: ...
Just as you turn around, a firm tug on your wrist sends you stumbling backward, completely off balance, before you can even take a step.

Title: Event Story - Lingering Stars → Luna Lingering Stars (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Luna]: What a surprise to run into you here.
Luna\'s eyes narrow as she gazes toward the end of the rose garden path, her brow furrowing slightly.
[Luna]: So, you\'re facing an Ascendant alone, without any backup?

Title: Event Story - Lingering Stars → Camu Lingering Stars (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Camu]: Just so you know, this wasn\'t my plan.
[Camu]: I never signed up for this... annoying group activity.
You follow the youngsters\' gaze and see a bunch of kids crowding around you on the slide; some are clustered around Camu, while others are shouting and darting around the playground.

Title: Event Story - Lingering Stars → Rosetta Lingering Stars (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Rosetta]: Phew...
Rosetta stands outside the shop, a grim determination etched on her face.
[Rosetta]: Commandant, it\'s time.

Title: Event Story - Lingering Stars → Qu Lingering Stars (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Outside the theater, a female Construct arrives as promised.
[Qu]: Since you called me here, I reckon you remember what day it is today.
It\'s hard to tell from Qu\'s tone and posture whether she\'s satisfied or not.

Title: Event Story - Lingering Stars → Changyu Lingering Stars (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Tonight\'s theme at the theater celebrates Valentine\'s Day, and the entire commercial street is teeming with tourists.
Inside, they\'ve constructed an elaborate stage reminiscent of Kowloong\'s architecture—colorful glass, dragon-shaped ridges, and phoenix tails—a truly captivating spectacle.
[??]: Hey—over here!

Title: Event Story - Lingering Stars → Wanshi Lingering Stars (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Following the commercial street, you reach a deserted area and stop in front of a small, forgotten shop.
This haunted house, decked out like a derelict hospital with splatters of fluorescent green and dark red paint, clearly aims for a spooky vibe that clashes hilariously with the festive atmosphere.
Dodging the predictable jump scares, you push open the creaking door marked In Surgery at the back. Inside, a white figure lies sprawled on the operating table.

Title: Event Story - Lingering Stars → Selena Lingering Stars (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The opera house in Constellia sits just a stone\'s throw from the commercial street, but it\'s much quieter compared to the lively hustle and bustle of the commercial area.
It seems that most folks are drawn to the lively street, leaving the theater so quiet that hardly anyone comes by on purpose.
Unsure whether to push open the theater\'s grand door, you hear a familiar voice chime in beside you.

Title: Event Story - Lingering Stars → No. 21 Lingering Stars (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[No. 21]: Commandant, I\'m catching a whiff of various scents.
[No. 21]: In addition to the commandant\'s scent, there\'s a whole mix of smells—foods, fabrics, mechnoids...
[No. 21]: And there\'s something special in the air... Commandant, can we go see it together?

Title: Event Story - Lingering Stars → Roland Lingering Stars (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[??]: Folks, behold a classic game from the Golden Age right before your very eyes...
Suddenly, the street buzzes with excitement as a crowd gathers around a small shop, piquing your curiosity.
[Passerby A]: What\'s going on? If participants can escape the room within a limited time, they receive a generous reward?

Title: Event Story - Lingering Stars → Pulao Lingering Stars (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
As you stroll through the busy streets, a familiar face suddenly pops into view.
[Pulao]: All good here. Next location!
[Pulao]: Huh?!

Title: Event Story - Lingering Stars → Haicma Lingering Stars (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Over by the river, people are drawn in by the glow of lanterns, pairing off and having a blast.
Someone floats a lantern onto the water, sparking cheers all around.
Holding this lantern from the merchant, you are not sure what wishes to pack into it.

Title: Event Story - Lingering Stars → Noan Lingering Stars (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Noan]: Good afternoon, Commandant.
Noan strolls up to the meeting point, flashing a smile and reaching out his hand.
And off you go, wandering the commercial streets, shooting the breeze like always.

Title: Event Story - Lingering Stars → Bambinata Lingering Stars (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
As you venture deeper into the rest area, a familiar melody fills the air—Delibes\' "Sylvia-Pizzicato".
And there, on a makeshift stage, stands Bambinata, performing a graceful ballet routine.
Bambinata twirls like a porcelain doll, her blue and white dress swirling around her.

Title: Event Story - Lingering Stars → Hanying Lingering Stars (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Over in the garden square, there is a pottery contest going on, lasting three days and two nights.
Many signed up, but only a handful have shown up. Probably the whole pottery-making grind scares them off.
While strolling through the open pottery workshop, you notice a familiar face.

Title: Event Story - Lingering Stars → Alisa Lingering Stars (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Echo]: Phew...
[Echo]: I never thought I\'d end up at an event like this. Thanks for inviting me, Commandant... uh...
You struggle to signal Echo from within the shopping bags that you are okay, but she looks troubled and quickly steps in to help carry two of them.

Title: Event Story - Lingering Stars → Noctis Lingering Stars (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Noctis]: Commandant, watching your whole fragile act is downright painful.
[Noctis]: Hey, you can\'t crush enemies on the battlefield if you\'re built like a twig!
[Noctis]: If you slow me down because of this, you\'re in for a world of trouble.

Title: Event Story - Lingering Stars → Teddy Lingering Stars (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The pink-haired girl stands before a rust-covered server rack, sorting through the cables of this ancient piece of equipment.
[Teddy]: This is a sub-server of the virtual world "Challenger 99"—a relic from the Golden Age. Don\'t tell me you\'ve never heard of it?
[Teddy]: A bunch of neuroscientists created this virtual world. They supposedly packed it full of Easter eggs referencing other works from that era.

Title: Event Story - Lingering Stars → Bridget Lingering Stars (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Following the coordinates Bridget sent, you arrive at a bar with a sign reading "The Awakened Pub".
As you push open the wooden swinging doors, you\'re hit with an acrid mix of machine oil and alcohol.
Inside this Western-style tavern, mechanoids mingle with human customers, raising their mugs in toasts. The golden liquid in their glasses looks identical to regular beer.

Title: Event Story - Chessboard Realms → WGAA Again... (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: Say cheese!
Right as you step into WGAA, you\'re greeted by the snap sound of a camera.
A girl takes the film spit out by the camera, carefully examining the image.

Title: Event Story - Chessboard Realms → Egret & Teddy (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Within the space permeated by the scent of oil and metal, an incongruous figure occupies the desk that originally belonged to the captain of the Engineering Force.
[Engineering Force Member]: Commandant Vanessa, here\'s your water.
A member of the Engineering Force respectfully extends a glass of ice water to Vanessa. However, she refrains from reaching for it, opting instead to pinch her nose with a handkerchief, seemingly unable to tolerate the pungent smell here.

Title: Event Story - Chessboard Realms → Archrival (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
It has been a week since you agreed to be Leonie\'s test subject for Hamlet Gen-2.
During this week, Leonie\'s mental state has noticeably taken a great turn.
From which you\'ve learned that it would only take 147 consecutive error alerts for a person\'s great passion to rapidly dissipate into despair.

Title: Event Story - Chessboard Realms → Archrival (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Leonie]: You both were doing great!
[Leonie]: The data gathered this time is super valuable for improving the interactive features. Having a real person as the opponent really made a difference.
[Leonie]: There were some maneuvers that even I, the designer, hadn\'t thought of... Hmm, maybe I should tweak the unit balance a bit before we roll out the next patch...

Title: Event Story - Chessboard Realms → The Melancholic Hamlet (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: Ta-da! Applause—for Nanami\'s grand entrance! Ayla Boo, ready to witness the power of Nanami evolved to her strongest form?!
[Nanami]: Eh? Ayla Boo?
[??]: Sorry, Ayla isn\'t here right now.

Title: Event Story - Chessboard Realms → Underneath the Infinite Universe (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
During the two-week feedback period, in addition to Vanessa and yourself, Leonie has managed to recruit quite some people as temporary volunteers.
[Sica]: Commandant Vanessa... we\'ve had thirty rounds in a row. Can we take a quick break...
[Vanessa]: Tired already? Is your Mind Beacon made of thin paper?

Title: Event Story - Chessboard Realms → Underneath the Infinite Universe (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: Ugh... I must admit, Commandant is stronger... for now!
[Nanami]: But if Nanami chooses the form of Power to strike, how would you counter that, Commandant?
[Leonie]: Power... Do you mean that mech?

Title: Event Story - Lightning and Thunder → Episode 10 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Storyteller]: The virtues of the Three Sovereigns and Five Emperors are credited to the Xia, Shang, and Zhou Dynasties. The long wars of the Seven Warring States and the Five Hegemons are mere moments in the grand scheme.
[Storyteller]: A few names in the history book costs countless graves in the northern hills. What is there to fight when we only reap what our ancestors have sown?
[Storyteller]: Last we left off, the commandant received orders to head to Kangzhou for a secret mission...

Title: Event Story - Lightning and Thunder → Episode 11 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Storyteller]: Last we left off, the commandant\'s sudden visit has thrown the county office into chaos. Bu Qing Lian claimed that he barely had any servants when there are actually quite a lot of them at the county office.
[Storyteller]: Three to four chefs can be seen cooking just now, completely contradicting what Bu Qing Lian has said.
[Storyteller]: Noctis and No. 21 are on standby in the rooms assigned to them, while Vera stays with the commandant for security purposes.

Title: Event Story - Lightning and Thunder → CER II - 07 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Storyteller]: Last we left off, the commandant and Howling Cerberus have run into an unjust case in Xun City. While there\'s nothing unusual about the case itself, it has exposed the collusion between the county magistrate and the Xie family.
[Storyteller]: If Bu Qing Lian hadn\'t fainted, Commandant Commandant and Cerberus wouldn\'t have had to go through the trouble to find the local bandits themselves...
You recall the interrogation of the young man, who revealed everything as soon as he heard your identities.

Title: Event Story - Lightning and Thunder → CER II - 07 (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Mountain bandits from a hillside town stand no chance against these three.
Most of the bandits do not even have a chance to escape, and the masked woman who ambushed you is no exception.
When she wakes up, the tip of Vera\'s spear is already at her throat.

Title: Event Story - Lightning and Thunder → Awakening (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A familiar dizziness sets in.
You have experienced this feeling of waking up from a dream countless times.
[???]: You\'re awake?

Title: Event Story - Lightning and Thunder → "Method Acting" (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: Adjusting vocal module. What\'s your name?
[???]: My official designation is ST-100 Conversational Mechanoid. The nickname you gave me was...
[???]: Stop.

Title: Event Story - Lightning and Thunder → Super Puppet (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: Cough... cough... cough...
Craig coughs violently as he saves the file. Wiping his mouth with his sleeve, he stands up.
[Craig]: Heat up some tea, little assistant.

Title: Event Story - Lightning and Thunder → CER II - 17 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Three.
Two.
One.

Title: Event Story - Lightning and Thunder → The End (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Storyteller]: In a flash of silver, fists and weapons clash. The "Action Star" and Cerberus fight each other for hundreds of rounds...
[Storyteller]: But in the end, even the mightiest "Action Star" can\'t fend off multiple opponents. His movements slow...
[Action Star]: I\'ve lost...

Title: Event Story - Pulao's Odyssey → Pulao's Odyssey (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Pulao]: Ahem... Welcome, everyone, to the grand launch of my very first autobiography novel!
Pulao rolls a piece of paper into a tube as if she is speaking into a microphone.
In a modest lounge in Kowloon, you, as an invited guest, are taking part in the rehearsal for Pulao\'s latest novel launch.

Title: Event Story - Pulao's Odyssey → Pulao's Odyssey (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Pulao]: It\'s finally done!!
Pulao leans against the desk and stretches her body widely, having meticulously rearranged the manuscript that you both worked on together.
[Pulao]: With your help, I\'m sure my book will be a big hit!

Title: Event Story - Pulao's Odyssey → Pulao's Cultivation (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Pulao]: You little imp, take my Dragon Subduing!
Pulao stands in a horse stance, one fist drawn to her waist and the other thrusting forward, accidentally knocking a glass off the table.
[Pulao]: Oh! Commandant? You\'re here at the perfect time! Come check out my latest "cultivation" breakthrough!

Title: Event Story - Pulao's Odyssey → Pulao's Cultivation (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Mission accomplished and trial session successfully concluded. We look forward to seeing you next time...
With the robotic voice signaling the end, the white light grows stronger and the surroundings slowly dissipate, reverting back to the original room.
[Pulao]: We did it—wait...? What?

Title: Event Story - Summer Anecdotes → Summer Anecdotes Beachside Respite (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Resident A]: Just leave these right here.
[Resident A]: Have a drink and go take a break.
[Resident A]: We really appreciate it. Even as a commandant of Babylonia, you\'re still taking the time to help out with our bonfire party.

Title: Event Story - Summer Anecdotes → Hanying - 1 Silhouette of Pisces (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A slight chill rides on the sea breeze, carrying that unique salty scent of the ocean.
On a sweltering summer day, it\'s usually the perfect relief—if not for the unsettling rumor making the rounds.
[Pulao]: If you feel a sudden, spine-tingling chill in the sea breeze, you\'d better watch your step!

Title: Event Story - Summer Anecdotes → Hanying - 2 Cloudless Sky (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
But no matter what happens, she should focus on the task of making the bracelet first.
After you collect all the shells needed, you sit down by the shore, waiting for Hanying to finish making the bracelet. It doesn\'t take long before she completes the rest.
[Hanying]: Thank you, Commandant. Honestly, I should be the one taking care of this, but I ended up asking you for help.

Title: Event Story - Summer Anecdotes → Teddy-1 Night Tide Chat (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You make your way through the maze of intersecting corridors, slowing down at the next junction. Glancing around, you confirm no one is on your tail before taking a left into a little-used side passage.
The hallway is lined with tightly closed doors, each numbered and otherwise indistinguishable.
Continuing onward, you finally come to a stop at the last door at the end, the one with the highest number.

Title: Event Story - Summer Anecdotes → Teddy-2 Summer Together (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Despite its battered, crumbling exterior, the inside of the abandoned apartment is surprisingly intact. Cracks run everywhere, but none of them go all the way through.
A warning sign made from concrete walls and boarded-up windows blocks every bit of light. Now that the interior lamps are broken, darkness is all that remains.
The flashlight is the only source of light, barely pushing back the shadows in a small circle around you.

Title: Event Story - Summer Anecdotes → Luna - 1 LUNA (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Moonlight shimmers on the ocean, sending ripples of silver dancing across the waves.
Though summer has long since slipped beneath the sea, the seventeen-year cicadas keep chanting through the night, determined to leave a trace of their existence in every echo.
By the window, a young girl turns the pages of her book under the soft glow of the moon.

Title: Event Story - Summer Anecdotes → Luna - 2 Umi (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Luna]: Cry not if you\'re before my grave...
The girl\'s voice trails off softly. These past few nights, Commandant comes here to teach Luna how to sing, and today she finally has it down.
[Luna]: So, what do you think? Does it sound good?

Title: Event Story - Magpie's Fortune → Prologue Magpie's Fortune (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Celica]: That\'s it for today\'s meeting.
[Celica]: If there\'s nothing else, you may be dismissed. Remember to turn in your follow-up reports!
[Celica]: Commandant.

Title: Event Story - Magpie's Fortune → Karenina: Scire Magpie's Fortune (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Karenina]: No, that\'s off. I lowered the pitch too much... I need to move it up another.
Deep in the Arctic Route Union exhibit area, you spot Karenina sitting alone on a bench, holding a... strange-looking instrument.
[Karenina]: ...Commandant?

Title: Event Story - Magpie's Fortune → No. 21: Feral Magpie's Fortune (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[No. 21]: Sniff...
[No. 21]: Commandant
Street vendors are calling out, and laughter is getting louder, revealing a busy thoroughfare brimming with life.

Title: Event Story - Magpie's Fortune → Haicma: Starveil Magpie's Fortune (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Evening lights come on, and the fireworks show outside the garden square draws couples eager to watch the spectacle.
In a corner of the garden square, a lone white mechanoid sits on a bench, staring at the canvas in front of it.
[Haicma]: Commandant?

Title: Event Story - Magpie's Fortune → Lucia: Pyroath Magpie's Fortune (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
On both sides of Constellia\'s shopping street, vibrant displays of melons and other fruits line the stalls. Lucia stands among them, locking eyes with you the moment you arrive.
[Lucia]: You\'re here, Commandant.
She walks up to you and naturally takes your hand, as if it\'s the most ordinary thing in the world.

Title: Event Story - Magpie's Fortune → Alpha: Crimson Weave Magpie's Fortune (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A short while ago, your terminal picked up an email containing a single set of coordinates.
You can easily tell the sender\'s identity from the concise, matter-of-fact tone. But instead of the typical "I\'ll be here waiting," it ends on a slightly urgent note: "Get here as soon as you can."
You wonder what\'s going on.

Title: Event Story - Magpie's Fortune → Chrome: Glory Magpie's Fortune (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
In Constellia, sunlight pours over the horse ranch, and in the distance the grass sways like rolling ocean waves, glowing with a dazzling light.
[Staff Member]: Hello, are you Commandant? Mr. Chrome is already here and waiting for you inside.
After changing into riding attire, you follow the signs farther in.

Title: Event Story - Magpie's Fortune → Qu: Shukra Magpie's Fortune (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You\'re strolling through a bustling Kowloong-inspired district, thinking you\'ll pick up a few mementos to bring home...
But most of the specialty items and souvenirs are so pricey that you hesitate at every stand.
What you\'d find all over Kowloong\'s streets is treated like high-end merchandise here.

Title: Event Story - Magpie's Fortune → Camu: Crocotta Magpie's Fortune (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
At daybreak, the street remains hushed, free of its usual bustle. A few early visitors arrive with the morning breeze, bringing a spark of life to the tranquil marketplace.
Camu clutches a scribbled sketch, navigating winding alleys in search of a hidden teahouse few ever notice.
Camu suggested this teahouse, took care of the reservation, and even offered to guide you. But so far, your trip doesn\'t seem to be going so well.

Title: Event Story - Magpie's Fortune → Lamia: Lost Lullaby Magpie's Fortune (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lamia]: I\'m definitely scaring Commandant this time...
A familiar figure stands by the water, her back to you, busy with something you can\'t quite see. You wait patiently, but after a while, you can\'t help quietly calling out to her.
[Lamia]: Eeeek—ah—waaah—!

Title: Event Story - Magpie's Fortune → Ayla: Kaleido Magpie's Fortune (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Ayla]: Commandant, are you ready? This is the final stage!
A balance beam, floating buoys... behind you lie the challenges you\'ve already cleared, and beneath your feet, the bridge stretches high over a massive pool.
[Staff Member A]: Looks like today\'s two challengers are fired up and ready to roll!

Title: Event Story - Magpie's Fortune → Vera: Rozen Magpie's Fortune (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A knock echoes from the door.
You glance at the clock to confirm the time. It looks like your guest arrives earlier than expected.
The red-haired Construct shows up right on cue, wearing that same familiar, haughty grin.

Title: Event Story - Magpie's Fortune → Bridget: Ardeo Magpie's Fortune (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The man-made beach extends as far as the eye can see, and even Constellia\'s silver skyline disappears from view.
The waves glimmer faintly behind the ash grove. It\'s hard to believe this futuristic city sets aside such an expansive area for a tropical park.
[Bridget]: Wow, this place is huge! Is this really Constellia\'s seaside go-kart track?

Title: Event Story - Magpie's Fortune → Rosetta: Rigor Magpie's Fortune (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Rosetta]: So what do I do... Just flip this card over?
[Fortune Teller]: Bingo! It\'s just like a card game—draw a fortune-telling card from the deck to see what\'s in store for you!
A few minutes ago, Rosetta noticed the flashy card designs at the fortune-telling booth and pulled you inside with her.

Title: Event Story - Magpie's Fortune → Pulao: Dragontoll Magpie's Fortune (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The setting sun gathers its last rays while the lights of Constellia slowly flicker to life. In the midst of the bustling crowd, a girl stretches up and waves both hands at you with an over-the-top flourish.
[Pulao]: Hey—Commandant, over here, over here!
She waves you over, but then pushes through the crowd and dashes straight toward you. Under the neon lights, her face glows pink with excitement.

Title: Event Story - Magpie's Fortune → Hanying: Solacetune Magpie's Fortune (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Electronic Voice]: They say that on the seventh day of the seventh month, the ship enters a hidden valley. The sky darkens, the world dims, and pale fog swirls. Through the haze, a dance pavilion slowly appears...
[Electronic Voice]: This place remains abandoned for years, flattened by the Bixi Crew—so where does this pavilion come from? Today, a scholar named Commandant follows the Golden Hairpin\'s guidance to explore these grounds...
Just a few minutes ago, you arrived at the Nighter exhibit at Hanying\'s invitation, but now...

Title: Event Story - Magpie's Fortune → Nanami: Starfarer Magpie's Fortune (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Vendor]: Sure thing, just a moment.
[Nanami]: (softly) Snap—
[Kiske]: Commandant, hey there.

Title: Event Story - Magpie's Fortune → Sophia: Silverfang Magpie's Fortune (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Sophia]: How long do these rations last?
[Vendor]: Normally, they last around twenty days. If you have vacuum-sealed bags, they can keep for a year, though the flavor does lose some of its punch.
[Sophia]: Hmm... how much is this?

Title: Event Story - Magpie's Fortune → Liv: Eclipse Magpie's Fortune (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[??]: Commandant!
A light tap on your shoulder makes you turn around quickly, and you see a familiar face.
Liv is holding a bouquet of pale pink roses that match her hair, merging perfectly with the early morning light.

Title: Event Story - Magpie's Fortune → Bianca: Veritas Magpie's Fortune (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You\'re waiting for Bianca in Constellia, right beside the bridge where you\'re supposed to meet.
[??]: All right! One, two...
A couple poses closely together, while a mechanoid in a beret stands by to snap their photo.

Title: Event Story - Magpie's Fortune → Bambinata: Vitrum Magpie's Fortune (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You receive an email invitation from Bambinata, but instead of a straightforward address, she only provides a set of coordinates.
You follow the coordinates and end up in a secluded clearing.
Before you actually see Bambinata, you hear the lively strains of Kowloong-style music floating in the breeze.

Title: Event Story - Magpie's Fortune → Alisa: Echo Magpie's Fortune (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Echo]: Hff...
[Echo]: This should be good.
You meet Echo by the park\'s artificial lake, where Echo straightens her rain boots before cautiously stepping onto a small wooden boat.

Title: Event Story - Magpie's Fortune → Lee: Hyperreal Magpie's Fortune (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Over at the rest area in a corner of Constellia, you\'re compiling the Double Seventh Festival report for the WGAA.
You tap out one last period, and your ideas run dry. Your fingers hover over the keyboard, stuck. Even after trying to squeeze out a few more thoughts, you\'ve left with nothing, so you finally give in.
Letting go of your tension, you slump backward, the chair\'s backrest catching your lower body. Unexpectedly, your head comes to rest against something else.

Title: Event Story - Magpie's Fortune → Luna: Oblivion Magpie's Fortune (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[On-Duty Staff]: Thanks for all your hard work, Gray Raven Commandant. The festival draws more visitors than we expected, and we just don\'t have enough manpower. We really appreciate your help...
[On-Duty Staff]: Well, there aren\'t many shops or tourists on your side. Fewer people means fewer issues, so I don\'t expect things to go wrong.
You look up and see only a few shops scattered along the street, with around a dozen visitors. Everyone is browsing quietly at the storefronts, no fuss at all—a complete contrast to the bustling main street.

Title: Event Story - Magpie's Fortune → Roland: Flambeau Roland: Flamedance Magpie's Fortune (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
At the festival\'s central plaza, after countless yawns, this tedious show finally comes to an end.
As the host drones on with a dull closing speech, the performers leave the stage with blank expressions. Only a smattering of applause breaks the silence.
Word is there\'s been a dispute over appearance fees, making the entire show feel especially slapdash.

Title: Event Story - Magpie's Fortune → Noctis: Indomitus Magpie's Fortune (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You sit at the front desk and take a sip of the recommended drink. The familiar flavor instantly fills your mouth.
You let out a long breath. It\'s amazing how authentic this tastes—you never expect the World Folklore Enthusiasts to capture New Oakley\'s style so perfectly.
You down the rest of your drink, pay your bill, and get ready to leave—when the door suddenly flies open with a bang. A red-haired Construct strides in, spots you, and dashes over.

Title: Event Story - Magpie's Fortune → Teddy: Decryptor Magpie's Fortune (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Your terminal casts a crystal-blue glow, and the interface lingers on your chat with Teddy. The last message reads, "Meet at 3 PM, same place."
You glance at the clock—it\'s already 3:12 PM.
You and Teddy have a deal: if either of you is more than ten minutes late, you have to grant the other a favor—unless you can come up with a reason the other accepts.

Title: Event Story - Magpie's Fortune → Watanabe: Epitaph Magpie's Fortune (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Watanabe]: ...Are you sure you want to press it?
Deep in the maze, a Construct and a human stand side by side, silently watching the diamond-studded lever on the wall before.
[Watanabe]: You\'re right about that.

Title: Event Story - Magpie's Fortune → Selena: Tempest Magpie's Fortune (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You make your way into a lush forest, quietly amazed that Constellia has preserved such a vast stretch of green.
Cicadas buzz incessantly, and in the near distance, pairs of fireflies drift by. It\'s tough to tell whether they\'re mechanical replicas or genuine insects living here.
As you pass by a patch of short shrubs, you catch the sound of voices not too far away.

Title: Event Story - Magpie's Fortune → Kamui: Bastion Magpie's Fortune (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You glance around at the unfamiliar scenery and realize the festival crowd has pushed you into a place you don\'t recognize. Festivals are always packed, but now you truly understand just how overwhelming they can get.
You only manage a few steps before the crowd closes in again, leaving you stuck in place. There\'s a hugely popular booth up ahead, and everyone is clustered around it, completely blocking your path.
As you hesitate, a yellow loop rolls right up to your feet from out of nowhere. You lean down to pick it up, examining it curiously, when a sudden, familiar voice catches your attention.

Title: Event Story - Magpie's Fortune → Changyu: Qilin Magpie's Fortune (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
As you wander around, a roadside stall catches your attention. It\'s set up like a tiny stage, taking up more space than the other stalls—and more importantly, there seems to be some kind of "dispute" here.
[???]: Come on, don\'t be so rigid! I keep telling you I can handle this. Just cut me a little slack, alright?
The figure chatting with the stall owner seems familiar. You step forward, and the moment you do, the boy in the middle of the crowd spots you.

Title: Event Story - Magpie's Fortune → Wanshi: Lucid Dreamer Magpie's Fortune (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
When it comes to Double Seventh Festival celebrations, the Kowloong district is definitely the busiest place around, filled with stalls that bring traditional folk customs to life.
But to you surprise... you run into someone completely unexpected here.
Upon hearing that shout, the person in front of you turns around and looks your way, then stretches in a laid-back manner.

Title: Event Story - Magpie's Fortune → Noan: Arca Magpie's Fortune (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You have an appointment to meet Noan this afternoon in Constellia.
You show up early at the scheduled spot, but he\'s nowhere to be found. You figure you\'ll kill some time at the bar next door—and end up spotting him there.
He\'s surrounded by a bunch of Cargo Crew members who are all swearing under their breath. The table is covered with playing cards and dice, and there\'s a pile of "loot" stacked around him.

Title: Event Story - Corrupted Battlefront: Pioneers of Peril → The First Gunshot I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Windswept sand pelts against your face, hurting you slightly.
The surroundings stretch out almost infinitely, with nothing but sand and stones as far as the eye can see.
From what you can recall, you were investigating an abandoned underground research facility with Gray Raven, so why are you...

Title: Event Story - Corrupted Battlefront: Pioneers of Peril → The First Gunshot III (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Ghost towns in deserts, underground facilities, sea-crossing bridges...
The distance you have walked has far exceeded the boundaries of this facility.
[Lee]: Probably.

Title: Event Story - Corrupted Battlefront: Pioneers of Peril → The Crossfire I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Under Liv\'s guidance, you quickly arrive at the area where Lucia is located.
You see an abandoned factory before you. A massive metal structure stands at its center, surrounded by a maze of pipes and machinery. Green light permeates the mist that shrouds the space, creating an ominous atmosphere.
After searching the area for a while, you finally—

Title: Event Story - Corrupted Battlefront: Pioneers of Peril → The Crossfire III (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Aggressive slashes and pursuing gunfire interweave like a torrential downpour.
The Nozzle unit is completely defenseless against such a fierce offensive.
After another precisely coordinated attack, the Nozzle\'s defenses are completely shattered. The massive machine staggers backward before crashing to the ground.

Title: Event Story - Corrupted Battlefront: Pioneers of Peril → Base Point Neutralization I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A solitary steel bridge spans across the sand-swept wasteland.
[Liv]: Yes. According to the survey results, the source of the interference should be somewhere nearby.
Before her words are finished, Liv suddenly pauses as if sensing something.

Title: Event Story - Corrupted Battlefront: Pioneers of Peril → Base Point Neutralization III (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
With everyone\'s combined attack, the massive enemy lets out a piercing shriek before crashing to the ground with a thunderous boom, raising a cloud of dust and debris.
Hanying steps forward and crouches, gently touching the wreckage\'s core with her slender fingertips.
After a moment, she lets out a soft sigh.

Title: Event Story - Corrupted Battlefront: Pioneers of Peril → Deep Realm Endgame I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Hanying]: That\'s right. To be more precise...
[Hanying]: Numerous micro-devices have been distributed throughout the facility, working in tandem to turn every corner of the base into part of the interference source.
[Hanying]: They work together to affect our vision, hearing, and even our perception of space, trapping us in a meticulously woven "illusion".

Title: Event Story - Corrupted Battlefront: Pioneers of Peril → Deep Realm Endgame II (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Following the special identifier to the exit, you overcame the final obstacles in your path, bringing this unexpected journey to its conclusion.
A blinding white light engulfs everything. As the radiance gradually fades, the world before your eyes returns to its original state.
You see a dimly lit passage, tilted street lamps, and a heavy metal gate behind you left open.

Title: Event Story - Operation SimTerra → Regular Battle I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Leonie]: Perfect! The temporary server\'s all set!
With a light tap, Leonie happily lifts her finger from the Enter key, finishing her intense work session.
[Leonie]: Even though I have to change Gaia\'s base to an FPS engine, create temporary accounts for the entire crew, and set up a server for the anomalous data...

Title: Event Story - Operation SimTerra → Regular Battle V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After going through levels and beating bosses, everyone meets up with Liv in a ruins map.
[Liv]: Hmm... I got in the connection pod, and at first it was like everyone else\'s. I talked to another Leonie and picked "Medic" as my class.
[Liv]: But while the system was assigning my class weapon, there was a loud crash from the ceiling. The room shook, and then that enemy showed up.

Title: Event Story - Operation SimTerra → Regular Battle VII (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Stepping back into Fort Winter—restored from data—which you thought you would never see again, Lucia leads everyone to the genetic engineering lab, using her memories.
The dark hallway smells musty. Bullet holes, dents, broken screens, and flipped furniture remind everyone of what has happened here.
[Lucia]: Looks like some test subjects escaped the tanks and are wandering around. Everyone, be careful.

Title: Event Story - Operation SimTerra → Regular Battle VII (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[??]: We finally found you.
In the deep, suffocating digital sea, the massive enemy slowly dissolves and reforms into an ethereal projection.
No matter how many projections speak, it\'s only one voice—not male or female, old and young at the same time, a hollow sound that doesn\'t bring anything to mind.

Title: Event Story - Amour Concerto → Prologue  Amour Concerto (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Finally finishing a long-term project, you collapse into bed and drift off to sleep... In your hazy slumber, you seem to hear faint whispers.
[??]: Just like this... And then this...
[??]: Definitely... Love it!

Title: Event Story - Amour Concerto → Lee  Amour Concerto (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: ...This is what you said you wanted?
Lee points at the flashy, over-decorated notebook on the display stand, the corner of his mouth twitching slightly.
[Staff]: Do you think the display model needs more decorations? We have many more options you can choose from—

Title: Event Story - Amour Concerto → Lucia  Amour Concerto (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
On the streets of Constellia, you and Lucia receive Amour Concerto Photo Vouchers from the staff, printed with special photography themes.
[Staff Member]: The rules are very simple.
[Staff Member]: All you need to do is record the most memorable moment from your day and send your recording to the email address printed on your voucher.

Title: Event Story - Amour Concerto → Liv  Amour Concerto (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Commandant?
You were just about to ask Liv to complete the challenge together when, around the corner a block after, she shows up out of the blue with a ticket in hand.
When she sees that you, too, are holding the same ticket she\'s holding, she breaks into a blush.

Title: Event Story - Amour Concerto → Bianca  Amour Concerto (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bianca]: Commandant.
In the twilight hours at Constellia\'s beachside garden, your awaited companion approaches nonchalantly, accompanied by the gentle rhythm of resting waves.
Bianca holds a transparent box containing several cone-shaped treats wrapped in gold foil.

Title: Event Story - Amour Concerto → Nanami  Amour Concerto (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: Commandant—??
On the streets of Constellia in the early morning, sunlight spills like shattered gold across the neat stone pavement, but from every angle, there\'s no sign of the human Commandant anywhere.
[Nanami]: This is definitely the right address...

Title: Event Story - Amour Concerto → Kamui  Amour Concerto (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After inserting the fun ticket into the lottery machine, the shop attendant rings the brass bell a few times.
[Staff]: Doo-doo-doo! Congratulations... on getting "Rooftop Race" for your adventure!
[Staff]: This is the most exciting thing in our adventure prize pool! I\'m sure it\'s going to be unforgettable for both of you!

Title: Event Story - Amour Concerto → Karenina  Amour Concerto (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Karenina]: That\'s effective, right?
[Karenina]: Being all straightforward now, aren\'t we?! Darn it...
[Karenina]: Here.

Title: Event Story - Amour Concerto → Watanabe  Amour Concerto (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Watanabe]: Truth or dare... Do I really have to choose one of these?
You and Watanabe approach the challenge wheel for a chance to win raffle tickets for the grand prize.
According to the rules, completing either a "truth" or "dare" is going to earn you a chance to win a "Limited Edition Constellia Kitchen Set" through the raffle.

Title: Event Story - Amour Concerto → Alpha  Amour Concerto (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The warm sun rises high, approaching noon, as crowds of people course through the streets.
The streets and shops bustle with extraordinary energy as couples excitedly experience their Amour Concerto Vouchers. Sweet nothings fill the air everywhere, and the pink Valentine\'s Day mood grows increasingly vibrant throughout Constellia.
And yet, amidst the couples, there is a particular someone who seems utterly out of place.

Title: Event Story - Amour Concerto → Ayla  Amour Concerto (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The festival is more than halfway over, but there\'s still no sign of Ayla anywhere.
When you go around asking the maintenance robots, they all tell you that Ayla was last seen in one of the preparation rooms.
You can\'t hold back the urge of wanting to look for her, thinking she might be hiding somewhere, busy adjusting equipment instead of enjoying the holiday.

Title: Event Story - Amour Concerto → Sophia  Amour Concerto (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Following Sophia\'s message, you now find yourself in a secluded street.
Unlike the other places with bustling crowds, there aren\'t many people here.
Looking around, you don\'t see Sophia anywhere.

Title: Event Story - Amour Concerto → Chrome  Amour Concerto (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Chrome]: Good day, Commandant.
Chrome is slowly walking up to you with a smile on his face.
[Chrome]: Looks like it\'s all set.

Title: Event Story - Amour Concerto → Vera  Amour Concerto (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Tis a morning as ordinary as any other. You\'re about to open your eyes like you always do...
When someone yanks the blindfold off your face and starts speaking in a bizarre tone.
[Evil Boss]: Well, well, guess a lot of people are starting to panic now with you kidnapped, hahaha... Welcome to "hell," Commandant! I\'m the evil Boss here!

Title: Event Story - Amour Concerto → Luna  Amour Concerto (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Staff Member A]: This lady who told us her name was Luna... drew these Amour Concerto Vouchers for you and herself.
Says the person with a mysterious smile. When you turn it over, you see a line of words staring back at you—Dare Challenge: Reach Lake Moon\'s Edge by nightfall.
Lake Moon\'s Edge? You remember it being a scenic spot somewhere in Constellia. According to the map, it\'s a stone\'s throw away from where you are now.

Title: Event Story - Amour Concerto → Camu  Amour Concerto (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Camu]: Is this the thing you told me about?
Camu taps the headphones in front of him with his finger, seemingly trying to find out whether they truly block out sound.
[Camu]: Guess What I\'m Trying to Say?... What a weird name. I mean, am I supposed to NOT understand what you say?

Title: Event Story - Amour Concerto → Rosetta  Amour Concerto (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Rosetta]: A one-day dating ticket? That means we get to spend the whole day together.
[Rosetta]: I\'d definitely like to spend some quiet time with you, Commandant.
Walking down the street with Rosetta, you see interactive games, laughter, and music fill every possible space.

Title: Event Story - Amour Concerto → Qu  Amour Concerto (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Under the star-painted sky, Constellia stretches out in panoramic splendor as the night breezes soothe the woman\'s soul.
Atop the tower\'s terrace, Qu sits quietly, gently turning the porcelain cup in her hand.
Ding—

Title: Event Story - Amour Concerto → Changyu  Amour Concerto (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Changyu]: Heh, watch me go!
[WGAA Staff Member]: Uhh, Sir Changyu, this is... uhh...
[WGAA Staff Member]: (Utterly defeated) Fine, you win. It\'s all yours now...

Title: Event Story - Amour Concerto → Wanshi  Amour Concerto (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Wanshi]: Want to do this challenge with me?
Wanshi glances briefly at the rules on the card and looks at you.
[Wanshi]: So that\'s how you see me? I\'m a little hurt.

Title: Event Story - Amour Concerto → Selena  Amour Concerto (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Selena]: It says here to "give your partner a sincere confession"...
[Selena]: That... is being very straightforward, which is keeping with how people were like back in the Golden Age, I\'d say.
Finished reading what it says on the back of the card, Selena presses it to her chest and turns to look at you.

Title: Event Story - Amour Concerto → No. 21  Amour Concerto (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You\'ve been looking over your shoulder the entire way without seeing anything, so you decide to take a turn at the corner of the street.
With it, you sense No.21\'s presence around!
[No. 21]: Gotcha.

Title: Event Story - Amour Concerto → Roland  Amour Concerto (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Roland]: Boo, long time no see, Gray Raven Commandant! Surprised to see me?
[Roland]: No way I\'m ever gonna miss out on the fun today.
[Roland]: And I want to see nowhere else but you now, and there\'s no way I\'d let this chance slip.

Title: Event Story - Amour Concerto → Pulao  Amour Concerto (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The sun now hangs high in the sky, with the festive mood of the holiday permeating everywhere.
Pulao comes bouncing over as she shows off the voucher in her hand.
[Pulao]: Commandant, look! I got a "Shooting Challenge Game" voucher! Sounds super exciting and fun, no?

Title: Event Story - Amour Concerto → Haicma  Amour Concerto (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Haicma]: Thank you for coming, Commandant.
[Haicma]: You have been invited to be part of this.
Quietly waiting in the event venue, Haicma hands you a voucher with a title that boldly reads: Adventure: Conquer of the Pure White Hell.

Title: Event Story - Amour Concerto → Noan  Amour Concerto (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Both you and Noan stare quietly at the question mark on the voucher you\'re holding, utterly confused.
[Noan]: What... exactly does this mean?
[Staff]: Congratulations on drawing our special hidden event!

Title: Event Story - Amour Concerto → Bambinata  Amour Concerto (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The teddy bear pats all over its costume, retrieving candies given by the children as thanks for the performance, and offers them to you with outstretched paws.
Probably limited by the narrow field of vision in the costume, the teddy bear misjudges the height of the stairs, causing it to take a hard tumble. With it, the candies scatter miserably across the floor.
Unsure what to do, the teddy bear sits dumbfounded on the floor for a moment, before finally attempting to gather up the candies with clumsy paws.

Title: Event Story - Amour Concerto → Hanying  Amour Concerto (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Hanying]: We need to get our partner to give us a gift?
Hanying stares at the voucher in her hand with a look of surprise.
Constellia is hosting a Valentine\'s Day event today. You and Hanying were just taking a stroll nearby when the two of you decided to join in the fun.

Title: Event Story - Amour Concerto → Alisa  Amour Concerto (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Echo]: So you\'re saying you\'ll be with me as long as I have this voucher?
Echo examines the item in her hands, seemingly trying to figure out if it\'s actually going to deliver what it promises.
When she sees that you\'re holding the same voucher, she breaks into a smile.

Title: Event Story - Amour Concerto → Noctis  Amour Concerto (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Struggling to keep up with Noctis, you make your way arduously up the steep mountain path.
This is what he said a few minutes ago...
[Noctis]: What\'s this challenge nonsense? I can\'t even make heads or tails of this colorful mess of a map. Whatever, I just happen to want to go hiking anyway!

Title: Event Story - Amour Concerto → Lamia  Amour Concerto (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lamia]: Are you for real?!
Lamia clutches the voucher in her hand tightly, reading and rereading the title to make sure she isn\'t mistaken. Just moments ago, the two of you learned about a "Truth or Dare" event while walking the streets of Constellia.
With your encouragement, Lamia closed her eyes and drew out a voucher—and the rest is history.

Title: Event Story - Amour Concerto → Teddy  Amour Concerto (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Teddy]: Commandant, try this one on, too.
In a shop along Constellia\'s commercial street, Teddy takes a new accessory from the shelf and places it on your head. You now look like a Christmas tree with hanging decorations.
[Teddy]: Woah, check this out. You look awesome!

Title: Event Story - Amour Concerto → Bridget  Amour Concerto (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After nightfall, the conservation area on the outskirts of Constellia becomes as peaceful as the streets within the city. The day\'s hustle and bustle has subsided, leaving only comforting lights behind.
With Bridget still out on a mission, you are here waiting for her return from the combat zone.
A transport aircraft lands on the nearby landing pad, with its vertical thrusters roaring all the while. It\'s the very last flight of the day.

Title: Event Story - Amour Concerto → Yata  Amour Concerto (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Bridget leans back in the twilight, her shadow elongated and polished by the warm glow.
[Yata]: Back where I came from, we call this time the "witching hour." It\'s when spirits are most likely to appear, and when humans and ghosts can exist in the same space.
[Yata]: Why are you being so quiet? Are you scared? Don\'t worry, I\'m right here with you.

Title: Event Story - Amour Concerto → The Merciful One  Amour Concerto (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
On the early evening streets, a large performance has just ended. The spectators disperse into groups that go in each and every way.
This is where you and Ishmael agreed to meet after the performance, except she\'s nowhere to be seen now.
You call her name twice, but get no response.

Title: Event Story - Amour Concerto → Lilith  Amour Concerto (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Eleanor]: Hey, didn\'t think I\'d see you again so soon, Commandant.
Eleanor walks up with elegant steps, holding out her empty hands as if to demonstrate she means no harm. She\'s the last person in this world you were expecting to run into today.
[Eleanor]: Relax. I heard Constellia was holding a Valentine\'s Day event, so I just came for a little vacation.

Title: Event Story - A Flash of Love → Through Your Dreamy Gaze A Flash of Love (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Crew members stand on both sides of the massive platform, some holding cameras while others operate various filming equipment. The lenses\' angles vary in height and position, but all converge on a single focal point.
Through the lens, beyond the observation deck, wispy clouds drift across the view. At the horizon, a cityscape sprawls, its scattered lights pulsing like a heartbeat, muffling the commotion hundreds of meters below.
Under the night sky, the girl leans against the faintly shimmering railings. Her long hair dances in the breeze as she focuses intently on the camera in her hands, pointed toward the horizon. Slowly, a smile begins to form at the corners of her lips.

Title: Event Story - A Flash of Love → Jetavie A Flash of Love (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
As night falls, the commercial district is enveloped in a lively atmosphere, filled with cheerful, bustling crowds.
You deliberately arrived a bit early and found a spot to sit, quietly waiting for the quirky, whimsical girl to show up.
You didn\'t have to wait long before you felt a light touch on the shoulder.

Title: Event Story - A Flash of Love → Vera A Flash of Love (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
In front of a shop along the Orbital Corridor, roses radiate crimson joy, their brilliant hue matching the female Construct standing beside them.
Just as you\'re about to frame the shot, you realize she\'s nowhere to be found.
[Vera]: Poor little child, are you lost? Need me to broadcast a missing person announcement?

Title: Event Story - A Flash of Love → Bianca A Flash of Love (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
People come and go along the broad walkway. Perhaps because of the festival, this usually formal and solemn area now feels a little more relaxed and cheerful than usual.
Walking side by side with Bianca, you exit the military spaceport\'s cabin entrance and head toward the transport elevator that leads to the dormitory.
[Bianca]: And that\'s the ending of the script.

Title: Event Story - A Flash of Love → Discord A Flash of Love (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Discord]: Commandant, the photoshoot is complete.
The blue-haired maid slowly lowers her vintage CCD camera. On the low-resolution display—made up of only a few hundred pixels—a perfectly formal, upright portrait gradually comes into view.
That\'s right. For the past half hour, no matter how you moved around the Commercial Street to change angles, no matter what poses were struck, this girl has persistently framed only the commandant\'s face at close range, capturing nothing but formal, front-facing portraits.

Title: Event Story - A Flash of Love → Veronica A Flash of Love (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Click—click—the shutter\'s sound keeps ringing in your ears. Before you, Veronica maintains her stance, camera in hand, her gaze never leaving the viewfinder.
All afternoon, you have been accompanying her like this—standing together at the highest point of a conservation area, watching her continuously capture every view below into her camera.
You cannot recall ever "hovering" at such heights for so long. From up here, the scenery below resembles a miniature diorama, giving everything an oddly surreal quality.

Title: Event Story - A Flash of Love → Liv A Flash of Love (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Festivals always bring a special atmosphere, and even the combat-ready Babylonia is no exception. Lush, vibrant roses, pink ribbons visible everywhere, and fast-selling liquor-filled chocolates all come together to form the Valentine\'s Day theme.
A long line has already formed outside the coffee shop...
[Liv]: Commandant, have you decided what you\'d like to drink?

Title: Event Story - A Flash of Love → Teddy A Flash of Love (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The pink-haired girl sits at a table by the coffee shop, waiting for someone.
Her gaze travels past the greenery beside her to the azure planet in the distance.
One can gaze past where Earth\'s edge melts into the darkness, and look into the void to find stars glittering beyond.

Title: Event Story - A Flash of Love → Rosetta A Flash of Love (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Click—
[Rosetta]: This one turned out well.
Click—

Title: Event Story - Stellar Narratives → Prologue Wishing Upon a Star (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Celica]: That concludes the announcement.
[Celica]: If there are no questions, you\'re all dismissed. Just don\'t forget to turn in your reports on time.
As the meeting wraps up, the fluorescent lights flicker on. Everyone around the long table gathers their files, stands, and begins to head out.

Title: Event Story - Stellar Narratives → Lee Wishing Upon a Star (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The heart of Constellia glows with bright lights, filled with the hum of mechanoid vendors and the steady click of turning gears. Their stalls are piled with unusual components, handcrafted pieces, and carefully restored relics.
The air carries a faint hint of machine oil blended with the sweet scent of energy fluid. Stalls of every kind tempt passersby to linger.
[Lee]: According to my scans, the market\'s energy efficiency is 17.3% higher than expected. Some stalls even hide defensive structures under designs that fit perfectly with the festival\'s atmosphere...

Title: Event Story - Stellar Narratives → Lucia Wishing Upon a Star (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: ...The renovations at the old Catania estate are complete. According to family tradition, a portrait of the heir must be hung in their room.
[Lucia]: Lady Dawne understands you\'re busy with official duties, so she\'s already hired the most professional photography team in all of Catania. They\'re on standby, ready whenever you are.
[Lucia]: She kindly asks that when you have some free time, you notify the family in advance so they can schedule the shoot quickly without taking up too much of your day.

Title: Event Story - Stellar Narratives → Liv Wishing Upon a Star (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Maybe it\'s the festival atmosphere, Constellia\'s streets are at least twice as crowded as usual. Humans, Constructs, and mechanoids flow through the city like a living tide, filling it with noise and color.
Even with the sea of people blocking your view, you easily spot the familiar pink silhouette waiting at the meeting spot.
She sits quietly on a bench by the street, perfectly still. Sunlight filters through her soft, straight hair and lights up her fair skin. She almost seems translucent—so translucent that, against the busy backdrop, she stands out even more.

Title: Event Story - Stellar Narratives → Bianca Wishing Upon a Star (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The afternoon air in Constellia carries a lazy breeze.
Most visitors take a post-lunch break, leaving the marketplace sparsely populated. The mechanoids use the lull to swap jokes about screws and bolts that only they understand.
In this relaxed atmosphere, you head to the meeting spot and see a figure standing in the sunlight.

Title: Event Story - Stellar Narratives → Nanami Wishing Upon a Star (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: Hello, everyone! The Double Seventh Festival Radio is starting, give me some applause!
[Nanami]: Today, we have a special guest joining me. Any guesses who it is?
[Nanami]: Hehe, that\'s right. It\'s none other than the Gray Raven Commandant, Commandant. Care to introduce yourself to everyone?

Title: Event Story - Stellar Narratives → Kamui Wishing Upon a Star (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You spot a familiar figure in the market.
[Mechanoid Vendor]: C\'mon, you gotta trust me! With an honest face like mine, how could I possibly trick you?
[Mechanoid Vendor]: This kit is so good that even Agent 006 swears by it! Take it home, you won\'t regret it.

Title: Event Story - Stellar Narratives → Karenina Wishing Upon a Star (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Judge]: The camera cuts back to the main screen. You\'ve reached the final round of this year\'s Block-Pulling Championship.
[Judge]: On the red team, we have Team Block Master! And on the blue team, representing Babylonia, it\'s Commandant and Karenina—Team Karenina Invincible!
The judge\'s loud voice hypes up the crowd. Despite the fancy name, the competition area is really just a small, simple tent.

Title: Event Story - Stellar Narratives → Watanabe Wishing Upon a Star (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Ding-a-ling... The sound of bells rings out from somewhere at the festival, while vendors call out to passing crowds.
As dusk settles and the sky darkens, you spot an unassuming stall at the corner of the street. Neon letters flash brightly above its sign: "Balloon Shooting: Hit More, Win More".
Old-fashioned air rifles are lined up next to a wall of balloons. Just looking at it stirs an urge to take on the challenge.

Title: Event Story - Stellar Narratives → Alpha Wishing Upon a Star (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
On the west side of Constellia, the flea market is buzzing with life. Mechanoids who are usually quiet have all set up stalls, selling trinkets they\'ve collected or crafted by hand.
You came here hoping to find something unusual, but instead, you spot a familiar figure in the crowd.
[Alpha]: ...

Title: Event Story - Stellar Narratives → Ayla Wishing Upon a Star (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Little Mechanoid A]: This is our wall! You go find somewhere else!
[Little Mechanoid B]: I\'m better at drawing than you, so I should be the one to paint it. That\'s the rule in Constellia.
[Little Mechanoid A]: Says who? No one agreed you\'re better than me. You\'re just talking *mechanical slang* nonsense!

Title: Event Story - Stellar Narratives → Sophia Wishing Upon a Star (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Sophia]: Got it! The last one.
[White Kitten]: Meow... Meooww!
[Sophia]: I\'m catching a food thief.

Title: Event Story - Stellar Narratives → Chrome Wishing Upon a Star (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Chrome]: Next, I\'ll try for the 5-ball in the corner pocket. Commandant, you keep an eye on the devices for me.
[Chrome]: If you\'re watching, nothing will go wrong.
[Chrome]: And I plan to deliver.

Title: Event Story - Stellar Narratives → Vera Wishing Upon a Star (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Vera]: I knew you\'d be here. I came straight over after leaving the Science Council.
A familiar cold voice sounds behind you. Turning around, you see the expected figure in red.
[Vera]: About halfway, I\'d say. But I managed to finish all the important parts in time for the Double Seventh Festival.

Title: Event Story - Stellar Narratives → Luna Wishing Upon a Star (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You\'ve heard that Constellia\'s east district is lined with beautiful decorations for the Double Seventh Festival. Out of curiosity—and because Luna once said she was a little interested—you both agreed to come see them.
You haven\'t been walking long when you hear the sound of light rain. A fine mist starts to fall, covering the streets in a soft, silvery layer.
[Luna]: Looks like this rain won\'t stop any time soon.

Title: Event Story - Stellar Narratives → Camu Wishing Upon a Star (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Constellia, a city born from humanity\'s grand ideals and boundless desires, is wrapped in the warmth of ordinary joy tonight. It sways to the simple rhythms of daily life, filled with lovers whispering to each other... and meow meow meow meow.
[Evil Chinchilla]: Hey, you there, meow meow! If you\'re not buying anything, don\'t just stand around meow meow! You\'re scaring off my customers, meow!
[Camu]: Grrrrr—

Title: Event Story - Stellar Narratives → Rosetta Wishing Upon a Star (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Outside the main venue, there\'s a separate recreation area set up for visiting guests.
You were planning to take a short break, until you spot Rosetta locked in an intense card duel with a mechanoid.
[Onlooking Crowd]: Whoa! The mechanoid rolled a 6! Rosetta\'s in trouble now.

Title: Event Story - Stellar Narratives → Qu Wishing Upon a Star (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Constellia Lounge
Tea leaves settle at the bottom of the cups as hot water is poured in. Within moments, a delicate aroma rises from the porcelain.
Balancing the saucers, you walk toward a dark mahogany desk.

Title: Event Story - Stellar Narratives → Changyu Wishing Upon a Star (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
In a makeshift theater on the street, a crowd gathers around a storyteller dressed in a robe and mask, dramatically reciting a script.
[Storyteller]: Previously, we spoke about a wealthy youngster who rejected family arrangements and decided to run away with a young martial artist.
[Storyteller]: One dark and windy night, they climbed over the mansion\'s walls, hoping to escape to the capital. But little did they know the family had found out and sent guards to intercept them...

Title: Event Story - Stellar Narratives → Wanshi Wishing Upon a Star (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Night at the Youth Center is quiet.
The children staying here have played to their hearts\' content and are now being led off to rest by their caretakers.
