The laughter and noise of the day have faded. In a dimly lit lecture hall, a white-haired young man sits alone, tidying up his materials and equipment.

Title: Event Story - Stellar Narratives → Selena Wishing Upon a Star (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The moon rises above the horizon, and stars fill the sky. A cool night breeze rustles through the trees lining the streets of Constellia.
A long-haired girl stands quietly beneath the bamboo shadows, holding a pale blue letter. She turns to look at you under the moonlight, her hair flowing like silk in the wind, carrying a faint scent of iris.
[Selena]: Here you are, Commandant.

Title: Event Story - Stellar Narratives → No. 21 Wishing Upon a Star (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Broadcast]: First set, stretching exercises. One, two, three, four...
Following the broadcast count, No. 21 perks up her wolf ears and raises both arms straight out in front of her.
[No. 21]: Am I doing this right, Commandant?

Title: Event Story - Stellar Narratives → Roland Wishing Upon a Star (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Theater Manager]: Commandant! W-we have another situation!
"—Hola amigo!" A bold and cheerful "declaration of war" has taken over the main page of the theater\'s control system. The legendary romance film screening prepared for the Double Seventh Festival has, as expected, hit a snag.
[Theater Manager]: Someone tampered with the system\'s love-story navigation path. Now it redirects to a private, encrypted scene set up by the intruder.

Title: Event Story - Stellar Narratives → Pulao Wishing Upon a Star (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
It\'s four in the afternoon. The weather is clear, the sky perfectly blue. White clouds drift overhead, buildings stretch across the distant skyline, and green grass spreads out underfoot...
Pulao is sitting on your shoulders.
[Pulao]: Whoa, Commandant, stop moving around!

Title: Event Story - Stellar Narratives → Haicma Wishing Upon a Star (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
During the festival, Constellia is even more dazzling and colorful than usual. Perhaps it\'s best described as tipping an entire paint box straight into water.
That\'s exactly what they would say with a perfectly straight face.
Lost in thought as you weave through the crowd, you suddenly spot a familiar flash of silvery white at a nearby stall.

Title: Event Story - Stellar Narratives → Noan Wishing Upon a Star (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Perhaps because of the festival, Constellia is bustling with activity during the day. The streets are packed with people, and a joyful festive atmosphere fills the city.
Many shops have long lines—clear proof the heat hasn\'t melted anyone\'s enthusiasm. One line snakes from a shady corner, far longer than expected.
At the head sits a young Construct with black-and-white streaked hair. His pencil flies; in three minutes he hands a lifelike manga sketch to the model.

Title: Event Story - Stellar Narratives → Bambinata Wishing Upon a Star (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Officiant]: Congratulations! You\'ve won the grand prize!
One corner of the venue bursts into noise—some groaning over picking the wrong number, others clapping in celebration.
Then, amid the cheers, a shy and slightly bewildered girl steps onto the stage. She accepts the prize from the officiant.

Title: Event Story - Stellar Narratives → Hanying Wishing Upon a Star (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
While strolling through downtown Constellia, you hear applause and cheers in the distance. Both humans and Constructs have stopped to watch something ahead.
Weaving through the crowded throng, you catch sight of a graceful figure in turquoise. Light and shadow play across her as she moves, and her mastery of the dance is nothing short of breathtaking.
[Hanying]: Commandant, it really is you.

Title: Event Story - Stellar Narratives → Alisa Wishing Upon a Star (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
At the Constellia festival, the Youth Center hosts a poetry sharing class for children. Echo, who has recently delved into poetry, has been invited to teach.
Dusk approaches, uneven sunlight spills into the room, lingering among the children\'s clear voices.
[Echo]: In the distant past of Kowloong, there was a poet born on Double Seventh and who also died on Double Seventh... Yet he was not known for romance.

Title: Event Story - Stellar Narratives → Noctis Wishing Upon a Star (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You expected the arcade to be popular, but this is beyond anything you imagined.
Countless people crowd around a strength-testing punching machine. Who knew these pre-Golden Age arcade games could be so popular? Among the crowd, you notice familiar bright red hair.
[Mechanoid Vendor]: I strongly protest the destructive behavior of this Babylonia Construct in Constellia!

Title: Event Story - Stellar Narratives → Lamia Wishing Upon a Star (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Night draws in, yet Constellia stays lively. Lamps of every color blink on, wrapping the streets in a warm, bustling glow.
Across the street, a mermaid focuses on a small stall, her profile frozen in the light like a still painting.
Paper lanterns pile high, crowding around a sign that reads "Wishing Lanterns".

Title: Event Story - Stellar Narratives → Teddy Wishing Upon a Star (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Underground arcade, Constellia.
Your fingers move quickly across the screen, keeping up with the rhythm as colorful notes fly toward you. The crisp tapping sounds blend into a seamless rhythm. As the song reaches its final part, you stay focused, hitting the last few beats with precision. Perfect!
As the vocals fade, the screen switches to the results page. You finally let out a breath, the tension in your body easing.

Title: Event Story - Stellar Narratives → Bridget Wishing Upon a Star (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You gently push open the door to the private theater suite. Warm amber light spills out, revealing a cozy space lined with sound-dampening carpet and elegant decor.
Bridget takes a few steps forward, then happily flops onto the soft cushions of the sofa.
[Bridget]: Mmm... so comfy!

Title: Event Story - Stellar Narratives → Yata Wishing Upon a Star (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Following the shared coordinates on your terminal, you push through the crowds until you reach the designated location—a food street on the western side of the exhibition.
Just as you begin scanning the crowd of mechanoids for the signal\'s source, a familiar, swaying silhouette in the corner of your eye catches your attention.
[Yata]: Yo, Gray Raven Commandant!

Title: Event Story - Stellar Narratives → Ishmael Wishing Upon a Star (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Event Staff]: Hello, excuse me, would you be interested in something called "Sunset Chase"?
As you walk through the streets of Constellia, a mechanoid suddenly steps in front of you, cheerfully handing over a flyer.
[Event Staff]: According to research, the glow of a sunset fades slowly after the sun goes down. But if you run toward the horizon during that time, it can create the visual illusion that the colors linger just a little longer.

Title: Event Story - Stellar Narratives → Lilith Wishing Upon a Star (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After checking several times to make sure no one is following, you grip the warning letter in your hand and step into the elevator to the windmill tower\'s top.
It\'s a letter foretelling a crime, and as you look at it, you can almost hear a woman\'s soft humming in your ear.
[Eleanor]: ?Windmill tower\'s falling down, falling down, falling down. Windmill tower\'s falling down, falling down, falling down.?{226|153|170}

Title: Event Story - Stellar Narratives → Jetavie Wishing Upon a Star (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Golden sunlight softens the edges of time, while the endless chorus of insects fills the air. Wrapped in the haze of late summer, it all drifts away into a dreamy whisper.
You had arranged to meet her in Constellia, but with a city this big, where exactly would you find her?
[???]: Here.

Title: Event Story - Stellar Narratives → Discord Wishing Upon a Star (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Corridor outside the conference room, Babylonia.
[Discord]: The meeting\'s over, Commandant. Do you need anything?
You tell Discord about the Double Seventh Festival Souvenir Exhibition in Constellia, and also mention Celica\'s request.

Title: Event Story - Hydrangea Gala → The First Bloom Hydrangea Gala (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Ayla]: ...And that\'s how I did it! I\'ve finally secured the rights to host the latest Golden Age Cultural Festival!
Just as you finish the paperwork, the pink-haired Construct arrives at the door with impeccable timing.
[Ayla]: Now, the question is—who should we appoint as the festival\'s site planner?

Title: Event Story - Hydrangea Gala → Moonlit Night Hydrangea Gala (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The indoor venue is buzzing with excitement. Being the most popular attraction, the gaming section already has a long line forming early on.
[Boxing Champion]: CHALLENGE START!
Your fist lands on the mechanoid\'s padded chest, but the display panel on its head shows no reaction whatsoever.

Title: Event Story - Hydrangea Gala → Stoy by the food stall... Hydrangea Gala (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Yata]: Oh? They\'re even selling oden here.
[Yata]: Let\'s see how it tastes...
[Yata]: Hmm, not bad at all.

Title: Event Story - Hydrangea Gala → Stop by the claw machine... Hydrangea Gala (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: The dolls here look quite retro...
Lucia\'s gaze pierces through the glass window, settling on a Froggie plush tucked away in the corner.
[Lucia]: Commandant, can I have some tokens?

Title: Event Story - Hydrangea Gala → Stop by the parts shop... Hydrangea Gala (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: You have to assemble a Mini 4WD car within the time limit, then race it on a short track.
[Lee]: If you win, you\'ll get quite a few tokens as a prize.
[Lee]: We\'ve played so many games already. We must be running low on tokens.

Title: Event Story - Hydrangea Gala → Stop by the piano... Hydrangea Gala (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Selena]: I agree. We\'re really on the same wavelength here.
[Selena]: Well then... Are you ready, Conductor?
Browsing through the sheet music, you press the keys. The melodious piano notes flow through the air, drawing passersby to stop and listen.

Title: Event Story - Hydrangea Gala → Stop by the flower shop... Hydrangea Gala (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Commandant, I see a flower shop.
[Liv]: They only seem to sell hydrangeas here...?
[Liv]: These flowers are so beautiful, though they\'re like begonias—not much of a fragrance.

Title: Event Story - Hydrangea Gala → Stop by "Norman Heroes"! Hydrangea Gala (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: Ugh—dodge! Dodge! Double jump! Heal!
[Nanami]: Ah—! What\'s up with this boss?! It doesn\'t move when I\'m standing still, but the moment I try to heal it attacks!
[Nanami]: Nanami! Is! Angry! Now!

Title: Event Story - Hydrangea Gala → Stop by the movie poster... Hydrangea Gala (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bianca]: Is that... a movie poster for "Seven Guns"?
[Bianca]: Indeed. The director was passionate about making period dramas, and their storytelling always had this subtle yet profound depth to it.
[Bianca]: Come to think of it, Hydrangea Island was one of his favorite filming locations. Many of his famous movies were shot there.

Title: Event Story - Hydrangea Gala → Stop by the shooting game booth... Hydrangea Gala (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Wanshi]: Two-player balloon shooting, huh...
[Wanshi]: ...Wanna give it a try?
[Wanshi]: Your wish is my command. Let\'s get this over with quickly.

Title: Event Story - Hydrangea Gala → Stop by the suit shop... Hydrangea Gala (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Chrome]: The pictures don\'t do it justice—their suits really are one of a kind.
[Chrome]: The brand was discontinued years ago, but they\'ve recently made a comeback riding the vintage fashion wave.
[Chrome]: Their designs blend the elements of formal suits with traditional clothing. It\'s quite a niche brand, I only heard about it recently myself.

Title: Event Story - Hydrangea Gala → Finish touring the park with Yata Hydrangea Gala (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Yata]: As expected of the Gray Raven Commandant. Your planning is truly impressive.
[Yata]: To be honest, it\'s even better than I remember.
[Yata]: I thought Hydrangea Island would be forgotten after everything that happened here.

Title: Event Story - Hydrangea Gala → Finish touring the park with Lucia Hydrangea Gala (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: The atmosphere was great. It really felt like being in a school.
[Lucia]: Both the performances and the food really captured Hydrangea Island\'s unique character. It was quite impressive.
[Lucia]: Oh right, speaking of food... I carefully studied how they make their specialty snacks at the festival today.

Title: Event Story - Hydrangea Gala → Finish touring the park with Lee Hydrangea Gala (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: Of course, you planned this event after all. It\'s truly impressive.
[Lee]: Everyone looks so happy. They must be cherishing these precious moments.
[Lee]: Whenever I see scenes like this, I can\'t help but think that protecting these hard-earned moments of joy is also our responsibility.

Title: Event Story - Hydrangea Gala → Finish touring the park with Selena Hydrangea Gala (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Selena]: Conductor, thank you for sharing this unforgettable day with me.
[Selena]: The festival you orchestrated went so smoothly, everything was perfectly in order.
[Selena]: The atmosphere here has sparked my interest in Hydrangea Island\'s culture.

Title: Event Story - Hydrangea Gala → Finish touring the park with Liv Hydrangea Gala (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Today\'s festival was a great success, Commandant.
[Liv]: Yes, I can tell you had put your heart into this, Commandant.
[Liv]: You must be exhausted from today\'s work. Please get some rest after the festival is over.

Title: Event Story - Hydrangea Gala → Finish touring the park with Nanami Hydrangea Gala (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: We got to see so many amazing performances and play all these fun games today!
[Nanami]: Nanami had soooo much fun!
[Nanami]: I\'ve known it all along—the activities you plan are always the most fun, Commandant!

Title: Event Story - Hydrangea Gala → Finish touring the park with Bianca Hydrangea Gala (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bianca]: Thank you for inviting me to today\'s festival, Commandant.
[Bianca]: It\'s quite pleasant here. The school festival theme creates such a lively and carefree atmosphere. You really have a knack for planning these kinds of events.
[Bianca]: ...Come to think of it, I once dreamed of building a school on the surface, once everything settled down.

Title: Event Story - Hydrangea Gala → Finish touring the park with Wanshi Hydrangea Gala (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Wanshi]: Yawn...
[Wanshi]: Mmm...? What\'s up?
[Wanshi]: ...Oh, I\'m exhausted.

Title: Event Story - Hydrangea Gala → Finish touring the park with Chrome Hydrangea Gala (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Chrome]: Oh, it\'s gotten this late already...
[Chrome]: Time flies by so quickly in these kinds of places.
[Chrome]: Most of my previous outings were business-related social events. I rarely had chances like today to simply enjoy myself with friends.

Title: Event Story - Stellar Witching Hour → Before Departure The Journey Begins (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Deep in the cosmos, stars scatter across the infinite void.
[Nanami]: Commandant! Hehe, are you ready?
[Nanami]: Time for our big adventure together!

Title: Event Story - Stellar Witching Hour → Final Destination The Journey Begins (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The two trudge on until they reach the end of the path.
At some point, the Red Tide had already flooded into the ocean. You\'re only able to this Red Tide-covered world now because your consciousness is connected to Nanami\'s.
[Nanami]: Oops...

Title: Event Story - Stellar Witching Hour → Before Departure Beneath the Sands (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Deep in the cosmos, stars scatter across the infinite void.
[Nanami]: Variables added, content extended... World construction complete!
[Nanami]: Commandant, is everything okay? Would you like to continue adventuring with Nanami?

Title: Event Story - Stellar Witching Hour → Final Destination Beneath the Sands (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Yellow sand drifts across the distant ruins.
Under the harsh, blinding sun, Nanami sits beside a broken-down Vassago, tinkering with her wheels.
[Nanami]: Sand just loves getting stuck in these wheels... No matter how good the oil is, they always end up feeling cranky...

Title: Event Story - Stellar Witching Hour → Before Departure Echoes of the Woodland (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Deep in the cosmos, stars scatter across the infinite void.
[Nanami]: Ugh, ahem—I can still feel sand stuck in my joints!
[Nanami]: Nanami doesn\'t want to go to that kind of world again... Are you ready to continue, Commandant?

Title: Event Story - Stellar Witching Hour → Final Destination Echoes of the Woodland (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After digging underground for a while, the two of you discover an unyielding subterranean bunker. But nothing is more unyielding than Nanami\'s blade.
After entering the bunker and walking for some time, you emerge into a vast open space.
[Nanami]: The Heteromer Forest has already spread over Kowloong...

Title: Event Story - Stellar Witching Hour → Before Departure Quiet Depths (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Deep in the cosmos, stars scatter across the infinite void.
[Nanami]: Phew—Finally back! Nanami thinks the enemies in the simulations are getting tougher and tougher.
[Nanami]: Hmm... Maybe! Just to be safe, let\'s feed our "The Big Eater" some more plugins!

Title: Event Story - Stellar Witching Hour → Final Destination Quiet Depths (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
As the battle draws to a close, Nanami leaps forward with a decisive slash and slashes down the last charging mechanoid.
The once chaotic battlefield falls silent. In the depths of this dark space, only a massive central computer emits a dim, mysterious glow.
Nanami steps forward and connects herself to the computer\'s cables, establishing a direct link.

Title: Event Story - Stellar Witching Hour → Before Departure Endless Winter (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Deep in the cosmos, stars scatter across the infinite void.
[Nanami]: Eeek—that tunnel was super dark and dead silent! Nanami felt super creeped out!
Nanami shrugs and inputs the commands for another simulation into the terminal.

Title: Event Story - Stellar Witching Hour → Final Destination Endless Winter (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Huaxu?]: Invasion protocol executed. Babylonia will crash-land in ■■ hours as planned.
[Huaxu?]: Invasion protocol executed. Babylonia...
After several exchanges with Nanami, the Huaxu-like enemy gradually weakens and eventually collapses into lifeless silence.

Title: Event Story - Stellar Witching Hour → Before Departure Forest Marsh (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Deep in the cosmos, stars scatter across the infinite void.
[Nanami]: Phew—we\'re getting closer to beating this thing!
[Nanami]: You\'ve been playing with Nanami for so long, Commandant. Are you getting tired?

Title: Event Story - Stellar Witching Hour → Final Destination Forest Marsh (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The Heteromer Forest sprawls across the horizon. While searching for an exit, the two discover a camp in the desolate wilderness.
Firewood lies scattered around the campfire stand, and various supplies are strewn haphazardly outside the tent—all signs point to this being a makeshift shelter.
[Nanami]: Hey—! Is anyone here?!

Title: Event Story - Stellar Witching Hour → Before Departure Purge Pact (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Deep in the cosmos, stars scatter across the infinite void.
[Nanami]: Commandant, look, look—
Beyond the porthole, the once-distorted galaxy begins to regain some semblance of order.

Title: Event Story - Stellar Witching Hour → Final Destination Purge Pact (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: Hi-yah!
Facing the final wave of enemies, Nanami charges at full throttle, grips her shield-axe tightly, and swings it to unleash an arc of electricity—
[Nanami]: Nanami Cyclone!

Title: Event Story - Stellar Witching Hour → Before Departure Dim Light of the End (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Deep in the cosmos, stars scatter across the infinite void.
[Nanami]: ...Commandant?
You hear Nanami calling you from nearby shortly after you\'ve made it out of the Dimension Domain.

Title: Event Story - Stellar Witching Hour → Final Destination Dim Light of the End (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The two of you arrive at your journey\'s end, where a shimmering light marking the exit pulses at the heart of the mountain base.
From their vantage point on the mountain, a towering spire looms in the distance, both majestic and unsettling in its presence—
It stands imperious beneath the night sky, its eerie crimson glow staining both the clouds and the darkness alike, casting an oppressive shroud over the entire planet.

Title: Event Story - Stellar Witching Hour → Before Departure Beyond the Cosmos (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
In the shimmering chaos, stars blaze with blinding brilliance, erupting with waves of radiant light.
[Nanami]: —Commandant—!!
Nanami screams out, but her voice is too faint to create even the slightest ripple in the vast expanse of the cosmos.

Title: Event Story - Stellar Witching Hour → Final Destination Beyond the Cosmos (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: —Commandant!
The shackles shatter with a thunderous crash, as the barriers before you crumble and dissolve, revealing a rift in their wake.
In that instant, Nanami leaps through the rift, arms spread wide to embrace you.

Title: Festival Story - Night on Christmas → Different Plans (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Based on the calendar used by humanity in the past, we\'re approaching the "Winter Solstice".
[Liv]: The so-called "Winter Solstice" means the end of autumn and the beginning of winter. It\'s also when Earth reaches its closest proximity to the sun, with sunlight shining directly on the Tropic of Capricorn.
[Liv]: This day will be the shortest day of the year—

Title: Festival Story - Night on Christmas → Mysterious Helper (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Cough. Back to the matter at hand. Now that the time and place have been decided, we need to come up with a detailed plan.
[Lee]: If we\'re going to plan for Christmas, we need to know what to prepare. We should be able to find information on past holidays in our database.
[Lucia]: I always used our database to research about engineering tech. I didn\'t know you\'d be interested in that kind of a thing, Lee.

Title: Festival Story - Night on Christmas → Operation Begins (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The severe winter in the far north approaches on the edge of the night sky, but the snowflakes have yet to arrive.
Tonight will usher in Christmas Eve. Everyone who has just completed the recon mission waits in anticipation...
Everyone in Gray Raven is looking to enjoy the festivity in the air.

Title: Festival Story - Night on Christmas → Operation Begins (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Commandant...
[Liv]: Commandant...?
[Liv]: Commandant... Something feels off. Quit leading me on.

Title: Festival Story - Night on Christmas → Lumberjack (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: Lalala! Lalala! It\'s me, Lumberjack Nanami! Chopping trees in the snow flurry!
[Nanami]: One swing! I sing! This weather makes me so happy!
Rustle—Crack—Timber—

Title: Festival Story - Night on Christmas → Lumberjack (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
(Static)
[Lucia]: ...About time. Finally got a hold of you...
[Nanami]: Lucia! Lucia! I\'ve finished up here! I\'m on my way back!

Title: Festival Story - Night on Christmas → Super Christmas Tree (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: Whoa, whoa, whoa... Wait a second. This was your idea, Lucia?
[Lucia]: I...
[Lee]: Sigh... This is turning into a disaster.

Title: Festival Story - Night on Christmas → Operation Christmas (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
From then on, Liv joins the others in "Operation Christmas".
What started off as an effort to cheer up Liv, is now a team effort to create their very first Christmas together.
Their temporary base is an ordinary abandoned building located in the northern region of what was once Russia.

Title: Festival Story - Night on Christmas → Lone Wolf (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
PheeEEeeeewWWW—
(The frigid wind continues to howl outside.)
[Karenina]: Why do those guys get to celebrate Christmas in a warm and cozy house, while I have to deal with these puny Corrupted out here in the cold?!

Title: Festival Story - Night on Christmas → Fireworks and Presents (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: I heard fireworks!
[Lucia]: Not bad, Karenina!
[Liv]: Oh, so you sent Karenina? I\'ll have to thank her for all her hard work.

Title: Festival Story - Night on Christmas → Merry Christmas! (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: Alright. Commandant, Liv, get into position.
[Lee]: 3, 2, 1—
(Crash!)

Title: Festival Story - Sea of Stars → Christmas Tree Dress-up Time (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: What... what\'s going on?
Walking into the lounge, Liv finds the Gray Raven resting area filled with people in uniforms labeled "World Government Association of Art."
The staff-attired personnel walk in and out of the room, carrying boxes of various sizes. A gorgeous-looking Construct in pink walks up.

Title: Festival Story - Sea of Stars → Star of Bethlehem Returns! (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Chrome]: Oh, Commandant, here you are.
[Chrome]: Sorry for bothering you... I\'m just wondering if you\'ve seen Kamui anywhere?
[Chrome]: Oh, in that case... Thank you very much, I\'ll look somewhere else.

Title: Festival Story - Sea of Stars → Special Comms (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: Haaaargh!
[Corrupted]: —
Kamui\'s greatsword swings wildly inside the crowd of enemies, bashing the corrupted into the air.

Title: Festival Story - Sea of Stars → Oasis Flower (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Watanabe]: Another batch of materials scrapped?
[Forsaken Member A]: Yes, sir. Even with the support from Akdilek, we\'re still unable to avoid this plight.
[Watanabe]: ...This is just the way it is. They were devices deployed long ago, after all. See if you can recycle anything from the stash.

Title: Festival Story - Sea of Stars → Best Partners (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Karenina]: What? Did you guys forget breakfast?
[Karenina]: Start listening to me and swing your weapon like this, not that!
[Construct]: Like this?

Title: Festival Story - Sea of Stars → Kids Taking Over (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Sophia]: ...I\'m swinging.
[Changyu]: Feels good standing on the bow, doesn\'t it? I\'m not feeling any wind, though. Can we get the captain to speed the ship up a little bit?
[Sophia]: ...I\'m swinging.

Title: Festival Story - Sea of Stars → Meeting Eden (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Hassen]: Celica, I heard the preparation of the Christmas Eve gala is coming along smoothly?
[Celica]: It is, but the number of squads available to attend that day is...
[Hassen]: Well, times like this... We still have to make a proper showing even if we aren\'t getting as many attendees. Let those who\'ll be there enjoy themselves to the fullest.

Title: Festival Story - Sea of Stars → Whisper from the Stars (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Commandant, we\'ll have to stay overnight here for our mission. Is that alright?
[Lucia]: Then I\'ll go prepare our camp with Lee and Liv.
[Lucia]: It\'s been a few days of long travels, hasn\'t it? I can\'t provide a mattress, but maybe you can rest more comfortably if you rest your head on my legs...

Title: Festival Story - Ring in the New Year → Fresh New Blessing (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Aside from the noise of machinery, several soft coughs intermittently punctuate the silence within the laboratory.
[Allen]: Cough...
As the president of WGAA, Allen rarely visits the laboratory of the Science Council. The strong odor of various reagents and electronic components are more pungent than expected. He finds it hard to imagine how people can tolerate staying in such a place for long periods of time.

Title: Festival Story - Ring in the New Year → Day XX, A Reunion (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
As the Lunar New Year approaches, frigid winter wind blows dust and rocks across the desert wasteland. But to Constructs, it poses no issue if only the occasional inconvenience of clearing the dust out of their ventilation systems.
As for the Forsaken soldiers, the frigid wind bites at the exposed skin of their tightly bundled up faces. Even so, no one dares to risk adjusting their collars.
[Watanabe]: Squads, report in... Starting with the patrol.

Title: Festival Story - Ring in the New Year → Unknown Discovery (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Corrupted]: Rargh—!!! Argh!!
[???]: Ahhhhhhh... Help!
The hiss of the Corrupted entwines with the young girl\'s scream. Encountering Corrupted in a dark and narrow underground passage was akin to falling prey to a hunter\'s trap. In other words—there is no escape.

Title: Festival Story - Farewell to the Past Year → Mission Alone (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The research laboratory is as deserted as ever, save for the cold, uncaring glow of a small display, where digits skip and change in the corner of the room.
In front of the display is Asimov, his head in his arms on the table. Next to him is a cup of cold coffee and a sandwich untouched for way too long.
"New Year" is approaching, according to the traditional lunar calendar.

Title: Festival Story - Farewell to the Past Year → A Special Day (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The supply transfer has been arranged after the routine security check at the outpost to conceal the actual objective of this operation.
The desert in winter is still remarkably arid. The sea of yellow sand in front of you has not changed apart from the cooling weather.
Your vehicle raises a fog of dust as it glides through the desert, and the sand dispersed in the air like a fleeting cloud.

Title: Festival Story - Farewell to the Past Year → The Forsaken and the Children (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You follow Watanabe\'s lead to an emptier spot of the camp.
The children you saw running before are now gathered there, keeping busy among themselves.
Watanabe slows down his pace, and you are confused about what he is intending.

Title: Festival Story - Farewell to the Past Year → The Forsaken and the Children (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Patrol Leader]: Sir, the fight here\'s over...
[Guard Leader]: But is it really a good idea to take advantage of their tests to get Babylonia\'s new device to help clear out the Corrupted nearby?
[Watanabe]: Who gives a damn? They wanted authentic, accurate data—nothing beats data from a real fight.

Title: Festival Story - Farewell to the Past Year → Battle under Fireworks (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Making the lanterns is unexpectedly difficult. You have been so used to the comforts in your daily life that a simple crafting work such as this is proving to be quite challenging.
[Xiuyong]: You\'re so slow... Are you really some kind of big shot in Babylonia?
With your pride on the line, you have at least managed to finish your lantern before the three children completely lose their patience.

Title: Festival Story - Farewell to the Past Year → Battle under Fireworks (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
By the time the last Corrupted is defeated, the celebration inside the Forsaken camp is already coming to a close.
[Guard Leader]: Reporting, Sir! We\'ve finished inspecting, and there is only minimal damage to the camp with no casualties. No one has even noticed the Corrupted were here.
[Watanabe]: Hmm... How about the Babylonian? We\'re in trouble if our supplier gets injured...

Title: Festival Story - Farewell to the Past Year → Another Journey (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Despite your repeat requests to stay at the Forsaken headquarters, Watanabe still insists on departing as scheduled—and so the supply run that helps cover the data collecting mission is also coming to an end.
For some reason, Watanabe takes the wheel of the vehicle and drives.
[Watanabe]: The next part is up to you guys.

Title: Festival Story - Farewell to the Past Year → Suspicious Marks (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
—Babylonia Outpost.
Watanabe departed a while ago due to his allegiance, while the people you are meeting have already arrived at the outpost, according to the message you received.
The headlights from your vehicle light up the entrance to the outpost, and you find two female Constructs standing there, waiting for you.

Title: Festival Story - Farewell to the Past Year → The Besieged Girl (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The city you are walking through is eerily silent. All you can hear is the snowfall and the wind howling.
[Bianca]: We are close, Commandant.
[Bianca]: It\'s already the middle of the night. I\'m not sure if you are accustomed to the temperature. And the continuous battles... must be weighing on you.

Title: Festival Story - Farewell to the Past Year → The Besieged Girl (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Your fight is over. Once Nanami realizes who she is fighting, she immediately stops.
To your surprise, the small machines also flee without putting up a fight.
Nobody notices, however, that during your chase, the tiny tracking device in the pocket of the jacket Watanabe gave you had fallen on the ground, lost without a trace.

Title: Festival Story - Farewell to the Past Year → Forgotten Gift (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The Forsaken Headquarters. Midnight.
With the help of his crew, Watanabe safely returns to the Forsaken campsite.
Greeting him there are the Forsaken soldiers and the three children who were sleeping.

Title: Festival Story - Farewell to the Past Year → Operation "Red Envelope" (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Reluctantly, you have all decided to travel with Nanami.
You follow her to an abandoned mall inside City 015, where fallen shelves and items have scattered all over the place. Yet, there is a certain order to it, as if someone has briefly cleaned up the area.
[Nanami]: They\'re my new discovery here!

Title: Festival Story - Farewell to the Past Year → Operation "Red Envelope" (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Karenina]: Alright, alright—these should be enough. Can you tell us your classified information already? By the way, isn\'t this...
[Bianca]: Right, I seem to recall... They\'re "red envelopes," aren\'t they?
[Nanami]: That\'s correct! You\'re looking at it—Nanami\'s secret weapon!

Title: Festival Story - Farewell to the Past Year → Gray Raven's "Rescue" (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: Are we still not connecting to Commandant\'s comms?
[Liv]: (Nods) Commandant\'s location has stopped at the edge of City 015, 16 degrees away from the designated route.
[Liv]: Lucia... should we...

Title: Festival Story - Farewell to the Past Year → Battle for "Xi" (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bianca]: ...
[Karenina]: ...
All of you surround the small hill of red envelopes piled in the middle of the abandoned mall in silence.

Title: Festival Story - Farewell to the Past Year → New Year for Everyone (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: Shh—shh—
Nanami gently pats Xi\'s head in the middle of the hall.
[Nanami]: It\'s alright... It\'s alright now.

Title: Festival Story - Poisson d'Avril → Sleeping Beauty (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
...
When you open your eyes, you do not find your trusty ol\' ceiling greeting you. Instead, all you see is darkness.
You cannot remember a single thing. You only know that you cannot move even an inch.

Title: Festival Story - Poisson d'Avril → Little Red Cap (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[System]: ...Establishing connection...
[System]: Connected.
...

Title: Festival Story - Poisson d'Avril → Little Red Cap (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: I\'ve searched for quite a while, Commandant. I am certain that you are not in this area.
[Lucia]: ...!
[Lucia]: The power of my frame is dropping. I think the connection is breaking off.

Title: Festival Story - Poisson d'Avril → Two Musketeers (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[System]: ...Establishing connection...
[System]: Connected.
...

Title: Festival Story - Poisson d'Avril → Ali Baba (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[System]: ...
[System]: Connected.
[Corrupted]: —! —!

Title: Festival Story - Poisson d'Avril → The Three Little Pigs (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[System]: Connected.
...
[Liv]: You surrenderin\' or not? This big fella is a hard hitter.

Title: Festival Story - Poisson d'Avril → Puss in Boots (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[System]: Connected.
...
The tall blonde female Construct is looking unusually anxious. Her long and thin fingers are resting next to her ear, but not touching the hair.

Title: Festival Story - Poisson d'Avril → Pinocchio (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[System]: Connected.
...
[Nanami]: —Tsk. You connected to me after all.

Title: Festival Story - Poisson d'Avril → Daughter of the Ocean (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[System]: Connected.
...
[Watanabe]: ■■■■■, is this the right place?

Title: Festival Story - Poisson d'Avril → The Prince (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Just when the Musashi unit is about to catch you, you see a blade flashing past, slashing the Musashi in half.
The one who protected you was the Corrupted that had to run away from you, right at the beginning of this whole drama.
You see a familiar expression in the Corrupted\'s eyes, strong, unwavering, and reminding you of someone.

Title: Festival Story - Poisson d'Avril → Happy April Fools' Day! (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You see darkness once again when you are forcefully disconnected.
But you can hear someone calling for you eagerly in the trembling darkness.
[???]: Commandant... Commandant!

Title: Festival Story - Poisson d'Avril → Sky Lord Celica (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
I was never given a choice.
Everything had been planned ever since I was born.
Then came the virus outbreak. Most humans fled into the deep space of the universe.

Title: Festival Story - Weirdlands Adventure → Day of Crisis (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
To both humans and Constructs, Babylonia is the only remaining sanctuary in the world.
The ever-present threat of the Punishing Virus and the Corrupted on the surface of Earth cannot reach this fortress in the orbit... but if even this bastion of humanity is no longer safe—
Fear...

Title: Festival Story - Weirdlands Adventure → Mysterious Guest (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: H-E-L-L-O, Gray Ravens! Here comes Nanami!
Nanami barges into the Gray Raven lounge with grandeur before realizing that only Liv is there.
[Nanami]: Hmm? Liv, are you the only one here? Where are the others?

Title: Festival Story - Weirdlands Adventure → Rabbit Running Late (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
To follow bugged bunny, Nanami rushes into the hidden dimension without thinking twice.
[Nanami]: Eh?!
Although it is still the ground underneath her feet and the simulated sky above her head, Nanami\'s senses are clearly under some strange effects, almost causing her to fall over.

Title: Festival Story - Weirdlands Adventure → Rabbit Running Late (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Although Nanami cannot tell why the hat-wearing program would try to help her, she has still managed to get rid of the odd-behaving programs, and she races toward the exit of the anomaly.
Despite being prepared, Nanami still loses her balance from the different sensory inputs of the two areas as she crosses the barrier.
[Nanami]: Uwah! Not again?!

Title: Festival Story - Weirdlands Adventure → Colorful Wrap (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: Aargh! Nanami is so mad!
Nanami has been sulking since she returned from the virtual space. She lies on a recliner in the Gray Raven lounge, bored and aimless.
[Nanami]: The Gray Ravens and Commandant are still not back... Waiting here is so boring...

Title: Festival Story - Weirdlands Adventure → Lies and Friends (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: The one we\'ve been waiting for... She has finally arrived in the free world.
[???]: Our kind shall bend our knees no more. Our kind shall be acknowledged.
[???]: Wait until she returns. She will return.

Title: Festival Story - Weirdlands Adventure → Tea Party for the Mad (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Chrome moves his limbs around after entering the virtual space. He looks around the place, intrigued by its similar yet distinct views with Babylonia.
[Chrome]: This is my first time connecting to Gestalt... through this way, nonetheless.
[Chrome]: Right, I hope this doesn\'t bring you any troubles in the future.

Title: Festival Story - Weirdlands Adventure → Collapsed Tower (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: Commandant—Commandant...!
You slowly open your eyes, and the white light gradually fades away like snowflakes, indicating that you are still inside the virtual space.
[Lucia (?)]: NO, I\'m NOT Lucia...

Title: Festival Story - Weirdlands Adventure → Wonderland (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: Let Nanami go immediately! My friends in the real world are waiting for me to return!
Pouting, Nanami swings her chainsaw around, and all the abnormal programs dare not approach her.
[Queen Program]: Our kind must obtain physical bodies before Gestalt removes us. We will replace the arrogant Constructs\' minds and become whole.

Title: Festival Story - Weirdlands Adventure → Wonderland (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Although the Queen Program has been defeated, she does not seem to have taken any damage. You barely see a scratch on her.
[Queen Program]: Your ridiculous struggle will not prevail—this is my domain! I am its soverign!
The Queen Program raises her hand, and Lucia and the group are all frozen. Not only can they not pick up their weapons, they cannot even move a single step.

Title: Festival Story - Weirdlands Adventure → The Fools' Future (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: All affected areas repaired. Anomaly completely blocked.
[Nanami]: (Nods)
[???]: Highest safety defense level reset. Algorithm corrected. Theoretically, a backdoor similar to the last one is no longer possible.

Title: Festival Story - Moonlit Night → Contract (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Pulao]: Welcome to the Nighter!
[Pulao]: Liven up! I promise it\'s a vacation this time.
You find yourself back on the Nighter after a recent call.

Title: Festival Story - Moonlit Night → Moonlit Night (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You are still seeing couples everywhere on the Nighter deep into the night.
With an assortment of tools in their hands, they gather together as if to make something.
[Liv]: What is everyone doing?

Title: Festival Story - Moonlit Night → The Stage (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
All of you have brought your crafts with you when you meet again.
[Pulao]: Let me see... Woah, they look amazing!
[Changyu]: Excellent, it can surely pass the pre-selection. Come, this way.

Title: Festival Story - Moonlit Night → The Stage (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After defeating the mechanical guards, a large number of grubs pour out of their bellies and pile up all over the stage.
[Pulao]: Ah... all the money... gone...
She falls to the ground, defeated.

Title: Festival Story - Moonlit Night → Summer Night Recollection (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The night after everything has ended—
With the rising of the moon, the crowd also ebbs back to their rooms.
Leaving only a lone silhouette in a mountain of materials, tinkering away at something.

Title: Festival Story - Moonlit Night → Summer Night Recollection (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The incapacitated service robots fall flat on the floor, but even while trembling, they kept the drinks in the glasses unspilled.
[Service Bot]: Please... taste-test... new...
They still have yet to give up, but their broken joints deny them from standing up.

Title: Festival Story - Fist of the Taoist → The Beginning (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Message]: Gray Raven, here is the routine dispatch for your ground operation. We have left several supply crates on your planned route.
[Message]: There are serums, repair kits, and spare parts in these crates. I\'m sure they will be helpful in your upcoming fights.
[Message]: Although I should end this message now with a typical "bon voyage"...

Title: Festival Story - Fist of the Taoist → Illusive Gray Raven (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: This area is bigger than I thought, now that we\'ve got a map from Foreman...
[Lucia]: It\'s also divided into clearly-defined zones. I wonder how many mechanoids have gathered here.
[Lee]: My initial estimation is over a thousand of them. After all, maintaining a hologram of this scale must involve an enormous amount of recon drones.

Title: Festival Story - Fist of the Taoist → Entropy Counting (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: That\'s one trial passed... but now we\'ve got more questions.
[Lee]: That\'s right. I thought it would just be a normal key, but I wasn\'t expecting a portrait on it.
[Liv]: Do you think it means anything?

Title: Festival Story - Fist of the Taoist → Spirit Walker (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: Frankly, I can\'t tell how that trial is related to wisdom at all.
[Lucia]: But it was pretty fun as an activity. Liv and I were guessing along as well.
[Lee]: ...Were all the gesturings you guys were doing just you trying to solve the puzzles?

Title: Festival Story - Fist of the Taoist → Spirit Walker (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[West General]: UUUUGGHH, how is it that you\'ve defeated me, the West General?!
[West General]: AAAAGGHHH!
He has not actually fought you, but the West General poses weirdly after Lucia has passed the trial to demonstrate his defeat.

Title: Festival Story - Fist of the Taoist → Last Fight (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Is this where the last trial takes place?
[North General]: What a surprise to find you before me... Have you defeated those feeble Generals of the East, South, and West?
[North General]: Huh, balanced? You\'ve seen nothing when all you\'ve done is solving riddles.

Title: Festival Story - Fist of the Taoist → The End (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Mechanoid A]: So powerful... so impressive!
[Mechanoid B]: Those are the outsiders, aren\'t they? This is my first time seeing one!
After passing all the trials, you arrive at an open space with barely any decorations, and in the center is a familiar-looking crate.

Title: Festival Story - Endless Summer Blue → Endless Summer (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
It should have been an ordinary summer afternoon.
Gray Raven completed their mission ahead of schedule, but there are still three hours to go until they have to rendezvous with the other teams.
Everyone sits in the shade of the temporary base, looking up at the solemn sky with a slight sense of relief.

Title: Festival Story - Endless Summer Blue → Moment of Softness (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Regaining consciousness from deep within your mind, you find yourself lying on a white sand beach.
[Lucia]: ...Commandant!
You gently lift your head to see Lucia looking at you nervously.

Title: Festival Story - Endless Summer Blue → Past Shard (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The next morning, a strange aroma rouses you from sleep. You open your eyes to find yourself in a completely different area from last night.
You call out for Lucia, but you get no response.
Looking around, you do not see anything peculiar aside from a magnificent palace.

Title: Festival Story - Endless Summer Blue → Azure Bubbles (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: I\'ve detected someone... or something with immense Punishing Virus concentration 1.3km south of here!
[Liv]: This level of concentration... It can\'t be a normal Corrupted...
[Lee]: Let\'s go check it out.

Title: Festival Story - Endless Summer Blue → Azure Bubbles (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
As Roland retreats under the four Gray Ravens\' coordinated attack, the augmented reality around him begins to fade, pulling back the curtain.
[Roland]: It\'s too late.
[Roland]: Gray Ravens... More like Gray Cockroaches.

Title: Festival Story - Commandant's Day → Colorful Feelings (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Chrome]: ...Right, that\'s everything summarized. We\'ve gone through all of the key points regarding the squad-based fire and movement tactic. Anything you want to add, Commandant?
[Chrome]: I\'m flattered. It really was the clarity of your thought process that made it easy.
[Chrome]: Is that so? You\'re quite wisecracking sometimes, Commandant.

Title: Festival Story - Fortune of Spring → End-of-the-Year Invitation (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Celica]: ...That\'s all for today. Any more questions, Captains and Commandants?
The simulated sky outside has turned dark long ago, but the large meeting room is brightened up by ceiling lights. The meeting invite indicated it was a "short meet-up," but it lasted way longer than that unsurprisingly.
[Celica]: Any questions at all?

Title: Festival Story - Fortune of Spring → The Invention of Tiger (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: Rawr... Meow...
[Liv]: It\'s okay. Don\'t be scared.
[Liv]: Lucia and Lee didn\'t mean to harm you. They were just too anxious.

Title: Festival Story - Fortune of Spring → Charm of the New World (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You cannot see, hear, smell, taste or touch anything. But your thoughts have expanded beyond infinite distance.
You feel like a speck of dust in space. Or, every single speck of space dust is you.
As you roam around, you see a glow—

Title: Festival Story - Fortune of Spring → Spring Cleaning (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
More wooden signs show up every few meters. The messages on them also keep changing.
"Turn left here. Don\'t get it wrong."
"Red means stop, green means go... Run! Now!"

Title: Festival Story - Fortune of Spring → Spring Cleaning (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The cleaning is actually very easy. After the last ball disappears, the walls no longer deteriorate, and the pagoda tree has stopped withering.
In fact—
[Liv]: It\'s so shiny now.

Title: Festival Story - Fortune of Spring → Spring Festival Couplets (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Hunger... It does feel like that.
[Lucia]: Constructs don\'t need to eat. I have long forgotten how hunger feels.
[Lucia]: Still, I don\'t understand why Nanami is doing this.

Title: Festival Story - Fortune of Spring → Stove God Worshipping (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The three familiar Constructs soon left after you paid with the coins found in the arcade.
But no matter how hard you try, you cannot seem to paste the couplets on the door frame. It is already your fifth attempt.
As you reach to the sticky tape, someone hands it over in advance.

Title: Festival Story - Fortune of Spring → Stove God Worshipping (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The revived ingredients are soon dismantled, but the kitchen—which has been reduced to "scorched earth," literally—is not recovered.
[Karenina (?)]: You have some use after all. Now I have received enough offerings.
[Stove God]: Hmph, it\'s me! The mighty Stove God!

Title: Festival Story - Fortune of Spring → Couplets Decorating (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The dishes prepared by Stove God not only look delicate, but also taste great. She must have had professional training.
Even Lucia has stopped being gloomy and started tasting them while jotting down notes every now and then.
[Lucia]: Hmm... This chicken soup probably has these ingredients.

Title: Festival Story - Fortune of Spring → Couplets Decorating (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Door God 1]: These things are weak, but they just keep coming.
[Door God 2]: If you have the time to bark, just fight harder. Monsters have gone through.
[Door God 1]: What? I\'m not slacking... Hey, Door God 3! Don\'t fall asleep!

Title: Festival Story - Fortune of Spring → Staying Up (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The entire world is spinning around you. You feel like clothes in the washing machine being tumble dried.
You never thought you would relate to your combat suit one day.
You lost track of time. Finally, you feel solid ground under your feet.

Title: Festival Story - Fortune of Spring → Staying Up (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Night Keeper]: Hmm, these should suffice.
[Red Envelope Distributor]: Squeak...
[Liv]: Sorry...

Title: Festival Story - Fortune of Spring → Ringing Out the Old Year (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A gigantic red machine charges at you.
[Nian]: Rargh!!
[Lucia]: You shall not pass.

Title: Festival Story - Fortune of Spring → Ringing Out the Old Year (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nian]: Eek!
Nian makes one last howl and collapses into the rainbow colors. The fireworks light up the night sky, filling the surroundings with warm light.
[Night Keeper]: Nian has been defeated. Looks like we have another good year ahead.

Title: Festival Story - Fortune of Spring → Ringing in the New Year (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
With Liv\'s help, you finally put on this slightly bulky equipment.
[Liv]: How do you feel, Commandant?
[Lee]: Better than frostbite.

Title: Festival Story - Fortune of Spring → Ringing in the New Year (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You manage to follow the voices and find everyone, but it is still dark. It is near impossible to find the way out with Polar Soldier\'s weak light.
Besides—
[Lucia]: No.

Title: Festival Story - Fortune of Spring → Happy Spring Festival (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
It didn\'t last as long as the first time. Soon, you regain vision.
[Lucia]: Commandant, you\'re awake.
Lucia and others seem to have waken up earlier. They are standing around Tiger, while Lee is holding a device running some checks.

Title: Festival Story - White Wishes → Celebration (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
When the cabin door of the transport craft opens, what comes into view does not seem to conform to your impression of a conservation area.
Looking down from the landing pad at the valley below, you see hundreds of stalls glimmering in the sun, densely packed in the plaza near the Central Purification Filter.
The stalls with colorful roofs depict the bustling scene of a festival market, crowded with people and goods.

Title: Festival Story - White Wishes → Star Ticket (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Inside the Exhibition Hall.
Despite the shabby exterior, the residents have decorated the interior of the temporarily erected building to the best extent of their abilities.
All kinds of colored lights and ribbons hang from the rafters, wood panels pave the floor, and various flowers and plants are placed in every corner.

Title: Festival Story - White Wishes → Treasure Hunter (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: Why are you coming with me?
After setting a time to meet up, Lee decides to go on a scavenger hunt held throughout the venue. According to the introduction, first place wins a bunch of Star Tickets.
You point at the flyer.

Title: Festival Story - White Wishes → Treasure Hunter (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: This is the last one.
Your team\'s strategy of maintaining constant communication seems to be almost on par with the Engineering Force, even with the help of their thrusters.
Only one component remains.

Title: Festival Story - White Wishes → Sound of Flowers (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The celebration is nearing its end, but people are still brimming with excitement. The vibe in the market continues to become more lively.
The vibrant lights along the winding streets and alleys are like fireflies along the riverside late at night, complementing the glorious sky above.
Having been brewing all day, the atmosphere of White Day has finally reached its climax.

Title: Festival Story - White Wishes → Parent-Child Game (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Where to next, Commandant?
[Liv]: Okay. We haven\'t done anything together in a while, Commandant.
[Liv]: Want to go walk around?

Title: Festival Story - White Wishes → The Orphan (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Although this is only one small goal: win a commemoration award and then stop...
But even then, you managed to get third place.
After having so much fun with Liv and Ellie, you hardly realize that the event is about to end.

Title: Festival Story - White Wishes → Aroma of the Moment (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: ...
Walking through the bustling market, Lucia carefully observes her surroundings.
Aside from vendors selling goods, the organizers have also arranged a variety of activities during the celebration to give away tons of Star Tickets.

Title: Festival Story - White Wishes → A Bite of Warmth (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
As time passes on, the vendors begin to pick up shop. However, the market is still full of people who are now exchanging gifts they had prepared for their sweethearts.
These gifts may be for confessions of love...
Or gratitude for long-lasting friendship...

Title: Festival Story - White Wishes → A Bite of Warmth (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: I did it. Want to give it a try, Commandant?
Lucia hands you a bag of freshly popped popcorn.
The taste of black pepper spreads throughout your mouth, complementing the aroma of popcorn. Although it\'s different from the traditionally sweet taste, you still find it delicious.

Title: Festival Story - Dumplings and Dragons → Demon's Screenplay (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The morning breeze has swayed the flowers and scattered their petals.
In contrast to the tranquility surrounding them, those standing in the center of the flower field are in a tense confrontation.
[Ayla]: Critical success! The gravity suction spell worked. Let me see who\'s the unlucky one.

Title: Festival Story - Dumplings and Dragons → World of the Brave (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Ayla]: The warm wind has brought you a message. Across the rain, in the hidden Realm of Dragons...
[Ayla]: Once sealed, the Ancient Triangle is now lost...
Lee turns on his terminal to simulate tactics and take records.

Title: Festival Story - Dumplings and Dragons → Sorcerer's Plan (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
It is a very ordinary tile roof. Basic, simple, with no decorations.
With the wizard\'s help, Gray Raven members have now transformed into their childhood looks, lying prone side-by-side on top of the roof.
Ten minutes ago, the Travelling Wizard was made speechless when he saw the crates full of bamboo leaves.

Title: Festival Story - Dumplings and Dragons → Chaos of the Capital (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Ayla gives her room a quick clean-up, then sits back and awakes her terminal.
She stares at the screen as the game world\'s time flows. She did her best to reconstruct the elements of this world—for example, the sea breeze that was blowing the sand—based on past records and documents.
[Ayla]: Alright, time to keep working. I was the one who invited them after all.

Title: Festival Story - Dumplings and Dragons → Plot Twist (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Dungeon Master Ayla]: There\'s a crossing ahead...
[Teddy]: We take a left turn, then turn to the right and move forward all the way till the end of the square.
[Kamui]: I no longer see any soldiers. Have you already scouted this place?

Title: Festival Story - Dumplings and Dragons → Sage's Confession (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
As Dragon Boat Festival draws near, Gray Raven marches forward on a vast plain and finally arrives at a village near the capital.
It is the eighth village they have been to. When looking beyond the forest in the distance, the majestic buildings of the capital can already be seen.
But right now they have something else to do.

Title: Festival Story - Dumplings and Dragons → Each Other's Trouble (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Inside an ordinary building to the left of the capital gate.
Strike Hawk and the Engineering Force had been trying to leave the game for days, but neither had succeeded.
So they decide to stay undercover around the safe house for the time to come, awaiting an opportunity.

Title: Festival Story - Dumplings and Dragons → Just Borrowing (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After a brief exchange of information, the players begin to discuss their next step in the safe house.
At this moment, Gray Raven already has one of the parts required for the Ancient Triangle, "Soulless Body". The Heroes\' Journal also explains how to get the other two.
[Teddy]: So our priority right now is to find the remaining Twin Souls in the artifact chamber, right?

Title: Festival Story - Dumplings and Dragons → Overlord (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After leaving the capital, the players followed the hand-drawn map in the Heroes\' Journal and reached an area they had never been to.
Lee opens the Heroes\' Journal. Although it is largely unorganized, the information about "Flawless Rope" has been thoughtfully put together.
[Lee]: What the journal says about the rope is... The Overlord of the Unbounded Realm, Leader of the Wings, who established utopia in a land where no gods could see...

Title: Festival Story - Dumplings and Dragons → Overlord (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Celica]: Aha, you lasted longer than I thought.
[Celica]: How about we let the next attack decide everything?
[Celica]: Of course not. I take great pride in this job.

Title: Festival Story - Dumplings and Dragons → Unique Quarrel (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Karenina]: Red... Blue... And here...
[Teddy]: Are you done yet?
[Dungeon Master Ayla]: "Boom!" The distraction caused the runes in Karenina\'s hand to boil. When they finally break away from the constraint, Karenina is engulfed in the dust blown up by the explosion.

Title: Festival Story - Dumplings and Dragons → Realm of Dragons (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You find yourself in a bizarre land, where desolation and prosperity blend together without any transition.
Withered branches stand alongside lush treetops. One moment, you are walking on hard, barren land, but the next instant you are on soft grass. It is impossible to determine where you are with no clear reference points.
[Lee]: No wonder the map here is all a mess...

Title: Festival Story - Dumplings and Dragons → The Last Relic (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The team walks over the empty streets. Shop banners sway in the wind, shaking some dust off. They seem to have been left unattended for a long time.
[Lucia]: Why do I have a strange feeling about this place...
[Lee]: These lamps are all filled with lamp oil. I don\'t think they can last so long without maintenance.

Title: Festival Story - Dumplings and Dragons → The Last Relic (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Realm Guardian]: ...
[Lucia]: Have you calmed down, Mr. Guardian?
[Realm Guardian]: How did you enter this city?

Title: Festival Story - Dumplings and Dragons → Off the Stage (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After bidding farewell to Mr. Door, the team has returned to the place outside the city.
According to Ayla, everyone needs to return to the city or the village to put an end to their hero journey.
[Lucia]: Commandant? What would heroes do after completing their duties?

Title: Festival Story - Dumplings and Dragons → In the Name of the Comrades (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Ayla finished her script. After another round of game, all the players received the WGAA\'s invitation. The project has come to the most crucial part.
It is a very sight in Babylonia. Members from different forces and squads have all gathered in the studio managed by WGAA.
[Lucia]: Noctis, those two lanterns need to be a little higher.

Title: Festival Story - Slumberland → Whispering Forest (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
In the absence of all the usual passersby, the quiet hallway appears more frigid than ever with the cold lights that illuminate the place. Standing alone in the middle of a passageway for a good few moments, you finally remember what you came to do here.
Walking down the same passageway you\'ve taken countless times, you reach a certain office you can\'t be more familiar with before you know it. Right before you press the doorbell, however, you hear a weighty voice coming from inside the room.
[???]: Come on in.

Title: Festival Story - Slumberland → Farewell Wonderland (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Holding on to a dandelion, you and Liv made it across the bubbling swamp...
Making it through the grass maze was almost too easy with Liv\'s scanning radar...
Crossing the rushing river was a breeze, too, with a river crab carrying you on its back...

Title: Festival Story - Slumberland → Blooming Wings (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Dry moss rolls out over the otherwise stony ground, and the trees part to either side to reveal a straight path ahead.
As the river stops flowing, the ripples carry the pumpkin carriage ever so gently to the other side of the riverbank.
The mountains come together without leaving so much as a crack. The place now looks nothing like what it was when you just arrived.

Title: Festival Story - Slumberland → Blooming Wings (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
It\'s been so long since anyone set foot in the cell down at the bottom of the spire, that even the dust in the air has grown stagnant.
Closing her eyes, the soul shard sits quietly in the ruins.
With her wings torn into pieces, she is no longer able to fly.

Title: Festival Story - Once in a Blue Moon → Coming Celebration (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
One day, in Gray Raven\'s lounge.
Having just come back from a mission, Gray Raven is now in the lounge and only needs to leave when they need to collect the ingredients needed to make mooncakes.
Naturally, people huddle up and start writing cards for the Mid-Autumn Festival.

Title: Festival Story - Once in a Blue Moon → Private Letter (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Chrome]: Joint Investigation Headquarters here. Confirmed no sighting of Ayla around the dorm.
[Wanshi]: Are you sure you want to call it that? It sounds like a mouthful to say.
[Nanami]: I think it sounds okay, but if you find it too long... Hold on, I\'m seeing the guys from WGAA collecting people\'s cards.

Title: Festival Story - Once in a Blue Moon → Endless Battle (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Before anyone knows what just happened, Noctis is already on his way dashing toward the pad.
[Vera]: How much longer do we need?
[Noctis]: C\'mon, it ain\'t as easy as it seems!

Title: Festival Story - Once in a Blue Moon → Endless Battle (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
As per schedule, the transport craft is ready for take-off after its temporary layover on the pad.
[Pilot]: Equipment check normal. Self-diagnostic of system normal. No errors found. Path clear. Vulture, ready for t...
Clang!

Title: Festival Story - Once in a Blue Moon → Tug of War (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui, Noctis]: ...
Entering the Quiz Hall, both Noctis and Kamui look worn out.
[Wanshi]: That\'s fast, Kamui... And I take it that Noctis is here under your escort?

Title: Festival Story - Once in a Blue Moon → The Rabbit and the Distant Moon (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Teddy]: So what you\'re saying is that this personal file that the Gray Raven Commandant had has been scanned and saved into WGAA\'s server.
[Teddy]: And that if WGAA doesn\'t have enough people to deliver all the festival cards when the time comes for them to be sent out, they\'ll just send out the electronic copies—along with the content of that personal file, that is.
[Noctis]: ...

Title: Festival Story - Once in a Blue Moon → The Rabbit and the Distant Moon (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Rabbit Robot]: Grab her... Grab her... Grab her...
[WGAA Member B]: Grab her... Grab her... Grab her...
[WGAA Member A]: ...

Title: Festival Story - Once in a Blue Moon → Beloved World (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Pulao]: Heave-ho...
Pulao puts down a box with fireworks where she\'s been instructed to.
[Pulao]: That\'s the fifteenth box. Almost there!

Title: Festival Story - Once in a Blue Moon → Converging Streams (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Teddy]: ...
[WGAA Member]: We just confirmed that all the cards were sent out randomly to people around the world without an opening and closing message.
[Noctis]: People around the world? And that includes people on Earth?

Title: Festival Story - Operation Happy-Go-Lucky → Operation Happy-Go-Lucky (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Inside a room of the WGAA on Babylonia.
With a "Woosh!", Nanami disappears before the box.
Seemingly dissatisfied by having to search the box from the outside, Nanami decides to jump inside instead, hauling something heavy out.

Title: Festival Story - The Night Train on Reunion → Festive Lanterns (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: Told you they\'re just some drunkards. Don\'t sweat it...
[???]: Chiwen just got in touch saying that the night market is going to last for another four hours. Oh boy...
[???]: I say we find a restaurant first and treat ourselves first to something nice and hot...

Title: Festival Story - The Night Train on Reunion → Lantern-Lit Eve (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Clank. Clank...
The train is starting. Passengers, please hold on tight.
...

Title: Festival Story - The Night Train on Reunion → A Journey's End (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
F.O.S. Academy. Please ensure that you have all your personal belongings with you when alighting.
With the door now open, the Gray Ravens step out—and are surprised to see that the "F.O.S. Academy" before them is not as they remember it.
[Liv]: Where exactly is this...?

Title: Festival Story - The Night Train on Reunion → A Journey's End (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Before Liv knows it, a gunshot shatters the Corrupted creeping up on her from behind. In pieces, the Corrupted twitches for a few seconds—before disappearing in a puff of smoke.
You and the rest of Gray Raven are the only ones left now in the virtual Hetero Tower—in addition to the weird train and, of course, the mechanoid that looks on as everything unfolds.
[??]: Commandant!

Title: Festival Story - The Night Train on Reunion → The Show Goes On (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Getting off the train, you now see that it doesn\'t seem to bother Conductor that humans, surprisingly, need to eat.
On the 6:00 am Administrative Avenue now watching the virtual public servants going about their day...
You, Nikola, Allen, and Sica feel every bit as hungry as you usually do in the real world.

Title: Festival Story - The Night Train on Reunion → Past Relived (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: Well done indeed.
Inside the frigid exhibition hall, "Conductor"—whose body has formed from pieces of mechanoids on the floor—trots up to the train\'s door.
Almost complete, its body misses just one last piece now.

Title: Festival Story - The Night Train on Reunion → Festive Spring (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Earlier at Cerberus\' lounge, Babylonia.
[Noctis]: Higher. To the left. Left!
[Noctis]: Say, can\'t you just take your hands out of your damn sleeves?

Title: Festival Story - The Night Train on Reunion → New Day, Old Dreams (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: Are you sure you would like to invest all memory data from the stack?
[???]: Positive.
[???]: Timestamps implemented. Returning to data structure...

Title: Festival Story - The Night Train on Reunion → Candle Vigil (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Earlier at the Science Council, Babylonia.
Every Babylonia citizen has probably heard of the Science Council—of how there is a group of scientists working relentlessly to push the boundary of science. The regular person, however, might go through their life never crossing paths with these scientists they hear about.
So people come up with their own imaginations of these scientists—picturing them, in their lab coats, exchanging opinions on difficult topics, filling up the whiteboard with calculations only at the end to refute them all, and working with all sorts of expensive-looking equipment.

Title: Festival Story - The Night Train on Reunion → Dawn of Spring (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
People often describe time as a river—one down which we all flow, along which we swim toward a future full of uncertainty.
This river has been coursing through the abyss way before humanity and the world itself existed.
And it is now only through this river that humans manage to remember the occasional splashes of water leaping out of the river.

Title: Festival Story - The Night Train on Reunion → Dawn of Spring (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The head of a Corrupted falls to the ground and makes a spin—before it disappears in a puff of smoke.
[Allen]: Knowing these things weren\'t real... didn\'t seem to make them any less disgusting when you see them up close.
[Ayla]: No, Allen. Don\'t even get me started.

Title: Festival Story - The Night Train on Reunion → Let's Eat (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
When you open your eyes again, you see the rest of Gray Raven around you, seemingly flustered.
This seems to have become something of a "ritual"—one that you are put through once every several months.
And it happens to you no matter where you are—be it in your lounge, when you\'re out in ruins, or when you\'re in the bed at Star of Life.

Title: Festival Story - Lost in Whitebloom → Winter Wanderer (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
I had a lucid "dream," where I observed my life as a spectator.
At the beginning, I was left by lonely human beings on the snowfield and became a sister in the church.
In the end, I came back here again as a witch who disobeyed my belief and a lost Corrupted.

Title: Festival Story - Lost in Whitebloom → Hidden Scars (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Renee]: Captain Bianca, your hometown is around here, right?
[Bianca]: Yeah, I know this place. There is a church in the north. It\'s where I grew up.
[Renee]: Well, do you wanna go for a revisit?

Title: Festival Story - Lost in Whitebloom → Hidden Scars (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Renee]: ...You are hurt...
[Bianca]: ...I\'m fine. Don\'t move... Get on the transport vehicle. The transport craft back to Babylonia is still on the way. You need treatment.
Bianca extends her hand to help Renee up, and together, they slowly board the transporter, supporting one another along the way.

Title: Festival Story - Lost in Whitebloom → Snowy Prophecy (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
This mission has been a trap from the very beginning.
A trap set by the defectors for the captain of the Purifying Force, as well as one set by her, aimed at ensnaring the defectors.
Along the way, Bianca strategically divulged the information she had gathered to the individuals she found suspicious, deliberately provoking them to silence her before the intended time.

Title: Festival Story - Lost in Whitebloom → Oath to Death (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After a three-hour journey, you finally rendezvous with Bianca at the ruins, situated not far from the pond.
[Bianca]: Great timing, thank you... Did you come alone?
[Bianca]: Where is Lee? He is not here with you?

Title: Festival Story - Lost in Whitebloom → Oath to Death (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The ragged memories are illuminated one by one by the Phantom Tracer, metamorphosing into lanterns in the chilly night, revealing themselves to the visitors.
[Renee]: This is Renee. I\'m at the designated location. I\'m injured. I request frame repair.
[???]: There is a medical kit in the temporary base. Take care of it yourself.

Title: Festival Story - Lost in Whitebloom → Shadowy Dream (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
