Staying around Bianca as you\'ve been told, you carefully set foot in the church—where she grew up as a child.
[Bianca]: I did and found nothing, and we have a low infection rate here, too. But...
With it, Bianca holds up the Phantom Tracer in her hand, looking disturbed.

Title: Festival Story - Dreams Inscribed → Script Workshop (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The morning sun bestows its gentle touch upon the land. Amidst the blossoming flowers, a girl stands, basking in the radiant glow.
Roaming through the sea of vibrant hues, the hero extends her arms, trying to embrace every tide surrounding her.
...Until Mr. Guardian appears in the distance, standing firm with a sword in hand to confront the hero.

Title: Festival Story - Dreams Inscribed → Sage From Above (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Sophia]: Test, test... All good.
[Sophia]: Is everyone ready?
Sophia scans the room, ensuring to catch everyone\'s nod of confirmation.

Title: Festival Story - Dreams Inscribed → "Old Friend" (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Changyu]: So...
When the squad finally reaches the city, they meet Changyu, who has been waiting for their arrival.
As a member of Akdilek accompanying Sophia to Babylonia, Changyu also became a participant in this game.

Title: Festival Story - Dreams Inscribed → Little Gray Raven (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
During the duty shift of the guards, the group quietly approaches the window of the hero\'s room.
With Changyu\'s assistance, the Gray Ravens successfully get through the window and appear before the hero.
However, what greets them is a scene completely beyond their expectations.

Title: Festival Story - Dreams Inscribed → Sage's Mission (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Sophia]: So, the plan is...?
While you wait for the traveling wizard to emerge from the palace, Sophia arrives at the rendezvous point with a carriage laden with supplies.
Before you have more time to catch up, you notice that the traveling wizard has already set off on his journey alone.

Title: Festival Story - Dreams Inscribed → Flying Ramen (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Young Gatekeeper]: H-hello, please tell me all the contents of your carriage, and an entry fee will be charged accordingly.
[Sophia]: We have four children... uh, six children in total, and accompanying us are two chests of bread, three chests of jewelry, four chests of hunting arrows, and twenty blankets.
[Young Gatekeeper]: So it will... it will be...

Title: Festival Story - Dreams Inscribed → Discovery of Fire (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The carriage wheels emit a rhythmic creak as they traverse the uneven road, steadily making their way forward.
The occasional jolt caused by small rocks prompts a few complaints from those inside, but these grumbles quickly give way to lively banter.
[Kamui]: Capt., can you scoot over a bit more?

Title: Festival Story - Dreams Inscribed → A Long Story (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Teddy]: Can we just buy another carriage...
The limited space within the carriage has grown even more cramped.
With Karenina and Teddy joining your group, Wanshi has to be bound by ropes on top of the carriage to sleep... to keep watch.

Title: Festival Story - Dreams Inscribed → Friends (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
"Bam—!"
A bullet pierces through the monster\'s head.
Upon confirming the demise of the monster, Wanshi lowers his upper body once more.

Title: Festival Story - Dreams Inscribed → Echoes (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Seven days later.
In an empty room at WGAA.
Gathered around an aged projection device, everyone takes a seat on the ground, patiently waiting for the calibration to be done.

Title: Festival Story - Viva la Nina → Entanglement Phenomenon (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Holding your breath, you focus on the drum before you.
Your wrists begin to move almost automatically, aiming to recreate the score in your mind.
Feeling the vibration of the strings, you listen to the melodious sound that follows.

Title: Festival Story - Viva la Nina → Ideal Crystal (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
One week later, in Karenina\'s secret base.
[Karenina]: Hff...
Karenina saunters off the small stage as the last note on her guitar lingers.

Title: Festival Story - Viva la Nina → Geometric Factor (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The streets of Constellia are bustling with people on the first day of the Paradise Festival.
Trinket-selling vendors and temporary amusement rides fill the streets, offering a feast for the eyes.
Furthermore, vacant buildings in the city have been transformed into exhibition halls, accessible even without a ticket.

Title: Festival Story - Viva la Nina → Flame Effect (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The city\'s central exhibition hall, which was taken by Iris Warbler, was built based on structures from different regions. Most of the data inside was removed following Cervantes\' departure.
After confirming there was no valuable information left in the exhibition hall, Babylonia opened it to the Constellia residents as a museum showcasing human and mechanoid art.
During the Paradise Festival, the main hall in the center has been temporarily transformed into a grand stage capable of accommodating thousands.

Title: Festival Story - Viva la Nina → Rising Star (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The sun has already set behind the mountains. On the other side of the horizon, the orange color of dusk gradually gives way to the darkness of night.
The staff and some mechanoids are cleaning the streets as the festive atmosphere has noticeably dwindled from the past few days.
This does not mean the festival has come to an end. On the contrary, it is only reaching its climax after nightfall.

Title: Festival Story - The Destined Surprise → Prologue (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Gray Raven Lounge, Babylonia.
[Lee]: That\'s the entire operational plan. If you have any questions, now\'s the time to ask.
[Lucia]: Regarding the first point, you\'ve explained very clearly why we\'re transitioning from team operations to individual operations, Lee. I have no questions.

Title: Festival Story - The Destined Surprise → With Lucia (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You haven\'t seen Lucia around since the birthday party ended and can\'t help but wonder where she went...
When you\'re back to your senses, you find yourself standing at the door to Lucia\'s resting pod.
[Lucia]: Commandant, is that you? I thought you went to rest already.

Title: Festival Story - The Destined Surprise → With Lee (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: Happy Birthday, Commandant.
[Lee]: I don\'t even know how many times I\'ve said "Happy Birthday" to you, but it\'s weird how I feel differently every time I say it to you.
[Lee]: I\'ve been looking forward to your birthday every year since God only knows when.

Title: Festival Story - The Destined Surprise → With Liv (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
It isn\'t exactly early now. According to your terminal, there is only so much time left until the day ends.
Guess I\'m gonna kick back and relax in the lounge...
[Liv]: Commandant! Quick!

Title: Festival Story - The Destined Surprise → With Sophia (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Swish swish... swish swish...
Focus, hold your breath, and shake the maracas to the rhythm of the music.
Swish swish... swish swish...

Title: Festival Story - The Destined Surprise → With Changyu (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Changyu]: Hey, Commandant, what do you think of my secret base?
Inside a compartment of the Asslam\'s train warehouse, Changyu looks proud as he gives a thumbs-up, pointing to the space behind him.
The place isn\'t exactly spacious but big enough for moving around. It\'s got running water and electricity, a small bed with a cushion, and even a terminal with all sorts of data in the corner.

Title: Festival Story - The Destined Surprise → With Chrome (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You just finished a last-minute meeting with Chrome late at night, and the two of you walk leisurely back to the lounge.
[Chrome]: Our joint operation was completed with high efficiency, so we should be able to rest well now. By the way, today\'s your...
A message suddenly appears on the terminal in your hand. The screen displays a note you have never seen before and a preview of the text.

Title: Festival Story - The Destined Surprise → With Kamui (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You received a message from Kamui that reads, "Will be waiting for you in the lounge. Gotta make time for me today!"
Given Kamui\'s track record of "amazing performances" over the years, it wasn\'t hard for you to guess what kind of surprise would be lying in store for you today.
You put your hand on the doorknob.

Title: Festival Story - The Destined Surprise → With Wanshi (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You replied to Wanshi\'s message and arranged to meet him at this park.
It does not take long before you hear footsteps behind you, and a hand gently pats you on your shoulder.
[Wanshi]: Happy birthday, Commandant.

Title: Festival Story - The Destined Surprise → With Camu (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Camu]: ...Great, no one is in the lounge right now.
[Camu]: Let\'s put the gift over here.
Camu takes out a gift box from his pocket, with a ribbon tied on it in a crooked manner. It looks more like a knot than a bow.

Title: Festival Story - The Destined Surprise → With Karenina (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Karenina]: Don\'t open your eyes just yet.
Sitting on a small sofa in Karenina\'s secret base and surrounded by all sorts of industrial devices, I hear her open a shelf.
Your thoughts drift back to the morning when Karenina appeared around your dorm.

Title: Festival Story - The Destined Surprise → With Luna (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You\'re back in your room—currently brimming with birthday gifts—after a busy day.
Your room\'s lights flicker twice when you\'re done showering. Could be a sign of unstable voltage... but it puts you on alert mode nonetheless because it never happened before.
You continue drying yourself with a towel until the lights flicker again.

Title: Festival Story - The Destined Surprise → With Alpha (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The night up on the snowy mountain is brighter than you thought.
Piercing through the thin clouds, the moonlight falls onto the ground and reflects off the snow, illuminating its surroundings.
When you\'ve climbed over the stacked rocks and through the dense forests and arrived at the summit, the view before you suddenly clears up.

Title: Festival Story - The Destined Surprise → With Roland (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Your consciousness seems to have sunken underwater, your body slowly waking from a long slumber.
Someone gently slaps you on your cheek, the warm touch bringing you some clarity.
In your blurry, dim vision, you see a familiar figure crouched in front of you, his hand waving before your eyes.

Title: Festival Story - The Destined Surprise → With Lamia (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
When the sun sets, the twilight envelops the distant ocean and the waves surge around the rocky reefs.
The sea murmurs as it reflects the lights in the distance. The world is so quiet that only the calls of seabirds can be heard.
No messages, no shouts, no deafening gunfire. Sitting at the edge of the reef with the fishing rod swinging gently in your hand, you\'re lost in the tranquil scenery.

Title: Festival Story - The Destined Surprise → With Watanabe (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Watanabe]: Sorry. Never thought this party would turn out like this when I invited you...
At this very moment, the kitchen table at the Oasis camp is piled high with all sorts of baking ingredients, including wheat flour, flour, and wild berries for decoration.
Watanabe, wearing an apron and holding a homemade frother, has a serious expression with a hint of frustration.

Title: Festival Story - The Destined Surprise → With Ayla (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Ayla]: Hey, there you are! Ready for this year\'s surprise?
The clock just struck 3:00 PM and the artificial sunlight is shining ever so brightly. Seeing you in a hurry, Ayla takes a hop and stops you in your tracks, her hands behind her back.
She has this mischievous glint in her eyes, obviously hiding something behind her back.

Title: Festival Story - The Destined Surprise → With Selena (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The hills are covered in blooming flowers that sway gently in the breeze.
You never thought you\'d see a sight like this during this era.
You arrived at the rendezvous point with Selena\'s letter in your hand. You have been waiting for quite some time now but haven\'t seen her.

Title: Festival Story - The Destined Surprise → With Nanami (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You find yourself stopping in your tracks in a corridor in Babylonia, feeling too scared to take another step forward.
Mostly because something up ahead doesn\'t feel right.
The massive armed mech that stands in the center...

Title: Festival Story - The Destined Surprise → With Haicma (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A cool breeze lifts the dark velvet veil over a small table without a sign at a corner of the shopping street in the early morning.
On the table are sage, crystals, and neatly arranged cards in an arc. On one side sits a mechanoid in white, and on the other, a human.
You place the cards you\'ve drawn from the deck and place them before the mechanoid.

Title: Festival Story - The Destined Surprise → With Hanying (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Hanying\'s Letter]: It\'s been a long time since I last wrote. You have my deepest apologies.
[Hanying\'s Letter]: I heard you planted the branch I\'d given you by the window. It should be blooming by now making for a beautiful piece of decoration at your place.
[Hanying\'s Letter]: Speaking of which, I guess I should refer to your place as the "lounge"... and I\'d love to see it for myself someday if I ever get the chance to.

Title: Festival Story - The Destined Surprise → With Bianca (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bianca]: Sorry to keep you waiting, Commandant.
Bianca is already sitting when you turn around.
You came to this tiny bar in Babylonia\'s commercial district at Bianca\'s invitation. According to your terminal, this place isn\'t exactly an easy one to find.

Title: Festival Story - The Destined Surprise → With Rosetta (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The honeyed berry cake that you\'re savoring as you sit by the roaring fireplace warms you from the inside out, making you cozy to the point of feeling a little drowsy.
[Rosetta]: Tired?
Noticing Rosetta\'s concerned look, you shake your head to show that you\'re feeling you\'re not feeling drowsy because you\'re tired.

Title: Festival Story - The Destined Surprise → With Vera (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Vera]: Hey, Commandant!
You hear Vera\'s cheerful greeting while strolling in the park. With a sudden change in mood, you start debating if you want to answer her greeting or pretend you never heard anything. Right then, something hits you as off.
Did I just hear something?

Title: Festival Story - The Destined Surprise → With No. 21 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Mechanical Dog]: Woof woof woof woof, woof woof woof!
[No. 21]: Commandant is having a birthday today. I have to be here.
[No. 21]: Commandant, final inspection.

Title: Festival Story - The Destined Surprise → With Noctis (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Noctis]: Hey, bring us another bottle here!
The red-haired Construct raises a bottle and clinks it with the human.
[Noctis]: We\'re here tonight to celebrate your birthday! Cheers!

Title: Festival Story - The Destined Surprise → With Qu (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Feeling a bit drowsy on a lazy afternoon, I head to my room to get some instant coffee.
Opening the door, I see a chair covered with a piece of silk cloth.
Except you don\'t remember having bought this and wonder if it\'s something you got as a gift from someone...

Title: Festival Story - The Destined Surprise → With Pulao (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Pulao]: Three, two, one... Okay! You can open your eyes!
Pulao moves her hands away from your eyes, and as you open them, colorful lights fill your vision, illuminating the night.
You have heard many vendors\' shouts on your way, but seeing them in person still feels a bit unreal.

Title: Festival Story - The Destined Surprise → With Bambinata (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You\'re back at the lounge, having finished the day\'s tasks. You notice something out of the ordinary as soon as you turn on the light.
There is a sticker of a birthday cake on the door and a party popper that\'s yet to be popped on the handle.
And the journal that Bambinata gave you that you\'d been keeping on your table is now nowhere to be seen.

Title: Festival Story - The Destined Surprise → With Noan (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
In the evening, people are still immersed in the revelry of your birthday party. Amidst the continuous greetings and blessings, you quietly retreat to the edge of the room.
Babylonia is never quiet at night, but rarely does it have a joyous clamor like this.
Coming back to your senses, you find yourself a good distance away from the lights, now standing alone by the library\'s entrance.

Title: Festival Story - The Destined Surprise → With Echo (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Construct]: Are you the Gray Raven Commandant? Uhm... here, this letter is for you. It came from Earth and has been checked. Free of dangerous substances. Here you go.
In your hand ow sits a simple white envelope that smells faintly of the disinfectant from the inspection center. Opening it, you see a page torn from a notebook.
Commandant, I hope this letter finds you well:

Title: Festival Story - The Destined Surprise → With Teddy (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Just now, a mysterious message arrived on your terminal.
When you open the mail, its attachment automatically launches. With it, garbled code suddenly fills the entire screen.
Characters gradually emerge from the center of the flickering data stream, forming two phrases—

Title: Festival Story - The Destined Surprise → With Bridget (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bridget]: Commandant!
A call, filled with excitement, jolts you back to reality from the indulgent cheese waterfall of calories.
[Commandant]: Kuh... Cough, cough.

Title: Festival Story - Solitary Longings → Going Ashore (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A crisp sensation envelops Lamia\'s dulled senses, while the fragrance of herbs and flowers gradually brings clarity to her hazy mind.
The sunlight streaming through the gaps between leaves falls upon the water and gently caresses the girl asleep within.
[Lamia]: ...

Title: Festival Story - Solitary Longings → Tide's Kiss (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The next day, with the storm gone, the sky stretches on for as far as the eye can see without a piece of cloud, and the long coastline is strewn with treasures from the deep sea.
Lamia, along with Begonia and the young person they rescued yesterday, are happily absorbed in digging holes in the sand and sorting through fish and shrimp.
[Lamia]: Still can\'t remember anything even after getting some rest? We could help you look around, but without any leads to go on...

Title: Festival Story - Solitary Longings → Caught in Storm (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The next morning, shadows of the forest dance across the pristine white stone walls. Following Lamia\'s lead, two people pull a cart through the city gates.
The bustling sounds draw closer as the atmosphere grows lively. People of all kinds gather in the streets and set up their stalls to begin another day.
[Lamia]: Let\'s stop the cart here. Ugh, I\'m exhausted. Come on, let\'s sit down for a bit.

Title: Festival Story - Solitary Longings → Caught in Storm (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The tide of enemies has receded, leaving the once-peaceful fishing village in ruins. Among the wreckage lie the faint silhouettes of villagers\' bodies.
The rain shows no sign of stopping, its bone-chilling drops carrying an unsettling malice.
The guards gather the crowd together while a priestess chants soothing prayers.

Title: Festival Story - Solitary Longings → Fallen Abyss (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Two carriages travel through the curtain of rain toward the city, one behind the other, keeping their passengers apart.
Lamia sits in the leading carriage, having yet to come back to her senses.
Sensing Lamia\'s emotions, the priestess sits beside her and speaks ever so tenderly.

Title: Festival Story - Solitary Longings → Caged Longing (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
CLANG—
The rust-covered iron bars clash together with a harsh, metallic screech.
Lamia is thrown into the cell, stripped of the clothes that once marked her as a servant of the Temple.

Title: Festival Story - Solitary Longings → Masked Bliss (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Atop the sea cliff, Lamia and the human commandant stand side by side. Having escaped their confinement, the two find themselves back at this place once again.
Directly below the sea cliff lies the relocated ritual site, with Temple processions arranging new offerings and grounds. On the other side, the ocean churns beneath the stormy clouds that darken the very sky that now roams with thunder.
The Sea God has broken free from the binding rules and is about to make an appearance because the ritual has been delayed.

Title: Festival Story - Solitary Longings → Masked Bliss (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Under the human commandant\'s leadership, the villagers, having launched a surprise attack against the Temple\'s forces, manage to repel them and capture both the priestess and the intended sacrifice for this ritual.
Meanwhile, Lamia finds herself in a desperate battle. This isn\'t reality—there is no way for her to get help from the human commandant here. The notion of fighting together reveals itself as a hollow promise...
Fighting through the excruciating pain and suppressing her urge to flee, Lamia takes one last glance at those on the beach before gritting her teeth and throwing herself back into battle.

Title: Festival Story - Solitary Longings → Sea Foam (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The raging waves crash and spray as Lamia desperately twists and turns through the turbulent waters.
A piercing whistle cuts through the air as a vengeful, crushing blow tears through the waves, bearing down with inescapable force.
[Lamia]: Nngh—

Title: Festival Story - Solitary Longings → Sea Foam (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The great waves shatter as the vessel of pure desire and bitter hatred finally wanes.
Gasping heavily, Lamia can no longer maintain her form as she sinks beneath the waters.
Guess it\'s all coming to an end now...

Title: Festival Story - Solitary Longings → Daybreak (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Memories seep back slowly through the silence, heavy and sluggish.
The gentle rippling of water and birdsong flutter at the edges of consciousness. As darkness recedes, light filters through closed eyelids.
[Lamia]: ...

Title: Festival Story - Shape of Thunder → Blue Bolt (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A boundless sea of snow churns with crashing waves. The cold mountain air slices like a blade, revealing a once-familiar view all over again.
Even after mentally bracing for it, the biting cold is overwhelming, making anyone stop to take a few deep breaths.
The transport craft only reaches the foot of the mountain. Beyond that, brutal terrain, dense fog, and extreme cold knock out most equipment, so going on foot is the only option left.

Title: Festival Story - Shape of Thunder → Agantuka (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You follow Alpha into a secluded monk\'s chamber. It\'s neat and orderly inside, though a thin layer of dust shows it hasn\'t been lived in for quite a while.
As soon as you\'re out of the wind and snow, your body warms up considerably, and your mind finally starts working properly again.
To start off our partnership, you give Alpha a vague explanation that you\'re here on monastery business. You figure an Ascendant probably has no desire to claim such a harsh place.

Title: Festival Story - Shape of Thunder → Parinama (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Toure musters a bit more courage, but Iron Skull has already left. Toure carefully guides you through winding passages, leading you to another side hall.
You brace yourself and knock on the door, its surface covered in deep scratches. Right away, a jarring voice booms from inside.
[Black-Clad Thug]: Who\'s there? Which damned fool dares to disturb us? That red-eyed mechanoid?

Title: Festival Story - Shape of Thunder → Pratitya (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Snow cascades down, blocking most of your view. It\'s so dense that you can barely move, and you can\'t force your way through on willpower alone.
Tomorrow, once you charge into the main hall, there\'s no telling what will happen, and you will have no spare energy to worry about things outside.
Just in case, you have told both sides to brace for defense. If things go south, they can pull back down the mountain first—at least, they can find Babylonia\'s support there.

Title: Festival Story - Shape of Thunder → Prasanga (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Golden sunlight bathes the mountain peaks, illuminating each tile on the main hall\'s rooftop and revealing the temple\'s solemn, pristine aura in its warm glow.
The sky is perfectly clear now—so bright that it\'s almost impossible to believe there was a raging blizzard just yesterday.
The human\'s fatigue runs deeper than she imagined. Even in sleep, the commandant\'s brow remains furrowed—like such a long rest has been missed in a long time.

Title: Festival Story - Shape of Thunder → Pratyaksha (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Alpha]: !
[Alpha]: (This is... the main hall!)
The familiar incense fills her senses. Lotus lanterns flicker in and out of the shadows, and thin spirals of smoke curl upward. Laughter and cursing drift by in bursts, loud and unruly.

Title: Festival Story - Shape of Thunder → Ishvara (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Commandant]: ...So, everything went smoothly, and the main hall is clear of Corrupted. Later, our people will come to the monastery to lend a hand.
They need to clean up the monastery, clear the roads, and set up living quarters. It\'s just their first step, but there\'s already so much to do.
While the Yama Clan still has its doubts, the refugees are completely convinced by the strength of the boss they\'ve chosen. They all rush out at once as soon as they hear the news.

Title: Festival Story - Tainted Moonrise → "Satan" (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
"As long as my heart beats, it\'ll always tell you: please remember."
Consciousness\'s still a mess. It starts with a connection request in a dream.
You hear Luna calling out to you.

Title: Festival Story - Tainted Moonrise → Misplaced Eden (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
When the book of Revelation starts changing, a blinding light surges forth from between its pages.
The gears of creation begin to turn. In an instant, heaven and earth interchange, matter transforms, and stars shift. When her eyes open again, everything has become utterly different from before.
The once desolate land has transformed into a garden bursting with spring beauty. Branches and leaves grow in abundance, with all manner of birds and beasts thriving throughout.

Title: Festival Story - Tainted Moonrise → World Laid Bare (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Luna opens her eyes and, after what feels like forever, clearly sees the person in front of her. She\'s lying on a bed she doesn\'t recognize, in a building she\'s never seen in Eden.
[Luna]: Mm, how long have I been asleep?
As she feels the weight in her body and remembers the last moments before she passed out, Luna realizes she must\'ve been in a coma.

Title: Festival Story - Tainted Moonrise → Shunned Moonlight (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
"I offer you the loyalty of someone who has never known faith."
Tick-tock—the clock\'s ticking stands out in the dead silence of the night.
The clock chimes ring through the hall, telling the time, but outside it\'s still pitch black—it should be noon, with the sun at its peak.

Title: Festival Story - Tainted Moonrise → Rain in the Mirror (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
In the dreamer\'s dream, the one being dreamed awakens.
Your mind comes to a sweet, rich scent.
One minute you\'re in a deep dream, the next you\'re pulled back by a soft whisper. The familiar smell makes waking up feel natural, with no sudden jolt.

Title: Festival Story - A Love Story Across Time → And Suddenly It's Evening (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Officiant]: Lucia, do you take Commandant to be your partner...
[Officiant]: ...To love, cherish, and stand by Commandant?
At twilight, the setting sun drapes a veil of gold across the boundless ocean.

Title: Festival Story - A Love Story Across Time → The Dark Arena (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A rush of fresh air greets you when the cabin door slowly opens. A breathtaking, poetic landscape unfolds before your eyes.
[Lucia]: Commandant, we\'re here.
The boundless azure sea embraces the shore, lifting the rolling mountains high above. Verdant firs in their abundance stand like countless slanted towers toward the heavens, adorning the crystal-clear midday sky.

Title: Festival Story - A Love Story Across Time → The Dark Arena (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Family Member 1]: S-stop! I\'m one of the Russells!
[Family Member 2]: Big talk. Everyone here\'s a Russell. Name your boss!
[Family Member 1]: —R-Romulus!

Title: Festival Story - A Love Story Across Time → Spring & Asura (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Night drapes Catania in a gray veil, with everything in sight seemingly viewed through the hazy filter of an old film.
Lights come on in every home, with warm specks of color flowing from the mountain peaks that embrace the lush foothills down to the shore.
On the beach, some people are on benches relishing the night, while there are some laughing and singing around barbecue grills with friends and family.

Title: Festival Story - A Love Story Across Time → The Name of the Rose (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Hand in hand with Lucia, you walk across the white sand as sea foam laps at your feet.
With the sea of stars blanketing the heavens above, you pass by the revelers dancing along the shore.
Under the watchful glow of the moonlight, you delve into the lush forest and weave through abundant green foliage until you come upon a pile of weathered ruins.

Title: Festival Story - A Love Story Across Time → La-la Land (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
By the time you reach the town, the sun is already hanging high at the peak.
In the outskirts, small filtration stations and bunker clusters established by the Thirteen Families form several layers of defensive lines against the Punishing at the sea—what Catanians call the "Joint Defense Zone".
Passing through the heavily guarded Joint Defense Zone, you find yourselves greeted by an elegant, classical world that stands in stark contrast to the one you\'ve left behind.

Title: Festival Story - A Love Story Across Time → To the Wedding (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The next day, having joined the Savoys\' motorcade, you and Lucia find yourself at the seaside sanctuary again.
Morning mist hangs like a delicate veil over the distant mountains and forests. Parked under the canopies, the black limousines bring wave after wave of family members to the venue.
With the sun slowly making its way up, the venue becomes crowded with family members before long.

Title: Festival Story - A Love Story Across Time → Vow to Be Yours (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Commandant, behind you!
Lucia cuts down an enemy, then spins around and throws her Pyro Katana your way.
A scream erupts from behind you as the katana whistles through the air.

Title: Festival Story - Heart's Whispers Across Time → Heart's Whispers Across Time (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Ishmael]: You like sweets?
The woman in the gray-white uniform adds a third spoonful of sugar, gently stirring with her slender fingers.
[Ishmael]: There\'s all kinds of sugar—granulated is pure, rock sugar is crunchy, and brown sugar smells like honey...

Title: Festival Story - Heart's Whispers Across Time → With Ishmael (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
I was invited to an outdoor music lecture in the residential area, but it started pouring rain halfway through.
My terminal says an ecological module in the residential area broke down, messing up the water cycle and causing this heavy rain.
It was unexpected—neither the organizers nor the audience were prepared. Everyone had to take shelter in nearby buildings, waiting for it to clear up.

Title: Festival Story - Heart's Whispers Across Time → With Luna (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The afternoon sun\'s softer than you\'d expect, probably because of the clouds. You can even look straight up without hurting your eyes.
You relax completely and lie back on the grass. Petals float all around you, carried by the breeze.
Phew—

Title: Festival Story - Heart's Whispers Across Time → With Qu (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You get to the meeting with Qu right on time.
A breeze ruffles her hair as you see a familiar figure with her back to you on the mountaintop. She turns, giving a small nod.
[Qu]: Right on time.

Title: Festival Story - Heart's Whispers Across Time → With Hanying (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You slowly walk up the stone steps with the wind blowing, and Kowloong Valley is quiet and peaceful.
The rustling sound of wind passing through the forest harmonizes with the soft whisper of a broom sweeping against the ground nearby.
A few more steps and you see an old person sweeping. He\'s wearing Kowloong clothes and looks happy and peaceful, smiling and nodding at you.

Title: Festival Story - Heart's Whispers Across Time → With Nanami (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Following the coordinates Nanami sent, you walk into an empty warehouse outside town.
All of a sudden, the huge chandelier goes dark, and the door behind you slams shut, trapping you in complete darkness.
[Kiat Brother A?]: Beep boop—heh ha, ha ha, dear Aparlashaw Star Person, now that you\'ve... fallen... into... our, the Kiat Brothers\'... hands—

Title: Festival Story - Heart's Whispers Across Time → With Lucia (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You finish today\'s plans early and check where your squad members are on your terminal.
A little red dot for Lucia is still at the "Holographic Experience Hall".
Lucia wouldn\'t usually come here alone. What\'s she up to?

Title: Festival Story - Heart's Whispers Across Time → With Teddy (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After a hectic afternoon, you finally get a few minutes to relax, leaning back on the break room couch.
You pop open the cherry soda on the tea table, and the fizz washes away the morning\'s tiredness.
The artificial cherry flavor is spot-on, sweet with a tiny bit of tart, you can\'t help but chug it.

Title: Festival Story - Heart's Whispers Across Time → With Bridget (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Whoosh—even the earmuffs can\'t stop the sound of the clay disc flying.
The orange blur makes a perfect arc under the lights, about to reach that invisible apex point.
The hand gripping the wooden forestock lifts slightly, while the other hand, which controls the firing, has reflexively positioned its index finger on the trigger.

Title: Festival Story - Heart's Whispers Across Time → With Yata (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The space is tight and small. Cold wind hits your face. It\'s pitch black, and only the walkie-talkie glows a little green.
Just a minute ago, the staff took you and Yata to different rooms, like the game said.
[Chilling Female Voice]: Heh heh heh... Ten years later... I\'ve finally got you both.

Title: Festival Story - Heart's Whispers Across Time → With Wanshi (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
I was talking with Wanshi late last night and ended up crashing here. Is it already morning...
This weather\'s perfect for sleeping in...
Thinking this, you turn a bit, only to feel a sudden weight pressing against your forehead...

Title: Festival Story - Threads of Destiny → Vista (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Pale blue ink seems to doze across the letter paper, the lazy handwriting a bit rougher than usual, with a spontaneous flair.
Fingertips brush the paper, as if they can feel the smile that spreads as the writer\'s pen glides across the page.
As if the letter\'s closing words stir things up, the ordinary weather suddenly becomes a bit much.

Title: Festival Story - Threads of Destiny → Twilight (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Afternoon, Stretching Mountain Forests, Outside Survey Point 23 Camp
You are inserting the last probe from your backpack into the towering tree, set to record Punishing density and a bunch of other data.
You grab Selena\'s outstretched arm, using her to steady yourself as you pull out of the thick foliage and back onto the secluded path.

Title: Festival Story - Threads of Destiny → Wedding (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Night, Village at the Foot of the Mountain
The two of you stand with the fox right in the middle of the market street. Passing villagers occasionally do a double-take because of your unusual clothes, but not a single one even glances at Yun Ye, as if the fox isn\'t even there.
The fox looks dead serious, sitting up straight and covering her tiny paws with her tail, looking incredibly solemn and earnest.

Title: Festival Story - Threads of Destiny → Bonding (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Night, Village Flower Shop
You have been waiting outside the flower shop for a while now. Soon after, the door swings open once more.
A wisteria vine threads right through the cloth collar on the fox\'s neck, hoisting it high just outside the doorway.

Title: Festival Story - Threads of Destiny → Vow (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Late Night, Shrine Mountain Path
Walking with Selena along the bright mountain path, the shrine\'s silhouette soon comes into view up ahead.
The whole area buzzes with activity as all sorts of visitors arrive—some emerge from the woods lining the path, others pop out from branching trails, and, remarkably, some even descend from the sky or rise right up from the earth.

Title: Festival Story - Threads of Destiny → Vow (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The battle\'s a done deal, with the priest taking a real beating.
Even with the offerings swiped, the Goddess of Union isn\'t a battle-ready deity.
After the knockout punch, Black Fox is pretty much out for the count.

Title: Festival Story - Threads of Destiny → Union (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Late night, Shrine of Union.
The Union Shrine is alive with the comings and goings of spirits, every corner brightly lit by countless lanterns.
You are perched on the tatami mats, facing Selena. The priest and fox flutter around you, meticulously adjusting your makeup and ceremonial ornaments.

Title: Festival Story - Summer Stroll → Under Azure Skies (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Summer in Aomizu on this island is a poem composed by the chirping of cicadas.
Under the serene sky with rosy clouds, a warn breeze gently touches the town.
You stand on the plaza near the beach, waiting for Babylonia\'s transport craft.

Title: Festival Story - Summer Stroll → On a Midsummer Day (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Days of rain and the humid coastal air in the summer have make the Aomizu conservation area feel muggy.
The Engineering Force, the administrators, and the Diplomatic Court officers... The not very large meeting room is packed with all kinds of people, discussing about the conservation area\'s reconstruction matters.
There aren\'t enough stools in the room. Some have to stand in the back, leaning against the wall while taking notes of the meeting.

Title: Festival Story - Summer Stroll → At a Silent Night (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The waves shimmer a blue glow at night.
A mysterious, ancient aura reveals itself to both of you in the darkness.
[Lucia]: The blue sea...

Title: Festival Story - Summer Stroll → Before the Bell (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Under the blue sky, cool breezes occasionally blow through the tree branches, swaying the tree shadows.
It\'s a muggy summer. Anyone would be soaked with sweat just by jogging a few minutes under the scorching sun.
You walk under the tree, but just when you are about to take a short rest, you see a few lively girls running over to you from a distance, waving and shouting to you.

Title: Festival Story - Summer Stroll → After School (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Thanks to your efforts, everyone is able to see the carefully prepared "surprise" at moonrise.
Pushing aside the grass, they see a clean swimming pool with the fresh scent of bleach behind the rusty bars. Nobody can believe it.
[Soyo]: Wait. Is this really the rundown swimming pool overgrown with weeds?

Title: Festival Story - To the One and Only You → To the One and Only You (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Babylonia, a secluded conference room.
[Bianca]: It\'s ten minutes past the scheduled time. Everyone should be here by now, so let\'s begin.
Thrown together at a single table are the Gray Raven members, the Cerberus captain, a musician from WGAA, a taciturn maid, and a devil-tailed mechanoid girl... It sounds like the start of a bad joke, making the scene feel utterly bizarre.

Title: Festival Story - To the One and Only You → With Lilith (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Pushing up from the heavy sand, you awaken—only to awaken again, peeling back layer upon layer of dream until you breach the final boundary between sleep and reality.
The cool shock of seawater washing over your ankles jolts you fully awake. This is an island. As your thoughts steady, still hazy from the successive awakenings, a single question forms: How did you get here?
Back in your dormitory at Babylonia.

Title: Festival Story - To the One and Only You → With Selena (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
At Selena\'s home, you unwrap a teal-blue gift box under her watchful, gentle gaze.
The wrapping paper falls away to reveal an adorably chubby plush toy. It has rounded ears, a plump little tail, and a pair of large, gleaming black eyes that seem to hold a spark of life...
The name comes to you instinctively as you hold the soft figure in your palm.

Title: Festival Story - To the One and Only You → With Jetavie (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You sign the final mission report and add it to the mountainous pile on your desk. Leaning back in your chair, you release a sigh that feels like it\'s been held for a year.
Your gaze drifts to the sterile glow of the ceiling lights. Had your birthday really slipped by, so utterly uneventful...?
"BOOM!" Just as you\'re sinking into the gloom, the world around you suddenly transforms.

Title: Festival Story - To the One and Only You → With Vera (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Vera]: How are you feeling right now?
You open the mystery box to find a single set of coordinates pointing to a conservation area on the Pacific coast.
Following the directions, you arrive at the remote spot, only to hear a familiar voice from behind, "Better prepare yourself mentally for something thrilling." Before you can even turn around, a hood is pulled over your head without warning. When it\'s finally removed, you\'re already zipped into a heavy thermal suit.

Title: Festival Story - To the One and Only You → With Bianca (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
At Bianca\'s invitation, you enter her room. The moment your weary body sinks into the soft chair after days of exhausting missions, a long-awaited relief washes over you.
A faint fragrance drifts toward you. Turning your head, you find the source: a row of delicate glass bottles on the table, each filled with liquid of a different hue.
[Bianca]: You have a good nose, Commandant. Though at this stage, they\'re more like promises than a finished perfume.

Title: Festival Story - To the One and Only You → With Discord (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Discord]: Thank you for coming.
[Discord]: I\'m sorry, Commandant. To drag you out on your birthday, of all days...
[Discord]: But... this is a necessary step.

Title: Festival Story - To the One and Only You → With Veronica (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Night has fallen. The cafe in front of you isn\'t open, so you check Veronica\'s message again just to be sure. Yeah, this is the place. But there\'s a sign hanging on the door that says, "Closed Today."
Just then, a few new messages pop up on your terminal, ones you haven\'t had time to check while hurrying over.
Looking closer at the "Closed Today" sign, you notice a small line of handwriting underneath: Gray Raven Commandant only.

Title: Festival Story - To the One and Only You → With Liv (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Liv sent a message. She wants to meet at Kuroro Coffee.
[Liv]: There you are, Commandant.
[Liv]: This is the Star of Life\'s specially developed health monitoring system. It can track your vitals and offer personalized lifestyle advice.

Title: Festival Story - Mercy in All Things → Day of Reckoning (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[????]: I filled this world with my own "fabrication." Raheleh, Etha, Lesti... and you.
[????]: They are content to remain here, to walk with me in this "sweet dream"... all except you.
[????]: ...Was it too much to ask, to keep this one sweet dream for myself?

Title: Festival Story - Mercy in All Things → Lamb's Lead (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Shorthalt]: I was actually going to take you to the pontiff\'s private residence next... but how in the world did you know it was at the top of this tower? Don\'t tell me the press has already caught wind of that.
The glass elevator climbs steadily, dappled in the light of a spring sun. With every shadow of a crossbeam, another floor falls away.
The city sprawls below, shrinking into an intricate map beneath your feet.

Title: Festival Story - Mercy in All Things → Die of Solace (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The radio crackles. Then, the announcer\'s distorted voice cuts through the static.
[Announcer]: "A terrible quiet has fallen over thousands of people."
[Announcer]: "Yesterday morning, authorities from both the police and the church made a joint announcement: the former Pontiff had been laid to rest in a private, secret ceremony."

Title: Festival Story - Mercy in All Things → Marionette (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Etha\'s carriage flies through broad avenues and narrow lanes, carrying two souls bent on "defying the world," leaving behind the stiff crowds, the sinking sun, and the crimson dusk...
At last, under the chill gaze of a pallid moon, it draws to a stop before a modest two-story house, its chimney whispering soft curls of smoke.
[Etha]: Quick, this way! No one ever uses this path after dark. You\'ll be safe.

Title: Festival Story - Mercy in All Things → The Red and the Gray (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You have fallen into a kind of madness, so profound that it\'s impossible to tell whether this is reality or dream.
In the haze of your memory, you recall making several failed calls from the attic of Ishmael\'s... Ms. Raheleh\'s house. You drank a cup of warm milk, fidgeted with a set of wooden carved dice from a drawer, and finally lay down on the bed.
Ishmael was there beside you, leaning close to whisper something intimately in your ear, though the words themselves are lost to you now. You were swiftly pulled into the black hole of dreams.

Title: Festival Story - Mercy in All Things → The Guilty (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Dawn breaks; gears turn. In this reality shaped by Ishmael\'s "guidance," a precious "second day" begins.
You wake as sunlight pierces the curtain gaps, setting the dust motes adrift in the air ablaze.
The bed is still soft, the books on the bedside night stand in their same precise order.

Title: Festival Story - Mercy in All Things → Reconciliation Day (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Ishmael]: Hurry, follow me! Now!
[Ishmael]: This world\'s falling apart!
[Ishmael]: ...Just one world destroyed—another one gone.

Title: Festival Story - Behind the Curtain → A Misty Prelude (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
An unnatural cold pervades the air, a ghostly mist that coils around her and seeps deep into the bones. Every breath is a sip of ice.
In the suffocating silence, the soft dip of Bianca\'s oar is a stark counterpoint as the two drift into the abyss of an underground river.
The lantern at the bow is a futile protest against the misty gloom, its light revealing only a few meters of dark water before being consumed by the swirling, watchful shadows of the fog.

Title: Festival Story - Behind the Curtain → Only Your Heart (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The car glides through the streets, taking Bianca and you toward your destination. Beyond the windows, the night is a brilliant tapestry of city lights.
In less than an hour, the press conference for your new play begins, as well as the moment you will present Bianca to the world as your leading lady.
The car\'s interior is hushed. Beside you, Bianca is a quiet silhouette, her attention captured by the night view. When she senses your gaze, she turns from the window and offers a gentle, knowing smile.

Title: Festival Story - Behind the Curtain → Sung by Night (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After working tirelessly day and night, you finally put the polishing touches on the new script just before formal rehearsals begin.
Today, you\'re scheduled to rehearse a pivotal emotional scene with Bianca, so you arrive at the theater early to prepare. Pushing open the main doors to what should be an empty building, you stop short. You are not alone.
[Bianca]: Good morning. Did you rest well?

Title: Festival Story - Behind the Curtain → Echo and Phantom (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Consciousness seeps back into her, slow as a tide, reclaiming a body that feels heavy and unfamiliar. Bianca opens her eyes to an expanse of pure, sterile white.
For a disorienting moment, the line between the lingering dream and this new reality refuses to hold.
[Bianca]: Maestro Gray Raven!

Title: Festival Story - Behind the Curtain → Echo and Phantom (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Through the relentless blizzard, you finally traverse the endless snowfields, arriving at the theater\'s entrance.
With a heavy groan, you force the doors open. Impenetrable darkness waits within, thick as undiluted ink.
You raise your candle, and its small sphere of light pushes back the suffocating shadows. As far as you can see, the theater lies in complete ruin.

Title: Festival Story - Behind the Curtain → Moonlight Sonata (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You stand behind Bianca, watching her in the mirror\'s soft focus.
On the dressing table, lilies bloom quietly in a vase, their elegant fragrance perfuming the air.
Tonight, the two of you will take the stage to perform your story for the world.

Title: Festival Story - Behind the Curtain → Among Myriad Finales (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bianca]: Then... did you enjoy the story I wrote for us?
[Bianca]: Commandant? Can you hear me?
Bianca\'s voice reaches you as if from a great distance, hazy and indistinct, filtering through the heavy curtain of sleep.

Title: Festival Story - Path of Unclouded Hearts → Journey of Devotion Begins (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: I just love it when I see a city or a town rebuilt... I love when ruins are restored to buildings and a no man\'s land turns into a bustling place.
[Liv]: Me...? What I want...
[Liv]: I still believe in the paper planes, in the fairy tales, in happy endings where lovers stay together forever...

Title: Festival Story - Path of Unclouded Hearts → In the Name of Progress (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The last cluster of attacking thorns shatters under the lotus wheel and gunfire, and silence temporarily returns to the palace gates.
Just as you are about to crouch down for a closer look, Liv grabs your wrist, stopping you with an almost prescient caution.
[Liv]: Let me inspect it first, Commandant. It\'s better to be cautious.

Title: Festival Story - Path of Unclouded Hearts → In the Name of Home (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Othilde]: Your Highness! Honorable Commandant! You really did it!
As you return to the lakeside with Liv through the now-safe forest of ice crystals and frost flowers, Othilde rushes excitedly to greet you, her feathers all fluffed up.
[Othilde]: Huh? Why are your hands tied together?

Title: Festival Story - Path of Unclouded Hearts → In the Name of Home (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The golden orb representing the [Wish of Home] bounces twice in Liv\'s hand before leaping toward you.
The moment you reach out and catch it, an indescribable feeling washes over you.
[Liv]: The perfect temperature, a full belly, a peaceful sleep, the safety of friends surrounding you... as if all pain has been soothed away, inspiring boundless courage.

Title: Festival Story - Path of Unclouded Hearts → In the Name of Devotion (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Othilde]: ...Wake up... I have good news, Your Highness and Honorable Commandant!
Gradually awaking, you search for the source of the excited voice. Looking down, you find a miniature hologram of the black swan butler, no bigger than a cup, perched on your knees.
[Liv]: Hmm...

Title: Festival Story - Path of Unclouded Hearts → Aspire, Achieve (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The red-robed intruder ignores Liv\'s warning and advances. Several feather-like lightning blades immediately shoot out from Liv\'s hands, but they pass through the sorcerer as if cutting through mist.
Countless overlapping voices, impossible to distinguish or count, blend together to form an inhuman murmur, enveloping the two of you in its ethereal embrace.
[Red Sorcerer]: Futile... It\'s futile to retrieve the wishes...

Title: Festival Story - Path of Unclouded Hearts → This Heart Eternal (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: The instruments have been tuned, and all the refreshments are ready... I wonder if we hung the ballroom chandelier a bit too low? I should check it again...
As you push open the balcony door, you see Liv lost in thought as she mentally checks off tasks while her fingertips absently brush against the railing.
[Liv]: That\'s good. She listens to you more than me these days, Commandant.

Title: Adaptation Fitting - Toniris → Escape and Search (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Elegant, noble, solitary.
Those keywords were all Bianca knew about cranes as they often appeared in the data.
Babylonia\'s database had a detailed section about cranes, but Bianca struggled to link those text and images with the actual creatures. After all, she had never seen them in real life.

Title: Adaptation Fitting - Toniris → Contact and Estrangement (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
For a split second, Bianca thought Toniris was supposed to be there all along. It looked like a divine creation.
She almost wants to pray to it, if she didn\'t know her mission is to calm it down.
[Bianca]: Asimov mentioned about this situation...

Title: Adaptation Fitting - Toniris → Reject and Accept (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bianca]: Where is this...?
When everything finally calmed down, Bianca saw a wetland.
As far as she could see, there was only greenery and mud. Fallen leaves and new buds scattered on the swamp. A few insect sounds could be heard every now and then.

Title: Adaptation Fitting - Toniris → Reject and Accept (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
When all had ended, Bianca took Toniris back to Babylonia.
A few days later.
[Bianca]: Purifying Force, Bianca reporting.

Title: Adaptation Fitting - Frost Oath → Difference (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Under the flickering aurora, she lets the cold wind mixed with frost and snow beat on her body and looks ahead.
Nightfall drapes over the snowy forest in a thin veil of endless darkness.
She clenches her spear tightly in the blistering cold as she looks out at the dim red lights illuminating the forest like fireflies.

Title: Adaptation Fitting - Frost Oath → Strider (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Lost in thought, Rosetta suddenly receives a transmission from Babylonia. She takes a deep breath to suppress her doubts, then answers the transmission.
[Asimov]: Rosetta.
[Rosetta]: Speaking.

Title: Adaptation Fitting - Frost Oath → Strider (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Rosetta takes the CUB to the snowy forest nearby. Like most machines Rosetta is familiar with, CUBs will silently carry out the previous command unless given a new command.
—Just like how this CUB has been silently following Rosetta, unresponsive to other external interferences.
[Rosetta]: One more parameter to test. Time to collect data on its maximum speed.

Title: Adaptation Fitting - Frost Oath → Pursuit (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Numerous mechanical devices have surrounded the airdrop cabin since Rosetta was away.
Drones hover around the equipment. Several mechanical arms are sticking out from the sides.
[Asimov]: Next up, I\'ll modify the CUB. I\'ve already prepared the replacement components.

Title: Adaptation Fitting - Frost Oath → Act of God (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The blizzard gradually obscures the sunlight on the snowy mountain. Rosetta continues onward in the dim, harsh environment.
—Unable to see where she is going.
—Where should she go?

Title: Adaptation Fitting - Frost Oath → Frost Oath (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Asimov]: You\'re back.
[Asimov]: Shall we finish where we left off with the calibration?
Rosetta hops off the CUB and responds to Asimov on the comms.

Title: Collaboration - Untold Naraka → The Cavern of Dawn (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
...What is the meaning of life?
...That isn\'t a topic we should be discussing, right? After all, we\'re...
...You\'re right. We... don\'t have any semblance of life to discuss...

Title: Collaboration - Untold Naraka → The Cavern of Dawn (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: What are those machines...? They don\'t look like any standard military hardware in our logs.
[Lucia]: I remember reading about some factions producing or modifying combat mechanoids before Constructs were developed to fight against the World Government\'s forces.
[Lee]: Perhaps, but these appear to predate that.

Title: Collaboration - Untold Naraka → Everlasting War (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: We\'re through! Assume reconnaissance formation!
[Lee]: Entering!
Lee enters the narrow hole from the blast first and aims his gun forward.

Title: Collaboration - Untold Naraka → Everlasting War (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Hassen]: Celica.
[Celica]: Yes? What is it?
[Hassen]: Do you still remember that... "School of Sapienism"?

Title: Collaboration - Untold Naraka → Cycle of War (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Mechanoid A]: Future. Is. The. Void! We. Don\'t need. A tyrant!
[Mechanoid A]: No leader! No tyranny!
[Mechanoid B]: Destroy! Destroy! Only our faction! Can rule the world!

Title: Collaboration - Untold Naraka → Cycle of War (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Mechanoid A]: Defect! Defect!
[Mechanoid B]: Failure! Failure!
Lucia slashes with her blade, slicing the last two mechanoids in half as they approach.

Title: Collaboration - Untold Naraka → The Bottom of Blood - Side A (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: Judging from the coordinates, we\'re still some distance from the sources of the red and blue mechanoids.
[Lee]: Based on our current situation, there is no evidence of a path between the sources of the two factions.
[Lee]: That seems to be the only reasonable course of action.

Title: Collaboration - Untold Naraka → The Bottom of Blood - Side A (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
No longer able to support its own weight, the broken mechanoid collapses onto the ground, incapacitated.
[Lee]: Lucia! We\'ve immobilized the red faction\'s "leader"!
[Lucia]: The blue faction\'s "leader" has been immobilized, too!

Title: Collaboration - Untold Naraka → The Bottom of Blood - Side B (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Copy that. I\'m setting up monitoring equipment here. We\'ll be in position shortly!
After hanging up the mid-range comms with Lee and you, Lucia turns to speak with Liv.
[Lucia]: Liv, let\'s get going.

Title: Collaboration - Untold Naraka → The Bottom of Blood - Side B (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Alarm]: Vital signs for both faction leaders have been terminated.
[Alarm]: Cycle of War #*（）——+& results: null.
[Alarm]: Initiating removal procedure according to Directive Number 2 of the "Naraka Bastille Protocol" enacted by the School of Sapienism.

Title: Collaboration - Untold Naraka → False Relationship (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The battle between mechanoids continues.
The dull impacts of weapons can be heard all around, followed by the sound of explosions and electric surges.
Even though the alarm echoes throughout the underground city, the mechanoids show no signs of stopping.

Title: Collaboration - Untold Naraka → False Relationship (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: What. Are. You. You. You. Doing?!
[???]: S-speak?
[Liv]: Looks like you can understand us.

Title: Collaboration - Untold Naraka → Blood & Flower (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Embla]: Askr! Askr!
Embla rushes over to Askr frantically.
[Embla]: Askr! Askr!

Title: Collaboration - Untold Naraka → World Collapsed (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Following Embla\'s footsteps, you proceed deeper into the underground city to continue your investigation.
When Lucia and Liv try to piece together the disarray tracks in front of them to form an estimated route, Lee calls you aside...
[Lee]: Commandant.

Title: Collaboration - Untold Naraka → World Collapsed (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Embla?]: ... I want. Push everything. Past breaking point. I can. Wake "Father".
Embla continues to trudge through the darkness with unprecedented agility.
She skips lightly over the traps on the road as mines explode behind her.

Title: Collaboration - Untold Naraka → The Strip of Truth (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: The entire area... is beginning to shake...
A moment later, you all notice that the ring you are standing on has begun to descend.
[Lee]: ...Looks like we made the right call.

Title: Collaboration - Untold Naraka → Machiavelli (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The disc-shaped elevator descends slowly, finally bringing the you all to a larger disc.
After the four of you jump onto the disc, the elevator descends straight down to the desert below.
—But is it really a desert?

Title: Collaboration - Untold Naraka → Machiavelli (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Machiavelli]: ...
Machiavelli\'s frame emits arcs of electricity as it trembles. Its polearm falls out of its hand onto the ground powerlessly.
As if in disbelief that it has been defeated, Machiavelli\'s three heads begin to spin chaotically.

Title: Collaboration - Lamento di Phantasma → Mediocre (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Thomas Hell has been attempting to reverse time using a Hetero Tower shard, but years of failure send him spiraling into madness, triggering a series of chaotic events.

Title: Collaboration - Lamento di Phantasma → Beginning (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Having received a distress signal from a conservation area, Gray Raven advances to rescue. There, they run into a mysterious man.

Title: Collaboration - Lamento di Phantasma → Dante (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Gray Raven follows Dante and Fann to New Oakley, where Commandant forms an alliance with Dante. The group discovers Vergil's whereabouts through footage obtained from the conservation area.

Title: Collaboration - Lamento di Phantasma → Vergil (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: While tracking Hetero-Creatures on the surface, Alpha crosses paths with Vergil, leading to a fierce battle between them. However, the strange behavior of the Hetero-Creatures interrupts their confrontation.

Title: Collaboration - Lamento di Phantasma → Vergil (After Battle)
SummaryContent: While tracking Hetero-Creatures on the surface, Alpha crosses paths with Vergil, leading to a fierce battle between them. However, the strange behavior of the Hetero-Creatures interrupts their confrontation.

Title: Collaboration - Lamento di Phantasma → Dr. "Hell" (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Alpha reaches out to the Gray Raven Commandant. Prior to this, Alpha and Vergil had saved a girl named Lyca from Hetero-Creatures, who claims to know information about the mastermind behind everything—the Mirror Demon.

Title: Collaboration - Lamento di Phantasma → Another World (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Armed with new insights about the Mirror Demon, the group decides to gather in New Oakley before embarking toward the Mirror Demon's lair—the Babel Tower.

Title: Collaboration - Lamento di Phantasma → The Night Talk (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Following the successful defense against yet another Hetero-Creature attack, the residents of New Oakley celebrate their brief peace. Dante and Vergil appear to have discovered some hidden truths regarding Lyca.

Title: Collaboration - Lamento di Phantasma → The Night Talk (After Battle)
SummaryContent: Following the successful defense against yet another Hetero-Creature attack, the residents of New Oakley celebrate their brief peace. Dante and Vergil appear to have discovered some hidden truths regarding Lyca.

Title: Collaboration - Lamento di Phantasma → Babel Tower (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: As the group assembles and progresses toward the Babel Tower. Dante and Vergil reveal their formidable Sin Devil Trigger forms against an overwhelming swarm of Hetero-Creatures.

Title: Collaboration - Lamento di Phantasma → The Spell (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Having successfully broken through the blockade of Hetero-Creatures, the group explores the interior of the Babel Tower. Meanwhile, the Hetero-Creatures outside begin their march toward New Oakley.

Title: Collaboration - Lamento di Phantasma → The Spell (After Battle)
SummaryContent: Having successfully broken through the blockade of Hetero-Creatures, the group explores the interior of the Babel Tower. Meanwhile, the Hetero-Creatures outside begin their march toward New Oakley.

Title: Collaboration - Lamento di Phantasma → Thirst for Blood (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Inside the Babel Tower, the group stumbles upon numerous civilians who had been captured by Hetero-Creatures. Lucia, Liv, and Lee are tasked with escorting the civilians to safety, while Commandant and the rest press on with the ascent. Meanwhile, back in town, Lyca unleashes a formidable surge of power when confronted by attacking Hetero-Creatures.

Title: Collaboration - Lamento di Phantasma → The Lab (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Reaching the 38th floor of Babel Tower, Commandant discovers remnants of a bygone laboratory and decides to collect all the experiment data Thomas Hell left behind here.

Title: Collaboration - Lamento di Phantasma → Memory (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: In New Oakley, Lyca recalls memories from her past and decides to head to the Babel Tower.

Title: Collaboration - Lamento di Phantasma → Mirror Image (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Dante and Vergil reach the 40th floor of the Babel Tower, coming face-to-face with the Mirror Demon as battle becomes inevitable.

Title: Collaboration - Lamento di Phantasma → Devil May Cry (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Confronted by the Mirror Demon and its exceptional regenerative powers, the group struggles to bring the battle to a decisive conclusion despite defeating it. Faced with this impasse, Lyca steps up and makes her choice.

Title: Collaboration - Lamento di Phantasma → Devil May Cry (After Battle)
SummaryContent: Confronted by the Mirror Demon and its exceptional regenerative powers, the group struggles to bring the battle to a decisive conclusion despite defeating it. Faced with this impasse, Lyca steps up and makes her choice.

Title: Collaboration - Lamento di Phantasma → Fate (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: After the Babel Tower incident reaches its conclusion, Dante and Vergil share a brief stay in Babylonia. The data collected from the tower has served its purpose. The moment of parting draws near.

Title: Collaboration - Lamento di Phantasma → Fate (After Battle)
SummaryContent: After the Babel Tower incident reaches its conclusion, Dante and Vergil share a brief stay in Babylonia. The data collected from the tower has served its purpose. The moment of parting draws near.

Title: Collaboration - Lamento di Phantasma → Strawberry Sundae (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: On an ordinary day, Vergil makes an attempt.

Title: Collaboration - Blazing Simulacrum → The Twin Fires (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A hidden underground space somewhere.
Only the colossal clusters of red crystals refract fragments of light.
A silver-haired girl lies quietly among the crystal clusters.

Title: Collaboration - Blazing Simulacrum → The Twin Fires (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The battle rages on for God only knows how long.
Their blades cross and clash with each other like interlocking lightning.
The standoff lasts only a moment. Alpha shifts her posture, sliding forward to the left in an attempt to throw the girl in black off balance.

Title: Collaboration - Blazing Simulacrum → The Incitement (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[BLACK★ROCK SHOOTER]: "Corridor" is what this world is called.
[α]: Hold on, I\'m not ready to buy into your story yet.
Alpha picks up her motorcycle from the roadside, cutting the girl off.

Title: Collaboration - Blazing Simulacrum → The Players (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[α]: Are you still alive?
[??]: Damn it... Why in the world...
[??]: Why... have you all...

Title: Collaboration - Blazing Simulacrum → The Helix (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[α]: We\'re here? Is this the village you were talking about?
[Fida]: Ah... Yeah...
Alpha follows closely behind Fida. The two stop in front of a few buildings amidst a vast wilderness.

Title: Collaboration - Blazing Simulacrum → The Play (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[??]: ...
[???]: Do a headcount and see how many we lost this time.
[???]: Dupi, Migris, Okand, and...

Title: Collaboration - Blazing Simulacrum → The Game (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: What in the world... is going on?
Her consciousness experiences what feels like an endless fall through the dark, and when she opens her eyes again, she finds herself in this cold and empty space.
[Lucia]: Is this... the inside of the castle?

Title: Collaboration - Blazing Simulacrum → The Duel (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The specks of light on the inverted virtual castle slowly begin to move, showing that the "game" has begun.
[Lucia]: She\'s made her first move.
[BLACK★ROCK SHOOTER]: Long story short, this is some kind of board game, right?

Title: Collaboration - Blazing Simulacrum → The Duel (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Fida]: ...
After staring at the holographic map that updates the positions of the pieces in real-time, Fida, who hasn\'t been moved yet, turns to look at the Craftsman who finds herself in the same situation.
[Fida]: Does this mean we can\'t decide what we want to do?

Title: Collaboration - Blazing Simulacrum → The Conflict (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[King]: I\'m sacrificing one of the "Bishop\'s" dice for decisions.
[King]: The roll is a 5, confirming events from c2 to c6.
[King]: Move the "Knight" to c4, which triggers an event. The "Knight" earns two additional dice.

Title: Collaboration - Blazing Simulacrum → The Reflection (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[BLACK★ROCK SHOOTER]: Haah!
Blocking the scythe\'s slash with her black katana, she spins and kicks her opponent away, then charges her cannon for a final shot at her unbalanced foe.
As the smoke clears, the girl with the scythe walks toward her, a thrilled smile on her face.

Title: Collaboration - Blazing Simulacrum → The Two Maidens (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[BLACK★ROCK SHOOTER]: ...
She\'s now only seven squares away from the finish line.
DEAD MASTER follows closely behind, yet she\'s still one round away from catching up.

Title: Collaboration - Blazing Simulacrum → The Two Maidens (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
She no longer remembers how long that day\'s battle lasted.
Raising her cannon, swinging her sword, countless particles of light scattered.
Shouts, roars, and wails pierced her eyes like needles.

Title: Collaboration - Blazing Simulacrum → The Conclusion (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
On the scoreboard, the symbols for the black "Queen" and "Knight" dim.
[King]: So, no thoughts of surrendering now?
[King]: Are you still pinning your hopes on that pawn?

Title: Collaboration - Blazing Simulacrum → The Conflict (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The blade pierces through the chest of the white knight.
[Knight]: Heh...
[Knight]: What a wonderful smile, Fida...

Title: Collaboration - Blazing Simulacrum → The Conflict (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
DEAD MASTER\'s domain gradually collapses, the surroundings reverting to their pre-battle state.
[DEAD MASTER]: ...
[DEAD MASTER]: I lost.

Title: Collaboration - Blazing Simulacrum → The Dream (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Nighttime, in the Craftsman\'s workshop.
A shadowy figure appears behind the Craftsman.
[???]: What are you doing?

Title: Alternative Interpretation - Recitativo di Fantasia → Unfinished Epilogue (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The storyline always has twists and turns. No one ever wants a dull life. Our protagonist will always go through a perilous journey with wits and agility. The evil villains are like faithful followers. Each of them carries important responsibilities that no one else can bear for them.
The deadly vipers always reveal themselves at the exact right moment, just like how pigeons timely come out of a magician\'s hat. Calamity always bides its time, and it will agonize its prey until fear grips the audience\'s hearts, tears roll down their cheeks, and rounds of applause burst out.
Upon realizing this ridiculous thought in your head, you let out a wry smile, put down the raft that you are making, and look in the direction where the sound is coming from.

Title: Alternative Interpretation - Recitativo di Fantasia → Unfinished Epilogue (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The sound of the pipe that heralds death is too sorrowful to bear. It is a heartbreaking elegy.
Your thoughts drift away. And your body feels heavier than ever.
You twist and grasp at the air like a dragon struggling to break free from invisible shackles. The bellow, the shriek, and the melody of madness slowly lose their order as the sound of the pipe fades away like a weary man desperately carrying a broken tune. It is the last cry of his hoarse whisper.

Title: Alternative Interpretation - Recitativo di Fantasia → Death of the Piper (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
—The piper controls the evil dragon to sow death and despair.
—The champion shall conquer many great challenges and slay the evil dragon in a faraway land.
—With everyone watching, the champion defeats the evil piper, and the story comes to a happy ending.

Title: Alternative Interpretation - Recitativo di Fantasia → Death of the Piper (EB)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
What flares warm like a flame, yet it is no flame?
What will be ignited when your heart pounds?
What will allow you to hear its voice when you place your hand on your chest and cover your ears?

Title: Alternative Interpretation - Recitativo di Fantasia → Walking on the Truth (EC)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Like a light in the dark, it shines for those drowned in sorrow.
It is born at night and dies at dawn.
The one thing all desire and cry for.

Title: Alternative Interpretation - Recitativo di Fantasia → Peony and Iris (ED)
Alternative Interpretation - Recitativo di Fantasia → Peony and Iris (Part D)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
"Facing the dragon, the champion remains steadfast. To protect their homeland, the champion raises their sword that represents justice and bravery."
Is she dreaming or awake?
Who is she?

Title: Alternative Interpretation - Recitativo di Fantasia → In the Name of Iris (EE)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The piper escapes the endless cycle of her doom and survives thanks to the champion who searches and comes to her rescue and the witch who helps from the shadow.
The story is drawing to a close. Its ending is as happy as that of a fairytale.
The champion and the piper work together to defeat the evil dragon.
