Title: Alternative Interpretation - Cursed Waves → Awakening (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The taste of metal and salt spreads in your mouth as a booming sound fills your ears.
It sounds like the waves crashing against the cliffside, the unending sound of the tide.
You grab ahold of yourself and reorient your consciousness from these stimuli of unknown origins.

Title: Alternative Interpretation - Cursed Waves → Farewell (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Your memories start from the moment you were washed ashore.
You do not remember anything before that, and you do not know how you got here.
A few Scavengers found you by the coast and saved you, and you have lived here ever since.

Title: Alternative Interpretation - Cursed Waves → Reincarnation (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Blood is still dripping down the blade that went through the girl\'s chest.
The cold body lies by your feet, slowly taken by the dark.
Will this do?

Title: Alternative Interpretation - Cursed Waves → Story (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The blurred colors slowly become concrete shapes. You blink, allowing a warm tear to drip down your cheek.
Your throat tightens as you groan unintelligibly.
[Medic]: You\'re awake.

Title: Alternative Interpretation - Cursed Waves → Contract (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The surging waves that echoed in your ears have stopped.
You open your eyes to find a completely new world.
The open field of grass is covered in a faint red. Unknown plants coil around tree roots and sprout from the soil.

Title: Alternative Interpretation - Cursed Waves → Reader (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Cradle]: ...
[Cradle]: Why...?
Confusion is evident in the girl\'s eyes as she walks through a desolate land. The ground is strewn with dust and sand, and weathered gravestones stand erect, scattered across the surface.

Title: Alternative Interpretation - Derived from Matrix → Phantom Sea (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
In the hush of darkness, wrapped in a tranquil yet faintly forlorn reverie.
Limbs numb, eyes too heavy to open, heart adrift without a home.
Drifting, letting your memories roam deeper, questing until they\'re adrift.

Title: Alternative Interpretation - Derived from Matrix → Here (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The battle\'s over, the enemies are gone, but that Red Tide\'s still creeping in.
Countdown hits zero, and everything\'s swallowed by that nasty red, dragged into a pit of despair.
Jetavie keels over out of nowhere, her tiny frame cradled in your arms.

Title: Alternative Interpretation - Derived from Matrix → Beyond (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The formidable enemy is vanquished, and the world-engulfing Red Tide retreats completely.
The once-red sky clears to reveal a brilliant blue dome, bathed in radiant light.
With Jetavie by your side, patches of light dancing between your figures, even the air feels fresher.

Title: Alternative Interpretation - Derived from Matrix → Jetavie (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
In a corner of the narrow enclosure, a crimson beam tears through the silent sky.
A flickering shadow weaves between the enemies, but the girl\'s eyes show neither joy nor rage.
[Higher Authority]: You now have the power to fully suppress the Red Tide, Jetavie.

Title: Alternative Interpretation - Derived from Matrix → Rabbit Hole (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Why can you hear this voice? Maybe something deep within your soul has stirred.
Well then, do you mind if I tell you a quick fairy tale?
It\'s that familiar fairy tale everyone knows, the one with Alice and the Rabbit Hole...

Title: Alternative Interpretation - Derived from Matrix → Night Watcher (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Above the ravaged battlefield, two silhouettes dart at lightning speed, locked in a relentless pursuit.
They collide and part ways; as their forms blaze into dazzling arcs of light, the resulting shockwaves obliterate every speck of dust on the ground.
As the smoke clears, beneath her tattered cloak, a woman with pink hair turns her gaze toward the far end of the battlefield.

Title: Alternative Interpretation - Derived from Matrix → Daybreaker (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The battle ends. The defeated Higher Authority sits alone at the edge of the battlefield, her loneliness unmistakable.
Jetavie steps behind Higher Authority and quietly puts her weapon away.
[Higher Authority]: Jetavie, you\'ve grown so much that you no longer need anyone else\'s strength. You can take care of things on your own.

Title: Alternative Interpretation - Awakening Tundra → Start of the Journey (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Clack... Clack... Clack... Clack...
The horse\'s hooves beat against the snow in a crisp, steady rhythm, jolting her out of a shallow doze.
A fleeting memory of that dream still drifts through her mind, but it quickly evaporates under the bite of the icy wind.

Title: Alternative Interpretation - Awakening Tundra → Sand Table (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The roaring wind eases into stillness, and the biting cold slowly slips away from their skin.
The long story ends abruptly, like a play that drops its curtain halfway, leaving chaos in its wake.
In the darkness, the final light flickers off, and the countless dancing digits vanish in an instant, plunging everything into silence.

Title: Alternative Interpretation - Awakening Tundra → Heart of the Land (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Tatyana]: Alright, that\'s the last one!
She strikes decisively, reducing the final Corrupted to dust. Tatyana\'s been through four or five rounds already, and there\'s still no sign of exhaustion on her face—just a growing rush of excitement the more she fights.
Ever since the Border Commune announced it would channel all resources into building an energy tower, she\'s thrown herself wholeheartedly into these combat missions.

Title: Alternative Interpretation - Awakening Tundra → Select (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Valeri]: Boss, this is a trap!
In this tight corridor, huge rocks keep raining down, piling up debris and snow that block their path. At the same time, an endless stream of mechanoid guards emerges from deep within the fortress.
They are shut in from both sides; there\'s no way out.

Title: Alternative Interpretation - Awakening Tundra → Galactic Dream (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A magnificent steed races across the snowy plains, trailing a comet-like spray of powder behind it.
It\'s already moving at meteoric speed, but the rider hugging the horse\'s neck still aches for more velocity.
She needs just a bit more speed... faster...

Title: Alternative Interpretation - Awakening Tundra → Burial at Sea (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The unknown Construct\'s broken form slowly sinks into the black tide. Her pale features fade into the darkness, until she\'s fully laid to rest at the bottom of the sea.
Stark-white ice merges with the inky tide, producing a scene as unsettling as a nightmare.
People are sticking to Antonov\'s plan exactly, but there\'s still this unsettling feeling they just can\'t shake.

Title: Alternative Interpretation - Awakening Tundra → Wind Catcher (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Boooo—
A deep-blue cargo ship blares its horn, sending plumes of white steam into the air as it approaches from the distant icebound sea.
After crossing vast distances and countless mountains and seas, the monsoon from the far side of the continent finally arrives at the snowy-white polar frontier.

Title: Alternative Interpretation - Awakening Tundra → Collapse of the Sand City (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Researcher]: 96, 97, 98, 99...
[Researcher]: We did it!
The excited researcher yanks out the monitoring earbuds and pulls Tatyana over to the holographic display.

Title: Alternative Interpretation - Awakening Tundra → Breaking the Cocoon (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Schulz]: ...
Another game session has ended. As usual, Schulz planted various redundant and useless data in the corners of the "sandbox" to prevent Tatyana from discovering the truth of the world.
This game session is also running perfectly, like precisely meshed gears, without any surprises.

Title: Alternative Interpretation - Awakening Tundra → Spring Dawn (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After a long and arduous journey, you finally reach the edge of the Sandbox world.
Ahead of you stretches a colossal iron wall, encased in ice and snow. This formidable barrier had been created by the Sandbox\'s "Higher Authority" to prevent any data from escaping.
You try to force it open, but like all the other obstacles you had encountered before, the laws of this world refuse any interference.

Title: Palette Clash - Travel with Vera → Travel with Vera - 1 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Alert... Alert...
Warning... Target locked...
Dazed, you can vaguely make out the flashing red light in your vision.

Title: Palette Clash - Travel with Vera → Travel with Vera - 2 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A flashing red light slices up all the objects in the air.
Facing paints spilling out from their cans, Vera swings her blade while leisurely dodging away.
[Awakened Machine]: Stay away!

Title: Palette Clash - Travel with Vera → Travel with Vera - 3 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A dark crimson color dashes across the chaotic battlefield.
In less than a minute, the mechanoids who were busy spraying the artworks of the opposite Schools all stopped in their tracks.
They all pause and stare at the spraying cans in their hands for a moment, confused about how they have been destroyed by a blade...

Title: Palette Clash - Travel with Vera → Travel with Vera - 4 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Vera]: It finally quiets down...
[Vera]: The other teams are on it. Shouldn\'t be much trouble.
[Awakened Machine]: ...

Title: Palette Clash - Travel with Lee → Travel with Lee - 1 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A breeze blows by, taking the heat away while leaving behind the fragrance of the wildflowers.
You fan yourself with your terminal, but you cannot save yourself from the heat of the enormous object behind you.
It is a platform lift that goes from inside the building to the roof. Up there sits the detection device Babylonia installed.

Title: Palette Clash - Travel with Lee → Travel with Lee - 2 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Awakened Machine]: ...
[Lee]: ...
The paint sprayer is pointed right at Lee\'s face. In return, Lee is also aiming his sprayer at his opponent.

Title: Palette Clash - Travel with Lee → Travel with Lee - 3 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
As more and more awakened machines are "disarmed," your questionings are trapped further and further into a dead end.
Common sense says that the mechanoids are clearly participating in a dangerous revelry with no regard for the cost.
But their answers are so alike that you seem to be the illogical ones here. You are powerless against them.

Title: Palette Clash - Travel with Lee → Travel with Lee - 4 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
"Cannot understand." "Cannot explain." "Cannot agree."
As incomprehensible as the mechanoids may be, you can still tell that these are the words in their heads right now.
The bound mechanoids sit side by side, staring forward motionlessly as if out of power.

Title: Palette Clash - Travel with Ayla → Travel with Ayla - 1 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You were wondering about one thing when you were on the transport craft.
"How many steps are there to stop the mechanoids from fighting an art war?"
Ayla only said one thing during the mission briefing.

Title: Palette Clash - Travel with Ayla → Travel with Ayla - 2 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Ayla raises her pen and aligns it with the girl in her vision.
Ayla is no beginner. She should not need to spend so much time on perspective and proportion.
[???]: Excuse me? How much longer will this take?

Title: Palette Clash - Travel with Ayla → Travel with Ayla - 3 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Windmill Square, above the steps where paints are literally flying.
Ayla has yet to set up her canvas and perform her finishing move despite being surrounded by all three Schools.
Instead, she has started a one-versus-all debate by providing criticisms.

Title: Palette Clash - Travel with Ayla → Travel with Ayla - 4 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Ayla stands with her painting in the middle of the street under the setting sun as the undisputable champion.
[Ayla]: Phew... It\'s finally over.
Stretching, she shows nothing but patience to the mechanoid who comes up to her.

Title: Palette Clash - Travel with Karenina → Travel with Karenina - 1 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Karenina]: So this all started because the mechanoids are competing?
Due to the urgent situation and the unexpected riots, you can only do the mission briefing with Karenina on the transport craft.
Karenina opens an image file on the terminal upon hearing WGAA\'s report on Constellia.

Title: Palette Clash - Travel with Karenina → Travel with Karenina - 2 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Art in Constellia comes in many forms.
Only a few of them are created deliberately to be free from human influence. Most of the rest are understandable to humans.
So you can see why they would choose to turn the counterweight of the calibration device into a statue.

Title: Palette Clash - Travel with Karenina → Travel with Karenina - 3 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You go through a few more areas with Karenina in the next two hours.
From statues that blocked the sewage system to graffiti that impacted power delivery, nothing is spared by Karenina\'s explosions.
Things were going smoothly at first. But as the news spreads, awakened machines of different Schools are getting alerted, setting up patrols to protect their artwork.

Title: Palette Clash - Travel with Karenina → Travel with Karenina - 4 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Windmill Square, in front of a graffiti-filled wall.
Mechanoids who have surrounded the area have blocked all the paths. It appears that all three Schools have formed an alliance and successfully ambushed your group.
[Karenina]: So the Masters from the Mechanical Schools also know how to lure the enemies in, huh?

Title: Palette Clash - Overture of Future → I Prelude Overture of Future (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
"Simulation complete. No match found based on search filters. Addition of new parameters is recommended."
"Would you like to save current search filters?"
"Simulation history cleared. You may exit now, ma\'am."

Title: Palette Clash - Overture of Future → II Prelude Overture of Future (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The night—\'tis the time to rest and sleep for humans as \'tis time to get creative juices flowing for mechanoids.
Being where the Palette Clash transpires, this place has driven away every last human and mechanoid that couldn\'t stand the constant hubbub.
An arrow with fireworks tied to it swishes into the sky, leaving in its wake a piercing hiss before it parts ways with the world in a loud explosion.

Title: Palette Clash - Overture of Future → lll Prelude Overture of Future (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Walking down the spacious hallway, you\'re fast approaching the hall at the end of it.
The hallway is lined on either side by the awakened machines from all schools, all apparently waiting for you and Dulcinea to arrive.
[Awakened Machine]: I thought Dulcinea working for Cervantes was going to be the one deciding the winner. What\'s up with the human?

Title: Palette Clash - Overture of Future → I Ending Overture of Future (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You have no idea how long the confrontation lasted.
All you know is that you\'ve had to hide yourself all over the place in Constellia and jumped at every chance you had to hit the machines before things slowed down.
So far, you haven\'t heard anyone calling you for help on your transceiver.

Title: Palette Clash - Overture of Future → II Ending Overture of Future (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Mark]: Are you really going to go with my work?
[Mark]: Right, I don\'t... except getting them to care about it is the whole point of this mission here.
A makeshift tent billows with shrieks in the wind on the spacious Windmill Square.

Title: Palette Clash - Overture of Future → lll Ending Overture of Future (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The breeze kisses Windmill Square ever so gently in the day\'s first sliver of sunlight.
The breeze, however, does nothing to mitigate the boiling tension that has long prevailed in the square.
To no one\'s surprise, the Neo-Multidimensional Mechanical Cubists have emerged as the winners, with Ayla\'s works as the mainstay...

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - The Godfall Revelation → Revelation (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
30 years after the Cataclysm, 4th day of the Starfire Month, midnight.
For thirty years, the world has known no night, trapped in an eternal day.
Even at the stroke of midnight, the sky blazes with brilliant sunlight.

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - The Godfall Revelation → Day of Wrath (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The train roars to life, its thunderous engine drowning out the Angels\' wails as it echoes once more across the desolate world.
["Angel"]: —Flesh and blood!! Slaughter!!
["Famine"]: Oh? Just a bit slower than me.

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - The Godfall Revelation → War Knight (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The blazing sun soars overhead, melting the boundless desert into a lake of shimmering gold.
The howling wind shrieks like burning blades, tearing through the crumbling yellow sand and cutting out a flat patch of ground in the wasteland.
The sandstorm gradually subsides, and on the vast wasteland, two figures slowly emerge. One stands behind the other, the scorching sun at their side. They are facing each other like arrows drawn and ready to fire.

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - The Godfall Revelation → Death Pilgrimage (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Suddenly, a melodic chime rings out beside his ear.
The music flows, weaving golden threads that descend into the shattered dreamscape, guiding your consciousness from deep slumber back into the warmth of reality.
[Morigan]: Caw—Commandant\'s awake! Awake!

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - The Godfall Revelation → Ember Rekindled (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Scorched Borderland, Rusty Yoke
[Soldier]: Taco, we\'ve handed out the weapons to all the town residents!
[Taco]: Thanks for your hard work. How is that lady doing?

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - The Godfall Revelation → Fatal Manhunt (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Ravens sweep overhead, gazing down at the carnage, where the air is thick with flesh and blood.
Amidst the grand symphony of gunfire, scattered piano notes dance through the chaos.
[Male Refugee]: I did what you asked! I brought all the food! You can\'t—

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - The Godfall Revelation → Fortress Deathmatch (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Before the Prison Riot, Halo Fortress Main Keep
[Death of Iron]: Commandant died thirty years ago.
Click—the trigger is pulled.

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - The Godfall Revelation → Forged Spine (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Blades clash with explosive force, sending rolling waves of sound that carve fresh scars into the surrounding buildings.
A burnt Eagle Banner hangs over the plaza, while shattered marble sculptures stand like silent spectators, witnessing the brutal duel.
[Watanabe]: Huff... Puff...

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - The Godfall Revelation → Crown of Death (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The river mist hangs thick and heavy, its sticky blackness silently cloaking the underworld.
Suddenly, a distant whistle echoes from above—from the mortal world.
In the next moment, a train wreathed in black flames roars into view. Its steam engine looms proudly above the churning waves, pulling its carriages down into the endless fog below.

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - The Godfall Revelation → Kowloong River (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The old Hell Train rumbles to life again. For the first time since angels hijacked it for the Sanctuary\'s use years ago, it\'s finally heading the right way—straight for Hell.
["Death"]: Is this your first time in the Hell Train\'s control room?
["Death"]: The scenery in Hell is magnificent. You should take advantage of this "homecoming" to enjoy the view.

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - The Godfall Revelation → Crimson Tides (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Witch Haida]: You\'re so incredibly... stubborn!
Witch Haida\'s halberd blade meets "Death\'s" powerful blow, sending a jolt up her arms. Her wrists throb as she cries out her accusation in pain.
[Witch Haida]: You\'re like wet sealing wax—impossible to shake off! Don\'t you ever quit?!

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - The Godfall Revelation → Beneath the Dying Flame (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Twilight zone, dim light zone, darkness zone...
The feeling of plunging into the abyss slowly fades as the light recedes, your senses smothered by the thick, encroaching void.
You fight to keep your eyes open, catching a glimpse of a faint light just as your thoughts are about to be consumed by the River Acheron.

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - The Godfall Revelation → Laws of Life and Death (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
That day, she watches as the steam-billowing train thunderously opens its doors before her.
A demon dressed in pristine white clothing, without a speck of dust, stands at the entrance, staring at her with cold indifference.
After a long silence, the demon finally utters two sentences.

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - The Godfall Revelation → Maze of Fate (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The moment she lays eyes on "Death" in the secret underground hall, Witch Haida takes off like a shot into the labyrinthine corridors.
[Witch Haida]: How—how could she suss out this place? Weren\'t she and that person supposed to be stuck fast in the Acheron River?
[Witch Haida]: Get a grip... You\'re Witch Haida, a big-shot Demon Lord now. You\'ve got Atlantis back under your thumb. See, everything\'s right where it should be, they\'re all tucked safely in your embrace...

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - The Godfall Revelation → Eternal Punishment (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The Dual-Bladed Lance and Halberd Blade cross in the scorching air, their friction sparking dazzling starlight.
Creatures of flame and the deep sea watch this confrontation unfold from the depths of Hell.
["Death"]: You fool! Lustrous was right—even if you lived to be sixty, you\'d still be blind to what\'s happening right in front of you!

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - The Godfall Revelation → Day of the Cataclysm (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
In the stillness of midnight, a boy stirs in his sleep, as if roused by something unknown. He awakens on his creaking wooden bed.
Ever since the plague, day and night have blurred into one. A hazy light constantly fills the orphanage dormitory. But tonight, the usual chorus of breathing is gone. In its place is an unsettling silence.
He sits up, wipes the clinging drowsiness from his face, staggers to the next bed, and discovers not only that his companions are gone, but the entire dormitory is deserted.

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - The Godfall Revelation → Pestilence Knight (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Two steeds move through the dense forest mist and finally stop in front of an unremarkable wooden cabin.
Still not fully recovered, Wanshi tugs the reins and slowly brings the horse to a stop in front of a weathered courtyard gate.
[Wanshi]: ...This is where I\'ve been staying. It\'s also an orphanage I built on my own.

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - The Godfall Revelation → Lifebury Woods (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The last bloom of blood withers, and heavy, rotting flesh collapses into a pool of still water.
Warm candlelight flickers through the trees, listening to the silent grief of those who died without a voice. It guides their unwilling souls toward peace.
["Pestilence"]: Six hundred seventy-two. Carson Deller. Sleep now. I\'ve remembered your story. Your life was not in vain.

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - The Godfall Revelation → The Defect of the World (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Within the long dream, you feel your consciousness violently pulled away, then shoved into another memory.
It\'s a memory filled with pain, anger, and defiance. It makes your heart tremble.
But the owner of that memory rejects the intruding presence, and your mind is forced into another memory entirely.

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - The Godfall Revelation → Cocoon (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The clock hands keep turning.
He sees the weight of history buried beneath the earth. He sees the tree rings of an ancient trunk flow with the passing sun and moon. He sees drifting sand gather into stone, only to shatter again in the depths of rushing rivers.
Time, once slow and vast, suddenly accelerates. The hands on its great dial spin forward toward the next cycle.

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - The Godfall Revelation → A Gift for You (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Uriel]: Wh-why are you stopping me...
[Uriel]: Even if the holy crown is destroyed, the divine wrath won\'t end. The calamity will still befall the world...
Uriel, severely wounded, clutches the gaping hole in her chest. She leans against the cocoon wall, struggling to breathe.

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - The Godfall Revelation → Snow in a Bottle (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Heavy fog cloaks the wilderness, burying the dense forest beneath layers of suffocating mist.
It\'s the dead of night in Whitehorse, where townsfolk slumber peacefully, blissfully unaware of the dark events transpiring in the forest beyond.
Through the dim haze, two figures dart along the forest path with hunched shoulders, clutching their bundles protectively as they sprint from tree to tree, finally ducking behind a massive trunk where they crouch gasping for air.

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - The Godfall Revelation → Unfinished Game (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Clack-clack, clack-clack—
The sun beats down mercilessly as an old carriage rattles along the dusty road toward Whitehorse.
Two figures sit on the driver\'s bench—one grips the reins while the other holds up a Moon Umbrella, shielding them both from the brutal afternoon sun.

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - The Godfall Revelation → Following the Memory (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
["Angel"]: ...Train coins, must take... the gambler Lilith... must slaughter, slaughter!!
Fed up with the creature\'s rasping shrieks, the Demon Knight stamps down on its chest, the sharp spur of her boot finding its throat to cut off any further wailing.
["Famine"]: Speak. If Madam Raphael already has the key, why is she still so fixated on me?

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - The Godfall Revelation → Crown of Desire (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Madam Raphael]: Lilith, the game of hide-and-seek is over.
After several rounds of savage bloodbath, the lesser Angels are now nothing but mangled corpses littering the ground, forcing the Archangel who had been commanding from safety to finally dirty her own hands.
[Madam Raphael]: Enough with the cat-and-mouse games! Hand over Mammon\'s Code!

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - The Godfall Revelation → Yearning for the End: Part I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
["Mammon"]: Ahaha! Pathetic! Just as I thought! Even the almighty Archangel is nothing but another slave to superior power!
Mammon pins the razor-sharp umbrella tip against Raphael\'s chest, methodically driving it through her body over and over. This woman caused her too many humiliations. She won\'t give the arrogant Angel the mercy of a swift death.
The golden runes covering Raphael\'s body grow dim, the gaping wound in her chest tears open again and again only to heal moments later, and the core nestled beneath her ribs flickers weakly. Her clashes with Gray Raven and "Mammon" have drained nearly all her power.

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - The Godfall Revelation → Yearning for the End: Part II (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After their brief conversation, the ghost decides to personally guide you to meet Mammon. It chatters away the entire way, explaining this world\'s rules to its unexpected visitor.
[??]: We all came here carrying too many regrets. To make our wishes come true, we willingly sold our souls to Mammon in exchange for the right to stay here forever.
[??]: Take me, for instance. I used to be an architect, but spent my whole life building nothing but cafeterias and bathrooms. Only after coming here did I finally get to experience what it\'s like being the one in charge!

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - The Godfall Revelation → Heed My Word (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The entire City of No Return shudders violently as furnace fires rage and golden sparks fly. The thunderous exchange of projectiles transforms this place into a brilliant arena.
Amid a thunderous explosion, the Devil King grips her Moon Umbrella and leaps back, its razor-sharp tip gouging a deep furrow in the ground. The impact nearly drives the umbrella\'s ribs like spikes into the stone.
["Mammon"]: Impressive, Gray Raven! Only someone with power like this is worthy of me betting my loyalty!

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - The Godfall Revelation → The Crimson Rust Declaration (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Amid the violent tremors of collapse, the battlements shed clouds of ashen dust.
Fire, brimstone, and the rust of dried blood mingle in the air, assaulting every being on the battlefield—angels, the Living Dead, demons, and humans alike.
[Soldier]: Not just angels, but and the Living Dead, too—and far more than we anticipated... Our intel was wrong. There\'s no way we can take this fortress with our current forces!

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - The Godfall Revelation → Unending (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lilith]: To you, and to the final rounds left in our game with the angels—cheers.
Lilith\'s face lights up at the response. The glasses ring out with a crisp chime, and her spirits lift with the sound.
[Lilith]: What a pity, Commandant.

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - The Godfall Revelation → Horn of Sacred Ruin (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Before you lie a scorched wasteland. The remains of the Mysterious Tavern scatter like chewed bones across the dust, barely hinting at the outline of what once stood there.
[Wanshi]: Huff... huff... You okay there, Bloodsworn?
Having deployed his lantern\'s defense, Wanshi stands before you, his knuckles white from the strain.

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - The Godfall Revelation → Sacred Carrion Rain (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
["Ferryman"]: Come here, Lamia.
[Lamia]: ...
["Ferryman"]: I\'m not going to repeat myself.

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - The Godfall Revelation → God-Devouring Sparks (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[??]: Can we dig out Commandant?
[??]: Found you. Here, take my hand.
A wave of dizziness washes over you. The world around you is dark, reeking of blood, and littered with severed limbs...

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - The Godfall Revelation → The Dreamless (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Nirvatia lay on her back in the sea of blooms, feeling the breeze on her face and the flowers\' scent in the air.
[Nirvatia]: Huff...
This is her favorite place. On quiet afternoons, when there\'s nothing to do, Nirvatia would slip away into the flowers and let her mind drift into calm.

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - The Godfall Revelation → Scales of Judgment (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nirvatia]: Why fall to earth...?
As she softly speaks the last line, a sudden gust tears through the air, tossing the unfinished pages into chaos.
She presses the pages down, and through the fluttering blur, sees a few children waving from afar.

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - The Godfall Revelation → Falling Meteor (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The next morning, just after dawn, the three of you set off from the village and begin your journey to the tribunal.
Strangely enough, the journey doesn\'t feel so heavy, perhaps because of Beatrice, who sits in the back of the carriage, marveling at everything she sees.
[Beatrice]: Miss Nirvatia, look! I didn\'t know there was such a big plain right over that hill!

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - The Godfall Revelation → Eternal Curse (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After the Cataclysm, the eternal daylight arrives, but the entire Scorched Borderland remains shrouded in endless gloom.
The Supreme Heaven, enraged by the fall of the Cardinal Deity, unleashes divine punishment on every soul. Even the demons of Hell cannot escape.
Nyarlathotep, defeated by the Supreme Heaven, vanishes without a trace. Hell, left without its ruler, falls into chaos.

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - The Godfall Revelation → Requiem Part I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After a brief moment of hesitation, you take Nirvatia\'s hand.
You couldn\'t agree with her before. But after seeing what she went through—what you both went through—something inside you changes.
Perhaps she\'s right. Only by tearing down the laws that bind the Three Realms and remaking the continent itself can the suffering of this land finally end.

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - The Godfall Revelation → Requiem Part II (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Demon Attendant]: Congratulations, my lady. With the fall of the last Cardinal Diocese, we now control the entire Scorched Borderland.
[Demon Attendant]: Meanwhile, construction of the Babel Tower continues without a hitch. I believe it won\'t be long before the Supreme Heaven also falls under your control, my lord.
[Nirvatia]: Enough with the flattery. Stop wasting my time. Where is Gray Raven?

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - The Godfall Revelation → Reencounter: Part I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
No, something is wrong...
The path she points to will lead the entire world toward its end...
Amid the chaos in your mind, one thought rises with absolute clarity.

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - The Godfall Revelation → Reencounter: Part II (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nirvatia]: Ugh—!
The heavens and the earth lose their color as the battle erupts. Everything around you breaks apart and rebuilds again as the laws of the world begin to collapse. But the fighting does not stop. It goes on with no end in sight.
The golden towers that once held up the sky now lie in ruins, shattered by fire and steel. The Sanctuary\'s awe and grandeur are gone, but the rules it created still cling to the world, refusing to fade.

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - Shrouded Requiem → Day of the Gallows (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
As midnight approaches, the full moon illuminates the lofty clock tower. A public hanging is about to take place there under the gaze of onlookers.
The executioners shove the prisoners, bound tightly in iron chains, toward the gallows.
[Morigan]: Stop pulling my tail! Or I\'ll curse you even in hell!

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - Shrouded Requiem → Omen Arrives (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The gas lamps on the streets have long gone out. Only the massive full moon casts an eerie, cold glow over the city streets.
Strange laughter occasionally echoes through the streets in the dead of night.
[Deranged Pedestrian]: Ahhh—they will arrive among us to devour everything in this mortal world...

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - Shrouded Requiem → Into the Misty Night (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
In the lavishly decorated city hall, the ashen-faced mayor sits at the table in the council chamber, silently glaring at Sheriff Shorthalt for what seems like an eternity.
Anxiety hangs over the mayor like a storm cloud. Nothing but bad news has reached his ears since he signed the order to execute the Aberrations.
Whether it\'s the Aberrations escaping the gallows, or the continued silence from the Academy regarding any breakthroughs in their research.

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - Shrouded Requiem → Bitter Moonlight (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[??]: When hell stands empty and demons walk the earth, churches are overflown with the desperate masses.
[??]: The divine spirits remain silent, and their followers are like lambs born in darkness. Without proper guidance, they remain pure and innocent, even when they commit sins.
[Will the First Mate]: They keep repeating the same thing, but I guess that\'s preaching... The same sermon with a fresh coat of paint. What\'s even the point?

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - Shrouded Requiem → Destiny's Pursuit (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
With her authority as a countess, Alpha bypasses all barriers and arrives directly before the Holy Maiden.
As the countess kneels and prays for a swift vengeance, she feels her scabbard grow increasingly hot. Her blade has always resonated with her murderous intent.
[Holy Maiden Mia]: Whatever wish you have, you may confide in Mother Superior, my child.

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - Shrouded Requiem → Cat & Mouse (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
As Alpha kicks the last disciple back into the church, the crowd surges forward together to close the cast-iron gates.
The Countess slowly slides down against the door and sits. Exhaustion from overexertion brings with it an intense hunger.
She needs blood—vast amounts of fresh, corrupted blood. This artificial Aberration body runs on tainted blood as fuel.

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - Shrouded Requiem → Calamitous Night (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
For you, being followed and arrested by unfamiliar police officers and thrown into a jail cell all took place within a matter of hours.
Before today, you were just an unremarkable nobody who owned a detective agency off the beaten track, living with your assistant Eileena, who occasionally made a small mistake or two.
The agency mostly investigated trivial matters: extramarital affairs, leaked compromising photos, stolen jewelry, mysterious telegrams, and the like. When finances got tight, you\'d even walk dogs and do other odd jobs.

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - Shrouded Requiem → Wayward Hunt (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Eileena]: Isn\'t it a bit too late to ask that now?
[Alpha]: You chose to come... Your assistant too.
[Eileena]: It\'s so creepy around here, all barren without any street lights. We\'ve already passed a cemetery, two abandoned manors, a dark forest, and a small chapel.

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - Shrouded Requiem → Forsaking Morality (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The room lacks any natural light, its decor worn, the medical equipment antiquated. Thousands of puppets fill the space, all embodying Cradle\'s innermost thoughts.
Eileena picks up an imaginary pipe, lights it with an imaginary match, and begins to speak with an exaggerated air of profundity.
[Eileena]: Leave the facts to me. A great detective always pieces together the real truth from the details others have overlooked.

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - Shrouded Requiem → Promise of the Past (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The mind is a place where common sense holds no power. It contains memories, dreams, and emotions that intertwine to form a vast labyrinth, one so complex that even the mind\'s owner can become lost within it.
Alpha\'s world is just as strange: real-world buildings stand among clouds, while dining tables float above the sea. Scorching sun switches to sudden downpour, while everything freezes at midnight beneath a crimson moon.
[Eileena]: You might need new glasses. That\'s a cemetery... The leaves are ghostly flames, and the flowers are made of bones.

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - Shrouded Requiem → City of Solitude (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Though the underworld springs from human imagination, sometimes the face of hell cannot compare to even a fraction of the horrors found in the world of the living.
Before the myriad scenes of horror can fall into view, Alpha rushes to Eileena\'s side, unfurling her cloak to embrace Eileena and gently covering Eileena\'s eyes with her hand.
[Alpha]: Don\'t look. Follow me.

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - Shrouded Requiem → Woven Fates (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Cradle unfurls her web of threads. She\'s nearly invincible—each time she approaches her limit, new puppets appear to reinforce her formation.
She can resurrect countless times, until her opponent\'s strength is completely drained.
[Cradle]: 33%. How about that, Countess? Are you satisfied with the power of my army yet?

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - Shrouded Requiem → Person in the Mirror (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Eileena]: We shouldn\'t have skipped past it when we were in Alpha\'s mind...
[Eileena]: We missed a crucial clue that day...
You can\'t hide the bitterness of being kept from the truth, but you can\'t help but feel a sense of anticipation. Perhaps there\'s still a chance, and maybe fate has other plans for the sisters after all.

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - Shrouded Requiem → Realm Beyond (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Luna]: Cradle, is this your creation?
[Cradle]: My army. My puppet army. Good little things that will never betray me.
[Luna]: Is that so? You\'re still so fond of your little schemes behind the scenes. What a shame that no matter how many chances you\'re given, you only ever produce such mediocrity.

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - Shrouded Requiem → March to Daybreak (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The power of routine carries an immense inertia. Something as mundane as a cup of less-than-perfect coffee is enough to overshadow the memories of adventures, reducing them to mere delusions of a confused mind.
[Eileena]: Boss, can we maybe buy some higher-quality coffee beans? Splurging on non-discounted beans once in a while won\'t bankrupt us.
[Eileena]: Here\'s your newspaper, here\'s your toast, and here\'s your subpar coffee. Ah, my beloved rainy day... looks like we won\'t be getting any customers today.

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - Shrouded Requiem → City of Serenity (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The city lies silent beneath the heavy cloak of dusk, as if it has fallen into a deep slumber.
Only the sound of footsteps from afar echoes through the night as two figures enter the city, breaking the deathly stillness.
A gray-clad figure walks alongside a young girl, their silhouettes outlined by the pale light of a waning moon as they step into the city. But the girl seems unable to bear such silence.

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - Shrouded Requiem → Unexpected Allies (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Dark clouds swallow the last traces of moonlight, plunging the already eerie streets into deeper darkness.
The pale moonlight fades completely as the Mist rolls in without warning. The sound of steady footsteps echoes faintly in the distance from within the thick fog.
The footsteps draw closer, steadily approaching you two.

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - Shrouded Requiem → Unresolved Case (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You stand under the dim yellow lights before a pale, rigid corpse. It is the body of a young person, drained of life, cold and still as carved stone.
Towering stacks of case files line the nearby walls, all grim evidence of the series of killings that has plagued this town. The body lying here is clearly not the killer\'s first victim.
[Veronica]: ...

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - Shrouded Requiem → Twilight Shadow (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: ...▃▅▆▁▂▄▁... Come... into the Mist... ▆▁▂▄▁...
[???]: Bloodthirsty... ▆▁▆▁▂... Siren▃▅▆▁...
Through the billowing fog, Veronica hears that voice again.

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - Shrouded Requiem → Mad Feast (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You can make out a trail of strange footprints on the ground by the pale moonlight.
Bloody rat tracks stretch all the way to the distant House of Peace, where they finally disappear.
What awaits you is an unbelievable sight: a bizarre banquet is underway inside the House of Peace.

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - Shrouded Requiem → Bow to Darkness (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
As the "banquet" begins, the townsfolk with their vacant stares start moving with shambling, unsteady steps.
Approaching Veronica, they seemingly try to escort her to partake of the so-called "sacrifice."
In their addled minds, they are escorting the "Bloodthirsty Siren", who does not fear the Mist and will grant them protection.

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - Shrouded Requiem → Beneath the Lies (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Everything around her vanishes, and she finds herself standing on the city streets she has walked countless times once more, thick fog swirling all around.
A devil with hazy features emerges from the fog, thick shadows like blood surging in its palm.
She knows the voice all too well, having heard it countless times in her dreams.

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - Shrouded Requiem → Blazing Will (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Even after Veronica pushes you out through the tall window, you refuse to abandon what is also rightfully your battle.
Eileena, who has been unconscious in your arms, slowly opens her eyes.
[Eileena]: Commandant...

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - Shrouded Requiem → Destiny's Shadow (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
She raises her weapon, aiming it at the attendees who are now nothing more than walking corpses.
The host of this feast clearly hasn\'t anticipated such a turn of events. He has no desire for his banquet to be disrupted by such discordant notes.
["Roko"]: Do you no longer wish to protect them as the sheriff of this town?

Title: Multiversal Chronicles - Shrouded Requiem → Before the End (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Mist still shrouds the town, its once-bustling streets now silent. Only rats scurry through the darkness, their claws scratching against stone.
The detective, the assistant, and their former client now stand united with a new purpose, facing the endless Mist together.
You have become true "companions," united in purpose and understanding.

Title: Affection - Lee: Palefire → Lee: Palefire I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: Liv, keep your distance!
[Lee]: You\'ll need to learn to use different types of defenses to complete a kill.
[Lee]: You and Lucia have different tactic systems, you can\'t just imitate an Attacker\'s battle style.

Title: Affection - Lee: Palefire → Lee: Palefire II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: These have been taken care of, we can start retrieving resources now.
[Lee]: Okay, I\'ll leave you to secure the perimeter.
[Liv]: I\'m going to search that area and ensure that it\'s safe!

Title: Affection - Lee: Palefire → Lee: Palefire III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: Looks like the parts and tools are ready.
[Lee]: It should be fine as long as there aren\'t any hidden security issues or vulnerabilities.
[Lee]: That\'s right, you want one, too?

Title: Affection - Lee: Palefire → Lee: Palefire IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: Yo! Commandant, what are you doing here sneaking around?
[Kamui]: Wow... I thought you were spying on something top secret but what\'s so interesting about Lee? Just go in and say hi... Hi! Lee!!
[Kamui]: You were busy with something and I saw Commandant here peeking for a while now.

Title: Affection - Lee: Palefire → Lee: Palefire V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Commandant, are you here for Lee?
[Lucia]: Now that you mention it, Lee did ask me about what you liked a few days ago...
[Lucia]: Commandant... You look happy...?

Title: Affection - Lee: Palefire → Lee: Palefire VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: Commandant, the equipment and repair resources are ready.
[Lee]: After countless inspections and investigations, I\'ve made sure what happened last time won\'t happen again.
[Lee]: Commandant, I heard that you\'ve destroyed 500 Corrupted.

Title: Affection - Lucia: Lotus → Lucia: Lotus I (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Corrupted]: —!!
[Lucia]: Corrupted detected, Commandant.
[Lucia]: Understood.

Title: Affection - Lucia: Lotus → Lucia: Lotus II (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Construct]: ...Yes, that\'s right.
[Construct]: Can I trouble you to look after it before we have time to retrieve it?
[Lucia]: That shouldn\'t be a problem.

Title: Affection - Lucia: Lotus → Lucia: Lotus III (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Puppy]: Woof!
[Liv]: Wait, don\'t run around inside the base!
[Liv]: It\'s all thanks to Lucia getting the medicine from the city, but...

Title: Affection - Lucia: Lotus → Lucia: Lotus IV (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Puppy]: Woof!
[Lee]: Just go to sleep already!
[Puppy]: Woof!!

Title: Affection - Lucia: Lotus → Lucia: Lotus V (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: Liv and I will take care of the dog for the time being, you go train with Commandant, Lucia.
[Lee]: It shouldn\'t be a problem as long as we create a proper procedure for feeding...
[Lucia]: Yes, Commandant.

Title: Affection - Lucia: Lotus → Lucia: Lotus VI (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Construct]: Gray Raven, we thank you for your assistance.
[Puppy]: Woof!
[Liv]: The puppy\'s going home with the Support Force?

Title: Affection - Liv: Eclipse → Liv: Eclipse I (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Our only target is that Corrupted!
[Corrupted]: —!
[Lee]: You\'re not getting away.

Title: Affection - Liv: Eclipse → Liv: Eclipse II (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: I\'ll do my best to complete the special training, Commandant!
[Liv]: I\'ve compiled several training programs after analyzing the data... but there\'s something I want to ask you first, Commandant.
[Liv]: Wonderful! I knew you\'d help me, Commandant.

Title: Affection - Liv: Eclipse → Liv: Eclipse III (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: I\'ve selected the appropriate program based on the criteria.
[Liv]: That\'s right. It\'s more effective choosing this way.
[Liv]: What we\'ll be doing today is the first step of the training program—thinking exercise.

Title: Affection - Liv: Eclipse → Liv: Eclipse IV (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Commandant, we\'re on the second step of the program today—combat mode training.
[Liv]: To learn how to use weapons outside of my Levi-Gun.
[Liv]: Lucia mentioned that the more you master, the better it is.

Title: Affection - Liv: Eclipse → Liv: Eclipse V (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: W-welcome back... M-mast—
[Liv]: No. This is training.
[Liv]: This is... an additional exercise for the training...

Title: Affection - Liv: Eclipse → Liv: Eclipse VI (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: For our final session, Commandant, we will be doing field testing today.
[Liv]: Although it\'s called field testing, we\'ll only be tackling a mission that seems doable by myself.
[Corrupted]: —!

Title: Affection - Bianca: Zero → Bianca: Zero I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bianca]: I don\'t know how to work with a commandant like you.
[Bianca]: I\'m sorry. That came out of nowhere.
[Bianca]: Having a stronger sense of rank and station, keeping the relationship between superiors and subordinates professional. The kind Karenina despises.

Title: Affection - Bianca: Zero → Bianca: Zero II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bianca]: You wanted to know more about the Purifying Force, Commandant?
[Bianca]: As you know, the Purifying Force is the task force that specializes in purifying Constructs.
[Bianca]: Although we do fight Corrupted sometimes, our main duty is to hunt down defected Constructs.

Title: Affection - Bianca: Zero → Bianca: Zero III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bianca]: Commandant, our mission today is to join the other squads for a joint operation, right?
[Bianca]: Are you asking... because of what happened with the Support Force earlier?
[Bianca]: Don\'t worry, Commandant. It\'ll be fine.

Title: Affection - Bianca: Zero → Bianca: Zero IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Karenina]: Bianca, I\'ll probably be out for a mission the next few days.
[Bianca]: I see. But you have to obey orders, alright?
[Karenina]: We\'ll see.

Title: Affection - Bianca: Zero → Bianca: Zero V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bianca]: While we\'re still capable to keep fighting, I\'d advise retreating for now, Commandant.
[???]: H-help...
[Bianca]: Understood, Commandant.

Title: Affection - Bianca: Zero → Bianca: Zero VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bianca]: Thank you for speaking up for me last time, Commandant.
[Bianca]: It is true that I\'m neither here nor there, isn\'t it? Not to mention that there\'s only so much one person can do. That wasn\'t your fight, Commandant.
[Bianca]: I can\'t keep my role as a Purifying Force member away when I\'m on the Gray Raven Task Force.

Title: Affection - Kamui: Bastion → Kamui: Bastion I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Battle preparations are completed, Commandant. We can go anytime.
[Liv]: It seems that most squads have been sent out for this mission.
[Liv]: Maybe we\'ll be collaborating with others on our objectives!

Title: Affection - Kamui: Bastion → Kamui: Bastion II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: The mission\'s over. The damage taken was less than expected.
[Liv]: I\'m glad the mission wasn\'t too hard. It\'s good to have everyone back safe and sound.
[Lee]: Still, we need to rest up and debrief.

Title: Affection - Kamui: Bastion → Kamui: Bastion III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: We\'ve been notified that a member from another squad will come to borrow our equipment for their maintenance today.
[Liv]: Who will that be?
[Lucia]: ...I have a hunch.

Title: Affection - Kamui: Bastion → Kamui: Bastion IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: Um...
[Kamui]: Phew! What a relief.
[Kamui]: Thanks, Commandant!

Title: Affection - Kamui: Bastion → Kamui: Bastion V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Maybe it\'s because Kamui hasn\'t shown up recently.
[Lucia]: Strike Hawks are in charge of scouting the battlefields. They rarely have the chance for a long period of rest.
[Lucia]: Let me check the parts in our storage. Maybe Kamui will come back for his maintenance in the future.

Title: Affection - Kamui: Bastion → Kamui: Bastion VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: Hmm...?
[Kamui]: Commandant?
[Kamui]: I\'ve long remembered the sound of your footsteps! Of course I know it\'s you.

Title: Affection - Nanami: Storm → Nanami: Storm I (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: Boring! Boring! So boring! Nanami\'s bored!
[Nanami]: Lucia! Lu~ci~a! What mission do you have? Take Nanami with you!
[Lucia]: I do have a few missions on hand...

Title: Affection - Nanami: Storm → Nanami: Storm II (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: Hey! Hey, Commandant! Here, here!
[Nanami]: It doesn\'t count as a date if we remain at the base.
[Nanami]: That\'s right! It\'s our first date!

Title: Affection - Nanami: Storm → Nanami: Storm III (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: Our second date will be in Professor Nanami\'s lab!
[Nanami]: Because Nanami is the person in charge for this room!
[Nanami]: It is if Nanami says so!

Title: Affection - Nanami: Storm → Nanami: Storm IV (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: Arghhhh!
[Nanami]: So annoying!! Annoying!!!
[Liv]: ...

Title: Affection - Nanami: Storm → Nanami: Storm V (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: If humans are truly required for Nanami\'s wacky experiments, then it would be easiest to send her to her corresponding place in human society.
With a solemn expression, Lee gathers the team and announces his plan.
[Lee]: Yes. I think this is best for everyone. Hear me out.

Title: Affection - Nanami: Storm → Nanami: Storm VI (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: Commandant, I have found a suitable school for Nanami with Celica\'s help. What say we send her over?
[Lee]: It\'s not like we have other jobs on our hands at the moment.
[Lee]: It\'s just going to school, nothing special.

Title: Affection - Karenina: Blast → Karenina: Blast I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Karenina]: Liv, do you know how to fortify the wall?
[Liv]: No problem.
[Karenina]: I\'ll go handle logistics with the support force.

Title: Affection - Karenina: Blast → Karenina: Blast II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Hey, Nanami! Give me back the fusion device!
[Nanami]: I have a new phrase I learned for you! You snooze, you lose! It\'s mine now!
[Liv]: Ugh... What should we do now?

Title: Affection - Karenina: Blast → Karenina: Blast III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Karenina]: Commandant, expanding the base is priority number one. We should deploy defenses outside as well.
[Karenina]: Hmph, who knows? Hindsight\'s always 20/20.
[Karenina]: Time\'s of the essence. We\'re about to be dispatched on our next mission.

Title: Affection - Karenina: Blast → Karenina: Blast IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Karenina]: I\'ll get this done as soon as possible. Then I\'ll be outta your hair!
[Karenina]: I\'ve been coming here way too often recently.
[Nanami]: Ahhhhh! It\'s about to blow!

Title: Affection - Karenina: Blast → Karenina: Blast V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Karenina]: Bianca, please?
[Bianca]: ...
[Bianca]: Karenina, that\'s impossible right now.

Title: Affection - Karenina: Blast → Karenina: Blast VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Karenina]: Looks like the fortification of the periphery is complete. I thought I was going to have to come back later and do it.
[Kamui]: Gee, way to trust us!
[Nanami]: Yeah! I wanna protest, too!

Title: Affection - Lucia: Dawn → Lucia: Dawn I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: I guess that\'s the end of this emergency mission then.
[Construct]: Yes, thank you for your assistance, Gray Raven. You guys really are something else.
[Lucia]: It\'s all thanks to Commandant giving the correct orders by assessing the situation.

Title: Affection - Lucia: Dawn → Lucia: Dawn II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[System]: —Analyzing target, Corrupted cluster confirmed, retrieving coordinates, coordinates confirmed.
[Liv]: Commandant, HQ has assigned us a new mission.
[Liv]: Okay, I\'ll go fetch Lucia now.

Title: Affection - Lucia: Dawn → Lucia: Dawn III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: I can take care of this myself, Commandant. You can go help the Support Force to take inventory of battle resources.
[Lee]: Lucia\'s over there with the Support Force and she probably needs your help more.
[Support Construct]: I understand your request.

Title: Affection - Lucia: Dawn → Lucia: Dawn IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: As the Support Force member said, can I trouble you to help me decide on a new look for the frame, Commandant?
[Lucia]: The Support Force already sent me a few sketches, Commandant, maybe you can choose one from them...
[Lucia]: ...The original, no, the Support Force already sent me a few sketches, Commandant, maybe you can choose a more suitable one...

Title: Affection - Lucia: Dawn → Lucia: Dawn V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: Maybe she refused to use that frame because of the hairstyle... What do you think, Commandant?
[Liv]: I don\'t think Lucia hates the twin tails.
[Liv]: I saw her looking at her own reflection in the mirror for quite some time when she first received the new frame.

Title: Affection - Lucia: Dawn → Lucia: Dawn VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Commandant.
[Lucia]: I still don\'t think they suit me.
[Lucia]: They look good but I just feel a bit on edge when using this frame.

Title: Affection - Liv: Lux → Liv: Lux I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Commandant, that\'s the end of today\'s battle mission.
[Liv]: You can leave the work at the base to me, Commandant.
[Liv]: We can leave collecting materials to the other Constructs. I don\'t think you have to do it yourself, Commandant.

Title: Affection - Liv: Lux → Liv: Lux II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Commandant, I\'ve already logged and updated today\'s agenda. Please follow it strictly as scheduled.
[Liv]: You don\'t have to repeat yourself, Commandant.
[Liv]: Did something happen? What a weird question, Commandant.

Title: Affection - Liv: Lux → Liv: Lux III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Lee said you wanted to talk to me about what\'s been going on, Commandant?
[Liv]: What exactly do you mean? I hope we can settle it during this break before I return to work on the documents.
[Liv]: Someone else? Do you mean my appearance?

Title: Affection - Liv: Lux → Liv: Lux IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Celica]: It\'s getting late. I\'ll leave the rest of the work to you, is that alright?
[Celica]: Taking proper rests is important too! Not that I can help you with Gray Raven business, anyway.
[Celica]: You should be familiar with the process and preparations for connections as well. So go connect now!

Title: Affection - Liv: Lux → Liv: Lux V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Commandant, is our mission today to track the special Corrupted?
[Lee]: But it surely is difficult to track something without its waveform signatures.
[Lee]: Liv, does anything show up on the radar?

Title: Affection - Liv: Lux → Liv: Lux VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: I\'ve used the terminal to clear some of the caches. I\'ll do a more thorough checkup later, so just stay here and don\'t move.
[Lee]: Regardless of what Commandant thinks, you\'ve been pushing yourself too hard recently, Liv.
[Lee]: You carry everything on your shoulders—combat, preparations, even Commandant\'s documents were taken care of by you.

Title: Affection - Watanabe: Nightblade → Watanabe: Nightblade I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Watanabe]: Right, go check the western front. Corrupted have been showing up on that side lately.
[Watanabe]: I\'m worried that our defense there isn\'t enough.
[Forsaken Construct]: Roger.

Title: Affection - Watanabe: Nightblade → Watanabe: Nightblade II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Watanabe]: Why are you still following me? Do you need a tour guide or something?
[Watanabe]: Can\'t you take a hint...
[Watanabe]: ...Fine. But no funny business, I warn you.

Title: Affection - Watanabe: Nightblade → Watanabe: Nightblade III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Forsaken Construct]: Hey! Sir!
[Watanabe]: What is it? Has anything gotten through?
[Forsaken Construct]: Nothing out of the ordinary, sir.

Title: Affection - Watanabe: Nightblade → Watanabe: Nightblade IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Watanabe]: There are more humans on this side of Oasis. You don\'t have to tiptoe around here.
[Watanabe]: Look at you. Why are you even here getting stressed out like that?
[Forsaken Soldier]: Sir!

Title: Affection - Watanabe: Nightblade → Watanabe: Nightblade V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Watanabe]: What are you doing?
[Watanabe]: What if someone found out who you are?
[Watanabe]: There are still tensions between our sides, even now.

Title: Affection - Watanabe: Nightblade → Watanabe: Nightblade VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Watanabe]: I... I\'ll ask you again—
[Watanabe]: Does your belief really align with ours?
[Watanabe]: Hmph, what a diplomatic way to put it...

Title: Affection - Karenina: Ember → Karenina: Ember I (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Commandant, target Corrupted is making a run for it.
[Lucia]: Roger, Commandant.
[Liv]: The radar isn\'t looking good...

Title: Affection - Karenina: Ember → Karenina: Ember II (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bianca]: You really need to reflect on your last mission, Karenina.
[Karenina]: Why? Didn\'t we take care of the new variant? Are the Gray Ravens alright?
[Bianca]: Only because the commandant acted accordingly and the Gray Ravens have enough experience under their belt.

Title: Affection - Karenina: Ember → Karenina: Ember III (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Karenina]: Did Bianca bring you here?
[Karenina]: I thought so.
[Karenina]: ...Great either way.

Title: Affection - Karenina: Ember → Karenina: Ember IV (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Karenina...
[Karenina]: What?
[Liv]: It\'s... nothing. I just wanted to say... good work back there gunning down the Corrupted with the turret.

Title: Affection - Karenina: Ember → Karenina: Ember V (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Karenina]: Commandant, you really are strong.
[Karenina]: I figured as much.
[Karenina]: I was just making observations. I fought my hardest in battle, too.

Title: Affection - Karenina: Ember → Karenina: Ember VI (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Karenina]: All the weird stuff I said before... Just pretend that never happened.
[Karenina]: There are many things I don\'t like about this squad, but what I don\'t like most is you...
[Karenina]: Well, I always speak my mind.

Title: Affection - Liv: Luminance → Liv: Luminance I (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Construct A]: Hey, take a look at that...
[Liv]: ...
[Construct A]: Is that a frame for real? It\'s so beautiful...

Title: Affection - Liv: Luminance → Liv: Luminance II (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Corrupted]: —!
[Lucia]: Target has escaped into the building. Commandant, your instruction?
[Lucia]: Lee and I will each take a side and flank it as quickly as possible!

Title: Affection - Liv: Luminance → Liv: Luminance III (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: Based on your request, we\'ll clear out these parts of the base for other purposes, Commandant.
[Lee]: The cleared areas will be partitioned according to their spaces and the plans to make future constructions easier.
[Lee]: I\'ll provide you with the detailed proposal later. Commandant, all you\'ve got to do is choose and sign.

Title: Affection - Liv: Luminance → Liv: Luminance IV (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Although many parts of its structure are damaged, I can still feel the sense of sanctity when standing on the faded carpet like this...
[Liv]: During worships, people will gather here for important matters, and music will start playing...
[Liv]: I\'m sorry... I was lost in my thoughts again. We\'re collecting building materials for the base, right?

Title: Affection - Liv: Luminance → Liv: Luminance V (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: The recording says that we don\'t have to prepare the clothes and rings for the wedding...
[Liv]: Then we\'re left with the venue, guests, witnesses, and decorations.
[Lee]: Liv, are you really trying to host a wedding for a projection device?

Title: Affection - Liv: Luminance → Liv: Luminance VI (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Construct A]: I know we\'re supposed to decorate the venue, but we really can\'t be wasting resources, so we can only do something simple.
[Liv]: I think this is more than good enough!
[Construct A]: As long as you guys are happy.

Title: Affection - Nanami: Pulse → Nanami: Pulse I (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
—!
Schween—! Boom—! Scheeeeen—! Boom—!
[Lee]: It\'s just the brat\'s daily routine.

Title: Affection - Nanami: Pulse → Nanami: Pulse II (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: Look! Look! Nanami has a new frame!
[Construct]: Ah, yes, very awesome.
[Construct]: We still have other Support Force tasks to take care of, bye.

Title: Affection - Nanami: Pulse → Nanami: Pulse III (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: Lucia, do you know where Nanami can find the things I just mentioned?
[Lucia]: I don\'t think this area has what you\'re searching for, and even if there were, the quality wouldn\'t be up to par.
[Lucia]: But... You may be able to find something suitable in the area reclaimed before.

Title: Affection - Nanami: Pulse → Nanami: Pulse IV (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Nanami, this is what you need, right?
[Nanami]: Yeah, but I still need more.
[Liv]: More...? But the energy activity from this is already really high...

Title: Affection - Nanami: Pulse → Nanami: Pulse V (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: Good morning, Commandant! Goodbye, Commandant!
[Lee]: Come back here, you!
[Lee]: Nanami suddenly burst in and took the remote while I was sorting out the storage.

Title: Affection - Nanami: Pulse → Nanami: Pulse VI (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: Hehehe, Nanami\'s wish is finally fulfilled.
[Nanami]: Nanami can die happy now.
[Nanami]: Hehe!

Title: Affection - Kamui: Tenebrion → Kamui: Tenebrion I (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Strike Hawk has taken Kamui back. His maintenance will be handled by them this time.
[Lee]: That\'s how it should be in the first place.
His wounds must be really bad that he needs to be treated at their own place.

Title: Affection - Kamui: Tenebrion → Kamui: Tenebrion II (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: Tick-tick-tick... Phew—
Boom! Bang! Bang! Bang!
[???]: Hahahahaha!

Title: Affection - Kamui: Tenebrion → Kamui: Tenebrion III (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: I\'m sure I don\'t have to introduce who we are collaborating with on this mission this time.
[Lee]: I\'m used to this curse already.
[Liv]: I\'ll feel weird if that changes someday!

Title: Affection - Kamui: Tenebrion → Kamui: Tenebrion IV (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: Hahahaha! Come at me, bro!
[Kamui]: Let me show you what I\'ve got!
[Kamui]: Piece of cake!

Title: Affection - Kamui: Tenebrion → Kamui: Tenebrion V (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: Lucia?
[Kamui]: What\'s the occasion? Have you come to chat?
[Lucia]: Not a chat exactly.

Title: Affection - Kamui: Tenebrion → Kamui: Tenebrion VI (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: Oh! Commandant! What are the chances?
[Kamui]: (I\'m here to check something...)
[Kamui]: It\'s a stakeout! I\'m checking on you!

Title: Affection - Lee: Entropy → Lee: Entropy I (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A figure in casual attire is busy in the workshop.
The person turning around reveals a stern face.
[Commandant]: Lee...

Title: Affection - Lee: Entropy → Lee: Entropy II (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: So, Commandant, what brings you to the workshop?
[Lee]: Is something wrong?
[Lee]: Did that tiny robot break?

Title: Affection - Lee: Entropy → Lee: Entropy III (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: What is it?
[Lee]: ...
[Commandant]: Are you... walking slower so I can keep up?

Title: Affection - Lee: Entropy → Lee: Entropy IV (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: You\'ve been staring at me long enough. If you have something to say, just spit it out.
[Lee]: ...
[Lee]: I ran into the same thing on a previous mission.

Title: Affection - Lee: Entropy → Lee: Entropy V (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: We\'re here.
[Lee]: It\'s a supply depot for ordering military-grade machine parts. It\'s off the beaten path, so only a few people know about it.
[Lee]: As for how I found this place...

Title: Affection - Lee: Entropy → Lee: Entropy VI (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Lee looks at the chips for a while before stopping.
[Lee]: ...
[Lee]: ...You could say that.

Title: Affection - Watanabe: Astral → Watanabe: Astral I (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Forsaken Base, Oasis. 4:00 pm.
After noticing a surprise assault on Oasis by some wandering Corrupted, Watanabe leaves you right where you are by yourself.
Soldiers in Oasis are nervously preparing for the incoming attack.

Title: Affection - Watanabe: Astral → Watanabe: Astral II (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Commandant... we...
[Liv]: Not that we don\'t trust Watanabe, Commandant, but you should at the very least notify us before you travel to Forsaken territory by yourself...
[Lucia]: Pardon me, Commandant, but that was really unwise.

Title: Affection - Watanabe: Astral → Watanabe: Astral III (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Watanabe]: So your "help" was to call in the Gray Ravens?
[Lee]: What else? Are you expecting the commandant to fight with bare hands?
[Watanabe]: Of course not!

Title: Affection - Watanabe: Astral → Watanabe: Astral IV (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Battle\'s over!
[Watanabe]: We can\'t relax yet. Based on what we\'ve detected, several Corrupted have been patrolling around here—I\'m afraid there are going to be more than just one wave of enemies.
[Lee]: A new variant?

Title: Affection - Watanabe: Astral → Watanabe: Astral V (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[New Variant]: Hehe... hehe...
[New Variant]: D-did you think—defeating me... means you\'ve won?
[Lee]: How can it still move?!

Title: Affection - Watanabe: Astral → Watanabe: Astral VI (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Watanabe]: ...
[Watanabe]: Why are you still here?
[Watanabe]: Relax. I\'m not human, I don\'t die that easily.

Title: Affection - Lucia: Crimson Abyss → Lucia: Crimson Abyss I (Part C)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[System]: Full body scan completed. Results: Normal.
[System]: Mind Beacon Stability scan completed. Results: Normal.
[Liv]: Commandant, is everything okay?

Title: Affection - Lucia: Crimson Abyss → Lucia: Crimson Abyss II (Part C)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: How\'s the commandant doing?
[Asimov]: Doing well, even finished two special meals in a row. But the virus inside is in an abnormal state that has never been observed.
[Lucia]: Commandant...

Title: Affection - Lucia: Crimson Abyss → Lucia: Crimson Abyss III (Part C)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[System]: Warning, high concentration of Punishing Virus detected—
[System]: Gray Raven Base, initiating Level 2 alert.
[Lucia]: Commandant, there are Corrupted outside our base...

Title: Affection - Lucia: Crimson Abyss → Lucia: Crimson Abyss IV (Part C)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Commandant, I\'m here to see you.
[Lucia]: Is everything... okay?
[Lucia]: Yeah... I hope your isolation ends soon.

Title: Affection - Lucia: Crimson Abyss → Lucia: Crimson Abyss V (Part C)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Good afternoon, Commandant.
[Liv]: It\'s been a while since we last met.
[Liv]: Yep, Commandant, were you expecting Lucia instead?

Title: Affection - Lucia: Crimson Abyss → Lucia: Crimson Abyss VI (Part C)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
It has been a long time since Alpha forced in a connection.
[Asimov]: Through the quantitative control of the Punishing Virus in your body, we can basically determine...
[Asimov]: That person uses a means of signal transmission that carries out signal relay through the Punishing Virus.

Title: Affection - Ayla: Brilliance → Ayla: Brilliance I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Strange sounds can be heard all day and night, making it difficult to sleep.
Following the source of the sound, you find a dormitory that appears to have been retrofitted into a studio.
A person is inside working busily beside the bed.

Title: Affection - Ayla: Brilliance → Ayla: Brilliance II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Agent]: Are you Commandant of the Gray Ravens?
[Agent]: I am Ayla\'s agent.
[Agent]: Of course, that\'s neither here nor there. Thanks to you, Ayla\'s been making a fuss about her installation...

Title: Affection - Ayla: Brilliance → Ayla: Brilliance III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
And so, you accompany Ayla to the modern art exhibition upon her invitation...
[Ayla]: My piece won\'t be displayed here until later, but we can at least look at others\' artwork and get hyped for the event.
[Ayla]: Commandant, let go on in.

Title: Affection - Ayla: Brilliance → Ayla: Brilliance IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The next day, Ayla calls you to her studio.
For some reason, you are blindfolded as you enter the studio.
[Ayla]: Don\'t take off your blindfold just yet.

Title: Affection - Ayla: Brilliance → Ayla: Brilliance V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Tonight in Ayla\'s studio...
[Ayla]: Yeah... I know the principle.
[Ayla]: But...

Title: Affection - Ayla: Brilliance → Ayla: Brilliance VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Recently, Ayla has finally stopped making noise, allowing you to catch up on some much-needed rest.
Huh? There\'s a message on my terminal...
Babylonia will be displaying a new installation titled "Traces" by the city\'s revolutionary artist, Ayla, for a limited time!

Title: Affection - Bianca: Veritas → Bianca: Veritas I (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Commandants Gala, Vanderbilt Holiday Hotel, Babylonia. 3:30 pm.
