A rainbow of lights from the chandeliers glisten in the ballroom, the crisp tinkling of glasses and silverware ringing around the room. Laughter and toasts weave together into a festive waltz.
The band performing on the stage is playing the newly recovered Golden Age single from Squared Circle last month. The ecstatic electronic music paints a romantic picture of a time long gone.

Title: Affection - Bianca: Veritas → Bianca: Veritas II (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Host]: Up next is our main event!
[Host]: One-day romance!
The ballroom is instantly filled with clapping and cheering.

Title: Affection - Bianca: Veritas → Bianca: Veritas III (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Commandant Dormitory, Babylonia. 11:20 am. One hour away from the date with Bianca.
(50 minutes later.)
(30 minutes later.)

Title: Affection - Bianca: Veritas → Bianca: Veritas IV (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Hologram Theatre, Babylonia. 2:20 pm.
[System]: Welcome to the Hologram Theatre. Which movie do you want to watch today?
[Bianca]: I\'m afraid I\'m not very familiar with this.

Title: Affection - Bianca: Veritas → Bianca: Veritas V (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Entrance of the Holographic Theatre, Babylonia. 5:02 pm.
Bianca nods respectfully, the emotionally invested figure nowhere to be found.
[Bianca]: (Nods)

Title: Affection - Bianca: Veritas → Bianca: Veritas VI (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Outside the Council Office, Babylonia. 10:54 pm.
[???]: Commandant.
[???]: My apologies. Did I startle you?

Title: Affection - Sophia: Silverfang → Sophia: Silverfang I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Unspecified date—
Celica summons you to Babylonia.
[Celica]: You\'re here, Commandant.

Title: Affection - Sophia: Silverfang → Sophia: Silverfang II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
—!
[Lucia]: Lee, we\'re being flanked!
[Lee]: Roger!

Title: Affection - Sophia: Silverfang → Sophia: Silverfang III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
On the way to the bridge, you see Sophia staring off into space.
[Sophia]: ...I can\'t say.
[Sophia]: It has to do with ACA intel.

Title: Affection - Sophia: Silverfang → Sophia: Silverfang IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A few days later...
At the forward operating base, everyone is preparing for the upcoming mission.
At that moment, Sophia stops you.

Title: Affection - Sophia: Silverfang → Sophia: Silverfang V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Sophia]: (Inhales) ...
[Sophia]: (Exhales) ...
[Sophia]: Ja... mi... lah:

Title: Affection - Sophia: Silverfang → Sophia: Silverfang VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Sophia]: Good morning, Commandant.
[Sophia]: I know it\'s not time yet.
[Sophia]: I meant... to arrive early.

Title: Affection - Chrome: Arclight → Chrome: Arclight I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: ...
[Karenina]: Um...
Lee sits at a table in the lounge. In front of him are three stacks of black cards.

Title: Affection - Chrome: Arclight → Chrome: Arclight II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Chrome]: I\'ve sent you the enemy\'s route.
[Chrome]: Don\'t mention it.
[Chrome]: Yep. After my Inver-Device was upgraded, my Mind Beacon became less sensitive than Gray Raven\'s. In other words, I can operate independently for longer periods of time than other Constructs.

Title: Affection - Chrome: Arclight → Chrome: Arclight III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Right after breakfast, I see Chrome waiting outside the door.
[Chrome]: ...
[Chrome]: Good morning, Commandant.

Title: Affection - Chrome: Arclight → Chrome: Arclight IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Chrome]: Commandant is...
The moment Chrome steps into Gray Raven\'s base, he finds himself surrounded by a crowd.
[Nanami]: Ah! It\'s Chrome, the leader of Strike Hawk!!

Title: Affection - Chrome: Arclight → Chrome: Arclight V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Commandant, what\'s the situation there?
[Liv]: Commandant, please wait in the safe zone for backup...
[Liv]: And Mr. Lee... Be sure to stay close to Commandant...

Title: Affection - Chrome: Arclight → Chrome: Arclight VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: Pleeeaaase—
[Chrome]: This kind of behavior will not help your recovery. Plus, it\'s not like I have all the time in the world.
[Kamui]: But I really want to see it!

Title: Affection - Lucia: Plume → Lucia: Plume I (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: The only directive we have left in this area is to set up the network routing. You can handle the terminal calibrations, right, Liv?
[Liv]: Yes. Leave it to me.
After the battle, Lee immediately starts setting up various pieces of equipment he brought with him. Liv pitches in as well, sharing the computational load and calibrating each piece as they are put in place.

Title: Affection - Lucia: Plume → Lucia: Plume II (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Oh Commandant, you\'re here... great.
As you move through the hallways, you stumble into Lucia, who seems to be looking for you.
[Lucia]: Sorry, Commandant... for running out on you earlier.

Title: Affection - Lucia: Plume → Lucia: Plume III (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: Liv, did you prepare for today\'s training?
[Liv]: Mh-hm! Ready as always! I won\'t drag everyone down!
[Lucia]: Lee and Liv are both members of Gray Raven, but where Lee is precise and direct to a fault, Liv tries to accommodate to almost anyone.

Title: Affection - Lucia: Plume → Lucia: Plume IV (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Celica]: Perfect timing, Commandant. Could you help me with something?
[Celica]: Just something simple. If you\'re not saying yes or no out loud, then I\'ll take it as a yes!
[Celica]: Huzzah, I knew you\'d say yes!

Title: Affection - Lucia: Plume → Lucia: Plume V (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: (Humming)
When you finally wake, you start at the sight of Lucia sitting in the corner of your quarters, calm as a lotus flower.
[Lucia]: Commandant, you\'re finally awake.

Title: Affection - Lucia: Plume → Lucia: Plume VI (Branch Scenario)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Commandant, you\'re here.
[Lucia]: No. I don\'t mind waiting if it\'s you.
[Lucia]: A few hours ago. I didn\'t know when you would arrive, so I came early, just in case.

Title: Affection - Vera: Rozen → Vera: Rozen I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
3:20 p.m. F6 Military Warehouse, Command Central
[??]: Three packages of serum, injectors, bio-type filters...
A worker is reading out a catalogue of supplies while adjusting his glasses.

Title: Affection - Vera: Rozen → Vera: Rozen II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Oh, Commandant. Good afternoon. Is something the matter?
[Liv]: Oh—yup. Today\'s Thursday after all.
[Liv]: It\'s okay, Commandant. You should take a rest. I can handle the supplies.

Title: Affection - Vera: Rozen → Vera: Rozen III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
6:34 p.m. Babylonia Central Archives
This should be the word...
The courses you took at the military academy are finally paying off. You scour through the files for the medicinal sounding terms on that supplier\'s notebook.

Title: Affection - Vera: Rozen → Vera: Rozen IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
11:23 p.m. Outside of Babylonia Command Central
You were just leaving the building after being done with work, when a sudden wave of dizziness strikes you—something forceful is clamping on your nape and dragging you toward the glow of a street lamp.
[Vera]: You just never learn, don\'t you?

Title: Affection - Vera: Rozen → Vera: Rozen V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Vera]: Meet me tomorrow. The current time. C-Labs. F23-C04.
Should you go... Or not?
You were only masticating Vera\'s words, but before you knew it, you already found yourself before the lab block entrance.

Title: Affection - Vera: Rozen → Vera: Rozen VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Noctis]: ...
[No. 21]: ...
[Noctis]: Yo, is it just me or anyone find it a bit awkward in here?

Title: Affection - Camu: Crocotta → Camu: Crocotta I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: All clear, Commandant.
[Lee]: Spotted the sixth batch of EX-monitor drones at 3 and 6 o\'clock. The design sure is old-fashioned.
Following a series of gunshots is a deafening blast. Roaring flames, like fireworks, dance in the distance.

Title: Affection - Camu: Crocotta → Camu: Crocotta II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
3:15 p.m. Combat Drill Training Lobby, Command Central Building
...
Due to it being a holiday, the Combat Drill Training Lobby is emptier than usual.

Title: Affection - Camu: Crocotta → Camu: Crocotta III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
...
Beep beep beep...
You wake up to your terminal beeping like no tomorrow. You open your eyes to see the bedroom ceiling. Strange. You have the day off as far as you can remember.

Title: Affection - Camu: Crocotta → Camu: Crocotta IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
3:35 p.m., Command Central Office, Council Building
[??]: Come in.
You enter the office to see Hassen flipping through files at his desk.

Title: Affection - Camu: Crocotta → Camu: Crocotta V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[System Voice]: Simulated Battlefield "Venus Splash Park" program update...
[System Voice]: >>Battle Log 12... Uploading...
[System Voice]: 25%>>65%>>…>>80%

Title: Affection - Camu: Crocotta → Camu: Crocotta VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
3:00 p.m. Outside the Training Room, Command Central
It is one of those rare days when Camu arrives at training on time. Babylonia is as sunny as usual, the artificial weather system making sure that the humidity and UV levels are perfect.
It gives Camu a sense of comfort.

Title: Affection - Rosetta: Rigor → Rosetta: Rigor I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Duelist Construct]: I send Musashi V from my hand to the graveyard, activating its effect: Choose 1 Musashi card from your deck and place it into your hand.
[Duelist Construct]: And since I drew a Musashi card outside of my draw phase, I get to special summon Musashi Zero from my hand.
[Duelist Construct]: Once a Musashi Zero has been special summoned, I get to special summon another Musashi card from my hand.

Title: Affection - Rosetta: Rigor → Rosetta: Rigor II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Rosetta]: The field survey mission is divided into several stages. We will need to make several trips, and even need to stay overnight in the wilds.
After the mission began, Rosetta took you to a snowfield some distance from the ARU. Here, you see a vast expanse of snow adorned with several lonely-looking trees.
[Rosetta]: So I was thinking, you should familiarize yourself with life in the Arctic.

Title: Affection - Rosetta: Rigor → Rosetta: Rigor III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Rosetta]: There\'s a lot I want to tell you about surviving out here on the snowfields, but today it\'ll have to wait...
[Rosetta]: Yeah. I like survival, since luck isn\'t as much of a factor. Card games, though, I like them for their gameplay.
[Rosetta]: Yeah, environmental surveying. This mission requires us to go conduct fieldwork.

Title: Affection - Rosetta: Rigor → Rosetta: Rigor IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Rosetta]: With these units installed, the mission is basically over.
[Rosetta]: Commandant, come here if your survey equipment is all set up.
Rosetta activates the module in her hand and begins to sync up the equipment.

Title: Affection - Rosetta: Rigor → Rosetta: Rigor V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Rosetta]: Do you know how to fish, Commandant?
While doing mission work in the snow, Rosetta suddenly throws a question at you.
[Rosetta]: Kinda sorta...? Which means you should learn how to properly fish. Grab your fishing pole, Commandant.

Title: Affection - Rosetta: Rigor → Rosetta: Rigor VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Rosetta]: All of the surveying instruments are up and operational—
[Rosetta]: Campfire ready, tent is up, and we got fish from the bear... Good, all ready.
[Rosetta]: Commandant, we just need to keep watch here until morning.

Title: Affection - Qu: Pavo → Qu: Pavo I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lyrics]: ～...Burning lanterns... Floating Flowers...～
[Lyrics]: ～...My beauty lost... in these final hours...～
The Nigher is filled with merchants and performance goers. Although it is not crowded, the boat is alive with festivity.

Title: Affection - Qu: Pavo → Qu: Pavo II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After accidentally becoming Qu\'s "partner" on the Nighter, she takes you to Kowloong\'s gate.
[Qu]: Now that you\'re my partner, understanding what\'s so great about Kowloong is priority number one.
[Qu]: Really? Well, I\'m sure there is a place in the city that you\'ve never been to.

Title: Affection - Qu: Pavo → Qu: Pavo III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Qu]: This is where the "Tabula Akasha" collects world treasures. You should be the first human to ever set foot in this place.
With the dull thud of the door, the Kowloong\'s vault is opened for the first time in a long time. Every inch of the chamber is filled with treasures collected from all over the world.
[Qu]: Of course, compared with the records of your unsightly WGAA, everything lying here is a shining example of human existence. This makes it the greatest witness of the human era.

Title: Affection - Qu: Pavo → Qu: Pavo IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The materials requested from Babylonia to be delivered by the Nighter have arrived. All idle teams are to be sent to guard against the Corrupted.
[Construct Leader]: Gray Raven Commandant... Come here for a minute.
[Construct Leader]: A Female Construct is looking for you. I\'d hate to be on her bad side...

Title: Affection - Qu: Pavo → Qu: Pavo V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Hassen]: That\'s all for this week\'s routine report. Dismissed.
[Celica]: Gray Raven Commandant? You\'re a bit worse for wear. Is your stomach okay?
[Celica]: Haha, you\'re just overthinking. The Gray Ravens are just performing routine equipment tests. What could possibly go wrong?

Title: Affection - Qu: Pavo → Qu: Pavo VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
On the spacious Kowloong observation deck, a beautiful Female Construct is playing the guqin, an eastern string instrument. The music sounds melodious but cold.
You have been invited here, but you are unsure of Qu\'s intent.
[Qu]: Oh, you\'re here.

Title: Affection - Changyu: Qilin → Changyu: Qilin I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
02:46 PM. Abandoned Dock, West Coast.
Recently, vandalized and adulterated supplies have repeatedly turned up in earthbound bases, prompting a request for Babylonia\'s assistance.
Seeing that most squads are occupied with their respective missions, this task is assigned to Gray Raven instead.

Title: Affection - Changyu: Qilin → Changyu: Qilin II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Two hours into waiting for him in his "secret lair," you finally find Changyu slipping through the door.
[Changyu]: Haha, sorry for leaving y\'all up there.
Cheekily he shrugs and wipes off the rain from his mechanical parts, looking anything but apologetic.

Title: Affection - Changyu: Qilin → Changyu: Qilin III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Having defeated the target, Lucia retrieves the ancient coin from his cloak.
[Lucia]: The token is yours now.
[Lee]: The pattern on the coin does suggest a Kowloong origin. I wonder how exactly the city connects to the black market.

Title: Affection - Changyu: Qilin → Changyu: Qilin IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Putting on the heavy cloak and the tailor-made mask Changyu passed you, the two of you approach the heart of the abandoned dock.
You enter a small, half-collapsed room under the countless watchful eyes of the guards.
[???]: Wait there. Bossman will be with you in a sec.

Title: Affection - Changyu: Qilin → Changyu: Qilin V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Your mind wanders in the dark. As you slowly regain consciousness, the voices around you trickle into your ears, gradually and sparingly, like raindrops dripping down the eaves.
[Gravelly Male Voice]: Akdilek must be very shorthanded to send a child like you.
[Changyu]: It\'s gonna cost you, judging a book by its cover.

Title: Affection - Changyu: Qilin → Changyu: Qilin VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
—Drip. Drop.
A streak of warm liquid flows down your cheek. With the buzz in your ears, you open your eyes to find the fading moonlight behind a cloudy night sky. The small building that trapped you is long gone.
Hoping to take stock of your surroundings, you try to get up, only to find yourself pressed against by something heavy. Something that is dripping the liquid running down your face.

Title: Affection - Luna: Laurel → Luna: Laurel I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
...
Whine—
A deafening whine pierces through your eardrums and slithers deep into your mind.

Title: Affection - Luna: Laurel → Luna: Laurel II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You feel an immense lightness enveloping you and the surroundings. Gravity seems to have gone missing in this place.
Streams of data, taking the form of cubes, flow into the space. They quickly transform, converge, and begin to rebuild into... a floor, walls, everything.
When you finally feel the grasp of gravity once more and land safely on the ground, you find yourself in a new world.

Title: Affection - Luna: Laurel → Luna: Laurel III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Breezy night. White beaches. Salty air.
You push yourself up from the sand. Some seems to have gotten into your mouth.
This place is... Venus Splash Park.

Title: Affection - Luna: Laurel → Luna: Laurel IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Luna clutches onto the head of the roundabout horse. Glancing downward, you can see the mechanoids still writhing around on the ground.
The girl in white turns and looks over. Her expression is one of mystery.
Under the glow of the amber light, the girl is illuminated in a half-shade. The wind blows stronger as the two of you rise, higher and higher.

Title: Affection - Luna: Laurel → Luna: Laurel V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You open your eyes and... find yourself in a completely different place.
The place looks to be a landfill. The stench of gasoline and rotten food fills the air.
Under the glimmering light, you manage to make out piles of scrap in front. You approach them and realize that they are all... Construct remains.

Title: Affection - Luna: Laurel → Luna: Laurel VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Darkness. Never-ending darkness.
Luna can hear her sister calling.
She fears the dark. The loneliness is suffocating.

Title: Affection - Luna: Laurel → Luna: Laurel VII (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
"Let us... sing..."
"For all will... be well..."
You open your eyes to find yourself in a corridor.

Title: Affection - Luna: Laurel → Luna: Laurel VIII (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Unknown Song]: ...
[Unknown Song]: "Let us sing, for all will be well."
[Unknown Song]: "Blossoming flowers and sea-washed sand castles, milk and warm bread and birch tinder that crackles."

Title: Affection - Wanshi: Hypnos → Wanshi: Hypnos I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Wind speed 30, southeast.
Your keen senses notice the temperature changes, and your eyes see the vapor trail behind the fast-oncoming, long-range bullet without a scope in the simulated training area. You duck back, and it almost grazes your scalp.
Your opponent has missed. A flicker of light reflected from the scope on his sniper rifle flashes in the corner of your eye, revealing his location.

Title: Affection - Wanshi: Hypnos → Wanshi: Hypnos II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You are not in the training room but in a much older shooting range this time, a quieter space with fewer visitors. You hold an actual rifle in your hands, which feels quite different from the one in the simulation.
You aim at the distant target and take a deep breath. There is no wind, no interference from the environment, and your training focuses on the fundamental skill of precision.
Thinking about the lessons from the training course, you toggle the safety.

Title: Affection - Wanshi: Hypnos → Wanshi: Hypnos III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[System]: Control center dispatching reinforcements for mission R40-119. Operator: Commandant, supporting: Red Robin. Mission coordinates transmitted. Please check them and set off in 5 minutes.
[Lucia]: Commandant, we\'ve sent you the route to the support location. Please be careful.
[Lee]: We expect the mission to be completed in 18 minutes on our end. We\'ll meet up with you as soon as we are done here.

Title: Affection - Wanshi: Hypnos → Wanshi: Hypnos IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
When you wake up, you are already in a medical room on Babylonia. You cannot believe that you had fallen asleep while waiting for rescue, but the Support Team claims that Wanshi had been awake until they arrived.
[Doctor]: Anyway, there\'s nothing serious but some scratches. Remember to keep your wounds away from water.
The medic in the Star of Life uniform before you flips through your medical record projected in the air, instructing you in a serious manner.

Title: Affection - Wanshi: Hypnos → Wanshi: Hypnos V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Commandant A]: That\'s definitely a foul! Foul!
[Commandant B]: C\'mon, just forget about it. Who\'d care about this sort of things on the battlefield...
As soon as you enter the simulation training room, you see two commandants you have met before arguing around the holographic projection screen.

Title: Affection - Wanshi: Hypnos → Wanshi: Hypnos VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[System]: Please stand by for reinforcement.
The sound of explosions, the screams of the Corrupted... all sorts of sounds fill your mind. Your gun-holding arm has gone numb as you struggle against the Corrupted pouncing on you like demons crawling out of hell.
Once again, you are standing on the battlefield on your own.

Title: Affection - Selena: Tempest → Selena: Tempest I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
...
...
On a random day, you receive a letter from a stranger in your personal mailbox.

Title: Affection - Selena: Tempest → Selena: Tempest II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Then there was a series of beautiful transcriptions. The person who wrote this letter even changed the color of ink to write this poetic text.
Writing here now, even the pen tip and pressure have become more "soft".
Suddenly, with a turn of the pen—

Title: Affection - Selena: Tempest → Selena: Tempest III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Your letters have not been especially frequent. Sometimes you get one a week, sometimes one the entire month. There have even been times when you receive a letter and forget to reply until much later. In any case, the letters between Iris and you have never stopped.
Like an hourglass, the grains of time kept slipping by, and recently, the innocent little girl has been showing greater maturity.
You have begun to grow ever closer.

Title: Affection - Selena: Tempest → Selena: Tempest IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
From that day on, the girl named A frequently appears in Iris\'s letters.
Through those letters, you can feel Iris\'s joy at finding a best friend.
The days go by and through the descriptions in the letters, the other girl starts to take shape.

Title: Affection - Selena: Tempest → Selena: Tempest V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Many months later...
Iris, who had vanished without a trace for a long time, finally sent another letter.
...

Title: Affection - Selena: Tempest → Selena: Tempest VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
From that day on, everything about Iris has completely vanished.
If the letters are not piled up in the cabinet, you might even think that this person is but a figment of your imagination.
Time flies.

Title: Affection - Chrome: Glory → Chrome: Glory I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Lecture Hall, F.O.S. Military Command College.
[Hassen]: This is an era filled with challenges and uncertainties. There is no way of knowing which path will lead humanity to the future.
The President\'s resonating voice echos in everyone\'s ears.

Title: Affection - Chrome: Glory → Chrome: Glory II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
White goes first. E2 to E4.
Following your command, the Pawn on E2 advances two squares.
Chrome slightly frowns and thinks. Then he makes up his mind.

Title: Affection - Chrome: Glory → Chrome: Glory III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The son of an Administrative Officer, the Chief of his year, the one who had it all.
Geniuses\' existence does not bother many people, but their downfalls are undoubtedly the most captivating gossip.
Due to using M.I.N.D. connections so intensely to the point of self-harm, he suffered incurable mental damages that disqualified him from forever being a commandant, and he instead volunteered to be a Construct.

Title: Affection - Chrome: Glory → Chrome: Glory IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The two of you walk inside the campus for a long while.
From the training facility to the canteen, then the lounge room... and, eventually, the library.
The library contains books and articles from the Golden Age, many of which are said to be the WGAA\'s donations. Many materials inaccessible at the Center of Basic Public Education have their original copies stored here.

Title: Affection - Chrome: Glory → Chrome: Glory V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
—What comes after humans?
—We are creating our successors at this very moment.
—They are as capable as humans. You will grant them capabilities that exceed humans.

Title: Affection - Chrome: Glory → Chrome: Glory VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Despite saying it is late, Chrome does not seem to be in a hurry to part ways as you two leave the library.
[Chrome]: Our game of chess hasn\'t ended yet, has it?
You tilt your head and look at him.

Title: Affection - Selena: Capriccio → Selena: Capriccio I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
"—Be emptier and cry like reed instruments cry. Emptier, write secrets with the reed pen."
...Commandant...
...I... I... want...

Title: Affection - Selena: Capriccio → Selena: Capriccio II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
One ordinary afternoon in Eden.
Sitting in front of her desk, the girl is writing a letter in elegant cursive. Warm artificial sunlight shines through the window, following the tip of her pen.
—...I\'ll wait for you.

Title: Affection - Selena: Capriccio → Selena: Capriccio III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
It feels like a dream.
The girl\'s skirt glides past your outfit as she spins. The starry light in her eyes is brighter than the chandeliers on the dome.
As the music comes to an end, she takes a step back and makes a curtsy.

Title: Affection - Selena: Capriccio → Selena: Capriccio IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
"—Thou must needs another way pursue, if thou wouldst escape from out that savage wilderness."
...
The scenes in front of you have shifted again in a sway.

Title: Affection - Selena: Capriccio → Selena: Capriccio V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The shattered iris continues to sink in the deep darkness.
After a long period of zero gravity, Selena feels her toes touching the ground.
It is the wooden floor of the Babylonia opera house, a feel that she cannot be more familiar with. She has stepped on it numerous times, spilling traces of joy, longing, apprehension, uncertainty and sweat.

Title: Affection - Selena: Capriccio → Selena: Capriccio VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The giant, cold machine is still talking.
—Through me you pass into the city of woe.
—Through me you pass into eternal pain.

Title: Affection - Liv: Empyrea → Liv: Empyrea I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Have you ever thought perhaps the reality you are living is just a dream and your dream is the reality?
You wake up to see nothing but snow that extends beyond the horizon. The cold wind is blowing.
You have been walking for seven days in a row, but still, all you see is snow. Your human body cannot hold on any longer.

Title: Affection - Liv: Empyrea → Liv: Empyrea II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
When you hear something like "hang out at the newly built amusement park," like most people, what comes to mind is a lovely day where everyone has fun.
[Lee]: The flowers are here. I need you to sign here.
[Staff Member]: Alright. Best of luck taking care of these flowers. This task is part of your contract.

Title: Affection - Liv: Empyrea → Liv: Empyrea III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: So your gun is not rusty, huh?
Lee takes over the small robot and puts it in his toolbox.
[Lee]: ...

Title: Affection - Liv: Empyrea → Liv: Empyrea IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Having accepted peace as reality, you feel like the four seasons pass by in the blink of an eye.
Now, you are one of the cogs that help propel the steam engine of civilization, going from city to city to help workers and machines. More and more places are thus rebuilt.
And as time goes by, you slowly forget how to fight. Instead, you are preoccupied with more trivial matters.

Title: Affection - Liv: Empyrea → Liv: Empyrea V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: Please remember...
[???]: It\'s going to be too late... Commandant...!
[Hippocrates]: It\'s too late. Give up.

Title: Affection - Liv: Empyrea → Liv: Empyrea VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Senses are like a rock that has fallen into a torrent, corroded and washed away by the mud over countless years.
The numerous scars on your body are taking their toll on you. If this goes on, you will lose your sanity.
How did you manage to maintain your most basic form? The flickering light could no longer gather its thoughts to ponder such a question.

Title: Affection - Liv: Empyrea → Liv: Empyrea VII (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The fading light turns into a white snowfield.
The scars and pain that were previously held at bay by her dream attack your senses the moment you arrive here.
The six M.I.N.D. shards you were holding in your arms also drop on the snowy ground, whispering how this journey has been hasty but arduous.

Title: Affection - Roland: Flambeau → Roland: Flambeau I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You may have experience as a commandant, but the current situation exceeds all your expectations.
You are in a small prison cell—judging by the steel cage in front of you and the limited number of furniture in the room, which includes a bed, a water basin, and a toilet, this is a prison for sure.
Meanwhile, a mechanoid with its artificial skin peeling off is guarding the room outside, its soulless eyes staring at you. At the entrance are the corpses of two other mechanoids.

Title: Affection - Roland: Flambeau → Roland: Flambeau II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Electronic Noise]: Beep, beep... Beep, beep, beep...
You were not expecting such a prompt response, so you rush back to the comms device.
The green indicator flickers in the darkness. A series of rhythmic beeps emits from the device, long and short, starting and pausing—you immediately realize that someone is responding to your distress signal.

Title: Affection - Roland: Flambeau → Roland: Flambeau III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The journey over to the laundry room goes smoother than you expected.
Avoiding the patrolling mechanoids and passing through the dusty old cells and interrogation rooms, you find most mechanoids ignore you as they carry on with their preset routes, doomed to repeat for eternity until they eventually join the corpses littered on the floor.
Twenty minutes later, you find yourself inside the laundry room.

Title: Affection - Roland: Flambeau → Roland: Flambeau IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Let us rewind time a bit.
Back to when Roland first ventured into this prison.
What compelled him to do so was nothing serious like a secret mission, but more due to his own curiosity.

Title: Affection - Roland: Flambeau → Roland: Flambeau V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Dozens of minutes have passed since you arrived at the rendezvous point.
And you are still alone.
No matter how many times you try to contact the other person through the device, there is no reply.

Title: Affection - Roland: Flambeau → Roland: Flambeau VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Sharp pain erupts from your ear drums, while a chaotic dissonance rings in your ears.
The sounds around you are muffled as though you are under water.
The flash grenade the Corrupted threw may not have caused any fatal damage, but getting caught in it at such a close distance does leave you temporarily blind.

Title: Affection - Nanami: Starfarer → Nanami: Starfarer I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After an extremely difficult mission, the Parliament approved a few days of holiday for most commandants.
While you don\'t need to go out, there are still tons of documents accumulated over time for you to process.
There is no such thing as a holiday. Catching up on the paperwork is enough to keep you occupied.

Title: Affection - Nanami: Starfarer → Nanami: Starfarer II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The thrust lasts but a moment. Before you know it, you are already inside a bedroom.
The world outside is already dark save for a few stars and a half-moon hanging in the sky.
After some fumbling around, you finally turn on the room light.

Title: Affection - Nanami: Starfarer → Nanami: Starfarer III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You have lost track of time, but the pain still lingers on your forehead. You feel the soft mattress on your back. The pendant lamp above you sways from the breeze.
You seem to have returned to the same bedroom. The interior looks no different, and you are wearing an identical, casual outfit.
But unlike last time, it is a sunny day outside. The alarm clock reads 08:00.

Title: Affection - Nanami: Starfarer → Nanami: Starfarer IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You feel the soft mattress on your back. The pendant lamp above you sways from the breeze.
You try to remember what happened "yesterday"—
After the trial of the carousel, you feel calmer with the other attractions that Nanami modified.

Title: Affection - Nanami: Starfarer → Nanami: Starfarer V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The gentle sways of a cradle wake you up. The tender breeze carries with it salted air, and you open your eyes to a bright blue sea.
Some people say that all lives on Earth began from the ocean. Back when the air and the land were lethal to all living things, water shielded lives from deadly radiation, giving them a chance to grow.
Billions of years of evolution took place in the ocean before chance sent one of its children to the surface with a wave, starting life on the surface.

Title: Affection - Nanami: Starfarer → Nanami: Starfarer VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The ocean reveals her fury. The water pressure pushes the sparse air in your lungs out before pushing seawater in, forbidding you to breathe.
Darkness, coldness, and silence surround you, dragging you further down.
You see shapes and figures flashing before your eyes.

Title: Affection - Haicma: Starveil → Haicma: Starveil I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Compared with the fading ruins, the residential areas hiding within them still more or less retain their past facade.
Situated between highrises, they have avoided the Punishing Virus in their small pockets.
Without fire and blades, the only thing that has passed through here is time.

Title: Affection - Haicma: Starveil → Haicma: Starveil II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
—Two kilometers away from the conservation area 001 rebuild.
A hole punctures the clouds at the edge of the dull, gray sky, allowing the soft glow of the sun to go through and cast a light on a towering building.
The wind blows past the buildings, gently bashing against the lady\'s clothes.

Title: Affection - Haicma: Starveil → Haicma: Starveil III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
—2.7 km away from the conservation area reconstruction site 02.
It is a small pathway hiding between the collapsed buildings.
Overlapping debris covers the area above you, one filling the gap of the other.

Title: Affection - Haicma: Starveil → Haicma: Starveil IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
—3.9 km away from the conservation area reconstruction site 03.
Inside the library amidst an ocean of small bookshelves, a white hat breaches the "surface."
Holding onto the shelves, Haicma lifts her head, trying very hard to scan the books at the top.

Title: Affection - Haicma: Starveil → Haicma: Starveil V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
—14.5 km away from the conservation area reconstruction site 04.
The endless desert is like the end of the road of exile, its monotonous scenery capable of paralyzing visual sensors.
Walking on it is a defective mechanoid. More precisely, she has to believe that she is defective.

Title: Affection - Haicma: Starveil → Haicma: Starveil VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
—0.4 km away from the conservation area.
You have been strolling alone in the woods for almost 2 hours after learning about where the safe area is.
There is no perfect way to tackle the struggles the conservation area faces. Even when the night ends and the sun rises, the survivors will still curl up and hide in the dark corners.

Title: Affection - Vera: Garnet → Vera: Garnet I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Hack, slash, and then strike straight ahead.
[Corrupted]: —Raaargh!—Rrrgghh!
Accompanied by a mechanical grating sound similar to a human scream, a Corrupted falls on Vera\'s banner spear.

Title: Affection - Vera: Garnet → Vera: Garnet II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Conservation Area 113, a few days ago.
[Vera]: I think an introduction is in order. This is Chief Commandant, the number one commandant of Babylonia. I am the Construct assigned to assist the commandant. If you have any problems, you can ask us for help.
[Vera]: Starting today, we\'ll be staying with you and helping you complete missions until your repair work is completed. I—simply—cannot wait!

Title: Affection - Vera: Garnet → Vera: Garnet III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Once again, you arrive at the border of the conservation area. Under the lead-gray sky, you walk through the field of mechanical parts left by Constructs and mechanoids.
[Vera]: Ugh... Looks like this mission is going to be a hassle. We\'ve got quite a few battles ahead of us.
[Vera]: No matter. More battles mean less wounded. I guess it\'s worth it.

Title: Affection - Vera: Garnet → Vera: Garnet IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Darkness.
Dazed. Confused.
You do not know where you are. At first, you feel like you are lying down. Then you feel something stand you up. Finally, you feel yourself being carried.

Title: Affection - Vera: Garnet → Vera: Garnet V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Vera]: Commandant, you want to live. Correct?
[Vera]: Considering I told you that little secret... I won\'t let you die. I promise.
Regaining consciousness, you are blinded by light.

Title: Affection - Vera: Garnet → Vera: Garnet VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The next visit you make to Vera\'s tent happens in a morning.
You see her hair awkwardly off to the side in a loose ponytail, which seems at odds with how you usually see her.
[Vera]: Commandant. You\'re awake.

Title: Affection - No. 21: XXI Scene → No. 21: XXI Scene I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
"BOOM—"
The aftermath of the explosion launches rubble into the air as the last remaining Corrupted signals flashing on the terminal are completely annihilated.
[System]: All Corrupted signals in Zone C are gone. Joint eradication mission complete.

Title: Affection - No. 21: XXI Scene → No. 21: XXI Scene II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Central Command — Outside the Training Operations Hall
After routine firearm training, you rub your wrists, now slightly numb from holding a gun for so long, and open the tactical terminal to confirm your next destination.
Walking to the corner of the hall, you bump into an unexpected person.

Title: Affection - No. 21: XXI Scene → No. 21: XXI Scene III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
"...The wolf\'s cub was left alone in the depths of the den."
"...The disaster was so sudden that it lost its parents\' protection. It was so weak that it was abandoned by the pack before it even learned to hunt."
"As the frigid Arctic winter approaches, it must learn to hunt on its own if there is any hope for it to survive through the months of darkness."

Title: Affection - No. 21: XXI Scene → No. 21: XXI Scene IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Separated by a glass pane, you see No. 21 getting ready for combat simulation in the next room.
Cables of various colors are connected to No. 21\'s neck and joints, linking her to the terminal. The small white Construct lies motionless on the cold metal bed as if used to the procedure.
Like a broken and hollow doll, the scene reminds you of what you witnessed in her pure white M.I.N.D.

Title: Affection - No. 21: XXI Scene → No. 21: XXI Scene V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
One month later.
No. 21 carries out routine combat simulations with your help as a commandant, establishing a remote link to keep her M.I.N.D. stable in battle.
After a continuous series of adjustments, you and No. 21 begin to synergize more closely, causing the frequency of No. 21\'s outbursts from M.I.N.D. deviation to gradually lessen.

Title: Affection - No. 21: XXI Scene → No. 21: XXI Scene VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Combat supplies... ready.
The Gray Raven Commandant\'s room... located.
She reviews her previous training in her M.I.N.D.

Title: Affection - Karenina: Scire → Karenina: Scire I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
1:36 PM. Outside City 072.
The sights beside you fly backward. You have not been to the surface for a while. Right now, you are on your way to conservation area 072.
You hear a comms notification from your terminal.

Title: Affection - Karenina: Scire → Karenina: Scire II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Surrounded by the residents, Karenina does not look like she is going to back down.
[Karenina]: I\'m not kicking you out, but this building is no longer suitable to stay. Demolishing it now is our best option.
[Karenina]: The Engineering Force will be in charge of rebuilding this afterward...

Title: Affection - Karenina: Scire → Karenina: Scire III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Corrupted]: —!
Hearing your orders, the Construct soldiers nod knowingly, forming into groups of three and scattering, slowly surrounding the dispersed Corrupted.
Even when their limited firepower cannot damage the Corrupted significantly, the soldiers\' concentrated barrage still manages to push the Corrupted back closer and closer to the planned location.

Title: Affection - Karenina: Scire → Karenina: Scire IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The interior of this CPF is tidier than you expected, with no Hetero-Creature and mechanoid remaining or weird vegetation to be found.
Task Force members have inspected this tower after recovering the conservation area. Confirming that there is no sign of the Punishing Virus here, you retract your hand from your holster.
You take the elevator to the center of the CPF. Arriving at the central control room, Karenina immediately heads to work, examining each and every part of the CPF before the large control panel.

Title: Affection - Karenina: Scire → Karenina: Scire V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The emergency brake has stopped the platform in the middle of the elevator shaft. The two of you sit down, leaning in a corner.
Luckily, your comms is still working. Reporting your situation to the supervisor, you are told that rescue will arrive soon.
With nothing else to do, you can only wait. Karenina, meanwhile, keeps staring at the CPF blueprint, mumbling to her as if investigating the cause of the malfunction.

Title: Affection - Karenina: Scire → Karenina: Scire VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The sun sets, and the CPF hums in the silent night. As the reconstruction effort progresses steadily and with the resources gradually arriving, the residents of the conservation area no longer sleep in fear.
It is a full moon tonight. With the sky looking brighter than usual, the children are allowed to play outside for a little longer while those who have finished their work gather in small groups around simple campfires.
Before you realize it, you are surrounded by children, their blinking and twinkling eyes widening as you tell your heroic tales in the Task Force.

Title: Affection - Noan: Arca → Noan: Arca I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
02:30 p.m.
As usual, Noan is half an hour early to Dark Aries\' preparation room, waiting for the regular meeting with Simon and the other two teammates.
It has been almost a month since Noan came to Babylonia. He is slowly getting used to life here.

Title: Affection - Noan: Arca → Noan: Arca II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
11:40 p.m.
The lights in Babylonia are already dimmed and replaced with a brilliant starry sky on the virtual ceiling.
Unlike the ground surface, there are never dark clouds to block the starry sky up here.

Title: Affection - Noan: Arca → Noan: Arca III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Just like Noan expected, the incident in the library quickly attracted nearby patrolling Constructs.
The interrogation and investigation lasted the entire morning. Noan was finally released when Gray Raven\'s commandant was awakened and testified that it was not the drink\'s fault. He walks back to the preparation room.
[Palma]: What a rare sight. I thought you were always free?

Title: Affection - Noan: Arca → Noan: Arca IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
—Three days later.
Noan has just seen off a few customers who were in for a short break. He is standing at the counter and washing their used cups.
The water spray makes a drizzling sound in the cup. He stops washing as his mind wanders away.

Title: Affection - Noan: Arca → Noan: Arca V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Noan]: I heard Commandant Simon said you would be going to another large-scale operation soon. When is it?
Noan peeks at the clock on the bar counter. Its vintage hands are pointing at 17:45.
[Noan]: Why are you still here then...? Aren\'t you going to prepare or have a final rest?

Title: Affection - Noan: Arca → Noan: Arca VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
When Noan turns to the last page, it is already late in the night.
[Noan]: ...Commandant? We need to go.
He calls softly, but the human is still deep asleep.

Title: Affection - Bambinata: Vitrum → Bambinata: Vitrum I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
It\'s but a 20-minute walk from F.O.S. Military College to Babylonia\'s preparation room—and it never felt so long.
[Simon]: Gotta love how they\'re treating someone who\'s coming back to their alma mater for the first time to deliver a speech.
Simon looks at you as he lets out a wry smile, and you bet that\'s how you\'re looking at him, too.

Title: Affection - Bambinata: Vitrum → Bambinata: Vitrum II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
What was going through your mind when you stopped by Egret\'s lounge again?
"I\'ll just be in and out"—so you thought as you knocked on the door again.
You try to remember what happened just a little over an hour ago, all the while unable to forget the blue figure you saw back then.

Title: Affection - Bambinata: Vitrum → Bambinata: Vitrum III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
When both the speeches for the conference tomorrow and the graduation ceremony on the day after form a pincer attack on your agenda, you finally realize you should not have taken on these challenging tasks alone—or, you should have at least allocated more time for them.
This challenge does not come from the writing itself, given that the College has sent you a range of topics that you can elaborate on. Besides, you can also reuse some of the content from your previous speeches on such an occasion. Even President Hassen himself often does that.
The real problem comes from the anxiety and struggle within yourself, which can easily be found in the speech text—

Title: Affection - Bambinata: Vitrum → Bambinata: Vitrum IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Knowing that you could not write your personal experience with Bambinata in the script, you eventually did not manage to finish the speech for the conference.
Those kids had light in their eyes. You could not convince yourself to tell them about the cruel, harsh encounters you had on the battlefield, so you just gave up.
Fortunately, you asked Simon to write you a short note just minutes before the conference, so you at least had something to say.

Title: Affection - Bambinata: Vitrum → Bambinata: Vitrum V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Simon]: Phew... Finally, that boulder\'s up the hill!
[Simon]: The speech you gave just now. I was very impressed, so I borrowed your story.
Simon does a stretch as if he has just come down from the hill and never has to go back up again.

Title: Affection - Bambinata: Vitrum → Bambinata: Vitrum VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
"...Step 2, turn off the sensory system. Inject circulatory enhancing transmitter at 3cm to the bottom right of C3, then turn the sensory system back on after 10 seconds."
Sensory system turned off. Here is the syringe.
Bambinata can\'t feel anything... Where is the C3 section...

Title: Affection - Bianca: Stigmata → Bianca: Stigmata I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Your seat to which you\'ve just fastened the seatbelt buckle shakes with a light jolt once again.
As the transport craft dives through the atmosphere, the sonic boom burrows into your ears and is there to stay.
You look up at the electronic screen in the cabin. As the Mach number keeps dropping, the coordinates shown on the radar continue changing as the light dot on the radar moves along.

Title: Affection - Bianca: Stigmata → Bianca: Stigmata II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Two shafts of white light tear across the darkness that prevails in this land of snow.
Waves of snow part to either side to reveal a path as the vehicle is revved through the snow, evoking to mind the Exodus—where the Israelites walked through the Red Sea parted by Moses.
The ice flakes and snow are now coming down at the speed of a shower, making it impossible for you to see the path ahead even with the windshield wiper working away at top speed.

Title: Affection - Bianca: Stigmata → Bianca: Stigmata III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You don\'t see Bianca beside you when you open your eyes again.
You exit the tent—and see Bianca standing right by the window, with the side of her face bathing in the hazy white light that\'s coming through.
With her hand placed on the window frame, she seems like a statue forgotten by the world.

Title: Affection - Bianca: Stigmata → Bianca: Stigmata IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
An icebreaker from a previous century, the ship now has scars all over it.
Standing on either side of the port are deserted buildings—a telltale proof of yet another failed attempt by those who tried to conquer Antarctica.
The Constructs set up temporary tents of all sizes around the bay and pulleys that go from the ground up to the ship. In their polar suits, the Constructs travel back and forth between the tents and the ship with tools in hand. It is now apparent what they\'re trying to do—they\'re fixing the ship.

Title: Affection - Bianca: Stigmata → Bianca: Stigmata V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
To most, Antarctica is but a lone and cold region located at the southernmost tip of Earth.
No amount of shallow knowledge acquired through various means can ever come together to form a complete and accurate picture of this place.
One needs to actually set foot in this pure white world to feel just how small they are.

Title: Affection - Bianca: Stigmata → Bianca: Stigmata VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Only when night comes do people see the stars shining in the galaxy above them.
The sun has to hide to reveal the countless, brighter stars glistening in the expanse of the universe.
Emerald light waves in the air like a dress weaved by the goddesses, dancing underneath the endless stars.

Title: Affection - Bianca: Stigmata → Bianca: Stigmata VII (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The time to return has arrived.
The transport craft from Babylonia has brought the Expedition Team their scheduled supplies. Meanwhile, Bianca, you, and a few members whose frames require urgent repairs will return to Babylonia with the aircraft.
The Expedition Team even planned to host a small farewell party for the two of you. Bianca shut down the idea as soon as she heard it, obviously.

Title: Affection - Lee: Hyperreal → Lee: Hyperreal I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
It is a rare beautiful day here on the surface. The gentle breeze and sun shower the earth like golden sand, leaving behind shimmering colors.
As the war slows down, most elite squads are under maintenance, only doing simple elimination missions at conservation areas. Given how intensive the last few years have been for Gray Raven, this is almost a vacation.
The leaves on the tree rustle as you hear familiar footsteps approaching you, and you turn to find Lucia and Liv poking out from behind you.

Title: Affection - Lee: Hyperreal → Lee: Hyperreal II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Asimov]: So, is this how you hurt your ear and why you terminated your mission early?
[Asimov]: I\'ve received the data analysis report. It suggests that the issue is due to abnormal data leaking from the new frame.
[Asimov]: I\'ve kept some data samples, but I can\'t confirm where the abnormal data comes from and what it\'s for at the moment.

Title: Affection - Lee: Hyperreal → Lee: Hyperreal III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The morning sun shines through the window in the reception room onto the floor. You have a massive headache, having spent the whole night filing all kinds of military applications and observation reports.
You wonder how Lee\'s M.I.N.D. is doing since he decided to stay in last night due to feeling unwell...
You open the door to the maintenance room, and you are greeted with—

Title: Affection - Lee: Hyperreal → Lee: Hyperreal IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Given Lee\'s situation, Gray Raven has not been assigned any surface missions recently.
Lucia is taking advantage of the rare respite to train, while Liv has been helping at the Star of Life. You, on the other hand, continue to tackle the heaps of paperwork on your desk.
The M.I.N.D. disorder on Lee\'s specialized frame has drawn much unwanted attention. You have already written an extensive report to keep Lee with the Gray Ravens, but... where do all these reading materials come from?

Title: Affection - Lee: Hyperreal → Lee: Hyperreal V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After the two of you return from your "mission," Lee has been staying inside his room without coming out or mentioning assassinating anyone for you.
Is Lee... really doing fine?
You still worry about him as dusk arrives after you have finished your battle with the various documents.

Title: Affection - Lee: Hyperreal → Lee: Hyperreal VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
To support leisure activities on Babylonia, the military base has a leisure hall that can host up to twenty people. It is used as a canteen most of the time, but it can also be rented for private gatherings.
[Liv]: Commandant! This way!
[Liv]: I\'ve prepared them exactly as discussed.

Title: Affection - Ayla: Kaleido → Ayla: Kaleido I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After lunchtime on a certain day in Babylonia.
Coming through the glass windows in the hallway, the sunlight is nice and warm—and if you ask Ayla how she\'d spend an afternoon like this, she\'d say...
[Ayla]: Gotta slack off hard. That\'s right!

Title: Affection - Ayla: Kaleido → Ayla: Kaleido II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
It didn\'t take long for your leave request to be approved, and you believe it\'s because it\'s been a while since you last submitted one.
With your leave request approved, you reach out to Ayla as you\'ve promised.
Since she\'ll be at Babylonia\'s library doing some reading to get ready for an upcoming exhibit, she says she\'ll meet you there for your first lesson.

Title: Affection - Ayla: Kaleido → Ayla: Kaleido III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
WGAA\'s hallway is bustling with people.
When you finish submitting to WGAA the documents picked up from the last mission, you check the time—and realize it\'s almost lunchtime.
Seeing the hustle and bustle in the hallway, it hits you that it\'s been a while since you last saw Ayla.

Title: Affection - Ayla: Kaleido → Ayla: Kaleido IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Babylonia\'s banquet hall is aglow with lights everywhere.
The awards ceremony is underway—and given the venue\'s set-up and the guest list, one can tell that WGAA takes this ceremony very seriously.
Ayla is now on the stage giving a speech—in the coating she changed into for the ceremony. With her hat slanted and a semiformal style, she sports the look of a serious pop artist.

Title: Affection - Ayla: Kaleido → Ayla: Kaleido V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Ayla]: ...Commandant, behind you!
[Corrupted]: Urgh—!
Without missing a beat, you jump out of the way as you pull out your gun and fire a shot behind...

Title: Affection - Ayla: Kaleido → Ayla: Kaleido VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After lunchtime on a certain day in Babylonia.
Against the cerulean artificial sky, Ayla lowers her hand as she sets her foot ever-so-lightly into the sun.
Then, following the ringing of her terminal, Ayla\'s agent can be heard barking through the hall.

Title: Affection - Pulao: Dragontoll Story → Pulao: Dragontoll Story I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
～Of flexile and simulacrous make...～
～Thusly, it cometh and goeth, at the pluck of digits ten...～
～How transient its flutter...～

Title: Affection - Pulao: Dragontoll Story → Pulao: Dragontoll Story II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The Nighter is nowhere as busy during daytime. There are only a few pedestrians on the street. Not many shops are open.
The old man at the breakfast stall is slowly stirring a pot of white porridge, yawning. The light morning fog has brought the fragrance of rice to the visitors.
[Construct]: Kamui from Strike Hawk said the Nighter was a very busy place, but this looks nothing like what he said.

Title: Affection - Pulao: Dragontoll Story → Pulao: Dragontoll Story III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You are standing outside an antique-style shop with "Lam\'s Clothing" written on the banner in calligraphy.
[Pulao]: It\'s a clothing store. Why did you bring me here, Commandant?
[Pulao]: Do you want me to go undercover? But if I go to them in disguise, even if they get close with me, they aren\'t close with the Construct Pulao.

Title: Affection - Pulao: Dragontoll Story → Pulao: Dragontoll Story IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
As time goes by, you have visited more stalls and Pulao keeps getting more prizes. Apart from the mask she won in the shooting bottle game, there are other little gadgets like a panda keychain, robot model, dancing princess sticker, wooden knife...
As Pulao walks, the gadgets bump into one another, adding more knocking noise to her laughter.
The fierce Dragon Child is gone. Pulao is taking little bites at the cotton candy in her hand. She looks just like an ordinary girl who is having so much fun.

Title: Affection - Pulao: Dragontoll Story → Pulao: Dragontoll Story V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Pulao]: Um, I should save some space for other snacks...
[Diner]: You\'ve got a great appetite, girl. Where are you going next?
[Pulao]: Hmm... Commandant, you haven\'t been to the East District, have you? Let\'s go. We\'ll find lots of machine troupes and tricks there.

Title: Affection - Pulao: Dragontoll Story → Pulao: Dragontoll Story VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
It\'s just a small badge with the logo of F.O.S. printed on it, nothing luxurious. It\'s not made from any rare material either.
This object isn\'t worth much to most people, but it means a lot to you. It is a souvenir to your time spent in F.O.S., but also an alarm to remind you of the oath you once made.
Of course, it never blocked any lethal bullet like in the stories.

Title: Affection - Hanying: Zitherwoe → Hanying: Zitherwoe I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Prelude]: ...How can it be love if one wouldn\'t die for it when they\'re alive and revived by it when they\'re dead?
[Prelude]: ...How is the love born from a dream any less real?
...

Title: Affection - Hanying: Zitherwoe → Hanying: Zitherwoe II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A few days afterward, you step onto the Nighter once again.
Apart from wrapping up your previous mission, you are only here for the routine meeting between Babylonia and the Nighter.
[Yazi]: We\'ve gone over the agreement, and everything is fine. We\'ll talk to the Qiunui Crew about the WGAA\'s collaboration request and give you an answer as soon as possible.

Title: Affection - Hanying: Zitherwoe → Hanying: Zitherwoe III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Hanying]: Ah, right...
She quickly steps into the courtyard and picks up the bird inside.
Holding the umbrella up, you follow her in and discover that the bird is actually a bionic swallow. Intricate and lifelike, it would have fooled you without a close inspection.

Title: Affection - Hanying: Zitherwoe → Hanying: Zitherwoe IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The setting sun in the west signals the end of a bustling day. It\'s time to return home and spend time with family. After a full day\'s work, you are finally home. Standing outside the yard, you take a deep breath and push the door open.
The yard turns out to be empty and quiet, devoid of any human presence. The only sounds you can hear are the gentle rustle of leaves falling to the ground and your own steady breaths.
The woman inside the house instantly turns around with joy at the sound of the door opening. She places down the half-finished needlework in her hand and walks briskly toward you.

Title: Affection - Hanying: Zitherwoe → Hanying: Zitherwoe V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You follow Sturddy to a warehouse-like structure situated near the back door of the yard.
[Sturddy]: It stores all the artworks left behind by Master, and after the theft, I\'ve enhanced the security measures here.
As Sturddy hoists the 24th electronic locker, the gate grudgingly gives way with a dry, rasping squeak.

Title: Affection - Hanying: Zitherwoe → Hanying: Zitherwoe VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Hanying]: ...What\'s the matter?
After rummaging through the pouch you carry, you take out the wooden comb and hand it to Hanying.
[Hanying]: This is... for me?

Title: Affection - No. 21: Feral → No. 21: Feral I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Changing out the culture solution... adjusting the temperature... recording growth...
You tick off items on your morning to-do list one by one.
You put away your terminal and start toward the door, which opens before you reach it.

Title: Affection - No. 21: Feral → No. 21: Feral II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Greenhouse Manager]: If only I knew you two have met before... I wouldn\'t have had to worry... All that anxiety for nothing...
Reaching the office, the manager is still not over the incident.
You have to cut off her mumbling.

Title: Affection - No. 21: Feral → No. 21: Feral III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The speeding wheels roll up sand and dust from the dry, bumpy road.
The route to your destination is rough, but the ORV is at no risk of flipping over as you keep its speed under control—thanks to the modifications done by the Engineering Force.
You jolt the steering wheel to avoid a large bump as you go through the mission details in your head.

Title: Affection - No. 21: Feral → No. 21: Feral IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You walk alongside No. 21 in the deserted forest over piles of dried leaves. It is a different kind of softness compared to carpets.
The overgrown vegetation wraps this forest in a tranquil cloak.
The air is so humid that you feel like you can probably squeeze water out of it with a pinch of your fingers.

Title: Affection - No. 21: Feral → No. 21: Feral V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
With the target area narrowed down, your sample collection goes smoothly and you\'re able to quickly find many of the listed species.
At the same time, you find yourself soaked from head to toe, having been assaulted mercilessly with water by No. 21.
Just when you\'re about to check your sample collection progress, a shadow flashes past you.

Title: Affection - No. 21: Feral → No. 21: Feral VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You look down from higher ground at a river that has been completely transformed.
The serene, clear water has turned dark and murky, carrying loads of sand and mud.
The aggressive flood decimates everything in its path. Only a few sturdy old trees sway gruelingly in the gushing waves.

Title: Affection - Lucia: Crimson Weave → Lucia: Crimson Weave I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Ransacked and left in heart-wrenching ruins, a conservation area can be seen teetering in the bone-chilling winds on the arid snowfield.
From the emergency tents that now stand on the ruins, stifled cries escape and rampage through the damaged streets alongside the rusty winds.
With Lucia under inspection and the military\'s considerations, you\'re now operating independently of your team.

Title: Affection - Lucia: Crimson Weave → Lucia: Crimson Weave II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Before Babylonia\'s team arrived at the pillaged conservation area...
The chill had torn through the white land where even time itself seemed to have been brought to a stop. The hill and the woods—everything was glaringly white...
Save for the conservation area before Alpha that had been reduced to a pile of ruins by fire.

Title: Affection - Lucia: Crimson Weave → Lucia: Crimson Weave III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Alpha sees an enormous frozen lake on the other side of the hill she just climbed.
They traversed the frozen lake, apparently so that their tracks would be covered by snow. Little did they know, however, that Alpha would catch up so quickly.
Having ascertained the rioters\' escape route, Alpha gives her motorcycle\'s throttle a hard twist. With a blaring vroom, the red motorcycle skids through the air, leaving a staggering trail before stopping squarely by the lake.

Title: Affection - Lucia: Crimson Weave → Lucia: Crimson Weave IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Redolent of goose feathers, the snow blankets the land with a thick layer of white.
[Crowe]: The snow is really picking up...
[Crowe]: How are you doing, Commandant?

Title: Affection - Lucia: Crimson Weave → Lucia: Crimson Weave V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
In the woods, Alpha finds herself surrounded by the rioters, her eyes staring coldly at the man leading the group.
[Armed Rioter A]: A Construct?! But I thought everyone had left that slimehole of a conservation area already!
Having no intention to answer the preposterous question, Alpha places her hand on her katana\'s grip.

Title: Affection - Lucia: Crimson Weave → Lucia: Crimson Weave VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
With only a few lonely stars, the sky is pitch-black, allowing not the least bit of snowlight to seep through the hazy clouds.
Sitting by the campfire that\'s faintly aglow, Alpha keeps her eyes trained on the dancing sparks.
[Alpha]: ...

Title: Affection - Noctis: Indomitus → Noctis: Indomitus I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Clean Zone, a vast purified area created with the power of the Inver-Hetero Tower.
As humans establish more and more settlements, an increasing number of facilities serving different purposes are being erected.
Many Task Force members would choose here as their getaway destination for vacations.

Title: Affection - Noctis: Indomitus → Noctis: Indomitus II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Customer A]: You know what? I heard that they caught some again during the curfew last night.
[Customer B]: I know! I think it was about some underground trading stuff. Can you believe those addicts? They\'re out of their minds, messing around even in the Clean Zone.
[Customer A]: No wonder the guards say that anyone roaming the streets late at night is probably up to something shady.

Title: Affection - Noctis: Indomitus → Noctis: Indomitus III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Customer A]: What a rain last night, eh?
[Customer A]: You worked until that late?
Before the sun sets, a familiar face has already appeared around the counter.

Title: Affection - Noctis: Indomitus → Noctis: Indomitus IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Conservation Resident]: Sykes? You mean that troublemaker?
[Conservation Resident]: Word on the street is that he\'s part of the reason why they\'ve been enforcing the curfew regulations.
[Conservation Resident]: But I\'m not even close to being associated with that group, let alone having any of their Wanderer\'s Biscuits.

Title: Affection - Noctis: Indomitus → Noctis: Indomitus V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Customer A]: He\'s here.
The regular customer, who kindly volunteered to keep watch outside, hastily returns to Vegetable Stew.
Noctis meets your gaze and nods in acknowledgment before making his way into the kitchen.

Title: Affection - Noctis: Indomitus → Noctis: Indomitus VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Noctis]: Two spoons of β20 extract...
[Noctis]: No wonder the glass is almost full with just two scoops.
[Noctis]: It\'s okay. I haven\'t added anything else, so I can just pour some out for later.

Title: Affection - Alisa: Echo → Alisa: Echo I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
In the woods where a small Utopia collection point is located, Conservation Area 104, Earth.
[Echo]: Target appears normal so far, guarded by six squads of sentries armed with light weapons of the same specs as before.
[Echo]: Me?

Title: Affection - Alisa: Echo → Alisa: Echo II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
It\'s several hours past sunset by the time you\'re done dealing with Pickman\'s minions and settling the refugees in.
The Constructs are still busy reviewing the data at the collection point beside Conservation Area 104. Echo, on the other hand, has gathered up a bunch of items on her own and taken them to a nearby empty lot.
Paper products, dirty bandages, old decorations, etc.—these are the things that lie around her feet now.

Title: Affection - Alisa: Echo → Alisa: Echo III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The transport craft slated to come has arrived, carrying resources to be delivered to other conservation areas.
While they did offer to take you back to Babylonia, you kindly refused them and asked them to first finish what they came to do.
Resources are life and hope—and a couple more days at Conservation Area 104 is nothing if it means the resources can be delivered to those in need as soon as possible.

Title: Affection - Alisa: Echo → Alisa: Echo IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The dawn of this world shines down from the heavens exactly when it\'s supposed to—reminding you of the figurative one from Echo\'s poem that\'s still being sought after.
After the "brief" discussion on modern poetry that you had last night with Echo, she made you go to bed in the transport craft, insisting that you adhere to a healthy lifestyle.
Echo won the argument about going to sleep early, but you insisted on bringing two sleeping bags out of the transport craft, not wanting to leave her outside all by herself.

Title: Affection - Alisa: Echo → Alisa: Echo V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Construct]: Thank you for your cooperation.
Echo gives the Construct a nod, except the Construct is fully absorbed by the terminal in hand.
When you see Echo stepping out of the meeting room, you quickly save the draft with the few words and phrases that you\'ve come up with.

Title: Affection - Alisa: Echo → Alisa: Echo VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Alisa]: Cecily, look. That\'s one bright star!
[Cecily]: Shh, quiet now... Let me have a look...
[Cecily]: That\'s Beta Lib, and I heard it looks green sometimes... Uhm... doesn\'t seem particularly green, does it?

Title: Affection - Lamia: Lost Lullaby → Lamia: Lost Lullaby I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
4:00 PM, Refugee Camp
[Kind Old Man]: What\'s your name again, little one?
[Elene]: My name is Elene, Sir.

Title: Affection - Lamia: Lost Lullaby → Lamia: Lost Lullaby II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
3:00 PM, Refugee Camp
[Kind Old Man]: What\'s your name again?
[Kind Old Man]: Wait, you\'re Elene, right?

Title: Affection - Lamia: Lost Lullaby → Lamia: Lost Lullaby III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Elene]: Huh?
The question catches her completely off guard and her jaw drops. Like a stranded fish, she\'s unable to say a word.
[Elene]: Uhm... I beg your pardon?

Title: Affection - Lamia: Lost Lullaby → Lamia: Lost Lullaby IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Nestled in the embrace of the human, Lamia clings tightly to those arms.
[Elene]: Just put me down. You won\'t get far carrying me like this.
[Elene]: It\'s not like I\'m very light.

Title: Affection - Lamia: Lost Lullaby → Lamia: Lost Lullaby V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Purifying Force Recruit]: Com—man—dant, are you hurt?
A Construct\'s head peeks over the cliff edge, shouting down to the two caught in the net.
[Purifying Force Recruit]: The refugee camp has been secured. The operation is going smoothly.

Title: Affection - Lamia: Lost Lullaby → Lamia: Lost Lullaby VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Aware of the importance of posture when entering the water from a significant height, you try your best to cradle the fragile body in your arms and maintain a vertical position, hoping to minimize the severity of injuries from the high fall.
Even with a perfect posture to enter the water, there are limits to the height that one can safely handle.
A violent shock surges through your body, originating from the soles, as if a heavy hammer relentlessly smashes against your fragile bones, piercing through the flesh.

Title: Affection - Watanabe: Epitaph → Watanabe: Epitaph I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
In this vast wilderness, it\'s hard to tell how long you\'ve been walking. The endless yellow sands stretch out infinitely.
It is 09:12 a.m. Every 10 minutes, the temperature here rises by 0.7°C.
The scorching heat reminds you of a giant pressure cooker, slowly and relentlessly pressing down on anyone passing through this desert.

Title: Affection - Watanabe: Epitaph → Watanabe: Epitaph II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The next morning, Watanabe and you disguise yourselves as refugees fleeing from the conservation area and head to the "Resisters" camp.
Both of you are dressed carefully, using common desert cloaks to cover your faces completely.
Knock, knock—

Title: Affection - Watanabe: Epitaph → Watanabe: Epitaph III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Early the next morning, the wake-up whistle echoes through the camp as the first light appears on the horizon.
[Resister Soldier]: Get up, get up! The Cargo Crew doesn\'t give us any breaks. If you want to eat, follow me to take down the supply trucks!
[Male Civilian]: Count me in!

Title: Affection - Watanabe: Epitaph → Watanabe: Epitaph IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
In the long history of battling the Punishing Virus, humans often forget that the virus is not their only enemy.
Natural disasters like tsunamis, earthquakes, avalanches, and volcanic eruptions can easily claim countless lives.
Humans always believe they\'ve conquered nature, only to scatter and flee in the face of its power.

Title: Affection - Watanabe: Epitaph → Watanabe: Epitaph V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Hours into driving in the desert, the night begins to fall.
The desert temperature drops drastically at night, plummeting to below zero. Humans must race against the Terminator Line and hurry to the conservation area.
With low visibility after the storm, Watanabe is relying on limited lighting and his familiarity with the desert to navigate.

Title: Affection - Watanabe: Epitaph → Watanabe: Epitaph VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Watanabe]: It\'s been almost three hours and still no sign of the oasis...
Tired of the unchanging yellow sands outside, you recline and close your eyes to rest.
[Watanabe]: What are you planning to do when you get back to Babylonia?
