Title: Affection - Qu: Shukra → Qu: Shukra I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The edge of the sky fades from the brilliance of daylight to a bright blue when the transport craft crosses the atmospheric boundary. In the direction from which the sunlight beams, the gem-like colors gradually spread to the horizon.
With the drastic change in pressure and temperature, the small transport craft from Babylonia experiences brief tremors. Time and again, the passengers sitting in the aircraft can feel the jolts coming into the cabin through the anti-shock structure.
At this moment, looking out the porthole, one could see the beautiful and fragile outline of the blue planet.

Title: Affection - Qu: Shukra → Qu: Shukra II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After the relatively short flight, you arrive at Babylonia with Qu.
Qu\'s declaration forms are soaked with tea from the turbulence earlier.
Unable to read Qu\'s soaked forms, the automatic entry system can\'t grant you and Qu entry.

Title: Affection - Qu: Shukra → Qu: Shukra III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The Astronomical Research Institute is located near F.O.S. During the day, there are hardly any people around.
Quiet, simple, and spacious. One wouldn\'t be blamed for going as far as calling this place gloomy.
[Qu]: The Astronomical Research Institute, huh... Why am I barely seeing anyone here now? It looks fine on its own, but this place looks barely alive if you compare it to F.O.S. over there.

Title: Affection - Qu: Shukra → Qu: Shukra IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You and Qu have arrived at the astronomical observatory located in the upper levels of Babylonia.
Compared to ground facilities, this place is closer to the outer domain, and it took both you and Qu quite some time just to get up here.
[Qu]: Crazy how much time it took us to get up here even when we took the elevator. Is this place closer to space than it is to the ground?

Title: Affection - Qu: Shukra → Qu: Shukra V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The equipment room at the observatory is very different from what you imagined it\'d be.
Behind the pitch-black iron door, there is no clean and tidy prep room like the ones you\'ve seen at F.O.S. Storage cabinets are piled up haphazardly, covered in cobwebs and dust, and there is no air circulation.
A moldy smell hits you the moment the door is opened.

Title: Affection - Qu: Shukra → Qu: Shukra VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Qu]: So I guess you didn\'t notice you were injured?
Carefully, you take off your protective suit.
[Qu]: You probably had a bunch of adrenaline flowing through your body just now when we almost lost you out there. Bet that\'s why you didn\'t feel a thing.

Title: Affection - Teddy: Decryptor → Teddy: Decryptor I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Soft light filters through the window, as warm as the gentle aroma of coffee filling the room.
Such a warm afternoon isn\'t the best time for long meetings. Despite the coffee to help keep you awake, the temptation of drowsiness is difficult to ward off.
[Celica]: ...Is this really that tiring?

Title: Affection - Teddy: Decryptor → Teddy: Decryptor II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
It appears like she has been waiting here for some time. As you draw near, the pink-haired Construct waves at you gently.
[Teddy]: Over here!
[Teddy]: We\'re heading to... Constellia.

Title: Affection - Teddy: Decryptor → Teddy: Decryptor III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Navigating through the labyrinth of alleys and dim pathways, the two of you walk quite a distance toward the city. Eventually, you arrive at a spot beside a massive sewer exit adorned with colorful graffiti.
[Teddy]: ...Quirky collectors always have their odd quirks, don\'t they?
[Teddy]: Anyway, I bumped into him around here last time, and he mentioned he lived nearby, so we should be able to find him at this hour.

Title: Affection - Teddy: Decryptor → Teddy: Decryptor IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
With some distance still to cover, to accommodate you, the only human in the group, Kiske manages to find a small electric vehicle with a sidecar. Together, the three of you embark on a wobbly journey.
The sidecar of the vehicle is quite compact, forcing Teddy and you to squeeze closely together.
[Teddy]: I just wanted a new pair of headphones. How did things get this complicated...

Title: Affection - Teddy: Decryptor → Teddy: Decryptor V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The two mechanoids energetically kick open the door, and a noisy wave of music pours out, enveloping you.
[Ragetide]: You\'ve got the nerve to show your face again, Thunder Sparks!
[Kiske]: We\'re here to beat you this time, Abyssal Ragetide!

Title: Affection - Teddy: Decryptor → Teddy: Decryptor VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After some deliberation, Teddy eventually accepts the extra gift.
Kiske hurried back to join his friends, while Teddy enthusiastically tinkers with the new collectible in her hands.
[Teddy]: Storing stuff in such an ancient way... It\'s indeed a rare find.

Title: Affection - Luna: Oblivion → Luna: Oblivion I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Throughout mankind\'s history, there have always been scattered accounts of miracles. Though hard to verify, people still choose to believe in their existence, yearning for miracles to occur.
Because miracles give humanity more than just a future—they give mankind reasons to carry on... or at least some sort of comfort.
They seem to believe that miracles would just find their way to them if they just keep waiting.

Title: Affection - Luna: Oblivion → Luna: Oblivion II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The storm Luna spoke of never comes, which is a lucky turn of events. After about three hours of travel, you come across what can only be described as an abandoned village.
This place is less a village than it is a makeshift camp, with just a few sheds propped against the rocky surface surrounding an empty lot.
Had there still been inhabitants, one might have marveled at humanity\'s resilience. Instead, the collapsed buildings, the scent of rust and mold hanging in the air, and the sparse weeds sprouting through the clearing all tell the same story—this place has been forgotten for years.

Title: Affection - Luna: Oblivion → Luna: Oblivion III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Darkness envelops you once more as hazy images and silhouettes fade in and out of view. Reality and illusion intertwine, distorting your memories.
You seem to hear the chaotic voices much more clearly this time than you did before.
[??]: Com... man... dant...

Title: Affection - Luna: Oblivion → Luna: Oblivion IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
With a stroke of luck coming out of nowhere, you manage to get the generator to work by tinkering and pulling the lever, bringing power back to the amusement park.
As you\'re about to leave, you notice something inside a bag nearby.
You can\'t believe they still have one of these around...

Title: Affection - Luna: Oblivion → Luna: Oblivion V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[?????]: Report... no physical... even... health... issues... in consciousness...
[????]: According to the Science Council... report... conciousness... intense activity... recommend...
[????]: At least... no threat to life...

Title: Affection - Luna: Oblivion → Luna: Oblivion VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Luna sits by the window, cradling an orchid in her hands.
She gazes silently at the orchid in her hand, carefully choosing her words.
[Luna]: When did you figure it out?

Title: Affection - Bridget: Ardeo → Bridget: Ardeo I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
On your rare morning off, you finally put away your terminal, spread out lazily on the bed, and enjoy a moment of leisure.
It feels strange to have a completely empty schedule after being used to working 24/7.
While you know this is your well-deserved free time and it\'s okay to do absolutely nothing—a restless urge stirs in your heart, telling you to go out for a walk.

Title: Affection - Bridget: Ardeo → Bridget: Ardeo II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Student Vendor]: Cotton candy, fluffy crepes, silky creme brulee—
[Student Vendor]: All your favorite snacks, we\'ve got them! Come and take a look!
You enter the festival and notice that the entire Education District looks different. The streets are decorated like school festivals of the Golden Age, vibrant and bustling.

Title: Affection - Bridget: Ardeo → Bridget: Ardeo III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Strange Commentary]: What incredible driving skills!
[Strange Commentary]: Unbelievable! They\'ve pulled off an overtake using the gutter technique!
[Strange Commentary]: Just who is this mysterious "BBBB" racer on the track?!

Title: Affection - Bridget: Ardeo → Bridget: Ardeo IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Time flies as you and Bridget play games at the festival together. Before you know it, the sun is getting low.
A startled voice comes from behind.
[Charles]: No way! Boss! Is that really you?

Title: Affection - Bridget: Ardeo → Bridget: Ardeo V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Charles]: ...My wife and I eventually managed to get this bar up and running.
[Charles]: Well? It\'s quite a touching love story, isn\'t it?
[Charles]: Really? Maybe it\'s my storytelling skills, but I thought it was very moving—actually, it was absolutely life-changing for me! Hahaha.

Title: Affection - Bridget: Ardeo → Bridget: Ardeo VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You follow Bridget onto a bridge on an observation deck, where you can peer into space and that planet—Earth, a 4.6-billion-year-old miracle, and humanity\'s only home.
In the vast emptiness of space, existence is beautifully solitary.
Before her, Babylonia is but an infant still attached to its umbilical cord.

Title: Affection - Hanying: Solacetune → Hanying: Solacetune I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Light dances on the afternoon sea, retreating as a small passenger ship leisurely heads toward its destination.
Identified by the Nighter emblem, the ship is not large, but it can comfortably transport a good number of passengers and cargo.
Inside, two mechanoids chat intermittently.

Title: Affection - Hanying: Solacetune → Hanying: Solacetune II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
At dawn\'s first light in the late spring, the silent forest awakens to an echoing chorus of birdsong that breathes life into every creature nearby.
Even though this natural alarm clock stirs you from sleep, you can\'t resist the urge to sleep a little longer, given the situation.
The scent of food is what really makes you want to get moving.

Title: Affection - Hanying: Solacetune → Hanying: Solacetune III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Man]: I\'ve tallied up the supplies during the first month from the Nighter, as well as the Grubs Kowloong provided for us.
You take the ledger he compiled and place it on the cabinet where you currently store your paperwork.
[Man]: It\'s no big deal—after all, we\'re practically neighbors.

Title: Affection - Hanying: Solacetune → Hanying: Solacetune IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Your view turns hazy under the relentless downpour.
Two mechanoids make their way along a shallow rut, hauling a crate of batteries. As they pass, they kick up a small splash of murky water.
The rainstorms descend in silence. You don\'t spot Yalin before leaving for the campsite, so you start looking for her.

Title: Affection - Hanying: Solacetune → Hanying: Solacetune V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
In the hush of midnight, a gentle mist rises among the mountain trees.
The fever medicine works quickly, and Yalin\'s temperature drops almost immediately.
At the moment, a gentle knocking sound comes from outside the door.

Title: Affection - Hanying: Solacetune → Hanying: Solacetune VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Boccioni]: Yalin has recovered from her fever and is now resting in the newly constructed temporary ward.
[Hanying]: I can see that you really know how to look after people, Boccioni...
[Boccioni]: Perhaps it\'s because of... the feeling of guilt...

Title: Affection - Lucia: Pyroath → Lucia: Pyroath I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Rainwater drips off the leaves onto the combat suit\'s waterproof coating, and the forest glimmers under the scattered sunlight after the downpour.
A moist, earthy smell fills the air, and Lucia\'s voice, routed through the comm channel, passes softly by your ears.
[Lucia]: Move three steps forward.

Title: Affection - Lucia: Pyroath → Lucia: Pyroath II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The patrol dog\'s trail leads you to the ruins of an old building. It shakes off the water clinging to its fur, then barks twice at the crumbling walls.
[Patrol Dog]: Woof!
[Lucia]: Over here!

Title: Affection - Lucia: Pyroath → Lucia: Pyroath III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The forest\'s terrain is twisted and overgrown. Humans haven\'t been here for ages, and in some spots, thick brambles make it nearly impossible to pass.
[Lucia]: Something\'s not right.
[Lucia]: This isn\'t the right way. The target just changed direction—it\'s heading... in the opposite direction?

Title: Affection - Lucia: Pyroath → Lucia: Pyroath IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Nightfall in the forest is especially quiet, and in the patrol team\'s makeshift camp, the fire crackles softly.
[Patrol Captain]: ...This concludes our operation report. We\'ve recovered most of the sound devices across the area. At this point, I\'d like to extend my gratitude to each of you for your efforts.
[Patrol Member A]: This spiel... Boss is definitely going to say "but" again.

Title: Affection - Lucia: Pyroath → Lucia: Pyroath V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The abandoned resort is tucked deep within the forest. If it weren\'t for the spreading Punishing Virus, it would probably be a perfect place to rest—its infrastructure is intact, and there\'s even a small room with a disused generator inside.
No wonder those scavengers wanted to settle here.
[Patrol Member A]: Hey, you\'ll never believe what Beefy just discovered.

Title: Affection - Lucia: Pyroath → Lucia: Pyroath VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The last of the Corrupted collapses, leaving a radiant arc where the flames still flicker in the air.
Taking careful aim at the fallen enemy\'s power core, you fire one precise finishing shot.
As the smoke dissipates, all those Corrupted lured by the sound devices lie defeated.

Title: Affection - Lucia: Pyroath → Lucia: Pyroath VII (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Inside the rumbling transport craft, Gray Raven heads back toward Babylonia.
Swayed by the turbulence, you soon doze off. The half-written mission report slips from your grasp, coming to rest on the knee of the Construct seated beside.
The black-haired Construct girl quietly picks up the notebook.

Title: Affection - Wanshi: Lucid Dreamer → Wanshi: Lucid Dreamer I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Early summer always brings this kind of downpour—light yet relentless.
In the humid, stifling air, the temperature continues to rise as those sheltering beneath the eaves find their patience ebbing away with each falling raindrop.
—Someone suggested replacing simulation training with field exercises, so special authorization for surface deployment allowed this batch of recruits to train in actual ground-level combat conditions.

Title: Affection - Wanshi: Lucid Dreamer → Wanshi: Lucid Dreamer II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Three days have passed since the group left Babylonia.
For the past two days, the researchers have been enthusiastically collecting plant samples from this pristine mountain forest. According to the plan, everyone should head to Nanyun Old Town at the foot of the mountain today.
It isn\'t until everyone is packing up to leave the mountains that someone finally realizes something is wrong.

Title: Affection - Wanshi: Lucid Dreamer → Wanshi: Lucid Dreamer III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After settling in Nanyun Old Town, you gradually become acquainted with the locals.
The isolated town hasn\'t seen outsiders in ages, so the group from Babylonia quickly becomes the talk of the town. The clinic where Gray Raven\'s Commandant and Wanshi are staying draws visitors every day.
Word on the street says that nothing is incurable when this mysterious Construct doctor does his wonders.

Title: Affection - Wanshi: Lucid Dreamer → Wanshi: Lucid Dreamer IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
When you wake up to the crackling of a campfire, the night has already draped its darkness over the dense forest.
Wanshi sits by the tent while you find yourself in a thermal sleeping bag with a soft pillow tucked beneath your neck—clearly Wanshi\'s way of preventing neck strain.
[Wanshi]: I should be the one apologizing. I just double-checked—that herb actually stimulates the poison from the mushrooms temporarily.

Title: Affection - Wanshi: Lucid Dreamer → Wanshi: Lucid Dreamer V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The next day brings clear skies. By the time the two of you make it back to the old town, the Rain Flower Festival is already in full swing.
Having spent the night camping in the forest, with no chance to change clothes, you and Wanshi have to borrow festival attire from Zhongjing and Wan.
The two of you change into the town\'s traditional attire, while Zhongjing looks on with a delighted smile for quite some time.

Title: Affection - Wanshi: Lucid Dreamer → Wanshi: Lucid Dreamer VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Wanshi]: Okay... That should do it.
By the time Wanshi finishes treating the injured researcher, the sun that had been stubbornly hanging in the sky has long set, marking the end of this year\'s Rain Flower Festival.
While you did take a tumble, too, everyone still acknowledges your time as the "fastest record" in Rain Flower Festival history.

Title: Affection - Yata: Fulgor → Yata: Fulgor I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The terminal vibrates, showing an incoming communication request.
[Celica]: Greetings, Gray Raven Commandant.
[Celica]: Good news—your vacation time has finally come.

Title: Affection - Yata: Fulgor → Yata: Fulgor II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The transport vessel nestles into the artificial island\'s embrace as the sea breeze carries the scent of flowers. Following the festival staff\'s guidance, Yata and you make your way to the starting point of this coastal street.
[Staff Member]: This is the spot. Let me brief you on the situation.
He clears his throat and pulls out a tablet for presentation, looking every bit ready to launch into a lengthy report.

Title: Affection - Yata: Fulgor → Yata: Fulgor III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
They say students are the most curious and creative group in the world.
Even on a predetermined path, they always manage to find and forge their own way forward.
[Yata]: Here it is! See that pit in the wall? Step on it and you can climb right up.

Title: Affection - Yata: Fulgor → Yata: Fulgor IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After leaving the music club room, Yata leads you to the track and field club\'s area, navigating with ease.
Though close to the field, the indoor space is noticeably smaller. Yata ventures inside, methodically searching every corner.
The metal shelves are lined with the club\'s achievements—trophies proudly displayed on the top shelf, medals arranged below, and carefully framed group photos positioned in the most prominent place.

Title: Affection - Yata: Fulgor → Yata: Fulgor V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Staff Member]: Sign here, and these food ingredients will be all yours.
[Staff Member]: The festival turned out much bigger than expected and we need to prioritize ingredients for the public stalls. I apologize that we can\'t spare much for you.
The familiar staff members and their delivery carts bustle about. Across the road, festival preparations are in full swing as visitors from all around gradually gather.

Title: Affection - Yata: Fulgor → Yata: Fulgor VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The stall is packed with people as their lively chatter blends into a continuous buzz. Yata\'s mechanical arms move at lightning speed and become quite the spectacle for onlookers. The queue loops around the food cart, it is so packed that not even a needle could pass through.
With Yata at the helm, you focus on packaging, ensuring that customers can swiftly get their food. After several rounds of orders, the already limited ingredients quickly become depleted.
You flip the sign to the side showing "Sold Out", and within moments, the crowd around the stall dissipates completely.

Title: Affection - Nanami: Startrail → Nanami: Startrail I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Chapter 1
Notes Lost to Paper, Land Lost to Sea
[??]: Commandant, Commandant—

Title: Affection - Nanami: Startrail → Nanami: Startrail II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Chapter 1001
A Summer of Cicadas and Rising Winds
Noisy cicada songs fill your ears as physical senses gradually return to your body. You try to open your eyes.

Title: Affection - Nanami: Startrail → Nanami: Startrail III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Chapter V Hero vs Dragon
Noisy shouts find their way to your ears as you slowly regain your senses.
You have the distinct feeling that someone is about to shout, "It\'s the apocalypse!" at you again.

Title: Affection - Nanami: Startrail → Nanami: Startrail IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Seaweed Puffhead]: This is the treasure the dragon has stolen—the one Nanami always hoped to find with you.
After Nanami\'s departure, Mr. Seaweed Puffhead and you risk venturing into a lair the dragon has abandoned, where you unearth a Cosmic Rider\'s Belt.
[Seaweed Puffhead]: And she has this other message for you.

Title: Affection - Nanami: Startrail → Nanami: Startrail V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The tower bells chime in the distance.
[Deity]: Even in your imagination, your mind keeps reshaping how you see this world...
You\'re running out of the time you\'ve received from the deity, and you\'ve still got to find the "treasure"... You know you\'ll have to find Nanami as soon as you can, even if you\'re the only person in this world who knows her.

Title: Affection - Nanami: Startrail → Nanami: Startrail VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: Wow, Nanami is drifting so far, so very far away...
Somewhere in the infinite cosmos, the girl looks back at the long path she has traveled, watching as even its traces fade into nothingness. She fails to notice the weary smile that dances across her face.
[Nanami]: This sure feels a little awkward... without Commandant around me.

Title: Affection - Ishmael: Parhelion → Ishmael: Parhelion I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
They say the snow in the ARU never melts. The land\'s cold, hard, and barren, like it was never meant for people.
The whining cold winds always carry a touch of melancholy, like the people who call this place home.
A harsh environment, scarce food, limited sunlight... even the literature born here is steeped in sorrow.

Title: Affection - Ishmael: Parhelion → Ishmael: Parhelion II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Commandant, we\'re here.
The transport craft makes a slow descent, touching down at a plaza.
The plaza is nestled between two mountains, with a highway stretching out from it.

Title: Affection - Ishmael: Parhelion → Ishmael: Parhelion III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After leaving Gray Raven, Ishmael walks alone toward the control room.
She runs into Hetero-Creatures now and then, but the creatures just wander past Ishmael like she is not there.
The pink-haired Construct walks calmly past the Hetero-Creatures toward the control room.

Title: Affection - Ishmael: Parhelion → Ishmael: Parhelion IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The pink-haired woman stands silently, watching the destruction from above.
An alert beeps, and she looks at the device on her wrist.
[???]: Time-space fluctuations? How\'s that possible?

Title: Affection - Ishmael: Parhelion → Ishmael: Parhelion V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A deafening alarm echoes throughout the research institute.
The number on the distant screen flashes, counting down rapidly.
Before the injured time traveler can speak again, he is buried by the falling ceiling.

Title: Affection - Ishmael: Parhelion → Ishmael: Parhelion VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Then, Ishmael uses the time travel terminal to contact other travelers.
Finally, someone finally answers Ishmael after a long wait.
[??]: This is Si. I\'ve received your message.

Title: Affection - Ishmael: Parhelion → Ishmael: Parhelion VI (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The howling wind and snow make it hard to see or hear anything.
With a flash of blue light, two figures appear in the snowstorm.
[Ishmael]: Hmm... Where are we...

Title: Affection - Lilith: Daemonissa → Lilith: Daemonissa I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Boots produce dull thuds against the cotton carpet as they move along the familiar path now covered in blood and grisly remnants.
The woman\'s figure comes to a stop. She conjures a pure black card with gold trim from her hand and swipes it to unlock the laboratory door.
If not for seeing the true dimensions of this laboratory with their own eyes, many people would genuinely mistake it for one of the VIP suites at Las Prados Hotel.

Title: Affection - Lilith: Daemonissa → Lilith: Daemonissa II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Eleanor]: Speaking of which, don\'t we have five minutes until the trial run starts?
[Faulkner]: It\'s just a luck-based game, what\'s there to test?
Just then, the terminal let out a soft beep.

Title: Affection - Lilith: Daemonissa → Lilith: Daemonissa III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Less than ten minutes after the third round ended, Faulkner, Rabio, and Eleanor confirmed their selections for the next round in sequence.
Then Collins.
The ten-second countdown appears on the screen of your terminal. If you do not make a choice now, you will be defeated.

Title: Affection - Lilith: Daemonissa → Lilith: Daemonissa IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Instead of responding immediately, she shifts her gaze to the weapon in your hand.
You look at the tactical dagger in your hand and gently place it on the ground.
[Eleanor]: If you knew how to get us to meet all along, why didn\'t you just say so?

Title: Affection - Lilith: Daemonissa → Lilith: Daemonissa V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Eleanor pulls over another chair from nearby and sits down.
She picks up the wristband terminal for the game.
[Eleanor]: No one seems to be initiating this round yet.

Title: Affection - Lilith: Daemonissa → Lilith: Daemonissa V (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Eleanor]: "I wish this moment could last forever."
[Eleanor]: That sounds like a foreshadowing for a bad ending.
[Eleanor]: Isn\'t that the kind of line a lady on a date would say?

Title: Affection - Lilith: Daemonissa → Lilith: Daemonissa VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You put the protective suit back on and inject the third dose of serum into your body.
Under the toppled bookshelf lie the items you left before coming here.
Of course, the Standard Pistol previously placed here is also revealed.

Title: Affection - Selena: Pianissimo → Selena: Pianissimo I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
—
[Selena]: I\'ll record five things. Five fingers, each holding a piece of the past.
She// is in a long, deep slumber.

Title: Affection - Selena: Pianissimo → Selena: Pianissimo II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Selena passes several collapsed walls and broken tiles before stopping at a withered apple tree.
The soil, saturated by Red Tide, can no longer sustain flowers, yet the loose earth still carries the warmth left behind by the lives that drifted away.
She bends down, brushing the ground with her fair fingertips. She activates the Tempest frame\'s ability to read Red Tide again and gently stirs up the untold stories of those who once walked this land.

Title: Affection - Selena: Pianissimo → Selena: Pianissimo III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lia]: Hey, what are you doing here? I\'ve been looking all over for you!
After forcing Selena out of hiding in the dusty room, Lia recites the message from her terminal.
[Lia]: Right after you sent that message, they got back to me.

Title: Affection - Selena: Pianissimo → Selena: Pianissimo IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The transport aircraft takes off.
When Selena arrives in Babylonia, Allen immediately sends her to the Science Council for a series of meticulous examinations.
Asimov hurries over as soon as the examination report arrives on his terminal.

Title: Affection - Selena: Pianissimo → Selena: Pianissimo V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A solitary whale glides through distant, deep waters.
She hears herself lingering amidst ruins, and sees herself wandering through the desolate wilderness.
She witnesses countless sunrises and sunsets on Earth, where forests and mountains bathe in radiant light,

Title: Affection - Selena: Pianissimo → Selena: Pianissimo VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Time continues to flow quietly.
As Selena is still in the adaptation period for her new frame, she cannot take surface missions as dictated by the Control Court for now. During her free time, she often invites you to explore Babylonia together, as if trying to make up for lost time.
[Selena]: Commandant, over here!

Title: Affection - Selena: Pianissimo → Selena: Pianissimo VI (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Selena]: Then... goodbye, Conductor.
The show has ended, and the night has sunk deep. It\'s time for farewells.
The evening breeze grazes streets with scattered lights, past the dancing shadows of trees that rustle softly in response.

Title: Affection - Jetavie: Daybreak → Jetavie: Daybreak I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
!!ATTENTION!! The contents of this game are entirely fictitious. All character names, organizations, locations, and settings in the game are fictional and have no connection to the real world. Therefore, please do not imitate the story or behaviors depicted in the game in any form. Otherwise, you might be taken away by people in white lab coats, you know? If you understand, quickly tap confirm and form a contract with your Vie-chan, okay?
[???]: Welcome back! You\'re tuned in to Super Earth\'s most explosive, most no-holds-barred program—Midnight Syndrome Radio!
[Meme-germ]: I\'m your old friend speaking through your headphones, and the amazing host about to capture your hearts—Meme-germ!

Title: Affection - Jetavie: Daybreak → Jetavie: Daybreak II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Classical Bodybuilder]: Can you FEEL your brachioradialis burning?! That\'s the call of the wild fused with your DNA! Strike while the iron\'s HOT! ONE MORE SET, LIFT!!
[Gluttonous Sloth]: C-coach, I can\'t lift anymore!
[Classical Bodybuilder]: You WEAKLING, have you forgotten the teachings bestowed upon us by our glorious President?

Title: Affection - Jetavie: Daybreak → Jetavie: Daybreak III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Vie-chan]: Hey, Darling, wake uuuuup!
The next morning, you once again experience the same noisy yet thoughtful "wake-up service" as yesterday.
Taking a gentle sip of the "nutritious breakfast" prepared by Vie-chan, you straighten your clothes while rising from the soft mattress.

Title: Affection - Jetavie: Daybreak → Jetavie: Daybreak IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Vie-chan]: Cheers—!
The two of you clink your glasses together in midair with a crystal-clear ring.
Then, the two of you tilt your heads back and down the joyous victory drink in one gulp (P.S.: It\'s actually a healthy, low-sugar, non-alcoholic beverage!).

Title: Affection - Jetavie: Daybreak → Jetavie: Daybreak V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Light pierces through the boundless silence, stabbing painfully into consciousness.
She pushes away the heavy debris pinning her down and staggers to her feet.
In the haze, everything before her seems almost real, yet simultaneously ethereal and dreamlike.

Title: Affection - Jetavie: Daybreak → Jetavie: Daybreak VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
In the pitch-black room, the faint glow of neon lights flickers, illuminating the faces of the six attendees.
[Man with Glinting Glasses]: That crazy girl... she\'s back.
[Man with Glinting Glasses]: We don\'t have much time left.

Title: Affection - Discord: Secator → Discord: Secator I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
By early morning, the conservation area is already awake. The sky is bright and clear, and your steps grow lighter as you make your way to the appointment.
The bustle along the path feels different from anywhere else. Humans and Constructs alike walk with animal companions—dogs of every shape and size, each wearing a name tag, full of energy as they play or train.
You arrive at the door of a quiet, out-of-the-way house. Just as you reach for the bell, the door opens.

Title: Affection - Discord: Secator → Discord: Secator II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Inside the modest temporary dormitory, a silent standoff plays out—half comical, half exasperating.
The blue-haired Construct crouches, holding a stuffed toy, doing her best to send friendly signals to the anxious training dog huddled in the corner.
She takes a careful step forward, lighter than a falling thread. But the dog keeps growling, backing up until she\'s pressed tight against the wall.

Title: Affection - Discord: Secator → Discord: Secator III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Discord]: Today\'s breakfast is Kowloong fragrant tea, strawberry muffins, and a sausage and cheese omelet...
[Discord]: Plus banana honey toast, taro croissants, and pumpkin pancakes. And...
She pauses mid-serve and looks at you, puzzled.

Title: Affection - Discord: Secator → Discord: Secator IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Host]: Little Phym finishes in 31.33 seconds and takes first place!
[Host]: Let\'s give a round of applause to Little Phym\'s trainer and the sponsor of this Paw Guardian event—Mr. Kaiji!
[Host]: Mr. Kaiji is passionate about public welfare—not only rescuing animals but also revitalizing the conservation area. He\'s even running for Babylonia council soon, so please give him your support!

Title: Affection - Discord: Secator → Discord: Secator V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
On the way back, none of you—neither you, Discord, nor Ksori—walk with the same lightness as when you set out.
You push aside the tangle of thoughts in your mind and quicken your pace toward the dorm.
The moment the leash is loosened, Ksori slips away to the same corner where she first showed signs of stress, curling herself tightly.

Title: Affection - Discord: Secator → Discord: Secator VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Host]: Wow, what an incredible leap! Ksori finishes the first round in 25.13 seconds, taking first place! Close behind is Mr. Kaiji\'s dog, Little Phym, at 33.01 seconds in second place!
[Host]: Alright, let\'s take a short intermission. The second half of the competition begins in 10 minutes. Don\'t miss it!
[Ksori]: Woof!

Title: Affection - Bianca: Crepuscule → Bianca: Crepuscule I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[?]: Yeah, it\'s been nearly a week now.
[?]: We\'ll have to try a forced awakening if you fail as well.
[?]: ...And take care of yourself... Don\'t throw your life away before you can rescue her.

Title: Affection - Bianca: Crepuscule → Bianca: Crepuscule II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Asimov]: Yeah, it\'s been nearly a week now.
Lab equipment ticks away in silence. A Construct is lying nearby, eyes tightly shut.
[Bianca]: ...

Title: Affection - Bianca: Crepuscule → Bianca: Crepuscule III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Davis]: Kids who can\'t escape the witch\'s ice magic will be turned into snowmen! Here I come, you little rascals!
A young man in a military uniform is chasing after a group of small children.
[Venice]: Hahahaha! You can\'t catch me!

Title: Affection - Bianca: Crepuscule → Bianca: Crepuscule III (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
As the bell tolls slowly, people begin to leave the church in small groups.
Just when you\'re getting ready to leave after helping with the cleanup, Bianca\'s gentle voice suddenly calls out to you.
[Bianca]: Commandant.

Title: Affection - Bianca: Crepuscule → Bianca: Crepuscule IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
It is the afternoon of March 10th. Riding on horseback, you see light snow falling from the sky. A few thin beams of light pierce through the clouds, making the surrounding landscape appear even more bleak.
You dismount from the horse, secure the reins, and hurry into the church.
The melodious church bells ring as scheduled. It\'s already 5 o\'clock. You\'re nearly an hour late for your appointment with Bianca.

Title: Affection - Bianca: Crepuscule → Bianca: Crepuscule V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After the north wind howls again, silence falls abruptly over the land.
The woman in silver stands alone in the wind and snow.
[Bianca]: ...

Title: Affection - Bianca: Crepuscule → Bianca: Crepuscule VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
It is May, and you finally figure out that you can\'t approach the mountain no matter what you do, so you move from village to village at the foot of the mountain with Rosa to look for any news about Bianca.
[Scavenger]: ...They\'re even more terrifying than the monsters from the Abyss!
In the center of the crowd, a Scavenger in tattered clothes points at a portrait behind him, waving wildly as he yells out.

Title: Affection - Veronica: Aegis → Veronica: Aegis I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[????]: At this point, a quick death would be a blessing. It\'d put her out of her misery.
Dusk settled over the savanna.
Epirus, once a jewel among the Golden Age\'s nature reserves, is now nothing but a forgotten dust bowl.

Title: Affection - Veronica: Aegis → Veronica: Aegis II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Muffled thunder rumbles through the humid air, and the savanna heaves in inky waves with the wind. A bolt of lightning splits the darkness, its white flame igniting the night, and the gentle drizzle turns into a full-blown downpour.
[Lion Cub]: Nngh—
The temperature on the savanna is dropping drastically, thanks to a mix of the heavy rain and the huge day-night temperature swing. The already fragile lion cub is shaking like a leaf in Veronica\'s arms, its body heat leaking away fast. It\'s clearly suffering from hypothermia.

Title: Affection - Veronica: Aegis → Veronica: Aegis III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Maybe it\'s because humans hadn\'t been around for eons, but the lions aren\'t too wary of the newcomers. Once they figure out you aren\'t a threat, and with the lioness queen\'s silent approval, the two of you and the lion cub settle in and get along just fine with the pride.
Cubs are the most high-energy troublemakers on the savanna, and before long, Veronica\'s one-on-one sessions turn into a wild free-for-all for all the young lions.
These fluffy future rulers of the savanna really start to show their true colors. The tacticians pull off sneaky attacks from behind, the aggressive ones come at you from every angle, the social butterflies get everyone in on a group assault, and the hopeless one—your own cub—whimpers and makes a beeline for you.

Title: Affection - Veronica: Aegis → Veronica: Aegis IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The lion pride continues its migration without skipping a beat, reaching a new resting place after two days of travel.
The afternoon sun beats down on the earth as you doze against a male lion. Only the cubs still have the energy to pounce around, treating the dragon rider\'s tail as a worthy opponent in their hunting games.
Fed up with the harassment, Veronica gets up to leave, but the persistent little "slow learner" sticks to her like glue, determined to continue its epic battle with her infuriating tail.

Title: Affection - Veronica: Aegis → Veronica: Aegis IV (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The harsh sun tilts westward, its scorching grip starting to loosen. The stifling heat blends into the air, turning into an almost imperceptible tension.
Veronica is back in a flash, zipping down at top speed before she comes to a halt in midair.
[Veronica]: We\'ve got to get them out of here now.

Title: Affection - Veronica: Aegis → Veronica: Aegis V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Scattered rocks, broken stems, a barren wasteland, and dead trees collapsed in mud. A hot wind blows through, carrying the unmistakable scent of blood, hinting at more death on the horizon.
[Veronica]: I\'m going to make them pay.
Unable to contain her fury any longer, Veronica turns and spreads her wings.

Title: Affection - Veronica: Aegis → Veronica: Aegis VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Epirus, the lion cub, huddles nervously against the kneeling human\'s legs, gnawing on the hem of their clothes.
The human quickly determines that Hermione has suffered an acute heart failure, a byproduct of the intense stress from the Red Tide.
You scramble towards the vehicle, a race against time.

Title: Affection - Vera: Geiravor → Vera: Geiravor I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Villager A]: On that fateful day... the Demon Lord descended upon the dark castle...
[Villager B]: Even looking upon the Demon Lord was forbidden—one glance and you\'d be transformed into a monster!
[Villager C]: We had no choice but to abandon the homes our ancestors had lived in for generations!

Title: Affection - Vera: Geiravor → Vera: Geiravor II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Embraced by the softness of the feather bed, the hero drifts into deep slumber while the system in their mind tirelessly reviews the script\'s progression:
[System]: Hero, storms the Demon Lord\'s castle, ends up imprisoned.
[System]: To kill the Demon Lord, first gain affection, and trust.

Title: Affection - Vera: Geiravor → Vera: Geiravor III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Howitzer]: Hey, wake up... The curse... It\'s already here!
[Howitzer]: Q-quick, wake up... We\'re g-going to be too late...!
[Technor]: Damn it, how can you be sleeping so deeply?!

Title: Affection - Vera: Geiravor → Vera: Geiravor IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
...
After a flash of white light, the world before you completely transforms. The quaint village and the dark castle of the Demon Lord are gone.
Reality itself seems disrupted, and what appears before you is a small room—a calendar on the nightstand explains everything: this is even before the Punishing Virus outbreak.

Title: Affection - Vera: Geiravor → Vera: Geiravor V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
When the last petal falls from the rose, the curse will take effect.
As the final petal withers away, the Demon Lord and everything within the castle will fade into nothingness.
Rose petals now carpet the floor, and the countdown has begun.

Title: Affection - Vera: Geiravor → Vera: Geiravor VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The data stream flows smoothly, yet mysterious characters occasionally jump out, randomly recombine, then disappear back into the turbulence.
[Hamlet]: ...Data modification detected.
The script program falls silent for a moment, then outputs a brand new sequence:

Title: Affection - Liv: Limpidity → Liv: Limpidity I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The Maiden of Eden
[Liv]: Uh...
[??]: Excuse me, please maintain some distance from the artwork.

Title: Affection - Liv: Limpidity → Liv: Limpidity II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Awakening from darkness, the little gray raven opened its eyes.
Before it stretched an endless expanse of fragrant grass, as it found itself cradled in the gentle curve of a maiden\'s arms.
[??]: ...Are you still in pain, little gray raven?

Title: Affection - Liv: Limpidity → Liv: Limpidity III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
With the little gray raven by her side, the maiden was no longer alone... yet the bird watched, its heart growing heavy, for she was fading before its eyes.
With every creature she folded, tiny specks of light escaped from between her fingers, flowing into the new creation.
Day by day, the luminous wings upon her back dwindled. Her very form began to thin, becoming translucent against the sun...

Title: Affection - Liv: Limpidity → Liv: Limpidity III (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The battle ends with you and Liv disarming the unit known as G94, though it still nervously keeps its gun turret raised.
[G94]: Wh-what do you want?! Even if your voice sounds like my little master\'s, I w-won\'t let you pass, you wretched Punishing Virus!
[Liv]: You think... we\'re the Punishing Virus?

Title: Affection - Liv: Limpidity → Liv: Limpidity IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Day by day, time flowed on, and day by day, the wind grew bolder and wilder.
The air turned crisp, the grasses faded from green to gold. Autumn had settled over the land, and winter drew near.
Once more, the maiden gifted particles of her own light to kindle life anew, then sank gently onto the fading grass.

Title: Affection - Liv: Limpidity → Liv: Limpidity V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
By the time you and Liv reach the base of the windmill tower, a hoarse thunder rumbles across the horizon. Dark clouds devour the sun, brewing what seems to be a long-overdue storm.
[Liv]: Ms. Vimine!
There, paint buckets lie overturned. Spattered in a riot of color, Vimine is scrambling to gather up that absurdly large drawing board. Seeing her struggle, Liv rushes forward to help manage the chaos.

Title: Affection - Liv: Limpidity → Liv: Limpidity VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Leaving the windmill tower, you are met by a maelstrom—thunderous roars, a pitch-black sky, and torrential rain.
Sensing the storm within Liv\'s M.I.N.D., you decisively initiate a Deep M.I.N.D. connection, but she remains silent, lost in overwhelming grief.
[Liv]: ...

Title: Affection - Liv: Limpidity → Liv: Limpidity VII (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Between dream and reality lies a thin membrane, as if you have sunken into the deep sea.
A low, solemn rhythm pulses in your ears like a lingering echo.
You glance around the dimly lit cabin... It takes a moment to remember: this is Liv\'s "secret base."

Title: Affection - Teddy: Spectre → Teddy: Spectre I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
In the golden morning light softened by sheer curtains, tiny specks of dust drift lazily, spinning themselves into stars without a care.
The rich, mellow scent of coffee feels like a warm hand. Gentle music flows between the fingers, and amid the sweet-tart notes of cherry, your mind slowly wakes to the first morning of vacation.
Wait a second...

Title: Affection - Teddy: Spectre → Teddy: Spectre II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The pink banner waves for barely half an hour before the flashy Golden Age coupe brazenly gives out, leaving you stranded halfway down the road.
Standing on the quiet roadside, you look out at faint clouds drifting over endless hills. The soft clang of metal rings out—Teddy is "communicating" with the unreliable machine.
After being sent away with a curt "Don\'t get in the way," you\'ve been reduced to standing nearby like a living billboard for "Genius Engineer\'s Repair Services."

Title: Affection - Teddy: Spectre → Teddy: Spectre III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The photo seems to carry the driver back to that distant time once again.
[Transport Driver]: Edward stayed in that museum for hours. Those few days, he looked so troubled, like he\'d met a problem no one could ever solve.
Teddy\'s fingers curl slightly. She frowns and turns away, but the man\'s voice stops her.

Title: Affection - Teddy: Spectre → Teddy: Spectre IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
When the transport enters conservation area 83, the afternoon sunlight has softened to its gentlest hue, tinting the world with lazy golden light. In the passenger seat, Teddy leans her head against the window, drifting in a gently swaying dream.
A strange, distorted violin melody barges into her dream. Teddy frowns, her lashes trembling before she opens her eyes in mild annoyance.
[Teddy]: That sounds awful.

Title: Affection - Teddy: Spectre → Teddy: Spectre V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Stratocumulus clouds hang low, pressing the sky down onto the mountains. As the transport vehicle winds along the twisting road, Teddy nods gently with each bump, as if knocking on the door of sleep.
Just before her head hits the window, you reach out to shield her forehead.
[Teddy]: ...Hmm?

Title: Affection - Teddy: Spectre → Teddy: Spectre VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The transport vehicle comes to a stop at the entrance to the village.
The night sky after the rain is clear and deep, countless stars forming the Milky Way, its finest details visible tonight.
The docking point in the village is still occupied, giving the two of you a chance to sit quietly and admire the shining tapestry of the stars above.

Title: Affection - Teddy: Spectre → Teddy: Spectre VII (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
With the lost girl found, the salt-collecting crew finally leaves after a long delay.
You settle Teddy at a temporary rest point and carefully check her frame for any further damage. Only when you confirm there is none do you finally hear, in her own words, what caused her strange behavior.
[Teddy]: A small mercy, really. At least it only affected me... Still within control.

Title: Affection - Teddy: Spectre → Teddy: Spectre VII (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Dark ink floods the space of her M.I.N.D., washing away every last construct until only a quiet, empty void remains.
In the stillness, countless bubbles—pure and translucent as frozen dew—float gently in the air. Beyond that dreamlike expanse, you finally see her: the Construct girl standing in the distance.
[Teddy]: ...

Title: Affection - Rosetta: Arete → Rosetta: Arete I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Deep truck tracks cut through the snow. A researcher crouches over them, studying the marks with full concentration.
He seems utterly absorbed, as if the tire marks open the door to some hidden scientific wonderland—one he hopes will lead to a groundbreaking discovery worthy of shaking the academic world.
Unfortunately, he\'ll never get that chance. A hole has been blown through the back of his skull—his brilliant mind reduced to a grim, blossoming red wound now exposed to the falling snow.

Title: Affection - Rosetta: Arete → Rosetta: Arete II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Asimov]: Your condition is worse than I expected... Does Commandant know?
[Rosetta]: No.
[Asimov]: Of course. The commandant isn\'t a Construct specialist, and you wouldn\'t tell the Commandant on your own.

Title: Affection - Rosetta: Arete → Rosetta: Arete III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Whiteford brushes the snow off, shoulders his heavy pack, and takes up his weapon. He looks up into the polar night. It stretches on—empty, quiet, and brazenly certain that nothing alive belongs here.
[Bill]: Damn weather! Boss, are you sure the "rabbits" we\'re chasing really came all the way out here?
Bill\'s clueless whining interrupts Whiteford\'s thoughts. Seeing the irritated twist on Whiteford\'s metal face, the mechanoid beside Bill smacks him on the head with his mechanical arm.

Title: Affection - Rosetta: Arete → Rosetta: Arete IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Rosetta drifts in and out of uneasy sleep, the endless darkness of the polar night washing over her dreams again and again.
Night follows night, darkness follows darkness. Her dream becomes a chamber of thick mercury, trapping whatever clarity or reason she has left.
Between dreams, she is somehow awake. Her consciousness doesn\'t move in a straight line—it drifts like scattered fragments on that ocean of mercury. Sometimes the world forms blurry shapes, sometimes it warps into things she can\'t even recognize.

Title: Affection - Rosetta: Arete → Rosetta: Arete V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Two days earlier, the two of you had analyzed the storage core of the defeated pursuers and uncovered intel.
[Rosetta]: By analyzing the storage core, we found quite a bit of information in our favor.
[Rosetta]: They can\'t communicate long-distance under signal jamming, so they still have no idea this squad was taken out.

Title: Affection - Rosetta: Arete → Rosetta: Arete V (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You and Rosetta choose to use the blizzard as cover to break through the sealed enemy perimeter.
The snowfields roar like something dying. Sky and ground churn together into a boiling vat of white, thick enough to choke on.
The light turns into a ghostly gray-white haze. Every direction blends into every other. The world shrinks into a spinning cage of snow, and beyond it, nothing exists.

Title: Affection - Rosetta: Arete → Rosetta: Arete VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The evacuation safehouse is already in sight, yet you turn back into the blizzard.
The snow groans under your boots. You try to follow your own trail back to Rosetta, but most of your footprints have already been buried. What\'s left looks like a puzzle with half the pieces missing.
Eventually, you spot tracks sunk deep into the snow—far deeper than anything a human or a Construct could make. Only a heavy metal body could leave marks like these. The mechanoid pursuers have passed through here.

Title: Affection - Kamui: Aeternion → Kamui: Aeternion I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: Commandant, can you hear me? This is Kamui.
A torrential downpour rages, ravaging through the muddy paths across the wasteland. A sickly and leaden gray blankets the sky, and lightning and thunder roar within the clouds, disrupting the stability of the communication channel.
The armored vehicle\'s windshield wipers swing frantically, yet they are simply unable to clear the curtain of rain obstructing visibility. The piercing white noise in the communication finally recedes after a while, and Kamui\'s voice comes through.

Title: Affection - Kamui: Aeternion → Kamui: Aeternion II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The buzzing broadcasts, the eerie surveillance probes... Strange phenomena suddenly occur one after another in the eco garden, tightening the nerves of the evacuees that had only just begun to relax.
The brief tranquility shatters in an instant, and anxiety washes over every face. Whispers spread through the crowd along with quick, shallow breaths, and panic breaks out once more, like drops of ink in clear water.
[?????]: Wel... come...

Title: Affection - Kamui: Aeternion → Kamui: Aeternion III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The dome\'s canopy shields them from the cold rain and heavy clouds outside, while warm golden light fills the entire space.
The desperate days of fleeing from the Corrupted, having to sleep rough and scrape by in the wilderness—all of this feels like just a bad dream now.
The refugees wake from peaceful slumber, basking in the eco garden\'s simulated sunlight with exclamations of surprise.

Title: Affection - Kamui: Aeternion → Kamui: Aeternion IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The rain continues to pour outside the eco garden. Meanwhile, under the domed ceiling, a gentle simulation of dawn light falls softly around the interior.
After unlocking the residential zone necessary for survival, the air circulation system was activated. In just the span of a day, it has removed the stale odors of rust and mold throughout the eco garden.
And in their place came the fresh fragrance of soil and vegetation.

Title: Affection - Kamui: Aeternion → Kamui: Aeternion V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Morning arrives, but the simulated sunlight that usually gently wakes everyone doesn\'t appear. The air inside the eco garden becomes humid as the cold rain rages on, accompanied by the rumbling thunder.
Yet none of this disturbs Kamui, who is sleeping soundly in the special room.
That is until—

Title: Affection - Kamui: Aeternion → Kamui: Aeternion V (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: Huh...? Commandant, look at this! It seems to be a journal belonging to the former mistress.
Chronologically speaking, this appears to be the earliest entry, considering that it was created in the Golden Age before the Punishing Virus outbreak.
[Former Mistress]: My colleagues thought I was crazy, asking why I gave up my lab job to settle in the middle of nowhere with him. We simply had enough of that mechanical and cold life in the city—like cogs in a machine, going through the same routine day after day.

Title: Affection - Kamui: Aeternion → Kamui: Aeternion VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The thunderstorm finally dissipates as dawn breaks, and the eco garden retracts its protective canopy. Real sunlight pours in after a long absence, giving striking clarity to everything.
Morning comes, and the butler robot\'s energetic broadcast gently pulls everyone out of their slumber.
[Butler Robot]: System reboot and self-diagnosis complete. Power supply stable.

Title: Affection - Nirvatia: Dirge - Part → Nirvatia: Dirge - Part I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Weather Presenter]: "...The weather regulation system in certain areas of Babylonia will switch to precipitation mode from this evening through tomorrow daytime. So, don\'t forget to bring your rain gear when going out."
After processing the last file, you stretch your wrists and lean back against the chair, your gaze drifting toward the window.
The silken, sad, uncertain rustling of each purple curtain ushers in the night ahead of time.

Title: Affection - Nirvatia: Dirge - Part → Nirvatia: Dirge - Part II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nirvatia]: ...Please reconsider, Dr. Witte. As Dr. Lenore\'s former colleague and close friend, your testimony is crucial to our inquiry.
[Witte]: Let me repeat myself: I transferred to a different team before her incident, so I never heard anything about this. I\'ve fulfilled my obligation to cooperate with your investigation.
[Witte]: As for personal matters... I don\'t want to talk about Lenore with anyone, especially not with the Council\'s Security Director.

Title: Affection - Nirvatia: Dirge - Part → Nirvatia: Dirge - Part III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Margaret]: I\'ll stay in the past. You all must continue moving forward.
[Jagienka]: Why?! Why would you go to a place like that?!
[Jagienka]: I\'ve been wrong about you from the very beginning! You\'ll never be Carthakian!

Title: Affection - Nirvatia: Dirge - Part → Nirvatia: Dirge - Part IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The streets have yet to fully awake when the first light of dawn breaks through. There is still an hour until your second meeting with Dr. Witte.
You check your terminal to confirm the meeting location Nirvatia arranged, completely unaware of the blue-purple hem of a dress silently approaching from behind. Suddenly, a cool sensation brushes against your neck.
Turning around, you find a woman with dark blue hair standing in the gentle sunlight, the corner of her lips curled into a smile, as if it wasn\'t her who just greeted you with her cold gauntlet.

Title: Affection - Nirvatia: Dirge - Part → Nirvatia: Dirge - Part V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The black-clad Construct leans casually against the interior side door, tilting her head with an enigmatic smile.
[Nirvatia]: Why the hesitation? Come on in!
[Nirvatia]: Yes.

Title: Affection - Nirvatia: Dirge - Part → Nirvatia: Dirge - Part V (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Under the cold, dim light of the testing ground, Nirvatia gently touches your cheek, her eyes crinkling slightly.
[Nirvatia]: I\'m fine, just a little tired. I\'m leaning on you for a quick "recharge."
The female Construct scans the room, her lips pressed together.

Title: Affection - Nirvatia: Dirge - Part → Nirvatia: Dirge - Part VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Sunlight pours through the floor-to-ceiling windows into the spacious, immaculate room, making the models, publications, and academic medals in the display cases gleam brilliantly.
On the wooden desk sits a cup of steaming green tea. The man behind the desk glances briefly at the mechanical raven perched nearby before shifting his attention back to his Science Council colleague.
[Professor Walden]: It\'s a new tea variety cultivated by a friend. Please, help yourself.

Title: Affection - Lucia: Inverse Crown → Lucia: Inverse Crown I (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The first thing she feels is a cold that cuts straight to the bone.
It\'s night in the valley. Every breath turns into mist in front of her.
Then her vision blurs.

Title: Affection - Lucia: Inverse Crown → Lucia: Inverse Crown II (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The first thing you feel is a bone-chilling cold.
Then comes the howling wind, and the constant patter of tiny hard particles hitting your gear.
Your consciousness claws its way back from a blank void.

Title: Affection - Lucia: Inverse Crown → Lucia: Inverse Crown III (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Realizing he\'s been recognized, Hiro\'s gaze flicks between the two of you.
He looks at the uniform under your fur coat first, then his gaze snaps to Alpha.
His brow tightens. Shock and uncertainty mix on his face. He studies Alpha\'s features, then speaks, hesitant.

Title: Affection - Lucia: Inverse Crown → Lucia: Inverse Crown IV (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Still weightless, neon lights streak across your vision. You drop into a forest of steel.
Below you is a busy district. Traffic streams along elevated ring roads. Skyscrapers reflect bright ads and flashing signs. The city feels cold and heavy, but it\'s dazzling too.
Your hand snaps to your waist, reaching for the grappling hook.

Title: Affection - Lucia: Inverse Crown → Lucia: Inverse Crown V (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You slowly wake up. When you open your eyes, you\'re met with Alpha\'s face just inches away.
A few strands of white hair fall from behind her ear and partly cover her eyes. The hair brushes your cheek, causing a slight tickle.
She seems distracted and doesn\'t notice right away that you\'re awake.

Title: Affection - Lucia: Inverse Crown → Lucia: Inverse Crown VI (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The moment you pass through the rift, the blur of light and shadow rapidly solidifies into a clear scene.
The air smells like soil and flowers. Sunlight filters through the leaves and lands on a small forest path. The warmth puts a soft golden edge on everything.
Alpha knows this place. She\'s run through these woods countless times, laughing. She\'s listened to cicadas singing in the trees. She\'s chased the path of butterflies in the air.

Title: Affection - Lucia: Inverse Crown → Lucia: Inverse Crown VII (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Alpha rides the motorcycle toward the massive structure, with you behind her. The warm house fades into the dusk behind you.
After you travel for a while and leave the neighborhood behind, the surroundings grow quiet again.
[Alpha]: These illusions... some of them really do come from inside me.

Title: Affection - Lucia: Inverse Crown → Lucia: Inverse Crown VII (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Shadow]: —!
[Alpha]: —!
White light.

The same idea may not be entirely impossible for another Ascendant to...

...Your previous encounter with Alpha\'s transformation.

Title: Extra Story - Event (CS) → CS002 - Stage 12 (Before Battle)

The speaker remains facing away, with wind and snow whipping between them like a wall.
[Aleksei]: …咳，人类仍在断断续续地制造混乱，一如往常。
There\'s an almost imperceptible complexity in his tone now, making him seem like a different person from when he entered the city not long ago.

Title: Extra Story - Event (CS) → CS002 - Stage 16 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The memories of fighting beside Selena feel close yet worlds away. They are shattered chips sliced by distorted time, interweaving and rising in your mind.
第一段（即前面的赛琳娜）仅测试【剧情回顾309】。
第二段（即接下来的露西亚）测试【剧情回顾309】带语音+【普通对话301】不自动进剧情回顾。
