Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (DW) → DW001 - Stage 1 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The decks of the Nighter—a floating stronghold tasked with perimeter and maritime defense—is littered with the dead and dying, consequences of a costly battle against the Ascendant earlier in the day.
Apart from the Nighter crew, there are also members of the Forsaken and the ACA, who have stayed to bolster the defense.
Striding past them, Pulao can manage nothing more than nods of appreciation—she had more pressing matters to attend to.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (DW) → DW001 - Stage 1 (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Corrupted]: —! —!
[Forsaken Soldier]: Watanabe-San! The remaining Corrupted have been disposed of!
Watanabe gives a nod and looks at the Akdilek entourage. Smiling, Jamilah waves back at him.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (DW) → DW001 - Stage 2 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
— an unusual gathering of Corrupted near the Forsaken HQ "coincides" with Gray Raven\'s investigation.
[Corrupted]: —! —!
[Watanabe]: Hey, Commandant! Watch your back!

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (DW) → DW001 - Stage 3 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Watanabe]: Hey, Akdelik kid, come here.
[Changyu]: What\'s going on?
One of the containers on your truck is open, and there\'s clearly something missing.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (DW) → DW001 - Stage 3 (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Are the leaves we\'ve gathered here enough, Watanabe-San?
[Watanabe]: That\'s enough. Thanks are in order, whichever way you slice it.
Leaves gathered, Watanabe and the group prepare to return to the Forsaken HQ when a Forsaken soldier sprints hurriedly up to them.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (DW) → DW001 - Stage 4 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
— all members of the Forsaken retreat successfully, and Watanabe tallies up their losses in supplies and personnel.
[Watanabe]: We\'re missing someone...
[Forsaken Soldier]: Report! I believe he\'s... still at the original HQ.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (DW) → DW001 - Stage 5 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
— Gray Raven and Changyu follow in Watanabe\'s footsteps to the Forsaken HQ, only to find the grounds crawling with the Corrupted.
[Corrupted]: ...
[Changyu]: What\'s that Corrupted doing there?

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (DW) → DW001 - Stage 5 (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Special Corrupted]: H...home...I\'m going h-...
[Lucia]: Despite its peculiar behavior, its combat capabilities seem to be in line with other Corrupted forms we\'ve encountered.
Changyu walks up to next to the Special Corrupted form and picks up one of Zongs, whispering in a voice so low that no one else could hear.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (DW) → DW001 - Stage 6 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Forsaken Soldier]: Hey! Watanabe-San is back!
[Zong]: I\'m back, too! And the food!
Cheers erupt among the Forsaken as they help Zong unload the food and settle into the wrapping process.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (DW) → DW001 - Stage 7 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Celica]: Good morning, Commandant.
[Celica]: Whoa! Those are quite the striking pair of panda eyes! Are you... alright?
[Celica]: Zongs? Oh yes, Duanwu festival is coming up. Did you make these yourself, Commandant? They look pretty tasty.

Title: Event Story - Event (HD001) → Stage 1 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: Welcome back, Commandant. I, great Lucia, have been waiting for you for ages!
[Sophia]: And I, Lee, have been doing the same.
[Ayla]: Should I talk like that too? Okay, here goes. I, Ayl... No, I, Liv, have also been waiting for you.

Title: Event Story - Event (HD001) → Stage 2 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You have not been back here for a while. You were fully expecting to be forgotten, but a surging familiarity surrounds you the moment you step inside the lounge.
The only thing that has changed is the sprouting cultivar plant at the center of the desk. Touching the pot, you reckon someone has been watering it regularly based on the moisture level and the weight of the soil.
"Thud!" You hear a container falling behind you, and a familiar voice follows.

Title: Event Story - Event (HD006) → Stage 9 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Archive Terminal]: School Archive — 17513-2/10
[Old Man]: ...Finally, everyone has left.
[Service Mechanoid]: Your vital signs indicate that you are exhausted. Would you like a warm glass of red wine?

Title: Event Story - Event (HD008) → Stage 1 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Karenina]: —Haha! How about this?
[Nanami]: —Perfect! Another one! And... with these!
[Karenina]: —No problem! I get it! Let\'s give them a loud one!

Title: Event Story - Event (HD008) → Stage 2 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After returning from the mission with the CUB, the Gray Ravens have all completed their situation reports.
[Lee]: —And that\'s the end of our reports. Commandant, are we dismissed?
[Lucia]: Now that this is done, we should return to help with Asimov\'s project.

Title: Event Story - Event (HD008) → Stage 3 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The sound of children laughing and running can be heard in the freshly renovated abandoned mall.
[Deckard]: ...Gotcha!
[Ann]: Hold it, let me put this one!

Title: Event Story - Event (HD008) → Stage 4 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: Is this some kind of a joke?!
A loud noise comes out of the laboratory, something other than an explosion, for once. It startles Ayla, who is returning to get more couplets.
[Ayla]: W-what\'s happening?

Title: Event Story - Event (HD008) → Stage 5 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Ayla]: Ah... here it is.
[Ayla]: ...No one\'s here, it seems. I can probably just... put this here...
Ayla moves lightly, placing the fortune bag with the couplets on the table.

Title: Event Story - Event (HD008) → Stage 6 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The chime of notification suddenly rings inside Strike Hawk\'s lounge.
>>>>Mission notification delivered.
>>>>Construct: Wanshi. Mission selected.

Title: Event Story - Event (HD014) → Stage 1 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Cinematic / Action cutscene (no dialogue text).

Title: Event Story - Event (HD017) → Stage 0 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
>>>Trailblazer Log, Entry Number 7744. New mission accepted...
...Activating Body Probing Arm. Scanning Section One... Unconfirmed. Scanning Section Two...
Scanning Section 78. Connecting Arm. Restoring Power.

Title: Event Story - Event (HD017) → Stage 1 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Cinematic / Action cutscene (no dialogue text).

Title: Event Story - Event (HD017) → Stage 2 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Cinematic / Action cutscene (no dialogue text).

Title: Event Story - Event (HD020) → Stage 1 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[No. 21]: Right at that moment, the pup noticed a spaceship next to the swamp. She clambered into the ship and pressed some buttons.
[No. 21]: The green button cured her wounds. The blue button gave her new powers...
[Noctis]: Wait, wait, wait. A spaceship? Do you even know where this is going...

Title: Event Story - Event (HD022) → Stage 3 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
By the time the Cerberus members push the car to a place that "looks like" a mechanic\'s shop, the sun is already setting behind the distant hills.
A cracked, lopsided billboard stands outside a scruffy plywood shed under the dusk sky. Crooked letters in white are painted across the sign—"Motors & Supper".
Pieces of torn fabric are tied above the board and the shed, attracting "customers" as they wave in the dusty wind.

Title: Event Story - Event (HD022) → Stage 3 (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Although the three Cerberus members have fought together before occasionally, their fights have never felt as good as this time—
At least, not for Vera.
[Noctis]: Have we not fought together like this enough in the past?

Title: Event Story - Event (HD022) → Stage 6 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
With a puff of smoke, a fleet of gaudy "vehicles" stops before Cerberus.
The truth is Vera cannot really decide if these are "vehicles" at all. Some of them look like fortresses, some bald sea urchins, and some watermelons with toothpicks all over them.
The only thing they have in common is they all have wheels.

Title: Event Story - Event (HD022) → Stage 6 (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The explosions and lightning finally quiet down, replaced by flames flickering on the field.
[Owner]: S-stay... stay away!
Standing on top of a sea of scrapped parts, the Cerberus members look like they are the actual bandits of this land.

Title: Event Story - Event (HD032) → Stage 1 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bridget]: Phew. It\'s time.
Bridget claps her hands to draw everyone\'s attention.
[Bridget]: We still have a few minutes. Take this time to do one final check of your load.

Title: Event Story - Event (HD042) → Stage 6 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
It is an ordinary afternoon of an ordinary vacation where ordinary work is being handled.
Everything flows along at its usual pace until a flash of crimson yanks open the door to the Gray Raven lounge.
[Vera]: Tch, aren\'t you looking swell?

Title: Event Story - Event (HD042) → Stage 7 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Vera]: Show me your arm. I\'ll give it a look.
After a quick examination, Vera\'s brows suddenly furrow.
[Vera]: How long has it been since you changed this dressing? Over three days, I bet.

Title: Event Story - Event (HD042) → Stage 8 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Seeing how Vera has made herself comfortable, you assume she intends to rest in the Gray Raven lounge for a while. You instinctively quiet down while working, and you even prepare an unused sleeping pod for her.
But upon activating the sleeping pod, you notice the Construct behind you has opened her eyes at some point, quietly watching you.
[Vera]: Your chair\'s uncomfortable, so I couldn\'t sleep. Get me a pillow next time.

Title: Event Story - Event (HD053) → Stage 1 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Hassen]: C-3057-74A, the classified file retrieved from Carthaki, has been decrypted.
[Hassen]: Its title is... "Additional Notes on the \'Consciousness Tide\' Theory and Construct M.I.N.D. Technology".
[Hassen]: After internal deliberation, Babylonia has designated this document as the "Phylotree Dossier".

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JD) → JD016 - Stage 1 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Something powerful suddenly hits you.
[Lee]: Be careful! This is data defense!
[Lee]: If I analyze the defense with my computing power...

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JD) → JD016 - Stage 2 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: I\'ve tracked down some traces that we should keep an eye out for, but I couldn\'t filter for specific ones because there are too many signals in this area...
[Lee]: ...Yes.
[Lee]: Not without risk, though. I can use my computing power to do a brute-force filtering of all the signal sources, but I can\'t guarantee that I\'ll be able to filter out all the other interfering signals.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JD) → JD016 - Stage 3 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Hm...
[Lee]: Tch... Seems like they were prepared for a brute-force filtering.
[Liv]: All the tracks in this area... are legitimate. They all spread out in different directions while still being connected to each other...

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JD) → JD016 - Stage 4 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Following the route Liv has mapped out, you run into a distorted Program Ghost.
[Liv]: How come... But the signal characteristics on it are definitely identical to "Bianca"...
[Lee]: They\'re probably left behind by the springboard.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JD) → JD016 - Stage 5 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Following the route shown in the data, you arrive at a ruin with fragments of Program Ghosts all over the place.
[Liv]: What... what happened...
Broken remains and fragments of Program Ghosts can be seen everywhere near you.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JD) → JD016 - Stage 6 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The Program Ghost twitches. "Bianca" stands in front of it, slowly disappearing.
[Lucia]: You\'re not getting away this time!
[Lee]: ...Liv, initiate signal jamming!

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JD) → JD016 - Stage 7 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Countless Program Ghosts stand in the path leading to "Bianca".
[Lee]: Every single one of these Program Ghosts bears a clear mark pointing to a direction... Tch, not even trying to be discreet anymore, uh?
[Lucia]: Not that she could have, anyway, with so many of them standing out here. We need to get rid of these Program Ghosts to move ahead, though.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JD) → JD016 - Stage 8 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You pass through the cluster of Program Ghosts and keeps walking, until an armored protection layer stops you in your tracks.
A highly complicated data blockade stands in front of a closed space.
Given the complexity of the blockade, it will probably take you quite some time to deactivate it.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JD) → JD016 - Stage 9 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You see supplementary data blocks here and there in this area. After walking for some time, you see another data blockade standing in your way.
[Lee]: ...?
[Lucia]: ...So this space was intentionally separated as a storage space for all the supplementary data blocks?

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JD) → JD016 - Stage 10 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A group of disorderly Program Ghosts are attacking one another, blocking your way.
[Lee]: The Program Ghosts that fought us before are killing one another now...
[Lucia]: We can\'t move forth with them blocking our way, and we\'ve still got more Program Ghosts behind us...

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JD) → JD016 - Stage 11 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: We\'ve got company behind us!
[Lee]: So this is what she\'s decided to do because she couldn\'t stop us with the Program Ghosts?
[Lucia]: We need to force our way through quickly!

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JD) → JD016 - Stage 12 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The invaders seem to have detected the defeat of "Bianca", and they are personally directing the Program Ghosts to capture the Gray Raven.
On Liv\'s suggestion, the four of you decide to travel through the secondary channel for emergency data transmission.
When there is no emergency, the channel remains locked with an emergency protocol.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JD) → JD016 - Stage 13 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[System Notice]: Security Line Code E-02-00436, Security Lock L2...2...2...（HN（）PT_（^T VVO BI*TY}_{""&^
The security key is showing some bizarre codes.
[Lee]: Did they... hijack the security lock, too?

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JD) → JD016 - Stage 14 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: We\'re at the end of the channel. The bridge... is up ahead.
[Lee]: I bet this is what screwed up the security lock.
[System Notice]: "Security Line Code E-02-00＊（＆Ｔ＿（Ｈ＿（ＰＩＵＧ436, Security Lock L３……３……３……(HN()PT_(^T VVO（＆＊Ｂ＊＆＾ＲＦ＊） BI*TY}_{""&^ "

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JD) → JD016 - Stage 15 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You all dash into the bridge, only to find no enemy to fight.
But the four of you seem to start losing your perception ability...
[Lee]: Area scan... Argh! It\'s the interfering nodes! If we let them stay where they are, they\'re going to keep affecting our perception ability!

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JD) → JD016 - Stage 16 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You take a slightly longer path to avoid enemies.
But the four of you seem to start losing your perception ability...
[Lee]: Area scan... Argh! The interfering nodes!

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JD) → JD016 - Stage 21 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You are now entering an abandoned residential area...
Projections and the Corrupted coexist and roam the area.
[Lee]: It\'d be great to be able to collect more data, but a record this huge and complicated is going to take us quite some time to look into.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JD) → JD016 - Stage 22 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Before we start looking for clues, let\'s turn this report in...
Liv has compiled a brief document on the previous team\'s fatalities.
[Lee]: The signal is still unstable. We\'ll reconnect and try again.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JD) → JD016 - Stage 23 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
With one of the cards, you open the door to the hotel\'s corridor outside, where the floor is shaky and littered with fallen objects.
[Lucia]: Be careful. The Red Tide is just right under.
[Liv]: Most of the doors are blocked by objects that have fallen. It\'d take us forever to remove them.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JD) → JD016 - Stage 24 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You board a reinforced defense ship and leaves the Red Tide with the Support Force\'s help.
Everyone wears protective gear and the ship itself has been reinforced, but the highly concentrated Punishing Virus still finds its way in and causes symptoms of infection in everyone.
After receiving first-aid, you all look over the abandoned area.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JD) → JD016 - Stage 25 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You have traveled for a while without running into any surprises while having also gathered quite a bit of data.
[Liv]: Alright, I\'ve laid out all the known information on the Ascendants and Huaxu. I can use this database to screen for useful intel.
[Lucia]: It looks like a daunting task. Let\'s do it!

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JD) → JD016 - Stage 26 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You have traveled for a while without running into any surprises while having also gathered quite a bit of data.
[Liv]: Alright, I\'ve laid out all the known information on the Ascendants and Huaxu. I can use this database to screen for useful intel.
[Lucia]: It looks like a daunting task. Let\'s do it!

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JD) → JD016 - Stage 27 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You arrive at another fork...
[Liv]: It\'s your call again, Commandant.
[Liv]: Where did the young boy go?

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JD) → JD016 - Stage 28 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Following the path, you see the projection of a female scavenger sitting beside a bonfire.
[Liv]: Oh, she\'s the same scavenger we saw back there just a while ago. Seems like she\'s been here for quite some time now.
When Liv walks up to her, she saw the woman staring at a faded photo.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JD) → JD016 - Stage 29 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You follow the path the boy has taken, eventually crossing the vast but monotonous zone.
Roads narrow as you travel further. It is hard to imagine that humans worked at a place so confined during the Golden Age.
[Liv]: We haven\'t come across any clues, but I\'m seeing a lot of supply boxes ahead. I wonder if they hold anything useful?

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JD) → JD016 - Stage 30 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A ruin stops you in your tracks. You will need to climb over this hill of debris to move forth. Then, the projection of someone familiar flashes past you.
[Liv]: I think I\'ve just seen Angel\'s projection. Can we look for it, Commandant?
[Liv]: Uhm... I just want to know where she went.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JD) → JD016 - Stage 31 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You plan a route from Angel\'s clues and enter a chemical plant under lockdown.
[Liv]: This chemical plant is huge, but there isn\'t a path we can go through.
[Lucia]: Probably not a good idea to climb over the fence with all the contaminated wastes around.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JD) → JD016 - Stage 32 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Countless supply boxes are standing in the way...
[Lee]: Why are there so many supply boxes here?
[Liv]: Most of them are empty but very heavy...

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JD) → JD016 - Stage 33 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A chasm breaks the ground apart, the Red Tide swirling in it. It can devour you the moment you step into it.
[Liv]: The Red Tide has a high level of concentration of the Punishing Virus around it. We need to figure out a way to get past it quickly!
[Lucia]: I\'ll try to find some planks.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JD) → JD016 - Stage 34 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You are now approaching the chemical plant\'s exit. Lucia is looking around and seems absent-minded.
[Lucia]: I\'m sorry. This place seems very familiar, but I just don\'t remember it.
[Lucia]: It\'s my personal issue. I can\'t make the rest of the team do this.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JD) → JD016 - Stage 35 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: Look, something is written on the wall.
Following where Liv is pointing at, you find a neatly written slogan on the wall of an abandoned building.
"Earth has been stricken with innumerable disasters, and time has washed every one of them away. Live for tomorrow, because all will pass."

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JD) → JD016 - Stage 41 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Now ready, you enter the underground tunnel. Lucia walks in the forefront, her katana in hand, with Liv by your side monitoring the concentration of the Punishing Virus in the area ahead.
Your footsteps echo down the tunnel, your searchlights the only source of light in sight.
[Liv]: It looks like an ordinary entrance to a bomb shelter, but...

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JD) → JD016 - Stage 42 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: The connecting bridge ahead is the only route connecting this sector to the next.
[Lee]: The Core Area is on the other side of the bridge. It\'s highly likely that Huaxu is stored there.
[Liv]: But the blockade... Seems like the front end of the bridge is blocked.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JD) → JD016 - Stage 61 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Lucia begins to dive from the divergence point of the Deep M.I.N.D. she shares with Alpha.
Because of the constraints of the connecting bridge, everything she does here will affect Alpha.
[Lucia]: I don\'t remember ever seeing this area. It seems like this is where my memory data has been sealed.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JD) → JD016 - Stage 62 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Alpha stands just a few meters away, seemingly having been waiting for quite some time now.
[α]: How does that memory make you feel?
[Lucia]: ...

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JD) → JD016 - Stage 63 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Deep M.I.N.D. is now shaking violently because of the red light pillars.
As the red dots of light diffuse, noises echo through Lucia\'s M.I.N.D. Her heartwarming memories have now turned into despair magnified.
[Luna?]: ...Please stay here, Lucia.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JD) → JD016 - Stage 63 (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Lucia\'s M.I.N.D. is now shaking violently, killing the lights in her surroundings. The Mind Beacon in the distance seems to have grown dimmer, too.
[Lucia]: Something might have happened to Commandant out there. I need to go now. There\'s still time to stop my M.I.N.D. from being devoured!
The pitch darkness does not stop Lucia.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JD) → JD016 - Stage 63 (Part C)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Lucia\'s M.I.N.D. is shaking violently once again, killing the lights in her surroundings. The Mind Beacon in the distance seems to have grown dimmer, too.
[Lucia]: It\'s happening again... I need to leave now. I can still stop the merge!
The pitch darkness returns, but it does not stop Lucia.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JD) → JD016 - Stage 64 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: So that\'s the Polyphage... It\'s way too big!
[Lee]: I say we move forward stealthily if possible...
The Polyphage seems to have been expecting your arrival. It sends a powerful shock wave your way with an incredible roar.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JD) → JD016 - Stage 65 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: We\'ve got company from behind... There\'s no going back!
[Lee]: Don\'t worry. We never planned to go back anyways.
[Lucia]: We need to force our way through before they have us totally cornered.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JD) → JD016 - Stage 66 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The Polyphage is now trying as hard as it can to shake the Gray Raven off its body.
[Lucia]: Commandant, hold on to something!
You thrust your knife into the Polyphage\'s body and hold on to it.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JD) → JD016 - Stage 67 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
A vibration stronger than before reaches you. A shadow now looms above your head.
[Lucia]: Commandant, up there!
The Polyphage raises its right hand, slamming it down fast to where you are.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JS) → JS001 - Stage 6 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Watanabe]: (Clank!)
[Watanabe]: (Clash!)
[Watanabe]: Ah, Babylonian. You\'re early.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JS) → JS001 - Stage 7 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Watanabe]: Tch... I remember putting it here.
[Watanabe]: Where did it go... This is bad...
[Watanabe]: Oh, here you are, Gray Raven Commandant.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JS) → JS001 - Stage 8 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Watanabe]: How are you doing, Commandant?
[Watanabe]: I was. And our partnership went very smoothly.
[Watanabe]: Which is why I think I should return something to you.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JS) → JS002 - Stage 6 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Alpha]: This should be the right channel... I see it\'s connected. We meet again.
[Alpha]: I have my ways. If you don\'t want me to call you, you should find a way yourself instead of asking me.
[Alpha]: We have a tentative understanding of each other. Meetings like this will only be rarer in the future.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JS) → JS002 - Stage 7 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Alpha]: You\'ll never keep up with a Construct, no matter how much you practice.
[Alpha]: I don\'t have the time for that. I just happened to see you practice swordplay secretly on your own that one time.
[Alpha]: It took me one look to know whether it was spur-of-the-moment or a lifelong dedication.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JS) → JS002 - Stage 8 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Alpha]: ...
[Alpha]: Your attitudes have changed.
[Alpha]: Have you found a way to defeat me, or have you gotten used to this?

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JS) → JS003 - Stage 6 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: Commandant! H-E-L-L-O!
[Nanami]: Is that strange, Commandant?
[Nanami]: Oh! So you sent me to the Science Council to wait for you on purpose, Commandant!

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JS) → JS003 - Stage 7 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: Nanami has a question for you, Commandant.
[Nanami]: No! It\'s a serious question! Why would you think that Nanami is only interested in brain teasers...
[Nanami]: What I want to ask is—do you find any part of Nanami strange, Commandant?

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JS) → JS003 - Stage 8 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Nanami]: Hello, Commandant! Have you been playing any good games recently?
[Nanami]: That\'s true!
[Nanami]: Hm... That\'s not necessary. Nanami has completed every game WGAA\'s Archaeological Team recovered!

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JS) → JS004 - Stage 6 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Karenina]: Here we go... and here... Alright, think we can call it a day here.
[Karenina]: We\'re done for the day. We can start with paving tomorrow, and hopefully we\'ll be done with reconstructing the area by the end of this month.
[Karenina]: Nah. We\'re glad to have you here to help when you\'re supposed to be off duty.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JS) → JS004 - Stage 7 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Karenina]: And that... is all I had to do for this ground mission.
[Karenina]: Phew... Done, at long last!
[Karenina]: Excited there, huh? Say, want to hit that place we went to last time before the transport craft gets here?

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JS) → JS004 - Stage 8 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Karenina]: Hey, there you are, Commandant.
[Karenina]: Don\'t get me wrong, though. I\'m just returning a favor.
[Karenina]: And this cassette is such a gem, so you probably don\'t want it to just sit in your room collecting dust.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JS) → JS005 - Stage 6 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
When you burst into the library where Noan is, the Babylonia sky has already transitioned into the hues of night.
You got caught red-handed by Celica while you were negotiating with a merchant on the roadside because your year-end summary report was late for three whole days.
[Noan]: Sure.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JS) → JS005 - Stage 7 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Noan has always been a trusted confidant.
As you grow closer, you would occasionally toss him some abstract questions during your strolls.
[Noan]: Why?

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (JS) → JS005 - Stage 8 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
After getting to know Noan for a bit, he always swings by whenever you fall ill or get hurt.
While he\'s not exactly a medic outside of emergencies, having someone to chat with during recovery is a real comfort.
[Noan]: Feeling any better today?

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (KD) → KD001 - Stage 2 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Celica]: Sir, the Gray Raven Commandant has arrived.
Inside the large laboratory, only Asimov is there debugging various machines.
[Asimov]: The others have gone to bed since they\'ve been working all night.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (MC) → MC000 - Stage 0 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent: Cinematic / Action cutscene (no dialogue text).

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (RG) → RG007 - Stage 4 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
In darkness and silence, you return once more to the familiar quantum sea, immersed in a peaceful yet somber dream.
Surging memories rush in to wake you... You hear static as the past and present merge into one.
In the endless cycles, what possibility are you searching for?

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (RG) → RG007 - Stage 8 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Higher Authority]: This entire realm is generated by Gestalt\'s computing power—it\'s an experiment designed to confirm the awakening of mechanical consciousness.
[Higher Authority]: During the experiment, the Punishing Virus infected the main host at the ■■■ lab, which led to...
[Higher Authority]: This is exactly what I told that kid—she didn\'t ask a single question and just believed me.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (RG) → RG007 - Stage 9 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The battle ends. The defeated Higher Authority sits alone at the edge of the battlefield, her loneliness unmistakable.
Jetavie steps behind Higher Authority and quietly puts her weapon away.
[Higher Authority]: That heavy weapon really suits you, Jetavie.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (TJ) → TJ001 - Stage 1 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[α]: I didn\'t think you\'re the type to like to collect weapons like katanas.
[α]: The cracking sound when they\'re wielded and the metallic roar of when attacking with them are so pleasing to the ear. It\'s something that other types of weapons can never do.
[α]: Uh-huh. By the look on your face you should learn this feeling from experience.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (TJ) → TJ002 - Stage 1 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: It\'s all done now. Thank you, Commandant, for sorting out these Levi-Guns with me.
[Liv]: Oh, leave little things like these to Liv. Go rest, Commandant.
[Liv]: Collecting them is hard enough after all. The rest is my job, and I shouldn\'t trouble Commandant.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (TJ) → TJ003 - Stage 1 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: Load, aim, fire. Guns have always been this simple and practical.
[Lee]: The guns you have on display makes me think you feel the same way too.
[Lee]: ...Thanks for your hard work. If you have any problems with guns, you can come to me to have them fixed anytime.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (TJ) → TJ004 - Stage 1 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bianca]: It\'s surprising that Commandant has collected so many bows.
[Bianca]: No, it\'s nothing. I just didn\'t expect that you would be interested in bowmanship too, Commandant.
[Bianca]: I can practice with you after work, if you don\'t mind.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (TJ) → TJ005 - Stage 1 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: Careful. Are you alright, Commandant?
[Kamui]: It\'s a rare to see so many greatswords together at once, so I accidentally picked them up one by one and tried them up after coming to you.
[Kamui]: Ah, I almost forgot. This is the item the leader asked me to hand to you...

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (TJ) → TJ006 - Stage 1 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Buzz— (Saw roaring)
BOOM BOOM BOOM—
[Nanami]: Found you! It\'s fun to play hide-and-seek with you, Commandant.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (TJ) → TJ007 - Stage 1 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Karenina]: So many rockets in one place... You\'re really something.
[Karenina]: Come on, let\'s move them out together and test if the firepower decreased!
[Karenina]: It\'s just an explosion site. I\'m not excited!

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (TJ) → TJ008 - Stage 1 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Watanabe]: Hardness... Good. Durability test... Pass. Heat resistance test... Pass. Done. Testing complete for this dagger.
[Watanabe]: Here you are! Seeing as you\'ve collected so many daggers, it must be tough to maintain them.
[Watanabe]: So, I helped you with maintenance on them before you came back. You\'re welcome.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (TJ) → TJ009 - Stage 1 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Ayla]: Commandant, Commandant! Do you also like weapons like scythes?
[Ayla]: No less from the person Ayla has her eye on.
[Ayla]: Oh yes, do you have some time later, Commandant? Let Ayla draw the cool moments when you swing the scythe!

Title: Floating Record - YC016 → Stage 1 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: This data is...?
Lee waves his hand and turns off the holo-screen display.
[Lee]: This is the data left by the Construct that defected from Babylonia. I\'ll give it to Bianca when I return.

Title: Floating Record - YC016 → Stage 2 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Hola, amigo.
If someone tells you to make a wish...
What would you ask for?

Title: Extra Story - Event (YR) → YR018 - Stage 1 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Engineer]: Good morning.
[Engineer]: Routine testing of the Mind Beacon commencing.
Whirr—a blue light sweeps across the head of the white-haired girl.

Title: Extra Story - Event (YR) → YR018 - Stage 2 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The wasteland is as silent as always.
It does not question, nor does it answer. It does not think and is never confused.
Above the wasteland is an ever-changing landscape, but the wasteland itself never changes.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (YS) → YS011 - Stage 1 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[System]: Confidentiality Level: A+, Urgency: S, Hazard Index: A+, Authentication: Gray Raven. Mission details uploaded. Implementing the permission request...
[Lucia]: ...
[Lucia]: Commandant, a new request for combat has come in from Babylonia.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (YS) → YS011 - Stage 1 (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: This should be the target of our mission, the ground tactical terminal.
[Lee]: Well, judging by the appearance, the tactical terminal is not damaged. Seems that the Ascendants haven\'t found it yet.
[Lucia]: Let\'s test and recycle the data, Lee.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (YS) → YS011 - Stage 2 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: Hah, here I am!
[Lee]: What\'s this guy doing here?
[Kamui]: I heard you\'re having fun in combat. Of course I wanna be a part of it!

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (YS) → YS011 - Stage 2 (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Kamui]: Well, that was sure was an easy battle!
[Kamui]: Commandant, all of the surrounding Corrupted have been destroyed.
[Lee]: Yes, I\'ll update you while I boot up the tactical terminal in question.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (YS) → YS013 - Stage 1 (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: Number of newly added responses: 4. Overall assessment of battle time and power: B+.
[Lucia]: Unable to confirm. Liv, is there anything unusual on the radar?
[Liv]: Not that I know of. No ascendant reaction detected...

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (YS) → YS014 - Stage 1 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Liv]: ...
[Lucia]: Did you detect the enemy attack?
[Liv]: No... no new Corrupted activity detected.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (YS) → YS014 - Stage 1 (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: No abnormalities in all areas. All Corrupted cleared.
[Lee]: The tactical terminal has been found, but there were no clues about the sound of singing. Could it be that Liv heard it wrong?
[Liv]: ...

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (YS) → YS015 - Stage 1 (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: Are you ready, Lucia?
[Lucia]: Ready. Lee, activate the tactical terminal.
[Lee]: Understood.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (YS) → YS016 - Stage 1 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bianca]: Hello, Gray Raven Commandant.
[Bianca]: Given it\'s an important mission, I was ordered to offer my support to the Gray Raven.
[Lucia]: Thank you, I\'m sure it\'ll go well.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (YS) → YS016 - Stage 1 (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Bianca]: Please don\'t stand on my ray, I won\'t be responsible for any accidental injuries.
[Watanabe]: This is the battlefield. I won\'t be hiding behind my teammates like the Purifying Force.
—!

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (YS) → YS017 - Stage 1 (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Heisen]: Phew, is it time for research?
[Lucia]: Hi, lady.
[Heisen]: Hi, who are you?

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (YS) → YS018 - Stage 1 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[???]: Lucia!
[Lucia]: Welcome, Karenina.
[Lucia]: No armed fighting in the office area of the base. Please drop your weapons.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (YS) → YS018 - Stage 1 (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: The target\'s memory data is located at the seventh end, named Shakespeare.
[Lee]: I analyzed the relevant information on the way. The memory doesn\'t seem to have much to do with the Moe Army.
[Shakespeare]: O visitors from afar against all odds, what are you here for?

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (YS) → YS019 - Stage 1 (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: Based on the coordinate information obtained, this should where the ninth original memory data is located.
[Lucia]: ...
[Lucia]: Nothing, Commandant. I was just thinking that the battle was coming to an end.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (YS) → YS021 - Stage 1 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: ...
[Liv]: Lucia, what are you looking at?
[Lucia]: The last copy of the information for the original memory data.

Title: Extra Story - Extra Chapter (YS) → YS021 - Stage 1 (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lee]: The tactical terminal has been activated.
...
[Liv]: There was a 0.03-second flicker just above the terminal, but it disappeared immediately...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 07 Inver-Collapse → ZX07 - Stage 8 (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The chaotic barrage of cannon fire finally comes to a halt, and Karenina\'s frame softly collapses on her weapon. Her fingertips still twirling with a halo of energy in pale violet.
[Liv]: Commandant, Karenina\'s M.I.N.D. will need to be manually rebooted.
[Bianca]: Wait, if we don\'t solve her issue before rebooting, it\'ll all just be the same as before.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 12 Kowloong Metropolis → ZX12 - Stage 25 (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Accessing memory data. Reloading Lucia\'s memory data...
[Lucia]: I\'m...
[Lucia]: ID BPL-01. Member of Babylonia\'s task force. Military Construct. Gray Raven leader, my name is... Lucia.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 12 Kowloong Metropolis → ZX12 - Stage 26 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
—It\'s over.
You don\'t know which one of you said that first, but it\'s over.
The whole city lies in shambles, with buildings wrecked and roads clustered with debris. To make matters worse, the spread of the Punishing Virus has sealed off even more of Kowloong.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 16 Evernight Beat → ZX16 - Stage 1 (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
From the moment of its inception, Babylonia has always followed the instruction entrusted to her by the scientists and maintained in low Earth orbit.
She was supposed to usher in a new era. Instead, she has become humanity\'s "Eden", a sanctuary from disaster. Like a lonely guardian, she watches over the fractured planet from orbit.
She has always been a reliable foundation... Until now.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 16 Evernight Beat → ZX16 - Stage 16 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
...Looks like we\'ve found a path with less Corrupted.
[Lucia]: It\'s safe here. Let\'s look for clues.
[Liv]: Alright, I\'ve laid out all the known information regarding Ascendants and Huaxu. I can use this database to screen for useful intel.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 16 Evernight Beat → ZX16 - Stage 16 (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
...Looks like we\'ve found a path with less Corrupted.
[Lucia]: Let\'s look for clues here.
You reconvene after investigating for quite some time.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 16 Evernight Beat → ZX16 - Stage 16 (Part C)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
...Looks like we\'ve found a path with less Corrupted.
[Lucia]: Let\'s look for clues here.
You reconvene after investigating for quite some time.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 16 Evernight Beat → ZX16 - Stage 16 (Part D)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Liv fires a beam of light with her Levi-Gun, and the last Corrupted standing in front of her falls to the ground.
[Liv]: My scans no longer detect any Corrupted in this area.
[Liv]: Alright, I\'ve laid out all the known information regarding Ascendants and Huaxu. I can use this database to screen for useful intel.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 16 Evernight Beat → ZX16 - Stage 16 (Part E)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
With a slash from Lucia, the last Corrupted in front of her falls as well.
[Lucia]: We\'ve cleared the area. It\'s now safe to search.
You reconvene after investigating for quite some time.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 16 Evernight Beat → ZX16 - Stage 16 (Part F)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The last infected body in front of you also falls under Lee\'s gun.
[Lee]: It\'s safe now. Let\'s look for clues.
You reconvene after investigating for quite some time.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 16 Evernight Beat → ZX16 - Stage 29 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
City 075, platform of the underground cavern.
Lee and Lucia are counting the remaining serum and ammo on the entry platform of the cavern. Liv is attempting to sync their intel with Babylonia. She looks unsure when she reopens her eyes after a while.
[Liv]: Communication... disconnected...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 16 Evernight Beat → ZX16 - Stage 37 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The ground begins to tremble after Huaxu enters the circular contraption, which appears to be a platform lift.
[Liv]: Is this one of Huaxu\'s traps?
[Lee]: No point trying to be safe in the enemy\'s den. If Huaxu wanted to harm us, it would\'ve been done already.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 16 Evernight Beat → ZX16 - Stage 48 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Following the tracks left behind by Lamia, the four of you soon reach a platform in an open area.
[Lee]: Is Lamia here?
[Liv]: Something isn\'t quite right...

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 16 Evernight Beat → ZX16 - Stage 58 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Ugh...!
[Ashen Hetero-Creature]: ...
The ashen creature\'s blade slits across Lucia\'s flank, forcing her to dash back with her jetpack, putting some distance between them.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 16 Evernight Beat → ZX16 - Stage 58 (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lucia]: Commandant... has rescued Luna from the Core?!
[Ashen Hetero-Creature]: —!
Noticing the source of its power removed, the ashen Hetero-Creature lets out a horrifying shriek, then rushes toward where Luna is—

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 16 Evernight Beat → ZX16 - Stage 58 (Part C)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You would not know how critical a decision you have made, as the pain from the Punishing Virus corruption forces you to dissociate, keeping you from thinking straight.
In your trance, you hear someone speaking to you.
[???]: Can you tell me what is the most crucial foundation of the Commandant-Construct maneuver?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 16 Evernight Beat → ZX16 - Stage 58 (Part D)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Luna]: ...
[Luna]: So this is how it is. I suppose you don\'t have a choice.
[Luna]: The way you see it, you might have made the right decision.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 22 Renaissance du Fantastique → ZX22 - Stage 13 (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Your consciousness drifts in hazy darkness as if dreaming an endless dream.
In the dream, there are many blurry figures and loud noises.
The singular blackness is replaced by the red of an unending flame.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 24 Chaos Unsnarled → ZX24 - Stage 1 (Part C)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
—The piper controls the evil dragon to sow death and despair.
—The champion shall conquer many great challenges and slay the evil dragon in a faraway land.
—With everyone watching, the champion defeats the evil piper, and the story comes to a happy ending.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 24 Chaos Unsnarled → ZX24 - Stage 1 (Part D)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
—The piper controls the evil dragon to sow death and despair.
—The champion shall conquer many great challenges and slay the evil dragon in a faraway land.
—With everyone watching, the champion defeats the evil piper, and the story comes to a happy ending.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 24 Chaos Unsnarled → ZX24 - Stage 1 (Part E)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
—The piper controls the evil dragon to sow death and despair.
—The champion shall conquer many great challenges and slay the evil dragon in a faraway land.
—With everyone watching, the champion defeats the evil piper, and the story comes to a happy ending.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 24 Chaos Unsnarled → ZX24 - Stage 2 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
...Ah.
Somebody help. Anybody...
First, it is the hearing.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 24 Chaos Unsnarled → ZX24 - Stage 2 (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
...Ah.
Somebody help. Anybody...
First, it is the hearing.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 24 Chaos Unsnarled → ZX24 - Stage 2 (Part C)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
...Ah.
Somebody help. Anybody...
First, it is the hearing.

SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
...Ah.
Somebody help. Anybody...
First, it is the hearing.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 24 Chaos Unsnarled → ZX24 - Stage 2 (Part E)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
...Ah.
Somebody help. Anybody...
First, it is the hearing.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 24 Chaos Unsnarled → ZX24 - Stage 3 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
As you approach the winding stream, the sounds of those critters in the forest are drowned. This river flows all the way into the ocean.
You awake from a forest hunter\'s dream, in which things shift from running wolves to glimmering wanderers. The salty ocean breeze blows and the sailboat has its flag lowered.
A few sailors move between the boat and the land to transport cargo. Their tanned skins and strong muscles are proof of the epic adventures they experienced at sea.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 24 Chaos Unsnarled → ZX24 - Stage 3 (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 24 Chaos Unsnarled → ZX24 - Stage 4 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You follow the sailor to a room on the boat.
From the angle of attack, you look at the lantern hanging above the stern. In the room next to the mast, there are oars as tall as men hung on the wall and numerous barrels placed on the floor.
When the last ray of sunlight disappears into the horizon, the captain gives his command as the helmsman steers the ship and sailors hoist the flag. The anchor has been pulled back on the deck.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 24 Chaos Unsnarled → ZX24 - Stage 4 (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
"She" waits patiently until the footsteps draw near. Then, she quietly lowers her branches, leaves, and flowers to guide the waiting people for the first time and for the last time.
The view at the beginning of this story is just as beautiful as the one at the end.
As the last ray of sunlight dims, the first star begins to shine. The universe spins, shedding beautiful light on this castle in the sky. It is as if time has stopped flowing. "She" looks at all the beauty for a very long time.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 24 Chaos Unsnarled → ZX24 - Stage 4 (Part C)
SummaryContent:

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 24 Chaos Unsnarled → ZX24 - Stage 5 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
You walk on the deck.
Surprisingly, there are many children on this ship.
Little people run around and chase each other. They are having fun, and the sailors don\'t scold them or stop them from playing. But when a child does run past an adult like the wind, the adult will grab the child by the shoulder and tell them to watch themselves.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 24 Chaos Unsnarled → ZX24 - Stage 5 (Part B)

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 24 Chaos Unsnarled → ZX24 - Stage 6 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The weather has been nice these past few days. Everything is calm and quiet on the sea.
All this time, you have been helping wherever you can on this boat, such as moving heavy objects, taking night shifts, or even tucking the children into bed.
When nightfall descends, the children are herded back to the boat room. These "champions" sheathe their long swords as they go to bed. As for the evil dragon, he also returns to his nest, but he refuses to fall asleep and asks for the adults to read him a nice bedtime story.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 24 Chaos Unsnarled → ZX24 - Stage 7 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Sailor]: Are they all asleep?
He seems relieved by this news as he turns his attention to something else.
The homesick tune has come to its end as if the muffled sound of a horn. It brightens up the mood and lifts the spirits of the night watchers.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 24 Chaos Unsnarled → ZX24 - Stage 7 (Part B)
SummaryContent:

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 24 Chaos Unsnarled → ZX24 - Stage 8 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Once we make it across this sea, we will arrive at our final destination.
[Sailor]: So long as the boat doesn\'t founder on a rock or hit a storm... or meet a dragon, we\'ll make it to the port in less than a day.
The tall, strong sailor stands on one side of the boat and looks into the distance.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 24 Chaos Unsnarled → ZX24 - Stage 8 (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Bit by bit, the raging storm and strong currents take parts of "her" away.
The tides carry parts of "her" into the distance, while some other parts of "her" are destroyed by the powerful wind.
The sea carries the boat with a hoisted flag. A part of "her" keeps sinking downwards to meet the wreckage of ancient ships, whose golden masts leans to one side. Countless treasures lay silent at the bottom of the sea.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 24 Chaos Unsnarled → ZX24 - Stage 8 (Part C)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Bit by bit, the raging storm and strong currents take parts of "her" away.
The tides carry parts of "her" into the distance, while some other parts of "her" are destroyed by the powerful wind.
The sea carries the boat with a hoisted flag. A part of "her" keeps sinking downwards to meet the wreckage of ancient ships, whose golden masts leans to one side. Countless treasures lay silent at the bottom of the sea.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 24 Chaos Unsnarled → ZX24 - Stage 9 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The ocean only takes a second to change to something completely different. Is the first sound lightning or a dragon roar?
We don\'t have time to think.
At first, it is a tornado above the ocean that comes from the south.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 24 Chaos Unsnarled → ZX24 - Stage 9 (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Sailor]: Are they all asleep?
He seems relieved by this news as he turns his attention to something else.
The homesick tune has come to its end as if the muffled sound of a horn. It brightens up the mood and lifts the spirits of the night watchers.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 24 Chaos Unsnarled → ZX24 - Stage 9 (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Why is the dragon above the sea?
Why isn\'t there the sound of the pipe? Is it drowned by the sound of waves?
There is no time to come up with answers.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 24 Chaos Unsnarled → ZX24 - Stage 10 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
No more ship wreckage, splintered wood, or any useful item is washed up to the shore.
You try to calculate how far you\'ve drifted and for how much time you have been drifting after you were carried away by the waves.
According to the information you have, after you lured away the evil dragon, the boat was unlikely to overturn. You can\'t seem to find any of the crew in the nearby area. Without a choice, you accept reality as it is and give up on the search for now.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 24 Chaos Unsnarled → ZX24 - Stage 10 (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Once we make it across this sea, we will arrive at our final destination.
[Sailor]: So long as the boat doesn\'t founder on a rock or hit a storm... or meet a dragon, we\'ll make it to the port in less than a day.
The tall, strong sailor stands on one side of the boat and looks into the distance.

It is less likely than running into a dragon on land, but it is still possible.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 24 Chaos Unsnarled → ZX24 - Stage 11 (Part C)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
As the sailor explains it, you imagine what must have happened back then.
The sailboat travels along the route as expected. It is a cold, humid night. The sea mist gets heavier as it becomes harder to see the looks on people\'s faces.
In the first two days after the ark sets sail, all the passengers on the boat try desperately to fit into the limited space.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 24 Chaos Unsnarled → ZX24 - Stage 11 (EB)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The raging sea is sending waves as high as the sky. Clothes are like serpents, tightly wrapped around human bodies. It feels like you are lifting weight as you can barely stand. Giant raindrops keep falling from the sky as if this is cruel torture. There is water in your eyes. Vision becomes blurred.
You grab onto whatever is nearby and slowly move closer to the mast. The captain\'s shouting is muffled and drowned by the wind. Ridiculous thoughts fill your mind.
Did a vengeful sorcerer summon this storm for revenge? Did a fairy cast a spell and cause this to find freedom?

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 24 Chaos Unsnarled → ZX24 - Stage 12 (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
"She" isn\'t the goddess to whom this eternal dirge created by the waves lapping the shore is dedicated.
"Her" ending is preordained. In countless cycles, she is always imprisoned on this lone island. The shackles are now part of her soul.
As the tides ebb and flow, and as lives blossom and wither, the forgotten things return to oblivion.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 24 Chaos Unsnarled → ZX24 - Stage 12 (Part C)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Sailor]: I sometimes wonder if the traveler truly existed.
The first time I noticed that traveler, it wasn\'t because of her stories but her singing voice.
[Sailor]: The siren\'s call.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 24 Chaos Unsnarled → ZX24 - Stage 12 (Part D)
SummaryContent:

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 24 Chaos Unsnarled → ZX24 - Stage 13 (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
It is not Prince Ferdinand stranded on a lone island. The ugly Caliban is nowhere to be found on the island. It is not Robinson drifting at sea. And the loyal, foolish Friday is not saved.
It always ends the same way. So, you stop wasting your time looking into the horizon and hoping for a rescue that will never come.
Weave a fishing net, catch fish, and live a life... The endless cycle of memories makes you a master of dealing with accidents and surviving the harsh environment.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 24 Chaos Unsnarled → ZX24 - Stage 14 (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The dragon takes you into the air.
In that epic story, did Siegfried, the real hero who slayed the dragon, once ride the dragon?
Your veins pulse and your heart pounds as you hold onto the dragon\'s claws as if holding onto dear life. Your palms are burning and your arms are aching. The howling wind is unforgiving. You can barely keep your eyes open.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 24 Chaos Unsnarled → ZX24 - Stage 15 (Part B)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
She has been through countless cycles, rewound the river of time, and drifted in a sea of mortal coils.
She has seen too many flattering smiles and crying faces. She has felt too many attitudes, passionate or indifferent.
She has walked into a magnificent palace and a beautiful garden and been to an artificial fountain that emits a delightful fragrance.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 24 Chaos Unsnarled → ZX24 - Stage 17 (Part D)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The witch doesn\'t always become friends with the princess in every story.
That is especially true at the beginning of a story, where the witch and the princess are still young.
The little witch wears a big cloak and a big hat. The adult witch tells her to always sneak around and never take off her hat or her cloak while she is in a great hall. She will have more respect from others if they mistake her for a midget or a dwarf.

Title: Main Story (Normal) - 24 Chaos Unsnarled → ZX24 - Stage 18 (Part D)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The princess\'s first wish is very simple.
The world portrayed in the illustration books and story books is very beautiful.
The world isn\'t a complex of palaces. Water isn\'t always gentle. The cycle of day and night exists even outside the little courtyard.

SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
"Facing the dragon, the champion remains steadfast. To protect their homeland, the champion raises their sword that represents justice and bravery."
Is she dreaming or awake?
Who is she?

Title: Floating Record - ZX044 → Stage 17 (After Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The girl\'s memories flash before your eyes—quick, but crystal clear.
As your mind settles, you see Luna sitting before you, her eyes bright.
[Luna]: I never expected you to go this far. Even knowing your friendly nature, I didn\'t think you\'d offer such thorough assistance.

Title: Floating Record - ZX916 → Stage 49 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lamia]: Stop it... I surrender...
Lamia barely resists, surrendering immediately after being discovered.
[Lee]: Are you... really an Ascendant?

Title: Floating Record - ZX916 → Stage 50 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
Only cracked and shattered rocks remain when you arrive at the epicenter.
[Liv]: There was a fight here.
[Lucia]: Only an Ascendant is capable of this level of destruction.

Title: Floating Record - ZX916 → Stage 52 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
The Polyphage\'s silhouette becomes more apparent the further you follow Lamia down underground. The closer you are, the more its colossal size becomes evident, as well as the malevolence that seeps in.
Eventually, there is only a rift standing between the Polyphage and you. Below it, the Red Tide roils and crashes to the sides of the cliff.
[Lamia]: Hmph... This is where I come in. After all, you wouldn\'t be able to pull this off...

Title: Floating Record - ZX916 → Stage 53 (Before Battle)
SummaryContent:
Dialogue excerpt:
[Lamia]: Tch... What a clingy bunch. Should\'ve loosened it up a bit.
[Lee]: Think again.
Lee catches a reflection of red light in his peripheral and instinctually leaps in your direction.
